papers.title: The Political Economy of Anti-Bribery Enforcement
papers.authors: Lauren Cohen, Bo Li
papers.abstract: This paper documents novel evidence on the influence of political incentives in the regulatory enforcement of foreign bribery. Using exogenous variation in the timing and geographic location of U.S. Congressional elections, we find that the probability of a Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) enforcement action against foreign firms located in the Senator’s jurisdiction increases significantly pre-election, spiking 23%, with zero equivalent move for equivalently global (but domestic-headquartered) firms in the Senator’s jurisdiction. Using hand-collected case-level data from the U.S. SEC and DOJ, we also observe larger discretion in regions where foreign firms are larger global competitors of in-state firms, operate in locally important industries, and when Senators serve as the Chairman of the Senate Judiciary Committee (which oversees the DOJ). Anti-bribery enforcement has electoral implications, leading to spikes in media coverage of the FCPA enforcement coupled with greater vote shares for the Senator. Moreover, the cases pushed through against these foreign firms just prior to elections appear to be weaker cases. The enforcements result in real effects, as in response to strategic timing in enforcement, firms reallocate business segments and sales.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI, LE, POL；JEL：F13, F14, F36, F53, F55, F65, G28, G38, K22, K33, K42
papers.zh_title: 反贿赂执法的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了政治激励对外国贿赂监管执法影响的新证据。利用美国国会选举时间和地理区位的外生变化，我们发现，针对参议员管辖区域内外国公司的《反海外腐败法》执法行动概率在选举前显著增加，峰值达到23%，而对同样全球运营但总部位于该参议员管辖区域内的本土公司则没有相应变化。利用从美国证券交易委员会和司法部手工收集的案件层面数据，我们还观察到，在外国公司是州内公司更大全球竞争对手、在地方重要行业运营以及参议员担任参议院司法委员会主席（该委员会监督司法部）的情况下，执法裁量权更大。反贿赂执法具有选举影响，导致媒体对《反海外腐败法》执法的报道激增，同时参议员获得的选票份额增加。此外，在选举前针对这些外国公司推进的案件似乎证据较弱。这些执法产生了实际影响，作为对执法时机策略的回应，公司重新调整了业务部门和销售布局。

papers.title: Using Bid Rotation and Incumbency to Detect Collusion: A Regression Discontinuity Approach
papers.authors: Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi, Juan M. Ortner, Sylvain Chassang
papers.abstract: Cartels participating in procurement auctions frequently use bid rotation or prioritize incumbents to allocate contracts. However, establishing a link between observed allocation patterns and firm conduct has been difficult: there are cost-based competitive explanations for such patterns. We show that by focusing on auctions in which the winning and losing bids are very close, it is possible to distinguish allocation patterns reflecting cost differences across firms from patterns reflecting non-competitive environments. We apply our tests to two datasets: the sample of Ohio milk auctions studied in Porter and Zona (1999), and a sample of municipal procurement auctions from Japan.
papers.zh_title: 利用投标轮换和现任优势检测合谋：一种断点回归方法
papers.zh_abstract: 参与采购拍卖的卡特尔经常使用投标轮换或优先考虑现任者来分配合同。然而，在观察到的分配模式与企业行为之间建立联系一直很困难：因为存在基于成本的竞争性解释可以说明此类模式。我们表明，通过关注胜出和失败投标非常接近的拍卖，可以区分反映企业间成本差异的分配模式与反映非竞争环境的分配模式。我们将我们的检验应用于两个数据集：Porter和Zona（1999）研究的俄亥俄州牛奶拍卖样本，以及来自日本的市政采购拍卖样本。

papers.title: Health Insurance for Whom? The ‘Spill-up’ Effects of Children’s Health Insurance on Mothers
papers.authors: Daniel S. Grossman, Sebastian Tello-Trillo, Barton Willage
papers.abstract: A rich literature documents the benefits of social safety net programs for children. This paper focuses on an unexplored margin: how children’s programs impact parents’ well-being. We explore changes in children’s public health insurance and its effects on parents’ economic and behavioral outcomes. Using a simulated eligibility for Medicaid eligibility expansions in the 1980s and 1990s, we isolate variation in children’s Medicaid eligibility due to changes in government policies. We find that increases in children’s Medicaid eligibility increases the likelihood a mother is married, decreases her labor market participation, and reduces her smoking and alcohol consumption. Our findings suggest improved maternal well-being as measured by the Center for Epidemiological Studies-Depression score, a proxy for mental health. These results uncover a new link that provides an important mechanism, parental well-being, for interpreting the literature’s findings on the long-term, short-term, and intergenerational effects of Medicaid coverage.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH；JEL：I1, I13, I14, I18, J10, J12, J18, J20, J21, J22
papers.zh_title: 为谁提供健康保险？儿童健康保险对母亲的“向上溢出”效应
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了社会安全网项目对儿童的益处。本文关注一个尚未被探索的方面：儿童项目如何影响父母的福祉。我们探讨了儿童公共健康保险的变化及其对父母经济和行为结果的影响。利用20世纪80年代和90年代医疗补助资格扩展的模拟资格，我们分离出因政府政策变化导致的儿童医疗补助资格变动。我们发现，儿童医疗补助资格的增加提高了母亲已婚的可能性，降低了她的劳动市场参与率，并减少了她的吸烟和饮酒行为。我们的研究结果表明，以流行病学研究中心抑郁量表得分（心理健康代理指标）衡量的母亲福祉有所改善。这些结果揭示了一个新的联系，为解释文献中关于医疗补助覆盖的长期、短期和代际效应的发现提供了重要机制——父母福祉。

papers.title: Two-Way Fixed Effects and Differences-in-Differences with Heterogeneous Treatment Effects: A Survey
papers.authors: Clément de Chaisemartin, Xavier D'Haultfoeuille
papers.abstract: Linear regressions with period and group fixed effects are widely used to estimate policies' effects: 26 of the 100 most cited papers published by the American Economic Review from 2015 to 2019 estimate such regressions. It has recently been show that those regressions may produce misleading estimates, if the policy's effect is heterogeneous between groups or over time, as is often the case. This survey reviews a fast-growing literature that documents this issue, and that proposes alternative estimators robust to heterogeneous effects.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, ED, EEE, EH, ITI, LS, PE, POL, TWP；JEL：C21, C23
papers.zh_title: 双向固定效应与异质性处理效应下的双重差分法：一项综述
papers.zh_abstract: 带有时期和组别固定效应的线性回归被广泛用于估计政策效果：在2015年至2019年《美国经济评论》发表的100篇被引次数最高的论文中，有26篇使用了此类回归。近期研究表明，如果政策效应在组间或时间上存在异质性（这通常是常见情况），这些回归可能会产生误导性估计。本综述回顾了快速增长的文献，这些文献记录了这一问题，并提出了对异质性效应具有稳健性的替代估计方法。

papers.title: Share Pledging in China: Funding Listed Firms or Funding Entrepreneurship?
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Bibo Liu, Feifei Zhu
papers.abstract: This paper studies the connection between share pledging and entrepreneurial activities in China, challenging the common wisdom that share pledging funds circle back to the listed firms. Share pledging funds are at the discretion of the shareholders who pledge their publicly traded shares, and survey evidence shows that a majority of the largest shareholders (67.3%) used pledging funds outside the listed firms. By linking firm registration data with share pledging data, we show a positive relation between shareholders’ pledging transactions and entrepreneurial activities. Utilizing the launch of the exchange market in 2013 as a quasi-natural experiment that favors share pledging by natural person shareholders against that by legal entity shareholders, our difference-in-differences (DiD) analysis shows natural person shareholders increased their entrepreneurial activities significantly in response to the policy shock, relative to legal entity shareholders. In addition to various robustness checks, we also show that shareholders with better access to share pledging invest more heavily in industries with above-median growth potential.
papers.zh_title: 中国的股权质押：为上市公司融资还是为创业融资？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中国股权质押与创业活动之间的联系，挑战了股权质押资金回流上市公司的普遍观点。股权质押资金由质押其公开交易股份的股东自行支配，调查证据显示大多数大股东（67.3%）将质押资金用于上市公司之外。通过将企业注册数据与股权质押数据关联，我们展示了股东质押交易与创业活动之间的正相关关系。利用2013年交易所市场启动作为有利于自然人股东相对于法人股东进行股权质押的准自然实验，我们的双重差分分析显示，相对于法人股东，自然人股东在政策冲击后显著增加了其创业活动。除各种稳健性检验外，我们还表明，股权质押渠道更便利的股东在增长潜力高于中位数的行业中投资更多。

papers.title: Conditional Cash Transfers for Education
papers.authors: Sandra García, Juan Saavedra
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews the extensive literature to date on CCTs for education. Section 2 provides background on the origins and expansion of CCTs globally, and describes basic design features and variation in characteristics across programs. Section 3 presents a theory of change and an economic household decision-making model highlighting key comparative statics and empirical predictions for the introduction of an education CCT program. Section 4 discusses key methodological challenges in evaluating the impacts of education CCTs. Section 5 integrates and updates the extensive evidence to date on the impacts of education CCTs on various outcome domains over the life cycle, and provides the most comprehensive view to date on learning impacts by meta-analyzing new evidence from more than 30 studies—substantially more than prior reviews of the literature. Section 6 reviews the evidence on indirect and general equilibrium effects. Section 7 presents a simple model of costs commonly used in the literature, which we extend to analyze cost-effectiveness for a subset of programs. Section 8 concludes and highlights open questions for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED；JEL：I28, I38, J24, O15, O38
papers.zh_title: 教育领域的有条件现金转移支付
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了迄今为止关于教育领域有条件现金转移支付（CCT）的广泛文献。第2节提供了CCT在全球的起源和扩展背景，并描述了基本设计特征和不同项目之间的特征差异。第3节提出了一个变革理论和一个经济家庭决策模型，强调了引入教育CCT项目的关键比较静态和实证预测。第4节讨论了评估教育CCT影响的关键方法论挑战。第5节整合并更新了迄今为止关于教育CCT在生命周期内对各种结果领域影响的广泛证据，并通过元分析来自30多项研究的新证据——远多于先前的文献综述——提供了迄今为止关于学习影响的最全面视角。第6节回顾了关于间接和一般均衡效应的证据。第7节提出了一个文献中常用的简单成本模型，我们将其扩展以分析一部分项目的成本效益。第8节进行总结并强调了未来研究的开放性问题。

papers.title: Unequal Expenditure Switching: Evidence from Switzerland
papers.authors: Raphael Auer, Ariel Burstein, Sarah M. Lein, Jonathan Vogel
papers.abstract: What are the unequal effects of changes in consumer prices on the cost of living? In the context of changes in import prices (driven by, e.g., changes in trade costs or exchange rates), most analyses focus on variation across households in initial expenditure shares on imported goods. However, the unequal welfare effects of non-marginal foreign price changes also depend on differences in how consumers substitute between imported and domestic goods, on which there is scant evidence. Using data from Switzerland surrounding the 2015 appreciation of the Swiss franc, we provide evidence that lower-income households have higher price elasticities. We quantify the contribution of heterogeneous elasticities for the unequal welfare effects of observed price changes between 2014–15 and for counterfactual shocks to the mean and dispersion of import price changes.
papers.zh_title: 不平等的支出转换：来自瑞士的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 消费者价格变化对生活成本的不平等影响是什么？在进口价格变化（由贸易成本或汇率变化等驱动）的背景下，大多数分析侧重于家庭在进口商品初始支出份额上的差异。然而，非边际性外国价格变化的不平等福利效应还取决于消费者在进口商品和国内商品之间替代方式的差异，而关于这一点的证据很少。利用瑞士在2015年瑞士法郎升值前后的数据，我们提供了低收入家庭具有更高价格弹性的证据。我们量化了异质性弹性对2014-15年间观察到的价格变化以及进口价格变化均值和离散度的反事实冲击的不平等福利效应的贡献。

papers.title: Reinforcing RCTs with Multiple Priors while Learning about External Validity
papers.authors: Frederico Finan, Demian Pouzo
papers.abstract: This paper presents a framework for how to incorporate prior sources of information into the design of a sequential experiment. These sources can include previous experiments, expert opinions, or the experimenter's own introspection. We formalize this problem using a multi-prior Bayesian approach that maps each source to a Bayesian model. These models are aggregated according to their associated posterior probabilities. We evaluate a broad of policy rules according to three criteria: whether the experimenter learns the parameters of the payoff distributions, the probability that the experimenter chooses the wrong treatment when deciding to stop the experiment, and the average rewards. We show that our framework exhibits several nice finite sample properties, including robustness to any source that is not externally valid.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, TWP；JEL：C11, C50, C90, O12
papers.zh_title: 在学习外部有效性的同时，用多重先验强化随机对照试验
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个框架，说明如何将先验信息源纳入序贯实验的设计中。这些信息源可以包括先前的实验、专家意见或实验者自身的反思。我们使用多先验贝叶斯方法形式化这个问题，将每个信息源映射到一个贝叶斯模型。这些模型根据其相关的后验概率进行聚合。我们根据三个标准评估一系列政策规则：实验者是否学习到收益分布的参数、实验者在决定停止实验时选择错误处理的概率以及平均收益。我们表明，我们的框架表现出几个良好的有限样本性质，包括对任何不具有外部有效性的信息源的稳健性。

papers.title: Information and Credible Sanctions in Curbing Online Cheating Among Undergraduates: a Field Experiment
papers.authors: Daniel L. Dench, Theodore J. Joyce
papers.abstract: The rapid increase in online instruction in higher education has heightened concerns about cheating. We use a randomized control design to test whether informing students that we can detect plagiarism reduces cheating. We further test whether informing students they have been caught cheating reduces subsequent cheating. We find informing students about our capability to detect plagiarism has little effect on cheating. Notifying students that they have been caught cheating and are on a watch list reduces subsequent cheating attempts by at least 65 percent depending on the class and sample. We test for peer effects but conclude we cannot credibly identify peer effects distinct from own-cheating propensities.
papers.zh_title: 信息与可信制裁在遏制大学生在线作弊中的作用：一项实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 高等教育中在线教学的迅速增加加剧了对作弊的担忧。我们使用随机对照设计来测试告知学生我们可以检测抄袭是否会减少作弊。我们进一步测试告知学生他们已被发现作弊是否会减少后续作弊。我们发现，告知学生我们有能力检测抄袭对作弊几乎没有影响。通知学生他们已被发现作弊并处于观察名单上，会根据班级和样本的不同，将后续作弊尝试减少至少65%。我们测试了同伴效应，但得出结论，我们无法可靠地将同伴效应与自身作弊倾向区分开来。

papers.title: Children and the US Social Safety Net: Balancing Disincentives for Adults and Benefits for Children
papers.authors: Anna Aizer, Hilary W. Hoynes, Adriana Lleras-Muney
papers.abstract: Economic research on the safety net has evolved significantly over time, moving away from a near exclusive focus on the negative incentive effects of means-tested assistance on employment, earnings, marriage and fertility to include examination of the potential positive benefits of such programs to children. Initially, this research on benefits to children focused on short run impacts, but as we accumulated knowledge about skill production and better data became available, the research evolved further to include important long run economic outcomes such as employment, earnings and mortality. Once the positive long-run benefits to children are considered, many safety net programs are cost-effective. However, the current government practice of limiting the time horizon for cost-benefit calculations of major policy initiatives reduces the influence of the most current economic research on the long run benefits. We conclude with a discussion of why the rate of child poverty in the US is still higher than most OECD countries and how research on children and the safety net can better inform policy-making going forward.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：I3, I32, I38, J12, J13, J24
papers.zh_title: 儿童与美国社会安全网：平衡对成年人的抑制激励与对儿童的益处
papers.zh_abstract: 关于安全网的经济研究随着时间的推移发生了显著演变，从几乎只关注基于经济状况调查的援助对就业、收入、婚姻和生育的负面激励效应，转向包括考察此类项目对儿童的潜在积极益处。最初，这项关于儿童益处的研究侧重于短期影响，但随着我们积累关于技能生产的知识并获得更好的数据，研究进一步演变，涵盖了重要的长期经济结果，如就业、收入和死亡率。一旦考虑到对儿童的积极长期益处，许多安全网项目就具有成本效益。然而，当前政府在主要政策举措的成本效益计算中限制时间跨度的做法，削弱了最新经济研究对长期益处的影响。最后，我们讨论了为什么美国的儿童贫困率仍然高于大多数经合组织国家，以及关于儿童和安全网的研究如何能更好地为未来的政策制定提供信息。

papers.title: Who Can Tell Which Banks Will Fail?
papers.authors: Kristian Blickle, Markus K. Brunnermeier, Stephan Luck
papers.abstract: We study the run on the German banking system in 1931 to understand whether depositors anticipate which banks will fail in a major financial crisis. We find that deposits decline by around 20% during the run. There is an equal outflow of retail and non-financial wholesale deposits from both failing and surviving banks. In contrast, we find that interbank deposits decline almost exclusively for failing banks. Our evidence suggests that banks are better informed about which fellow banks will fail. In turn, banks being informed allows the interbank market to continue providing liquidity even during times of severe financial distress.
papers.zh_title: 谁能预测哪些银行会倒闭？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1931年德国银行体系的挤兑事件，以了解储户是否能预测重大金融危机中哪些银行会倒闭。我们发现，在挤兑期间存款下降了约20%。零售存款和非金融批发存款从倒闭银行和幸存银行中流出的规模相当。相比之下，我们发现银行间存款几乎只从倒闭银行中流出。我们的证据表明，银行更了解哪些同行银行会倒闭。反过来，银行掌握信息使得银行间市场即使在严重金融困境时期也能继续提供流动性。

papers.title: Valuing the Time of the Self-Employed
papers.authors: Daniel J. Agness, Travis Baseler, Sylvain Chassang, Pascaline Dupas, Erik Snowberg
papers.abstract: People’s value for their own time is a key input in evaluating public policies: evaluations should account for time taken away from work or leisure as a result of policy. Using rich choice data collected from farming households in western Kenya, we show that households exhibit non-transitive preferences consistent with behavioral features such as loss aversion and self-serving bias. As a result, neither market wages nor standard valuation techniques (such as the Becker-DeGroot-Marschak—BDM—mechanism of Becker et al., 1964) correctly measure participants’ value of time. Using a structural model, we identify the mix of behavioral features driving our choice data. We find that these features distort choices when exchanging cash either for time or for goods. Our model estimates suggest that valuing the time of the self-employed at 60% of the market wage is a reasonable rule of thumb.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C93, D03, D61, D91, J22, O12, Q12
papers.zh_title: 评估自雇者的时间价值
papers.zh_abstract: 人们对自己时间的价值是评估公共政策的关键输入：评估应考虑政策导致从工作或休闲中占用的时间。利用从肯尼亚西部农户收集的丰富选择数据，我们表明家庭表现出非传递性偏好，这与损失厌恶和自利偏差等行为特征一致。因此，市场工资和标准估值技术（如Becker等人（1964）的Becker-DeGroot-Marschak机制）都无法正确衡量参与者对时间的价值。通过结构模型，我们识别了驱动选择数据的行为特征组合。我们发现这些特征在现金与时间或商品交换时会扭曲选择。我们的模型估计表明，将自雇者的时间价值定为市场工资的60%是一个合理的经验法则。

papers.title: The Rise of the Engineer: Inventing the Professional Inventor During the Industrial Revolution
papers.authors: W. Walker Hanlon
papers.abstract: Why was the Industrial Revolution successful at generating sustained growth? Some have argued that there was a fundamental change in the way that new technology was developed during this period, but evidence for this argument remains largely anecdotal. This paper provides direct quantitative evidence showing that how innovation and design work was done changed fundamentally during the Industrial Revolution. This change was characterized by the professionalization of innovation and design work through the emergence of the engineering profession. I also propose a theory describing how this change could have acted as one mechanism behind the transition to modern economic growth.
papers.zh_title: 工程师的崛起：工业革命期间专业发明家的诞生
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么工业革命能够成功实现持续增长？一些人认为，这一时期新技术开发方式发生了根本性变化，但这一观点的证据主要停留在轶事层面。本文提供了直接的定量证据，表明创新和设计工作的方式在工业革命期间发生了根本性变化。这一变化的特点是工程专业的出现，推动了创新和设计工作的专业化。我还提出了一种理论，描述这种变化如何成为向现代经济增长过渡的机制之一。

papers.title: Survey Experiments on Economic Expectations
papers.authors: Andreas Fuster, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: In this chapter, we discuss field experiments in surveys that are conducted with the purpose of learning about expectation formation and the link between expectations and behavior. We begin by reviewing the rationale for conducting experiments within surveys, rather than just relying on observational survey data. We then outline the most commonly used experimental paradigm, randomized information provision, along with some examples. Next, we outline a few methodological issues that are important to consider in the design of such experiments. We also provide a discussion of existing extensions of this paradigm, as well as of alternative approaches.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, ME, PE；JEL：C83, C93, D84
papers.zh_title: 关于经济预期的调查实验
papers.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我们讨论了在调查中进行的实地实验，其目的是了解预期形成以及预期与行为之间的联系。我们首先回顾了在调查中进行实验而非仅依赖观测性调查数据的理由。然后，我们概述了最常用的实验范式——随机信息提供，并附上一些例子。接下来，我们概述了在设计此类实验时需要考虑的几个方法论问题。我们还讨论了该范式的现有扩展以及替代方法。

papers.title: Assessing Misallocation in Agriculture: Plots versus Farms
papers.authors: Fernando M. Aragón, Diego Restuccia, Juan Pablo Rud
papers.abstract: We examine empirically whether the level of data aggregation affects the assessment of misallocation in agriculture. Using data from Ugandan farmers, we document a substantial discrepancy between misallocation measures calculated at the plot and at the farm levels. Estimates of misallocation at the plot level are much higher than those estimated with the same data but aggregated at the farm level. Even after accounting for measurement error and unobserved heterogeneity, estimates of misallocation at the plot level are extremely high, with nationwide agricultural productivity gains of 562%. Furthermore, we find suggestive evidence that granular data may be more susceptible to measurement error in survey data and that data aggregation can attenuate the relative magnitude of measurement error in misallocation measures. Our findings suggest caution in generalizing insights on measurement error and misallocation from plot-level analysis to those at the farm level.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PR；JEL：O11, O13, O4, O55, Q1
papers.zh_title: 评估农业中的错配：地块与农场
papers.zh_abstract: 我们实证检验了数据聚合水平是否影响农业错配的评估。利用乌干达农民的数据，我们记录了在地块层面和农场层面计算的错配指标之间存在显著差异。地块层面的错配估计值远高于使用相同数据但聚合到农场层面的估计值。即使考虑了测量误差和未观测到的异质性，地块层面的错配估计值仍然极高，全国农业生产力增益可达562%。此外，我们发现了暗示性证据，表明细粒度数据可能更容易受到调查数据中测量误差的影响，并且数据聚合可以减弱错配指标中测量误差的相对大小。我们的发现表明，在将关于测量误差和错配的见解从地块层面分析推广到农场层面时应谨慎。

papers.title: Racial Disparities in the Paycheck Protection Program
papers.authors: Sergey Chernenko, David S. Scharfstein
papers.abstract: Using a large sample of Florida restaurants, we document significant racial disparities in borrowing through the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) and investigate the causes of these disparities. Black-owned restaurants are 25% less likely to receive PPP loans. Restaurant location explains 5 percentage points of this differential. Restaurant characteristics explain an additional 10 percentage points of the gap in PPP borrowing. On average, prior borrowing relationships do not explain disparities. The remaining 10% disparity is driven by a 17% disparity in PPP borrowing from banks, which is partially offset by greater borrowing from nonbanks, largely fintechs. Disparities in PPP borrowing cannot be attributed to lower awareness of PPP loans or lower demand for PPP loans by minority-owned restaurants. Black-owned restaurants are significantly less likely to receive bank PPP loans in counties with more racial bias. In these counties, Black-owned restaurants are more likely to substitute to nonbank PPP loans. This substitution, however, is not strong enough to eliminate racial disparities in PPP borrowing. Finally, we show that our findings apply more broadly across industries in a sample of firms that were likely eligible for PPP.
papers.zh_title: 薪资保护计划中的种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 利用佛罗里达州餐厅的大样本，我们记录了通过薪资保护计划借款中存在显著的种族差异，并调查了这些差异的原因。黑人拥有的餐厅获得PPP贷款的可能性低25%。餐厅位置解释了这一差异中的5个百分点。餐厅特征进一步解释了PPP借款差距中的10个百分点。平均而言，先前的借贷关系不能解释这些差异。剩余的10%差异是由银行PPP借款中17%的差异驱动的，这部分被来自非银行（主要是金融科技公司）的更高借款部分抵消。PPP借款中的差异不能归因于少数族裔拥有的餐厅对PPP贷款的认识较低或需求较低。在种族偏见更多的县，黑人拥有的餐厅从银行获得PPP贷款的可能性显著更低。在这些县，黑人拥有的餐厅更有可能转向非银行PPP贷款。然而，这种替代不足以消除PPP借款中的种族差异。最后，我们表明，在可能符合PPP条件的公司样本中，我们的发现更广泛地适用于各个行业。

papers.title: The Information Content of Corporate Earnings: Evidence from the Securities Exchange Act of 1934
papers.authors: Oliver Binz, John Graham
papers.abstract: We examine whether the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 increased the information content of corporate earnings disclosures. Prior research questions whether the Act improved disclosure quality but generally relies on long-window tests and yields mixed results. We focus on whether the Act increased earnings informativeness, improving upon prior designs by focusing on short earnings announcement windows and employing a difference-in-differences design to control for potential contemporaneous structural changes. We document an increase in earnings informativeness following the Act, which is larger for treatment firms (which withheld disclosure before the Act) than for control firms. The increase in informativeness is more pronounced for firms that are subject to stronger enforcement.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE, POL；JEL：B26, G14, G18, K22, M41, M48
papers.zh_title: 公司盈利的信息含量：来自1934年证券交易法的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1934年证券交易法是否增加了公司盈利披露的信息含量。先前的研究质疑该法案是否提高了披露质量，但通常依赖于长窗口检验，结果不一。我们聚焦于该法案是否增加了盈利信息含量，通过关注短盈利公告窗口并采用双重差分设计来控制潜在的同期结构性变化，改进了先前的研究设计。我们记录了该法案后盈利信息含量的增加，对于处理组公司（在该法案前未披露信息）而言，这一增加大于对照组公司。信息含量的增加在面临更强执法的公司中更为显著。

papers.title: Corporate Flexibility in a Time of Crisis
papers.authors: John W. Barry, Murillo Campello, John Graham, Yueran Ma
papers.abstract: We use the COVID shock to study the direct and interactive effects of several forms of corporate flexibility on short- and long-term real business plans. We find that i) workplace flexibility, namely the ability for employees to work remotely, plays a central role in determining firms’ employment plans during the health crisis; ii) investment flexibility allows firms to increase or decrease capital spending based on their business prospects in the crisis, with effects shaped by workplace flexibility; and iii) financial flexibility contributes to stronger employment and investment, in particular when fixed costs are high. While the role of workplace flexibility is new to the COVID crisis, CFOs expect lasting effects for years to come: high workplace flexibility firms foresee continuation of remote work, stronger employment recovery, and shifting away from traditional capital investment, whereas low workplace flexibility firms rely more on automation to replace labor.
papers.zh_title: 危机时期的企业灵活性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用COVID冲击来研究几种企业灵活性形式对短期和长期实际商业计划的直接和交互效应。我们发现：i) 工作场所灵活性，即员工远程工作的能力，在健康危机期间决定企业就业计划中起着核心作用；ii) 投资灵活性使企业能够根据危机中的业务前景增加或减少资本支出，其效应受工作场所灵活性的影响；iii) 财务灵活性有助于增强就业和投资，特别是在固定成本较高时。虽然工作场所灵活性的角色在COVID危机中是新的，但首席财务官预计其影响将持续多年：高工作场所灵活性的企业预计远程工作将持续、就业复苏更强，并转向传统资本投资；而低工作场所灵活性的企业则更依赖自动化来替代劳动力。

papers.title: Land Speculation and Wobbly Dynamics with Endogenous Phase Transitions
papers.authors: Tomohiro Hirano, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: This paper examines the global macro-dynamics of an OLG model with capital and land with rational expectations. Through the interactions between capital accumulation and land prices, the economy experiences phase transitions, endogenously moving back and forth from situations with unique and multiple momentary equilibria. Consequently, there can be a plethora of rational expectation equilibria trajectories, without any smooth convergence properties, neither converging to a steady state or even to a limit cycle—what we call “wobbly” macro-dynamics. The price of land and other key macro variables (wages, interest rates, output, consumption, wealth, capital stock) endogenously fluctuate within a well-identified range with repeated boom-bust cycles. The key disturbance to the economy is endogenous; even with rational expectations, there can be real estate booms, with increasing land prices increasingly crowding out productive investments; but such unsustainable land price booms inevitably are followed by a crash. We analyze the set of parameter values for which wobbly fluctuations occur, show that with some parameter values, the only r.e. trajectories involve such wobbly dynamics, demonstrate how changes in parameters affect global macro-dynamics, and show how policy interventions can affect stability and social welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：C61, E22, E32, G12, G18, H21, O11
papers.zh_title: 土地投机与内生相变下的摇摆动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一个包含资本和土地且具有理性预期的世代交叠模型的全球宏观动态。通过资本积累与土地价格之间的相互作用，经济会经历相变，在具有唯一和多重瞬时均衡的情形之间内生地来回移动。因此，可能存在大量理性预期均衡轨迹，这些轨迹不具有任何平滑收敛性质，既不会收敛到稳态，甚至不会收敛到极限周期——我们称之为“摇摆”宏观动态。土地价格和其他关键宏观变量（工资、利率、产出、消费、财富、资本存量）在一个明确界定的范围内内生地波动，并伴随反复的繁荣-萧条周期。对经济的主要扰动是内生的；即使存在理性预期，也可能出现房地产繁荣，土地价格不断上涨日益挤出生产性投资；但这种不可持续的土地价格繁荣不可避免地会紧随一场崩盘。我们分析了发生摇摆波动的参数值集合，表明在某些参数值下，唯一的理性预期轨迹就涉及这种摇摆动态，展示了参数变化如何影响全球宏观动态，并说明了政策干预如何影响稳定性和社会福利。

papers.title: The Value of Arbitrage
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Daniel D. Graves, Cecilia Parlatore
papers.abstract: This paper studies the social value of closing price differentials in financial markets. We show that arbitrage gaps (price differentials between markets) exactly correspond to the marginal social value of executing an arbitrage trade. We further show that arbitrage gaps and measures of price impact are sufficient to compute the total social value from closing an arbitrage gap. Theoretically, we show that, for a given arbitrage gap, the total social value of arbitrage is higher in more liquid markets. We apply our framework to compute the welfare gains from closing arbitrage gaps in the context of covered interest parity violations and several dual-listed companies. The estimates of the value of closing arbitrage gaps vary substantially across applications.
papers.zh_title: 套利的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了消除金融市场价差的社会价值。我们证明，套利缺口（市场间的价格差异）恰好对应于执行一笔套利交易的社会边际价值。我们进一步证明，套利缺口和价格冲击的度量足以计算消除套利缺口所产生的总社会价值。理论上，我们表明，对于给定的套利缺口，在流动性更强的市场中，套利的总社会价值更高。我们应用我们的框架，在覆盖利率平价违背和几家双重上市公司的背景下，计算了消除套利缺口的福利收益。消除套利缺口价值的估计值在不同应用中差异很大。

papers.title: Local Journalism under Private Equity Ownership
papers.authors: Michael Ewens, Arpit Gupta, Sabrina T. Howell
papers.abstract: Local daily newspapers historically played an important role in U.S. democracy by providing citizens with information about local policy issues. In recent decades, local newspapers have struggled to compete with new online platforms. In the first study of private equity (PE) in a struggling industry, we find nuanced effects. PE leads to higher digital circulation and lower chances of newspaper exit. However, the composition of news shifts away from local governance, the number of reporters and editors falls, and participation in local elections declines. The results have implications for knowledge about local policy issues and highlight trade-offs surrounding media ownership.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G23, G32, H42, L82
papers.zh_title: 私募股权所有权下的地方新闻业
papers.zh_abstract: 地方日报历来通过向公民提供地方政策问题的信息，在美国民主中发挥着重要作用。近几十年来，地方报纸一直在努力与新的在线平台竞争。在对一个陷入困境的行业中私募股权的首次研究中，我们发现了细微的影响。私募股权导致数字发行量增加，报纸退出的可能性降低。然而，新闻的构成从地方治理转向，记者和编辑的数量下降，地方选举的参与率也下降。这些结果对了解地方政策问题具有启示意义，并凸显了围绕媒体所有权的权衡。

papers.title: A Bridge to Graduation: Post-Secondary Effects of an Alternative Pathway for Students Who Fail High School Exit Exams
papers.authors: Jane Arnold Lincove, Catherine Mata, Kalena Cortes
papers.abstract: High school exit exams are meant to standardize the quality of public high schools and to ensure that students graduate with a set of basic skills and knowledge. Evidence suggests that a common perverse effect of exit exams is an increase in dropout for students who have difficulty passing tests, with a larger effect on minority students. To mitigate this, some states offer alternative, non-tested pathways to graduation for students who have failed their exit exams. This study investigates the post-secondary effects of an alternative high school graduation program. Among students who initially fail an exit exam, those who eventually graduate through an alternative project-based pathway have lower college enrollment, but similar employment outcomes to students who graduate by retaking and passing their exit exams. Compared to similar students who fail to complete high school, those students who take the alternative pathway have better post-secondary outcomes in both education and employment.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I2, I21, I24, I26, J01, J18
papers.zh_title: 通往毕业的桥梁：高中毕业考试不及格学生替代路径的高等教育后效应
papers.zh_abstract: 高中毕业考试旨在规范公立高中的质量，并确保学生毕业时掌握一套基本技能和知识。有证据表明，毕业考试的一个常见负面效应是增加了考试困难学生的辍学率，对少数族裔学生的影响更大。为了缓解这一问题，一些州为毕业考试不及格的学生提供了替代性的、非考试的毕业途径。本研究调查了一个替代性高中毕业项目的高等教育后效应。在最初毕业考试不及格的学生中，那些最终通过替代性项目路径毕业的学生，其大学入学率较低，但就业结果与通过重考并通过毕业考试的学生相似。与未能完成高中学业的类似学生相比，那些选择替代路径的学生在教育和就业方面都有更好的高等教育后结果。

papers.title: From Anti-vax Intentions to Vaccination: Panel and Experimental Evidence from Nine Countries
papers.authors: Vincenzo Galasso, Vincent Pons, Paola Profeta, Michael Becher, Sylvain Brouard, Martial Foucault
papers.abstract: Millions of people refuse COVID-19 vaccination. Using original data from two surveys in nine OECD countries, we analyze the determinants of anti-vax intentions in December 2020 and show that half of the anti-vax individuals were vaccinated by summer 2021. Vaccinations were more likely among individuals aged 50+, exposed to COVID-19, compliant with public restrictions, more informed on traditional media, trusting scientists, and less concerned about vaccines’ side effects. We run a survey experiment with informational messages. In EU countries, a message about protecting health largely increases vaccinations, even among anti-vax individuals. In the U.K. and U.S., a message about protecting the economy generates similar effects. Our findings suggest that informational campaigns should adopt adequate narratives and address concerns about vaccines’ side effects.
papers.zh_title: 从反疫苗意图到疫苗接种：来自九个国家的面板与实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 数百万人拒绝接种新冠疫苗。利用来自九个经合组织国家两项调查的原始数据，我们分析了2020年12月反疫苗意图的决定因素，并表明到2021年夏季，一半的反疫苗个体已接种疫苗。接种疫苗更可能发生在50岁以上、曾接触过新冠、遵守公共限制、更多从传统媒体获取信息、信任科学家以及对疫苗副作用担忧较少的个体中。我们进行了一项包含信息性信息的调查实验。在欧盟国家，关于保护健康的信息在很大程度上增加了疫苗接种，即使在反疫苗个体中也是如此。在英国和美国，关于保护经济的信息产生了类似的效果。我们的研究结果表明，信息宣传活动应采用适当的叙事方式，并解决对疫苗副作用的担忧。

papers.title: Environmental Liabilities, Borrowing Costs, and Pollution Prevention Activities: The Nationwide Impact of the Apex Oil Ruling
papers.authors: Jianqiang Chen, Pei-Fang Hsieh, Po-Hsuan Hsu, Ross Levine
papers.abstract: The 2008 Apex Oil court decision reduced the circumstances under which specific environmental clean-up obligations were dischargeable in Chapter 11, potentially affecting the securities prices, credit conditions, and pollution practices of corporations not in Chapter 11. We discover that among financially stressed firms with those specific environmental liabilities, bond and stock prices dropped after Apex. Moreover, those firms (1) experienced a tightening of credit conditions (e.g., paying higher risk premia on debts and receiving lower bond ratings), (2) intensified pollution prevention activities, and (3) reduced the emissions of pollutants causing environmental damages no longer dischargeable in Chapter 11. These findings hold among firms nationwide, not only those within the jurisdiction of the Seventh Circuit court, which issued the Apex decision, suggesting that Apex had a nationwide impact.
papers.zh_title: 环境负债、借贷成本与污染预防活动：Apex Oil裁决的全国性影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2008年的Apex Oil法院裁决缩小了特定环境清理义务在《破产法》第11章中可被免除的情形，这可能影响未进入第11章程序的公司的证券价格、信贷条件和污染行为。我们发现，在那些负有这些特定环境负债的财务压力公司中，债券和股票价格在Apex裁决后下跌。此外，这些公司（1）经历了信贷条件的收紧（例如，为债务支付更高的风险溢价并获得较低的债券评级），（2）加强了污染预防活动，以及（3）减少了导致环境损害且不再能在第11章中免除的污染物的排放。这些发现在全国范围内的公司中都成立，而不仅仅是在发布Apex裁决的第七巡回法院管辖区域内，这表明Apex裁决具有全国性影响。

papers.title: How Tight are U.S. Labor Markets?
papers.authors: Alex Domash, Lawrence H. Summers
papers.abstract: Since the outset of the Covid-19 pandemic, labor market indicators that traditionally move together have been sending different signals about the degree of slack in the U.S. labor market. While some indicators on the supply-side, such as the prime-age employment-to-population ratio, suggest that there is still some slack in the labor market, other indicators on the demand-side, such as the job vacancy rate and the quits rate, imply that the labor market is already very tight. In light of these divergent signals, this paper compares alternative labor market indicators as predictors of wage inflation. Using national time series and state cross-section data, we find (i) unemployment is a better predictor of wage inflation than non-employment and (ii) vacancy rates and quit rates have substantial predictive power for wage inflation. We highlight the fact that vacancy and quit rates currently experienced in the United States correspond to a degree of labor market tightness previously associated with sub-2 percent unemployment rates. Finally, we show that predicted firm-side unemployment has dominant explanatory power with respect to subsequent inflation. Our results, along with a cursory analysis of labor force participation information, suggest that labor market tightness is likely to contribute significantly to inflationary pressure in the United States for some time to come.
papers.zh_title: 美国劳动力市场有多紧张？
papers.zh_abstract: 自新冠疫情爆发以来，传统上同步变动的劳动力市场指标对美国劳动力市场松弛程度的发出了不同信号。虽然一些供给侧指标（如壮年就业人口比）表明劳动力市场仍存在一些松弛，但其他需求侧指标（如职位空缺率和离职率）则暗示劳动力市场已经非常紧张。鉴于这些分歧的信号，本文比较了不同劳动力市场指标作为工资通胀预测指标的表现。利用全国时间序列和州截面数据，我们发现（i）失业率比非就业率更能预测工资通胀，（ii）职位空缺率和离职率对工资通胀具有显著的预测能力。我们强调，美国目前经历的职位空缺率和离职率对应于此前与低于2%的失业率相关的劳动力市场紧张程度。最后，我们表明，预测的企业侧失业率对随后的通胀具有主导性的解释力。我们的结果，连同对劳动力参与率信息的初步分析，表明劳动力市场紧张很可能在未来一段时间内显著加剧美国的通胀压力。

papers.title: Minority Underrepresentation in U.S. Cities
papers.authors: Federico Ricca, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the patterns of Minority representation and voter registration in U.S. municipal governments. For the period 1981-2020, we report substantial levels of strategic underrepresentation of African American, Asian, and Latino voters in U.S. local politics. Disproportionality in the representation and in voter registration rates of Minority groups are widespread, but stronger when racial or ethnic minorities are electorally pivotal. Underrepresentation is determined by the combination of several endogenous institutional features, starting from systematic disparity in voter registration, strategic selection of electoral rules, city’s form of government, council size, and pay of elected members of the council. We provide causal evidence of the strategic use of local political institutions in reducing electoral representation of minorities based on the U.S. Supreme Court narrow decision of Shelby County v. Holder (2013), which deemed unconstitutional Voting Rights Act (VRA) Section 4(b), removing federal preclearance requirements for a specific subset of U.S. jurisdictions.
papers.zh_title: 美国城市中的少数族裔代表性不足
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国市镇政府中少数族裔代表性和选民登记的格局。在1981-2020年期间，我们报告了美国地方政治中非裔美国人、亚裔和拉丁裔选民存在显著的战略性代表性不足。少数族裔群体在代表性和选民登记率方面的不成比例现象普遍存在，但在种族或族裔少数群体在选举中具有关键作用时更为严重。代表性不足是由若干内生制度特征共同决定的，首先是选民登记的系统性差异、选举规则的战略性选择、城市政府形式、议会规模以及当选议员的薪酬。我们基于美国最高法院对Shelby County v. Holder案（2013年）的窄幅裁决，提供了地方政治机构被战略性地用于减少少数族裔选举代表性的因果证据，该裁决宣布《投票权法》第4(b)条违宪，取消了对特定美国司法管辖区的联邦预先批准要求。

papers.title: Reconciling Trends in U.S. Male Earnings Volatility: Results from Survey and Administrative Data
papers.authors: Robert A. Moffitt, John M. Abowd, Christopher R. Bollinger, Michael D. Carr, Charles M. Hokayem, Kevin L. McKinney, Emily E. Wiemers, Sisi Zhang, James P. Ziliak
papers.abstract: One strand of the literature in labor economics, household finance, and macroeconomics has studied whether individual earnings volatility has risen or fallen in the U.S. over the last several decades. There are disagreements in the empirical literature on this question, with some suggestions that the differences are the result of using flawed survey data instead of more accurate administrative data. This paper summarizes the results of a project to reconcile these findings with four different data sets and six different data series--three survey and three administrative data series, including two which match survey respondent data to their administrative data. Four of the six series show no significant trend in male earnings volatility over the last 20-to-30+ years when differences across the data sets are properly accounted for. A fifth shows a positive net trend but small in magnitude. A sixth shows no net trend 1998-2011 and only a small decline thereafter. The remaining differences across data series can be largely explained by differences in the left tail of their cross-sectional earnings distributions. We conclude that the data sets we have analyzed show little evidence of any significant trend in male earnings volatility since the mid-1980s.
papers.zh_title: 调和美国男性收入波动趋势：基于调查与行政数据的结果
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动经济学、家庭金融和宏观经济学领域的一支文献研究了美国过去几十年中个人收入波动是上升还是下降。实证文献对此问题存在分歧，部分观点认为差异源于使用有缺陷的调查数据而非更准确的行政数据。本文总结了一项调和这些发现的项目结果，该项目使用了四个不同数据集和六个不同数据序列——三个调查数据序列和三个行政数据序列，其中两个将调查受访者数据与其行政数据匹配。在适当考虑数据集间差异后，六个序列中有四个显示过去20至30多年间男性收入波动无显著趋势。第五个序列显示正向净趋势但幅度较小。第六个序列显示1998-2011年无净趋势，此后仅小幅下降。数据序列间剩余的差异主要可由其横截面收入分布左尾的差异解释。我们得出结论，我们分析的数据集几乎未显示自1980年代中期以来男性收入波动存在任何显著趋势的证据。

papers.title: The Unemployment-Inflation Trade-off Revisited: The Phillips Curve in COVID Times
papers.authors: Richard K. Crump, Stefano Eusepi, Marc Giannoni, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: Using a New Keynesian Phillips curve, we document the rapid and persistent increase in the natural rate of unemployment, u*ₜ, in the aftermath of the pandemic and characterize its implications for inflation dynamics. While the bulk of the inflation surge is attributed to temporary supply factors, we also find an important role for current and expected negative unemployment gaps. Through the lens of the model, the 2022–2023 disinflation was driven by the expectation that the unemployment gap will close through a progressive decline in u*ₜ and a rise in the unemployment rate. This implies that convergence to long-run price stability depends critically on expectations about labor market tightness. Using a variety of cross-sectional data sources we provide corroborating evidence of unusually tight labor market conditions, consistent with our estimated rise in u*ₜ.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D84, E24, E31, E32, J11, J3
papers.zh_title: 失业与通胀权衡再审视：新冠疫情时期的菲利普斯曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 利用新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线，我们记录了疫情后自然失业率u*ₜ的快速且持续上升，并刻画了其对通胀动态的影响。虽然通胀飙升主要归因于暂时性供给因素，但我们发现当前和预期的负失业缺口也发挥了重要作用。根据模型视角，2022-2023年的通胀下降是由以下预期驱动的：失业缺口将通过u*ₜ的逐步下降和失业率的上升而闭合。这意味着向长期价格稳定的收敛关键取决于对劳动力市场紧张程度的预期。利用多种横截面数据来源，我们提供了劳动力市场异常紧张的佐证证据，这与我们估计的u*ₜ上升相一致。

papers.title: Has the Willingness to Work Fallen during the Covid Pandemic?
papers.authors: R. Jason Faberman, Andreas I. Mueller, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of the Covid pandemic on willingness to work along both the extensive and intensive margins of labor supply. Special survey questions in the Job Search Supplement of the Survey of Consumer Expectations (SCE) allow us to elicit information about individuals’ desired work hours for the 2013-2021 period. Using these questions, along with workers’ actual labor market participation, we construct a labor market underutilization measure, the Aggregate Hours Gap (AHG), following Faberman et al. (2020). The AHG captures changes in labor market underutilization for the full population along both the extensive and intensive margins using data on desired work hours as a measure of their potential labor supply. We find that the sharp increase in the AHG during the Covid pandemic essentially disappeared by the end of 2021. We also document a sharp decline in desired work hours during the pandemic that persists through the end of 2021 and is roughly double the drop in the labor force participation rate. Ignoring the decline in desired hours overstates the degree of underutilization by 2.5 percentage points (12.5%). Our findings suggest that, as of 2021Q4, the labor market is tighter than suggested by the unemployment rate and the adverse labor supply effect of the pandemic is more pronounced than implied by the labor force participation rate. These discrepancies underscore the importance of taking into account the intensive margin for both labor market underutilization and potential labor supply.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间工作意愿是否下降？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了新冠疫情对劳动力供给广延边际和集约边际上工作意愿的影响。消费者预期调查（SCE）求职补充问卷中的特殊问题使我们能够获取2013-2021年期间个人期望工作小时数的信息。利用这些问题以及工人的实际劳动力市场参与情况，我们按照Faberman等人（2020）的方法构建了一个劳动力市场利用不足指标——总工时缺口（AHG）。AHG利用期望工作小时数作为潜在劳动力供给的度量，捕捉了全体人口在广延边际和集约边际上劳动力市场利用不足的变化。我们发现，新冠疫情期间AHG的急剧上升到2021年底基本消失。我们还记录了疫情期间期望工作小时数的急剧下降，这种下降持续到2021年底，并且大约是劳动力参与率下降幅度的两倍。忽略期望工作小时数的下降会使利用不足程度被高估2.5个百分点（12.5%）。我们的研究结果表明，截至2021年第四季度，劳动力市场比失业率所暗示的更为紧张，而疫情对劳动力供给的不利影响比劳动力参与率所暗示的更为显著。这些差异凸显了在考虑劳动力市场利用不足和潜在劳动力供给时，纳入集约边际的重要性。

papers.title: What Determines Effectiveness of Renewable Energy Standards? General Equilibrium Analytical Model and Empirical Analysis
papers.authors: Don Fullerton, Chi L. Ta
papers.abstract: Our new analytical general equilibrium model is used to study effects of tightening state Renewable Portfolio Standards (RPS) on electricity price, CO2 emissions, fossil fuel electricity generation, and two kinds of renewable generation. We show how those outcomes depend on key state characteristics such as endowments of potential intermittent and non-intermittent (“dispatchable”) renewable sources and the degree of intermittency. Our three extensions investigate key assumptions. We prove theorems and derive empirical hypotheses about what state characteristics makes RPS programs more effective. Using U.S. state-level data from 1990 to 2015, we find the data are consistent with these hypotheses.
papers.zh_title: 什么决定了可再生能源标准的有效性？一般均衡分析模型与实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用新的分析性一般均衡模型，研究各州收紧可再生能源组合标准（RPS）对电价、二氧化碳排放、化石燃料发电以及两种可再生能源发电的影响。我们展示了这些结果如何取决于关键州特征，例如潜在间歇性和非间歇性（“可调度”）可再生资源的禀赋以及间歇性程度。我们的三个扩展部分研究了关键假设。我们证明了定理并推导出关于哪些州特征使RPS计划更有效的实证假设。利用1990年至2015年美国州级数据，我们发现数据与这些假设一致。

papers.title: Human Capital Reallocation Across Firms: Evidence from Idiosyncratic Shocks
papers.authors: Erik P. Gilje, Jérôme P. Taillard, Linghang Zeng
papers.abstract: We study human capital reallocation following firm-specific idiosyncratic shocks. Theory offers diverging predictions as to whether human capital gets reallocated to its most productive use following these shocks. To empirically test these predictions, we focus on relegation battles in the English Premier League. This setting offers well identified idiosyncratic shocks as well as both individual-level and firm-level productivity metrics. We find that human capital exits firms after a negative idiosyncratic shock. Specifically, we find that more productive players move to more productive clubs and maintain their long-term productivity. They get replaced with lower productivity players. Overall, our results show that in a setting with highly transferable skills, idiosyncratic shocks lead to a reallocation of human capital that moves an industry towards a better overall match between individual-level and firm-level productivity.
papers.zh_title: 跨企业的人力资本重新配置：来自特质性冲击的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业特定特质性冲击后的人力资本重新配置。关于人力资本在经历这些冲击后是否会重新配置到其最具生产力的用途，理论给出了不同的预测。为了实证检验这些预测，我们聚焦于英格兰足球超级联赛的保级战。这一设定提供了识别良好的特质性冲击，以及个人层面和企业层面的生产力指标。我们发现，在经历负面特质性冲击后，人力资本会离开企业。具体而言，我们发现生产力更高的球员会转会到生产力更高的俱乐部，并保持其长期生产力。他们被生产力较低的球员所取代。总体而言，我们的结果表明，在一个技能高度可转移的环境中，特质性冲击会导致人力资本重新配置，使行业朝着个人层面和企业层面生产力之间整体更优匹配的方向发展。

papers.title: Integrating Refugees by Addressing Labor Shortages? A Policy Evaluation
papers.authors: Mette Foged, Janis Kreuder, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effect on newly arrived refugees' employment of a policy, introduced in Denmark in 2013, that matched refugees to occupations with local labor shortages after basic training for those jobs. Leveraging the staggered roll-out across municipalities, we find that the policy increased employment by 5-6 percentage points one year after arrival and 10 percentage points two years after. The policy was especially effective for male refugees and refugees with some secondary education. The findings suggest that this type of policy could alleviate long-term labor shortages and integrate low-skilled immigrants, while having minimal competition effects on natives.
papers.zh_title: 通过解决劳动力短缺来融合难民？一项政策评估
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一项于2013年在丹麦引入的政策对新抵达难民就业的影响，该政策在难民接受基本职业培训后，将其与存在当地劳动力短缺的职业进行匹配。利用各市镇分阶段推广的情况，我们发现该政策在难民抵达一年后使就业率提高了5-6个百分点，两年后提高了10个百分点。该政策对男性难民和接受过一定中等教育的难民尤其有效。研究结果表明，这类政策可以缓解长期劳动力短缺并融合低技能移民，同时对本地人的竞争效应最小。

papers.title: A Solomonic Solution to Ownership Disputes: An Application to Blockchain Front-Running
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans, Richard T. Holden
papers.abstract: Blockchain front-running involves multiple agents, other than the legitimate agent, claiming a payment from performing a contract. It arises because of the public nature of blockchain transactions and potential network congestion. This paper notes that disputes over payments are similar to classic ownership disputes (such as King Solomon's dilemma). We propose a simultaneous report mechanism that resolves Solomon's dilemma (using only ordinal preference information) and also eliminates blockchain front-running. In each case, the mechanism relies on threats to remove ownership from all claimants and preferences from the legitimate claimant over allocations to other agents.
papers.zh_title: 解决所有权争议的所罗门式方案：应用于区块链抢先交易
papers.zh_abstract: 区块链抢先交易涉及除合法代理人之外的多个代理人，声称有权从执行合约中获得付款。它源于区块链交易的公开性质和潜在的网络拥堵。本文指出，付款争议类似于经典的所有权争议（如所罗门王的困境）。我们提出一个同时报告机制，该机制解决了所罗门困境（仅使用序数偏好信息），同时也消除了区块链抢先交易。在每种情况下，该机制依赖于威胁：剥夺所有索赔人的所有权，以及合法索赔人对其他代理人分配的偏好。

papers.title: Gifted Children Programs’ Short and Long-Term Impact: Higher Education, Earnings, and the Knowledge Economy
papers.authors: Yoav Goldstein, Victor Lavy, Genia Rachkovski
papers.abstract: This paper examines the short- and long-term consequences of participation in high school Gifted Children Programs (GCPs). Using administrative data that follow individuals from primary school to adulthood, we find that while these programs have negligible effects on high school academic achievement, they substantially influence university trajectories. Specifically, GCP participation shifts the choice of field of study, increases the incidence of double majors, and increases the probability of attaining advanced degrees. Interestingly, we find no effect on earnings or employment—either overall or within knowledge-based sectors—indicating that the high baseline productivity gifted children possess is not further enhanced by program participation. However, we find that GCP participation positively affects spouse “quality” and significantly increases the likelihood of working with fellow GCP peers, suggesting that the program has important long-run effects on the social connections of gifted students. We discuss potential mechanisms within the context of psychological theories of giftedness.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：J01, J24
papers.zh_title: 天才儿童项目的短期与长期影响：高等教育、收入与知识经济
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了参与高中天才儿童项目（GCP）的短期和长期后果。利用从小学到成年期追踪个体的行政数据，我们发现虽然这些项目对高中学业成绩的影响微乎其微，但它们显著影响了大学轨迹。具体而言，参与GCP改变了专业选择方向，增加了双专业的发生率，并提高了获得高等学位的概率。有趣的是，我们发现对收入或就业（无论是在知识型部门内还是总体上）没有影响，这表明天才儿童已有的高基线生产力并未因项目参与而进一步增强。然而，我们发现参与GCP对配偶“质量”有积极影响，并显著增加了与GCP同伴共事的可能性，这表明该项目对天才学生的社会关系具有重要的长期影响。我们在天才心理理论的背景下讨论了潜在机制。

papers.title: Gaps Between Official and Excess Covid-19 Mortality Measures: The Effects of Institutional Quality and Vaccinations
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Alex Cukierman, Yothin Jinjarak, Sameer Nair-Desai, Weining Xin
papers.abstract: We evaluate quartile rankings of countries during the Covid-19 pandemic using both official (confirmed) and excess mortality data. By December 2021, the quartile rankings of three-fifths of the countries differ when ranked by excess vs. official mortality. Countries that are ‘doing substantially better’ in the excess mortality are characterized by higher urban population shares; higher GDP/Capita; and higher scores on institutional and policy variables. We perform two regressions in which the ratio of Cumulative Excess to Official Covid-19 mortalities (E/O ratio) is regressed on covariates. In a narrow study, controlling for GDP/Capita and vaccination rates, by December 2021 the E/O ratio was smaller in countries with higher vaccination rates. In a broad study, adding institutional and policy variables, the E/O ratio was smaller in countries with higher degree of voice and accountability. The arrival of vaccines in 2021 and voice and accountability had a discernible association on the E/O ratio.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IFM；JEL：F5, F6, H12, H84, I18
papers.zh_title: 官方与超额新冠死亡率指标之间的差距：制度质量与疫苗接种的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用官方（确诊）和超额死亡率数据评估了新冠疫情期间国家的四分位数排名。截至2021年12月，按超额死亡率与官方死亡率排名时，五分之三国家的四分位数排名存在差异。在超额死亡率方面“表现明显更好”的国家，其特点是城市人口比例更高；人均GDP更高；以及制度和政策变量得分更高。我们进行了两次回归，将累计超额死亡率与官方新冠死亡率的比率（E/O比率）对协变量进行回归。在一项狭义研究中，控制人均GDP和疫苗接种率后，截至2021年12月，疫苗接种率较高的国家E/O比率较小。在一项广义研究中，加入制度和政策变量后，发言权和问责制程度较高的国家E/O比率较小。2021年疫苗的到来以及发言权和问责制与E/O比率存在可辨别的关联。

papers.title: Exorbitant Privilege? Quantitative Easing and the Bond Market Subsidy of Prospective Fallen Angels
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Ryan Banerjee, Matteo Crosignani, Tim Eisert, Renée Spigt
papers.abstract: We document capital misallocation in the U.S. investment-grade (IG) corporate bond market, driven by quantitative easing (QE). Prospective fallen angels—risky firms just above the IG cutoff—enjoyed subsidized bond financing in 2009-19. This effect is driven by prolonged cumulative Fed purchases of securities inducing long-duration IG-focused investors to rebalance their portfolios towards higher-yielding IG bonds. The benefiting firms (i) exploited the sluggish downward adjustment of credit ratings after M&A to finance risky acquisitions with bond issuances, (ii) increased market share affecting competitors' employment and investment, but (iii) suffered severe downgrades at the onset of the pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ME；JEL：E44, E52, E58, G01, G20
papers.zh_title: 过高特权？量化宽松与准堕落天使的债券市场补贴
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了美国投资级公司债券市场中由量化宽松驱动的资本错配。在2009-2019年间，准堕落天使——即刚好高于投资级门槛的风险企业——享受了补贴性的债券融资。这一效应源于美联储长期累积的证券购买，促使专注于长期投资级债券的投资者将其投资组合重新平衡至收益率更高的投资级债券。受益企业（i）利用并购后信用评级调整缓慢的特点，通过发行债券为风险收购融资；（ii）通过增加市场份额影响竞争对手的就业和投资；但（iii）在疫情爆发时遭受了严重的评级下调。

papers.title: Dampening General Equilibrium: Incomplete Information and Bounded Rationality
papers.authors: George-Marios Angeletos, Chen Lian
papers.abstract: We review how realistic frictions in information and/or rationality arrest general equilibrium (GE) feedbacks. In one specification, we maintain rational expectations but remove common knowledge of aggregate shocks. In another, we replace rational expectations with Level-k Thinking or a smooth variant thereof. Two other approaches, heterogeneous priors and cognitive discounting, capture the same essence while offering a gain in tractability. Relative to the full-information rational-expectation (FIRE) benchmark, all these modifications amount to attenuation of GE effects, especially in the short run. This in turn translates to either under- or over-reaction in aggregate outcomes, depending on whether GE feedbacks are positive or negative in the first place. We review a few applications, with emphasis on monetary and fiscal policy. We finally discuss how the available evidence on expectations, along with other considerations, can help guide the choice among the various alternatives, as well as between them and FIRE.
papers.zh_title: 抑制一般均衡：不完全信息与有限理性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了信息或理性方面的现实摩擦如何抑制一般均衡反馈。在一种设定中，我们维持理性预期，但移除对总体冲击的共同知识。在另一种设定中，我们用层级思维或其平滑变体替代理性预期。另外两种方法，即异质性先验和认知贴现，在捕捉相同本质的同时提供了更高的可处理性。相对于完全信息理性预期基准，所有这些修正都相当于减弱了一般均衡效应，尤其是在短期内。这进而转化为总体结果的过度反应或反应不足，具体取决于一般均衡反馈最初是正还是负。我们回顾了几个应用，重点放在货币和财政政策上。最后，我们讨论了关于预期的现有证据以及其他考虑因素，如何有助于指导在各种替代方案之间以及它们与完全信息理性预期之间的选择。

papers.title: What Gets Measured Gets Managed: Investment and the Cost of Capital
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Guanmin Liao, Baolian Wang
papers.abstract: We study the impact of government-led incentive systems by examining a staggered reform in the Chinese state-owned enterprise (SOE) performance evaluation policy. To improve capital allocative efficiency, in 2010, regulators switched from using return on equity (ROE) to economic value added (EVA) when evaluating SOE performance. This EVA policy adopts a one-size-fits-all approach by stipulating a fixed cost of capital for virtually all SOEs, ignoring the potential heterogeneity of firm-specific costs of capital. We show that SOEs did respond to the performance evaluation reform by altering their investment decisions, more so when the actual borrowing rate was further away from the stipulated cost of capital. Our paper provides causal evidence that incentive schemes affect real investment and sheds new light on challenges faced by economic reforms in China.
papers.zh_title: 可衡量即可管理：投资与资本成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过考察中国国有企业绩效评估政策的分阶段改革，研究了政府主导的激励体系的影响。为了提高资本配置效率，监管机构在2010年将国有企业绩效评估指标从净资产收益率改为经济增加值。这项经济增加值政策采用一刀切的方法，为几乎所有国有企业规定了固定的资本成本，忽略了企业特定资本成本的潜在异质性。我们表明，国有企业确实通过改变其投资决策来回应绩效评估改革，当实际借款利率与规定的资本成本相差较大时，这种反应更为明显。我们的论文提供了激励计划影响实际投资的因果证据，并揭示了中国经济改革所面临的挑战。

papers.title: The Distribution of Crisis Credit: Effects on Firm Indebtedness and Aggregate Risk
papers.authors: Federico Huneeus, Joseph P. Kaboski, Mauricio Larrain, Sergio L. Schmukler, Mario Vera
papers.abstract: We study the distribution of credit during crisis times and its impact on leverage and risk at the firm and macroeconomic levels. We analyze a large-scale COVID-19 public credit guarantee program in Chile, using novel transaction-level credit data matched with tax data. We find that demand drives the increase in leverage, especially for riskier firms, but several factors keep aggregate risk small. Aggregate risk increases substantially when credit limits are relaxed, but reallocating the existing program credit toward riskier firms or raising the expected default increases risk much less. A quantitative model of firms and endogenous default confirms our empirics.
papers.zh_title: 危机信贷的分配：对企业负债与总体风险的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了危机时期信贷的分配及其对企业层面和宏观经济层面的杠杆和风险的影响。我们分析了智利一项大规模的COVID-19公共信贷担保计划，使用了与税务数据匹配的新型交易级信贷数据。我们发现，需求推动了杠杆率的上升，尤其是对于风险较高的企业，但若干因素使得总体风险保持在较低水平。当信贷限额放宽时，总体风险大幅增加，但将现有计划信贷重新分配给风险较高的企业或提高预期违约率，则风险增加幅度要小得多。一个包含企业和内生违约的定量模型证实了我们的实证结果。

papers.title: How Important are Investment Indivisibilities for Development? Experimental Evidence from Uganda
papers.authors: Joseph P. Kaboski, Molly Lipscomb, Virgiliu Midrigan, Carolyn Pelnik
papers.abstract: Theoretically, indivisible investments together with financial frictions can lower development, generate poverty traps, and lead agents to become risk-loving. Using experimental cash grants involving a choice between a safer, low payoff and a riskier, large payoff lottery, we find that 27 percent choose the riskier, larger lottery. Small grant winners invest in livestock and business inventory, while large grant winners invest in land, which exhibits high capital gains. Our quantitative model shows that the aggregate effects of financial deepening are sizable if the indivisible investment can be accumulated (e.g., capital) but not if it is in fixed supply (e.g., land).
papers.zh_title: 投资不可分割性对发展有多重要？来自乌干达的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，不可分割的投资加上金融摩擦会降低发展水平，产生贫困陷阱，并导致经济主体变得风险偏好。通过使用涉及在更安全、低回报彩票和风险更高、高回报彩票之间进行选择的实验性现金赠款，我们发现27%的人选择了风险更高、回报更大的彩票。小额赠款获得者投资于牲畜和商业库存，而大额赠款获得者则投资于土地，土地表现出高资本收益。我们的定量模型表明，如果不可分割的投资可以积累（例如资本），那么金融深化的总体效应是显著的，但如果其供给是固定的（例如土地），则效应不显著。

papers.title: The Economic Effects of the English Parliamentary Enclosures
papers.authors: Leander Heldring, James A. Robinson, Sebastian Vollmer
papers.abstract: We use a dataset of the entire population of English Parliamentary enclosure acts between 1750 and 1830 to provide the first evidence of their impact. Parliamentary enclosure led to the systematic rationalization of traditional property rights. Exploiting a feature of the Parliamentary process that produced such legislation as a source of exogenous variation, we show that such enclosures were associated with significantly higher crop yields, but also higher land inequality. Our results are in line with a literature going back to Arthur Young and Karl Marx on the effects of Parliamentary enclosure on productivity and inequality. They do not support the argument that informal systems of governance, even in small, cohesive, and stable communities, were able to efficiently allocate commonly used and governed resources.
papers.zh_title: 英国议会圈地的经济效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用1750年至1830年间英国所有议会圈地法案的完整数据集，首次提供了其影响的证据。议会圈地导致了传统财产权的系统合理化。利用议会过程中产生此类立法的一个特征作为外生变异的来源，我们表明此类圈地与显著更高的作物产量相关，但也与更高的土地不平等相关。我们的结果与可追溯到亚瑟·杨和卡尔·马克思的关于议会圈地对生产力和不平等影响的文献一致。它们不支持这样的论点：即使在小规模、有凝聚力且稳定的社区中，非正式治理体系也能够有效分配共同使用和管理的资源。

papers.title: The End of Privilege: A Reexamination of the Net Foreign Asset Position of the United States
papers.authors: Andrew Atkeson, Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri
papers.abstract: The U.S. net foreign asset position has declined sharply since 2007 and is currently negative 65 percent of U.S. GDP. This deterioration primarily reflects a U.S.-specific rise in corporate asset values that has inflated the value of U.S. equity liabilities to the rest of the world. To interpret these trends we develop an international macro finance model of flows, stocks, asset valuations, the current account, and the net foreign asset position. We find that the welfare impact of rising asset values for a representative U.S. household has been quite negative given extensive foreign ownership of U.S. corporate equity.
papers.zh_title: 特权的终结：美国净外国资产头寸的再审视
papers.zh_abstract: 自2007年以来，美国净外国资产头寸急剧下降，目前为美国GDP的负65%。这种恶化主要反映了美国特有的企业资产价值上升，这抬高了美国对世界其他地区的股权负债价值。为了解释这些趋势，我们开发了一个关于流量、存量、资产估值、经常账户和净外国资产头寸的国际宏观金融模型。我们发现，鉴于外国对美国公司股权的广泛持有，资产价值上升对代表性美国家庭的福利影响非常负面。

papers.title: Patent Publication and Innovation
papers.authors: Deepak Hegde, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Chenqi Zhu
papers.abstract: How does the publication of patents affect innovation? We answer this question by exploiting a large-scale natural experiment—the passage of the American Inventor's Protection Act of 1999 (AIPA)—that accelerated the public disclosure of most U.S. patents by two years. We obtain causal estimates by comparing U.S. patents subject to the law change with “twin” European patents which were not. After AIPA's enactment, U.S. patents receive more and faster follow-on citations, indicating an increase in technology diffusion. Technological overlap increases between distant but related patents and decreases between highly similar patents, and patent applications are less likely to be abandoned post-AIPA, suggesting a reduction in duplicative R&D. Firms exposed to one standard deviation longer patent grant delays increased their R&D investment by 4% after AIPA. These findings are consistent with our theoretical framework in which AIPA provisions news shocks about related technologies to follow-on inventors and thus alters their innovation decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, PR；JEL：D23, E02, G24, L26, O34
papers.zh_title: 专利公开与创新
papers.zh_abstract: 专利的公开如何影响创新？我们通过利用一项大规模自然实验——1999年《美国发明人保护法》的通过——来回答这个问题，该法案将大多数美国专利的公开披露时间提前了两年。我们通过比较受法律变更影响的美国专利与未受影响的“孪生”欧洲专利来获得因果估计。在《美国发明人保护法》颁布后，美国专利获得了更多且更快的后续引用，表明技术扩散增加。在相距较远但相关的专利之间，技术重叠增加，而在高度相似的专利之间，技术重叠减少，并且专利申请在《美国发明人保护法》后更不可能被放弃，表明重复研发减少。在《美国发明人保护法》后，面临一个标准差更长专利授权延迟的企业将其研发投资增加了4%。这些发现与我们的理论框架一致，在该框架中，《美国发明人保护法》向后继发明者提供了关于相关技术的新闻冲击，从而改变了他们的创新决策。

papers.title: Procyclical Productivity in New Keynesian Models
papers.authors: Zhesheng Qiu, José-Víctor Ríos-Rull
papers.abstract: We propose an easy-to-use search friction in the goods markets in medium-sized New Keynesian models. This friction allows increases in measured productivity in response to increases in expenditures via higher search effort from households. As a result markups can become procyclical and labor share countercyclical. Unlike in models that pose variable capital utilization and fixed costs to generate procyclical productivity, firms do not have to spend more to achieve it. We estimate the model matching impulse responses with Bayesian techniques and show superior performance of models with search frictions relative to the state of the art alternative models in the literature. Our estimates also display low fixed costs of production and lower Frisch elasticities.
papers.zh_title: 新凯恩斯模型中的顺周期生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在中等规模的新凯恩斯模型中引入了一种易于使用的商品市场搜索摩擦。这种摩擦允许通过家庭更高的搜索努力，使测度的生产率随支出增加而上升。其结果是，加成率可能变得顺周期，而劳动份额则变得逆周期。与那些通过设定可变资本利用率和固定成本来产生顺周期生产率的模型不同，企业无需增加支出即可实现这一点。我们使用贝叶斯技术估计了匹配脉冲响应的模型，并表明与文献中现有最先进的替代模型相比，具有搜索摩擦的模型表现更优。我们的估计还显示出较低的生产固定成本和较低的弗里希弹性。

papers.title: Statistical Uncertainty in the Ranking of Journals and Universities
papers.authors: Magne Mogstad, Joseph P. Romano, Azeem Shaikh, Daniel Wilhelm
papers.abstract: Economists are obsessed with rankings of institutions, journals, or scholars according to the value of some feature of interest. These rankings are invariably computed using estimates rather than the true values of such features. As a result, there may be considerable uncertainty concerning the ranks. In this paper, we consider the problem of accounting for such uncertainty by constructing confidence sets for the ranks. We consider both the problem of constructing marginal confidence sets for the rank of, say, a particular journal as well as simultaneous confidence sets for the ranks of all journals. We apply these confidence sets to draw inferences about uncertainty in the ranking of economics journals and universities by impact factors.
papers.zh_title: 期刊与大学排名中的统计不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家痴迷于根据某些感兴趣特征的价值对机构、期刊或学者进行排名。这些排名总是基于估计值而非这些特征的真实值来计算。因此，排名可能存在相当大的不确定性。在本文中，我们考虑通过构建排名的置信集来应对这种不确定性的问题。我们既考虑了为特定期刊的排名构建边际置信集的问题，也考虑了为所有期刊的排名构建联合置信集的问题。我们将这些置信集应用于推断经济学期刊和大学按影响因子排名的不确定性。

papers.title: Could Machine Learning be a General Purpose Technology? A Comparison of Emerging Technologies Using Data from Online Job Postings
papers.authors: Avi Goldfarb, Bledi Taska, Florenta Teodoridis
papers.abstract: General purpose technologies (GPTs) push out the production possibility frontier and are of strategic importance to managers and policymakers. While theoretical models that explain the characteristics, benefits, and approaches to create and capture value from GPTs have advanced significantly, empirical methods to identify GPTs are lagging. The handful of available attempts are typically context specific and rely on hindsight. For managers deciding on technology strategy, it means that the classification, when available, comes too late. We propose a more universal approach of assessing the GPT likelihood of emerging technologies using data from online job postings. We benchmark our approach against prevailing empirical GPT methods that exploit patent data and provide an application on a set of emerging technologies. Our application exercise suggests that a cluster of technologies comprised of machine learning and related data science technologies is relatively likely to be GPT.
papers.zh_title: 机器学习能否成为通用目的技术？基于在线职位发布数据的新兴技术比较
papers.zh_abstract: 通用目的技术（GPT）能够推动生产可能性边界外移，对管理者和政策制定者具有战略重要性。尽管解释GPT特征、收益以及创造和获取价值方法的理论模型已取得显著进展，但识别GPT的实证方法却相对滞后。现有的少数尝试通常依赖于特定背景并需要事后回顾。对于制定技术战略的管理者而言，这意味着分类信息在可用时往往为时已晚。我们提出了一种更通用的方法，利用在线职位发布数据来评估新兴技术成为GPT的可能性。我们将我们的方法与利用专利数据的现有实证GPT方法进行基准比较，并对一组新兴技术进行了应用分析。我们的应用实验表明，由机器学习及相关数据科学技术组成的技术集群相对更有可能成为GPT。

papers.title: Electoral Turnovers
papers.authors: Benjamin Marx, Vincent Pons, Vincent Rollet
papers.abstract: In most national elections, voters face a key choice between continuity and change. Electoral turnovers occur when the incumbent candidate or party fails to win reelection. To understand how turnovers affect national outcomes, we study all presidential and parliamentary elections held globally between 1946 and 2018. We document the prevalence of turnovers over time and estimate their effects on economic performance, human development, and the quality of democracy. Using a close-elections regression discontinuity design across countries, we show that turnovers improve several measures of country performance. To explain these positive effects, we explore how electoral turnovers affect leader characteristics, shape policy decisions, reduce perceived corruption, and foster accountability.
papers.zh_title: 选举更迭
papers.zh_abstract: 在大多数全国性选举中，选民面临连续性还是变革的关键选择。当现任候选人或政党未能赢得连任时，就会发生选举更迭。为了理解更迭如何影响国家结果，我们研究了1946年至2018年间全球所有总统和议会选举。我们记录了更迭随时间推移的普遍性，并估计了它们对经济表现、人类发展以及民主质量的影响。通过使用跨国界的接近选举断点回归设计，我们表明更迭改善了几项国家绩效指标。为了解释这些积极影响，我们探讨了选举更迭如何影响领导人特征、塑造政策决策、减少感知腐败并促进问责制。

papers.title: Is There a VA Advantage? Evidence from Dually Eligible Veterans
papers.authors: David C. Chan Jr, David Card, Lowell Taylor
papers.abstract: We study public vs. private provision of health care for veterans aged 65 and older who may receive care provided by the US Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) and in private hospitals financed by Medicare. Utilizing the ambulance design of Doyle et al. (2015), we find that the VA reduces 28-day mortality by 46% (4.5 percentage points) and that these survival gains are persistent. The VA also reduces 28-day spending by 21% and delivers strikingly different reported services relative to private hospitals. We find suggestive evidence of complementarities between continuity of care, health IT, and integrated care.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, PR；JEL：H4, H51, I10, I18
papers.zh_title: 退伍军人事务部是否存在优势？来自双重资格退伍军人的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了65岁及以上退伍军人在公共与私人医疗提供方面的差异，这些退伍军人既可以在美国退伍军人事务部（VA）提供的医疗机构接受护理，也可以在由医疗保险资助的私立医院接受护理。利用Doyle等人（2015）的救护车设计，我们发现VA将28天死亡率降低了46%（4.5个百分点），并且这些生存获益是持久的。VA还将28天支出降低了21%，并且与私立医院相比，提供了显著不同的报告服务。我们发现了护理连续性、健康信息技术和整合医疗之间存在互补性的初步证据。

papers.title: The Downward Spiral
papers.authors: Jeremy Greenwood, Nezih Guner, Karen A. Kopecky
papers.abstract: There have been more than 500,000 opioid overdose deaths since 2000. To analyze the opioid epidemic, a model is constructed where individuals choose whether to use opioids recreationally, knowing the probabilities of addiction and dying. These odds are functions of recreational opioid usage. Markov chains are estimated from the US data for the college and non-college educated that summarize the transitions into and out of opioid addiction as well as to a deadly overdose. The structural model is constructed to match the estimated Markov chains. The epidemic’s drivers and the impact of medical interventions are examined.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH；JEL：D11, E13, E70, I12, I14, I31, J11, J17
papers.zh_title: 恶性循环
papers.zh_abstract: 自2000年以来，已有超过50万人因阿片类药物过量死亡。为了分析阿片类药物疫情，我们构建了一个模型，其中个体在知道成瘾和死亡概率的情况下，选择是否娱乐性使用阿片类药物。这些概率是娱乐性阿片类药物使用量的函数。我们根据美国数据，针对大学教育程度和非大学教育程度群体估计了马尔可夫链，这些链总结了进入和退出阿片类药物成瘾以及致命过量的转变过程。结构模型被构建以匹配估计的马尔可夫链。我们考察了疫情的驱动因素以及医疗干预的影响。

papers.title: The World Uncertainty Index
papers.authors: Hites Ahir, Nicholas Bloom, Davide Furceri
papers.abstract: We construct the World Uncertainty Index (WUI) for an unbalanced panel of 143 individual countries on a quarterly basis from 1952. This is the frequency of the word “uncertainty” in the quarterly Economist Intelligence Unit country reports. Globally, the Index spikes around major events like the Gulf War, the Euro debt crisis, the Brexit vote and the COVID pandemic. The level of uncertainty is higher in developing countries but is more synchronized across advanced economies with their tighter trade and financial linkages. In a panel vector autoregressive setting we find that innovations in the WUI foreshadow significant declines in output. This effect is larger and more persistent in countries with lower institutional quality, and in sectors with greater financial constraints.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ITI, ME, POL, PR；JEL：E0
papers.zh_title: 世界不确定性指数
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了涵盖143个国家的非平衡面板的世界不确定性指数（WUI），该指数基于1952年以来的季度数据。该指数是经济学人智库国家报告中“不确定性”一词的出现频率。在全球范围内，该指数在海湾战争、欧元债务危机、英国脱欧公投和新冠疫情等重大事件期间出现飙升。发展中国家的不确定性水平更高，但在发达经济体中，由于其更紧密的贸易和金融联系，不确定性更加同步。在面板向量自回归设定中，我们发现WUI的创新预示着产出的显著下降。这种效应在制度质量较低的国家以及金融约束较大的部门中更大且更持久。

papers.title: The Federal Funds Market, Pre- and Post-2008
papers.authors: Eric T. Swanson
papers.abstract: This chapter provides an overview of the federal funds market and how the equilibrium federal fund rate is determined. I devote particular attention to comparing and contrasting the federal funds market before and after 2008, since there were several dramatic changes around that time that completely changed the market and the way in which the equilibrium federal funds rate is determined. The size of this structural break is arguably as large and important as the period of reserves targeting under Fed Chairman Paul Volcker from 1979–82. Finally, I discuss the relationship between the federal funds rate and other short-term interest rates in the U.S. and the outlook for the federal funds market going forward.
papers.zh_title: 联邦基金市场：2008年前后
papers.zh_abstract: 本章概述了联邦基金市场以及均衡联邦基金利率是如何决定的。我特别关注比较和对比2008年前后的联邦基金市场，因为在那段时间发生了若干剧烈变化，完全改变了市场以及均衡联邦基金利率的决定方式。这种结构性断裂的规模，可以说与1979-82年美联储主席保罗·沃尔克时期准备金目标制的重要性相当。最后，我讨论了联邦基金利率与美国其他短期利率之间的关系，以及联邦基金市场未来的前景。

papers.title: The Great Gatsby Curve
papers.authors: Steven N. Durlauf, Andros Kourtellos, Chih Ming Tan
papers.abstract: This paper provides a synthesis of theoretical and empirical work on the Great Gatsby Curve, the positive empirical relationship between cross-section income inequality and persistence of income across generations. We present statistical models of income dynamics that mechanically give rise to the relationship between inequality and mobility. Five distinct classes of theories, including models on family investments, skills, social influences, political economy, and aspirations are developed, each providing a behavioral mechanism to explain the relationship. Finally, we review empirical studies that provide evidence of the curve for a range of contexts and socioeconomic outcomes as well as explore evidence on mechanisms.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EFG, PE；JEL：D3, H0, J0, R0
papers.zh_title: 了不起的盖茨比曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综合了关于“了不起的盖茨比曲线”的理论与实证研究，该曲线描述了横截面收入不平等与代际收入持续性之间的正相关关系。我们提出了收入动态的统计模型，这些模型在机制上产生了不平等与流动性之间的关系。我们发展了五类不同的理论，包括关于家庭投资、技能、社会影响、政治经济学和抱负的模型，每一类都提供了解释这种关系的行为机制。最后，我们回顾了实证研究，这些研究为一系列背景和社会经济结果提供了该曲线的证据，并探讨了关于机制的证据。

papers.title: Intergenerational Mobility
papers.authors: Neil A. Cholli, Steven N. Durlauf
papers.abstract: This essay reviews the theory and empirics of intergenerational mobility. Our review draws on models and empirical analyses of classic and more recent work from both economics and sociology. We summarize models and the surrounding empirical evidence of two key sets of mechanisms: family factors (income, education, credit constraints, household composition, and genes) and social factors (schools, neighborhood sorting, racial segregation, and peer and role model effects). We then discuss and evaluate current methods used to measure intergenerational mobility, including linear regressions and Markov chains. Theoretical models imply nonlinear relationships between parent and child status that are often ignored in practice and offer potentially different interpretations of the evidence of heterogeneity in mobility across locations, groups, and time. We conclude that the next generation of studies would benefit from a closer integration of theory with empirics.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EFG, PE；JEL：D30, H0, J0, R0
papers.zh_title: 代际流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了代际流动性的理论和实证研究。我们的综述借鉴了经济学和社会学中经典及近期工作的模型和实证分析。我们总结了两组关键机制及其相关的实证证据：家庭因素（收入、教育、信贷约束、家庭构成和基因）和社会因素（学校、社区分类、种族隔离以及同伴和榜样效应）。然后，我们讨论并评估了当前用于衡量代际流动性的方法，包括线性回归和马尔可夫链。理论模型暗示了父母与子女地位之间的非线性关系，这在实践中常常被忽视，并为解释不同地点、群体和时间上流动性异质性的证据提供了潜在的不同视角。我们得出结论，下一代研究将受益于理论与实证的更紧密结合。

papers.title: Group Corruption via Sequential Bargaining in a Hierarchical Organization
papers.authors: Fan-chin Kung, Ping Wang, Quan Wen
papers.abstract: We develop a framework of group corruption via back-door negotiations between an outside initiator and an authority of decision-makers in a hierarchical organization. We examine the role played by the architecture of a multi-tier authority and determine under such a structure how bargaining proceeds, in what order, and when it breaks down. We verify that equilibrium bargaining sequence proceeds as a chain through decision-making agents, regardless of the hierarchy of the organization. We prove the existence of a compromised equilibrium, where the decision of the authority is compromised, and establish sufficient conditions under which the most natural bottom-up bargaining configuration arises in equilibrium where a proposer negotiates with an immediately higher ranked respondent, starting with the initiator bargaining with the lowest ranked decision-maker in the organization. We then show the circumstances under which a top-down or a non-monotonic equilibrium configuration may emerge, and those under which the deal may break down. This enables us to capture a rich array of group corruptive configurations as observed. We conclude by investigating the extension to multi-tier authorities with multiple agents of the same rank in each tier, such as in a tree hierarchy.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, PE；JEL：C78, D23, D73, L22
papers.zh_title: 层级组织中的群体腐败：通过序贯谈判实现
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个群体腐败框架，该框架通过外部发起者与层级组织中的决策者权威之间的幕后谈判来实现。我们研究了多层权威结构所扮演的角色，并确定了在这种结构下谈判如何进行、以何种顺序进行以及何时破裂。我们验证了无论组织层级如何，均衡谈判序列都作为一条链条贯穿决策者。我们证明了妥协均衡的存在，其中权威的决策被妥协，并建立了充分条件，使得最自然的自下而上谈判配置在均衡中出现，即提议者与直接上级回应者谈判，从发起者与组织中最低级别的决策者谈判开始。然后，我们展示了自上而下或非单调均衡配置可能出现的情况，以及交易可能破裂的情况。这使我们能够捕捉到观察到的丰富多样的群体腐败配置。最后，我们研究了扩展到具有多层权威且每层有多个同级代理人的情况，例如树形层级结构。

papers.title: Do Higher-Priced Hospitals Deliver Higher-Quality Care?
papers.authors: Zack Cooper, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., John A. Graves, Jonathan Gruber
papers.abstract: Hospitals in the US compete on price and quality. There are fears that because of general idiosyncrasies in the market for health care services, competition between hospitals will not generate efficient prices. These concerns have led to widespread calls for price regulation in the $1.3 trillion hospital sector. A clear prediction from the growing literature on hospital insurer bargaining is that more appealing hospitals should be able to negotiate higher prices. Following this prediction, we introduce a simple test of the extent to which the market for hospital care in the US is functioning: analyzing whether high priced hospitals have higher quality, controlling for patient selection. We find that being admitted to a hospital with two standard deviations higher prices raises spending on patients by 53% and lowers their mortality by 1 percentage point (37%). However, the relationship between higher prices and lower mortality is only present at hospitals in less concentrated markets. Receiving care from expensive hospitals in concentrated markets increases spending but has no detectable effect on mortality.
papers.zh_title: 高价格医院是否提供更高质量的医疗服务？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的医院在价格和质量上展开竞争。人们担心，由于医疗保健服务市场普遍存在的特殊性，医院之间的竞争不会产生有效的价格。这些担忧导致了对价值1.3万亿美元的医院行业进行价格监管的广泛呼吁。关于医院与保险公司讨价还价的日益增多的文献中，一个明确的预测是，更具吸引力的医院应该能够协商出更高的价格。遵循这一预测，我们引入了一个简单的检验，以评估美国医院市场的运作程度：分析高价格医院是否具有更高质量，同时控制患者选择。我们发现，入住价格高出两个标准差的医院会使患者支出增加53%，并使其死亡率降低1个百分点（37%）。然而，较高价格与较低死亡率之间的这种关系仅存在于集中度较低的市场中的医院。在集中度较高的市场中，从昂贵的医院接受治疗会增加支出，但对死亡率没有可检测到的影响。

papers.title: Using Digitized Newspapers to Refine Historical Measures: The Case of the Boll Weevil
papers.authors: Andreas Ferrara, Joung Yeob Ha, Randall Walsh
papers.abstract: This paper shows how to remove attenuation bias in regression analyses due to measurement error in historical data for a given variable of interest by using a secondary measure which can be easily generated from digitized newspapers. We provide three methods for using this secondary variable to deal with non-classical measurement error in a binary treatment: set identification, bias reduction via sample restriction, and a parametric bias correction. We demonstrate the usefulness of our methods by replicating two recent studies on the effect of the boll weevil. Relative to the initial analysis, our results yield markedly larger coefficient estimates.
papers.zh_title: 利用数字化报纸完善历史度量：以棉铃虫为例
papers.zh_abstract: 本文展示了如何通过使用一种可以从数字化报纸中轻松生成的次要度量，来消除回归分析中因历史数据测量误差导致的衰减偏差。我们提供了三种方法来利用这个次要变量处理二元处理中的非经典测量误差：集合识别、通过样本限制减少偏差以及参数偏差校正。我们通过复制两项关于棉铃虫影响的最新研究，展示了我们方法的实用性。与最初的分析相比，我们的结果产生了明显更大的系数估计值。

papers.title: Collective Moral Hazard and the Interbank Market
papers.authors: Levent Altinoglu, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: The concentration of risk within the financial system leads to systemic instability. We propose a theory to explain the structure of the financial system and show how it alters the risk taking incentives of financial institutions when the government optimally intervenes during crises. By issuing interbank claims, risky institutions endogenously become too interconnected to fail. This concentrated structure enables institutions to share the risk of systemic crises in a privately optimal way, but leads to excessive risk taking even by peripheral institutions. Interconnectedness and excessive risk taking reinforce one another. Macroprudential regulation which limits the interconnectedness of risky institutions improves welfare.
papers.zh_title: 集体道德风险与银行间市场
