papers.zh_abstract: 金融体系内风险的集中会导致系统性不稳定。我们提出了一种理论来解释金融体系的结构，并展示了当政府在危机期间进行最优干预时，这种结构如何改变金融机构的风险承担激励。通过发行银行间债权，高风险机构内生地变得“太大而不能倒”。这种集中结构使机构能够以私人最优的方式分担系统性危机的风险，但会导致即使是外围机构也过度承担风险。相互关联性与过度风险承担相互强化。限制高风险机构相互关联性的宏观审慎监管能够改善福利。

papers.title: The Wobbly Economy: Global Dynamics with Phase and State Transitions
papers.authors: Tomohiro Hirano, Joseph E. Stiglitz
papers.abstract: We analyze global dynamics in the standard life-cycle model with production, showing that there can be a plethora of rational expectations dynamics, including “wobbly macro-dynamics”. Depending on people’s beliefs, the macroeconomy can bounce around infinitely, without converging, without regular periodicity. The economy can be plagued by repeated periods of inefficiencies and unemployment. In phase transitions, the economy endogenously changes from a state with a unique momentary equilibrium into one with multiple equilibria, or vice versa. Phase transitions determine the patterns of dynamics. We identify all possible patterns of dynamics, providing a complete characterization of the parameter values under which each may occur, showing how a change in some key parameter (e.g. labor productivity) induces a “state transition,” an abrupt change in the set of feasible global dynamics: a boom can become unstable. Global dynamics exhibits strong hysteresis effects; a temporary positive productivity shock can have long run adverse effects.
papers.zh_title: 摇摆不定的经济：具有相变和状态跃迁的全球动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了标准生命周期模型（含生产）中的全球动态，表明可能存在大量理性预期动态，包括“摇摆不定的宏观动态”。根据人们的信念，宏观经济可能会无限期地波动，既不收敛，也不具有规律性周期。经济可能反复遭受低效率和失业的困扰。在相变中，经济内生地从具有唯一瞬时均衡的状态转变为具有多重均衡的状态，反之亦然。相变决定了动态的模式。我们识别了所有可能的动态模式，提供了每种模式可能发生的参数值的完整刻画，展示了某个关键参数（例如劳动生产率）的变化如何引发“状态跃迁”，即可行全球动态集合的突然变化：繁荣可能变得不稳定。全球动态表现出强烈的滞后效应；一次暂时的正向生产率冲击可能产生长期的不利影响。

papers.title: Spending Limits, Public Funding, and Election Outcomes
papers.authors: Nikolaj Broberg, Vincent Pons, Clemence Tricaud
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the effects of campaign finance rules on electoral outcomes. In French local elections, candidates competing in districts above 9,000 inhabitants face spending limits and are eligible for public reimbursement. Using an RDD around the population threshold, we find that these rules increase competitiveness and benefit the runner-up of the previous race as well as new candidates, in departmental elections, while leaving the polarization of results and winners’ representativeness and quality unaffected. Incumbents are less likely to get reelected because they are less likely to run and obtain a lower vote share, conditional on running. These results appear to be driven by the reimbursement of campaign expenditures, not spending limits. We do not find such effects in municipal elections, which we attribute to higher spending, decreasing marginal returns of campaign money, and the use of a proportional list system instead of plurality voting.
papers.zh_title: 支出限制、公共资助与选举结果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了竞选财务规则对选举结果的影响。在法国地方选举中，在人口超过9000人的选区竞选的候选人面临支出限制，并有资格获得公共报销。利用人口阈值附近的断点回归设计，我们发现这些规则增加了竞争性，并在省级选举中有利于上次竞选的亚军以及新候选人，同时不影响结果的极化程度以及获胜者的代表性和质量。现任者连任的可能性降低，是因为他们参选的可能性更小，并且在参选的情况下获得的得票率更低。这些结果似乎是由竞选支出的报销所驱动，而非支出限制。我们在市级选举中没有发现这种效应，我们将其归因于更高的支出、竞选资金递减的边际回报，以及采用比例代表名单制而非简单多数制。

papers.title: On the Dynamics of Human Behavior: The Past, Present, and Future of Culture, Conflict, and Cooperation
papers.authors: Nathan Nunn
papers.abstract: I provide a theoretically-guided discussion of the dynamics of human behavior, focusing on the importance of culture (socially-learned information) and tradition (transmission of culture across generations). Decision-making that relies on tradition can be an effective strategy and arises in equilibrium. While dynamically optimal, it generates static `mismatch.' When the world changes, since traits evolve slowly, they may not be beneficial in their new environment. I discuss how mismatch helps explain the world around us, presents special challenges and opportunities for policy, and provides important lessons for our future as a human species.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, EFG, ITI, POL；JEL：B5, B52, N00, O10
papers.zh_title: 论人类行为的动态：文化、冲突与合作的过去、现在与未来
papers.zh_abstract: 我提供了一个以理论为指导的关于人类行为动态的讨论，重点关注文化（社会学习信息）和传统（文化代际传递）的重要性。依赖传统进行决策可以是一种有效策略，并在均衡中出现。虽然动态最优，但它会产生静态的“错配”。当世界发生变化时，由于特质演化缓慢，它们可能在新环境中不再有利。我讨论了错配如何有助于解释我们周围的世界，为政策制定带来了特殊的挑战和机遇，并为我们作为人类物种的未来提供了重要的启示。

papers.title: Dynamics of Subjective Risk Premia
papers.authors: Stefan Nagel, Zhengyang Xu
papers.abstract: We examine subjective risk premia implied by return expectations of individual investors and professionals for aggregate portfolios of stocks, bonds, currencies, and commodity futures. While in-sample predictive regressions with realized excess returns suggest that objective risk premia vary countercyclically with business cycle variables and aggregate asset valuation measures, subjective risk premia extracted from survey data do not comove much with these variables. This lack of cyclicality of subjective risk premia is a pervasive property that holds in expectations of different groups of market participants and in different asset classes. A similar lack of cyclicality appears in out-of-sample forecasts of excess returns, which suggests that investors’ learning of forecasting relationships in real time may explain much of the cyclicality gap. These findings cast doubt on models that explain time-varying objective risk premia inferred from in-sample regressions with countercyclical variation in perceived risk or risk aversion. We further find a link between subjective perceptions of risk and subjective risk premia, which points toward a positive risk-return tradeoff in subjective beliefs.
papers.zh_title: 主观风险溢价的动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了个人投资者和专业投资者对股票、债券、货币和商品期货等总体投资组合的预期回报所隐含的主观风险溢价。虽然使用已实现超额收益的样本内预测回归表明，客观风险溢价随商业周期变量和总体资产估值指标呈逆周期变化，但从调查数据中提取的主观风险溢价与这些变量的共同变动不大。这种主观风险溢价缺乏周期性的特征是一个普遍属性，存在于不同市场参与者群体的预期以及不同资产类别中。类似的缺乏周期性也出现在超额收益的样本外预测中，这表明投资者实时学习预测关系可能解释了周期性差距的很大一部分。这些发现对以下模型提出了质疑：这些模型用感知风险或风险厌恶的逆周期变化来解释从样本内回归中推断出的时变客观风险溢价。我们进一步发现了主观风险感知与主观风险溢价之间的联系，这指向主观信念中存在正向的风险-收益权衡。

papers.title: Marijuana Legalization and Opioid Deaths
papers.authors: Neil K. Mathur, Christopher J. Ruhm
papers.abstract: Over the last two decades there has been considerable movement at the state-level to legalize marijuana, initially for medical purposes and more recently for recreational consumption. Despite prior research, it is unclear how, if at all, these policies are related to rates of opioid-involved overdose deaths, which have trended rapidly upwards over time and represent a major public health problem. We provide two types of new information on this question. First, we replicate and extend upon previous investigations and show that the empirical results of those studies are frequently fragile and that, in most cases, the inclusion of more comprehensive controls, longer analysis periods and more correctly defined dependent variables results in less favorable estimates, often including predicted increases in opioid deaths. Second, we present new estimates from generalized differences-in-differences and event study models that incorporate more recent data and improvements developed in our replication and extension of early research. These results indicate that legal medical marijuana, particularly when available through retail dispensaries, is associated with higher opioid mortality. The results for recreational marijuana, while less reliable, also suggest that retail sales through dispensaries are associated with greater death rates relative to the counterfactual of no legal cannabis.
papers.zh_title: 大麻合法化与阿片类药物死亡
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，美国各州在将大麻合法化方面取得了相当大的进展，最初是出于医疗目的，最近则用于娱乐消费。尽管已有研究，但目前尚不清楚这些政策与阿片类药物过量致死率（该比率随时间快速上升，构成一个重大公共卫生问题）之间是否存在关联，以及如何关联。我们针对这个问题提供了两类新信息。首先，我们复制并扩展了先前的研究，表明这些研究的实证结果往往很脆弱，并且在大多数情况下，纳入更全面的控制变量、更长的分析期以及更正确定义的因变量会导致更不利的估计，通常包括预测的阿片类药物死亡人数增加。其次，我们展示了来自广义双重差分法和事件研究模型的新估计结果，这些模型纳入了更近期的数据以及我们在复制和扩展早期研究中开发的改进。这些结果表明，合法的医用大麻，特别是通过零售药房获得时，与更高的阿片类药物死亡率相关。娱乐用大麻的结果虽然不太可靠，但也表明，与没有合法大麻的反事实情况相比，通过药房零售与更高的死亡率相关。

papers.title: Most-Favored Entry Clauses in Drug Patent Litigation Settlements as a Potential Reverse Payment
papers.authors: Keith M. Drake, Thomas McGuire
papers.abstract: Settlements of drug patent disputes that involve a potential payment from the brand to the generic signal a possible collusive profit split with a threat to competition, and have undergone intensive scrutiny in the literature on law and economics. A common feature of these brand-generic settlements, so-called “most-favored entry” (MFE) clauses, have not been investigated to the same extent. The expectation that brand drug companies make settlement decisions rationally implies that an otherwise unexplained brand payment above savings from expected future litigation costs derives from a delay in competition achieved by the settlement. This paper applies the condition of brand rationality to settlements with MFE clauses, with the added consideration that an MFE clause may affect two dates: the date of entry for the settling generic and the date of entry of third-party generic challengers. A brand payment from an MFE clause above future expected litigation costs implies delays in at least one and possibly two of these expected dates for competition. We find that MFE clauses can constitute a reverse payment. When a payment takes the form of an MFE clause, the pay-above-saved-litigation-cost criterion is, however, vulnerable to suggesting that a settlement is not anticompetitive, when in fact it is.
papers.zh_title: 药品专利诉讼和解中的最惠进入条款作为潜在反向支付
papers.zh_abstract: 涉及品牌药企向仿制药企潜在支付的药品专利纠纷和解，暗示了可能损害竞争的共谋利润分配，并在法律经济学文献中受到严格审查。这些品牌-仿制药和解的一个常见特征——所谓的“最惠进入”（MFE）条款——尚未得到同等程度的深入研究。品牌药企理性做出和解决策的预期意味着，超出预期未来诉讼成本节省的、无法解释的品牌支付，源于和解所实现的竞争延迟。本文将品牌理性条件应用于包含MFE条款的和解，并额外考虑MFE条款可能影响两个日期：和解仿制药企的进入日期以及第三方仿制药挑战者的进入日期。来自MFE条款的品牌支付若高于未来预期诉讼成本，则意味着至少一个、可能两个预期竞争日期被延迟。我们发现MFE条款可能构成反向支付。然而，当支付采取MFE条款形式时，“支付超出节省的诉讼成本”标准容易错误地表明和解不具有反竞争性，而实际上它确实具有反竞争性。

papers.title: Does Welfare Prevent Crime? The Criminal Justice Outcomes of Youth Removed From SSI
papers.authors: Manasi Deshpande, Michael G. Mueller-Smith
papers.abstract: We estimate the effect of losing Supplemental Security Income (SSI) benefits at age 18 on criminal justice and employment outcomes over the next two decades. To estimate this effect, we use a regression discontinuity design in the likelihood of being reviewed for SSI eligibility at age 18 created by the 1996 welfare reform law. We evaluate this natural experiment with Social Security Administration data linked to records from the Criminal Justice Administrative Records System. We find that SSI removal increases the number of criminal charges by a statistically significant 20% over the next two decades. The increase in charges is concentrated in offenses for which income generation is a primary motivation (60% increase), especially theft, burglary, fraud/forgery, and prostitution. The effect of SSI removal on criminal justice involvement persists more than two decades later, even as the effect of removal on contemporaneous SSI receipt diminishes. In response to SSI removal, youth are twice as likely to be charged with an illicit income-generating offense than they are to maintain steady employment at $15,000/year in the labor market. As a result of these charges, the annual likelihood of incarceration increases by a statistically significant 60% in the two decades following SSI removal. The costs to taxpayers of enforcement and incarceration from SSI removal are so high that they nearly eliminate the savings to taxpayers from reduced SSI benefits.
papers.zh_title: 福利能否预防犯罪？被移除补充保障收入的青年的刑事司法结果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了在18岁时失去补充保障收入（SSI）福利对未来二十年内刑事司法和就业结果的影响。为估算这一效应，我们利用了1996年福利改革法所创造的、在18岁时被审查SSI资格可能性的断点回归设计。我们通过将社会保障管理局数据与刑事司法行政记录系统的记录相关联来评估这一自然实验。我们发现，移除SSI使未来二十年内的刑事指控数量在统计上显著增加了20%。指控的增加主要集中在以创收为主要动机的犯罪中（增加60%），尤其是盗窃、入室盗窃、欺诈/伪造和卖淫。SSI移除对刑事司法介入的影响持续二十多年，即使移除对同期SSI领取的影响逐渐减弱。作为对SSI移除的回应，青年因非法创收犯罪被指控的可能性，是在劳动力市场保持每年15,000美元稳定就业可能性的两倍。由于这些指控，在SSI移除后的二十年里，每年被监禁的可能性在统计上显著增加了60%。SSI移除给纳税人带来的执法和监禁成本如此之高，以至于几乎抵消了因SSI福利减少而为纳税人节省的开支。

papers.title: Business Cycles and Healthcare Employment
papers.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Shin-Yi Chou, Kuhelika De
papers.abstract: Is healthcare employment recession proof? We examine the hypothesis that healthcare employment is stable across the business cycle. We explicitly distinguish between a negative aggregate demand and supply shock in studying how healthcare employment responds to recessions, and show that this response depends largely on the type of the exogenous shock triggering the recession. We find that aggregate healthcare employment responds procyclically during demand-induced recessions but remains stable during supply-induced recessions. Further, there is significant heterogeneity in the employment responses of the healthcare sub-sectors. While healthcare employment in most sub-sectors responds procyclically during recessions caused by both negative demand and supply shocks, that in nursing dominant sectors responds countercyclically. However, the procyclical response of sub-sectors and countercyclical response of nursing dominant sectors are both relatively weaker during recessions caused by a negative aggregate supply shock than a demand shock, thus balancing out and contributing to an overall null employment response of the aggregate healthcare sector during recessions caused by a supply shock. More generally, by isolating the recessionary impact of the negative aggregate demand shock from supply shock on healthcare employment, we provide new empirical evidence that healthcare employment in general is not recession proof.
papers.zh_title: 经济周期与医疗保健就业
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗保健就业是否具有抗衰退性？我们检验了医疗保健就业在经济周期中保持稳定的假设。在研究医疗保健就业如何应对衰退时，我们明确区分了负的总需求冲击和总供给冲击，并表明这种反应在很大程度上取决于引发衰退的外生冲击类型。我们发现，在需求引发的衰退期间，整体医疗保健就业呈顺周期反应，但在供给引发的衰退期间保持稳定。此外，医疗保健子行业的就业反应存在显著的异质性。虽然大多数子行业的医疗保健就业在由负需求冲击和供给冲击引起的衰退中都呈顺周期反应，但护理主导部门的就业呈逆周期反应。然而，与需求冲击引起的衰退相比，在负总供给冲击引起的衰退中，子行业的顺周期反应和护理主导部门的逆周期反应都相对较弱，从而相互平衡，并导致在供给冲击引起的衰退期间，整体医疗保健部门的就业总体呈现零反应。更一般地说，通过将负总需求冲击与供给冲击对医疗保健就业的衰退影响分离开来，我们提供了新的经验证据，表明医疗保健就业总体上并非抗衰退的。

papers.title: Grandfathering with Anticipation
papers.authors: Christopher Costello, Corbett A. Grainger
papers.abstract: Natural resources such as carbon, water, and fish are increasingly managed with markets that require an initial allocation of property rights. In practice these rights are typically grandfathered based on historical use, but rights could be allocated any number of ways. Taking the perspective of a currently unregulated firm, we ask how the anticipation of a future market affects extraction incentives, environmental quality, and welfare prior to the implementation of the market. We show that this anticipation has first-order welfare implications, seemingly contradicting the widely held belief that the allocation of rights has no aggregate welfare consequences. The most egregious case involves anticipation of a traditional grandfathering rule, which induces a race for allocation before the market goes into effect, causing over-extraction or over-emissions, even relative to the completely unregulated baseline. We derive an alternative allocation rule called "Reverse-Grandfathering" that still provides a free allocation of rights but reverses the marginal incentive to emit or extract. We show that this new approach, which relies on incentives due to anticipation, can replicate welfare-maximizing firm behavior, even in the complete absence of regulation. To illustrate the potential magnitude of anticipation effects, we develop and parameterize a structural model of a hypothetical market among nearly 5,000 large fishing firms on the high seas. Relative to traditional grandfathering and auctioning of rights, Reverse-Grandfathering substantially increases natural resource stocks and welfare.
papers.zh_title: 带有预期的祖父条款
papers.zh_abstract: 碳、水和鱼类等自然资源越来越多地通过需要初始产权分配的市场进行管理。在实践中，这些权利通常基于历史使用情况通过祖父条款分配，但权利可以通过多种方式分配。从当前未受监管企业的角度出发，我们探讨对未来市场的预期如何影响市场实施前的开采激励、环境质量和福利。我们表明，这种预期具有一阶福利影响，这似乎与广泛持有的观点——即权利分配没有总体福利后果——相矛盾。最严重的情况涉及对传统祖父条款规则的预期，这会在市场生效前引发争夺分配的竞赛，导致过度开采或过度排放，甚至相对于完全未受监管的基线也是如此。我们推导出一种称为“反向祖父条款”的替代分配规则，该规则仍然提供免费的权利分配，但逆转了排放或开采的边际激励。我们表明，这种依赖于预期激励的新方法，即使在完全没有监管的情况下，也能复制福利最大化的企业行为。为了说明预期效应的潜在规模，我们开发并参数化了一个假设市场的结构模型，该市场涉及公海上近5,000家大型渔业公司。相对于传统的祖父条款和权利拍卖，反向祖父条款显著增加了自然资源存量和社会福利。

papers.title: Democratization, Elite Capture and Economic Development
papers.authors: Andrew D. Foster, Mark R. Rosenzweig
papers.abstract: We show using a theoretical framework that embeds a voting model in a general-equilibrium model of a rural economy with two interest groups defined by land ownership that the effects of democratization—a shift from control of public resources by the landed elite to a democratic regime with universal suffrage—on the portfolio of public goods is heterogeneous, depending the population landless. In accord with the model and empirical findings from micro data on the differing material interests of the two land classes, we find, based on 30-year panel data describing the democratization of Indian villages, that democratization in villages with a larger landless population share shifted resources away from public irrigation, secondary schools, and electrification and towards programs that increase employment. When the landed farmers have a large population share, public resources were shifted towards irrigation, secondary schools and electrification and away from employment programs.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D72, H41, O1, O13, O40
papers.zh_title: 民主化、精英俘获与经济发展
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过一个理论框架——该框架将投票模型嵌入一个由土地所有权定义的两个利益集团的农村经济一般均衡模型中——表明，民主化（即公共资源控制权从土地精英转向普选民主政体）对公共产品组合的影响是异质性的，取决于无地人口的比例。根据该模型以及基于微观数据关于两个土地阶层不同物质利益的经验发现，我们基于描述印度村庄民主化的30年面板数据发现，在无地人口比例较大的村庄，民主化将资源从公共灌溉、中学和电气化转向增加就业的项目。当地主农民占较大人口比例时，公共资源则转向灌溉、中学和电气化，而远离就业项目。

papers.title: Measuring Upward Mobility
papers.authors: Debraj Ray, Garance Genicot
papers.abstract: We conceptualize and measure upward mobility over income or wealth. At the core of our exercise is the Growth Progressivity Axiom: transfers of instantaneous growth rates from relatively rich to poor individuals increases upward mobility. This axiom, along with mild auxiliary restrictions, identifies an “upward mobility kernel" with a single free parameter, in which mobility is linear in individual growth rates, with geometrically declining weights on baseline incomes. We extend this kernel to trajectories over intervals. The analysis delivers an upward mobility index that does not rely on panel data. That significantly expands our analytical scope to data-poor settings.
papers.zh_title: 衡量向上流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对收入或财富的向上流动性进行概念化并加以衡量。我们分析的核心是增长进步性公理：将瞬时增长率从相对富裕的个体转移给相对贫困的个体，会提高向上流动性。这一公理，连同温和的辅助约束条件，识别出一个具有单一自由参数的“向上流动性核”，其中流动性是个人增长率的线性函数，且对基线收入的权重呈几何递减。我们将此核扩展到时间区间上的轨迹。该分析得出一个不依赖面板数据的向上流动性指数。这显著扩展了我们在数据匮乏环境下的分析范围。

papers.title: The Coming Rise in Residential Inflation
papers.authors: Marijn A. Bolhuis, Judd N. L. Cramer, Lawrence H. Summers
papers.abstract: We study how the recent run-up in housing and rental prices affects the outlook for inflation in the United States. Housing held down overall inflation in 2021. Despite record growth in private market-based measures of home prices and rents, government measured residential services inflation was only four percent for the twelve months ending in January 2022. After explaining the mechanical cause for this divergence, we estimate that, if past relationships hold, the residential inflation components of the CPI and PCE are likely to move close to seven percent during 2022. These findings imply that housing will make a significant contribution to overall inflation in 2022, ranging from one percentage point for headline PCE to 2.6 percentage points for core CPI. We expect residential inflation to remain elevated in 2023.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：E01, E31, E37, R21, R31
papers.zh_title: 即将到来的住宅通胀上升
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了近期房价和租金的上涨如何影响美国通胀的前景。住房在2021年压低了整体通胀。尽管私人市场衡量的房价和租金创纪录增长，但政府衡量的住宅服务通胀在截至2022年1月的十二个月内仅为4%。在解释了这种差异的机制原因后，我们估计，如果过去的关系成立，CPI和PCE中的住宅通胀成分在2022年可能接近7%。这些发现表明，住房将在2022年对整体通胀做出显著贡献，范围从整体PCE的1个百分点到核心CPI的2.6个百分点。我们预计住宅通胀在2023年将保持高位。

papers.title: Asset Prices and Unemployment Fluctuations: A Resolution of the Unemployment Volatility Puzzle
papers.authors: Patrick J. Kehoe, Pierlauro Lopez, Virgiliu Midrigan, Elena Pastorino
papers.abstract: Recent work has demonstrated that existing solutions of the unemployment volatility puzzle are at odds with the procylicality of the opportunity cost of employment, the cyclicality of wages, and the volatility of risk-free rates. We propose a model of business cycles that is immune to these critiques by incorporating two key features. First, we allow for preferences that generate time-varying risk over the business cycle to account for observed fluctuations in asset prices. Second, we introduce human capital acquisition consistent with the evidence on how wages grow with experience in the labor market. Our model reproduces the observed fluctuations in unemployment because hiring a worker is a risky investment with long-duration returns. As in the data, the price of risk in our model sharply increases in recessions. The benefit from hiring new workers therefore greatly declines, leading to a large decrease in job vacancies and an increase in unemployment of the same magnitude as in the data. We show that our results extend to versions of the model that include physical capital, a life cycle for workers, and alternative preference structures common in the asset-pricing literature.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：E3, E32, J22, J23, J24
papers.zh_title: 资产价格与失业波动：失业波动之谜的解决
papers.zh_abstract: 最近的研究表明，现有的失业波动之谜解决方案与就业机会成本的顺周期性、工资的周期性以及无风险利率的波动性不一致。我们提出了一个商业周期模型，通过纳入两个关键特征来避免这些批评。首先，我们允许产生跨商业周期时变风险的偏好，以解释观察到的资产价格波动。其次，我们引入与工资如何随劳动力市场经验增长的经验证据相一致的人力资本积累。我们的模型再现了观察到的失业波动，因为雇佣工人是一项具有长期回报的风险投资。与数据一样，我们模型中的风险价格在经济衰退时急剧上升。因此，雇佣新工人的收益大幅下降，导致职位空缺大幅减少和失业增加，其幅度与数据相同。我们表明，我们的结果可以扩展到包含实物资本、工人生命周期以及资产定价文献中常见的替代偏好结构的模型版本。

papers.title: The Long-Run Labor Market Effects of the Canada-U.S. Free Trade Agreement
papers.authors: Brian K. Kovak, Peter M. Morrow
papers.abstract: This paper assesses the long-run effects of the 1988 Canada-U.S. Free Trade Agreement (CUSFTA) on the Canadian labor market using matched longitudinal administrative data for the years 1984-2004. We simultaneously examine the labor market effects of increased export expansion and import competition, generally finding adverse effects of Canadian tariff cuts and favorable effects of U.S. cuts, though both effects are small. Workers initially employed in industries that experienced larger Canadian tariff concessions exhibit a heightened probability of layoffs at large firms, but little impact on long-run cumulative earnings. Lower earnings and years worked at the initial employer are offset by gains in other manufacturing industries, construction, and services. Canadian workers quickly transitioned out of industries facing import competition, with the majority of industry adjustment occurring among new entrants to the labor market.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：F13, F16, F66, J23, J31
papers.zh_title: 《加美自由贸易协定》的长期劳动力市场效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1984-2004年的纵向行政匹配数据，评估了1988年《加美自由贸易协定》对加拿大劳动力市场的长期影响。我们同时考察了出口扩张和进口竞争加剧的劳动力市场效应，总体发现加拿大关税削减带来不利影响，而美国关税削减则产生有利影响，但两种效应均较小。最初受雇于经历较大加拿大关税减让行业的工人，在大公司被解雇的概率更高，但对长期累积收入影响甚微。在初始雇主处较低的工资和工作年限，被其他制造业、建筑业和服务业的收益所抵消。加拿大工人迅速从面临进口竞争的行业转移出来，行业调整的主体发生在劳动力市场的新进入者中。

papers.title: The Effects of the Emeryville Fair Workweek Ordinance on the Daily Lives of Low-Wage Workers and their Families
papers.authors: Elizabeth Ananat, Anna Gassman-Pines, John Fitz-Henley II
papers.abstract: Emeryville, CA’s Fair Workweek Ordinance (FWO) aimed to reduce service workers’ schedule unpredictability by requiring large retail and food service employers to provide advanced notice of schedules and to compensate workers for last-minute schedule changes. From a 1-in-6 sample of Emeryville retail and food service workers with young children (58 percent working in regulated businesses at baseline, the rest in the same industries in firms below the size cutoff for regulation), this study gathered daily reports of work schedule unpredictability and worker and family well-being over three waves before and after FWO implementation (N=6,059 observations). The FWO decreased working parents’ schedule unpredictability relative to those in similar jobs at unregulated establishments. The FWO also decreased parents’ days worked while increasing hours per work day, leaving total hours roughly unchanged. Finally, parent well-being improved, with significant declines in sleep difficulty.
papers.zh_title: 《埃默里维尔公平工作周条例》对低工资工人及其家庭日常生活的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 加利福尼亚州埃默里维尔的《公平工作周条例》旨在通过要求大型零售和食品服务雇主提前通知排班，并对临时排班变动给予补偿，来减少服务行业工人的排班不可预测性。本研究从埃默里维尔有幼儿的零售和食品服务工人中抽取六分之一样本（基线时58%在受监管企业工作，其余在同一行业但规模低于监管门槛的企业工作），在条例实施前后三个波次中收集了关于工作排班不可预测性以及工人和家庭福祉的每日报告（观测值N=6059）。该条例降低了在职父母相对于在未受监管机构从事类似工作者的排班不可预测性。该条例还减少了父母的工作天数，同时增加了每个工作日的工时，总工时基本保持不变。最后，父母福祉得到改善，睡眠困难显著减少。

papers.title: Selection Into Public Service: Evidence from School Board Elections
papers.authors: Stephen B. Billings, Hugh Macartney, Geunyong Park, John D. Singleton
papers.abstract: In this paper, we use narrowly-decided elections and housing transactions data to test for private returns from public office in the context of school boards in the U.S. We find no detectable effect of election to the school board on home prices in the neighborhoods of winning candidates. Stratifying by political affiliation reveals that homes appreciate in winning Republicans' neighborhoods, but the estimate is not statistically robust. We do not find corresponding evidence for improvements in local school productivity, but we show that neighborhood public schools of Republican members also shift to serving more white students through attendance zone adjustments.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：D72, H75, I24
papers.zh_title: 公共服务的选择：来自学校董事会选举的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用以微弱优势决定的选举和住房交易数据，以美国学校董事会为背景，检验公职的私人回报。我们发现，当选学校董事会对获胜候选人所在社区的房价没有可检测的影响。按政治派别分层显示，获胜共和党人所在社区的房价升值，但该估计在统计上不稳健。我们没有发现当地学校生产率改善的相应证据，但我们表明，共和党成员所在社区的公立学校也通过学区调整，转向服务更多白人学生。

papers.title: Calling All Issuers: The Market for Debt Monitoring
papers.authors: Huaizhi Chen, Lauren Cohen, Weiling Liu
papers.abstract: 95% of long-term municipal bonds have callable features, and yet we find new evidence of a substantial fraction of local governments exercising these valuable options sub-optimally, with significant delays – resulting in sizable losses. Using data from 2001 to 2018, we estimate that U.S. municipals lost over $26 billion from delayed refinancing, whereas the entire U.S. corporate sector, facing the same low interest-rate environment, lost only a comparatively modest $1.4 billion. We present evidence that these delays are related to gaps in localized debt monitoring. For instance, when a bond’s call unlocks in a month that is the fiscal year-end of a local government – a particularly busy time for finance departments – the decision to call is delayed significantly longer. A significantly longer delay also occurs when a municipality is faced with waves of calls all coming due at once. These effects are magnified in smaller municipalities, staffed with smaller finance departments. Moreover, the market for outside monitoring (e.g., underwriters), is a fractured one. It is characterized by extreme stickiness: 87% of a municipality’s bonds are issued with the same underwriter over our sample period. The usage of a less locally-focused underwriter is associated with significantly greater delays.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, PE, POL；JEL：G18, G21, G24, G28, G32, G38, H7, H74
papers.zh_title: 召集所有发行人：债务监控市场
papers.zh_abstract: 95%的长期市政债券具有可赎回特征，然而我们发现新证据表明，相当一部分地方政府在行使这些有价值的期权时表现欠佳，存在显著延迟，从而导致巨额损失。利用2001年至2018年的数据，我们估计美国市政部门因延迟再融资损失超过260亿美元，而整个美国企业部门在相同的低利率环境下，仅损失相对较小的14亿美元。我们提供的证据表明，这些延迟与本地化债务监控的缺口有关。例如，当债券的赎回权在地方政府财政年度末（财务部门特别繁忙的时期）解锁时，赎回决策的延迟显著更长。当市政当局面临一波同时到期的赎回时，也会出现显著更长的延迟。这些效应在财务部门规模较小的较小市政当局中被放大。此外，外部监控市场（例如承销商）是一个碎片化的市场。其特点是极端粘性：在我们的样本期内，一个市政当局87%的债券由同一承销商发行。使用较少本地化关注的承销商与显著更长的延迟相关。

papers.title: Where Do My Tax Dollars Go? Tax Morale Effects of Perceived Government Spending
papers.authors: Matias Giaccobasso, Brad C. Nathan, Ricardo Perez-Truglia, Alejandro Zentner
papers.abstract: Do perceptions about government spending affect willingness to pay taxes? We test this hypothesis with a natural field experiment that focuses on the allocation of property taxes to public schools. Our results show that taxpayers often misperceive the destination of their tax dollars. By introducing shocks to households’ perceptions via an information-provision experiment, we find that perceptions of how tax dollars are used significantly affect the probability of filing a tax appeal. Moreover, the effects are consistent with reciprocal motivations: individuals are more willing to pay taxes if they believe that the government services funded by those taxes will provide greater personal benefit.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LE, PE, POL；JEL：C93, H26, I22, Z13
papers.zh_title: 我的税款去哪儿了？感知政府支出对纳税道德的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 关于政府支出的看法是否会影响纳税意愿？我们通过一项聚焦于房产税向公立学校分配的自然实地实验来检验这一假设。我们的结果表明，纳税人常常误解其税款的去向。通过信息提供实验引入对家庭认知的冲击，我们发现，对税款使用方式的看法显著影响提交税务上诉的概率。此外，这些效应与互惠动机一致：如果个人认为由这些税款资助的政府服务将为其带来更大的个人利益，他们更愿意纳税。

papers.title: Ideas Have Consequences: The Impact of Law and Economics on American Justice
papers.authors: Elliott Ash, Daniel L. Chen, Suresh Naidu
papers.abstract: This paper provides a quantitative analysis of the effects of the early law-and- economics movement on the U.S. judiciary. We focus on the Manne Economics Institute for Federal Judges, an intensive economics course that trained almost half of federal judges between 1976 and 1999. Using the universe of published opinions in U.S. Circuit Courts and 1 million District Court criminal sentencing decisions, we estimate the within-judge effect of Manne program attendance. Selection into attendance was limited—the program was popular across judges from all backgrounds, was regularly oversubscribed, and admitted judges on a first-come first-served basis—and results are robust to a variety of automatically selected covariates predicting the timing of attendance. We find that after attending economics training, participating judges use more economics language in their opinions, issue more conservative decisions in economics-related cases, rule against regulatory agencies more often, favor more lax enforcement in antitrust cases, and impose more/longer criminal sentences. The law-and- economics movement had policy consequences via its influence on U.S. federal judges.
papers.zh_title: 思想有后果：法律经济学对美国司法的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对早期法律经济学运动对美国司法机构的影响进行了定量分析。我们聚焦于曼恩联邦法官经济学研究所，这是一个在1976年至1999年间培训了近半数联邦法官的强化经济学课程。利用美国巡回法院已发表意见的全部数据和100万份地区法院刑事量刑决定，我们估算了参加曼恩项目的法官个体内效应。参加的选择性有限——该项目在所有背景的法官中都很受欢迎，经常超额认购，并按先到先得原则录取法官——结果对自动选择的预测参加时间的各种协变量具有稳健性。我们发现，在参加经济学培训后，参与法官在其意见中使用了更多经济学语言，在与经济相关的案件中做出了更保守的裁决，更频繁地裁定监管机构败诉，在反垄断案件中倾向于更宽松的执行，并施加了更多/更长的刑事判决。法律经济学运动通过其对美国联邦法官的影响产生了政策后果。

papers.title: Causality and Econometrics
papers.authors: James J. Heckman, Rodrigo Pinto
papers.abstract: This paper examines the econometric causal model for policy analysis developed by the seminal ideas of Ragnar Frisch and Trygve Haavelmo. We compare the econometric causal model with two popular causal frameworks: Neyman-Holland causal model and the do-calculus. The Neyman-Holland causal model is based on the language of potential outcomes and was largely developed by statisticians. The do-calculus, developed by Judea Pearl and co-authors, relies on Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) and is a popular causal framework in computer science. We make the case that economists who uncritically use these approximating frameworks often discard the substantial benefits of the econometric causal model to the detriment of more informative economic policy analyses. We illustrate the versatility and capabilities of the econometric framework using causal models that are frequently studied by economists.
papers.zh_title: 因果关系与计量经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了由拉格纳·弗里希和特里格夫·哈维尔莫的开创性思想发展起来的、用于政策分析的计量经济学因果模型。我们将计量经济学因果模型与两种流行的因果框架进行比较：内曼-霍兰德因果模型和do-演算。内曼-霍兰德因果模型基于潜在结果的语言，主要由统计学家发展。do-演算由朱迪亚·珀尔及其合著者发展，依赖于有向无环图，是计算机科学中流行的因果框架。我们论证，不加批判地使用这些近似框架的经济学家，往往丢弃了计量经济学因果模型的实质性优势，从而损害了更具信息量的经济政策分析。我们使用经济学家经常研究的因果模型，来说明计量经济学框架的通用性和能力。

papers.title: Seeing the Future: A Better Way to Model and Test for Adaptive Developmental Plasticity
papers.authors: Anup Malani, Stacy Rosenbaum, Susan C. Alberts, Elizabeth A. Archie
papers.abstract: Early life conditions can have profound effects on individual health, longevity, and biological fitness. Two classes of hypotheses are used to explain the evolutionary origins of these effects: developmental constraints (DC) hypotheses, which focus on the deleterious effects of low-quality early-life environments, and predictive adaptive response (PAR) models, which focus on organisms’ predictions about their adult environment, phenotypic adaptations based on that prediction, and the deleterious consequences of incorrect predictions. Despite their popularity, these ideas remain poorly defined. To remedy this, we provide mathematical definitions for DC, PARs, and related concepts, and develop statistical tests derived from these definitions. We use simulations to demonstrate that PARs are more readily detected by tests based on quadratic regressions than by tests based on more commonly used interaction regression models. We demonstrate that the poor performance of interaction models stems from two problems: first, they are mathematically incapable of detecting a central prediction of PAR, and second, they conceptually conflate PARs with DC. We conclude by providing recommendations for how researchers can make use of explicit definitions and properly-aligned visualizations and statistical tests to make progress in this important research area.
papers.zh_title: 预见未来：建模和检验适应性发育可塑性的更好方法
papers.zh_abstract: 早期生活条件可能对个体健康、寿命和生物适应性产生深远影响。有两类假说用于解释这些效应的进化起源：发育约束假说，侧重于低质量早期生活环境的有害效应；以及预测性适应反应模型，侧重于生物体对其成年环境的预测、基于该预测的表型适应以及错误预测的有害后果。尽管这些观点很流行，但它们仍然定义不清。为弥补这一点，我们为发育约束、预测性适应反应及相关概念提供了数学定义，并基于这些定义开发了统计检验。我们使用模拟证明，基于二次回归的检验比基于更常用的交互回归模型的检验更容易检测到预测性适应反应。我们证明，交互模型表现不佳源于两个问题：首先，它们在数学上无法检测预测性适应反应的核心预测；其次，它们在概念上将预测性适应反应与发育约束混为一谈。最后，我们为研究人员如何利用明确定义以及适当对齐的可视化和统计检验，在这一重要研究领域取得进展提供了建议。

papers.title: How Important are Minimum Wage Increases in Increasing the Wages of Minimum Wage Workers?
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Michael R. Strain
papers.abstract: Popular discussion commonly presumes an outsized role for minimum wage increases as a driver of wage increases for minimum wage workers. In this paper, we investigate the accuracy of this presumption using data from the earnings studies of the Current Population Survey (CPS). CPS wage and earnings data enable us to assess the fraction of minimum wage workers who receive a raise within 12 months of their initial appearance as a minimum wage worker. On average from 2010 to 2019, we find that roughly 75 percent of minimum wage workers who remain employed experience a wage increase within 12 months. This fraction is higher during the later years of the sample, when the labor market has been strong, than in the earlier years. The fraction of minimum wage workers receiving wage increases is moderately higher when states enact minimum wage increases than when they do not. We also find that the fraction of minimum wage workers receiving wage increases is correlated with several measures of labor market tightness. Finally, wage gains are quite commonly associated with industry and/or occupation switches. This highlights the importance of career progression for the growth of earnings among entry-level workers. The vast majority of the wage gains realized by minimum wage workers thus appear to be driven by career progression and increases in labor demand. Minimum wage increases play a modest role as a driver of earnings trajectories beyond shaping the initial, typically short-lived, minimum wage job itself.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资上涨对提高最低工资工人工资有多重要？
papers.zh_abstract: 公众讨论通常假定最低工资上涨在推动最低工资工人工资增长中扮演着过大的角色。在本文中，我们利用当前人口调查（CPS）的工资研究数据来调查这一假定的准确性。CPS的工资和收入数据使我们能够评估在首次成为最低工资工人后12个月内获得加薪的最低工资工人比例。平均而言，从2010年到2019年，我们发现大约75%的仍受雇用的最低工资工人在12个月内经历了工资增长。这一比例在样本后期（劳动力市场强劲时）高于早期。当各州实施最低工资上涨时，获得加薪的最低工资工人比例略高于未实施时。我们还发现，获得加薪的最低工资工人比例与几个劳动力市场紧张程度的衡量指标相关。最后，工资增长通常与行业和/或职业转换相关。这凸显了职业发展对入门级工人收入增长的重要性。因此，最低工资工人实现的绝大多数工资增长似乎是由职业发展和劳动力需求增加驱动的。最低工资上涨在塑造最初的、通常是短暂的最低工资工作本身之外，对收入轨迹的推动作用较为温和。

papers.title: Effects of the Expanded Child Tax Credit on Employment Outcomes: Evidence from Real-World Data from April to December 2021
papers.authors: Elizabeth Ananat, Benjamin Glasner, Christal Hamilton, Zachary Parolin
papers.abstract: Studies have established that the expanded Child Tax Credit (CTC), which provided monthly cash payments to most U.S. families with children from July to December 2021, substantially reduced poverty and food hardship. Other studies posit, however, that the CTC payments may generate negative employment effects that could offset its potential poverty-reduction effects. Scholars have simulated employment scenarios assuming various labor supply elasticities, but less work has empirically assessed how the monthly payments affected employment outcomes using real-world data. To evaluate employment effects, we apply a series of difference-in-differences analyses using data from the monthly Current Population Survey and the Census Pulse, both from April through December 2021. Across both samples and several model specifications, we find very small, inconsistently signed, and statistically insignificant impacts of the CTC both on employment in the prior week and on active participation in the labor force among adults living in households with children. Further, labor supply responses to the policy change do not differ for households for whom the CTC’s expansion eliminated a previous work incentive. Thus, our analyses of real-world data suggest that the expanded CTC did not have negative short-term employment effects that offset its documented reductions in poverty and hardship.
papers.zh_title: 扩大儿童税收抵免对就业结果的影响：来自2021年4月至12月真实世界数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 已有研究证实，扩大儿童税收抵免（CTC）——该政策于2021年7月至12月向大多数有孩子的美国家庭提供每月现金支付——显著减少了贫困和食品困难。然而，其他研究认为，CTC支付可能产生负面就业效应，从而抵消其潜在的减贫效果。学者们假设了各种劳动供给弹性来模拟就业情景，但利用真实世界数据实证评估每月支付如何影响就业结果的研究较少。为了评估就业效应，我们使用2021年4月至12月的月度当前人口调查和人口普查脉冲数据，应用了一系列双重差分分析。在两个样本和多种模型设定中，我们发现CTC对生活在有孩子家庭中的成年人过去一周的就业以及积极参与劳动力市场的影响非常小、符号不一致且统计上不显著。此外，对于CTC扩大消除了先前工作激励的家庭，其对政策变化的劳动供给反应并无差异。因此，我们对真实世界数据的分析表明，扩大CTC并未产生负面的短期就业效应，从而抵消其已证实的贫困和困难减少效果。

papers.title: School Choice
papers.authors: Atila Abdulkadiroglu, Tommy Andersson
papers.abstract: School districts in the US and around the world are increasingly moving away from traditional neighborhood school assignment, in which pupils attend closest schools to their homes. Instead, they allow families to choose from schools within district boundaries. This creates a market with parental demand over publicly-supplied school seats. More frequently than ever, this market for school seats is cleared via market design solutions grounded in recent advances in matching and mechanism design theory. The literature on school choice is reviewed with emphasis placed on the trade-offs among policy objectives and best practices in the design of admissions processes. It is concluded with a brief discussion about how data generated by assignment algorithms can be used to answer contemporary empirical questions about school effectiveness and policy interventions.
papers.zh_title: 择校
papers.zh_abstract: 美国及世界各地的学区正日益摆脱传统的就近入学分配模式（即学生就读离家最近的学校），转而允许家庭在学区范围内选择学校。这形成了一个由家长对公立学校座位需求构成的市场。如今，这一学校座位市场比以往任何时候都更频繁地通过基于匹配与机制设计理论最新进展的市场设计解决方案来出清。本文回顾了关于择校的文献，重点阐述了政策目标之间的权衡以及招生流程设计中的最佳实践。最后，简要讨论了如何利用分配算法产生的数据来回答关于学校效能和政策干预的当代实证问题。

papers.title: Dynamic Trading with Realization Utility
papers.authors: Min Dai, Cong Qin, Neng Wang
papers.abstract: An investor receives utility bursts from realizing gains and losses at the individual-stock level (Barberis and Xiong, 2009, 2012; Ingersoll and Jin, 2013) and dynamically allocates his mental budget between risky and risk-free assets at the trading-account level. Using savings, he reduces his stockholdings and is more willing to realize losses. Using leverage, he increases his stockholdings beyond his mental budget and is more reluctant to realize losses. While leverage strengthens the disposition effect, introducing leverage constraints mitigates it. Our model predicts that investors with stocks in deep losses sell them either immediately or after stocks rebound a little.
papers.zh_title: 基于实现效用的动态交易
papers.zh_abstract: 一位投资者从个股层面实现收益和损失中获得效用爆发（Barberis and Xiong, 2009, 2012; Ingersoll and Jin, 2013），并在交易账户层面动态地在风险资产和无风险资产之间分配其心理预算。通过储蓄，他减少股票持有量，并更愿意实现损失。通过杠杆，他增加股票持有量超出其心理预算，并更不愿意实现损失。虽然杠杆强化了处置效应，但引入杠杆约束则缓解了该效应。我们的模型预测，持有深度亏损股票的投资者要么立即卖出这些股票，要么在股票小幅反弹后卖出。

papers.title: Systemic Discrimination: Theory and Measurement
papers.authors: J. Aislinn Bohren, Peter Hull, Alex Imas
papers.abstract: Economists often measure discrimination as disparities arising from the direct effects of group identity. We develop new tools to model and measure systemic discrimination, which instead captures how discrimination in other decisions indirectly contributes to disparities. We propose an experimental design, the Iterated Audit, to identify systemic discrimination. We then illustrate these new tools in two field experiments. The first experiment shows how racial discrimination accumulates across multiple rounds of hiring through the interaction of two forces: greater discrimination against inexperienced workers—which affects the opportunity to obtain experience—and high subsequent returns to experience. The second experiment shows how gender-based differences in the language of recommendation letters can translate into systemic gender discrimination in STEM hiring. We discuss how our findings qualify previous results on direct discrimination and outline how our tools can be used to target policy interventions.
papers.zh_title: 系统性歧视：理论与测度
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家通常将歧视测度为源于群体身份直接效应的差异。我们开发了新的工具来建模和测度系统性歧视，后者则捕捉其他决策中的歧视如何间接导致差异。我们提出了一种实验设计——迭代审计——来识别系统性歧视。然后，我们在两个实地实验中展示了这些新工具。第一个实验展示了种族歧视如何通过两种力量的相互作用在多次招聘轮次中累积：对缺乏经验工人的更大歧视（这影响了获得经验的机会）以及经验随后带来的高回报。第二个实验展示了推荐信语言中的性别差异如何转化为STEM招聘中的系统性性别歧视。我们讨论了我们的发现如何对先前关于直接歧视的研究结果进行限定，并概述了我们的工具如何用于针对政策干预。

papers.title: Capital Taxation, Development, and Globalization: Evidence from a Macro-Historical Database
papers.authors: Pierre Bachas, Matthew H. Fisher-Post, Anders Jensen, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: This paper builds and analyzes a new global macro-historical database of effective tax rates on capital and labor in 154 countries. We establish a new stylized fact: while effective capital tax rates fell in developed countries between 1965 and 2018, they rose in developing countries since 1990. Multiple research designs at the country, sector and firm-level suggest that trade openness contributed to this rise, by increasing the share of output produced in corporations and larger firms, where effective capital taxation is higher. In contrast to a common view, globalization appears in many countries to have supported governments’ ability to tax capital.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, PE；JEL：F14, F62, H20, O24
papers.zh_title: 资本税、发展与全球化：来自宏观历史数据库的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建并分析了一个新的全球宏观历史数据库，涵盖了154个国家对资本和劳动的有效税率。我们确立了一个新的典型事实：在1965年至2018年间，发达国家的有效资本税率下降，而发展中国家的有效资本税率自1990年以来却上升了。基于国家、行业和企业层面的多种研究设计表明，贸易开放通过提高产出在公司和大企业中的份额（这些地方的有效资本税率更高）促进了这一上升。与普遍观点相反，全球化在许多国家似乎支持了政府对资本征税的能力。

papers.title: Inequality and Income Dynamics in Germany
papers.authors: Moritz Drechsel-Grau, Andreas Peichl, Johannes F. Schmieder, Kai D. Schmid, Hannes Walz, Stefanie Wolter
papers.abstract: We provide a comprehensive analysis of income inequality and income dynamics for Germany over the last two decades. Combining personal income tax and social security data allows us – for the first time – to offer a complete picture of the distribution of annual earnings in Germany. We find that cross-sectional inequality rose until 2009 for men and women. After the Great Recession inequality continued to rise at a slower rate for men and fell slightly for women due to compression at the lower tail. We further document substantial gender differences in average earnings and inequality over the life-cycle. While for men earnings rise and inequality falls as they grow older, many women reduce working hours when starting a family such that average earnings fall and inequality increases. Men’s earnings changes are on average smaller than women’s but are substantially more affected by the business cycle. During the Great Recession, men’s earnings losses become magnified and gains are attenuated. Apart from recession years, earnings changes are significantly right-skewed reflecting the good overall state of the German labor market and increasing labor supply. In the second part of the paper, we study the distribution of total income including incomes of self-employed, business owners, and landlords. We find that total inequality increased significantly more than earnings inequality. Regarding income dynamics, entrepreneurs’ income changes are more dispersed, less skewed, less leptokurtic and less dependent on average past income than workers’ income changes. Finally, we find that top income earners have become less likely to fall out of the top 1 and 0.1 percent.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, LS, PE；JEL：E2, J16, J2, J3
papers.zh_title: 德国的收入不平等与收入动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对过去二十年德国的收入不平等和收入动态进行了全面分析。结合个人所得税和社会保障数据，使我们首次能够提供德国年度收入分布的完整图景。我们发现，男性和女性的横截面不平等在2009年之前持续上升。大衰退之后，男性的不平等继续以较慢速度上升，而女性由于下尾压缩，不平等略有下降。我们进一步记录了平均收入和生命周期不平等的显著性别差异。男性随着年龄增长收入上升且不平等下降，而许多女性在组建家庭时减少工作时间，导致平均收入下降和不平等加剧。男性的收入变化平均小于女性，但受经济周期的影响要大得多。在大衰退期间，男性的收入损失被放大，收益被削弱。除衰退年份外，收入变化显著右偏，反映了德国劳动力市场的良好整体状况和劳动供给的增加。在论文的第二部分，我们研究了包括自雇者、企业主和房东收入在内的总收入分布。我们发现总收入不平等的增长显著大于收入不平等。关于收入动态，企业家的收入变化比工人的收入变化更分散、更不偏斜、更不尖峰，并且对过去平均收入的依赖更小。最后，我们发现高收入者跌出前1%和前0.1%的可能性降低了。

papers.title: Economic Crises and Mental Health: Effects of the Great Recession on Older Americans
papers.authors: David M. Cutler, Noémie Sportiche
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of the Great Recession of 2007-2009 on the mental health of older adults, using longitudinal Health and Retirement Study data linked to area-level data on house prices. We use a variety of measures to capture mental health and rely on the very large cross-sectional variation in falling house prices to identify the impact of the Great Recession on those outcomes. We also account for people who moved in response to falling prices by fixing each person’s location immediately prior to the house price collapse. Our central finding is that the Great Recession had heterogeneous effects on health. While mental health was not affected for the average older adult, mental health declined among homeowners with few financial assets, who were therefore more vulnerable to falling house prices. Importantly, health impacts in this group differed by race and ethnicity: depression and functional limitations worsened among Black and other non-white homeowners and medication use increased among white homeowners. There were no measurable impacts for Hispanic homeowners. These results highlight the importance of examining heterogeneity across multiple dimensions when examining the health impacts of economic conditions.
papers.zh_title: 经济危机与心理健康：大衰退对美国老年人的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用与地区层面房价数据相关联的纵向健康与退休研究数据，考察了2007-2009年大衰退对老年人心理健康的影响。我们使用多种指标来捕捉心理健康状况，并依靠房价下跌的巨大横截面差异来识别大衰退对这些结果的影响。我们还通过将每个人的位置固定在其房价暴跌前的时点，来考虑因房价下跌而搬家的人群。我们的核心发现是，大衰退对健康产生了异质性影响。虽然平均而言老年人的心理健康未受影响，但在金融资产较少的房主中，心理健康状况下降，因为他们更容易受到房价下跌的影响。重要的是，该群体中的健康影响因种族和民族而异：黑人和其它非白人房主的抑郁和功能限制恶化，而白人房主的药物使用增加。对西班牙裔房主没有可测量的影响。这些结果强调了在考察经济状况对健康影响时，审视多个维度异质性的重要性。

papers.title: Investing in the Next Generation: The Long-Run Impacts of a Liquidity Shock
papers.authors: Patrick Agte, Arielle Bernhardt, Erica M. Field, Rohini Pande, Natalia Rigol
papers.abstract: How do poor entrepreneurs trade off investments in business enterprises versus children's human capital, and how do these choices influence intergenerational socio-economic mobility? To examine this, we exploit experimental variation in household income resulting from a one-time relaxation of household liquidity constraints (Field et al., 2013), and track schooling and business outcomes over the subsequent 11 years. On average, treatment households, who were made wealthier through the experiment, increase human capital investment such that their children are 35% more likely to attend college. However, schooling gains only accrue to children with literate parents, among whom college attendance nearly doubles. In contrast, treatment effects on investment among the illiterate accrue only on the business margin and are accompanied by adverse educational outcomes for children. As a result, treatment lowers relative educational mobility. In a forecasting exercise, we find that earnings gains for literate households are four times larger than the earnings gains for illiterate households, raising earnings inequality. Our findings highlight how parental investment choices can contribute to a growth in intergenerational earnings inequality despite reductions in urban poverty.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, PR；JEL：G32, I24, I25, I26, I32, L26, O1, O15, O16
papers.zh_title: 投资下一代：流动性冲击的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 贫困企业家如何在企业投资与子女人力资本投资之间进行权衡？这些选择如何影响代际社会经济流动性？为考察这一点，我们利用一次性放松家庭流动性约束所产生的家庭收入实验性变化（Field et al., 2013），并追踪随后11年的教育和商业结果。平均而言，通过实验变得更富裕的处理组家庭增加了人力资本投资，使其子女上大学的概率提高了35%。然而，教育收益仅发生在父母有读写能力的儿童中，这些儿童的大学入学率几乎翻了一番。相比之下，对无读写能力家庭的处理效应仅体现在商业投资方面，并伴随着子女教育的不良后果。因此，处理降低了相对教育流动性。在一项预测练习中，我们发现，有读写能力家庭的收入增长是无读写能力家庭的四倍，从而加剧了收入不平等。我们的发现强调了尽管城市贫困减少，但父母投资选择如何可能导致代际收入不平等的加剧。

papers.title: A Note on Temporary Supply Shocks with Aggregate Demand Inertia
papers.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: We study optimal monetary policy during temporary supply contractions when aggregate demand has inertia and the central bank is concerned about future constraints on expansionary policy. In this environment, it is optimal to run the economy hot until supply recovers. However, the policy does not remain loose throughout the low-supply phase. Overall, when the initial aggregate demand is low, the goal is to frontload the rate cuts to raise demand in anticipation of the recovery of supply. If inflation also has inertia, the central bank still overheats the economy during the low-supply phase but gradually cools it down over time.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E32, E43, E44, E52, G12
papers.zh_title: 关于具有总需求惯性的暂时性供给冲击的注记
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在总需求具有惯性且央行担忧未来扩张性政策受限的情况下，面对暂时性供给收缩时的最优货币政策。在这种环境下，最优策略是在供给恢复前让经济过热运行。然而，政策在整个低供给阶段并非始终保持宽松。总体而言，当初始总需求较低时，目标是提前降息，以在供给复苏预期到来前提升需求。如果通胀也具有惯性，央行仍会在低供给阶段让经济过热，但会随时间推移逐步降温。

papers.title: Improving Willingness-to-Pay Elicitation by Including a Benchmark Good
papers.authors: Rebecca Dizon-Ross, Seema Jayachandran
papers.abstract: We propose and validate a simple way to augment the standard Becker-DeGroot-Marschak method that researchers use to elicit willingness to pay (WTP) for a good. The augmentation is to measure WTP for another good ("benchmark good"), one unrelated to both the good the researcher is interested in and the independent variables of interest, and to use WTP for the benchmark good as a control variable in analyses. We illustrate the method and how it can eliminate noise in measured WTP using data collected in Uganda.
papers.zh_title: 通过纳入基准商品改进支付意愿的诱导方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出并验证了一种简单的方法，用于增强研究者常用的贝克尔-德格鲁特-马沙克方法，以诱导对某商品的支付意愿。该增强措施是测量另一种商品（“基准商品”）的支付意愿，这种商品既与研究者感兴趣的商品无关，也与所关注的自变量无关，并在分析中将基准商品的支付意愿作为控制变量使用。我们利用在乌干达收集的数据，展示了该方法及其如何消除测量支付意愿中的噪声。

papers.title: Indirect Effects of Access to Finance
papers.authors: Jing Cai, Adam Szeidl
papers.abstract: We created experimental variation across local markets in China in the share of firms having access to a new loan product, to measure the direct and indirect effects of access to finance. We find that: (1) Access to finance had a large positive direct effect on the performance of treated firms. (2) Access to finance had a similar-sized negative indirect effect on the performance of firms with treated competitors. The two effects offset in the aggregate and imply no detectable gains in producer surplus. (3) Access to finance had a positive direct effect on business practices, service quality, and consumer satisfaction, and a negative effect on price. None of these effects were offset by indirect effects, suggesting net gains in consumer surplus. (4) Two additional indirect effects were active: diffusion of borrowing to firms with treated peers, and diffusion of demand to firms with treated neighbors. (5) Combining several effects in a model-based evaluation, we estimate that the loan had a private return of 74%, most of which was offset by losses to competitors, and a social return of 60%, most of which was driven by gains to consumers.
papers.zh_title: 融资可及性的间接效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在中国地方市场中实验性地创造了企业获得新贷款产品比例的差异，以衡量融资可及性的直接和间接效应。我们发现：（1）融资可及性对受处理企业的绩效有较大的正向直接效应。（2）融资可及性对与受处理企业存在竞争关系的企业绩效有同等规模的负向间接效应。这两种效应在总体上相互抵消，意味着生产者剩余没有可检测的增益。（3）融资可及性对商业实践、服务质量和消费者满意度有正向直接效应，对价格有负向效应。这些效应均未被间接效应抵消，表明消费者剩余有净增益。（4）还存在两种额外的间接效应：借款行为向有受处理同行的企业扩散，以及需求向有受处理邻居的企业扩散。（5）通过基于模型的评估综合多种效应，我们估计该贷款的私人回报率为74%，其中大部分被竞争对手的损失所抵消，社会回报率为60%，其中大部分由消费者收益驱动。

papers.title: European Recessions and Native American Conflict
papers.authors: Marco Del Angel, Gregory D. Hess, Marc D. Weidenmier
papers.abstract: We investigate the extent to which conflicts between Native American tribes and U.S. Army troops were caused by poor economic conditions in Europe from 1869 to 1890. We hypothesize that contractions in economic activity pushed many Europeans to move to the western United States in search of better economic opportunity. The empirical analysis demonstrates that immigration, interacted with US railroad access, caused the probability of a Native American conflict to increase by approximately 46 percent.
papers.zh_title: 欧洲经济衰退与美洲原住民冲突
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1869年至1890年间，美洲原住民部落与美国陆军部队之间的冲突在多大程度上是由欧洲糟糕的经济状况引起的。我们假设，经济活动的收缩促使许多欧洲人迁移到美国西部寻找更好的经济机会。实证分析表明，移民与美国铁路通达性的交互作用，使美洲原住民冲突发生的概率增加了约46%。

papers.title: When Can Benefit Cost Analyses Ignore Secondary Markets?
papers.authors: Matthew Kotchen, Arik Levinson
papers.abstract: We make four main contributions in this paper related to the theory and practice of benefit cost analysis (BCA). First, we show that most BCAs of policy interventions do not consider the welfare consequences in secondary markets, where goods or services can be complements or substitutes to those in the directly regulated markets. Second, we provide a general theoretical analysis for examining the sign of welfare effects in secondary markets, showing how the results depend on the welfare measure of interest and on whether the goods are complements or substitutes. In doing so, we conclude that the welfare effects in secondary markets will typically be negative in cases most relevant for policy analysis. Third, we develop a straightforward tool that BCA analysts can use to evaluate the potential magnitude of secondary market effects in particular applications. The tool itself highlights how secondary markets are likely to be relatively small in most circumstances. Finally, we illustrate use of the tool in different applications that provide further evidence that secondary market effects are likely to be small.
papers.zh_title: 何时效益成本分析可以忽略次级市场？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在效益成本分析的理论与实践方面做出了四项主要贡献。首先，我们表明，大多数政策干预的效益成本分析并未考虑次级市场中的福利后果，在这些市场中，商品或服务可能是直接受监管市场中商品或服务的互补品或替代品。其次，我们提供了一个一般性理论分析，用于检验次级市场中福利效应的符号，展示了结果如何取决于所关注的福利度量以及商品是互补品还是替代品。在此过程中，我们得出结论，在政策分析最相关的情况下，次级市场中的福利效应通常为负。第三，我们开发了一个直观的工具，效益成本分析人员可以在特定应用中评估次级市场效应的潜在规模。该工具本身突显了在大多数情况下次级市场可能相对较小。最后，我们通过不同应用展示了该工具的使用，进一步证明了次级市场效应可能很小的证据。

papers.title: Intergenerational Persistence in Child Mortality
papers.authors: Frances R. Lu, Tom Vogl
papers.abstract: We study the intergenerational persistence of inequality by estimating grandmother-mother associations in the loss of a child, using pooled data from 119 Demographic and Health Surveys in 44 developing countries. Compared with compatriots of the same age, women with at least one sibling who died in childhood face 39% higher odds of having experienced at least one own-child death, or 7 percentage points at age 49. Place fixed effects reduce estimated mortality persistence by 47%; socioeconomic covariates explain far less. Within countries over time, persistence falls with aggregate child mortality, so that mortality decline disproportionately benefits high-mortality lineages.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH；JEL：I14, I15, J62, O15
papers.zh_title: 儿童死亡率的代际持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自44个发展中国家119项人口与健康调查的合并数据，通过估计祖母与母亲在子女死亡方面的关联，研究了不平等的代际持续性。与同龄同胞相比，至少有一个兄弟姐妹在童年时期去世的女性，其经历过至少一次自身子女死亡的概率高出39%，或在49岁时高出7个百分点。地区固定效应使估计的死亡率持续性降低了47%；社会经济协变量解释的差异要少得多。在国家内部随时间推移，持续性随着总体儿童死亡率的下降而下降，因此死亡率下降不成比例地惠及高死亡率谱系。

papers.title: Allocating Scarce Information
papers.authors: Richard T. Holden, Anup Malani, Chris Teh
papers.abstract: Sender conveys scarce information to a number of receivers to maximize the sum of receiver payoffs. Each receiver’s payoff depends on the state of the world and an action she takes. The optimal action is state contingent. Under mild regularity conditions, we show that the payoff of each receiver is convex in the amount of information she receives. Thus, it is optimal for Sender to target information to a single receiver. We then study four extensions in which interior information allocations are optimal.
papers.zh_title: 稀缺信息的分配
papers.zh_abstract: 发送者向多个接收者传递稀缺信息，以最大化接收者收益的总和。每个接收者的收益取决于世界状态和她采取的行动。最优行动是依状态而定的。在温和的正则条件下，我们证明每个接收者的收益是她所接收信息量的凸函数。因此，发送者将信息集中传递给单个接收者是最优的。随后，我们研究了四种扩展情形，在这些情形中，内部信息分配是最优的。

papers.title: Economic Geography and the Efficiency of Environmental Regulation
papers.authors: Alex Hollingsworth, Taylor Jaworski, Carl Kitchens, Ivan J. Rudik
papers.abstract: We develop a quantitative economic geography model with endogenous emissions, amenities, trade, and labor reallocation to evaluate the spatial impact of the leading air quality regulation in the United States: the National Ambient Air Quality Standards (NAAQS). We find that the NAAQS generate $40 billion in annual welfare gains. The gains are spatially concentrated in a small set of cities targeted by the NAAQS, and the improved amenities attract large numbers of nonmanufacturing workers into these areas. We use our model to analyze counterfactual policies and find that using first-best emissions pricing increases welfare by an additional $70 billion per year. Atmospheric transport of emissions, labor reallocation, and trade are first-order factors for quantifying the level and distribution of the costs and benefits of the NAAQS.
papers.zh_title: 经济地理与环境规制的效率
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含内生排放、宜居性、贸易和劳动力重新配置的定量经济地理模型，以评估美国主要空气质量法规——国家环境空气质量标准（NAAQS）的空间影响。我们发现，NAAQS每年带来400亿美元的福利收益。这些收益在空间上集中于NAAQS所针对的一小部分城市，并且改善后的宜居性吸引了大量非制造业工人进入这些地区。我们利用模型分析反事实政策，发现采用最优排放定价每年可额外增加700亿美元的福利。大气污染物传输、劳动力重新配置和贸易是量化NAAQS成本与收益水平及分布的一阶因素。

papers.title: The Influence of Cousin Order and Cousin Group Size on Educational Outcomes
papers.authors: Kieron Barclay, Dalton Conley
papers.abstract: Despite growing interest in the potential influence of grandparents on grandchild status attainment, research has not addressed whether the ordinal position or number of grandchildren affects outcomes. We apply sibling- and cousin-fixed effects analyses to Swedish population data to examine how cousin order and cousin group size influence grade point average (GPA) percentile rank at the end of compulsory school. We study cohorts born 1972-2003 (N=1,591,979). In cousin fixed effects analyses, second-born, fifth-born, and tenth or later born maternal cousins achieve GPA ranked scores 1.04, 2.17, and 4.97 percentile points lower than first-born cousins, respectively. Amongst paternal cousins the differences relative to the first-born cousin are 0.02, 0.46, and 1.86 percentile points low-er, respectively—suggesting the greater influence of the mother’s extended family. In further analyses we examine whether an arguably exogenous shock to cousin group size, a twin birth to an aunt or uncle, has any impact on GPA percentile rank. Instrumental variable analyses indicate that an increase in maternal cousin group size has a statistically significant negative effect on GPA rank, lowering GPA rank in percentile points by 0.27, but an increase in paternal cousin group size does not negatively affect GPA rank.
papers.zh_title: 堂表亲出生顺序与堂表亲群体规模对教育成果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管对祖父母可能影响孙辈地位获得的兴趣日益增长，但研究尚未探讨孙辈的出生顺序或数量是否会影响结果。我们运用兄弟姐妹固定效应和堂表亲固定效应分析，基于瑞典人口数据，考察堂表亲出生顺序和堂表亲群体规模如何影响义务教育结束时的平均绩点（GPA）百分位排名。我们研究了1972-2003年出生的队列（N=1,591,979）。在堂表亲固定效应分析中，与头胎出生的母系堂表亲相比，第二胎、第五胎以及第十胎及以后出生的母系堂表亲的GPA百分位排名分别低1.04、2.17和4.97个百分点。在父系堂表亲中，与头胎出生的堂表亲相比，这些差异分别低0.02、0.46和1.86个百分点——这表明母亲一方的大家庭影响更大。在进一步分析中，我们检验了堂表亲群体规模的一个可视为外生的冲击——即姑姨或叔舅的双胞胎出生——是否对GPA百分位排名有任何影响。工具变量分析表明，母系堂表亲群体规模的增加对GPA排名有统计上显著的负向影响，使GPA百分位排名降低0.27，但父系堂表亲群体规模的增加对GPA排名没有负向影响。

papers.title: Highly Powered Analysis Plans
papers.authors: Michael L. Anderson, Jeremy Magruder
papers.abstract: Formal analysis plans limit false discoveries by registering and multiplicity adjusting statistical tests. As each registered test reduces power on other tests, researchers prune hypotheses based on prior knowledge, often by combining related indicators into evenly-weighted indices. We propose two improvements to maximize learning within these types of analysis plans. First, we develop data-driven optimized indices that can yield more powerful tests than evenly-weighted indices. Second, we discuss organizing the logical structure of an analysis plan into a gated tree that directs type I error towards these high-powered tests. In simulations we show that researchers may prefer these "optimus gates" across a wide range of data-generating processes. We then assess our strategy using the community-driven development (CDD) application from Casey et al. (2012) and the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment from Finkelstein et al. (2012). We find substantial power gains in both applications, meaningfully changing the conclusions of Casey et al. (2012).
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE；JEL：C12, C55, C81, C9, C93, O1
papers.zh_title: 高功效的分析计划
papers.zh_abstract: 正式的分析计划通过注册统计检验并进行多重性调整来限制虚假发现。由于每个注册的检验会降低其他检验的功效，研究者会基于先验知识精简假设，通常通过将相关指标合并为等权指数来实现。我们提出两项改进，以在这类分析计划中最大化学习效果。首先，我们开发了数据驱动的优化指数，其能产生比等权指数更有效的检验。其次，我们讨论了将分析计划的逻辑结构组织成一个门控树，该树将第一类错误导向这些高功效检验。在模拟中，我们表明研究者可能在广泛的数据生成过程中偏好这些“最优门控”。随后，我们使用Casey等人（2012）的社区驱动发展（CDD）应用和Finkelstein等人（2012）的俄勒冈健康保险实验来评估我们的策略。我们发现这两个应用都有显著的功效提升，从而有意义地改变了Casey等人（2012）的结论。

papers.title: Energy Prices and Electric Vehicle Adoption
papers.authors: James B. Bushnell, Erich Muehlegger, David S. Rapson
papers.abstract: This paper presents evidence that gasoline prices have a larger effect on demand for electric vehicles (EVs) than electricity prices in California. We match a spatially-disaggregated panel dataset of monthly EV registration records to detailed records of gasoline and electricity prices in California from 2014-2017, and use these to estimate the effect of energy prices on EV demand. Two distinct empirical approaches (panel fixed-effects and a utility-border discontinuity) yield remarkably similar results: a given change in gasoline prices has roughly four to six times the effect on EV demand as a similar percentage change in electricity prices. We explore the implications for optimal EV subsidies, which promote externality reduction benefits and correct for consumer misoptimization stemming from the undervaluation of future electricity costs.
papers.zh_title: 能源价格与电动汽车普及
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供的证据表明，在加利福尼亚州，汽油价格对电动汽车（EV）需求的影响大于电价。我们将2014-2017年加利福尼亚州月度电动汽车注册记录的空间细分面板数据集与汽油和电价的详细记录进行匹配，并利用这些数据估计能源价格对电动汽车需求的影响。两种不同的实证方法（面板固定效应和公用事业边界断点回归）得出了显著相似的结果：汽油价格的给定变化对电动汽车需求的影响，大约是相同百分比电价变化的四到六倍。我们探讨了对最优电动汽车补贴的启示，这些补贴旨在促进外部性减少效益，并纠正因低估未来电力成本而导致的消费者错误优化。

papers.title: Presidential Address: Corporate Finance and Reality
papers.authors: John Graham
papers.abstract: This paper conducts surveys that document CFO perspectives on corporate planning, corporate investment, capital structure, payout, and the goal of the firm. Current policy choices are compared to CFO survey data from two decades prior, which allows me to identify decision-making themes that are common across policies and through time. These common elements of real-world corporate finance indicate that companies make decisions based on internal forecasts that are miscalibrated and thought to be reliable only two years ahead; use decision rules that are conservative, sticky, simple, and that attempt to market time; and, emphasize corporate objectives that increasingly focus on stakeholders and revenues. These themes can guide and discipline academic models and tests, with the aim of better explaining outcomes. A model of satisficing decision-making aligns with many of these practice-of-finance characteristics: optimization is difficult in a complex fast-changing world, so managers use simple rules to make incremental improvements and they stick with rules that have worked well enough in the past. Non-behavioral models with costly biases can also account for some of the themes. Implications and avenues for future research are discussed
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE；JEL：A0, G30, G31, G32, G35, G40
papers.zh_title: 主席致辞：公司金融与现实
papers.zh_abstract: 本文通过调查记录了首席财务官（CFO）在企业规划、企业投资、资本结构、派息以及公司目标方面的观点。将当前的决策选择与二十年前的CFO调查数据进行比较，这使我能够识别出跨政策和跨时间共通的决策制定主题。这些现实世界公司金融的共同要素表明，公司基于内部预测做出决策，这些预测存在校准偏差，且被认为仅在未来两年内可靠；公司使用保守、粘性、简单且试图把握市场时机的决策规则；并且，公司强调日益关注利益相关者和收入的企业目标。这些主题可以指导和约束学术模型与检验，旨在更好地解释结果。一个满意型决策模型与许多这些金融实践特征相符：在复杂多变的世界中优化是困难的，因此管理者使用简单规则进行渐进式改进，并坚持使用过去效果足够好的规则。具有成本偏差的非行为模型也可以解释部分主题。本文讨论了未来研究的启示和方向。

papers.title: Invisible Primes: Fintech Lending with Alternative Data
papers.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Dimuthu Ratnadiwakara, Don Carmichael
papers.abstract: We exploit anonymized administrative data provided by a major fintech platform to investigate whether using alternative data to assess borrowers' creditworthiness results in broader credit access. Comparing actual outcomes of the fintech platform’s model to counterfactual outcomes based on a “traditional model” used for regulatory reporting purposes, we find that the latter would result in a 70% higher probability of being rejected and higher interest rates for those approved. The borrowers most positively affected are the “invisible primes”--borrowers with low credit scores and short credit histories, but also a low propensity to default. We show that funding loans to these borrowers leads to better economic outcomes for the borrowers and higher returns for the fintech platform.
papers.zh_title: 隐形优质借款人：使用替代数据的金融科技贷款
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一家主要金融科技平台提供的匿名行政数据，调查使用替代数据评估借款人信用状况是否会扩大信贷获取范围。将金融科技平台模型的实际结果与基于用于监管报告的“传统模型”的反事实结果进行比较，我们发现后者会导致被拒绝的概率高出70%，并且对获批者收取更高的利率。受正面影响最大的借款人是“隐形优质借款人”——即信用评分低、信用记录短，但违约倾向也低的借款人。我们表明，向这些借款人提供贷款会为借款人带来更好的经济结果，并为金融科技平台带来更高的回报。

papers.title: Reducing Frictions in Healthcare Access: The ActionHealth NYC Experiment for Undocumented Immigrants
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Adrienne Sabety, Rishi Sood, Jin Yung Bae
papers.abstract: In 2016, New York City designed and implemented an intervention reducing frictions in accessing safety-net care: randomly making initial primary care appointments for 2,428 undocumented immigrants. We leverage a novel survey-administrative data linkage to show that the program resulted in a more efficient allocation of care. The program increased self-reported access to primary care, leading to a 21% fall in emergency department (ED) use. This effect was driven by high-risk individuals whose ED visits fell by 42% on average. Among those visiting sponsored clinics, chronic condition diagnoses and preventive screens increased, positively affecting long-run health.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, I14, I18, J15, J61
papers.zh_title: 减少医疗获取中的摩擦：面向无证移民的ActionHealth NYC实验
papers.zh_abstract: 2016年，纽约市设计并实施了一项干预措施，旨在减少获取安全网医疗的摩擦：随机为2428名无证移民安排首次初级保健预约。我们利用一项新颖的调查-行政数据链接，表明该计划带来了更高效的医疗资源配置。该计划提高了自我报告的初级保健可及性，导致急诊科使用率下降21%。这一效应由高风险个体驱动，其急诊就诊次数平均减少了42%。在前往赞助诊所就诊的人群中，慢性病诊断和预防性筛查有所增加，对长期健康产生了积极影响。

papers.title: Stock Volatility and the War Puzzle: The Military Demand Channel
papers.authors: Gustavo S. Cortes, Angela Vossmeyer, Marc D. Weidenmier
papers.abstract: U.S. stock volatility is 25 percent lower during wartime and periods of conflict, including World War II. Schwert (1989) identified the “war puzzle” as a surprising fact from two centuries of realized stock volatility data. We hypothesize that stable demand from defense spending makes corporate America’s cash flows easier to forecast during wartime. Using new hand-collected data on 100 years of military spending, we document that defense outlays reduce aggregate, sector- and state-level stock volatility. Firm-level event studies of recent U.S. military conflicts demonstrate that equity analysts’ earnings forecasts of procurement-intensive companies became significantly less dispersed in the aftermath of 9/11 and the invasion of Iraq.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DAE, PE；JEL：E30, G1, H56, N12
papers.zh_title: 股票波动性与战争之谜：军事需求渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 美国股票波动性在战争和冲突时期（包括第二次世界大战）降低了25%。Schwert（1989）根据两个世纪的实际股票波动性数据，将“战争之谜”识别为一个令人惊讶的事实。我们假设，国防支出的稳定需求使得美国企业的现金流在战争期间更易于预测。利用新手工收集的100年军事支出数据，我们记录了国防支出降低了总体、行业和州层面的股票波动性。对近期美国军事冲突的公司层面事件研究表明，在9/11事件和入侵伊拉克之后，股权分析师对采购密集型公司的盈利预测分散度显著降低。

papers.title: The Effects of Legal Representation on Tenant Outcomes in Housing Court: Evidence from New York City's Universal Access Program
papers.authors: Michael T. Cassidy, Janet Currie
papers.abstract: Housing is one of the areas where it may be most critical for poor people to have access to legal representation in civil cases. We use the roll-out of New York City’s Universal Access to Counsel program (UA) to assess the effects of legal representation on tenant outcomes, using detailed address-level housing court data from 2016 to 2019. The program offers free legal representation in housing court to tenants with income at or below 200 percent of the federal poverty guideline. We find that tenants who gain lawyers are less likely to be subject to possessory judgments, face smaller monetary judgments, are less likely to have eviction warrants issued against them, and are less likely to be evicted. Lawyers have larger effects in poorer places and in those with larger shares of noncitizens. Our results support the idea that legal representation in civil procedures can have important positive impacts on the lives of poor people.
papers.zh_title: 法律代理对住房法庭中租户结果的影响：来自纽约市全民法律援助计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 住房是穷人在民事案件中可能最需要获得法律代理的领域之一。我们利用纽约市全民法律援助计划的逐步推广，使用2016年至2019年详细的地址级住房法庭数据，评估法律代理对租户结果的影响。该计划为收入等于或低于联邦贫困线200%的租户提供住房法庭的免费法律代理。我们发现，获得律师的租户更少受到占有判决的影响，面临的金钱判决金额更小，针对他们发出的驱逐令更少，并且被驱逐的可能性更低。律师在更贫困的地区以及非公民比例更高的地区效果更大。我们的结果支持这样一种观点，即民事诉讼中的法律代理可以对穷人的生活产生重要的积极影响。

papers.title: Consumption Heterogeneity and Monetary Policy in an Open Economy
papers.authors: Sihao Chen, Michael B. Devereux, Kang Shi, Jenny Xu
papers.abstract: We explore how consumption heterogeneity affects the international transmission mechanism of monetary shocks and the choice of optimal monetary policy in an open economy. Incorporating two types of agents (Ricardian versus Keynesian) into a standard open economy macro model, we find that there are sizeable ranges of household heterogeneity in which monetary policy become ineffective, but this depends sensitively on the interaction of aggregate demand and relative price effects. We derive the global optimal monetary policy with household heterogeneity under alternative pricing regimes. PPI targeting is still the optimal monetary policy under PCP and can restore the economy to the efficient equilibrium. Under LCP, however, the presence of consumption heterogeneity and currency misalignment implies that CPI inflation targeting is no longer optimal in most cases. Finally, we show that when fiscal instruments such as an import tax and export subsidy are introduced, both currency misalignment and consumption heterogeneity can be eliminated, and even under LCP, PPI targeting is the optimal monetary rule.
papers.zh_title: 开放经济中的消费异质性与货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了消费异质性如何影响货币冲击的国际传导机制以及开放经济中最优货币政策的选择。将两类代理人（李嘉图型与凯恩斯型）纳入标准开放经济宏观模型，我们发现存在相当大的家庭异质性范围，在此范围内货币政策变得无效，但这敏感地依赖于总需求与相对价格效应的相互作用。我们在不同定价机制下推导了具有家庭异质性的全球最优货币政策。在生产者货币定价下，生产者价格指数目标仍然是最优货币政策，并能将经济恢复到有效均衡。然而，在当地货币定价下，消费异质性和货币错配的存在意味着，在大多数情况下，消费者价格指数通胀目标不再是最优的。最后，我们表明，当引入进口税和出口补贴等财政工具时，货币错配和消费异质性都可以被消除，即使在当地货币定价下，生产者价格指数目标也是最优的货币规则。

papers.title: New Evidence on Sectoral Labor Productivity: Implications for Industrialization and Development
papers.authors: Berthold Herrendorf, Richard Rogerson, Ákos Valentinyi
papers.abstract: Moving labor from agriculture to manufacturing – “industrialization” – is often viewed as essential for the development of poor countries. We present new evidence on the channels through which industrialization can help poor countries close the productivity gap with rich countries. To achieve this, we leverage recent data releases by the Groningen Growth and Development Centre and build a new dataset of comparable labor productivity levels in agriculture and manufacturing for 64 mostly poor countries during 1990–2018. We find two key results: (i) cross-country labor productivity gaps in manufacturing are larger than in the aggregate and (ii) there is no tendency for manufacturing labor productivity to converge. While these results challenge the notion that expanding manufacturing employment is essential for the development of today’s poor countries, we also find that higher labor productivity growth in manufacturing is associated with higher labor productivity growth in the aggregate and in several key sectors.
papers.zh_title: 关于部门劳动生产率的新证据：对工业化与发展的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 将劳动力从农业转移到制造业——即“工业化”——通常被视为贫穷国家发展的关键。我们提供了关于工业化如何帮助贫穷国家缩小与富裕国家生产率差距的新证据。为此，我们利用格罗宁根增长与发展中心最近发布的数据，构建了一个涵盖1990-2018年期间64个主要是贫穷国家的农业和制造业可比劳动生产率水平的新数据集。我们发现了两个关键结果：（i）制造业的跨国劳动生产率差距大于总体差距；（ii）制造业劳动生产率没有趋同的趋势。虽然这些结果挑战了扩大制造业就业对当今贫穷国家发展至关重要的观点，但我们也发现，制造业更高的劳动生产率增长与总体以及几个关键部门更高的劳动生产率增长相关联。

papers.title: High-Dimensional Factor Models with an Application to Mutual Fund Characteristics
papers.authors: Martin Lettau
papers.abstract: This paper considers extensions of two-dimensional factor models to higher-dimensional data represented as tensors. I describe decompositions of tensors that generalize the standard matrix singular value decomposition and principal component analysis to higher dimensions. I estimate the model using a three-dimensional data set consisting of 25 characteristics of 1,342 mutual funds observed over 34 quarters. The tensor factor models reduce the data dimensionality by 97% while capturing 93% of the variation of the data. I relate higher-dimensional tensor models to standard two-dimensional models and show that the components of the model have clear economic interpretations.
papers.zh_title: 高维因子模型及其在共同基金特征中的应用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考虑了将二维因子模型扩展到以张量表示的高维数据。我描述了张量的分解，这些分解将标准矩阵奇异值分解和主成分分析推广到更高维度。我使用一个三维数据集来估计模型，该数据集包含在34个季度内观察到的1342只共同基金的25个特征。张量因子模型将数据维度减少了97%，同时捕捉了数据93%的变异。我将高维张量模型与标准二维模型联系起来，并表明该模型的组成部分具有清晰的经济解释。

papers.title: Personal Increasing Returns: Analytics and Applications
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: The human capital investment model with endogenous labor supply is generalized to consumer and health behaviors while retaining the tractability of comparative-static analysis of a single first-order condition. Accounting for the endogenous specialization responses is essential to properly distinguish supply and demand factors and to understand how the magnitude of their effects vary across time and circumstances. Even signing effects of policy interventions can hinge on the existence and extent of personal increasing returns. Applications include the gender gap in earnings, the dynamics of substance abuse, effects of taxes on human capital, the tradeoff between product quality and quantity, and unintended consequences of energy regulation. Metrics are provided for assessing the extent of personal increasing returns.
papers.zh_title: 个人递增回报：分析与应用
papers.zh_abstract: 具有内生劳动供给的人力资本投资模型被推广到消费者和健康行为，同时保留了单一一阶条件比较静态分析的可处理性。考虑内生专业化反应对于正确区分供给和需求因素，以及理解其效应大小如何随时间和环境变化至关重要。甚至政策干预效应的符号都可能取决于个人递增回报的存在和程度。应用包括性别收入差距、药物滥用动态、税收对人力资本的影响、产品质量与数量之间的权衡，以及能源监管的意外后果。提供了评估个人递增回报程度的度量标准。

papers.title: Fueling Alternatives: Gas Station Choice and the Implications for Electric Charging
papers.authors: Jackson Dorsey, Ashley Langer, Shaun McRae
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies the value of electric vehicle (EV) charging networks and the marginal value of network speed and density. We estimate a model of gasoline drivers’ refueling preferences and simulate how these potential future EV drivers value refueling time under counterfactual charging networks. Drivers value refueling time at $19.73/hour. EV adopters with home charging receive $675 per vehicle in benefits from avoiding travel to gas stations, whereas refueling travel and waiting time costs $7,763 for drivers using public charging. Increasing network charging speed yields three times greater time savings than a proportional increase in station density.
papers.zh_title: 替代燃料的选择：加油站选择及其对电动汽车充电的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 本文量化了电动汽车充电网络的价值以及网络速度和密度的边际价值。我们估计了一个汽油车司机加油偏好的模型，并模拟了这些潜在的未来电动汽车司机在反事实充电网络下如何评价充电时间。司机对加油时间的估价为每小时19.73美元。拥有家庭充电设施的电动汽车采用者每辆车因避免前往加油站而获得675美元的收益，而使用公共充电设施的司机则需花费7763美元的加油出行和等待时间成本。将网络充电速度提高一倍所带来的时间节省，是成比例增加站点密度所带来的三倍。

papers.title: Export Expansion and Investment in Children’s Human Capital: Evidence from the U.S.-Vietnam Bilateral Trade Agreement
papers.authors: Brian McCaig, Minh Nguyen, Robert Kaestner
papers.abstract: We examine how export expansion induced by the U.S-Vietnam Bilateral Trade Agreement (BTA) affected migration, school enrollment, work and healthcare use of young children and adolescents in Vietnam. To do so, we exploit variation in tariff reductions across industries associated with the BTA and differences in industry employment shares across Vietnamese provinces prior to the policy change. We find that the BTA led to migration to the most affected provinces, particularly by adolescents (15 to 18) and young adults (19 to 29). The BTA also increased household expenditures, slightly decreased employment among nonmigrant adults and increased employment among migrant adults. Among adolescents, enrolment increased among non-migrants, but fell among migrants, with the opposite pattern for working. For children (7 to 14), enrolment did not change among non-migrants, but fell for migrants, who typically moved with their family. Conditional on being enrolled, education expenditures increased for both children and adolescents. We find evidence that healthcare utilization decreased for both children and adolescents.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：F16, I25, O15
papers.zh_title: 出口扩张与儿童人力资本投资：来自美越双边贸易协定的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由美越双边贸易协定（BTA）引发的出口扩张如何影响越南儿童和青少年的迁移、入学、工作及医疗保健使用情况。为此，我们利用了BTA相关行业关税削减的差异，以及政策变化前越南各省份行业就业份额的差异。我们发现，BTA导致人口向受影响最严重的省份迁移，尤其是青少年（15至18岁）和年轻成年人（19至29岁）。BTA还增加了家庭支出，略微减少了非移民成年人的就业，并增加了移民成年人的就业。在青少年中，非移民的入学率上升，但移民的入学率下降，而工作模式则相反。对于儿童（7至14岁），非移民的入学率没有变化，但移民的入学率下降，这些移民通常随家庭迁移。在已入学的情况下，儿童和青少年的教育支出均有所增加。我们发现有证据表明，儿童和青少年的医疗保健利用率均有所下降。

papers.title: Progressivity of Pricing at US Public Universities
papers.authors: Emily E. Cook, Sarah Turner
papers.abstract: Substantial increases in public university tuition often raise concerns about college affordability.
