But assessment of the impacts on low- and moderate-income families requires consideration of whether net tuition—tuition less grant aid—has increased commensurately. This paper describes recent shifts in net tuition by family income and institution type and assesses the role of changes in state funding in generating these shifts. Using data reported by universities on net tuition paid by students from different family income levels, we find that public research universities have increasingly shifted to high-tuition, high-aid pricing. From 2012 to 2018, net tuition fell by far more than would have been predicted by the growth in state appropriations, while tuition levels continued to rise, albeit at a slower rate than in the prior years. The increased progressivity in pricing, particularly among research universities, cannot be explained by changes in state appropriations.
papers.zh_title: 美国公立大学定价的累进性
papers.zh_abstract: 公立大学学费的大幅上涨常常引发对大学可负担性的担忧。但评估对中低收入家庭的影响需要考虑净学费（学费减去助学金）是否同步增长。本文描述了按家庭收入和机构类型划分的净学费近期变化，并评估了州政府资助变化在产生这些变化中的作用。利用大学报告的不同家庭收入水平学生支付的净学费数据，我们发现公立研究型大学越来越多地转向高学费、高资助的定价模式。从2012年到2018年，净学费的下降幅度远大于州政府拨款增长所预测的水平，而学费水平继续上升，尽管增速低于前几年。定价累进性的增强，尤其是在研究型大学中，无法用州政府拨款的变化来解释。

papers.title: Loss Aversion or Lack of Trust: Why Does Loss Framing Work to Encourage Preventative Health Behaviors?
papers.authors: Emily A. Beam, Yusufcan Masatlioglu, Tara Watson, Dean Yang
papers.abstract: We implemented a field experiment designed to increase participants’ willingness to visit a health clinic. We find differential responses to a $50 incentive framed as a loss versus framed as a gain. We find little support for the notion that loss aversion is responsible for the effectiveness of loss framing. Instead, it appears that loss framing promotes take-up by raising the perceived probability that the incentive will be provided as promised. The results suggest trust is an alternative pathway through which loss framing may affect behavior, and trust may be an important way to promote desirable health behaviors.
papers.zh_title: 损失厌恶还是缺乏信任：为什么损失框架能有效鼓励预防性健康行为？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们实施了一项旨在提高参与者访问健康诊所意愿的实地实验。我们发现，对50美元激励措施的反应存在差异，该激励措施被构建为损失框架与收益框架。我们几乎没有发现支持损失厌恶是损失框架有效性原因的证据。相反，损失框架似乎通过提高激励措施将按承诺提供的感知概率来促进接受率。结果表明，信任是损失框架可能影响行为的另一种途径，而信任可能是促进理想健康行为的重要方式。

papers.title: Stock Market Stimulus
papers.authors: Robin Greenwood, Toomas Laarits, Jeffrey Wurgler
papers.abstract: We study the stock market effects of the arrival of the three rounds of “stimulus checks” to U.S. taxpayers and the single round of direct payments to Hong Kong citizens. The first two rounds of U.S. checks appear to have increased retail buying and share prices of retail-dominated portfolios. The Hong Kong payments increased overall turnover and share prices on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. We cannot rule out that these price effects were permanent. The findings raise novel questions about the role of fiscal stimulus in the stock market.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E62, G0, G14, G38, G4
papers.zh_title: 股市刺激
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了向美国纳税人发放的三轮“刺激支票”以及向香港市民发放的单轮直接付款对股市的影响。美国前两轮支票似乎增加了散户购买量和散户主导投资组合的股价。香港的付款增加了香港交易所的整体成交量和股价。我们不能排除这些价格效应是永久性的可能性。这些发现提出了关于财政刺激在股市中作用的新问题。

papers.title: Consumption and Saving after Retirement
papers.authors: Bent Jesper Christensen, Malene Kallestrup-Lamb, John Kennan
papers.abstract: The paper analyzes consumption decisions of retired workers, using Danish register data. A major puzzle, which motivates much of the analysis below, is that wealth actually increases for a large fraction of the people in our data. One would expect that wealth accumulated before retirement would be used to augment consumption in later life, with the implication that wealth should decline over time. The risk of large out-of-pocket medical expenditures is negligible in Denmark, so although explanations associated with such expenditures might explain similar patterns in U.S. data, these explanations are not plausible for Denmark (and therefore also questionable for the U.S.). Our analysis instead attempts to explain wealth paths using a model that emphasizes fluctuations in the marginal utility of consumption. The results show that a latent state variable extension of the standard life-cycle consumption model is quite successful in explaining the curious observed wealth patterns after retirement for singles.
papers.zh_title: 退休后的消费与储蓄
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用丹麦登记数据分析了退休工人的消费决策。一个主要谜题（也是下文许多分析的动机）是，我们数据中很大一部分人的财富实际上在增加。人们会预期退休前积累的财富将用于增加晚年消费，这意味着财富应随时间下降。在丹麦，大额自付医疗支出的风险可以忽略不计，因此，尽管与此类支出相关的解释可能解释美国数据中的类似模式，但这些解释在丹麦并不成立（因此对美国也值得怀疑）。我们的分析转而尝试用一个强调边际消费效用波动的模型来解释财富路径。结果表明，标准生命周期消费模型的潜在状态变量扩展在解释观察到的单身人士退休后奇特的财富模式方面相当成功。

papers.title: What Do the Data Tell Us About Inflation Expectations?
papers.authors: Francesco D’Acunto, Ulrike Malmendier, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Inflation expectations are central to economics because they affect the effectiveness of fiscal and monetary policy as well as realized inflation. We survey the recent literature with a focus on the inflation expectations of households. We first review standard data sources and discuss their advantages and disadvantages. We then document that household inflation expectations are biased upwards, dispersed across individuals, and volatile in the time series. We also provide evidence of systematic differences by gender, income, education, and race. Turning to the underlying expectations formation process, we highlight the role of individuals' exposure to price signals in their daily lives, such as price changes in groceries, the role of lifetime experiences, and the role of cognition. We then discuss the literature that links inflation expectations to economic decisions at the individual level, including consumption-savings and financial decisions. We conclude with an outlook for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：C90, D14, D84, E31, E52, E71, G11, G51, G53
papers.zh_title: 数据告诉我们关于通胀预期的什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 通胀预期对经济学至关重要，因为它们影响财政和货币政策的有效性以及实际通胀。我们调查了近期文献，重点关注家庭通胀预期。我们首先回顾了标准数据来源，并讨论了它们的优缺点。然后，我们记录了家庭通胀预期存在向上偏差、个体间分散且时间序列波动大的特点。我们还提供了按性别、收入、教育和种族存在系统性差异的证据。转向潜在预期形成过程，我们强调了个人在日常生活中接触价格信号（如杂货价格变化）、终身经历以及认知的作用。接着，我们讨论了将通胀预期与个人层面经济决策（包括消费储蓄和金融决策）联系起来的文献。最后，我们对未来研究进行了展望。

papers.title: Pretrial Juvenile Detention
papers.authors: E. Jason Baron, Brian Jacob, Joseph P. Ryan
papers.abstract: Roughly one in four juveniles arrested in the U.S. spend time in a detention center prior to their court date. To study the consequences of this practice for youth, we link the universe of individual public school records in Michigan to juvenile and adult criminal justice records. Using a combination of exact matching and inverse probability weighting, we estimate that juvenile detention leads to a 31% decline in the likelihood of graduating high school and a 25% increase in the likelihood of being arrested as an adult. Falsification tests suggest the results are not driven by unobserved heterogeneity.
papers.zh_title: 审前青少年拘留
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，大约每四名被捕青少年中就有一人在开庭前被关押在拘留中心。为了研究这种做法对青少年的影响，我们将密歇根州所有公立学校个人记录与青少年和成人刑事司法记录相关联。结合精确匹配和逆概率加权方法，我们估计青少年拘留导致高中毕业可能性下降31%，成年后被逮捕可能性增加25%。虚假检验表明，结果并非由未观测到的异质性驱动。

papers.title: In-group Favoritism and Peer Effects in Wrongful Acquittals: NBA Referees as Judges
papers.authors: Naci H. Mocan, Eric Osborne-Christenson
papers.abstract: We provide the first analysis of racial in-group bias in Type-I and Type-II errors. Using player-referee matched data from NBA games we show that there is no overall racial bias or in-group bias in foul calls made by referees. Similarly, there is no racial bias or in-group bias in Type-I errors (incorrect foul calls). On the other hand, there is significant in-group favoritism in Type-II errors. These are wrongful acquittals where the referee did not blow the whistle although a foul was committed. We also analyze peer effects and find that black referees’ proclivity to make Type-II errors in favor of black players exists as long black referees have at least one black peer referee on the court, and that the bias disappears only if black referees have two white peers. In case of white referees, in-group favoritism in Type-II errors emerges if white referees have two black peers with them on the court. We provide evidence showing that the results are not attributable to skill differences between referees. We also show that a higher Type-I error rate during the season lowers referees’ probability to be selected to officiate a game in the playoffs, whereas variations in the rate of Type-II errors have no impact on the likelihood of a playoff assignment. These results indicate that in-group favoritism takes place in a domain which is not costly (making Type-II errors), and that bias is eliminated when it is costly to the decisionmaker.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS；JEL：D03, D9, J70, K0
papers.zh_title: 群体内偏袒与错误无罪判决中的同伴效应：以NBA裁判为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们首次分析了第一类错误和第二类错误中的种族内群体偏见。利用NBA比赛中球员与裁判的匹配数据，我们发现裁判在犯规判罚中不存在整体种族偏见或内群体偏见。同样，在第一类错误（错误犯规判罚）中也不存在种族偏见或内群体偏见。另一方面，在第二类错误中存在显著的内群体偏袒。这些是错误的无罪判决，即裁判在犯规发生时未吹哨。我们还分析了同伴效应，发现黑人裁判对黑人球员做出第二类错误的倾向仅在至少有一名黑人同伴裁判在场时存在，只有当黑人裁判有两名白人同伴时偏见才会消失。对于白人裁判，只有当白人裁判有两名黑人同伴在场时，第二类错误中的内群体偏袒才会出现。我们提供的证据表明，这些结果并非归因于裁判之间的技能差异。我们还表明，赛季中较高的第一类错误率会降低裁判被选入季后赛执法的概率，而第二类错误率的变化对季后赛指派可能性没有影响。这些结果表明，内群体偏袒发生在无成本的领域（做出第二类错误），而当对决策者而言成本高昂时，偏见会消失。

papers.title: Syndicated Lending, Competition and Relative Performance Evaluation
papers.authors: Thomas Schneider, Philip Strahan, Jun Yang
papers.abstract: Relative performance evaluation (RPE) intensifies competitive pressure by tying executive compensation to the profits of rivals. We show that these contracts make loan syndication harder by reducing banks’ willingness to participate in loans underwritten by banks named in their RPE contracts. Lead arranger banks which are more frequently named in RPE hold larger shares of the loans they syndicate, and their borrowers face higher spreads. These banks, in turn, lose market share to banks less likely to be named in RPE. Our results highlight the tension between the normal benefits of competition versus the need for cooperation in loan syndication.
papers.zh_title: 银团贷款、竞争与相对绩效评估
papers.zh_abstract: 相对绩效评估通过将高管薪酬与竞争对手利润挂钩，加剧了竞争压力。我们表明，这些合同通过降低银行参与其相对绩效评估合同中提及银行承销贷款的意愿，使贷款银团化更加困难。更频繁出现在相对绩效评估中的牵头安排行在其银团贷款中持有更大份额，其借款人面临更高的利差。这些银行反过来将市场份额输给不太可能出现在相对绩效评估中的银行。我们的结果凸显了竞争的正常收益与贷款银团化中合作需求之间的张力。

papers.title: Black Americans’ Landholdings and Economic Mobility after Emancipation: New Evidence on the Significance of 40 Acres
papers.authors: William J. Collins, Nicholas C. Holtkamp, Marianne H. Wanamaker
papers.abstract: The US Civil War ended in 1865 without the distribution of land or compensation to those formerly enslaved—a decision often seen as a cornerstone of racial inequality. We build a dataset to observe Black households’ landholdings in 1880, a key component of their wealth, alongside a sample of White households. We then link their sons to the 1900 census records to observe economic and human capital outcomes. We show that Black landowners (and skilled workers) were able to transmit substantial intergenerational advantages to their sons. But such advantages were small relative to the overall racial gaps in economic status.
papers.zh_title: 解放后黑人的土地持有与经济流动性：关于“四十英亩”意义的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国内战于1865年结束，未向被奴役者分配土地或提供补偿——这一决定常被视为种族不平等的基石。我们构建了一个数据集，观察1880年黑人家庭的土地持有情况（其财富的关键组成部分），同时包含白人家庭样本。然后，我们将他们的儿子与1900年人口普查记录关联，以观察经济和人力资本结果。我们表明，黑人土地所有者（以及熟练工人）能够将显著的代际优势传递给他们的儿子。但这些优势相对于经济地位的整体种族差距而言较小。

papers.title: Improving the Availability of Unrelated Stem Cell Donors: Evidence from a Major Donor Registry
papers.authors: Michael Haylock, Patrick Kampkötter, Mario Macis, Jürgen Sauter, Susanne Seitz, Robert Slonim, Daniel Wiesen, Alexander H. Schmidt
papers.abstract: The unavailability of potential stem cell donors poses a critical challenge for donor registries worldwide. This study investigates the impact of initiatives of a stem cell donor registry to enhance donors' availability for confirmatory typing. Initiatives ask donors to provide a sample for genetic analysis and/or information on their temporal unavailability. We analyzed 91,479 confirmatory typing requests from DKMS Germany, a large stem cell donor registry, exploiting a quasi-random initiative assignment based on observable characteristics. We find that, first, invitation to the initiatives increases donors' availability. Intention-to-treat estimates yield effects ranging from 2.5 to 3.2 percentage points, and local average treatment effects estimates range from 3.8 to 8.2 percentage points (baseline: 77.1%). Second, the difference in availability between participants and non-participants is over 10 percentage points. The initiatives yield a direct positive effect on donor availability and a selection effect through which participation signals a higher commitment.
papers.zh_title: 提高无关干细胞捐赠者的可用性：来自主要捐赠者登记处的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 潜在干细胞捐赠者的不可用性对全球捐赠者登记处构成关键挑战。本研究调查了干细胞捐赠者登记处为增强捐赠者用于确认分型的可用性而采取的举措的影响。这些举措要求捐赠者提供基因分析样本和/或关于其暂时不可用性的信息。我们分析了来自德国大型干细胞捐赠者登记处DKMS的91,479份确认分型请求，利用基于可观测特征的准随机举措分配。我们发现，首先，受邀参与举措提高了捐赠者的可用性。意向治疗估计显示效应范围为2.5至3.2个百分点，局部平均处理效应估计范围为3.8至8.2个百分点（基线：77.1%）。其次，参与者和非参与者之间的可用性差异超过10个百分点。这些举措对捐赠者可用性产生直接正向效应，并通过参与表明更高承诺产生选择效应。

papers.title: Fertility and Savings: The Effect of China’s Two-Child Policy on Household Savings
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Efraim Benmelech, Zhishu Yang, Qi Zhang
papers.abstract: China’s high household savings rate has attracted great academic interest but remains a puzzle. Potential explanations include demographic, policy, and financial causes. Yet a lack of reliable microlevel data on household finances makes it difficult to assess the relative importance of each factor. This paper uses individual income and spending transactions linked to demographic characteristics and financial information on loan applications and credit availability from a large Chinese bank in Inner Mongolia. We match a large subset of bank customers to administrative records covering marriage and births and obtain a unique view into consumption and saving patterns around important life events. Our results point toward identifying income growth, financial instability, and credit access, rather than such directives as the one-child policy, as the primary causes of high levels of savings among Chinese households.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, ME；JEL：D14, D31, E21, G51
papers.zh_title: 生育与储蓄：中国二孩政策对家庭储蓄的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 中国的高家庭储蓄率引起了学术界的极大兴趣，但仍是一个谜。潜在解释包括人口、政策和金融原因。然而，缺乏可靠的家庭财务微观数据使得评估各因素的相对重要性变得困难。本文利用来自内蒙古一家大型中国银行的个人收入和支出交易数据，这些数据与人口特征以及贷款申请和信贷可用性的财务信息相关联。我们将大量银行客户与涵盖婚姻和生育的行政记录进行匹配，从而获得对重要生活事件前后消费和储蓄模式的独特视角。我们的结果表明，收入增长、金融不稳定和信贷获取（而非独生子女政策等指令）是中国家庭高储蓄率的主要原因。

papers.title: Public School Funding, School Quality, and Adult Crime
papers.authors: E. Jason Baron, Joshua M. Hyman, Brittany N. Vasquez
papers.abstract: This paper asks whether increasing public school funding can be an effective long-run crime-prevention strategy in the U.S. Specifically, we examine the effect of increases in funding early in children’s lives on the likelihood that they are arrested as adults. We exploit quasi-experimental variation in public school funding, leveraging two natural experiments in Michigan and a novel administrative dataset linking the universe of Michigan public school students to adult criminal justice records. The first research design exploits variation in operating expenditures due to Michigan’s 1994 school finance reform, Proposal A. The second design exploits variation in capital spending by leveraging close school district capital bond elections in a regression discontinuity framework. In both cases, we find that students exposed to additional funding during elementary school were substantially less likely to be arrested in adulthood. We show that the social benefits of increasing school funding are greater than the costs, even when considering only the crime-reducing benefits.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I21, I22, K42
papers.zh_title: 公立学校资助、学校质量与成人犯罪
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨增加公立学校资助能否成为美国有效的长期犯罪预防策略。具体而言，我们研究了儿童早期获得的资助增加对其成年后被逮捕可能性的影响。我们利用公立学校资助的准实验性变化，借助密歇根州的两次自然实验以及一个将密歇根州公立学校全体学生与成人刑事司法记录关联起来的新型行政数据集。第一个研究设计利用了密歇根州1994年学校财政改革（提案A）导致的运营支出变化。第二个设计则利用学区资本债券选举的断点回归框架，通过资本支出的变化进行分析。在这两种情况下，我们都发现，在小学阶段获得额外资助的学生成年后被逮捕的可能性显著降低。我们表明，即使仅考虑减少犯罪的效益，增加学校资助的社会收益也大于成本。

papers.title: The Benefits and Costs of a U.S. Child Allowance
papers.authors: Irwin Garfinkel, Laurel Sariscsany, Elizabeth Ananat, Sophie M. Collyer, Robert Paul Hartley, Buyi Wang, Christopher Wimer
papers.abstract: We conduct a benefit-cost analysis of a U.S. child allowance, based on a systematic literature review of the highest quality available causal evidence on the short- and long-term effects of cash and near-cash transfers. In contrast to the previous studies we synthesize, which tend to measure a subset of benefits and costs available in a particular dataset, we establish a comprehensive accounting of potential effects and secure estimates of each. We produce core estimates of the benefits and costs per child and per adult of increasing household income by $1,000 in one year; these can be applied to value any cash or near-cash program that increases household income. Using microsimulation, we then apply these estimates to determine net aggregate benefits of three child allowance policies, including the expanded Child Tax Credit as enacted for the year 2021 in the American Rescue Plan (ARP). Our estimates indicate that making that expansion permanent would cost $97 billion per year and generate social benefits with net present value of $982 billion per year. Sensitivity analyses indicate that our estimates are robust to alternative assumptions and that all three child allowance policies we evaluate produce very high net returns for the U.S. population.
papers.zh_title: 美国儿童津贴的收益与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们基于对现金及近似现金转移支付短期和长期影响最高质量因果证据的系统性文献回顾，对美国儿童津贴进行了成本效益分析。与我们综合的以往研究（这些研究往往衡量特定数据集中可获得的收益和成本子集）不同，我们建立了潜在影响的全面核算，并获得了每项影响的可靠估计。我们得出了在一年内将家庭收入增加1000美元时，每个儿童和每个成年人的收益和成本的核心估计值；这些估计值可用于评估任何增加家庭收入的现金或近似现金项目。然后，我们利用微观模拟，将这些估计值应用于确定三项儿童津贴政策的净总收益，包括《美国救援计划》中为2021年制定的扩大的儿童税收抵免。我们的估计表明，将该扩大政策永久化每年将花费970亿美元，并产生每年净现值为9820亿美元的社会收益。敏感性分析表明，我们的估计对替代假设是稳健的，并且我们评估的所有三项儿童津贴政策都为美国人口带来了非常高的净回报。

papers.title: The Education-Innovation Gap
papers.authors: Barbara Biasi, Song Ma
papers.abstract: This paper studies the dissemination of frontier knowledge through higher education. Applying natural language processing (NLP) techniques to the text of 1.7M university course syllabi and 20M academic articles, we construct the “education-innovation gap,” a measure of a syllabus’s distance from frontier knowledge. Using this measure, we document four new facts. First, courses differ greatly in their education-innovation gap, even after controlling for field, course-level, and time. Second, instructors play an important role in shaping course content. Research-active instructors teach more frontier knowledge, particularly when their research is close to the course topic. Third, access to frontier knowledge is unequal: Schools enrolling more socio-economically advantaged students offer courses with a lower gap. Lastly, students from lower-gap schools are more likely to complete a doctoral degree, produce more patents, and earn more after graduation.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：I23, I24, I26, J24, O33
papers.zh_title: 教育-创新差距
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究前沿知识通过高等教育的传播。通过将自然语言处理技术应用于170万份大学课程大纲和2000万篇学术文章的文本，我们构建了“教育-创新差距”，即衡量课程大纲与前沿知识距离的指标。利用这一指标，我们记录了四个新事实。第一，即使在控制了领域、课程级别和时间之后，不同课程的教育-创新差距也存在巨大差异。第二，教师在塑造课程内容方面发挥着重要作用。从事研究活动的教师教授更多前沿知识，尤其是当他们的研究与课程主题接近时。第三，获取前沿知识的机会不平等：招收社会经济地位更有利学生的学校提供的课程差距更小。最后，来自低差距学校的学生更有可能完成博士学位、获得更多专利，并且在毕业后收入更高。

papers.title: Strengthening State Capacity: Postal Reform and Innovation during the Gilded Age
papers.authors: Abhay Aneja, Guo Xu
papers.abstract: We use newly digitized records from the U.S. Post Office to study how strengthening state capacity affects public service delivery and innovation in over 2,700 cities between 1875–1905. Exploiting the gradual expansion of a major civil service reform, cities with a reformed postal office experience fewer errors in delivery, lower unit costs, and an increase in mail handled per worker. This improvement goes with greater information flow, as measured by increased volumes of mail and newspapers. We use personnel data to show that reformed offices see a decline in turnover and an increase in merit-based retention, consistent with a reduction in political interference. We observe more joint patenting involving inventors and businesses from different cities, suggesting that a more effective postal service contributed to innovation and growth during the Gilded Age.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, POL, PR；JEL：D73, M5, N4, N41, O3
papers.zh_title: 加强国家能力：镀金时代的邮政改革与创新
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国邮政局新近数字化的记录，研究了1875年至1905年间加强国家能力如何影响超过2700个城市的公共服务提供和创新。利用一项重大公务员制度改革的逐步推广，经过改革的邮政局所在城市在投递错误、单位成本方面有所减少，并且每位工人处理的邮件量有所增加。这种改善伴随着更大的信息流动，以邮件和报纸数量的增加来衡量。我们利用人事数据表明，改革后的邮政局人员流动率下降，基于功绩的留任率上升，这与政治干预的减少相一致。我们观察到更多涉及来自不同城市的发明者和企业的联合专利申请，这表明更有效的邮政服务为镀金时代的创新和增长做出了贡献。

papers.title: Policing and Management
papers.authors: Max Kapustin, Terrence Neumann, Jens Ludwig
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：H41, H75, J0, M0

papers.title: Cross-subsidization of Bad Credit in a Lending Crisis
papers.authors: Nikolaos Artavanis, Brian Jonghwan Lee, Stavros Panageas, Margarita Tsoutsoura
papers.abstract: We study the corporate-loan pricing decisions of a major Greek bank during the Greek financial crisis. A unique aspect of our dataset is that we observe both the interest rate and the “breakeven rate” of each loan, as computed by the bank’s own loan-pricing department (in effect, the loan’s marginal cost). We document that low-breakeven-rate (safer) borrowers are charged significant markups, whereas high-breakeven-rate (riskier) borrowers are charged small and sometimes even negative markups. We rationalize this de-facto cross-subsidization of riskier borrowers by safer borrowers through the lens of a dynamic model featuring depressed collateral values, impaired capital-market access, and limit pricing.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E43, E44, G01, G21, G3
papers.zh_title: 信贷危机中不良信用的交叉补贴
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了希腊金融危机期间一家主要希腊银行的企业贷款定价决策。我们数据集的一个独特之处在于，我们观察到了每笔贷款的利率以及银行自身贷款定价部门计算的“盈亏平衡利率”（实际上是贷款的边际成本）。我们记录到，低盈亏平衡利率（更安全）的借款人被收取了显著的正利差，而高盈亏平衡利率（风险更高）的借款人则被收取了很小甚至有时为负的利差。我们通过一个动态模型的视角（该模型具有抵押品价值低迷、资本市场准入受限和限制性定价的特征）将这种风险较高借款人实际上由风险较低借款人补贴的现象合理化。

papers.title: Evidence on Retrieved Context: How History Matters
papers.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Akiko Watanabe, Masahiro Watanabe
papers.abstract: This paper tests the retrieved context model of Wachter and Kahana (2019) using a long-term panel of economic forecasts by participants in the Livingston Survey. Events in historical time contribute additional explanatory power to a relative time series model. Historical precedents for current macroeconomic conditions appear to be more relevant for extreme quantile forecasts. The results are consistent with the use of the retrieved context mechanism for formulating expectations about asset prices. They also suggest that historical events, not just lagged variables in relative time, matter in economic forecasting.
papers.zh_title: 关于检索背景的证据：历史如何重要
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用利文斯顿调查中参与者对经济预测的长期面板数据，检验了Wachter和Kahana（2019）的检索背景模型。历史时间中的事件为相对时间序列模型提供了额外的解释力。当前宏观经济状况的历史先例似乎对极端分位数预测更为重要。这些结果与使用检索背景机制来形成对资产价格的预期是一致的。它们还表明，历史事件（而不仅仅是相对时间中的滞后变量）在经济预测中很重要。

papers.title: This is Air: The "Non-Health" Effects of Air Pollution
papers.authors: Sandra Aguilar-Gomez, Holt Dwyer, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Matthew J. Neidell
papers.abstract: A robust body of evidence shows that air pollution exposure is detrimental to health outcomes, often measured as deaths and hospitalizations. This literature has focused less on subclinical channels that nonetheless impact behavior, performance, and skills. This article reviews the economic research investigating the causal effects of pollution on "non-health" endpoints, including labor productivity, cognitive performance, and multiple forms of decision making. Subclinical effects of pollution can be more challenging to observe than formal health care encounters but may be more pervasive if they affect otherwise healthy people. The wide variety of possible impacts of pollution should be informed by plausible mechanisms and require appropriate hypothesis testing to limit false discovery. Finally, any detected effects of pollution, both in the short and long run, may be dampened by costly efforts to avoid exposure ex-ante and remediate its impacts ex-post; these costs must be considered for a full welfare analysis
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I31, J22, J24, Q51, Q53
papers.zh_title: 这就是空气：空气污染的“非健康”影响
papers.zh_abstract: 大量证据表明，暴露于空气污染对健康结果（通常以死亡和住院来衡量）有害。该文献较少关注那些虽然影响行为、表现和技能但处于亚临床层面的渠道。本文回顾了研究污染对“非健康”终点（包括劳动生产率、认知表现和多种形式的决策）因果影响的经济学研究。污染的亚临床效应可能比正式的医疗就诊更难观察到，但如果它们影响到原本健康的人，则可能更为普遍。污染可能产生的各种影响应基于合理的机制，并需要适当的假设检验来限制错误发现。最后，任何检测到的污染影响（无论是短期还是长期）都可能因事前避免暴露和事后补救其影响的高成本努力而被削弱；这些成本必须纳入全面的福利分析中。

papers.title: Do Startups Benefit from Their Investors’ Reputation? Evidence from a Randomized Field Experiment
papers.authors: Shai Bernstein, Kunal Mehta, Richard R. Townsend, Ting Xu
papers.abstract: We analyze a field experiment conducted on AngelList Talent, a large online search platform for startup jobs. In the experiment, AngelList randomly informed job seekers of whether a startup was funded by a top-tier investor and/or was funded recently. We find that the same startup receives significantly more interest when information about top-tier investors is provided. Information about recent funding has no effect. The effect of top-tier investors is not driven by low-quality candidates and is stronger for earlier-stage startups. The results show that venture capitalists can add value passively, simply by attaching their names to startups.
papers.zh_title: 初创企业能否从投资者的声誉中受益？来自随机实地实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在AngelList Talent（一个大型初创企业职位在线搜索平台）上进行的一项实地实验。实验中，AngelList随机告知求职者某家初创企业是否由顶级投资者资助，以及/或者是否近期获得融资。我们发现，当提供关于顶级投资者的信息时，同一家初创企业会获得显著更多的关注。关于近期融资的信息则没有影响。顶级投资者的效应并非由低质量候选人驱动，并且对于更早期的初创企业更为显著。结果表明，风险资本家可以通过简单地将自己的名字与初创企业关联，被动地增加价值。

papers.title: Labor Substitutability among Schooling Groups
papers.authors: Mark Bils, Bariş Kaymak, Kai-Jie Wu
papers.abstract: Knowing the degree of substitutability between schooling groups is essential to understanding the role of human capital in income differences and to assessing the economic impact of such policies as schooling subsidies, immigration systems, or redistributive taxes. We derive a lower bound for the substitutability required for worldwide growth in real GDP from 1960 to 2010 to be consistent with a stable wage premium for schooling despite the rapid growth in schooling, assuming no exogenous worldwide regress in the technology frontier for workers with only primary schooling. That lower bound for the long-run elasticity of substitution is about 4, which is far higher than values commonly used in the literature. Given our bound, we reexamine the importance of human capital in cross-country income differences and the roles of school quality versus the skill bias of technology in greater efficiency gains from schooling in richer countries.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS；JEL：E24, J24, O15, O47
papers.zh_title: 不同教育群体间的劳动替代性
papers.zh_abstract: 了解不同教育群体之间的替代程度，对于理解人力资本在收入差异中的作用，以及评估教育补贴、移民制度或再分配税等政策的经济影响至关重要。我们推导出一个替代性的下界，该下界要求1960年至2010年间全球实际GDP的增长，能够与教育工资溢价保持稳定相一致，尽管教育水平快速增长，但假设对于仅受过初等教育的工人，其技术前沿没有发生外生的全球性倒退。这个长期替代弹性的下界约为4，远高于文献中常用的数值。基于我们的下界，我们重新审视了人力资本在跨国收入差异中的重要性，以及学校质量与技术技能偏向性在富裕国家从教育中获得更大效率提升中所扮演的角色。

papers.title: Valuing Financial Data
papers.authors: Maryam Farboodi, Dhruv Singal, Laura Veldkamp, Venky Venkateswaran
papers.abstract: How should an investor value financial data? The answer is complicated because it depends on the characteristics of all investors. We develop a sufficient statistics approach that uses equilibrium asset return moments to summarize all relevant information about others' characteristics. It can value data that is public or private, about one or many assets, relevant for dividends or for sentiment. While different data types have different valuations, heterogeneous investors value the same data very differently, which suggests a low price elasticity for data demand. Heterogeneous investors' data valuations are also affected very differentially by market illiquidity.
papers.zh_title: 金融数据的估值
papers.zh_abstract: 投资者应如何为金融数据估值？答案很复杂，因为它取决于所有投资者的特征。我们开发了一种充分统计量方法，利用均衡资产收益矩来概括关于其他投资者特征的所有相关信息。该方法可以对公开或私有的、关于一项或多项资产的、与股息或情绪相关的数据进行估值。虽然不同类型的数据具有不同的估值，但异质性投资者对相同数据的估值差异很大，这表明数据需求的价格弹性较低。市场非流动性对异质性投资者的数据估值也会产生非常不同的影响。

papers.title: The Female Happiness Paradox
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Using data across countries and over time we show that women are unhappier than men in unhappiness and negative affect equations, irrespective of the measure used – anxiety, depression, fearfulness, sadness, loneliness, anger – and they have more days with bad mental health and more restless sleep. Women are also less satisfied with many aspects of their lives such as democracy, the economy, the state of education and health services. They are also less happy in the moment in terms of peace and calm, cheerfulness, feeling active, vigorous, fresh and rested. However, prior evidence on gender differences in global wellbeing metrics – happiness and life satisfaction – is less clear cut. Differences vary over time, location, and with model specification and the inclusion of controls especially marital status. We also show that there are significant variations by month in happiness data regarding whether males are happier than females but find little variation by month in unhappiness data. It matters which months are sampled when measuring positive affect but not with negative affect. These monthly data reveal that women’s happiness was more adversely affected by the COVID shock than men’s, but also that women’s happiness rebounded more quickly suggesting resilience. As a result, we now find strong evidence that males have higher levels of both happiness and life satisfaction in recent years even before the onset of pandemic. As in the past they continue to have lower levels of unhappiness. A detailed analysis of several data files, with various metrics, for the UK confirms that men now are happier than women.
papers.zh_title: 女性幸福悖论
papers.zh_abstract: 利用跨国和跨时期的数据，我们表明，在不幸感和负面情绪方程中，女性比男性更不幸福，无论使用何种衡量指标——焦虑、抑郁、恐惧、悲伤、孤独、愤怒——并且她们有更多天数出现不良心理健康状况和睡眠不安。女性对生活的许多方面，如民主、经济、教育和卫生服务状况，也感到不太满意。她们在当下的幸福感，如平和与平静、快乐、感觉活跃、精力充沛、精神焕发和休息充分方面，也较低。然而，先前关于全球幸福感指标（幸福感和生活满意度）性别差异的证据并不那么明确。差异随时间、地点、模型设定以及是否包含控制变量（尤其是婚姻状况）而变化。我们还表明，在幸福感数据中，关于男性是否比女性更幸福存在显著的月度变化，但在不幸感数据中几乎没有发现月度变化。在测量积极情感时，采样的月份很重要，但对于消极情感则不然。这些月度数据揭示，女性的幸福感比男性更受新冠冲击的不利影响，但女性的幸福感也反弹得更快，表明具有韧性。因此，我们现在发现强有力的证据表明，即使在疫情爆发之前，近年来男性的幸福感和生活满意度水平都更高。与过去一样，他们的不幸感水平仍然较低。对英国多个数据文件（包含各种指标）的详细分析证实，现在男性比女性更幸福。

papers.title: Reinsuring the Insurers of Last Resort
papers.authors: David Dranove, Craig Garthwaite, Christopher Ody
papers.abstract: Hospitals face large and variable costs from treating indigent care patients. Two methods of “reinsuring” hospitals against these costs are providing these patients with insurance and directly providing hospitals with supplemental payments to cover the expected costs of treating the indigent. Currently, the U.S. uses a hybrid of these approaches, insuring some indigent patients through Medicaid and providing hospitals with supplemental payments through programs such as Medicaid Disproportionate Share. We evaluate the economic fundamentals of supplemental payments in the U.S. safety net. We find that providing indigent care patients with insurance and providing hospitals with supplement payments are imperfect substitutes to hospitals because they differ in the extent to which they protect hospitals from risk, incentivize cost control, and and incentivize certain investments. Overall, we find that supplemental payments are used to increase access to hospitals in areas with many indigent patients, rather than to provide efficient intertemporal risk-protection to hospitals or incentivize cost control.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：H0, H4, I1, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 为最后保险人提供再保险
papers.zh_abstract: 医院因治疗贫困患者而面临巨大且多变的成本。为医院“再保险”以应对这些成本的两种方法是：为这些患者提供保险，以及直接向医院提供补充支付以覆盖治疗贫困患者的预期成本。目前，美国采用了一种混合方法，通过医疗补助计划为部分贫困患者提供保险，并通过诸如医疗补助不成比例份额计划等项目向医院提供补充支付。我们评估了美国安全网中补充支付的经济基础。我们发现，为贫困患者提供保险和为医院提供补充支付对医院而言是不完全的替代品，因为它们在保护医院免受风险、激励成本控制以及激励特定投资的程度方面存在差异。总体而言，我们发现补充支付被用于增加贫困患者较多地区的医院可及性，而不是为医院提供有效的跨期风险保护或激励成本控制。

papers.title: Intergenerational Mobility Begins Before Birth
papers.authors: Ananth Seshadri, Anson Zhou
papers.abstract: Nearly 40% of births in the United States are unintended, and this phenomenon is disproportionately common among Black Americans and women with lower education. Given that being born to unprepared parents significantly affects children’s outcomes, could family planning access affect intergenerational persistence of economic status? We extend the standard Becker–Tomes model by incorporating an endogenous family planning choice. When the model is calibrated to match observed patterns of unintended fertility, we find that intergenerational mobility is significantly lower than that in the standard model. In a policy counterfactual where states improve access to family planning services for the poor, intergenerational mobility improves by 0.3 standard deviations on average. When we calibrate the model to match unintended birth rates by race, we find that differences in family planning access alone can account for 20% of the racial gap in upward mobility. Helping women fulfill their goals about family planning and childbearing can improve social mobility and address racial inequality.
papers.zh_title: 代际流动性始于出生之前
papers.zh_abstract: 美国近40%的出生是非预期的，这一现象在非裔美国人和受教育程度较低的女性中尤为普遍。鉴于出生在未准备好的父母身边会显著影响孩子的结果，那么计划生育的可及性是否会影响经济地位的代际持续性？我们通过纳入内生的计划生育选择，扩展了标准的贝克尔-托姆斯模型。当模型经过校准以匹配观察到的非预期生育模式时，我们发现代际流动性显著低于标准模型。在一个政策反事实中，如果各州改善穷人获得计划生育服务的机会，代际流动性平均提高0.3个标准差。当我们校准模型以匹配按种族划分的非预期出生率时，我们发现仅计划生育可及性的差异就可以解释向上流动性种族差距的20%。帮助女性实现其关于计划生育和生育的目标，可以改善社会流动性并解决种族不平等问题。

papers.title: Disruption and Credit Markets
papers.authors: Bo Becker, Victoria Ivashina
papers.abstract: We show that over the past half century innovative disruptions were central to understanding corporate defaults. In a given year, industries experiencing abnormally high VC or IPO activity subsequently see higher default rates, higher segment exits by conglomerates, and higher yields on bonds issued by the firms in these industries. Overall, we find that disruption is a broad phenomenon, negatively affecting incumbent firms across the spectrum of age, valuation, and levers, with the exception of very large and low-leverage firms, which confirms our central hypothesis.
papers.zh_title: 颠覆与信贷市场
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在过去半个世纪中，创新性颠覆对于理解企业违约至关重要。在给定年份中，经历异常高风险投资或首次公开募股活动的行业，随后会出现更高的违约率、更高的企业集团部门退出率，以及这些行业企业所发行债券的更高收益率。总体而言，我们发现颠覆是一种广泛现象，对各个年龄、估值和杠杆水平的在位企业产生负面影响，但规模极大和杠杆率极低的企业除外，这证实了我们的核心假设。

papers.title: Credit Markets, Property Rights, and the Commons
papers.authors: Frederik Noack, Christopher Costello
papers.abstract: Credit markets and property rights are fundamental for modern economies, but they also have implications for the commons. Using a dynamic model of competitive resource extraction, we show that improving property right security unambiguously increases conservation incentives, but the effect of credit markets on resource extraction effort hinges on the security of property rights. We test these predictions using data on global fisheries, credit markets, and the largest-ever marine property rights assignment. We find that property right security reduces resource extraction, while credit market development increases resource extraction under insecure property rights but reduces resource extraction under secure property rights.
papers.zh_title: 信贷市场、产权与公地
papers.zh_abstract: 信贷市场和产权是现代经济的基础，但它们也对公地产生影响。利用一个竞争性资源开采的动态模型，我们表明提高产权安全性明确地增加了保护激励，但信贷市场对资源开采努力的影响取决于产权的安全性。我们利用全球渔业、信贷市场以及有史以来最大的海洋产权分配数据来检验这些预测。我们发现，产权安全性减少了资源开采，而信贷市场发展在产权不安全的情况下增加了资源开采，但在产权安全的情况下减少了资源开采。

papers.title: High-Yield Debt Covenants and Their Real Effects
papers.authors: Falk Bräuning, Victoria Ivashina, Ali Ozdagli
papers.abstract: High-yield debt including leveraged loans is characterized by incurrence financial covenants, or “cov-lite” provisions. A traditional loan agreement includes maintenance covenants, which require continuous compliance with the covenant threshold, and their violation shifts the control rights to creditors. Incurrence covenants preserve equity control rights but trigger pre-specified restrictions on the borrower’s actions once the covenant threshold is crossed. We show that the prevalence of incurrence covenants indirectly imposes significant constraints on investments as restricted actions become binding: Similar to the effects associated with the shift of control rights to creditors in traditional loans, the drop in investment under incurrence covenants is large and sudden. The deleveraging and drop in investment and market value associated with such latent violations point to a shock amplification mechanism through contractual restrictions that are at play for a highly levered corporate sector prior to firms filing for bankruptcy and independently of whether they ever do so.
papers.zh_title: 高收益债务契约及其实际影响
papers.zh_abstract: 包括杠杆贷款在内的高收益债务，其特点是采用发生型财务契约，或称“宽松契约”条款。传统的贷款协议包含维持型契约，要求持续遵守契约阈值，违反该阈值会将控制权转移给债权人。发生型契约保留了股权控制权，但一旦超过契约阈值，就会触发对借款人行为的预先指定限制。我们表明，发生型契约的普遍存在间接地对投资施加了显著约束，因为受限行动变得具有约束力：类似于传统贷款中控制权转移给债权人所带来的影响，在发生型契约下投资的下降是巨大且突然的。与这些潜在违约相关的去杠杆化以及投资和市场价值的下降，指向一种通过契约限制产生的冲击放大机制，这种机制在高度杠杆化的企业部门申请破产之前就已发挥作用，并且独立于它们是否最终申请破产。

papers.title: How do Private Equity Fees vary across Public Pensions?
papers.authors: Juliane Begenau, Emil Siriwardane
papers.abstract: We study how investment fees vary within private-capital funds. Net-of-fee return clustering suggests that most funds have two tiers of fees, and we decompose differences across tiers into both management and performance-based fees. Managers of venture capital funds and those in high demand are less likely to use multiple fee schedules. Some investors consistently pay lower fees relative to others within their funds. Investor size, experience, and past performance explain some but not all of this effect, suggesting that unobserved traits like negotiation skill or bargaining power materially impact the fees that investors pay to access private markets.
papers.zh_title: 私募股权费用在不同公共养老金中如何变化？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了私募资本基金中投资费用的差异。净费用收益的聚类表明，大多数基金存在两个费用层级，我们将层级间的差异分解为管理费和基于业绩的费用。风险资本基金的管理者以及需求旺盛的管理者不太可能使用多种费用表。一些投资者在其基金内部始终支付比其他投资者更低的费用。投资者规模、经验和过往业绩部分解释了这一效应，但并非全部，这表明谈判技巧或议价能力等未观察到的特征会实质性地影响投资者为进入私募市场所支付的费用。

papers.title: Does Entry Remedy Collusion? Evidence from the Generic Prescription Drug Cartel
papers.authors: Amanda Starc, Thomas G. Wollmann
papers.abstract: Entry represents a fundamental threat to cartels. We study the extent and effect of this behavior in the largest price-fixing case in US history, which involves generic drug manufacturing. We link information on the cartel’s internal operations to regulatory filings and market data. There is a substantial increase in entry after cartel formation but regulatory approvals delay most entrants by 2-4 years. We then estimate a structural model to simulate counterfactual equilibria. Absent entry, cartel profits would be dramatically higher. Correspondingly, reducing regulatory delays by just 1-2 years equates to consumer compensating variation of $559 million-$1.3 billion.
papers.zh_title: 进入能否补救合谋？来自仿制药卡特尔的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 进入是对卡特尔的基本威胁。我们研究了美国历史上最大价格操纵案（涉及仿制药生产）中这种行为的程度和影响。我们将卡特尔内部运作的信息与监管申报和市场数据联系起来。卡特尔形成后，进入显著增加，但监管审批将大多数进入者延迟了2-4年。然后，我们估计了一个结构模型来模拟反事实均衡。如果没有进入，卡特尔利润将大幅提高。相应地，仅将监管延迟减少1-2年，就相当于消费者补偿变差为5.59亿至13亿美元。

papers.title: Smoking, Selection, and Medical Care Expenditures
papers.authors: Michael E. Darden, Robert Kaestner
papers.abstract: The contribution of cigarette smoking to national health expenditures is thought to be large, but our current understanding of the effect of smoking on annual medical expenditures is limited to studies that use cross-sectional data to make comparisons of medical care expenditures between smokers and never smokers at a particular age. We develop a dynamic economic model of smoking and medical care use that highlights two forms of selection: selective mortality and non-random cessation. To test predictions from our model, we construct novel longitudinal profiles of medical expenditures of smokers and never smokers from merged National Health Interview Survey and Medicare claims information. Consistent with our theory, we find that, from a given age, smokers generate higher expenditures prospectively, because of a higher incidence in inpatient usage, and lower expenditures retrospectively, because of lower outpatient usage. Between ages 65 and 84, we find that the expected value of the discounted sum of total expenditures is lower for smokers, mainly because of excess mortality. We find no evidence that cigarette smoking is a burden on Medicare.
papers.zh_title: 吸烟、选择与医疗支出
papers.zh_abstract: 吸烟对国民健康支出的贡献被认为很大，但我们目前对吸烟对年度医疗支出影响的理解仅限于使用横截面数据在特定年龄比较吸烟者和从不吸烟者医疗支出的研究。我们开发了一个吸烟和医疗使用的动态经济模型，突出了两种形式的选择：选择性死亡和非随机戒烟。为了检验我们模型的预测，我们从合并的国家健康访谈调查和医疗保险索赔信息中构建了吸烟者和从不吸烟者医疗支出的新颖纵向概况。与我们的理论一致，我们发现，从特定年龄开始，吸烟者由于住院使用率更高，未来产生的支出更高，而由于门诊使用率更低，过去产生的支出更低。在65至84岁之间，我们发现吸烟者总支出贴现和的预期值较低，这主要是由于超额死亡率。我们没有发现吸烟是医疗保险负担的证据。

papers.title: Vaccination Rates and COVID Outcomes across U.S. States
papers.authors: Robert J. Barro
papers.abstract: Rates of COVID deaths, hospitalizations, and cases differ markedly across U.S. states, as do rates of vaccination. This study uses cross-state regressions to assess impacts of vaccinations on COVID outcomes. A number of familiar issues arise concerning cross-sectional regressions, including omitted variables, behavioral responses to vaccination, and reverse causation. The benefits from a field context and from the broad range of observed variations suggest the value from dealing with these issues. Results reveal sizable negative effects of vaccination on deaths, hospitalizations, and cases up to early December 2021, although vaccine efficacy seems to wane over time. The findings for deaths apply to all-cause excess mortality as well as COVID-related mortality. The estimates imply that one expected life saved requires 248 additional doses, with a marginal cost around $55000, far below typical estimates of the value of a statistical life. Results since December 2021 suggest smaller effects of vaccinations on deaths and, especially, hospitalizations and cases, possibly because of diminished effectiveness of vaccines against new forms of the virus, notably the omicron variant. A further possibility is that confidence engendered by vaccinations motivated individuals and governments to lessen non-pharmaceutical interventions, such as masking and social distancing.
papers.zh_title: 美国各州的疫苗接种率与新冠结果
papers.zh_abstract: 美国各州的新冠死亡、住院和病例率存在显著差异，疫苗接种率也是如此。本研究使用跨州回归来评估疫苗接种对新冠结果的影响。关于横截面回归，出现了一些常见问题，包括遗漏变量、对疫苗接种的行为反应以及反向因果。实地背景的好处以及观察到的广泛变异表明处理这些问题的价值。结果显示，截至2021年12月初，疫苗接种对死亡、住院和病例有显著的负面效应，尽管疫苗效力似乎随时间减弱。死亡率的发现适用于全因超额死亡率以及新冠相关死亡率。估计表明，挽救一条预期寿命需要额外接种248剂，边际成本约为55000美元，远低于统计生命价值的典型估计。2021年12月以来的结果表明，疫苗接种对死亡，尤其是住院和病例的影响较小，可能是因为疫苗对病毒新变种（特别是奥密克戎变异株）的有效性降低。另一种可能性是，疫苗接种带来的信心促使个人和政府减少非药物干预措施，如戴口罩和保持社交距离。

papers.title: Payment for Order Flow And Asset Choice
papers.authors: Thomas Ernst, Chester S. Spatt
papers.abstract: The paper documents important differences in payment for order flow (PFOF), spreads, and price improvement across asset classes. In stocks we show that PFOF is small. While many retail trades are executed off-exchange, we find that they receive meaningful price improvement, particularly when spreads are at their minimum. In single-name equity options, we show that PFOF is large. While all option trades are executed on-exchange, option exchanges have rules that facilitate internalization. We exploit variation in the Designated Market Maker (DMM) assignments at option exchanges to show that retail traders receive less price improvement, and worse prices, from those DMMs who pay PFOF to brokers. Current debate concerning PFOF has focused on equity routing. We show that option routing is comparatively worse, and this gives rise to a second potential conflict of interest of brokers: encouraging customers to trade assets offering higher PFOF. As fintech has eliminated retail commissions, these cross-asset differences in PFOF have become far more consequential to broker incentives.
papers.zh_title: 订单流付费与资产选择
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了不同资产类别在订单流付费、价差和价格改善方面的重要差异。在股票中，我们显示订单流付费很小。虽然许多零售交易在场外执行，但我们发现它们获得了有意义的价差改善，尤其是在价差处于最低水平时。在单一股票期权中，我们显示订单流付费很大。虽然所有期权交易都在交易所执行，但期权交易所的规则促进了内部化。我们利用期权交易所指定做市商分配的差异来表明，零售交易者从那些向经纪商支付订单流付费的指定做市商那里获得的价格改善较少，价格也更差。当前关于订单流付费的辩论集中在股票路由上。我们表明期权路由相对更差，这引发了经纪商的第二个潜在利益冲突：鼓励客户交易提供更高订单流付费的资产。随着金融科技消除了零售佣金，这些跨资产订单流付费的差异对经纪商激励的影响变得更为重要。

papers.title: Fiscal Capacity and Commercial Bank Lending Under COVID-19
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak, Mark M. Spiegel
papers.abstract: We investigate the implications of government indebtedness for the efficacy of expansionary government spending in encouraging commercial bank lending growth during the COVID-19 pandemic. Our sample is a large cross-section of over 3000 banks from 71 countries. To address the likely endogeneity of government assistance, we instrument for extra-normal spending using disparities in pre-existing national political characteristics. Our results indicate that bank lending did respond to fiscal capacity, as higher public debt going into the crisis weakened the expansionary effects of higher spending on bank lending at economically and statistically significant levels. Moreover, this sensitivity was higher among weaker banks, suggesting sensitivity to the perceived implications of spending for government assistance going forward. We also found greater sensitivity in high-income economies and for small and medium-sized banks. Our results are robust to a variety of robustness tests, including perturbations in specification, sample, and estimation methodology.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间的财政能力与商业银行贷款
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在COVID-19大流行期间，政府负债对扩张性政府支出在鼓励商业银行贷款增长方面有效性的影响。我们的样本是来自71个国家的3000多家银行的大规模横截面数据。为了解决政府援助可能存在的内生性问题，我们利用先前存在的国家政治特征差异来对超常支出进行工具变量处理。我们的结果表明，银行贷款确实对财政能力做出了反应，因为危机前较高的公共债务削弱了更高支出对银行贷款的扩张效应，这在经济上和统计上都是显著的。此外，这种敏感性在较弱的银行中更高，这表明对支出对未来政府援助的感知影响的敏感性。我们还发现，在高收入经济体以及中小型银行中，敏感性更高。我们的结果对各种稳健性检验（包括模型设定、样本和估计方法的扰动）都是稳健的。

papers.title: Household Portfolios and Retirement Saving over the Life Cycle
papers.authors: Jonathan A. Parker, Antoinette Schoar, Allison T. Cole, Duncan Simester
papers.abstract: US middle-class households invested 10% more of their investable wealth in the stock market in the past two decades than they did in the 1990s, and this share is now hump-shaped in age, declining after age 50. We present a range of evidence that the Pension Protection Act (PPA) — which allowed Target Date Funds (TDFs) as default options in retirement plans — played an important role. Younger (older) workers starting at the same firm after TDFs became the default option post-PPA, invested more (less) in stocks. in line with the TDF glide path. In contrast to portfolio allocations, contribution rates changed little following the PPA.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D14, E21, G11, G23, G28, G51
papers.zh_title: 生命周期中的家庭投资组合与退休储蓄
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，美国中产阶级家庭将其可投资财富中投资于股票市场的比例比1990年代增加了10%，并且这一比例在年龄上呈驼峰形，在50岁之后下降。我们提供了一系列证据表明，《养老金保护法案》——该法案允许在退休计划中将目标日期基金作为默认选项——发挥了重要作用。在《养老金保护法案》之后，目标日期基金成为默认选项，在同一家公司开始工作的年轻（年长）员工投资于股票的比例更高（更低），这与目标日期基金的滑行路径一致。与投资组合配置相反，在《养老金保护法案》之后，缴费率变化不大。

papers.title: Does Human-algorithm Feedback Loop Lead to Error Propagation? Evidence from Zillow’s Zestimate
papers.authors: Runshan Fu, Ginger Zhe Jin, Meng Liu
papers.abstract: We study how home sellers and buyers interact with Zillow’s Zestimate algorithm throughout the sales cycle of residential properties, with an emphasis on the implications of such interactions. In particular, leveraging Zestimate’s algorithm updates as exogenous shocks, we find evidence for a human-algorithm feedback loop: listing and selling outcomes respond significantly to Zestimate, and Zestimate is quickly updated for the focal and comparable homes after a property is listed or sold. This raises a concern that housing market disturbances may propagate and persist because of the feedback loop. However, simulation suggests that disturbances are short-lived and diminish eventually, mainly because all marginal effects across stages of the selling process—though sizable and significant—are less than one. To further validate this insight in the real data, we leverage the COVID-19 pandemic as a natural experiment. We find consistent evidence that the initial disturbances created by the March-2020 declaration of national emergency faded away in a few months. Overall, our results identify the human-algorithm feedback loop in an important real-world setting, but dismiss the concern that such a feedback loop generates persistent error propagation.
papers.zh_title: 人机反馈循环是否会导致错误传播？来自Zillow的Zestimate证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了住宅物业销售周期中，房屋卖家和买家如何与Zillow的Zestimate算法互动，并特别关注这种互动的影响。具体来说，利用Zestimate算法更新作为外生冲击，我们发现了人机反馈循环的证据：挂牌和销售结果对Zestimate有显著反应，而在房产挂牌或出售后，Zestimate会迅速针对该房产和可比房产进行更新。这引发了一个担忧，即由于反馈循环，住房市场扰动可能会传播并持续存在。然而，模拟表明扰动是短暂的，并最终消失，这主要是因为销售过程各阶段的所有边际效应——尽管显著且规模可观——都小于1。为了在真实数据中进一步验证这一见解，我们利用COVID-19大流行作为自然实验。我们发现一致的证据表明，2020年3月宣布国家紧急状态所引发的初始扰动在几个月内就消失了。总体而言，我们的结果在一个重要的现实世界环境中识别出了人机反馈循环，但消除了这种反馈循环会导致持续错误传播的担忧。

papers.title: Trading-off Bias and Variance in Stratified Experiments and in Staggered Adoption Designs, Under a Boundedness Condition on the Magnitude of the Treatment Effect
papers.authors: Clément de Chaisemartin
papers.abstract: I consider estimation of the average treatment effect (ATE), in a population composed of $G$ groups, when one has unbiased and uncorrelated estimators of each group's conditional average treatment effect (CATE). These conditions are met in stratified randomized experiments. I assume that the outcome is homoscedastic, and that each CATE is bounded in absolute value by B standard deviations of the outcome, for some known B. I derive, across all linear combinations of the CATEs' estimators, the estimator of the ATE with the lowest worst-case mean-squared error. This minimax-linear estimator assigns a weight equal to group g's share in the population to the most precisely estimated CATEs, and a weight proportional to one over the estimator's variance to the least precisely estimated CATEs. I also derive the minimax-linear estimator when the CATEs' estimators are positively correlated, a condition that may be met by differences-in-differences estimators in staggered adoption designs.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, CH, DEV, ED, EEE, EH, IFM, IO, ITI, LS, PE, POL, TWP；JEL：C21, C23
papers.zh_title: 在分层实验和交错采纳设计中，基于处理效应幅度有界条件下的偏差与方差权衡
papers.zh_abstract: 我考虑在由G个群体组成的总体中估计平均处理效应（ATE），假设每个群体的条件平均处理效应（CATE）存在无偏且不相关的估计量。这些条件在分层随机实验中得到满足。我假设结果是同方差的，并且每个CATE的绝对值以结果标准差的B倍为界，其中B已知。我推导出在所有CATE估计量的线性组合中，具有最低最坏情况均方误差的ATE估计量。这个极小化极大线性估计量对最精确估计的CATE赋予等于该群体在总体中份额的权重，而对最不精确估计的CATE赋予与估计量方差成反比的权重。当CATE估计量正相关时，我也推导出极小化极大线性估计量，这种条件可能在交错采纳设计中的双重差分估计量中得到满足。

papers.title: Changes in the Distribution of Economic Well-Being during the COVID-19 Pandemic: Evidence from Nationally Representative Consumption Data
papers.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Connacher Murphy, James X. Sullivan
papers.abstract: We examine the distribution of household consumption, income and savings from 2019 through the end of 2020 using the Consumer Expenditure Survey (CE) and other data. This is the first work to study the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on economic well-being using nationally representative consumption data. We find that low percentiles of the consumption distribution see pre-pandemic growth and little change with the onset of the pandemic. On the other hand, higher percentiles of the consumption distribution do not increase before the pandemic and fall in 2020. Leveraging the rich demographics of our microdata, we find the most pronounced decline for high-educated families near the top of the consumption distribution and seniors in the top half of the distribution. The decrease in the top half is less evident for non-Whites. These patterns for consumption are different than those for income, particularly in the upper part of the distribution. Liquid assets increase in the upper half of the distribution, consistent with the divergence between the upper half of the income and consumption distributions. Our results suggest that the policy response to the pandemic averted a decrease in consumption for the most materially disadvantaged families, while changes in aggregate consumption accord with the observed patterns in the top of the consumption distribution. The changes for various types of consumption, and the distribution of those changes across the material resource distribution, are consistent with reductions in travel to work—which were large for those with greater material advantage—and restrictions on outlets for consumption.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D12, D31, E21, H31, I31
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间经济福利分布的变化：来自全国代表性消费数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用消费者支出调查（CE）和其他数据，考察了从2019年到2020年底的家庭消费、收入和储蓄分布。这是首次使用全国代表性消费数据研究COVID-19疫情对经济福利影响的工作。我们发现，消费分布的低百分位数在疫情前有所增长，而在疫情爆发时变化很小。另一方面，消费分布的高百分位数在疫情前没有增加，并在2020年下降。利用我们微观数据丰富的 demographics 信息，我们发现消费分布顶部附近的高学历家庭和分布上半部分的老年人下降最为显著。对于非白人群体，上半部分的下降不那么明显。这些消费模式与收入模式不同，尤其是在分布的上部。流动资产在分布的上半部分增加，这与收入和消费分布上半部分的差异一致。我们的结果表明，对疫情的政策反应避免了最物质弱势家庭的消费下降，而总消费的变化与消费分布顶部观察到的模式相符。各类消费的变化以及这些变化在物质资源分布上的分布，与通勤减少（对物质优势较大者影响较大）和消费渠道限制相一致。

papers.title: Invisible Wounds: Health and Well-Being Impacts of Mental Disorder Disability Compensation on Veterans
papers.authors: David Silver, Jonathan Zhang
papers.abstract: We study impacts of the US Department of Veteran Affairs (VA) Disability Compensation program on the health and well-being of the large and rapidly growing population of veterans claiming mental disorders. Our empirical strategy leverages quasi-random assignment of veterans to medical examiners who vary in their assessing tendencies. We find that an additional $1,000 per year in transfers decreases food insecurity and homelessness by 4.1% and 1.3% over five years, while the number of collections on VA debts declines by 6.4%. Despite facing few monetary costs, healthcare utilization increases by 2.5% over the first five years, with greater engagement in preventive care and improved medication adherence. Patient satisfaction surveys suggest that transfers improve communication and trust between veterans and VA clinicians, leading to greater overall satisfaction. Apart from a reduction in self-reported pain, we estimate precise null average effects on mental and physical health, and on mortality. Lastly, those on the margin of claim denial experience worse outcomes on average than other applicants, with suggestive evidence of large treatment effects for this sub-population, highlighting the precarious positions of many marginally (dis)qualified applicants for this program.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H53, I1, I3, I38, J01
papers.zh_title: 隐形创伤：精神障碍残疾补偿对退伍军人健康和福祉的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国退伍军人事务部（VA）残疾补偿计划对声称患有精神障碍的退伍军人（这一庞大且快速增长的人群）健康和福祉的影响。我们的实证策略利用了退伍军人被准随机分配到评估倾向各异的医学检查员的情况。我们发现，每年额外1000美元的转移支付在五年内将食品不安全和无家可归分别降低4.1%和1.3%，同时VA债务的催收数量下降6.4%。尽管面临很少的货币成本，医疗保健利用率在头五年内增加2.5%，预防性护理参与度提高，药物依从性改善。患者满意度调查表明，转移支付改善了退伍军人与VA临床医生之间的沟通和信任，从而提高了总体满意度。除了自我报告疼痛的减少外，我们估计出对心理和身体健康以及死亡率的精确零平均效应。最后，处于索赔拒绝边缘的群体平均结果比其他申请人更差，有提示性证据表明该子群体存在较大的处理效应，这突显了许多该计划中勉强（不）合格申请人的不稳定处境。

papers.title: From Scarcity to Abundance: Government and Private Initiatives to Manage the Allocation of N95 Masks in the U.S. During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Paul L. Joskow
papers.abstract: This paper examines the structure, behavior and performance of the N95 respirator market in the U.S. before and during the COVID-19 pandemic (2020-early 2022). It focuses on the behavior and performance of government and private sector organizations in the allocation of scarce supplies of N95 respirators during the pandemic in the U.S. The experience with the supply, demand, allocation, rationing, and pricing of N95s during the first two years of the pandemic provides instructive examples of how the public and private sectors can work in tandem with regulatory support rather than coercion to achieve widely accepted public health goals. Of particular interest is the adoption of voluntary private market segmentation, rationing and price maintenance policies during roughly the first year of the pandemic, led by the dominant U.S. manufacturer of N95s.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO；JEL：I18, L1, L11, L14, L21, L5, L81
papers.zh_title: 从稀缺到充裕：COVID-19疫情期间美国N95口罩分配管理的政府和私人举措
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了美国N95呼吸器市场在COVID-19疫情前和疫情期间（2020年至2022年初）的结构、行为和绩效。它重点关注疫情期间美国政府及私营部门组织在分配稀缺N95呼吸器供应方面的行为和绩效。疫情头两年在N95供应、需求、分配、配给和定价方面的经验，提供了具有启发性的例子，说明公共和私营部门如何在监管支持而非强制下协同工作，以实现广泛接受的公共卫生目标。特别值得注意的是，在疫情大约第一年，由美国N95主要制造商主导，采取了自愿的私人市场细分、配给和价格维持政策。

papers.title: A Preferred-Habitat Model of Term Premia, Exchange Rates, and Monetary Policy Spillovers
papers.authors: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Walker D. Ray, Dimitri Vayanos
papers.abstract: We develop a two-country model in which currency and bond markets are populated by different investor clienteles, and segmentation is partly overcome by arbitrageurs with limited capital. Risk premia in our model are time-varying, connected across markets, and consistent with the empirical violations of Uncovered Interest Parity and Expectations Hypothesis. Through risk premia, large-scale bond purchases lower domestic and foreign bond yields and depreciate the currency, and short-rate cuts lower foreign yields, with smaller effects than bond purchases. Currency returns are disconnected from long-maturity bond returns, and yet the currency market is instrumental in transmitting bond demand shocks across countries.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：F31, F41, F42, G11, G12
papers.zh_title: 期限溢价、汇率和货币政策溢出效应的偏好栖息地模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个两国模型，其中货币和债券市场由不同的投资者客户群体组成，市场分割被资本有限的套利者部分克服。我们模型中的风险溢价是时变的，跨市场关联，并与无抛补利率平价和预期假设的经验违背一致。通过风险溢价，大规模债券购买降低了国内和国外债券收益率，并使本币贬值；短期利率下调降低了国外收益率，但其影响小于债券购买。货币回报与长期债券回报脱节，然而货币市场在跨国传导债券需求冲击方面起着关键作用。

papers.title: Eclipse of Rent-Sharing: The Effects of Managers' Business Education on Wages and the Labor Share in the US and Denmark
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Alex He, Daniel le Maire
papers.abstract: This paper provides evidence from the US and Denmark that managers with a business degree (“business managers”) reduce their employees' wages. Within five years of the appointment of a business manager, wages decline by 6% and the labor share by 5 percentage points in the US, and by 3% and 3 percentage points in Denmark. Firms appointing business managers are not on differential trends and do not enjoy higher output, investment, or employment growth thereafter. Using manager retirements and deaths and an IV strategy based on the diffusion of the practice of appointing business managers within industry, region and size quartile cells, we provide additional evidence that these are causal effects. We establish that the proximate cause of these (relative) wage effects are changes in rent-sharing practices following the appointment of business managers. Exploiting exogenous export demand shocks, we show that non-business managers share profits with their workers, whereas business managers do not. But consistent with our first set of results, these business managers show no greater ability to increase sales or profits in response to exporting opportunities. Finally, we use the influence of role models on college major choice to instrument for the decision to enroll in a business degree in Denmark and show that our estimates correspond to causal effects of practices and values acquired in business education - rather than the differential selection into business education of individuals unlikely to share rents with workers.
papers.zh_title: 租金分享的消退：管理者商业教育对美国及丹麦工资和劳动份额的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了来自美国和丹麦的证据，表明拥有商业学位的管理者（“商业管理者”）会降低其员工的工资。在商业管理者上任后的五年内，美国工资下降6%，劳动份额下降5个百分点；丹麦则分别下降3%和3个百分点。任命商业管理者的公司并未呈现差异化趋势，此后也未获得更高的产出、投资或就业增长。利用管理者退休和死亡，以及基于行业、地区和规模四分位单元格内任命商业管理者实践扩散的工具变量策略，我们提供了这些是因果效应的额外证据。我们确定这些（相对）工资效应的直接原因是任命商业管理者后租金分享实践的变化。利用外生的出口需求冲击，我们表明非商业管理者与工人分享利润，而商业管理者则不分享。但与我们第一组结果一致，这些商业管理者在应对出口机会时并未表现出更强的增加销售额或利润的能力。最后，我们利用榜样对大学专业选择的影响，为丹麦选择攻读商业学位的决策构建工具变量，并表明我们的估计对应于商业教育中获得的实践和价值观的因果效应——而非那些不太可能与工人分享租金的个体对商业教育的差异性选择。

papers.title: Difference-in-Differences Estimators of Intertemporal Treatment Effects
papers.authors: Clément de Chaisemartin, Xavier D'Haultfoeuille
papers.abstract: We study treatment-effect estimation using panel data. The treatment may be nonbinary, non-absorbing, and the outcome may be affected by the treatment lags. We make parallel-trends assumptions, but do not restrict treatment effect heterogeneity, unlike commonly-used two-way-fixed-effects regressions. We propose reduced-form event-study estimators of the effect of being exposed to a weakly higher treatment dose for ℓ periods. We also propose normalized event-study estimators, that estimate a weighted average of the effects of the current treatment and its lags. Finally, we show that the reduced-form estimators can be combined into an economically interpretable cost-benefit ratio.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EEE, EH, IFM, ITI, LS, PE, POL, TWP；JEL：C21, C23
papers.zh_title: 跨期处理效应的双重差分估计量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究使用面板数据进行处理效应估计。处理变量可能非二元、非吸收性，且结果可能受处理滞后期影响。我们做出平行趋势假设，但与常用的双向固定效应回归不同，我们不限制处理效应异质性。我们提出了简约形式的事件研究估计量，用于估计暴露于略高处理剂量ℓ期的效应。我们还提出了标准化的事件研究估计量，用于估计当前处理及其滞后效应的加权平均值。最后，我们展示了简约形式估计量可以组合成一个具有经济解释意义的成本效益比。

papers.title: Sovereign Bond Restructuring: Commitment vs. Flexibility
papers.authors: Jason Roderick Donaldson, Lukas Kremens, Giorgia Piacentino
papers.abstract: Sovereigns in distress often engage in debt restructuring, typically negotiating with multiple classes of bondholders at once. We use natural experiments to investigate whether sovereign bondholders benefit from committing not to restructure. We find that committing not to restructure one class of bonds is valuable for not only that class, but, in contrast to received theory, for others too. We develop a model to rationalize these cross-bond spillovers. It points to a system of cross-bond equations that, we show, can be exploited to quantify natural experiments and to estimate unobservable elasticities in terms of a few sufficient statistics.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, LE, POL；JEL：G34, H63, K12
papers.zh_title: 主权债券重组：承诺与灵活性
papers.zh_abstract: 陷入困境的主权国家经常进行债务重组，通常同时与多类债券持有人谈判。我们利用自然实验来研究主权债券持有人是否从承诺不进行重组中受益。我们发现，承诺不重组某一类债券不仅对该类债券有价值，而且与现有理论相反，对其他类债券也有价值。我们开发了一个模型来解释这些跨债券的溢出效应。该模型指向一个跨债券方程组，我们表明，可以利用该方程组来量化自然实验，并根据几个充分统计量估计不可观测的弹性。

papers.title: Legal Representation in Disability Claims
papers.authors: Hilary W. Hoynes, Nicole Maestas, Alexander Strand
papers.abstract: Legal representatives play a prominent role in the Social Security Disability Insurance adjudication process, earning fees totaling $1.2 billion in 2019. Long ubiquitous in appellate hearings, disability representatives—including attorneys and non-attorneys—have begun appearing more frequently at the beginning of cases, during the initial review. This development has raised questions about the motives of disability law firms, who are sometimes perceived to prioritize their own interests in response to incentives in the fee structure set by the Social Security Administration. We provide the first estimates of the causal impact of legal representation on case outcomes when representatives are engaged from the initial stage. To address selection into representation, we instrument for initial representation using geographic and temporal variation in disability law firm market shares in the closely related but distinct appellate market. We find that representation increases the probability of initial awards, reduces the probability of appeals, and induces no detectable change in the ultimate probability of award. This pattern indicates that legal representation in the initial stage leads to earlier disability awards to individuals who would otherwise be awarded benefits only on appeal. Furthermore, by securing earlier awards and discouraging unsupported appeals, representation reduces total case processing time by nearly one year.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H55, J14, K15
papers.zh_title: 残疾索赔中的法律代理
papers.zh_abstract: 法律代理人在社会保障残疾保险裁决过程中扮演着重要角色，2019年其收费总额达12亿美元。长期以来，残疾代理人（包括律师和非律师）在上诉听证中普遍存在，但如今他们开始更频繁地出现在案件初始阶段，即初次审查期间。这一发展引发了对残疾律师事务所动机的质疑，人们有时认为，这些事务所会优先考虑自身利益，以回应社会保障管理局设定的费用结构中的激励措施。我们首次估算了当代理人从初始阶段介入时，法律代理对案件结果的因果影响。为了解决代理选择问题，我们利用密切相关但不同的上诉市场中残疾律师事务所市场份额的地理和时间变化，作为初始代理的工具变量。我们发现，代理提高了初始裁决的概率，降低了上诉的概率，并且未导致最终裁决概率发生可检测的变化。这一模式表明，初始阶段的法律代理使得那些原本只能在上诉时获得福利的个人更早地获得残疾裁决。此外，通过确保更早的裁决和阻止无依据的上诉，代理将案件总处理时间缩短了近一年。

papers.title: The Change in Poverty from 1995 to 2016 Among Single Parent Families
papers.authors: Kevin Corinth, Bruce D. Meyer, Derek Wu
papers.abstract: This paper is the first to examine changes in poverty over time using a comprehensive set of linked survey and administrative data, implementing recommendations of the Interagency Technical Working Group on Evaluating Alternative Measures of Poverty. Using the Comprehensive Income Dataset (CID), we correct for measurement error in survey-reported incomes, focusing on single parent families from 1995 to 2016. Our preferred estimates indicate that single parent family poverty declined by 62% over time, while it fell by only 45% using survey data alone. Moreover, survey-reported deep poverty among single parent families increased over time, while it fell using the CID.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C42, C81, I32, I38
papers.zh_title: 1995年至2016年单亲家庭贫困状况的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文首次利用一套全面的关联调查和行政数据，并采纳了跨机构替代贫困衡量指标评估技术工作组的建议，来考察贫困随时间的变化。我们使用综合收入数据集（CID），纠正了调查报告中收入的测量误差，重点关注1995年至2016年的单亲家庭。我们的首选估计表明，单亲家庭贫困率在此期间下降了62%，而仅使用调查数据则显示仅下降了45%。此外，调查报告中单亲家庭的深度贫困率随时间推移而上升，而使用CID数据则显示下降。

papers.title: Estimating Equilibrium in Health Insurance Exchanges: Price Competition and Subsidy Design under the ACA
papers.authors: Pietro Tebaldi
papers.abstract: In government-sponsored health insurance, subsidy design affects market outcomes. First, holding premiums fixed, subsidies determine insurance uptake and average cost. Insurers then respond to these changes, adjusting premiums. Combining data from the first four years of the California ACA marketplace with a model of insurance demand, cost, and insurers’ competition, I quantify the impact of alternative subsidy designs on premiums, enrollment, costs, public spending, and consumer surplus. Younger individuals are more price sensitive and cheaper to cover. Increasing subsidies to this group would make all buyers better off, increase market participation, and lower average costs and average subsidies.
papers.zh_title: 健康保险交易所的均衡估计：ACA下的价格竞争与补贴设计
papers.zh_abstract: 在政府资助的健康保险中，补贴设计会影响市场结果。首先，在保费固定的情况下，补贴决定了保险参保率和平均成本。然后，保险公司会针对这些变化做出反应，调整保费。结合加州ACA市场前四年的数据与保险需求、成本及保险公司竞争模型，我量化了替代补贴设计对保费、参保率、成本、公共支出和消费者剩余的影响。年轻人对价格更敏感，且参保成本更低。增加对这一群体的补贴将使所有购买者受益，提高市场参与度，并降低平均成本和平均补贴。

papers.title: Consumer Bankruptcy, Mortgage Default and Labor Supply
papers.authors: Wenli Li, Costas Meghir, Florian Oswald
papers.abstract: We specify and estimate a lifecycle model of consumption, housing demand and labor supply in an environment where individuals may file for bankruptcy or default on their mortgage. Uncertainty in the model is driven by house price shocks, {education specific} productivity shocks, and catastrophic consumption events, while bankruptcy is governed by the basic institutional framework in the US as implied by Chapter 7 and Chapter 13. The model is estimated using micro data on credit reports and mortgages combined with data from the American Community Survey. We use the model to understand the relative importance of the two chapters (7 and 13) for each of our two education groups that differ in both preferences and wage profiles. We also provide an evaluation of the BACPCA reform. Our paper demonstrates importance of distributional effects of Bankruptcy policy.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LE, LS, PE；JEL：D14, D18, D52, D53, E21, G33, J22, J31, K35
papers.zh_title: 消费者破产、抵押贷款违约与劳动力供给
papers.zh_abstract: 我们设定并估计了一个生命周期模型，该模型包含消费、住房需求和劳动力供给，且个体可能申请破产或抵押贷款违约。模型中的不确定性由房价冲击、特定教育程度的生产率冲击以及灾难性消费事件驱动，而破产则受美国基本制度框架（即第7章和第13章）的约束。该模型利用信用报告和抵押贷款的微观数据，并结合美国社区调查的数据进行估计。我们利用该模型来理解第7章和第13章对于两个教育群体（他们在偏好和工资曲线方面均存在差异）的相对重要性。我们还对BACPCA改革进行了评估。我们的论文展示了破产政策分配效应的重要性。

papers.title: The Effect of Smoking Cessation on Mental Health: Evidence from a Randomized Trial
papers.authors: Katherine Meckel, Katherine P. Rittenhouse
papers.abstract: One in nine Americans smokes cigarettes, and a disproportionate share of smokers suffer from mental illness. Despite this correlation, there exists little rigorous evidence on the effects of smoking cessation on mental health. We re-use data from a randomized trial of a smoking cessation treatment to estimate short and long-term impacts on previously un-analyzed measures of mental distress. We find that smoking cessation increases short-run mental distress, while reducing milder forms of long-run distress. We provide suggestive evidence on mechanisms including physical health, marriage, employment and substance use. Our results suggest that cessation efforts and mental health supports are complementary interventions in the short run and provide new evidence of welfare gains from cessation in the long run.
papers.zh_title: 戒烟对心理健康的影响：来自随机试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 每九个美国人中就有一人吸烟，而吸烟者中患有精神疾病的比例过高。尽管存在这种相关性，但关于戒烟对心理健康影响的严谨证据却很少。我们重新利用一项戒烟治疗随机试验的数据，来估计戒烟对先前未分析的心理困扰指标的短期和长期影响。我们发现，戒烟会增加短期心理困扰，同时减少较轻微的长期困扰。我们提供了关于机制（包括身体健康、婚姻、就业和物质使用）的提示性证据。我们的结果表明，戒烟努力和心理健康支持在短期内是互补的干预措施，并为戒烟带来的长期福利收益提供了新证据。

papers.title: Computerization of White Collar Jobs
papers.authors: Marcus Dillender, Eliza Forsythe
papers.abstract: We investigate the impact of computerization of white-collar jobs on wages and employment. Using online job postings from 2007 and 2010--2016 for office and administrative support (OAS) jobs, we show that when firms adopt new software at the job-title level they increase the skills required of job applicants. Furthermore, firms change the task content of such jobs, broadening them to include tasks associated with higher-skill office functions. We aggregate these patterns to the local labor-market level, instrumenting for local technology adoption with national measures. We find that a 1 standard deviation increase in OAS technology usage reduces employment in OAS occupations by about 1 percentage point and increases wages for college graduates in OAS jobs by over 3 percent. We find negative wage spillovers, with wages falling for both workers with and without a college degree. These results are consistent with technological adoption inducing a realignment in task assignment across occupations, leading office support occupations to become higher skill. We argue relative wage gains for OAS workers indicates that factor-augmenting features of OAS technological change dominate task-substituting features. In addition, while we find that total employment increases, these gains primarily accrue to college-educated women.
papers.zh_title: 白领工作的计算机化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了白领工作计算机化对工资和就业的影响。利用2007年及2010-2016年办公和行政支持（OAS）职位的在线招聘信息，我们表明，当企业在职位层面采用新软件时，它们会提高对求职者的技能要求。此外，企业会改变这些工作的任务内容，将其扩展至包含与更高技能办公职能相关的任务。我们将这些模式汇总到地方劳动力市场层面，并以全国性指标作为地方技术采用的工具变量。我们发现，OAS技术使用量每增加一个标准差，OAS职业的就业率就会下降约1个百分点，而OAS工作中大学毕业生的工资则会提高超过3%。我们发现了负面的工资溢出效应，即无论是否拥有大学学位的工人，其工资均有所下降。这些结果与以下观点一致：技术采用导致了跨职业的任务分配重新调整，使得办公支持职业的技能要求提高。我们认为，OAS工人相对工资的增长表明，OAS技术变革的要素增强特征压倒了任务替代特征。此外，虽然我们发现总就业量有所增加，但这些收益主要惠及受过大学教育的女性。

papers.title: Joined at the Hip: Monetary and Fiscal Policy in a Liquidity-Dependent World
papers.authors: Guillermo A. Calvo, Andrés Velasco
papers.abstract: We study the effects of monetary and fiscal policies when both money and government bonds provide liquidity services. Because money is the unit of account, the price of money is the inverse of the price level. If prices are sticky, so is the price of money in terms of goods, and this is one important reason why money is liquid and attractive. By contrast, the price of government bonds is free to jump and often does, especially in response to news about changes in fiscal policy and the supply of bonds. Those movements in government bond prices affect available liquidity, and therefore aggregate demand, inflation and output. Under these conditions, bond-financed fiscal expansions can be contractionary, causing deflation and a temporary recession. To avoid those effects, changes in bond supply must be matched by changes in money supply and in the interest rate on money. We conclude that in a liquidity-dependent world, fiscal and monetary policies are joined at the hip.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E12, E4, E42, E44, E52, E58, E62
papers.zh_title: 紧密相连：流动性依赖世界中的货币与财政政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当货币和政府债券都提供流动性服务时，货币政策和财政政策的影响。由于货币是记账单位，货币的价格是物价水平的倒数。如果价格是粘性的，那么货币相对于商品的价格也是粘性的，这是货币具有流动性和吸引力的一个重要原因。相比之下，政府债券的价格可以自由变动，并且经常变动，尤其是在应对财政政策变化和债券供给变化的新闻时。政府债券价格的这些变动会影响可用的流动性，从而影响总需求、通货膨胀和产出。在这些条件下，债券融资的财政扩张可能具有紧缩效应，导致通货紧缩和暂时性衰退。为了避免这些影响，债券供给的变化必须与货币供给和货币利率的变化相匹配。我们得出结论，在一个流动性依赖的世界中，财政政策和货币政策是紧密相连的。

papers.title: The Power of Certainty: Experimental Evidence on the Effective Design of Free Tuition Programs
papers.authors: Elizabeth Burland, Susan Dynarski, Katherine Michelmore, Stephanie Owen, Shwetha Raghuraman
papers.abstract: Proposed “free college” policies vary widely in design. The simplest set tuition to zero for everyone. More targeted approaches limit free tuition to those who demonstrate need through an application process. We experimentally test the effects of these two models on the schooling decisions of low-income students. An unconditional free tuition offer from a large public university substantially increases application and enrollment rates. A free tuition offer contingent on proof of need has a much smaller effect on application and none on enrollment. These results are consistent with students placing a high value on financial certainty when making schooling decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：I0, I21, I22, I24, I28
papers.zh_title: 确定性的力量：关于免费学费计划有效设计的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 提议的“免费大学”政策在设计上差异很大。最简单的做法是将所有人的学费降至零。更具针对性的方法则将免费学费限制在那些通过申请程序证明有经济需求的人。我们通过实验测试了这两种模式对低收入学生求学决策的影响。一所大型公立大学提供的无条件免费学费要约显著提高了申请率和入学率。而一项以证明经济需求为条件的免费学费要约对申请的影响要小得多，并且对入学率没有影响。这些结果与学生在做出求学决策时高度重视财务确定性这一观点一致。

papers.title: A Year Older, A Year Wiser (and Farther from Frontier): Invention Rents and Human Capital Depreciation
papers.authors: Philippe Aghion, Ufuk Akcigit, Ari Hyytinen, Otto Toivanen
papers.abstract: We look at how the arrival of an invention affects wage returns and probability of moving out of employment for white- and blue-collar coworkers of the inventor. First results suggest that older workers are hurt by the arrival of an invention. This negative effect disappears when we control for education and, in particular, for time that since obtaining the last formal degree, i.e., distance to human capital frontier. If anything, this effect is slightly higher for non-STEM than STEM-educated co-workers. This result suggests that retraining programs could be helpful in making the process of creative destruction and economic growth more inclusive.
papers.zh_title: 年长一岁，智慧一分（却离前沿更远）：发明租金与人力资本折旧
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察一项发明的出现如何影响发明者的白领和蓝领同事的工资回报及退出就业的概率。初步结果表明，年长工人因发明的出现而受损。当我们控制教育水平，特别是自获得最后一个正式学位以来的时间（即与人力资本前沿的距离）后，这一负面效应消失。若存在任何差异，非STEM教育背景的同事所受影响略高于STEM教育背景的同事。这一结果表明，再培训计划可能有助于使创造性破坏和经济增长的过程更具包容性。

papers.title: Abundance from Abroad: Migrant Income and Long-Run Economic Development
papers.authors: Gaurav Khanna, Emir Murathanoglu, Caroline B. Theoharides, Dean Yang
papers.abstract: We study how international migrant income prospects affect long-run development in origin areas. We leverage the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis exchange rate shocks in a shift-share identification strategy across Philippine provinces. Initial migrant income shocks are magnified six-fold over time, increasing domestic income, education levels, migrant skills, and high-skilled migration. Remarkably, 73.6% of long-run income gains come from domestic rather than migrant income. Trade-driven impacts of exchange rate shocks are orthogonal to effects via migrant income. A structural model reveals that 19.6% of long-run income gains stem from educational investments. International migration fosters broad economic development in origin communities.
papers.zh_title: 来自海外的丰裕：移民收入与长期经济发展
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究国际移民收入前景如何影响原籍地的长期发展。我们利用1997年亚洲金融危机汇率冲击，在菲律宾各省份采用份额转移识别策略。初始移民收入冲击随时间放大六倍，增加了国内收入、教育水平、移民技能和高技能移民。值得注意的是，73.6%的长期收入增长来自国内收入而非移民收入。汇率冲击的贸易驱动效应与通过移民收入产生的效应正交。一个结构模型显示，19.6%的长期收入增长源于教育投资。国际移民促进了原籍社区的广泛经济发展。

papers.title: The Adoption-Substitution Gap: Administrative Evidence from Swedish E-Bike Subsidies
papers.authors: Anders Anderson, Harrison Hong, Eline Jacobs
papers.abstract: Policymakers increasingly use green subsidies to advance Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) related to climate, mobility, and health. These programs assume a causal chain: subsidies drive technology adoption, which induces behavioral substitution that then generates sustainability impact. We test this mechanism in the context of a nationwide e-bike subsidy program in Sweden, focusing on the adoption-substitution gap—the friction between acquiring green technology and displacing high-carbon behaviors. Linking administrative data on all 90,000 recipients to vehicle registry and insurance records, we find that while the subsidy successfully doubled e-bike sales with complete price pass-through, behavioral substitution was minimal. Objective vehicle-kilometers traveled (VKT) changed marginally, leading to negligible emissions reductions and health gains. Notably, survey-based substitution estimates within the same population substantially overstate realized reductions, suggesting a reporting bias in stated-preference data. Our findings highlight the necessity of targeting green subsidies toward populations whose behavior is most elastic to ensure cost-effective climate and mobility outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H2, H20, H21, H22, H23, R4, R48, R49
papers.zh_title: 采纳-替代缺口：来自瑞典电动自行车补贴的行政证据
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者越来越多地使用绿色补贴来推进与气候、出行和健康相关的可持续发展目标。这些项目假设了一个因果链：补贴推动技术采纳，进而引发行为替代，最终产生可持续性影响。我们在瑞典全国性电动自行车补贴项目的背景下检验了这一机制，重点关注采纳-替代缺口——即获取绿色技术与替代高碳行为之间的摩擦。通过将涵盖所有9万名受助者的行政数据与车辆登记和保险记录相关联，我们发现，尽管补贴成功地将电动自行车销量翻了一番，且价格完全传导，但行为替代微乎其微。客观的车辆行驶里程变化很小，导致减排和健康收益可以忽略不计。值得注意的是，在同一人群中基于调查的替代估计值大大高估了实际减少量，这表明陈述偏好数据中存在报告偏差。我们的研究结果强调了将绿色补贴瞄准行为弹性最大的人群的必要性，以确保气候和出行目标的成本效益。

papers.title: Dads and Daughters: Disentangling Altruism and Investment Motives for Spending on Children
papers.authors: Rebecca Dizon-Ross, Seema Jayachandran
papers.abstract: This paper tests whether mothers and fathers differ in their spending on their daughters relative to their sons. We compare mothers’ and fathers’ willingness to pay (WTP) for specific goods for their children, diverging from the previous literature’s approach of comparing the expenditure effects of mothers’ versus fathers’ income. Our method, which we apply in Uganda, allows us to estimate gender differences and explore mechanisms with greater precision.
