A second innovation is that we examine why spending patterns differ between mothers and fathers, e.g., altruism, personal returns to investing in children. We find that fathers have a lower WTP for their daughters’ human capital than their sons’ human capital, whereas mothers do not. We also find evidence that altruism plays a role in the mother-father differences: fathers’ WTP for goods that simply bring joy to their daughters is lower than their WTP for such goods for their sons, but mothers’ is not.
papers.zh_title: 父亲与女儿：区分子女支出的利他动机与投资动机
papers.zh_abstract: 本文检验了母亲和父亲在女儿与儿子身上的支出是否存在差异。我们比较了母亲和父亲为子女购买特定商品的支付意愿，这与以往文献比较母亲收入与父亲收入对支出影响的方法不同。我们在乌干达应用了这种方法，从而能够更精确地估计性别差异并探索其机制。第二个创新之处在于，我们考察了母亲和父亲支出模式不同的原因，例如利他主义、投资子女的个人回报。我们发现，父亲对女儿人力资本的支付意愿低于对儿子人力资本的支付意愿，而母亲则没有这种差异。我们还发现证据表明，利他主义在母亲与父亲的差异中发挥了作用：父亲对仅为女儿带来快乐的商品的支付意愿低于对儿子此类商品的支付意愿，但母亲则不然。

papers.title: Aggregating Partial Rankings from Neighbors: Methodology and Empirical Evidence
papers.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Marcel Fafchamps, Deivy Houeix
papers.abstract: Many decisions require ordering alternatives: for example, the selection of top candidates for a competitive academic program or the selection of the poorest individuals for a cash transfer program. One common approach consists in aggregating orderings reported by different observers (e.g., committee or community members), but those orderings are typically partial: not all observers rank all applicants. We introduce a novel type of approach, based on pairwise rankings, to (i) aggregate partial orderings reported by multiple observers and (ii) construct confidence intervals for the resulting aggregate ordering. We identify, both theoretically and using simulations, the conditions under which a pairwise approach dominates rank averaging: when reporting error is low, reported orderings are partial, and observers rank alternatives that are close to each other in their true latent ordering. We introduce improvements to rank averaging and pairwise methods and illustrate them using several datasets. We find that, with partial reported orderings, Borda counts (i.e., simple rank averages) are dominated by the averaging of normalized ranks and should never be used in practice.
papers.zh_title: 聚合来自邻居的偏序：方法与实证证据
papers.zh_abstract: 许多决策需要对备选方案进行排序：例如，为竞争性学术项目选拔顶尖候选人，或为现金转移项目选择最贫困的个人。一种常见的方法是聚合不同观察者（例如委员会或社区成员）报告的排序，但这些排序通常是偏序的：并非所有观察者都对所有申请者进行排序。我们引入了一种基于成对排序的新型方法，用于（i）聚合多个观察者报告的偏序，以及（ii）为由此产生的聚合排序构建置信区间。我们通过理论和模拟确定了成对方法优于排序平均法的条件：当报告误差较低、报告排序为偏序、且观察者对真实潜在排序中彼此接近的备选方案进行排序时。我们引入了对排序平均法和成对方法的改进，并使用多个数据集进行了说明。我们发现，在报告偏序的情况下，博达计数（即简单的排序平均值）被归一化排序的平均值所主导，在实践中不应使用。

papers.title: A labor market view on the risks of a U.S. hard landing
papers.authors: Alex Domash, Lawrence H. Summers
papers.abstract: This paper uses historical labor market data to assess the plausibility that the Federal Reserve can engineer a soft landing for the economy. We first show that the labor market today is significantly tighter than implied by the unemployment rate: the vacancy and quit rates currently experienced in the United States correspond to a degree of labor market tightness previously associated with sub-2 percent unemployment rates. We highlight that the super-tight labor market coincides with current wage inflation of 6.5 percent – the highest level experienced in the past 40 years – and that firm-side slack measures predict further increases in wage inflation over the coming year. Finally, we show that high levels of wage inflation have historically been associated with a substantial risk of a recession over the next one to two years. We argue that periods that historically have been hailed as successful soft landings have little in common with the present moment. Our results suggest a very low likelihood that the Federal Reserve can reduce inflation without causing a significant slowdown in economic activity.
papers.zh_title: 从劳动力市场视角看美国硬着陆的风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用历史劳动力市场数据来评估美联储实现经济软着陆的可能性。我们首先表明，当前的劳动力市场比失业率所暗示的要紧张得多：美国目前经历的职位空缺率和离职率，对应于以往与低于2%的失业率相关的劳动力市场紧张程度。我们强调，这种超紧张的劳动力市场恰逢当前6.5%的工资通胀率——这是过去40年来的最高水平——并且企业侧的闲置指标预示着未来一年工资通胀将进一步上升。最后，我们表明，历史上高水平的工资通胀与未来一到两年内发生衰退的巨大风险相关。我们认为，历史上被誉为成功软着陆的时期与当前时刻几乎没有共同之处。我们的结果表明，美联储在不导致经济活动显著放缓的情况下降低通胀的可能性非常低。

papers.title: Housing Market Expectations
papers.authors: Theresa Kuchler, Monika Piazzesi, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We review the recent literature on the determinants and effects of housing market expectations. We begin by providing an overview of existing surveys that elicit housing market expectations, and discuss how those surveys may be expanded in the future. We then document a number of facts about time-series and cross-sectional patterns of housing market expectations in these survey data, before summarizing research that has studied how individuals form these expectations. Housing market expectations are strongly influenced by recently observed house price changes, by personally or locally observed house price changes, by house price changes observed in a person's social network, and by current home ownership status. Similarly, experienced house price volatility affects expectations uncertainty. We also summarize recent work that documents how differences in housing market expectations translate into differences in individuals’ housing market behaviors, including their home purchasing and mortgage financing decisions. Finally, we highlight research on how expectations affect aggregate outcomes in the housing market.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO, ME, PE；JEL：D83, G50, R30
papers.zh_title: 住房市场预期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了近期关于住房市场预期决定因素和影响的文献。我们首先概述了现有的调查，这些调查引出了住房市场预期，并讨论了未来如何扩展这些调查。然后，我们记录了这些调查数据中住房市场预期的时间序列和横截面模式的一系列事实，然后总结了研究个体如何形成这些预期的研究。住房市场预期受到近期观察到的房价变化、个人或本地观察到的房价变化、个人社交网络中观察到的房价变化以及当前住房所有权状况的强烈影响。同样，经历过的房价波动会影响预期的不确定性。我们还总结了近期的工作，这些工作记录了住房市场预期的差异如何转化为个体住房市场行为的差异，包括他们的购房和抵押贷款融资决策。最后，我们重点介绍了关于预期如何影响住房市场总体结果的研究。

papers.title: Estimating General Equilibrium Spillovers of Large-Scale Shocks
papers.authors: Kilian Huber
papers.abstract: Large-scale shocks directly affect some firms and households and indirectly affect others through general equilibrium spillovers. In this paper, I describe how researchers can directly estimate spillovers using quasi-experimental or experimental variation. I then argue that spillover estimates suffer from distinct sources of mechanical bias that standard empirical tools cannot resolve. These biases are particularly relevant in finance and macroeconomics, where multiple spillover channels and nonlinear effects are common. I offer guidance on how to detect and overcome mechanical biases. An application and several examples highlight that the suggested methods are broadly relevant and can inform policy and multiplier calculations.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, IO, ITI, ME, PR；JEL：C13, C2, D5, E0, E51, G0, G21, G30, L2, R11, R23, R51
papers.zh_title: 估计大规模冲击的一般均衡溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 大规模冲击直接影响一些企业和家庭，并通过一般均衡溢出效应间接影响其他企业和家庭。在本文中，我描述了研究人员如何利用准实验或实验变异直接估计溢出效应。然后，我论证了溢出估计值会受到标准实证工具无法解决的独特机械性偏差的影响。这些偏差在金融和宏观经济学中尤其相关，因为在这些领域中，多重溢出渠道和非线性效应很常见。我提供了关于如何检测和克服机械性偏差的指导。一个应用和几个例子强调了所建议的方法具有广泛的相关性，并且可以为政策和乘数计算提供信息。

papers.title: Transferable Skills? Founders as Venture Capitalists
papers.authors: Paul A. Gompers, Vladimir Mukharlyamov
papers.abstract: In this paper we explore whether or not the experience as a founder of a venture capital-backed startup influences the performance of founders who become venture capitalists (VCs). We find that nearly 7% of VCs were previously founders of a venture-backed startup. Having a successful exit and being male and white increase the probability that a founder transitions into a venture capital career. Successful founder-VCs have investment success rates that are 6.5 percentage points higher than professional VCs while unsuccessful founder-VCs have investment success rates that are 4 percentage points lower than professional VCs. While successful founder-VCs do get higher quality deal flow than professional or unsuccessful founder-VCs, observably higher deal quality does not explain the entire difference in performance. Using an instrumental variables approach to separate unobservable deal quality from value-add, we find that the outperformance of successful founder-VCs is consistent with them adding more value post-investment.
papers.zh_title: 可转移技能？创始人作为风险投资家
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们探讨了作为风险投资支持初创企业创始人的经历是否会影响那些成为风险投资家的创始人的业绩。我们发现，近7%的风险投资家曾是风险投资支持初创企业的创始人。成功退出以及身为男性和白人会增加创始人转型为风险投资家的概率。成功的创始人-风险投资家的投资成功率比职业风险投资家高6.5个百分点，而不成功的创始人-风险投资家的投资成功率比职业风险投资家低4个百分点。虽然成功的创始人-风险投资家确实比职业风险投资家或不成功的创始人-风险投资家获得了更高质量的交易流，但可观察到的更高交易质量并不能解释全部业绩差异。使用工具变量方法来分离不可观察的交易质量与增值，我们发现，成功的创始人-风险投资家的优异表现与其在投资后增加更多价值是一致的。

papers.title: Economics of Foster Care
papers.authors: Anthony Bald, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Max Gross, Brian Jacob
papers.abstract: Foster care provides substitute living arrangements to protect maltreated children. The practice is remarkably common: it is estimated that 5 percent of children in the United States are placed in foster care at some point during childhood. These children exhibit poor outcomes as children and adults, and economists have begun to estimate the causal relationship between foster care and life outcomes. This paper describes tradeoffs in child welfare policy and provides background on the latest trends in foster care practice to highlight areas most in need of rigorous evidence. These trends include efforts to prevent foster care on the demand side and to improve foster home recruitment on the supply side. With increasing data availability and a growing interest in evidence-based practices, there are opportunities for economic research to inform policies that protect vulnerable children.
papers.zh_title: 寄养经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 寄养提供替代性居住安排以保护受虐待的儿童。这种做法非常普遍：据估计，美国有5%的儿童在童年时期的某个阶段被安置在寄养家庭中。这些儿童在儿童期和成年期的结果都很差，经济学家已经开始估计寄养与生活结果之间的因果关系。本文描述了儿童福利政策中的权衡，并提供了寄养实践最新趋势的背景，以突出最需要严格证据的领域。这些趋势包括在需求侧努力预防寄养，以及在供给侧努力改善寄养家庭的招募。随着数据可用性的提高和对循证实践兴趣的增长，经济研究有机会为保护弱势儿童的政策提供信息。

papers.title: Estimation of a Life-Cycle Model with Human Capital, Labor Supply and Retirement
papers.authors: Xiaodong Fan, Ananth Seshadri, Christopher R. Taber
papers.abstract: We develop and estimate a life-cycle model in which individuals make decisions about consumption, human capital investment, and labor supply and use it to analyze changes in Social Security rules. The most important aspect of our paper is human capital towards the end of the life cycle which responds to changes in the rules. Retirement arises endogenously as part of the labor supply decision. The model allows for both an endogenous wage process through human capital investment (which is typically assumed exogenous in the retirement literature), an endogenous retirement decision (which is typically assumed exogenous in the human capital literature), and accounts for the Social Security system. We estimate the model using indirect inference to match the life-cycle profiles of employment and measured wages from the SIPP data. The model replicates the main features of the data—in particular the large increase in measured wages and small increase in labor supply at the beginning of the life cycle as well as the small decrease in measured wages but large decrease in labor supply at the end of the life cycle. We use the model to estimate the effects of various changes to tax and Social Security policies and show that allowing for human capital accumulation is critical.
papers.zh_title: 包含人力资本、劳动供给与退休的生命周期模型估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建并估计了一个生命周期模型，其中个体对消费、人力资本投资和劳动供给做出决策，并利用该模型分析社会保障规则的变化。我们论文最重要的方面是生命周期末期的人力资本，它会对规则变化做出反应。退休作为劳动供给决策的一部分内生于模型。该模型同时允许通过人力资本投资形成的内生工资过程（这在退休文献中通常被假定为外生）、内生的退休决策（这在人力资本文献中通常被假定为外生），并考虑了社会保障体系。我们使用间接推断方法估计模型，以匹配来自SIPP数据的就业和测量工资的生命周期轮廓。该模型复制了数据的主要特征——特别是生命周期初期测量工资的大幅增长和劳动供给的小幅增长，以及生命周期末期测量工资的小幅下降但劳动供给的大幅下降。我们利用该模型估计税收和社会保障政策各种变化的影响，并表明考虑人力资本积累至关重要。

papers.title: Zombie Lending: Theoretical, International and Historical Perspectives
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Matteo Crosignani, Tim Eisert, Sascha Steffen
papers.abstract: This paper surveys the theory on zombie lending incentives and the consequences of zombie lending for the real economy. It also offers a historical perspective by reviewing the growing empirical evidence on zombie lending along three dimensions: (i) the role of under-capitalized banks, (ii) effects on zombie firms, and (iii) spillovers and distortions for non-zombie firms. We then provide an overview of how zombie lending can be attenuated. Finally, we use a sample of U.S. publicly listed firms to compare various measures proposed in the literature to classify firms as "zombies." We identify definitions of zombie firms that are adequate to investigate economic inefficiency in the form of real sector competitive distortions of zombie lending. We find that only definitions that are based on interest rate subsidies are able to detect these spillovers and thereby provide evidence in support of credit misallocation.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E44, E58, G01, G2, G3
papers.zh_title: 僵尸贷款：理论、国际与历史视角
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综述了关于僵尸贷款激励及其对实体经济后果的理论。它还通过回顾僵尸贷款在三个维度上日益增长的实证证据提供了历史视角：（i）资本不足银行的作用，（ii）对僵尸企业的影响，以及（iii）对非僵尸企业的溢出效应和扭曲。然后，我们概述了如何减轻僵尸贷款。最后，我们使用美国上市公司样本比较文献中提出的各种将企业分类为“僵尸”的衡量标准。我们识别出足以调查僵尸贷款在实体经济部门竞争扭曲形式下经济无效率的僵尸企业定义。我们发现，只有基于利率补贴的定义才能检测到这些溢出效应，从而为支持信贷错配提供证据。

papers.title: Assortative Mating and Wealth Inequality
papers.authors: Andreas Fagereng, Luigi Guiso, Luigi Pistaferri
papers.abstract: We use population data on capital income and wealth holdings for Norway to measure asset positions and wealth returns before individuals marry and after the household is formed. These data allow us to establish a number of novel facts. First, individuals sort on personal wealth rather than parents' wealth. Assortative mating on own wealth dominates, and in fact renders assortative mating on parental wealth statistically insignificant. Second, people match also on their personal returns to wealth and assortative mating on returns is as strong as that on wealth. Third, post-marriage returns on family wealth are largely explained by the return of the spouse with the highest pre-marriage return. This suggests that family wealth is largely managed by the spouse with the highest potential to grow it. This is particularly true for households at the top of the wealth distribution at marriage. We use a simple analytical example to illustrate how assortative mating on wealth and returns and wealth management task allocation between spouses affect wealth inequality.
papers.zh_title: 选型婚配与财富不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用挪威关于资本收入和财富持有的人口数据，在个体结婚前和家庭形成后衡量资产头寸和财富回报。这些数据使我们能够建立一系列新的事实。首先，个体根据个人财富而非父母财富进行匹配。基于自身财富的选型婚配占主导地位，实际上使得基于父母财富的选型婚配在统计上不显著。其次，人们也根据其个人财富回报进行匹配，且基于回报的选型婚配与基于财富的选型婚配同样强烈。第三，婚后家庭财富的回报在很大程度上由婚前回报最高的配偶的回报所解释。这表明家庭财富主要由具有最大增长潜力的配偶管理。对于结婚时处于财富分配顶端的家庭尤其如此。我们使用一个简单的分析示例来说明基于财富和回报的选型婚配以及配偶间的财富管理任务分配如何影响财富不平等。

papers.title: Measuring U.S. Fiscal Capacity using Discounted Cash Flow Analysis
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Hanno Lustig, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Mindy Z. Xiaolan
papers.abstract: We use discounted cash flow analysis to measure a country's fiscal capacity. Crucially, the discount rate applied to projected cash flows includes a GDP risk premium. We apply our valuation method to the CBO's projections for the U.S. federal government's deficit between 2022 and 2051 and debt in 2051. In spite of low rates, our current measure of U.S. fiscal capacity is lower than the debt/GDP ratio. Because of the backloading of projected surpluses, the duration of the surplus claim far exceeds the duration of the outstanding Treasury portfolio. This duration mismatch exposes the government to the risk of rising rates, which would trigger the need for higher tax revenue or lower spending. Reducing this risk by front-loading the surpluses also requires major fiscal adjustment.
papers.zh_title: 使用折现现金流分析衡量美国财政能力
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用折现现金流分析来衡量一个国家的财政能力。关键在于，应用于预测现金流的折现率包含一个GDP风险溢价。我们将我们的估值方法应用于CBO对美国联邦政府2022年至2051年间赤字以及2051年债务的预测。尽管利率较低，但我们当前对美国财政能力的衡量低于债务/GDP比率。由于预测盈余集中在后期，盈余索取权的久期远远超过未偿国债组合的久期。这种久期错配使政府面临利率上升的风险，这将引发对更高税收收入或更低支出的需求。通过将盈余前置来降低这种风险也需要重大的财政调整。

papers.title: Designing Stress Scenarios
papers.authors: Cecilia Parlatore, Thomas Philippon
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable framework to study the optimal design of stress scenarios. A principal wants to manage the unknown risk exposures of a set of agents. She asks the agents to report their losses under hypothetical scenarios before mandating actions to mitigate the exposures. We show how to apply a Kalman filter to solve the learning problem and we characterize the scenario design as a function of the risk environment, the principal’s preferences, and the available remedial actions. We apply our results to banking stress tests. We show how the principal learns from estimated losses under different scenarios and across different banks. Optimal capital requirements are set to cover losses under an adverse scenario while targeted interventions depend on the covariance between residual exposure uncertainty and physical risks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D8, G2, H12
papers.zh_title: 设计压力情景
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的框架来研究压力情景的最优设计。一个委托人想要管理一组代理人的未知风险敞口。她要求代理人报告他们在假设情景下的损失，然后强制采取行动以减轻风险敞口。我们展示了如何应用卡尔曼滤波器来解决学习问题，并将情景设计描述为风险环境、委托人偏好和可用补救行动的函数。我们将我们的结果应用于银行压力测试。我们展示了委托人如何从不同情景下和不同银行间的估计损失中学习。最优资本要求被设定为覆盖不利情景下的损失，而针对性干预则取决于剩余敞口不确定性与物理风险之间的协方差。

papers.title: An Economic Analysis of U.S Public Transit Carbon Emissions Dynamics
papers.authors: Robert Huang, Matthew E. Kahn
papers.abstract: Urban public transit agencies spend billions of dollars each year on workers, durable capital and energy to supply transportation services. During a time of rising concern about climate change, the urban public transit sector has not significantly reduced its carbon footprint. Using data for the nation’s transit agencies over the years 2002 to 2019, we benchmark U.S transit agencies with transit agencies in Germany and the United Kingdom. We study U.S urban public sector energy efficiency trends and explain the cross-sectional variation. We present a new operating profits metric that incorporates each transit agency’s annual total carbon emissions.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE, POL；JEL：H23, H41, H76, R4
papers.zh_title: 美国公共交通碳排放动态的经济分析
papers.zh_abstract: 城市公共交通机构每年花费数十亿美元用于工人、耐用资本和能源以提供交通服务。在气候变化担忧日益加剧的时期，城市公共交通部门并未显著减少其碳足迹。使用2002年至2019年间美国国家交通机构的数据，我们将美国交通机构与德国和英国的交通机构进行了基准比较。我们研究了美国城市公共部门能源效率趋势并解释了横截面差异。我们提出了一个新的运营利润指标，该指标纳入了每个交通机构的年度总碳排放量。

papers.title: Agency MBS as Safe Assets
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Zhaogang Song
papers.abstract: Measured as yield spreads against AAA corporate bonds, the convenience premium for agency MBS averaged 47 basis points between 1995 and 2021, about half of the long-term-Treasury convenience premium. Both the MBS convenience premium and the issuance amount vary negatively with the mortgage rate, which is consistent with a prepayment-driven demand channel. This negative dependence contrasts strikingly with the positive dependence of the MBS-repo convenience premium on interest rates, as implied by the “opportunity cost of money” hypothesis. The placing of agencies into conservatorship in 2008 and the introduction of the liquidity coverage ratio in 2013 affected the convenience premium significantly, which is consistent with the safety and regulatory-constraint channels of demand for MBS. Based on “structural” restrictions in standard models, the ratio of MBS to Treasury convenience premia pinpoints the time-varying MBS-specific demand empirically.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E44, E58, G12, G18, G21
papers.zh_title: 机构MBS作为安全资产
papers.zh_abstract: 以相对于AAA级公司债券的收益率利差衡量，机构MBS的便利溢价在1995年至2021年间平均为47个基点，约为长期国债便利溢价的一半。MBS便利溢价和发行量都与抵押贷款利率负相关，这与提前还款驱动的需求渠道一致。这种负相关性与MBS回购便利溢价对利率的正相关性形成鲜明对比，后者由“货币机会成本”假说所暗示。2008年机构被置于监管之下以及2013年流动性覆盖率规则的引入显著影响了便利溢价，这与MBS需求的安全性和监管约束渠道一致。基于标准模型中的“结构性”限制，MBS与国债便利溢价之比在经验上指出了时变的MBS特定需求。

papers.title: Health Care Expenditure and Farm Income Loss: Evidence from Natural Disasters
papers.authors: Hung-Hao Chang, Chad Meyerhoefer
papers.abstract: Farmers have higher rates of disability and illness than the general population and more volatile incomes due to frequent crop and livestock losses from extreme weather events. This raises concerns that sudden, weather-related drops in farm income could reduce access to health care for an already vulnerable population. We estimate the sensitivity of health care use to the loss in farm income brought about by natural disasters in Taiwan. To account for endogenous exposure to disaster risks, we estimate an instrumental variables model and find that farm income elasticities of demand for outpatient care and prescriptions range from 0.11 to 0.32. Reductions in health care use may be due, in part, to changes in time allocations within farm households.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健支出与农场收入损失：来自自然灾害的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 农民比普通人群有更高的残疾和疾病发生率，并且由于极端天气事件频繁导致作物和牲畜损失，他们的收入更加不稳定。这引发担忧，即与天气相关的农场收入突然下降可能会减少本已脆弱人群获得医疗保健的机会。我们估计了台湾地区因自然灾害导致的农场收入损失对医疗保健使用的敏感性。为了解释对灾害风险的内生暴露，我们估计了一个工具变量模型，发现门诊和处方药需求的农场收入弹性在0.11到0.32之间。医疗保健使用的减少可能部分归因于农户家庭内部时间分配的变化。

papers.title: Consensus and Disagreement: Information Aggregation under (not so) Naive Learning
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Olivier Compte
papers.abstract: We explore a model of non-Bayesian information aggregation in networks. Agents non-cooperatively choose among Friedkin-Johnsen type aggregation rules to maximize payoffs. The DeGroot rule is chosen in equilibrium if and only if there is noiseless information transmission, leading to consensus. With noisy transmission, while some disagreement is inevitable, the optimal choice of rule amplifies the disagreement: even with little noise, individuals place substantial weight on their own initial opinion in every period, exacerbating the disagreement. We use this framework to think about equilibrium versus socially efficient choice of rules and its connection to polarization of opinions across groups.
papers.zh_title: 共识与分歧：非完全天真学习下的信息聚合
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了网络中非贝叶斯信息聚合的模型。代理人非合作地在弗里德金-约翰森型聚合规则中进行选择，以最大化收益。当且仅当信息传输无噪声时，德格鲁特规则在均衡中被选中，从而达成共识。在存在噪声传输的情况下，虽然一定程度的分歧不可避免，但规则的最优选择会放大分歧：即使噪声很小，个体在每个时期仍会对其初始观点赋予显著权重，从而加剧分歧。我们利用这一框架来思考规则选择的均衡效率与社会效率，以及其与群体间观点极化的联系。

papers.title: Counter-stereotypical Messaging and Partisan Cues: Moving the Needle on Vaccines in a Polarized U.S.
papers.authors: Bradley Larsen, Marc J. Hetherington, Steven H. Greene, Timothy J. Ryan, Rahsaan D. Maxwell, Steven Tadelis
papers.abstract: We report a large-scale randomized controlled trial designed to assess whether the counter-stereotypical messaging and partisan cues can induce people to get COVID-19 vaccines. Our study involved creating a 27-second video compilation of Donald Trump’s comments about the vaccine from Fox News interviews. We presented the video to millions of U.S. YouTube users in October 2021. Results indicate that the campaign increased the number of vaccines in the average treated county by 103. Spread across 1,014 treated counties, the total effect of the campaign was an estimated increase of 104,036 vaccines. The campaign was cost-effective: with an overall budget of about $100,000, the cost to obtain an additional vaccine was about $1 or less.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, PE, POL；JEL：D8, I12, I18, M3
papers.zh_title: 反刻板印象信息与党派线索：在极化美国推动疫苗接种
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了一项大规模随机对照试验，旨在评估反刻板印象信息和党派线索是否能促使人们接种新冠疫苗。我们的研究制作了一段27秒的视频，汇编了唐纳德·特朗普在福克斯新闻采访中关于疫苗的评论。2021年10月，我们向数百万美国YouTube用户展示了该视频。结果表明，该活动使平均处理县的疫苗数量增加了103剂。在1014个处理县中，该活动的总效果估计增加了104036剂疫苗。该活动具有成本效益：总预算约为10万美元，每增加一剂疫苗的成本约为1美元或更低。

papers.title: Optimal Exploration and Price Paths of a Non-renewable Commodity with Stochastic Discoveries
papers.authors: Ivar Ekeland, Wolfram Schlenker, Peter Tankov, Brian Wright
papers.abstract: We address the long-standing challenge of adding optimal exploration to the classic Hotelling model of a non-renewable resource. We completely solve such a model, using impulse control. The model, extending Arrow and Chang (1982), has two state variables: “proven” reserves and a finite unexplored area available for exploration at constant marginal cost, with a Poisson process for new discoveries. We prove that a frontier of critical levels of proven reserves exists, above which exploration ceases, and below which it happens at infinite speed. This frontier is increasing in explored area, and higher reserve levels along this critical threshold indicate more scarcity, not less. In a stochastic generalization of Hotelling’s rule, the expected shadow price of reserves rises at the rate of interest across exploratory episodes. The trajectories of prices realized prior to exhaustion of the exploratory area may jump up or down upon exploration. Conditional on non-exhaustion, expected price rises at a rate bounded above by the rate of interest, explaining why most empirical tests based on past price histories reject Hotelling’s rule. Starting when the unexplored area is sufficiently close to zero, all price paths rise at less than the rate of interest until exhaustion of the unexplored area.
papers.zh_title: 具有随机发现的不可再生商品的最优勘探与价格路径
papers.zh_abstract: 我们解决了在经典的非可再生资源霍特林模型中添加最优勘探这一长期存在的挑战。我们使用脉冲控制完全解决了这样一个模型。该模型扩展了Arrow和Chang（1982），有两个状态变量：“已探明”储量和可供勘探的有限未勘探区域，勘探边际成本恒定，新发现遵循泊松过程。我们证明存在一个已探明储量的临界水平前沿，高于该水平勘探停止，低于该水平勘探以无限速度进行。该前沿随勘探区域增加而上升，并且沿此临界阈值的更高储量水平表明更稀缺，而非更少。在霍特林规则的随机推广中，储量的预期影子价格在勘探事件之间以利率上升。在勘探区域耗尽之前实现的价格路径可能在勘探时向上或向下跳跃。在未耗尽条件下，预期价格以不超过利率的速率上升，这解释了为什么大多数基于过去价格历史进行的实证检验都拒绝了霍特林规则。从未勘探区域足够接近零时开始，所有价格路径都以低于利率的速率上升，直到未勘探区域耗尽。

papers.title: Returns to Different Postsecondary Investments: Institution Type, Academic Programs, and Credentials
papers.authors: Michael F. Lovenheim, Jonathan Smith
papers.abstract: Early research on the returns to higher education treated the postsecondary system as a monolith. In reality, postsecondary education in the United States and around the world is highly differentiated, with a variety of options that differ by credential (associates degree, bachelor’s degree, diploma, certificate, graduate degree), the control of the institution (public, private not-for-profit, private for-profit), the quality/resources of the institution, field of study, and exposure to remedial education. In this Chapter, we review the literature on the returns to these different types of higher education investments, which has received increasing attention in recent decades. We first provide an overview of the structure of higher education in the U.S. and around the world, followed by a model that helps clarify and articulate the assumptions employed by different estimators used in the literature. We then discuss the research on the return to institution type, focusing on the return to two-year, four-year, and for-profit institutions as well as the return to college quality within and across these institution types. We also present the research on the return to different educational programs, including vocational credentials, remedial education, field of study, and graduate school. The wide variation in the returns to different postsecondary investments that we document leads to the question of how students from different backgrounds sort into these different institutions and programs. We discuss the emerging research showing that lower-SES students, especially in the U.S., are more likely to sort into colleges and programs with lower returns as well as results from recent U.S.-based interventions and policies designed to support success among students from disadvantaged backgrounds. The Chapter concludes with some broad directions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 不同高等教育投资的回报：院校类型、学术项目与学历证书
papers.zh_abstract: 早期关于高等教育回报的研究将高等教育系统视为一个整体。实际上，美国和世界各地的中学后教育高度分化，存在多种选择，这些选择在学历证书（副学士学位、学士学位、文凭、证书、研究生学位）、院校控制权（公立、私立非营利、私立营利）、院校质量/资源、学习领域以及补习教育经历方面各不相同。在本章中，我们回顾了关于这些不同类型高等教育投资回报的文献，这些文献在近几十年来受到越来越多的关注。我们首先概述了美国和世界各地高等教育的结构，然后提出了一个模型，该模型有助于阐明和阐述文献中不同估计量所使用的假设。接着，我们讨论了关于院校类型回报的研究，重点关注两年制、四年制和营利性院校的回报，以及这些院校类型内部和跨类型的院校质量回报。我们还介绍了关于不同教育项目回报的研究，包括职业证书、补习教育、学习领域和研究生院。我们记录的不同高等教育投资回报的巨大差异引出了一个问题：来自不同背景的学生如何被分流到这些不同的院校和项目中。我们讨论了新兴研究，这些研究表明，社会经济地位较低的学生（尤其是在美国）更有可能被分流到回报较低的大学和项目，以及最近美国旨在支持弱势背景学生成功的干预措施和政策的结果。本章最后对未来研究提出了一些广泛的方向。

papers.title: Substance Abuse during the Pandemic: Implications for Labor-Force Participation
papers.authors: Jeremy Greenwood, Nezih Guner, Karen Kopecky
papers.abstract: The labor-force participation rates of prime-age U.S. workers dropped in March 2020—the start of the COVID-19 pandemic—and have still not fully recovered. At the same time, substance-abuse deaths were elevated during the pandemic relative to trend indicating an increase in the number of substance abusers, and abusers of opioids and crystal methamphetamine have lower labor-force participation rates than non-abusers. Could increased substance abuse during the pandemic be a factor contributing to the fall in labor-force participation? Estimates of the number of additional substance abusers during the pandemic presented here suggest that increased substance abuse accounts for between 9 and 26 percent of the decline in prime-age labor-force participation between February 2020 and June 2021.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, LS；JEL：E24, I12, J11, J21
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间的药物滥用：对劳动力参与的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国壮年工人的劳动力参与率在2020年3月（COVID-19大流行开始时）下降，至今尚未完全恢复。与此同时，疫情期间的药物滥用死亡人数相对于趋势有所上升，表明药物滥用者数量增加，而阿片类药物和冰毒滥用者的劳动力参与率低于非滥用者。疫情期间药物滥用的增加是否是导致劳动力参与率下降的一个因素？本文提供的疫情期间额外药物滥用者数量的估计表明，增加的药物滥用解释了2020年2月至2021年6月期间壮年劳动力参与率下降的9%至26%。

papers.title: A p Theory of Taxes and Debt Management
papers.authors: Wei Jiang, Thomas J. Sargent, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: Distortions induce a benevolent government that must finance an exogenous expenditure process to smooth taxes. An optimal fiscal plan determines the marginal cost —p’ of servicing government debt and makes government debt risk-free. A convenience yield tilts debts forward and taxes backward. An option to default determines debt capacity. Debt-GDP ratio dynamics are driven by 1) a primary deficit, 2) interest payments, 3) GDP growth, and 4) hedging costs. We provide quantitative comparative dynamic statements about debt capacity, debt-GDP ratio transition dynamics, and time to exhaust debt capacity.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E44, E62, G12, H21, H63
papers.zh_title: 税收与债务管理的p理论
papers.zh_abstract: 扭曲导致一个仁慈的政府必须为外生的支出过程融资以平滑税收。最优财政计划决定了服务政府债务的边际成本——p，并使政府债务无风险。便利收益将债务向前倾斜，将税收向后倾斜。违约选择权决定了债务容量。债务-GDP比率的动态由以下因素驱动：1）基本赤字，2）利息支付，3）GDP增长，以及4）对冲成本。我们提供了关于债务容量、债务-GDP比率过渡动态以及耗尽债务容量所需时间的定量比较动态陈述。

papers.title: Intimate Partner Violence and Income: Quasi-Experimental Evidence from the Earned Income Tax Credit
papers.authors: Resul Cesur, Núria Rodriguez-Planas, Jennifer Roff, David Simon
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of an exogenous increase in income on the prevalence and counts of intimate partner violence (IPV). Using the National Crime Victimization Survey data from 1992 to 2000, we exploit time and family-size variation in the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC) by comparing IPV victimization of women with one or more children (our “treated” group) to that of women with no children (our comparison group) before and after OBRA-93. The OBRA-93 expansion reduces both reports of any physical or sexual assault and counts of physical or sexual assaults per 100 women surveyed, with the effects being strongest for those groups more likely to both experience IPV and be eligible for EITC: unmarried women and unmarried Black women. If increased income (rather than changes in employment) is the only channel by which the EITC decreases IPV, an additional $1,000 of after-tax income decreases the prevalence of physical or sexual violence of unmarried low-educated women by 9.73% and the counts of physical or sexual violence by 21%. We explore potential mechanisms behind these findings.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H2, I3, J08
papers.zh_title: 亲密伴侣暴力与收入：来自劳动所得税抵免的准实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了外生收入增加对亲密伴侣暴力（IPV）发生率和数量的影响。利用1992年至2000年的全国犯罪受害调查数据，我们通过比较OBRA-93前后有一个或多个孩子的女性（我们的“处理”组）与没有孩子的女性（我们的对照组）的IPV受害情况，来利用劳动所得税抵免（EITC）在时间和家庭规模上的变化。OBRA-93的扩张减少了每100名受访女性中报告的任何身体或性侵犯以及身体或性侵犯的次数，这种效应对于那些更可能经历IPV且更有资格获得EITC的群体最为强烈：未婚女性和未婚黑人女性。如果增加收入（而非就业变化）是EITC减少IPV的唯一渠道，那么额外1000美元的税后收入会使未婚低学历女性遭受身体或性暴力的发生率降低9.73%，身体或性暴力的次数降低21%。我们探讨了这些发现背后的潜在机制。

papers.title: A Minimalist Model for the Ruble During the Russian Invasion of Ukraine
papers.authors: Guido Lorenzoni, Iván Werning
papers.abstract: This note isolates an overlooked economic force for the Ruble to appreciate in response to international sanctions limiting exports to Russia. The economic intuition is that when Russians are unable to buy the mix of foreign goods they wish, then foreign goods becomes less attractive, increasing the demand for domestic goods; to reestablish an equilibrium a real appreciation is needed to raise the relative price of domestic goods and incentivizing the accumulation of foreign assets and the import from non-sanctioning countries. We also review well-known forces for a depreciation (e.g. Russian export reduction). Our analysis emphasizes that the exchange rate is an inadequate signal of welfare impacts and the effectiveness of sanctions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, F3, F31, F4, F51
papers.zh_title: 俄罗斯入侵乌克兰期间卢布的极简模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文揭示了一个被忽视的经济力量，即国际制裁限制对俄出口时，卢布反而可能升值。其经济直觉在于：当俄罗斯人无法购买他们想要的外国商品组合时，外国商品的吸引力下降，从而增加了对国内商品的需求；为重建均衡，需要实际升值以提高国内商品的相对价格，并激励积累外国资产以及从非制裁国家进口。我们还回顾了导致贬值的已知力量（例如俄罗斯出口减少）。我们的分析强调，汇率并非衡量福利影响和制裁有效性的恰当信号。

papers.title: A Final Report Card on the States’ Response to COVID-19
papers.authors: Phil Kerpen, Stephen Moore, Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Almost exactly two years ago COVID-19 spread to the United States. Following the federalism model, the 50 states and their governors and legislators made many of their own pandemic policy choices to mitigate the damage from the virus. States learned from one another over time about what policies worked most and least effectively in terms of containing the virus while minimizing the negative effects of lockdown strategies on businesses and children.\nThis study is an expanded and updated version of an October 2020 report card of how pandemic health, economy, and policy varied across the 50 states and the District of Columbia (Committee to Unleash Prosperity 2020). It examines three variables: health outcomes, economic performance throughout the pandemic, and impact on education.
papers.zh_title: 各州应对COVID-19的最终成绩单
papers.zh_abstract: 大约两年前，COVID-19蔓延至美国。遵循联邦制模式，50个州及其州长和立法者各自制定了多项疫情政策选择，以减轻病毒造成的损害。随着时间的推移，各州相互学习，了解哪些政策在遏制病毒方面最有效或最无效，同时尽量减少封锁策略对企业和儿童的负面影响。本研究是2020年10月一份关于疫情健康、经济和政策在50个州及哥伦比亚特区之间差异的成绩单（Committee to Unleash Prosperity 2020）的扩展和更新版本。它考察了三个变量：健康结果、整个疫情期间的经济表现以及对教育的影响。

papers.title: An Equilibrium Analysis of the Effects of Neighborhood-based Interventions on Children
papers.authors: Eric Chyn, Diego Daruich
papers.abstract: To study the effects of neighborhood and place-based interventions, this paper incorporates neighborhood effects into a general equilibrium (GE) heterogeneous-agent overlapping-generations model with endogenous location choice and child skill development. Importantly, housing costs as well as neighborhood effects are endogenously determined in equilibrium. Having calibrated the model based on U.S. data, we use simulations to show that predictions from the model match reduced form evidence from experimental and quasi-experimental studies of housing mobility and urban development programs. After this validation exercise, we study the long-run and large-scale impacts of vouchers and place-based subsidies. Both policies result in welfare gains by reducing inequality and generating improvements in average skills and productivity, all of which offset higher levels of taxes and other GE effects. We find that a voucher program generates larger long-run welfare gains relative to place-based policies. Our analysis of transition dynamics, however, suggests there may be more political support for place-based policies.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, PE；JEL：H53, I31, J13, R13, R23
papers.zh_title: 基于社区的干预措施对儿童影响的均衡分析
papers.zh_abstract: 为了研究社区和基于地点的干预措施的效果，本文将邻里效应纳入一个具有内生区位选择和儿童技能发展的异质性代理人世代交叠一般均衡模型中。重要的是，住房成本以及邻里效应在均衡中是内生决定的。在基于美国数据校准模型后，我们通过模拟表明，模型的预测与来自住房流动性和城市发展项目的实验和准实验研究的简化形式证据相匹配。在此验证练习之后，我们研究了代金券和基于地点的补贴的长期和大规模影响。这两种政策都通过减少不平等以及提高平均技能和生产率来带来福利收益，所有这些都抵消了更高的税收水平和其他一般均衡效应。我们发现，相对于基于地点的政策，代金券计划能产生更大的长期福利收益。然而，我们对转型动态的分析表明，基于地点的政策可能获得更多的政治支持。

papers.title: The Long Run Impacts of Court-Ordered Desegregation
papers.authors: Garrett Anstreicher, Jason Fletcher, Owen Thompson
papers.abstract: Court ordered desegregation plans were implemented in hundreds of US school districts nationwide from the 1960s through the 1980s, and were arguably the most substantive national attempt to improve educational access for African American children in modern American history. Using large Census samples that are linked to Social Security records containing county of birth, we implement event studies that estimate the long run effects of exposure to desegregation orders on human capital and labor market outcomes. We find that African Americans who were relatively young when a desegregation order was implemented in their county of birth, and therefore had more exposure to integrated schools, experienced large improvements in adult human capital and labor market outcomes relative to Blacks who were older when a court order was locally implemented. There are no comparable changes in outcomes among whites in counties undergoing an order, or among Blacks who were beyond school ages when a local order was implemented. These effects are strongly concentrated in the South, with largely null findings in other regions. Our data and methodology provide the most comprehensive national assessment to date on the impacts of court ordered desegregation, and strongly indicate that these policies were in fact highly effective at improving the long run socioeconomic outcomes of many Black students.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I24, J71, J78
papers.zh_title: 法院命令的废除种族隔离的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 从1960年代到1980年代，美国全国数百个学区实施了法院命令的废除种族隔离计划，这可以说是现代美国历史上改善非裔美国儿童教育机会的最实质性全国性尝试。利用与包含出生县的社会保障记录相关联的大型人口普查样本，我们实施了事件研究，估计了接触废除种族隔离命令对人力资本和劳动力市场结果的长期影响。我们发现，在废除种族隔离命令在其出生县实施时相对年轻、因此更多接触融合学校的非裔美国人，相对于在本地实施法院命令时年龄较大的黑人，其成年后的人力资本和劳动力市场结果有了显著改善。在经历命令的县的白人中，或在本地命令实施时已超过学龄的黑人中，没有出现类似的结果变化。这些影响强烈集中在南方，其他地区的结果基本为零。我们的数据和方法提供了迄今为止对法院命令的废除种族隔离影响的最全面的全国性评估，并强烈表明这些政策实际上在改善许多黑人学生的长期社会经济结果方面非常有效。

papers.title: The Social Integration of International Migrants: Evidence from the Networks of Syrians in Germany
papers.authors: Michael Bailey, Drew M. Johnston, Martin Koenen, Theresa Kuchler, Dominic Russel, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We use de-identified data from Facebook to study the social integration of Syrian migrants in Germany, a country that received a large influx of refugees during the Syrian Civil War. We construct measures of migrants' social integration based on Syrians' friendship links to Germans, their use of the German language, and their participation in local social groups. We find large variation in Syrians' social integration across German counties, and use a movers' research design to document that these differences are largely due to causal effects of place. Regional differences in the social integration of Syrians are shaped both by the rate at which German natives befriend other locals in general (general friendliness) and the relative rate at which they befriend local Syrian migrants versus German natives (relative friending). We follow the friending behavior of Germans that move across locations to show that both general friendliness and relative friending are more strongly affected by place-based effects such as local institutions than by persistent individual characteristics of natives (e.g., attitudes toward neighbors or migrants). Relative friending is higher in areas with lower unemployment and more completed government-sponsored integration courses. Using variation in teacher availability as an instrument, we find that integration courses had a substantial causal effect on the social integration of Syrian migrants. We also use fluctuations in the presence of Syrian migrants across high school cohorts to show that natives with quasi-random exposure to Syrians in school are more likely to befriend other Syrian migrants in other settings, suggesting that contact between groups can shape subsequent attitudes towards migrants.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D85, F22, J15, K37
papers.zh_title: 国际移民的社会融合：来自德国叙利亚人网络的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用来自Facebook的去标识化数据，研究叙利亚移民在德国的社会融合情况，德国是在叙利亚内战期间接收了大量难民涌入的国家。我们基于叙利亚人与德国人的友谊链接、德语使用情况以及参与当地社会群体的情况，构建了移民社会融合的衡量指标。我们发现叙利亚人的社会融合在德国各郡之间存在巨大差异，并利用迁移者研究设计证明，这些差异很大程度上是由于地点的因果效应造成的。叙利亚人社会融合的区域差异既受到德国本地人普遍与其他本地人交朋友的速度（普遍友好度）的影响，也受到他们与当地叙利亚移民交朋友相对于与德国本地人交朋友的相对速度（相对交友）的影响。我们跟踪了在不同地点之间迁移的德国人的交友行为，以表明普遍友好度和相对交友都更强烈地受到基于地点的效应（如当地制度）的影响，而不是受本地人持久个人特征（例如对邻居或移民的态度）的影响。在失业率较低和完成政府资助的融合课程较多的地区，相对交友更高。利用教师可用性的变化作为工具变量，我们发现融合课程对叙利亚移民的社会融合产生了显著的因果效应。我们还利用高中各年级叙利亚移民存在的波动性表明，在学校中准随机接触叙利亚人的本地人更有可能在其他环境中与其他叙利亚移民交朋友，这表明群体间的接触可以塑造随后对移民的态度。

papers.title: Tax Aversion and the Social Contract in Africa
papers.authors: James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: Despite the low levels of taxation and public good provision in Africa, I provide evidence that a large proportion of Africans prefer lower taxation and fewer public goods. This cannot be explained by standard arguments about problems of accountability, governance or state capacity. Instead I argue that it reflects deeply seated ideas about the nature of the state and its potential threats to the autonomy of society. I show the historic social contracts in Africa rarely featured taxation and kept the state to limited jurisdictions. These social contracts have in many ways reproduced themselves and influence the way Africa is governed today.
papers.zh_title: 非洲的税收厌恶与社会契约
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管非洲的税收水平和公共产品供给较低，但我提供的证据表明，很大一部分非洲人倾向于更低的税收和更少的公共产品。这不能用关于问责制、治理或国家能力的标准论点来解释。相反，我认为这反映了关于国家本质及其对社会自治潜在威胁的根深蒂固的观念。我展示了非洲历史上的社会契约很少涉及税收，并将国家权力限制在有限的管辖范围内。这些社会契约在许多方面自我复制，并影响着当今非洲的治理方式。

papers.title: Technology and Tax Capacity: Evidence from Local Governments in Ghana
papers.authors: James Dzansi, Anders Jensen, David Lagakos, Henry Telli
papers.abstract: This paper studies the role of technology in improving tax capacity in the developing world, focusing on local property taxation in Ghana. We randomize the use of a new technology designed to help revenue collectors locate property owners to deliver tax bills. We find that the technology increases bill deliveries by 27 percent and, surprisingly, increases tax collections by 103 percent. To reconcile these experimental findings, we build and estimate a dynamic time-use model in which revenue collectors respond to the new technology by shifting their allocation of time toward learning about households’ propensity to pay and subsequently collecting from those with the highest payment propensity. The model’s predictions are consistent with experimental evidence on collector time allocations, knowledge, and collection strategies. Our theory highlights how technology designed to solve one problem can help overcome other challenges once behavioral changes by users of the technology are taken into account.
papers.zh_title: 技术与税收能力：来自加纳地方政府的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了技术在提高发展中国家税收能力方面的作用，重点关注加纳的地方财产税。我们随机使用了一种新技术，该技术旨在帮助税收征收员定位房产所有者以送达税单。我们发现，该技术将税单送达率提高了27%，并且令人惊讶的是，将税收征收额提高了103%。为了调和这些实验结果，我们构建并估计了一个动态时间使用模型，在该模型中，税收征收员通过将时间分配转向了解家庭的支付倾向，并随后向支付倾向最高的家庭征税，来应对新技术。该模型的预测与关于征收员时间分配、知识和征收策略的实验证据一致。我们的理论强调，一旦考虑到技术使用者的行为变化，旨在解决一个问题的技术如何能够帮助克服其他挑战。

papers.title: Is There a Foster Care-To-Prison Pipeline? Evidence from Quasi-Randomly Assigned Investigators
papers.authors: E. Jason Baron, Max Gross
papers.abstract: Foster care placement is strongly associated with crime—for example, close to one fifth of the prison population in the U.S. is comprised of former foster children—yet there is little evidence on whether this relationship is causal. Leveraging the quasi-random assignment of investigators and administrative data from Michigan, we show that placement substantially reduced the chances of adult arrests, convictions, and incarceration for children at the margin. Exploring mechanisms, we find evidence that children’s birth parents made positive changes following placement. We show that most children in our setting reunified with their parents after being in foster care for one to two years, and that parents themselves were less likely to have criminal justice contact after placement. Considering recent historic federal policy which prioritizes keeping children with their families, our analysis indicates that safely reducing foster care caseloads will require improving efforts to ensure child wellbeing in the home.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I38, J13, K42
papers.zh_title: 是否存在从寄养到监狱的输送管道？来自准随机分配调查员的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 寄养安置与犯罪密切相关——例如，美国近五分之一的监狱人口由前寄养儿童组成——然而，关于这种关系是否具有因果性的证据很少。利用密歇根州调查员的准随机分配和行政数据，我们表明，对于处于临界点的儿童，安置显著降低了其成年后被逮捕、定罪和监禁的可能性。在探索机制时，我们发现证据表明儿童的亲生父母在安置后做出了积极改变。我们表明，在我们的环境中，大多数儿童在寄养一到两年后与父母团聚，并且父母本人在安置后与刑事司法系统接触的可能性也降低了。考虑到近期具有历史意义的联邦政策优先考虑让孩子与家人在一起，我们的分析表明，安全地减少寄养案件量将需要改进确保家庭中儿童福祉的努力。

papers.title: Economic Shocks and Skill Acquisition: Evidence from a National Online Learning Platform at the Onset of COVID-19
papers.authors: Ina Ganguli, Jamal I. Haidar, Asim Ijaz Khwaja, Samuel W. Stemper, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We study how large shocks impact individuals’ skilling decisions using data from the largest online learning platform in Saudi Arabia. The onset of the COVID-19 pandemic brought about a massive increase in online skilling, and demand shifted towards courses that offered skills, such as telework, likely to be immediately valuable during the pandemic. Consistent with a model where individuals trade off reskilling costs with their expectations of future labor market conditions and their duration of work, we find that shifts into telework courses were largest for older workers. In contrast, younger workers increased enrollments in courses related to new skills, such as general, occupation-specific, and computer-related skills. Using national administrative employment data, we provide suggestive evidence that these investments in skills in early 2020 helped users maintain employment over the course of the pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 经济冲击与技能获取：来自COVID-19初期全国在线学习平台的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用沙特阿拉伯最大在线学习平台的数据，研究大规模冲击如何影响个人的技能提升决策。COVID-19大流行的爆发导致在线技能学习大幅增加，需求转向提供远程办公等在大流行期间可能立即有价值的课程。与个人权衡再培训成本与对未来劳动力市场状况及工作持续时间的预期这一模型一致，我们发现，转向远程办公课程的变化在年长工人中最为显著。相比之下，年轻工人增加了与通用技能、职业特定技能和计算机相关技能等新技能相关课程的注册。利用全国行政就业数据，我们提供了初步证据，表明2020年初的这些技能投资帮助用户在大流行期间维持了就业。

papers.title: Industries, Mega Firms, and Increasing Inequality
papers.authors: John C. Haltiwanger, Henry R. Hyatt, James Spletzer
papers.abstract: Most of the rise in overall earnings inequality is accounted for by rising between-industry dispersion from ten percent of 4-digit NAICS industries. These thirty industries are clustered especially in high-paying high-tech and low-paying retail sectors. The rise of employment in mega firms is concentrated in the industries that dominate rising earnings inequality. Earnings differentials for the mega firms relative to small firms decline in the low-paying industries but increase in the high-paying industries. A critical component accounting for the rising dispersion in the top thirty industries is an increasing covariance between industry premia and worker characteristics associated with high earnings.
papers.zh_title: 行业、巨型企业与日益加剧的不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 总体收入不平等加剧的大部分原因可归因于来自4位数NAICS行业中10%的行业间离散度的上升。这三十个行业尤其集中在高薪的高科技行业和低薪的零售行业。巨型企业就业的增长集中在主导收入不平等加剧的行业中。在低薪行业中，巨型企业相对于小企业的收入差距缩小，但在高薪行业中则扩大。导致前三十个行业离散度上升的一个关键组成部分是行业溢价与高收入相关工人特征之间协方差的增加。

papers.title: The role of Venture Capital and Governments in Clean Energy: Lessons from the First Cleantech Bubble
papers.authors: Matthias van den Heuvel, David Popp
papers.abstract: After a boom and bust cycle in the early 2010s, venture capital (VC) investments are, once again, flowing towards green businesses. In this paper, we use Crunchbase data on 150,000 US startups founded between 2000 and 2020 to better understand why VC initially did not prove successful in funding new clean energy technologies. Both lackluster demand and a lower potential for outsized returns make clean energy firms less attractive to VC than startups in ICT or biotech. However, we find no clear evidence that characteristics such as high-capital intensity or long development timeframe are behind the lack of success of VC in clean energy. In addition, our results show that while public sector investments can help attract VC investment, the ultimate success rate of firms receiving public funding remains small. Thus, stimulating demand will have a greater impact on clean energy innovation than investing in startups that will then struggle through the “valley of death”. Rather than investing themselves in startups bound to struggle through the valleys of death, governments wishing to support clean energy startups can first implement demand-side policies that make investing in clean energy more viable.
papers.zh_title: 风险投资与政府在清洁能源中的作用：第一次清洁技术泡沫的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 在2010年代初经历繁荣与萧条周期后，风险投资再次流向绿色企业。在本文中，我们利用Crunchbase上2000年至2020年间成立的15万家美国初创公司的数据，以更好地理解为何风险投资最初在资助新的清洁能源技术方面未能取得成功。需求疲软和超额回报潜力较低，使得清洁能源公司对风险投资的吸引力不如信息通信技术或生物技术领域的初创公司。然而，我们没有发现明确证据表明高资本密集度或长开发时间等特征是风险投资在清洁能源领域未能成功的原因。此外，我们的结果表明，虽然公共部门投资有助于吸引风险投资，但获得公共资金资助的公司的最终成功率仍然很低。因此，刺激需求对清洁能源创新的影响将大于投资于随后将在“死亡谷”中挣扎的初创公司。希望支持清洁能源初创公司的政府，与其自己投资于注定要在死亡谷中挣扎的初创公司，不如首先实施需求侧政策，使投资清洁能源更具可行性。

papers.title: Are Managers Paid for Market Power?
papers.authors: Renjie Bao, Jan De Loecker, Jan Eeckhout
papers.abstract: To answer the question whether managers are paid for market power, we propose a theory of executive compensation in an economy where firms have market power, and the market for man- agers is competitive. We identify two distinct channels that contribute to manager pay in the model: market power and firm size. Both increase the profitability of the firm, which makes managers more valuable as it increases their marginal product. Using data on executive compensation from Com- pustat, we quantitatively analyze how market power affects Manager Pay and how it changes over time. We attribute on average 45.8% of Manager Pay to market power, from 38.0% in 1994 to 48.8% in 2019. Over this period, market power accounts for 57.8% of growth. We also find there is a lot of heterogeneity within the distribution of managers. For the top managers, 80.3% of their pay in 2019 is due to market power. Top managers are hired disproportionately by firms with market power, and they get rewarded for it, increasingly so.
papers.zh_title: 管理者是否因市场势力而获得报酬？
papers.zh_abstract: 为了回答管理者是否因市场势力而获得报酬这一问题，我们提出了一个经济体中企业拥有市场势力且管理者市场竞争激烈的管理者薪酬理论。我们在模型中识别出两个导致管理者薪酬的不同渠道：市场势力与企业规模。两者都提高了企业的盈利能力，这通过增加管理者的边际产出而使其更有价值。利用Compustat的管理者薪酬数据，我们定量分析了市场势力如何影响管理者薪酬及其随时间的变化。我们将管理者薪酬平均的45.8%归因于市场势力，从1994年的38.0%上升到2019年的48.8%。在此期间，市场势力解释了管理者薪酬增长的57.8%。我们还发现管理者分布内部存在很大的异质性。对于顶级管理者，其2019年薪酬的80.3%归因于市场势力。顶级管理者不成比例地被拥有市场势力的企业雇佣，并因此获得报酬，且这一趋势日益增强。

papers.title: Bubbles and the Value of Innovation
papers.authors: Valentin Haddad, Paul Ho, Erik Loualiche
papers.abstract: Booming innovation often coincides with intense speculation in financial markets. Using over a million patents, we document two ways the market valuation of innovation and its economic impact become disconnected during bubbles. Specifically, an innovation raises the stock price of its creator by 40% more than is justified by future outcomes. In contrast, competitors’ stock prices move little despite their profits suffering. We develop a theory of investor disagreement about which firms will succeed that reconciles both the facts, unlike existing models of bubbles. Optimal innovation policy during bubbles must account for the disconnect.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PR；JEL：G0, G4, O3
papers.zh_title: 泡沫与创新的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 蓬勃发展的创新往往与金融市场的剧烈投机同时发生。利用超过一百万项专利，我们记录了在泡沫期间，创新的市场估值与其经济影响脱节的两种方式。具体而言，一项创新使其创造者的股价上涨幅度比未来结果所证明的合理水平高出40%。相比之下，尽管竞争对手的利润受损，其股价却几乎没有变动。我们提出了一个关于投资者对哪些企业将成功的分歧理论，该理论同时解释了这两个事实，这与现有的泡沫模型不同。泡沫期间的最优创新政策必须考虑到这种脱节。

papers.title: Idiosyncratic Equity Risk Two Decades Later
papers.authors: John Y. Campbell, Martin Lettau, Burton G. Malkiel, Yexiao Xu
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the literature on idiosyncratic equity volatility since the publication of “Have Individual Stocks Become More Volatile? An Empirical Exploration of Idiosyncratic Risk” in 2001. We respond to replication studies by Chiah, Gharghori, and Zhong and by Leippold and Svaton, and we present volatility estimates through the end of 2021, significantly extending the period covered in our original paper as well as the two replication studies. After spiking in the 1999- 2000 period, idiosyncratic volatility declined thereafter; but sharp increases in market, industry, and idiosyncratic volatility occurred during the global financial crisis of 2008-2009 and the COVID-19 pandemic of 2020-2021. We argue that market microstructure effects are not of first-order importance for volatility measurement, and we discuss the roles of fundamental factors and investor sentiment in driving the observed fluctuations in volatility.
papers.zh_title: 二十年后的特质股权风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了自2001年《个股是否变得更具波动性？特质风险的经验探索》发表以来关于特质股权波动率的文献。我们回应了Chiah、Gharghori和Zhong以及Leippold和Svaton的复制研究，并提供了截至2021年底的波动率估计，显著延长了我们原始论文以及两项复制研究所涵盖的时期。在1999-2000年期间飙升后，特质波动率随后下降；但在2008-2009年全球金融危机和2020-2021年COVID-19大流行期间，市场、行业和特质波动率均出现急剧上升。我们认为，市场微观结构效应对波动率测量并非首要重要因素，并讨论了基本面因素和投资者情绪在驱动观察到的波动率变化中的作用。

papers.title: Modeling Uncertainty as Ambiguity: a Review
papers.authors: Cosmin L. Ilut, Martin Schneider
papers.abstract: We survey literature on ambiguity with an emphasis on recent applications in macroeconomics and finance. Like risk, ambiguity leads to cautious behavior and uncertainty premia in asset markets. Unlike risk, ambiguity can generate first order welfare losses. As a result, precautionary behavior and ambiguity premia obtain even when agents have linear utility and are reflected in linear approximations to model dynamics. Quantitative work exploits this insight to estimate models that jointly match the dynamics of asset prices and macro aggregates. In micro data, inertia and inaction due to ambiguity help understand patterns such as non-participation in asset markets, price rigidities and simple contracts. Learning under ambiguity generates asymmetric responses to news that help connect higher moments in micro and macro data. Survey evidence is increasingly used to provide direct evidence on ambiguity averse behavior, as well as to discipline quantitative models.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D8, E2, E3, E4, G1
papers.zh_title: 将不确定性建模为模糊性：一个综述
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了关于模糊性的文献，重点关注其在宏观经济学和金融学中的最新应用。与风险一样，模糊性会导致谨慎行为和资产市场中的不确定性溢价。与风险不同，模糊性可以产生一阶福利损失。因此，即使代理人具有线性效用，预防性行为和模糊性溢价也会出现，并反映在模型动态的线性近似中。定量研究利用这一见解来估计同时匹配资产价格和宏观总量动态的模型。在微观数据中，由模糊性导致的惯性和不作为有助于理解资产市场不参与、价格刚性和简单契约等模式。模糊性下的学习会产生对新信息的非对称反应，有助于连接微观和宏观数据中的高阶矩。调查证据越来越多地被用来提供关于模糊厌恶行为的直接证据，并用于约束定量模型。

papers.title: Can a Website Bring Unemployment Down? Experimental Evidence from France
papers.authors: Aïcha Ben Dhia, Bruno Crépon, Esther Mbih, Louise Paul-Delvaux, Bertille Picard, Vincent Pons
papers.abstract: We evaluate the impact of an online platform giving job seekers tips to improve their search and recommendations of new occupations and locations to target, based on their personal data and labor market data. Our experiment used an encouragement design and was conducted in collaboration with the French public employment agency. It includes 212,277 individuals. We find modest effects on search methods: the users of the platform adopt some of its tips and they are more likely to use resources provided by public employment services. However, following individual trajectories for 18 months after the intervention, we do not observe any impact on time spent looking for a job, search scope (occupational or geographical), or self-reported well-being. Most importantly, we do not find any effect on any employment outcome, whether in the short or medium run. We conclude that the enthusiasm around the potential for job-search assistance platforms to help reduce unemployment should be toned down.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：D83, D84, J22, J24, J62, J64
papers.zh_title: 网站能降低失业率吗？来自法国的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一个在线平台的影响，该平台为求职者提供改善搜索的技巧，并根据其个人数据和劳动力市场数据推荐新的职业和地点。我们的实验采用了鼓励设计，并与法国公共就业机构合作进行。实验包括212,277名个体。我们发现对搜索方法的影响不大：平台用户采纳了其部分建议，并且更有可能使用公共就业服务提供的资源。然而，在干预后追踪个体轨迹18个月，我们没有观察到对求职时间、搜索范围（职业或地理）或自我报告幸福感有任何影响。最重要的是，无论是在短期还是中期，我们没有发现对任何就业结果的影响。我们得出结论，应降低对求职援助平台有助于减少失业的热情。

papers.title: On ESG Investing: Heterogeneous Preferences, Information, and Asset Prices
papers.authors: Itay Goldstein, Alexandr Kopytov, Lin Shen, Haotian Xiang
papers.abstract: We study how environmental, social and governance (ESG) investing reshapes information aggregation by prices. We develop a rational expectations equilibrium model in which traditional and green investors are informed about financial and ESG risks but have different preferences over them. Because of the preference heterogeneity, traditional and green investors trade in the opposite directions based on the same information. We show that the equilibrium price may not be uniquely determined. An increase in the fraction of green investors and an improvement in the ESG information quality can reduce price informativeness about the financial payoff and raise the cost of capital.
papers.zh_title: 论ESG投资：异质性偏好、信息与资产价格
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了环境、社会和治理（ESG）投资如何重塑价格的信息聚合。我们构建了一个理性预期均衡模型，其中传统投资者和绿色投资者都了解金融风险和ESG风险，但对这些风险有不同的偏好。由于偏好异质性，传统投资者和绿色投资者基于相同信息进行相反方向的交易。我们表明，均衡价格可能不是唯一确定的。绿色投资者比例的增加和ESG信息质量的提高会降低价格关于金融收益的信息含量，并提高资本成本。

papers.title: Asymmetric Investment Rates
papers.authors: Hang Bai, Erica X. N. Li, Chen Xue, Lu Zhang
papers.abstract: Integrating national accounting with financial accounting, we provide firm-specific estimates of current-cost capital stocks for the entire Compustat universe, as well as an array of estimates of investment flows, economic depreciation rates, and capital and investment price deflators. The firm-level current-cost investment rate distribution is heavily right-skewed, with a small fraction of negative investment rates, 5.51%, but a huge fraction of positive investment rates, 91.64%. Despite a tiny fraction of inactive investment rates, 2.85%, firm-level investment also seems lumpy, featuring a fraction of 32.66% for positive spikes (investment rates higher than 20%). For a typical firm, 39% of total investment is completed within 20% of the sample years.
papers.zh_title: 非对称投资率
papers.zh_abstract: 通过将国民核算与财务会计相结合，我们为整个Compustat数据库提供了公司特定的现时成本资本存量估计，以及一系列投资流量、经济折旧率以及资本和投资价格平减指数的估计。公司层面的现时成本投资率分布严重右偏，负投资率占比很小，为5.51%，但正投资率占比巨大，为91.64%。尽管非活跃投资率占比很小，仅为2.85%，但公司层面的投资似乎也具有块状特征，正峰值（投资率高于20%）占比为32.66%。对于典型公司而言，总投资的39%是在样本年份的20%内完成的。

papers.title: The Anatomy of U.S. Sick Leave Schemes: Evidence from Public School Teachers
papers.authors: Christopher J. Cronin, Matthew C. Harris, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
papers.abstract: We study how public school teachers use paid sick leave. Most U.S. sick leave schemes operate as individualized credit accounts – paid leave is earned and unused leave accumulates, producing an employee-specific leave balance. We construct a unique data set from administrative records containing the daily balances and leave behavior of 982 teachers from 2010- 2018. We find that sick leave use increases during flu season. We do not find evidence that the average teacher uses sick leave for leisure; however, there is evidence of such behavior among certain subsets of teachers (e.g., young, inexperienced teachers). Usage increases with leave balance; the elasticity is around 0.4. Further, higher balances reduce the likelihood that teachers work sick, particularly during flu season.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I13, I18, J22, J28, J32, J38
papers.zh_title: 美国病假制度的剖析：来自公立学校教师的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了公立学校教师如何使用带薪病假。大多数美国病假制度作为个人化信贷账户运作——带薪假是挣得的，未使用的假期会累积，产生员工特定的假期余额。我们利用行政记录构建了一个独特的数据集，包含2010年至2018年982名教师的每日余额和休假行为。我们发现，病假使用在流感季节增加。我们没有发现证据表明普通教师将病假用于休闲；然而，在某些教师子群体（例如年轻、缺乏经验的教师）中存在此类行为的证据。病假使用随假期余额增加而增加；弹性约为0.4。此外，较高的余额降低了教师带病工作的可能性，尤其是在流感季节。

papers.title: Modeling the Great Recession as a Bank Panic: Challenges
papers.authors: Lawrence Christiano, Hüsnü Dalgic, Xiaoming Li
papers.abstract: We highlight two challenges for the notion that a pure panic bank run played an important role in the dynamics in the Great Recession. First, the conclusion depends critically on ruling out any entry of new net worth into a sector experiencing a run. When interpreted as reflecting a cost of entry into banking, the resulting costs seem implausibly large across a range of models. Second, we show that the qualitative features of run equilibria (their existence, how many there are, etc.) are highly sensitive to minor technical changes in assumptions about banker entry. We report another result that is of independent interest. In particular, we describe implementation problems associated with standard macroprudential policy tools for reducing the risk of bank panic.
papers.zh_title: 将大衰退建模为银行恐慌：挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 我们强调了两个挑战，针对纯恐慌性银行挤兑在大衰退动态中发挥重要作用的观点。第一，该结论关键取决于排除任何新净值进入经历挤兑的部门。当被解释为反映进入银行业的成本时，由此产生的成本在一系列模型中似乎高得难以置信。第二，我们表明，挤兑均衡的定性特征（其存在性、数量等）对银行家进入假设的微小技术变化高度敏感。我们报告了另一个具有独立意义的结果。具体而言，我们描述了与降低银行恐慌风险的标准宏观审慎政策工具相关的实施问题。

papers.title: The Inherent Trade-Off Between the Environmental and Anti-Poverty Goals of Payments for Ecosystem Services
papers.authors: Seema Jayachandran
papers.abstract: Conservation programs in low-income countries often have dual goals of protecting the environment and reducing poverty. This article discusses the tension between these two goals in payments for ecosystem services (PES) programs. Participants who undertake a pro-environment behavior receive a payment, which can be decomposed into two parts: the amount that compensates them for the cost of changing their behavior and the extra amount that is a "pure transfer" to them. To maximize the program's environmental benefits, a policy maker would like to set the pure transfer component to zero, but the pure transfer is the only part of the payment that increases participants' economic well-being. In practice, PES programs pay out some pure transfers, and the extent of the anti-poverty benefits depends on whether the pure transfers are de facto targeted to the poor. I lay out these points and then illustrate them with data from a randomized trial of payments for forest protection in Uganda. I provide evidence that the economic gains from participation in PES are indeed larger for those with low costs to fulfill the program's conservation requirements. I also show that, in this context, poorer eligible households enjoyed more improvement in their economic well-being than richer ones did.
papers.zh_title: 生态系统服务付费的环境与减贫目标之间的固有权衡
papers.zh_abstract: 低收入国家的保护项目通常具有保护环境和减少贫困的双重目标。本文讨论了生态系统服务付费项目中这两个目标之间的紧张关系。采取环保行为的参与者会收到一笔付款，该付款可分解为两部分：补偿其改变行为成本的金额，以及作为“纯转移支付”给他们的额外金额。为了最大化项目的环境效益，政策制定者希望将纯转移支付部分设为零，但纯转移支付是付款中唯一能增加参与者经济福祉的部分。在实践中，生态系统服务付费项目会支付一些纯转移支付，而减贫效益的程度取决于纯转移支付是否实际上针对贫困人口。我阐述了这些观点，然后利用乌干达森林保护付款随机试验的数据加以说明。我提供的证据表明，参与生态系统服务付费的经济收益确实对那些履行项目保护要求成本较低的人更大。我还表明，在此背景下，较贫困的合格家庭比富裕家庭在经济福祉方面获得了更多改善。

papers.title: Partially Linear Models under Data Combination
papers.authors: Xavier D'Haultfoeuille, Christophe Gaillac, Arnaud Maurel
papers.abstract: We consider the identification of and inference on a partially linear model, when the outcome of interest and some of the covariates are observed in two different datasets that cannot be linked. This type of data combination problem arises very frequently in empirical microeconomics. Using recent tools from optimal transport theory, we derive a constructive characterization of the sharp identified set. We then build on this result and develop a novel inference method that exploits the specific geometric properties of the identified set. Our method exhibits good performances in finite samples, while remaining very tractable. Finally, we apply our methodology to study intergenerational income mobility over the period 1850-1930 in the United States. Our method allows to relax the exclusion restrictions used in earlier work while delivering confidence regions that are informative.
papers.zh_title: 数据组合下的部分线性模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当感兴趣的结果变量和部分协变量在两个无法链接的不同数据集中被观测到时，部分线性模型的识别与推断问题。这种数据组合问题在实证微观经济学中非常常见。利用最优传输理论的最新工具，我们推导出尖锐识别集的构造性刻画。在此基础上，我们开发了一种新的推断方法，该方法利用了识别集的特定几何性质。我们的方法在有限样本中表现出良好的性能，同时保持高度可操作性。最后，我们将该方法应用于研究1850-1930年间美国的代际收入流动性。我们的方法能够放宽早期研究中使用的排除限制，同时提供具有信息量的置信区域。

papers.title: Air Pollution and the Labor Market: Evidence from Wildfire Smoke
papers.authors: Mark Borgschulte, David Molitor, Eric Zou
papers.abstract: We study how air pollution impacts the U.S. labor market by analyzing effects of drifting wildfire smoke that can affect populations far from the fires themselves. We link satellite smoke plumes with labor market outcomes to estimate that an additional day of smoke exposure reduces quarterly earnings by about 0.1 percent. Extensive margin responses, including employment reductions and labor force exits, can explain 13 percent of the overall earnings losses. The implied welfare cost of lost earnings due to air pollution exposure is on par with standard valuations of the mortality burden. The findings suggest that labor market channels warrant greater consideration in policy responses to air pollution.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, LS；JEL：J21, Q51, Q52, Q53, Q54
papers.zh_title: 空气污染与劳动力市场：来自野火烟雾的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过分析飘移的野火烟雾（可能影响远离火灾本身的人群）的影响，研究空气污染如何影响美国劳动力市场。我们将卫星烟雾羽流与劳动力市场结果相关联，估计出额外一天的烟雾暴露会使季度收入减少约0.1%。广泛边际反应，包括就业减少和劳动力退出，可以解释总体收入损失的13%。因空气污染暴露导致的收入损失的隐含福利成本与死亡负担的标准估值相当。研究结果表明，在应对空气污染的政策响应中，劳动力市场渠道值得更多考虑。

papers.title: A Comparative Perspective on Long-Term Care Systems
papers.authors: Rainer Kotschy, David E. Bloom
papers.abstract: This paper investigates challenges of aging for long-term care. Our analysis proceeds in three steps. In the first step, we estimate the prospective care demand for 30 developed countries based on projected aging and disabilities among the elderly. In the second step, we outline challenges for care systems with respect to shortages of care workers, increasing skill requirements for care workers, barriers to universal and equitable access to care, and cost containment subject to adequate care quality. In the third step, we identify solutions for these challenges by comparing the care systems of Germany, Israel, Japan, the Netherlands, and South Korea.
papers.zh_title: 长期护理体系的比较视角
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了老龄化对长期护理的挑战。我们的分析分三步进行。第一步，我们基于预测的老龄化和老年人残疾情况，估算了30个发达国家的预期护理需求。第二步，我们概述了护理体系面临的挑战，涉及护理人员短缺、对护理人员技能要求提高、普及和公平获得护理的障碍，以及在确保足够护理质量的前提下控制成本。第三步，我们通过比较德国、以色列、日本、荷兰和韩国的护理体系，为这些挑战确定了解决方案。

papers.title: Additive Growth
papers.authors: Thomas Philippon
papers.abstract: Growth theory is based on the assumption of exponential total factor productivity (TFP) growth. Across countries and time periods I find that TFP growth is actually linear. The additive growth model, unlike the exponential one, provides useful long-term forecasts for TFP. For the distant past the model suggests piecewise linear evolutions where the size of TFP increments changes in the late 1600’s, the early 1800’s, and around 1930. For the distant future the model predicts ever increasing increments in standards of living but with falling real interest rates and growth rates that converge to zero. The model suggests stable TFP growth in the US, but a TFP slowdown in the Euro area since the late 1990s.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DAE, EFG, PR；JEL：E22, N1, O11, O3, O4
papers.zh_title: 加法增长
papers.zh_abstract: 增长理论基于全要素生产率指数增长的假设。我发现，在不同国家和时间段，全要素生产率增长实际上是线性的。与指数增长模型不同，加法增长模型为全要素生产率提供了有用的长期预测。对于遥远的过去，该模型暗示了分段线性演化，其中全要素生产率增量的大小在17世纪末、19世纪初和1930年左右发生变化。对于遥远的未来，该模型预测生活水平将不断提高，但实际利率下降，增长率趋近于零。该模型表明美国全要素生产率增长稳定，但欧元区自20世纪90年代末以来全要素生产率放缓。

papers.title: Cohort Effects on Expected Co-Movement
papers.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Akiko Watanabe, Masahiro Watanabe
papers.abstract: The covariance of asset returns with economic states of the world is a fundamental input to asset pricing models. Using a semi-annual survey of forecasts by a panel of U.S. economists over more than 70 years, we infer forecaster beliefs about covariance between the S&P index and macro-economic factors. We find evidence that life-experience was a significant determinant of beliefs about the co-movement of inflation and stock returns
papers.zh_title: 队列效应对预期共同变动的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 资产收益率与经济状态的协方差是资产定价模型的基本输入。利用一项超过70年对美国经济学家小组进行的半年度预测调查，我们推断出预测者对标准普尔指数与宏观经济因素之间协方差的信念。我们发现证据表明，生活经历是决定关于通胀与股票收益率共同变动信念的重要因素。

papers.title: The Economics of Fertility: A New Era
papers.authors: Matthias Doepke, Anne Hannusch, Fabian Kindermann, Michèle Tertilt
papers.abstract: In this survey, we argue that the economic analysis of fertility has entered a new era. First-generation models of fertility choice were designed to account for two empirical regularities that, in the past, held both across countries and across families in a given country: a negative relationship between income and fertility, and another negative relationship between women's labor force participation and fertility. The economics of fertility has entered a new era because these stylized facts no longer universally hold. In high-income countries, the income-fertility relationship has flattened and in some cases reversed, and the cross-country relationship between women's labor force participation and fertility is now positive. We summarize these new facts and describe new models that are designed to address them. The common theme of these new theories is that they view factors that determine the compatibility of women's career and family goals as key drivers of fertility. We highlight four factors that facilitate combining a career with a family: family policy, cooperative fathers, favorable social norms, and flexible labor markets. We also review other recent developments in the literature, and we point out promising new directions for future research on the economics of fertility.
papers.zh_title: 生育经济学：新时代
papers.zh_abstract: 在这篇综述中，我们认为生育的经济分析已进入一个新时代。第一代生育选择模型旨在解释两个过去在跨国和一国国内家庭层面都成立的实证规律：收入与生育率之间的负相关关系，以及女性劳动参与率与生育率之间的负相关关系。生育经济学已进入新时代，因为这些典型事实不再普遍成立。在高收入国家，收入与生育率的关系已趋平缓，在某些情况下甚至逆转，而女性劳动参与率与生育率之间的跨国关系现在为正。我们总结了这些新事实，并描述了旨在解释这些事实的新模型。这些新理论的共同主题是，它们将决定女性职业与家庭目标兼容性的因素视为生育的关键驱动因素。我们强调了四个有助于兼顾职业与家庭的因素：家庭政策、合作型父亲、有利的社会规范和灵活的劳动力市场。我们还回顾了文献中的其他近期发展，并指出了未来生育经济学研究有前景的新方向。

papers.title: Increasing the Demand for Workers with a Criminal Record
papers.authors: Zoe B. Cullen, Will S. Dobbie, Mitchell Hoffman
papers.abstract: State and local policies increasingly restrict employers’ access to criminal records, but without addressing the underlying reasons that employers may conduct criminal background checks. Employers may thus still want to ask about a job applicant’s criminal record later in the hiring process or make inaccurate judgments based on an applicant’s demographic characteristics. In this paper, we use a field experiment conducted in partnership with a nationwide staffing platform to test policies that more directly address the reasons that employers may conduct criminal background checks. The experiment asked hiring managers at nearly a thousand U.S. businesses to make incentive-compatible decisions under different randomized conditions. We find that 39% of businesses in our sample are willing to work with individuals with a criminal record at baseline, which rises to over 50% when businesses are offered crime and safety insurance, a single performance review, or a limited background check covering just the past year. Wage subsidies can achieve similar increases but at substantially higher cost. Based on our findings, the staffing platform relaxed the criminal background check requirement and offered crime and safety insurance to interested businesses.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：C93, J23, J24, M51
papers.zh_title: 增加对有犯罪记录工人的需求
papers.zh_abstract: 州和地方政策越来越多地限制雇主获取犯罪记录，但并未解决雇主可能进行犯罪背景调查的根本原因。因此，雇主可能仍希望在招聘后期询问求职者的犯罪记录，或基于求职者的人口统计特征做出不准确的判断。在本文中，我们利用与一家全国性招聘平台合作进行的实地实验，测试了更直接解决雇主可能进行犯罪背景调查原因的政策。该实验要求近千家美国企业的招聘经理在不同随机条件下做出激励相容的决策。我们发现，样本中39%的企业在基线情况下愿意与有犯罪记录的个人合作，当企业获得犯罪与安全保险、单次绩效评估或仅覆盖过去一年的有限背景调查时，这一比例上升至超过50%。工资补贴可以实现类似的增长，但成本要高得多。基于我们的发现，该招聘平台放宽了犯罪背景调查要求，并向感兴趣的企业提供犯罪与安全保险。

papers.title: Trends in Retirement and Retirement Income Choices by TIAA Participants: 2000–2018
papers.authors: Jeffrey R. Brown, James M. Poterba, David P. Richardson
papers.abstract: This paper documents trends over the last two decades in retirement behavior and retirement income choices by participants in TIAA, a large and mature defined contribution plan with a wide range of withdrawal options. Between 2000 and 2018, the average retirement age rose by approximately 1.3 years for female and 2 years for male participants. There is considerable variation in the elapsed time between the last contribution to and the first income draw from participants’ plan accounts; only 40% take an initial income payment within 48 months of their last contribution, which is likely to coincide with retirement. Later retirement and lags between retirement and the first retirement income payout led to a growing fraction of participants reaching the Required Minimum Distribution (RMD) age before starting income draws. The fraction of first-time income recipients who took no income until their RMD rose from 10% (2000) to 52% (2018), while the fraction of these recipients who selected a life-contingent annuitized payout stream declined from 61 to 18%. Among those who began receiving income before age 70, annuitization rates were significantly higher than among those who did so at older ages. Aggregating across all income recipients at a point in time, not just the new recipients, the proportion who had a life annuity as part of their payout strategy fell from 52% in 2008 to 31% in 2018. At the same time, the proportion of all income recipients taking an RMD payment rose from 16 to 29%. About one-fifth of retirees received more than one type of income; the most common pairing was an RMD and a life annuity. The data suggest that the RMD is becoming the de facto default distribution option for newly-retired TIAA participants.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H24, H55, J14, J32
papers.zh_title: TIAA参与者的退休与退休收入选择趋势：2000-2018年
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了过去二十年中，TIAA（一个大型且成熟的固定缴款计划，提供广泛的提款选择）参与者的退休行为和退休收入选择的趋势。在2000年至2018年间，女性参与者的平均退休年龄上升了约1.3岁，男性参与者上升了约2岁。参与者最后一次缴款与首次从计划账户中提取收入之间的时间间隔存在相当大的差异；只有40%的人在最后一次缴款后的48个月内进行了首次收入支付，这很可能与退休时间重合。延迟退休以及退休与首次退休收入支付之间的时滞，导致越来越多的参与者在开始提取收入之前达到了规定最低分配年龄。首次收入领取者中，直到规定最低分配年龄才领取收入的比例从2000年的10%上升到2018年的52%，而选择终身年金化支付流的比例则从61%下降到18%。在70岁之前开始领取收入的人群中，年金化率显著高于在更年长年龄开始领取的人群。汇总某一时点所有收入领取者（而不仅仅是新领取者）的数据，将终身年金作为其支付策略一部分的比例从2008年的52%下降到2018年的31%。与此同时，所有收入领取者中领取规定最低分配付款的比例从16%上升到29%。大约五分之一的退休人员领取了不止一种类型的收入；最常见的组合是规定最低分配和终身年金。数据表明，规定最低分配正成为新退休TIAA参与者事实上的默认分配选项。

papers.title: Measuring Firm Activity from Outer Space
papers.authors: Katarzyna A. Bilicka, André Seidel
papers.abstract: To understand how global firm networks operate, we need consistent information on their activities, unbiased by their reporting choices. In this paper, we collect a novel dataset on the light that factories emit at night for a large sample of car manufacturing plants. We show that nightlight data can measure activity at such a granular level, using annual firm financial data and high-frequency data related to Covid-19 pandemic production shocks. We use this data to quantify the extent of misreported global operations of these car manufacturing firms and examine differences between sources of nightlight.
papers.zh_title: 从太空测量企业活动
papers.zh_abstract: 为了理解全球企业网络如何运作，我们需要关于其活动的一致信息，且这些信息不受其报告选择的影响。本文收集了一个新颖的数据集，该数据集包含大量汽车制造工厂夜间发出的灯光。我们利用年度企业财务数据以及与新冠疫情生产冲击相关的高频数据，证明夜间灯光数据能够在如此微观的层面测量活动。我们利用这些数据量化这些汽车制造企业全球运营中误报的程度，并考察夜间灯光不同来源之间的差异。

papers.title: The Savings Glut of the Old: Population Aging, the Risk Premium, and the Murder-Suicide of the Rentier
papers.authors: Joseph Kopecky, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: Population aging has been linked to a global savings glut and a decline in safe real interest rates. Conversely, risky real returns have not fallen as much, if at all, with equity risk premia on the rise. An existing literature can explain changes in safe rates using demographics. We go further to account for divergent returns on different assets as well as the underlying surge in the wealth-income ratio and its asset composition. Empirical evidence from historical panel data shows that demographic shifts are correlated with asset returns and risk premia. We build a heterogeneous agent life-cycle model with two assets (a safe bond and equity) and with aggregate risk. Aging demographics can help to simultaneously explain three key trends: the rising wealth-income ratio, the falling risk free rate, and an increasing risk premium. The shifts exert less pressure on risky returns as high-wealth elderly reallocate away from equities: aging makes retirement saving a “crowded trade” but more so for bonds. Projecting our model to 2050, aging pushes the safe rate below zero, but the risk premium remains elevated, as post-boomer demographics push asset returns to unprecedented and persistently low levels.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E43, G11, J11
papers.zh_title: 老年人的储蓄过剩：人口老龄化、风险溢价与食利者的谋杀-自杀
papers.zh_abstract: 人口老龄化与全球储蓄过剩以及安全实际利率的下降有关。相反，风险实际回报的下降幅度较小（如果确实下降的话），而股票风险溢价却在上升。现有文献可以利用人口结构来解释安全利率的变化。我们进一步解释了不同资产回报率的差异，以及财富收入比及其资产构成的潜在激增。来自历史面板数据的实证证据表明，人口结构变化与资产回报和风险溢价相关。我们构建了一个包含两种资产（安全债券和股票）并具有总体风险的异质性代理人生命周期模型。老龄化的人口结构有助于同时解释三个关键趋势：财富收入比上升、无风险利率下降以及风险溢价上升。这些变化对风险回报的压力较小，因为高财富的老年人从股票中重新配置资产：老龄化使得退休储蓄成为一种“拥挤的交易”，但对债券而言更是如此。将我们的模型预测到2050年，老龄化将安全利率推至零以下，但风险溢价仍然较高，因为婴儿潮一代之后的人口结构将资产回报推至前所未有的持续低位。

papers.title: US Sanctions Reinforce the Dollar’s Dominance
papers.authors: Michael P. Dooley, David Folkerts-Landau, Peter M. Garber
papers.abstract: Recent sanctions on the use of Russia’s international reserve assets seem likely to reduce the appeal of US dollar reserves as a “shock absorber” for international payments. But international reserves are also a means to reassure foreign investors that problematic countries will not confiscate their investments. The “collateral” motive for holding dollar reserves has been enhanced by the demonstration that the United States is willing and able to sanction misbehavior. Geopolitically risky countries now more than ever need to reassure foreign investors that their investments are safe from expropriation. We conclude that recent events will strengthen the role of the dollar as the key international reserve currency.
papers.zh_title: 美国制裁强化了美元的主导地位
papers.zh_abstract: 最近对俄罗斯国际储备资产使用的制裁似乎可能会降低美元储备作为国际支付“减震器”的吸引力。但国际储备也是一种手段，用于向外国投资者保证，有问题的国家不会没收他们的投资。持有美元储备的“抵押品”动机因美国愿意且能够制裁不当行为的示范效应而得到加强。地缘政治风险高的国家现在比以往任何时候都更需要向外国投资者保证，他们的投资不会被征收。我们得出结论，近期事件将加强美元作为关键国际储备货币的角色。

papers.title: Who is Neoliberal? Durkheimian Individualism and Support for Market Mechanisms
papers.authors: Augustin Landier, David Thesmar
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the drivers of support for market mechanisms (competition and optimizing behavior by agents). We elicit such attitudes using concrete and simplified situations where respondents face a tradeoff between an economically efficient situation and a pro-social objective.
