Using a novel administrative data source on the flow of offense records to prosecutors’ offices in 81 provinces of the country each year, and utilizing the staggered movement of refugees across provinces over time, we estimate instrumental variables models that address potential endogeneity of the number of refugees and their location, and find that an increase in the number of refugees leads to more crime. We estimate that the influx of refugees between 2012 and 2016 generated additional 75,000 to 150,000 crimes per year, although it is not possible to identify the distribution of these crimes between refugees and natives. Additional analyses reveal that low-educated native population has a separate, but smaller, effect on crime. We also highlight the pitfalls of employing incorrect empirical procedures and using poor proxies of criminal activity which produce the wrong inference about the refugee-crime relationship. Our results underline the need to quickly strengthen the social safety systems, to take actions to dampen the impact on the labor market, and to provide support to the criminal justice system in order to mitigate the repercussions of massive influx of individuals into a country, and to counter the social and political backlash that typically emerges in the wake of such large-scale population movements.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J08, J2, J3, J38, J61, J68, K14, K37, K42
papers.zh_title: 难民对犯罪的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了因叙利亚内战而进入并留在土耳其的370万难民对犯罪的影响。利用关于每年全国81个省检察官办公室犯罪记录流量的新颖行政数据源，并利用难民随时间跨省交错流动的情况，我们估计了工具变量模型，以解决难民数量及其所在地的潜在内生性问题，发现难民数量的增加导致更多犯罪。我们估计，2012年至2016年间难民的涌入每年额外产生了7.5万至15万起犯罪，尽管无法确定这些犯罪在难民和本地人之间的分布。进一步分析显示，低教育程度的本地人口对犯罪有独立但较小的影响。我们还强调了采用错误实证程序和使用不良犯罪活动代理变量所产生的陷阱，这些做法会导致关于难民与犯罪关系的错误推断。我们的结果强调了迅速加强社会安全体系、采取措施减轻对劳动力市场的影响、以及为刑事司法系统提供支持的必要性，以缓解大量人口涌入一个国家的后果，并应对通常在此类大规模人口流动之后出现的社会和政治反弹。

papers.title: Agricultural Crises and Government Responses Between the World Wars in the Atlantic Trading Network
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: The paper summarizes research on the heterogeneous experiences of actors in agriculture in Europe and the Americas between the First and Second World Wars. Following a period of increasing globalization of agricultural markets, the First World War sharply limited farming in the main combatant nations, which led to sharp increases in agricultural prices and farm incomes in countries outside the combat zones. During the 1920s the combatants experienced a return to normalcy, while farmers that experienced booms during the war went through hard times. During the Great Depression that followed, farm prices for most goods fell sharply and farm regions were flooded with unemployed workers. During both decades, most countries responded by raising tariffs and setting quotas on farm imports in an attempt to protect farmers, most often large farmers, against the drops in prices. After experimenting with aiding farmers through price guarantees in the 1920s, nearly every government in the 1930s regulated agriculture in some new way: by providing subsidies, setting minimum prices, purchasing surpluses, or limiting output. Often the regulations led to problems that led to new regulatory fixes while setting the precedents for the domestic farm programs that continue to protect farmers in the modern era.
papers.zh_title: 两次世界大战期间大西洋贸易网络中的农业危机与政府应对
papers.zh_abstract: 本文总结了关于第一次和第二次世界大战之间欧洲和美洲农业参与者异质性经验的研究。在农业市场日益全球化的时期之后，第一次世界大战严重限制了主要参战国的农业，导致非战区国家农产品价格和农业收入急剧上升。在1920年代，参战国恢复了正常状态，而战时经历繁荣的农民则经历了困难时期。在随后的大萧条期间，大多数农产品价格大幅下跌，农业地区充斥着失业工人。在这两个十年中，大多数国家通过提高关税和设定农产品进口配额来应对，试图保护农民（通常是大农场主）免受价格下跌的影响。在1920年代尝试通过价格保证援助农民之后，1930年代几乎所有政府都以某种新方式监管农业：提供补贴、设定最低价格、购买剩余产品或限制产量。这些监管常常导致问题，进而引发新的监管修补，同时为现代继续保护农民的国内农业计划开创了先例。

papers.title: Urban Sprawl and Social Capital: Evidence from Indonesian Cities
papers.authors: Andrea Civelli, Arya Gaduh, Alexander D. Rothenberg, Yao Wang
papers.abstract: We use detailed data from Indonesian cities to study how variation in density within urban areas affects social capital. For identification, we instrument density with soil characteristics, and control for community averages of observed characteristics. Under plausible assumptions, these controls address sorting on observables and unobservables. We find that lower density increases trust in neighbors and community participation. We also find that lower density is associated with lower interethnic tolerance, but this relationship is explained by sorting. Heterogeneity analysis suggests that crime in dense areas undermines community trust and participation, intensifying the negative impact of density.
papers.zh_title: 城市蔓延与社会资本：来自印度尼西亚城市的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用印度尼西亚城市的详细数据，研究城市区域内密度变化如何影响社会资本。为了识别，我们使用土壤特征作为密度的工具变量，并控制社区平均观测特征。在合理假设下，这些控制解决了基于可观测和不可观测特征的分类问题。我们发现，较低的密度增加了对邻居的信任和社区参与。我们还发现，较低的密度与较低的族裔间容忍度相关，但这种关系可由分类解释。异质性分析表明，密集地区的犯罪破坏了社区信任和参与，加剧了密度的负面影响。

papers.title: Safety Nets and Social Welfare Expenditures in World Economic History
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: The safety nets in high-income countries before 1900 and in low-income countries today were based on savings and aid from extended family, friends, charities, churches, and small amounts from local governments. Mutual societies and eventually insurance companies offered insurance against lost earnings from sickness, injury, death, and old age. Germany led the way in mandating that employers provide benefits. Since 1900 higher income nations have sharply increased public and private social welfare expenditures to well over 20 percent relative to GDP. A large share of this rise has come in increases in aid to the elderly and health care expenses, often in the form of contributory social insurance financed by payroll taxes on workers and employers. Meanwhile, noncontributory transfer programs for the poor have risen relatively little. In most countries, the employer’s share of payroll taxes are higher than the worker’s share. There are some major countries who have followed a path of reliance on private programs, which are largely financed by employers. Probably the most striking feature of social welfare programs world-wide is the very large variation in expenditures relative to GDP, in the categories of spending, and in the mix of taxation, private programs, and government programs.
papers.zh_title: 世界经济史中的安全网与社会福利支出
papers.zh_abstract: 1900年前高收入国家和当今低收入国家的安全网基于大家庭、朋友、慈善机构、教会以及地方政府少量资金的储蓄和援助。互助协会以及后来的保险公司提供了针对疾病、伤害、死亡和老年收入损失的保险。德国率先强制雇主提供福利。自1900年以来，高收入国家大幅增加了公共和私人社会福利支出，占GDP比重超过20%。这一增长中很大一部分来自对老年人援助和医疗保健支出的增加，通常以工人和雇主工资税资助的缴费型社会保险形式出现。与此同时，针对贫困的非缴费型转移支付项目增长相对较少。在大多数国家，雇主承担的工资税份额高于工人。一些主要国家遵循依赖私人项目的路径，这些项目主要由雇主资助。全球社会福利项目最显著的特征可能是支出占GDP比重、支出类别以及税收、私人项目和政府项目组合的巨大差异。

papers.title: Markets, Governments, and the Institutional Structure of Social Welfare Expenditures in the United States and Sweden in the 20th Century
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: Social welfare spending on health, welfare, and insurance against adverse outcomes expanded a great deal in all of the developed countries during the 20th century. The institutional structure of the spending varies with respect to the extent that governments or market institutions provide the services. Sweden and the United States are on opposite ends of this spectrum. After discussing the problems with adverse selection and moral hazard that bedevil private and public social welfare organizations, I compare the development of the social welfare institutions in the U.S. and Sweden in the 20th century.
papers.zh_title: 20世纪美国和瑞典的市场、政府与社会福利支出的制度结构
papers.zh_abstract: 20世纪，所有发达国家在健康、福利和针对不利结果的保险方面的社会福利支出大幅扩张。支出的制度结构因政府或市场机构提供服务的程度而异。瑞典和美国处于这一光谱的两端。在讨论了困扰私人和公共社会福利组织的逆向选择和道德风险问题之后，我比较了20世纪美国和瑞典社会福利制度的发展。

papers.title: Bayesian Persuasion with Lie Detection
papers.authors: Florian Ederer, Weicheng Min
papers.abstract: How does lie detection constrain the potential for one person to persuade another to change her action? We consider a model of Bayesian persuasion in which the Receiver can detect lies with positive probability. We show that the Sender lies more when the lie detection probability increases. As long as this probability is sufficiently small, the Sender’s and the Receiver’s equilibrium payoffs are unaffected by the presence of lie detection because the Sender simply compensates by lying more. However, when the lie detection probability is sufficiently high, the Sender’s equilibrium payoff decreases and the Receiver’s equilibrium payoff increases with the lie detection probability. We explore several extensions including partial commitment, general state and action spaces, and different detection technologies and show that our model’s main insights continue to hold.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, POL；JEL：D72, D82, D83, K40, M31
papers.zh_title: 带有谎言检测的贝叶斯说服
papers.zh_abstract: 谎言检测如何限制一个人说服另一个人改变其行为的潜力？我们考虑了一个贝叶斯说服模型，其中接收方能够以正概率检测到谎言。我们表明，当谎言检测概率增加时，发送方会更多地撒谎。只要这个概率足够小，发送方和接收方的均衡收益就不会受到谎言检测的影响，因为发送方只是通过更多地撒谎来补偿。然而，当谎言检测概率足够高时，发送方的均衡收益会随着谎言检测概率的增加而减少，而接收方的均衡收益则会增加。我们探讨了多种扩展情况，包括部分承诺、一般状态和行动空间以及不同的检测技术，并表明我们模型的主要见解仍然成立。

papers.title: Reserve System Design for Allocation of Scarce Medical Resources in a Pandemic: Some Perspectives from the Field
papers.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Govind Persad, Tayfun Sönmez, M. Utku Ünver
papers.abstract: The Covid-19 pandemic has brought renewed attention to rationing guidelines for scarce medical resources. This paper describes the benefits of using a reserve system over a priority system in operationalizing compromises between certain ethical goals. In the last two years, more than a dozen states and local jurisdictions have adopted reserve systems in initial phases of vaccine distribution. We highlight several design issues arising in some of these implementations.
papers.zh_title: 大流行期间稀缺医疗资源分配的储备系统设计：来自实地的一些视角
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情重新引起了人们对稀缺医疗资源配给指南的关注。本文描述了在实现某些伦理目标之间的折衷时，使用储备系统相对于优先级系统的优势。在过去两年中，超过十二个州和地方管辖区在疫苗分配的初始阶段采用了储备系统。我们强调了其中一些实施中出现的设计问题。

papers.title: Safeguarding Consumers Through Minimum Quality Standards: Milk Inspections and Urban Mortality, 1880-1910
papers.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Kerwin Kofi Charles, Michael McKelligott, Daniel I. Rees
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of enforcing minimum quality standards (MQSs) on consumer health. In the late 1800s, the urban milk supply was regularly skimmed and diluted with water, but consumers could not easily determine its quality because dyes, caramel, and salt were added. To protect consumers, milk inspectors were tasked with enforcing a well-defined MQS. Using city-level data for the period 1880-1910, we find that milk inspections reduced mortality from waterborne and foodborne diseases by 12-19 percent. Ours is the first study to provide evidence that MQSs can improve consumer health when directly applied to an experience or credence good.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, EH, IO, PE；JEL：H75, I18, J18, L51, N31
papers.zh_title: 通过最低质量标准保护消费者：牛奶检查与城市死亡率，1880-1910
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了执行最低质量标准对消费者健康的影响。在19世纪末，城市牛奶供应经常被撇去脂肪并用水稀释，但由于添加了染料、焦糖和盐，消费者难以轻易判断其质量。为了保护消费者，牛奶检查员被指派执行明确的最低质量标准。利用1880-1910年间的城市层面数据，我们发现牛奶检查使水媒和食源性疾病死亡率降低了12-19%。我们的研究首次提供了证据，表明当最低质量标准直接应用于经验品或信任品时，可以改善消费者健康。

papers.title: Gender Differences in Response to Competitive Organization? Differences Across Fields from a Product Development Platform Field Experiment
papers.authors: Kevin Boudreau, Nilam Kaushik
papers.abstract: Prior research, primarily based on lab experiments, suggests that females might be more averse to competition than males and could be more inclined towards collaboration, instead. Were these findings to generalize to adults across the workforce, there could be profound implications for organizational design and personnel management. We report on a field experiment in which 97,678 adults from a wide range of fields and ages were invited to join a product development opportunity. Individuals were randomly assigned to treatments framing the opportunity as either involving competitive or collaborative interactions with other participants. Among those outside of science, technology, engineering, and math fields (STEM), we find significant gender differences in willingness to participate under competition. Among those in STEM fields, we detect no statistical gender differences. These results and broader patterns documented in the study are consistent with significant heterogeneity in competitiveness across both men and women, with field and career sorting resulting in differences (in gender differences) across fields.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：D02, D03, D9, D91, J0, J01, J2, M0, M12, M5, O3, O31, O32, O36
papers.zh_title: 竞争性组织中的性别差异？来自产品开发平台实地实验的跨领域差异
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究（主要基于实验室实验）表明，女性可能比男性更厌恶竞争，并且可能更倾向于合作。如果这些发现能推广到整个劳动力市场的成年人，那么可能对组织设计和人事管理产生深远影响。我们报告了一项实地实验，其中邀请了来自广泛领域和年龄段的97,678名成年人参与一个产品开发机会。个体被随机分配到不同的处理组，这些处理组将机会描述为涉及与其他参与者的竞争性或合作性互动。在科学、技术、工程和数学领域之外的人群中，我们发现参与竞争的意愿存在显著的性别差异。在科学、技术、工程和数学领域的人群中，我们没有检测到统计上的性别差异。这些结果以及研究中记录更广泛的模式，与男性和女性在竞争性方面存在显著异质性一致，而领域和职业筛选导致了跨领域的性别差异。

papers.title: Air Pollution and Student Performance in the U.S.
papers.authors: Michael Gilraine, Angela Zheng
papers.abstract: We combine satellite-based pollution data and test scores from over 10,000 U.S. school districts to estimate the relationship between air pollution and test scores. To deal with potential endogeneity we instrument for air quality using (i) year-to-year coal production variation and (ii) a shift-share instrument that interacts fuel shares used for nearby power production with national growth rates. We find that each one-unit increase in particulate pollution reduces test scores by 0.02 standard deviations. Our findings indicate that declines in particulate pollution exposure raised test scores and reduced the black-white test score gap by 0.06 and 0.01 standard deviations, respectively.
papers.zh_title: 美国空气污染与学生表现
papers.zh_abstract: 我们结合基于卫星的污染数据和来自美国超过10,000个学区的考试成绩，来估计空气污染与考试成绩之间的关系。为了处理潜在的内生性问题，我们使用以下工具变量来衡量空气质量：(i) 年度煤炭产量变化，以及 (ii) 一个将附近电力生产的燃料份额与全国增长率相互作用的份额-转移工具变量。我们发现，颗粒物污染每增加一个单位，考试成绩就会降低0.02个标准差。我们的研究结果表明，颗粒物污染暴露的下降分别使考试成绩提高了0.06个标准差，并使黑人与白人之间的考试成绩差距缩小了0.01个标准差。

papers.title: Real Effects of Supplying Safe Private Money
papers.authors: Chenzi Xu, He Yang
papers.abstract: Privately issued money often bears devaluation risk that create monetary transaction frictions. We evaluate the real effects of supplying a new type of safe money in the historical context of the US in 1863. We instrument for the change in monetary frictions locally using regulatory capital requirements and measure the degree safe money access with a market access approach derived from general equilibrium trade theory. Lowering monetary transaction costs increased traded goods production and spurred structural transformation with more manufacturing output, employment, and urban population. The growth in manufacturing was driven by employment and inputs rather than capital investment.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, ITI, ME；JEL：E42, E44, E51, F14, G21, N11, N21
papers.zh_title: 提供安全私人货币的真实效应
papers.zh_abstract: 私人发行的货币通常带有贬值风险，这会产生货币交易摩擦。我们以1863年美国的历史背景为背景，评估了提供一种新型安全货币的真实效应。我们使用监管资本要求作为工具变量来衡量当地货币摩擦的变化，并采用源自一般均衡贸易理论的市场准入方法来衡量安全货币的可及性程度。降低货币交易成本增加了贸易品的生产，并推动了结构性转型，带来了更多的制造业产出、就业和城市人口。制造业的增长是由就业和投入驱动的，而非资本投资。

papers.title: Exorbitant Privilege Gained and Lost: Fiscal Implications
papers.authors: Zefeng Chen, Zhengyang Jiang, Hanno Lustig, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Mindy Z. Xiaolan
papers.abstract: We study three centuries of U.K. fiscal history. Before WW-I, when the U.K. dominated global bond markets, the U.K.’s government debt was not always fully backed by its future surpluses, even after accounting for the seigniorage revenue from convenience yields. As predicted by theories of safe asset determination, investors concentrate extra fiscal capacity in a single country, the global safe asset supplier, based on relative macro fundamentals, and its debt growth may temporarily outstrip what is warranted by its own macro fundamentals. After the relative deterioration in U.K. fundamentals, due to the run-up in debt during WW-I and WW-II, bond investors focused exclusively on the U.K’s own macro fundamentals. Since then the U.K. debt has been fully backed by surpluses.
papers.zh_title: 获得与失去的过高特权：财政影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了三个世纪的英国财政历史。在第一次世界大战之前，当英国主导全球债券市场时，英国政府债务并非总是完全由其未来盈余支持，即使在考虑了来自便利收益的铸币税收入之后也是如此。正如安全资产决定理论所预测的那样，投资者根据相对宏观基本面，将额外的财政能力集中在一个国家，即全球安全资产供应国，其债务增长可能暂时超过其自身宏观基本面所保证的水平。在第一次世界大战和第二次世界大战期间债务累积导致英国基本面相对恶化之后，债券投资者完全专注于英国自身的宏观基本面。自那时起，英国债务已完全由盈余支持。

papers.title: The Effects of Alcohol Excise Tax Increases by Drinking Level and by Income Level
papers.authors: Henry Saffer, Markus Gehrsitz, Michael Grossman
papers.abstract: The alcohol industry argues that alcohol excise taxes do not reduce heavy drinking because of substitutions to lower-cost products and that these taxes disproportionately burden low-income drinkers. Alternatively, some economists have argued that increases in alcohol excise taxes reduce heavy alcohol consumption. Using data from the Nielsen Homescan we investigate the effects of a large excise tax increase that raised alcohol prices. The results show that heavy drinkers reduce purchases, and this reduction is no different than the reductions by other drinkers. The results also show that only low-income drinkers pay more for ethanol after the tax increase.
papers.zh_title: 按饮酒水平和收入水平划分的酒精消费税上调效应
papers.zh_abstract: 酒精行业认为，由于消费者会转向低价产品，酒精消费税并不能减少重度饮酒，而且这些税种对低收入饮酒者造成了不成比例的负担。另一些经济学家则认为，提高酒精消费税能减少重度酒精消费。利用尼尔森家庭扫描数据，我们研究了一次大幅提高酒精价格的消费税上调的影响。结果显示，重度饮酒者减少了购买量，且减少幅度与其他饮酒者并无差异。结果还表明，只有低收入饮酒者在增税后为乙醇支付了更多费用。

papers.title: Inflation Past, Present and Future: Fiscal Shocks, Fed Response, and Fiscal Limits
papers.authors: John H. Cochrane
papers.abstract: Our current inflation stemmed from a fiscal shock. The Fed is slow to react. Why? Will the Fed's slow reaction spur more inflation? I write a simple model that encompasses the Fed's mild projections and its slow reaction, and traditional views that inflation will surge without swift rate rises. The key question is whether expectations are forward looking or backward looking. If expectations are forward looking, the Fed is right, and inflation will eventually fade without a period of high real interest rates. Price stickiness means inflation will persist past an initial shock. To reduce inflation, fiscal and monetary policy must be coordinated. Without fiscal contraction, an unpleasant arithmetic holds: The Fed can reduce inflation now, but only by increasing inflation later. If the Fed wishes to lower inflation durably via interest rate rises, those must come with fiscal support to pay higher costs on the debt and a windfall to bondholders. Coordinated fiscal, monetary and microeconomic reforms can, and have, swiftly eliminated inflation without the major recession of the early 1980s. Nonetheless, in the very long run, the central bank controls the price level.
papers.zh_title: 通胀的过去、现在与未来：财政冲击、美联储应对与财政极限
papers.zh_abstract: 我们当前的通货膨胀源于一次财政冲击。美联储反应迟缓。原因何在？美联储的缓慢反应是否会引发更多通胀？我构建了一个简单模型，该模型涵盖了美联储温和的预测及其缓慢的反应，以及认为若不迅速加息通胀将飙升的传统观点。关键问题在于预期是前瞻性的还是后顾性的。如果预期是前瞻性的，那么美联储就是正确的，通胀最终会消退，而无需经历一段高实际利率的时期。价格粘性意味着通胀会在初始冲击后持续存在。要降低通胀，财政政策和货币政策必须协调一致。如果没有财政紧缩，一种令人不快的算术就会成立：美联储现在可以降低通胀，但代价是未来通胀上升。如果美联储希望通过加息来持久地降低通胀，那么这些加息必须伴随财政支持，以支付更高的债务成本，并给债券持有人带来意外收益。协调一致的财政、货币和微观经济改革能够且已经迅速消除了通胀，而无需像1980年代初那样经历严重衰退。尽管如此，从长远来看，中央银行控制着价格水平。

papers.title: Individual Earnings and Family Income: Dynamics and Distribution
papers.authors: Joseph G. Altonji, Disa M. Hynsjö, Ivan Vidangos
papers.abstract: We review research on the dynamics and distribution of individual earnings and family income. We start with univariate earnings models, which dominate the literature and are often used as the exogenous component of family income in structural models of saving. We present a version of the linear model that nests most of the specifications that have been used in the literature, and then discuss recent papers that stress nonnormal shocks, nonlinear and age-dependent processes, and heterogeneous model parameters. The recent work provides a much richer description of the nature of earnings volatility than the basic model. We then turn to models of individual earnings that are based on wages, employment, job mobility, and hours. These multivariate models permit measuring the sources of permanent differences in earnings and distinguishing among shocks that influence earnings through employment, job mobility, general productivity, or hours. Finally, we consider models of lifetime family income that integrate individual earnings, marriage (accounting for marital sorting), and earnings of a spouse (if present). We conclude by discussing directions for future work.
papers.zh_title: 个人收入与家庭收入：动态与分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于个人收入和家庭收入动态与分布的研究。我们从单变量收入模型开始，该模型在文献中占主导地位，并常在储蓄结构模型中被用作家庭收入的外生组成部分。我们提出了一个线性模型的版本，该版本涵盖了文献中使用的大多数设定，然后讨论了近期强调非正态冲击、非线性和年龄依赖过程以及异质性模型参数的论文。与基本模型相比，近期工作提供了对收入波动性本质更为丰富的描述。接着，我们转向基于工资、就业、工作流动性和工时的个人收入模型。这些多变量模型能够衡量收入永久性差异的来源，并区分通过就业、工作流动性、一般生产率或工时影响收入的冲击。最后，我们考虑了整合个人收入、婚姻（考虑婚配分类）和配偶收入（如有）的终身家庭收入模型。我们通过讨论未来工作的方向来结束本文。

papers.title: Expectations Data in Structural Microeconomic Models
papers.authors: Gizem Koşar, Cormac O'Dea
papers.abstract: A growing literature uses now widely-available data on beliefs and expectations in the estimation of structural models. In this chapter, we review this literature, with an emphasis on models of individual and household behavior. We first show how expectations data have been used to relax strong assumptions about beliefs and outline how they can be used in estimation to substitute for, or as a complement to, data on choices. Next, we discuss the literature that uses different types of expectations data in the estimation of structural models. We conclude by noting directions for future research.
papers.zh_title: 结构微观经济模型中的预期数据
papers.zh_abstract: 越来越多的文献在估计结构模型时使用现已广泛可得的信念和预期数据。在本章中，我们回顾了这些文献，重点关注个人和家庭行为模型。我们首先展示了预期数据如何被用来放宽关于信念的强假设，并概述了如何在估计中使用它们来替代或补充选择数据。接下来，我们讨论了在结构模型估计中使用不同类型预期数据的文献。最后，我们指出了未来研究的方向。

papers.title: Center Pivot Irrigation Systems as a Form of Drought Risk Mitigation in Humid Regions
papers.authors: Daniel J. Cooley, Steven M. Smith
papers.abstract: Irrigation in the Eastern US receives little attention compared to the West, but farmers in humid states of the US, traditionally reliant on rainfall, have more than tripled irrigation since 1978. We examine this trend in Illinois where there has been a nearly threefold increase in center pivot irrigation systems (CPIS) installations since 1988. Specifically, we analyze where and when CPIS installations occur and their benefits in terms of annual crop yield, irrigated acreage, crop selection, and reduction in drought-related insurance payouts. To do so, we create a novel data set derived from a deep learning model capable of automatically identifying the location of CPIS during drought years along with annual county level crop, weather, and insurance data. The results indicate CPIS installations in Illinois are significantly more common over alluvial aquifers after droughts. Additionally, counties with a higher presence of CPIS do not have higher average crop yields, a shift to more water intensive crops, or an expansion of cropland. However, in drought years CPIS presence does have a significant positive effect on corn yield and a significant negative effect on indemnity payments for both soybeans and corn. The results provide insights into an emerging trend of irrigation in humid regions, raising potential policy considerations for crop insurance and signaling a potential need to address water rights as demand increases.
papers.zh_title: 中心支轴灌溉系统作为湿润地区干旱风险缓解的一种形式
papers.zh_abstract: 与西部相比，美国东部的灌溉问题很少受到关注，但传统上依赖降雨的美国湿润州农民自1978年以来已将灌溉面积增加了两倍多。我们在伊利诺伊州考察了这一趋势，自1988年以来，该州中心支轴灌溉系统的安装量增加了近三倍。具体而言，我们分析了中心支轴灌溉系统安装的地点和时间，以及它们在年度作物产量、灌溉面积、作物选择和减少与干旱相关的保险赔付方面的效益。为此，我们创建了一个新颖的数据集，该数据集源自一个深度学习模型，能够自动识别干旱年份中心支轴灌溉系统的位置，并结合了年度县级作物、天气和保险数据。结果表明，伊利诺伊州的中心支轴灌溉系统在干旱后于冲积含水层上显著更为常见。此外，中心支轴灌溉系统存在率较高的县，其平均作物产量并未更高，也未转向更耗水的作物或扩大耕地面积。然而，在干旱年份，中心支轴灌溉系统的存在确实对玉米产量有显著的正向影响，并对大豆和玉米的赔付金额有显著的负向影响。这些结果揭示了湿润地区灌溉的新兴趋势，为作物保险提出了潜在的政策考量，并表明随着需求增加，可能需要解决水权问题。

papers.title: Internal Disagreement and Disruptive Technologies
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper models the adoption by established firms of technologies that are internally disruptive in that different parts of an organization stand to lose or gain from adoption. When agents disagree with a decision they impose costs on the firm. The paper shows that any resistance to change this yields is necessarily accompanied by others aggrieved should change not occur. Thus, the firm cannot avoid disagreement costs regardless of whether they adopt the technology or not. In some cases, depending on their ability to impose costs, such firms may be more likely to adopt technologies as a result of internal disagreement.
papers.zh_title: 内部分歧与颠覆性技术
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对成熟企业采用那些在内部具有颠覆性的技术进行了建模，这种颠覆性体现在组织的不同部门会因采用该技术而受损或获益。当代理人不同意某项决策时，他们会给企业带来成本。本文表明，由此产生的任何变革阻力都必然伴随着如果变革不发生则其他方会感到不满。因此，无论企业是否采用该技术，都无法避免分歧成本。在某些情况下，取决于代理人施加成本的能力，这类企业可能因内部分歧而更有可能采用技术。

papers.title: A Theory of Visionary Disruption
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: Exploitation of disruptive technologies often requires resource deployment that creates conflict if there are divergent beliefs regarding the efficacy of a new technology. This arises when a visionary agent has more optimistic beliefs about a technological opportunity. Exploration in the form of experiments can be persuasive when beliefs differ by mitigating disagreement and its costs. This paper examines experimental choice when experiments need to persuade as well as inform. It is shown that, due to resource constraints, persuasion factors more highly for entrepreneurial than incumbent firms. However, incumbent firms, despite being able to redeploy resources using authority, are constrained in adoption as exploration cannot mitigate the costs of disagreement
papers.zh_title: 愿景式颠覆理论
papers.zh_abstract: 颠覆性技术的利用通常需要资源部署，如果对新技术的有效性存在不同信念，就会产生冲突。当一位有远见的代理人对技术机会持有更乐观的信念时，这种情况就会出现。当信念不同时，以实验形式进行的探索可以通过减少分歧及其成本而具有说服力。本文考察了当实验需要既说服又告知时的实验选择。研究表明，由于资源约束，说服因素对创业企业比对在位企业更为重要。然而，尽管在位企业能够利用权威重新部署资源，但它们在采用方面受到限制，因为探索无法减轻分歧的成本。

papers.title: The Effects of Public Housing on Children: Evidence from Colombia
papers.authors: Adriana Camacho, Valentina Duque, Michael Gilraine, Fabio Sanchez
papers.abstract: We analyze the effect of Colombia's ambitious "Free Housing" program on children's educational outcomes. The program was generous, giving free housing to beneficiaries in desirable areas. We evaluate the program by leveraging housing lotteries and linking applicants to their children. We find that public housing increases high school graduation by seven percentage points – a seventeen percent increase relative to the control mean – and boosts exit exam scores and college-going. Using a survey to explore mechanisms, lottery winners report better environmental conditions and shorter commute times. Their children also attend better schools and live in neighborhoods with less crime.
papers.zh_title: 公共住房对儿童的影响：来自哥伦比亚的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了哥伦比亚雄心勃勃的“免费住房”项目对儿童教育成果的影响。该项目十分慷慨，向理想地区的受益者免费提供住房。我们通过利用住房抽签并将申请者与其子女关联来评估该项目。我们发现，公共住房使高中毕业率提高了七个百分点——相对于对照组均值增加了百分之十七——并提高了毕业考试分数和大学入学率。通过一项调查来探索机制，抽签获胜者报告了更好的环境条件和更短的通勤时间。他们的子女也就读于更好的学校，并居住在犯罪率较低的社区。

papers.title: The Rest of the World’s Dollar-Weighted Return on U.S. Treasurys
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Hanno Lustig
papers.abstract: Since 1980, foreign investors have timed their purchases and sales of U.S. Treasurys to yield particularly low returns. Their annual “dollar-weighted” returns, measured by the internal rate of return on their purchases and sales of Treasury bonds, are over 3.26 percentage points (pp) lower than a buy-and-hold strategy over the same horizon. Their returns are 1.62 pp lower than the returns earned by domestic investors. We also explore the heterogeneity across foreign investors, and find that official investors and developing country investors underperform more than other foreign investors. Our results are consistent with theories in which foreign investors are price-inelastic buyers of safe dollar assets, and increase their demand for dollar assets in stress periods.
papers.zh_title: 世界其他地区对美国国债的美元加权回报率
papers.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，外国投资者通过择时买卖美国国债，获得了异常低的回报。以他们买卖美国国债的内部收益率衡量的年度“美元加权”回报率，比同期买入并持有策略的回报率低3.26个百分点以上。他们的回报率比国内投资者的回报率低1.62个百分点。我们还探讨了外国投资者之间的异质性，发现官方投资者和发展中国家投资者的表现比其他外国投资者更差。我们的结果与以下理论一致：外国投资者是安全美元资产的价格无弹性买家，并且在压力时期会增加对美元资产的需求。

papers.title: Grads on the Go: Measuring College-Specific Labor Markets for Graduates
papers.authors: Johnathan G. Conzelmann, Steven W. Hemelt, Brad Hershbein, Shawn M. Martin, Andrew Simon, Kevin M. Stange
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a new measure of the labor markets served by colleges and universities across the United States. About 50 percent of recent college graduates are living and working in the metro area nearest the institution they attended, with this figure climbing to 67 percent in-state. The geographic dispersion of alumni is more than twice as great for highly selective 4-year institutions as for 2-year institutions. However, more than one-quarter of 2-year institutions disperse alumni more diversely than the average public 4-year institution. In one application of these data, we find that the average strength of the labor market to which a college sends its graduates predicts college-specific intergenerational economic mobility. In a second application, we quantify the extent of “brain drain” across areas and illustrate the importance of considering migration patterns of college graduates when estimating the social return on public investment in higher education.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H41, I23, J24, J61
papers.zh_title: 流动的毕业生：衡量大学特定毕业生劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了一种衡量美国各学院和大学所服务劳动力市场的新指标。大约50%的近期大学毕业生生活和工作在其就读院校最近的大都市区，这一数字在州内上升到67%。对于高度选择性的四年制院校，其校友的地理分布广度是两年制院校的两倍以上。然而，超过四分之一的两年制院校的校友分布比普通公立四年制院校更加多样化。在这些数据的一个应用中，我们发现大学毕业生所进入的劳动力市场的平均强度可以预测该大学特有的代际经济流动性。在第二个应用中，我们量化了各地区“人才流失”的程度，并说明了在估算高等教育公共投资的社会回报时考虑大学毕业生迁移模式的重要性。

papers.title: Who Holds Sovereign Debt and Why It Matters
papers.authors: Xiang Fang, Bryan Hardy, Karen K. Lewis
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impact of investor composition on the sovereign debt market. We construct a data set of sovereign debt holdings by foreign and domestic bank, non-bank private, and official investors for 101 countries across three decades. Private non-bank investors absorb disproportionately more debt supply than others. Moreover, non-bank investors’ demand for emerging market debt is most responsive to its price. Counterfactual analysis of emerging market sovereigns shows a 10% increase in debt leads to a 5.8% yield increase, but an out-sized 8.4% increase without non-bank investors. We conclude that sovereigns are vulnerable to the loss of non-bank investors.
papers.zh_title: 谁持有主权债务及其重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了投资者构成对主权债务市场的影响。我们构建了一个涵盖101个国家、跨越三十年的主权债务持有数据集，包括外国和国内银行、非银行私人投资者以及官方投资者。私人非银行投资者吸收的债务供应比例高于其他投资者。此外，非银行投资者对新兴市场债务的需求对价格最为敏感。对新兴市场主权国家进行的反事实分析表明，债务增加10%会导致收益率上升5.8%，但如果没有非银行投资者，收益率将大幅上升8.4%。我们得出结论，主权国家容易因失去非银行投资者而变得脆弱。

papers.title: Did the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act Reduce Profit Shifting by US Multinational Companies?
papers.authors: Javier Garcia-Bernardo, Petr Janský, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: The 2017 Tax Cut and Jobs Act reduced the US corporate tax rate and introduced provisions to curb profit shifting. We combine survey data, tax data, and firm financial statements to study the evolution of the geographical allocation of US firms’ profits after the reform. The share of profits booked abroad by US multinationals fell 3–5 percentage points, driven by repatriations of intellectual property to the US. The share of foreign profits booked in tax havens remained stable around 50% between 2015 and 2020. Changes in the global allocation of profits are small overall, but some firms responded strongly.
papers.zh_title: 《减税与就业法案》是否减少了美国跨国公司的利润转移？
papers.zh_abstract: 2017年的《减税与就业法案》降低了美国公司税率，并引入了遏制利润转移的条款。我们结合调查数据、税收数据和公司财务报表，研究了改革后美国公司利润地理分配的演变。美国跨国公司海外入账利润的份额下降了3-5个百分点，这主要是由知识产权回流美国所驱动的。2015年至2020年间，海外利润在避税天堂入账的份额保持稳定，约为50%。全球利润分配的整体变化较小，但一些公司反应强烈。

papers.title: New Schools and New Classmates: The Disruption and Peer Group Effects of School Reassignment
papers.authors: Darryl V. Hill, Rodney P. Hughes, Matthew A. Lenard, David D. Liebowitz, Lindsay C. Page
papers.abstract: Policy makers periodically consider using student assignment policies to improve educational outcomes by altering the socio-economic and academic skill composition of schools. We exploit the quasi-random reassignment of students across schools in the Wake County Public School System to estimate the academic and behavioral effects of being reassigned to a different school and, separately, of shifts in peer characteristics. We rule out all but substantively small effects of transitioning to a different school as a result of reassignment on test scores, course grades and chronic absenteeism. In contrast, increasing the achievement levels of students' peers improves students' math and ELA test scores but harms their ELA course grades. Test score benefits accrue primarily to students from higher-income families, though students with lower family income or lower prior performance still benefit. Our results suggest that student assignment policies that relocate students to avoid the over-concentration of lower-achieving students or those from lower-income families can accomplish equity goals (despite important caveats), although these reassignments may reduce achievement for students from higher- income backgrounds.
papers.zh_title: 新学校与新同学：学校重新分配的中断效应与同伴群体效应
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者会定期考虑使用学生分配政策，通过改变学校的社会经济和学业技能构成来改善教育成果。我们利用维克县公立学校系统中学生跨学校的准随机重新分配，来估计被重新分配到不同学校以及同伴特征变化所带来的学业和行为影响。我们排除了因重新分配而转学对考试成绩、课程成绩和长期缺勤率产生的实质性影响，仅发现其影响微乎其微。相比之下，提高学生同伴的学业水平会提高学生的数学和英语语言艺术考试成绩，但会损害他们的英语语言艺术课程成绩。考试成绩的收益主要来自高收入家庭的学生，尽管家庭收入较低或先前表现较差的学生仍然受益。我们的结果表明，旨在通过重新安置学生以避免低学业成就学生或低收入家庭学生过度集中的学生分配政策，可以实现公平目标（尽管存在重要限制），尽管这些重新分配可能会降低高收入背景学生的学业成就。

papers.title: Causal Inference During a Pandemic: Evidence on the Effectiveness of Nebulized Ibuprofen as an Unproven Treatment for COVID-19 in Argentina
papers.authors: Sebastian Calonico, Rafael Di Tella, Juan Cruz Lopez Del Valle
papers.abstract: Many medical decisions during the pandemic were made without the support of causal evidence obtained in clinical trials. We study the case of nebulized ibuprofen (NaIHS), a drug that was extensively used on COVID-19 patients in Argentina amidst wild claims about its effectiveness and without regulatory approval. We study data on 5,146 patients hospitalized in 11 health centers spread over 4 provinces, of which a total of 1,019 (19.8%) received the treatment. We find a large, negative and statistically significant correlation between NaIHS treatment and mortality using inverse probability weighting estimators. We consider several threats to identification, including the selection of “low” risks into NaIHS, spillovers affecting patients in the control group, and differences in the quality of care in centers that use NaIHS. While the negative correlation appears to be, broadly, robust, our results are best interpreted as emphasizing the benefits of running a randomized controlled trial and the challenges of incorporating information produced in other, less rigorous circumstances.
papers.zh_title: 大流行期间的因果推断：阿根廷雾化布洛芬作为未经证实的COVID-19治疗方法的有效性证据
papers.zh_abstract: 大流行期间的许多医疗决策都是在没有临床试验因果证据支持的情况下做出的。我们研究了雾化布洛芬（NaIHS）的案例，这种药物在阿根廷被广泛用于COVID-19患者，尽管其有效性被夸大且未经监管批准。我们研究了分布在4个省份的11个医疗中心住院的5,146名患者的数据，其中共有1,019名（19.8%）接受了该治疗。使用逆概率加权估计量，我们发现NaIHS治疗与死亡率之间存在较大、负向且统计上显著的相关性。我们考虑了识别中的几个威胁，包括“低风险”患者被选择接受NaIHS治疗、对对照组患者的溢出效应，以及使用NaIHS的医疗中心护理质量的差异。虽然负相关性似乎大体上是稳健的，但我们的结果最好被解释为强调了进行随机对照试验的好处，以及整合其他不太严格情况下产生的信息所面临的挑战。

papers.title: Robbing Peter to Pay Paul? The Redistribution of Wealth Caused by Rent Control
papers.authors: Kenneth R. Ahern, Marco Giacoletti
papers.abstract: We use the price effects caused by the passage of rent control in St. Paul, Minnesota in 2021, to study the transfer of wealth across income groups. First, we find that rent control caused property values to fall by 6-7%, for an aggregate loss of $1.6 billion. A calibrated model of house prices under rent control attributes a third of these losses to indirect, negative externalities. Second, leveraging administrative parcel-level data, we find that the tenants who gained the most from rent control had higher incomes and were more likely to be white, while the owners who lost the most had lower incomes and were more likely to be minorities. For properties with high-income owners and low-income tenants, the transfer of wealth was close to zero. Thus, to the extent that rent control is intended to transfer wealth from high-income to low-income households, the realized impact of the law was the opposite of its intention.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, LS, PE；JEL：D61, D62, G51, H23, R23, R31, R32, R38
papers.zh_title: 拆东墙补西墙？租金管制导致的财富再分配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2021年明尼苏达州圣保罗市通过租金管制所引起的价格效应，来研究不同收入群体之间的财富转移。首先，我们发现租金管制导致房产价值下降6-7%，总损失达16亿美元。一个校准的租金管制下房价模型将其中三分之一的损失归因于间接的负外部性。其次，利用行政地块层面的数据，我们发现从租金管制中获益最多的租户收入更高且更可能是白人，而损失最大的业主收入更低且更可能是少数族裔。对于高收入业主和低收入租户的房产，财富转移接近于零。因此，就租金管制旨在将财富从高收入家庭转移到低收入家庭而言，该法律的实际影响与其初衷相反。

papers.title: Decarbonization and Electrification in the Long Run
papers.authors: Stephen P. Holland, Erin T. Mansur, Andrew J. Yates
papers.abstract: Decarbonization and electrification will require a transformed electricity grid. Our long-run model of entry and exit of generation and storage capacity captures crucial aspects of the electricity industry such as time-varying demand for electricity, intermittency of renewables, and intertemporal optimization of storage. We derive several theoretical possibilities that differ in surprising ways from short-run intuition: A carbon tax can increase electricity consumption; cheaper storage can decrease renewable capacity; cheaper renewables can increase carbon emissions; and an increase in electricity demand (e.g., electrification) can decrease emissions. We calibrate the model using 2019 hourly data on demand and renewable availability for thirteen regions covering the contiguous U.S. A carbon price of $150 or more essentially eliminates carbon emissions. Given a modest decarbonization goal, a renewable subsidy performs better than a nuclear subsidy, but this ranking is reversed for an ambitious decarbonization goal. Transmission expansion yields large emissions reductions if renewable costs fall sufficiently, but policies promoting storage are unlikely to yield significant benefits. Electrifying 100% of car miles traveled (thereby eliminating gasoline vehicle carbon emissions) increases electricity-sector carbon emissions by 23-27% if vehicles are charged at night, but could decrease electricity-sector carbon emissions if vehicles are charged during the day.
papers.zh_title: 长期脱碳与电气化
papers.zh_abstract: 脱碳和电气化将需要一个转型后的电网。我们的发电和储能容量进入与退出的长期模型，捕捉了电力行业的关键方面，如电力需求的时变特性、可再生能源的间歇性以及储能的跨期优化。我们推导出几种与短期直觉截然不同的理论可能性：碳税可以增加电力消费；更便宜的储能可以减少可再生能源容量；更便宜的可再生能源可以增加碳排放；电力需求增加（例如电气化）可以减少排放。我们使用2019年美国本土13个地区的需求和可再生能源可用性的每小时数据对模型进行了校准。150美元或更高的碳价基本上可以消除碳排放。在适度的脱碳目标下，可再生能源补贴的表现优于核能补贴，但在雄心勃勃的脱碳目标下，这一排名会逆转。如果可再生能源成本充分下降，输电扩张将带来巨大的减排效果，但促进储能政策不太可能带来显著收益。如果车辆在夜间充电，将100%的汽车行驶里程电气化（从而消除汽油车碳排放）会使电力部门的碳排放增加23-27%，但如果车辆在白天充电，则可能减少电力部门的碳排放。

papers.title: Creating American Farmland: Governance Institutions and Investment in Agricultural Drainage
papers.authors: Eric C. Edwards, Walter N. Thurman
papers.abstract: The U.S. Corn Belt, relatively flat and covered with thick glacial soils, is famously responsible for the bulk of U.S. corn production. Development of this central part of the continent came with remarkable technical progress—in seed varieties, mechanization, fertilization, and pest control. Little of this development could have occurred without decades of investment in farmland itself, through the methodical application of drainage. We trace the economic forces that drove wide-scale drainage in the eastern United States and present empirical evidence that a key institutional innovation, the drainage management district, facilitated investment. Today, over 50% of corn produced in the Corn Belt comes from counties with high natural soil wetness requiring artificial drainage. States in our sample adopted drainage district laws between 1857 and 1912, and we estimate artificial drainage facilitated by management districts across all eastern states increased the value of agricultural land in counties with high natural soil wetness by 20-37% ($16.8-18.7 billion in 2020 dollars). Although the broader implications of drainage were largely unforeseen at the time, the conversion led to the loss of more than half of the 215 million acres of wetlands estimated to have existed in the contiguous United States at colonization.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE；JEL：N51, N52, Q1, Q15, Q54
papers.zh_title: 创造美国农田：治理制度与农业排水投资
papers.zh_abstract: 美国玉米带地势相对平坦，覆盖着厚厚的冰川土壤，以生产美国大部分玉米而闻名。北美大陆这一中心地带的发展伴随着显著的技术进步——在种子品种、机械化、施肥和病虫害防治方面。然而，如果没有通过系统性的排水工程对农田本身进行数十年的投资，这些发展几乎不可能实现。我们追溯了推动美国东部大规模排水的经济力量，并提供了实证证据，表明一项关键的制度创新——排水管理区——促进了投资。如今，玉米带生产的玉米中，超过50%来自天然土壤湿度高、需要人工排水的县。在我们的样本中，各州在1857年至1912年间通过了排水区法律。我们估计，由管理区推动的人工排水使所有东部各州中天然土壤湿度高的县的农业用地价值提高了20-37%（按2020年美元计算，相当于168-187亿美元）。尽管当时排水更广泛的影响在很大程度上未被预见，但这种转变导致美国本土在殖民时期估计存在的2.15亿英亩湿地中，超过一半已经消失。

papers.title: Producer Beliefs and Conservation: The Impact of Perceived Water Scarcity on Irrigation Technology Adoption
papers.authors: Joey Blumberg, Chris Goemans, Dale Manning
papers.abstract: Agricultural producers make investment decisions based on beliefs about future returns. This article investigates how changes in beliefs about input availability affects the adoption of conservation practices. We develop a theoretical model to examine how a producer's beliefs about water shortages influence investment in more efficient irrigation technologies. We then use publicly available data on water rights and irrigated cropland to empirically identify the impact of changing beliefs about water availability on conservation decisions. We leverage a natural experiment in Colorado in which a period of severe drought and institutional change in the early 2000s led to an exogenous shock to expectations for some water right holders. We estimate that producers who experience unprecedented increases in the curtailment of their water right convert 11% more land to a more efficient irrigation technology on average. We also present evidence that adoption rates are driven more by changes in surface water availability than groundwater. This analysis provides useful insight into the role of beliefs in incentivizing adaptation to increasing water scarcity in irrigated agriculture.
papers.zh_title: 生产者的信念与保护：感知到的水资源短缺对灌溉技术采用的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 农业生产者基于对未来回报的信念做出投资决策。本文研究了关于投入品可用性的信念变化如何影响保护措施的采用。我们构建了一个理论模型来考察生产者对水资源短缺的信念如何影响对更高效灌溉技术的投资。然后，我们利用关于水权和灌溉农田的公开数据，从实证上识别了关于水资源可用性的信念变化对保护决策的影响。我们利用了科罗拉多州的一个自然实验，在该实验中，21世纪初的一段严重干旱和制度变化导致了一些水权持有者预期的外生冲击。我们估计，那些经历了前所未有的水权削减的生产者，平均将11%的土地转换为更高效的灌溉技术。我们还提供了证据表明，采用率更多地受到地表水可用性变化而非地下水的驱动。这项分析为信念在激励灌溉农业适应日益严重的水资源短缺方面的作用提供了有用的见解。

papers.title: The Political Effects of Immigration: Culture or Economics?
papers.authors: Alberto Alesina, Marco Tabellini
papers.abstract: We review the growing literature on the political economy of immigration. First, we discuss the effects of immigration on a wide range of political and social outcomes. The existing evidence suggests that immigrants often, but not always, trigger backlash, increasing support for anti-immigrant parties and lowering preferences for redistribution and diversity among natives. Next, we unpack the channels behind the political effects of immigration, distinguishing between economic and non-economic forces. In examining the mechanisms, we highlight important mediating factors, such as misperceptions, the media, and the conditions under which inter-group contact occurs. We also outline promising avenues for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, J15, J61, Z1
papers.zh_title: 移民的政治效应：文化还是经济？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于移民政治经济学日益增长的文献。首先，我们讨论了移民对广泛政治和社会结果的影响。现有证据表明，移民常常（但并非总是）引发反弹，增加对反移民政党的支持，并降低本地人对再分配和多样性的偏好。接下来，我们剖析了移民政治效应背后的渠道，区分了经济和非经济力量。在考察机制时，我们强调了重要的中介因素，例如误解、媒体以及群体间接触发生的条件。我们还概述了未来研究的有前景方向。

papers.title: The “College Gap” in Marriage and Children’s Family Structure
papers.authors: Melissa Schettini Kearney
papers.abstract: The share of children living in a two-parent family has declined sharply in the past 40 years, driven by a decline in marriage among parents without a four-year college degree. This paper presents a number of facts about these trends, drawing on US Census data, the Current Population Survey, the Survey of Income and Program Participation, and US vital statistics birth data. First, there is a large gap in the share of children living with married parents (or two parents) that favors the children of college-educated mothers, both overall and within race and ethnic groups. Second, the decline in the share of children living in married parent families primarily reflects an increase in non-marital childbearing, not a rise in divorce. Third, the widening college gap in children’s family structure corresponds to a widening college gap in marriage rates, both overall and within race and ethnic groups. The paper briefly discusses evidence suggesting a causal link between the eroding economic position of men without a four-year college degree and their declining marriage rates. Fourth, the rise in the share of children living with an unpartnered mother has happened despite a sizable decrease in births to teens, women in their 20s, and women with less than a high school degree. Fifth, the college gap in family structure has contributed to the widening college gap in household income, accentuating widening earnings inequality. These trends have the potential to exacerbate class gaps in children’s outcomes and undermine social mobility.
papers.zh_title: 婚姻与子女家庭结构中的“大学差距”
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去40年里，生活在双亲家庭中的儿童比例急剧下降，这主要是由没有四年制大学学位的父母之间婚姻减少所驱动的。本文利用美国人口普查数据、当前人口调查、收入与项目参与调查以及美国生命统计出生数据，呈现了关于这些趋势的一系列事实。首先，在子女与已婚父母（或双亲）同住的比例上，存在巨大的差距，有利于受过大学教育的母亲的子女，无论是在总体上还是在种族和族裔群体内部都是如此。其次，与已婚父母同住的儿童比例下降，主要反映的是非婚生育的增加，而非离婚率的上升。第三，子女家庭结构中不断扩大的大学差距，与婚姻率中不断扩大的大学差距相对应，无论是在总体上还是在种族和族裔群体内部都是如此。本文简要讨论了表明没有四年制大学学位的男性经济地位下降与其婚姻率下降之间存在因果联系的证据。第四，尽管青少年、20多岁女性以及高中以下学历女性的生育率大幅下降，但与单身母亲同住的儿童比例仍在上升。第五，家庭结构中的大学差距导致了家庭收入中大学差距的扩大，加剧了不断扩大的收入不平等。这些趋势有可能加剧儿童成长结果的阶级差距，并削弱社会流动性。

papers.title: Creative Destruction? Impact of E-Commerce on the Retail Sector
papers.authors: Sudheer Chava, Alexander Oettl, Manpreet Singh, Linghang Zeng
papers.abstract: Using an administrative payroll dataset for 2.6 million retail workers, we find that the staggered rollout of a major e-commerce firm's fulfillment centers reduces traditional retail workers' income in geographically proximate counties by 2.4%. Wages of hourly workers, especially part-time hourly workers, decrease significantly, driven by a drop in the number of hours worked. We observe a U-shaped pattern in which both young and old workers experience a sharper decrease in wage income. Consequently, some workers experience an increase in credit card delinquency. Using data for 3.2 million stores, we find that sales (employment) at proximate stores decrease by 4% (2.1%). Exits, especially of young and small stores, increase, and entry decreases. In aggregate, the retail sector loses 938 jobs per county per quarter, and the transportation-warehousing sector (food services sector) gains 256 (143) jobs. Our results highlight how creative destruction led by e-commerce impacts local labor markets.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LS, PR；JEL：J30, L81, O33
papers.zh_title: 创造性破坏？电子商务对零售业的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用涵盖260万零售业工人的行政工资数据集，我们发现，一家大型电子商务公司的配送中心分阶段投入使用，使地理邻近县的传统零售业工人收入下降了2.4%。小时工，尤其是兼职小时工的工资显著下降，这是由工作小时数减少所驱动的。我们观察到一种U型模式，即年轻和年长工人的工资收入下降幅度都更大。因此，一些工人的信用卡逾期率有所上升。利用320万家商店的数据，我们发现邻近商店的销售额（就业）下降了4%（2.1%）。商店退出，尤其是年轻和小型商店的退出增加，而进入减少。总体而言，零售业每个县每季度损失938个工作岗位，而运输仓储业（食品服务业）增加了256个（143个）工作岗位。我们的结果突显了电子商务引领的创造性破坏如何影响地方劳动力市场。

papers.title: A Penny for Your Thoughts
papers.authors: W. Walker Hanlon, Stephan Heblich, Ferdinando Monte, Martin B. Schmitz
papers.abstract: How do communication costs affect the production of new ideas and inventions? To answer this question, we study the introduction of the Uniform Penny Post in Great Britain in 1840. This reform replaced the previous system of expensive distance-based postage fees with a uniform low rate of one penny for sending letters anywhere in the country. The result was a large spatially-varied reduction in the cost of communicating across locations. We study the impact of this reform on the production of scientific knowledge using citation links constructed from a leading academic journal, the Philosophical Transactions, and the impact on the development of new technology using patent data. Our results provide quantitative causal estimates showing how a fall in communication costs can increase the rate at which scientific knowledge is exchanged and new ideas and technologies are developed. This evidence lends direct empirical support to an extensive theoretical literature in economic growth and urban economics positing that more ideas can emerge from communication between individuals.
papers.zh_title: 一分钱换你的想法
papers.zh_abstract: 沟通成本如何影响新思想和发明的产生？为了回答这个问题，我们研究了1840年英国引入的“统一便士邮政”。这项改革取代了之前昂贵的按距离收费的邮资制度，改为在全国范围内寄信统一收取一便士的低廉费用。其结果是，跨地点沟通成本出现了巨大的空间差异性的降低。我们利用一份领先学术期刊《哲学汇刊》构建的引文链接，研究了这项改革对科学知识生产的影响，并利用专利数据研究了其对新技术发展的影响。我们的结果提供了定量的因果估计，表明沟通成本的下降如何能够提高科学知识交流以及新思想和技术开发的速率。这一证据为经济增长和城市经济学中一个广泛的理论文献提供了直接的经验支持，该理论认为更多的思想可以源于个体之间的沟通。

papers.title: Boundary Discontinuity Methods and Policy Spillovers
papers.authors: Ekaterina S. Jardim, Mark C. Long, Robert Plotnick, Emma van Inwegen, Jacob L. Vigdor, Hilary Wething
papers.abstract: The boundary discontinuity method of causal inference may yield misleading results if a policy’s impacts do not stop at the border of the implementing jurisdiction. We use geographically precise longitudinal employment data documenting worker job-to-job mobility to study policy spillovers in the context of three local minimum wage increases. Estimated spillover impacts on wages and hours are statistically significant, geographically diffuse, and sufficient to create concern regarding interpretation of results even using not-immediately-adjacent regions as controls. Spillover effects appear less concerning with smaller interventions or those or adopted in a smaller jurisdiction.
papers.zh_title: 边界不连续方法与政策溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 如果一项政策的影响并未止步于实施辖区的边界，那么因果推断的边界不连续方法可能会产生误导性结果。我们利用记录工人工作间流动的地理精确纵向就业数据，以三次地方最低工资上涨为背景，研究了政策溢出效应。估计出的对工资和工作时间的溢出影响在统计上显著、在地理上分散，并且足以引起对即使使用非直接相邻区域作为对照的结果解释的担忧。对于规模较小的干预措施或在较小辖区实施的干预措施，溢出效应似乎不那么令人担忧。

papers.title: The Labor Market Impacts of Technological Change: From Unbridled Enthusiasm to Qualified Optimism to Vast Uncertainty
papers.authors: David Autor
papers.abstract: This review considers the evolution of economic thinking on the relationship between digital technology and inequality across four decades, encompassing four related but intellectually distinct paradigms, which I refer to as the education race, the task polarization model, the automation-reinstatement race, and the era of Artificial Intelligence uncertainty. The nuance of economic understanding has improved across these epochs. Yet, traditional economic optimism about the beneficent effects of technology for productivity and welfare has eroded as understanding has advanced. Given this intellectual trajectory, it would be natural to forecast an even darker horizon ahead. I refrain from doing so because forecasting the “consequences” of technological change treats the future as a fate to be divined rather than an expedition to be undertaken. I conclude by discussing opportunities and challenges that we collectively face in shaping this future.
papers.zh_title: 技术变革的劳动力市场影响：从盲目乐观到审慎乐观再到巨大不确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 本综述考察了四十年来关于数字技术与不平等之间关系的经济思想的演变，涵盖了四个相关但智力上不同的范式，我称之为教育竞赛、任务极化模型、自动化与重新安置竞赛以及人工智能不确定性时代。在这些时期，经济理解的细微之处有所提高。然而，随着理解的深入，传统上关于技术对生产率和福利有益影响的经济乐观情绪已经减弱。鉴于这种智力轨迹，预测未来更加暗淡的前景是自然的。我避免这样做，因为预测技术变革的“后果”是将未来视为需要占卜的命运，而不是需要进行的远征。最后，我讨论了我们在塑造这一未来时共同面临的机遇和挑战。

papers.title: The Endowment Effect and Collateralized Loans
papers.authors: Kevin Carney, Michael Kremer, Xinyue Lin, Gautam Rao
papers.abstract: Collateral requirements play an important role in credit markets. This paper shows that the endowment effect—the phenomenon where owing a good increases one's valuation of it—inhibits demand for loans which use a borrower's existing assets as collateral. Using a field experiment in Kenya, we show that borrowers instead strongly prefer loans collateralized using the new durable assets being financed by the loans themselves. They are willing to pay 9% per month higher interest for such Same-Asset Collateralized Loans (SACLs) despite the endowed and new assets being randomized, and thus similarly valued before ownership. Our findings imply that assets which are difficult to use as collateral—which cannot be financed by SACLs—will be invested in less, even if the borrower has other collateral. We argue that borrowers' preference for SACLs is driven by naivete: they initially perceive that they have little to lose when offered a SACL, but subsequently come to develop an attachment to the new asset, resulting in high repayment effort. Consistent with this, borrowers underestimate their future attachment to an asset before owning it, and SACLs do not have higher default rates despite having higher demand. We derive the conditions under which offering consumers SACLs increases or conversely decreases borrower welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV；JEL：D14, D25, D9, D91, D92, O1, O16
papers.zh_title: 禀赋效应与抵押贷款
papers.zh_abstract: 抵押品要求在信贷市场中扮演着重要角色。本文表明，禀赋效应——即拥有某物品会提高对其估值——抑制了以借款人现有资产作为抵押品的贷款需求。通过在肯尼亚进行的一项实地实验，我们发现借款人反而强烈偏好以贷款本身所融资的新耐用资产作为抵押品的贷款。尽管被赋予的资产和新资产是随机分配的，因此在所有权之前估值相似，但借款人仍愿意为这种“同资产抵押贷款”（SACL）每月多支付9%的利息。我们的研究结果表明，难以用作抵押品的资产——即无法通过SACL融资的资产——将减少投资，即使借款人拥有其他抵押品。我们认为，借款人对SACL的偏好是由天真驱动的：他们最初认为在获得SACL时几乎没有什么可损失的，但随后逐渐对新资产产生依恋，从而导致较高的还款努力。与此一致的是，借款人在拥有资产之前低估了自己未来的依恋程度，并且尽管SACL需求更高，但其违约率并未更高。我们推导出了向消费者提供SACL会增加或反而降低借款人福利的条件。

papers.title: (Co-)Working in Close Proximity: Knowledge Spillovers and Social Interactions
papers.authors: Maria P. Roche, Alexander Oettl, Christian Catalini
papers.abstract: We examine the influence of physical proximity on between-startup knowledge spillovers at one of the largest technology co-working hubs in the United States. Relying on the random assignment of office space to the hub's 251 startups, we find that proximity positively influences knowledge spillovers as proxied by the likelihood of adopting an upstream web technology already used by a peer startup. This effect is largest for startups within close proximity of each other and quickly decays: startups more than 20 meters apart on the same floor are indistinguishable from startups on different floors. The main driver of the effect appears to be social interactions. While startups in close proximity are most likely to participate in social co-working space events together, knowledge spillovers are greatest between startups that socialize but are dissimilar. Ultimately, startups that are embedded in environments that have neither too much nor too little diversity perform better, but only if they socialize.
papers.zh_title: 近距离（共）同工作：知识溢出与社交互动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了物理距离对美国最大科技共享办公空间之一内初创企业间知识溢出的影响。基于该空间内251家初创企业办公空间的随机分配，我们发现，物理距离正向影响知识溢出，其代理指标是采用同行初创企业已使用的上游网络技术的可能性。这种效应在彼此距离很近的初创企业中最大，并迅速衰减：同一楼层相距超过20米的初创企业与不同楼层的初创企业之间没有区别。该效应的主要驱动因素似乎是社交互动。虽然距离很近的初创企业最有可能一起参加共享办公空间的社交活动，但知识溢出在那些进行社交但彼此不相似的初创企业之间最大。最终，嵌入在既不过度多样化也不过度同质化环境中的初创企业表现更好，但这仅当它们进行社交时才成立。

papers.title: Globalization, Fertility and Marital Behavior in a Lowest-Low Fertility Setting
papers.authors: Osea Giuntella, Lorenzo Rotunno, Luca Stella
papers.abstract: Using longitudinal data from the German Socio-Economic Panel, we analyze the effects of exposure to globalization on the fertility and marital behavior in Germany, until recently a lowest-low fertility setting. We find that exposure to greater import competition from Eastern Europe led to worse labor market outcomes and lower fertility rates. In contrast, workers in industries that benefited from increased exports had better employment prospects and higher fertility. These effects are driven by low-educated, married men, and full-time workers and reflect changes in the likelihood of having any child (extensive margin). While there is evidence of some fertility postponement, we find significant effects on completed fertility. There is instead little evidence of any significant impact on marital behavior.
papers.zh_title: 全球化、生育行为与婚姻行为：基于极低生育率环境的研究
papers.zh_abstract: 利用德国社会经济面板数据的纵向追踪，我们分析了全球化暴露对德国生育与婚姻行为的影响——直至近期，德国仍处于极低生育率环境。研究发现，东欧进口竞争加剧导致劳动力市场表现恶化及生育率下降；相反，受益于出口扩张的行业从业者则获得更优就业前景与更高生育率。这些效应主要由低学历已婚男性及全职工作者驱动，并反映在生育可能性（广延边际）的变化上。尽管存在生育推迟的证据，但我们发现对终身生育率具有显著影响。相比之下，婚姻行为未受显著冲击。

papers.title: How Undervalued is the Covid-19 Vaccine? Evidence from Discrete Choice Experiments and VSL Benchmarks
papers.authors: Patrick Carlin, Brian E. Dixon, Kosali I. Simon, Ryan Sullivan, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: Two discrete choice experiments conducted early in the Covid-19 vaccination campaign show that people dramatically undervalue the Covid-19 vaccine, relative to benchmarks implied by the value of a statistical life (VSL). Our first experiment found that median willingness to pay (WTP) for initial vaccination is around $50, only 2 percent of the WTP implied by standard VSL calculations. Our second experiment found the median person was willing to accept (WTA) about $200 to delay the second dose, only 32 percent of the WTA implied by standard VSL calculations. While standard economic models imply that vaccines are undervalued because of their large externalities, we interpret the finding that WTP estimates are well below the VSL benchmarks as evidence that internalities play a substantial role. This evidence that people undervalue even the private benefits of vaccination suggests that there may be a role for government beyond conventional efforts to correct externalities.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH；JEL：H0, I0, I12, I18, I28
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫苗被低估了多少？来自离散选择实验与统计生命价值基准的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫苗接种运动早期开展的两项离散选择实验表明，相对于统计生命价值（VSL）隐含的基准，人们对新冠疫苗的估值显著偏低。第一项实验发现，初始疫苗接种意愿支付中位数约为50美元，仅占标准VSL计算隐含意愿支付的2%。第二项实验显示，中位受访者愿意接受约200美元以推迟第二剂接种，仅占标准VSL计算隐含意愿接受的32%。虽然标准经济模型认为疫苗因巨大外部性而被低估，但我们发现意愿支付估计值远低于VSL基准，这证明内部性发挥了重要作用。该证据表明人们甚至低估了疫苗接种的私人收益，暗示政府可能需要超越传统纠正外部性的努力来发挥作用。

papers.title: Escaping Secular Stagnation with Unconventional Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Luba Petersen, Ryan Rholes
papers.abstract: We design a new experimental framework to study policy interventions to combat secular stagnations and liquidity traps in an overlapping-generations environment where participants form expectations and make real economic decisions. We observe that participants can learn to coordinate on high inflation full-employment equilibria. Permanent deleveraging shocks induce pessimistic, backward-looking expectations and considerable consumption heterogeneity as the economies experience persistent deflation. We explore the ability of unconventional monetary policy to lead economies out of deflationary traps. Permanently increasing the central bank's inflation target is insufficient to generate inflationary expectations due to low central bank credibility. Negative interest rates stimulate spending and generate the necessary inflation for the economies to escape the zero lower bound. Negative interest rates are more potent than raising the inflation target at shifting consumption to the present.
papers.zh_title: 以非常规货币政策逃离长期停滞
papers.zh_abstract: 我们设计了一个新的实验框架，研究在代际交叠环境中应对长期停滞与流动性陷阱的政策干预——该环境中参与者形成预期并做出真实经济决策。我们观察到参与者能够学会协调于高通胀充分就业均衡。永久性去杠杆冲击引发悲观的后顾型预期，并在经济经历持续通缩时产生显著的消费异质性。我们探索了非常规货币政策引导经济脱离通缩陷阱的能力。由于央行可信度低，永久性提高通胀目标不足以产生通胀预期。负利率刺激支出并产生必要通胀，使经济摆脱零下限约束。在将消费转移至当前方面，负利率比提高通胀目标更为有效。

papers.title: Comparing Past and Present Inflation
papers.authors: Marijn A. Bolhuis, Judd N. L. Cramer, Lawrence H. Summers
papers.abstract: There have been important methodological changes in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) over time. These distort comparisons of inflation from different periods, which have become more prevalent as inflation has risen to 40-year highs. To better contextualize the current run-up in inflation, this paper constructs new historical series for CPI headline and core inflation that are more consistent with current practices and expenditure shares for the post-war period. Using these series, we find that current inflation levels are much closer to past inflation peaks than the official series would suggest. In particular, the rate of core CPI disinflation caused by Volcker-era policies is significantly lower when measured using today’s treatment of housing: only 5 percentage points of decline instead of 11 percentage points in the official CPI statistics. To return to 2 percent core CPI inflation today will thus require nearly the same amount of disinflation as achieved under Chairman Volcker.
papers.zh_title: 过去与当前通胀的比较
papers.zh_abstract: 消费者价格指数（CPI）在方法上经历了重要变革。这些变革扭曲了不同时期通胀率的比较——随着通胀升至40年高位，此类比较愈发普遍。为更好地理解当前通胀飙升的背景，本文构建了战后时期与现行做法及支出份额更一致的CPI总体与核心通胀新历史序列。使用这些序列，我们发现当前通胀水平比官方序列所暗示的更接近历史通胀峰值。具体而言，若采用当今对住房的处理方式，沃尔克时代政策导致的核心CPI反通胀率显著更低：仅下降5个百分点，而非官方CPI统计中的11个百分点。因此，要使当前核心CPI通胀回归2%，所需的反通胀幅度几乎与沃尔克主席时期相当。

papers.title: Factors Influencing the Choice of Pension Distribution at Retirement
papers.authors: Robert L. Clark, Olivia S. Mitchell
papers.abstract: One of the most important financial decisions that pension participants make concerns how they access their pension assets when they terminate employment with their plan sponsor. Their choices depend both on own preferences and the options offered by their retirement plan. This paper examines both past and future pension withdrawal choices for those with defined benefit and defined contribution pensions, separately. Our data are drawn from a set of pension distribution questions we fielded in the Understanding American Study. Results show significant differences in distribution choices based on the type of retirement plan, with individuals covered by defined benefit plans significantly more likely to select annuities compared to similar employees covered by defined contribution plans. We also find differences in how higher annual income affects annuity choices based on coverage by DB plans. Individuals with lower levels of financial literacy and lower annual income have less knowledge of basic pension characteristics.
papers.zh_title: 影响退休时养老金分配选择的因素
papers.zh_abstract: 养老金参与者在终止与计划发起人的雇佣关系时，最重要的财务决策之一涉及如何获取养老金资产。其选择既取决于个人偏好，也取决于退休计划提供的选项。本文分别考察了固定收益型与固定缴款型养老金参与者的过去及未来养老金提取选择。数据来自我们在“理解美国研究”中设置的一组养老金分配问题。结果显示，基于退休计划类型的分配选择存在显著差异：与固定缴款计划覆盖的类似员工相比，固定收益计划覆盖的个人选择年金的概率显著更高。我们还发现，基于固定收益计划覆盖情况，较高年收入对年金选择的影响存在差异。金融素养较低且年收入较低的个人对基本养老金特征的了解更少。

papers.title: The Race Between Tax Enforcement and Tax Planning: Evidence From a Natural Experiment in Chile
papers.authors: Sebastián Bustos, Dina Pomeranz, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato, José Vila-Belda, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: Profit shifting by multinational corporations is thought to reduce tax revenue around the world. This paper provides a comprehensive analysis of the introduction of standard regulations to limit profit shifting. Using administrative tax and customs data from Chile, we find that the reform was ineffective in reducing multinationals’ transfers to lower-tax countries and did not significantly raise tax payments. Interviews with tax advisors and employment history data reveal a drastic increase in consulting services. Our results illustrate that when enforcement can be circumvented by sophisticated tax planning, it can benefit tax consultants at the expense of tax authorities and taxpayers.
papers.zh_title: 税收执法与税收筹划的竞赛：来自智利自然实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 跨国公司的利润转移被认为减少了全球税收收入。本文对限制利润转移的标准法规引入进行了全面分析。利用智利的行政税收与海关数据，我们发现改革在减少跨国公司向低税国转移方面无效，且未显著提高税收收入。对税务顾问的访谈及就业历史数据揭示了咨询服务的急剧增长。我们的结果表明，当执法可以被复杂的税收筹划规避时，执法可能以税务机关和纳税人的代价使税务顾问受益。

papers.title: Who Benefits from Meritocracy?
papers.authors: Diana Moreira, Santiago Pérez
papers.abstract: Individuals from lower-income backgrounds are underrepresented in high-status occupations. This underrepresentation has coincided with increasing scrutiny of the “meritocratic” criteria shaping access to these positions. We study the equity impacts of a prominent example of meritocratic selection: civil service exams. To do so, we use evidence from the Pendleton Act, a historical reform that introduced such exams to select U.S. federal employees. We find that, although the reform increased the representation of “educated outsiders” (individuals with high education but limited connections), it reduced the representation of lower-SES individuals. This reduction was stronger among applicants from states with high educational inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：J15, J62, M5, N21
papers.zh_title: 谁从精英选拔中受益？
papers.zh_abstract: 低收入背景个体在高地位职业中代表性不足。这种不足与塑造这些职位准入的“精英选拔”标准日益受到审视相伴而生。我们研究了一个精英选拔的突出案例——公务员考试——的公平性影响。为此，我们利用《彭德尔顿法案》这一历史改革——该法案引入此类考试以选拔美国联邦雇员。我们发现，尽管改革增加了“受过教育的外部人士”（高学历但关系有限者）的代表性，但它降低了低社会经济地位个体的代表性。这种降低在教育不平等程度高的州的申请者中更为显著。

papers.title: Mothers as Insurance: Family Spillovers in WIC
papers.authors: Marianne Bitler, Janet Currie, Hilary W. Hoynes, Krista J. Ruffini, Lisa Schulkind, Barton Willage
papers.abstract: The Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) is a widely used program. Previous research shows that WIC improves birth outcomes, but evidence about impacts on children and families is limited. We use a regression discontinuity leveraging an age five when children become ineligible for WIC and examine nutritional and laboratory outcomes for adults and children. We find little impact on children who aged out of the program. But among adult women caloric intake falls and food insecurity increases, suggesting that mothers protect children by consuming less themselves. We find no effect on others in the household.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H53, I18, I38
papers.zh_title: 母亲作为保险：WIC项目中的家庭溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 妇女、婴儿和儿童特别补充营养计划（WIC）是一项广泛使用的项目。先前研究表明WIC改善了出生结局，但关于对儿童和家庭影响的证据有限。我们利用儿童在五岁时失去WIC资格的断点回归设计，考察成人与儿童的营养及实验室检测结果。我们发现对超龄退出项目的儿童影响甚微。但成年女性中热量摄入下降且食品不安全增加，表明母亲通过减少自身消费来保护儿童。我们未发现对家庭其他成员的影响。

papers.title: Near-Rational Equilibria in Heterogeneous-Agent Models: A Verification Method
papers.authors: Leonid Kogan, Indrajit Mitra
papers.abstract: We propose a general simulation-based procedure for estimating quality of approximate policies in heterogeneous-agent equilibrium models, which allows to verify that such approximate solutions describe a near-rational equilibrium. Our procedure endows agents with superior knowledge of the future path of the economy, while imposing a suitable penalty for such foresight. The relaxed problem is more tractable than the original, and results in an upper bound on agents’ welfare. Our method applies to various solution algorithms. We illustrate our approach in two applications: the incomplete-markets model of Krusell and Smith (1998) and the heterogeneous firm model of Khan and Thomas (2008).
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C02, C18, C63, C68, E00, E37, G1
papers.zh_title: 异质性主体模型中的近理性均衡：一种验证方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种通用的基于模拟的程序，用于评估异质性主体均衡模型中近似策略的质量，该程序能够验证此类近似解是否描述了一个近理性均衡。我们的程序赋予主体对未来经济路径的优越知识，同时对此类预见施加适当的惩罚。这个松弛问题比原始问题更易处理，并得出了主体福利的上界。我们的方法适用于多种求解算法。我们通过两个应用实例来说明该方法：Krusell和Smith（1998）的不完全市场模型以及Khan和Thomas（2008）的异质性企业模型。

papers.title: Opioid Use and Employment Outcomes: Evidence from the U.S. Military
papers.authors: Abby E. Alpert, Steve Schwab, Benjamin D. Ukert
papers.abstract: There is significant interest in understanding the labor market consequences of the opioid epidemic, but little is known about how opioid use impacts on-the-job productivity. We analyze the impact of opioid initiation in the emergency department (ED) on workforce outcomes in the Military using linked medical and administrative personnel data for active duty service members from 2008 to 2017. Exploiting quasi-random assignment of patients to physicians in the ED, we find that assignment to a high-intensity opioid prescribing physician increases the probability of long-term opioid use and leads to subsequent negative effects on work capacity, job performance, and productivity. We also analyze the mechanisms underlying these negative workforce outcomes. While opioid use does not negatively affect measures of physical job performance, we find large increases in behavioral problems which lead to disciplinary actions and job separation.
papers.zh_title: 阿片类药物使用与就业结果：来自美国军方的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 人们对于理解阿片类药物流行对劳动力市场的影响有浓厚兴趣，但关于阿片类药物使用如何影响在职生产率却知之甚少。我们利用2008年至2017年现役军人的关联医疗和行政人事数据，分析了急诊科中阿片类药物初始使用对军队劳动力结果的影响。利用急诊科患者被准随机分配给医生的特点，我们发现，被分配给高阿片类药物处方强度医生的患者，其长期使用阿片类药物的概率增加，并导致随后在工作能力、工作表现和生产率方面的负面效应。我们还分析了这些负面劳动力结果背后的机制。虽然阿片类药物使用并未对体力工作表现指标产生负面影响，但我们发现行为问题大幅增加，这导致了纪律处分和离职。

papers.title: Cutting Out the Middleman: The Structure of Chains of Intermediation
papers.authors: Matthew Grant, Meredith Startz
papers.abstract: Distribution of goods often involves multiple intermediaries engaged in sequential buying and reselling. Why do these chains of intermediation exist, and what are their implications for consumers? We show that multi-intermediary chains arise in response to internal economies of scale in trade costs. This suggests that chains will be longer on average in developing countries, and can account for empirical patterns in firm size and prices that we document using original data on imported consumer goods in Nigeria. While policy wisdom often calls for shortening chains, we show that this has ambiguous welfare implications. Equilibrium distribution structures are not generally efficient, and policies and technologies that lead to shorter chains will not necessarily benefit consumers, even when intermediaries hold market power. Instead, there is a fundamental trade-off: shorter chains have lower marginal cost but also fewer sellers, which can reduce competition, product availability, and access to retailers. We embed this insight in a quantifiable model of endogenous intermediation chains, which we calibrate for distribution of Chinese-made apparel in Nigeria, and describe changes in chain structure in response to counterfactual changes in regulation and e-commerce technologies. We find that cutting out middlemen has heterogeneous welfare impacts but may harm remote consumers.
papers.zh_title: 去掉中间商：中介链的结构
papers.zh_abstract: 商品分销通常涉及多个中介机构进行连续的买卖。为什么这些中介链会存在，它们对消费者有何影响？我们表明，多中介链的出现是为了应对贸易成本中的内部规模经济。这表明，发展中国家的中介链平均而言会更长，并且可以解释我们使用尼日利亚进口消费品原始数据所记录的企业规模和价格方面的经验模式。尽管政策智慧通常呼吁缩短中介链，但我们表明这对福利的影响是模糊的。均衡分销结构通常并非有效，即使中介机构拥有市场力量，导致中介链缩短的政策和技术也不一定使消费者受益。相反，存在一个基本的权衡：更短的中介链具有更低的边际成本，但卖家数量也更少，这可能会减少竞争、产品可得性和对零售商的访问。我们将这一见解嵌入一个可量化的内生中介链模型中，该模型针对尼日利亚中国制造服装的分销进行了校准，并描述了在反事实的监管和电子商务技术变化下中介链结构的变化。我们发现，去掉中间商会产生异质性的福利影响，但可能会损害偏远地区的消费者。

papers.title: Contamination Bias in Linear Regressions
papers.authors: Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Peter Hull, Michal Kolesár
papers.abstract: We study regressions with multiple treatments and a set of controls that is flexible enough to purge omitted variable bias. We show that these regressions generally fail to estimate convex averages of heterogeneous treatment effects—instead, estimates of each treatment’s effect are contaminated by non-convex averages of the effects of other treatments. We discuss three estimation approaches that avoid such contamination bias, including the targeting of easiest-to-estimate weighted average effects. A re-analysis of nine empirical applications finds economically and statistically meaningful contamination bias in observational studies; contamination bias in experimental studies is more limited due to smaller variability in propensity scores.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS, TWP；JEL：C14, C21, C22, C90
papers.zh_title: 线性回归中的污染偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了包含多个处理变量和一组足够灵活以消除遗漏变量偏差的控制变量的回归。我们表明，这些回归通常无法估计异质性处理效应的凸平均值——相反，每个处理效应的估计值会受到其他处理效应的非凸平均值的污染。我们讨论了三种避免此类污染偏差的估计方法，包括针对最容易估计的加权平均效应。对九个实证应用的重新分析发现，观察性研究中存在经济上和统计上显著的污染偏差；由于倾向得分变异性较小，实验研究中的污染偏差更为有限。

papers.title: Gender and Underrepresented Minority Differences in Research Funding
papers.authors: Laura Cruz-Castro, Donna K. Ginther, Luis Sanz-Menendez
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews the data and literature on gender, race and ethnicity differences in research funding in the United States and Europe. The gender gap in research funding has closed at the National Science Foundation and National Institutes of Health in the United States and substantially narrowed in Europe. Underrepresented minorities are less likely to receive research funding that whites in the United States. We found that much of the literature was a series of informative independent studies where many of the potential explanations depended upon the context. Our examination of peer review also found contradictory evidence of its efficacy. The variety of countries, funders, and approaches to peer review make it difficult to make definitive conclusions in the face of contradictory evidence on the gender funding gap. We conclude that access to high-quality administrative data would allow for improved methodological approaches to understanding these differences in research funding.
papers.zh_title: 研究经费中的性别与少数族裔差异
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了美国和欧洲在研究经费方面关于性别、种族和族裔差异的数据和文献。在美国国家科学基金会和美国国立卫生研究院，研究经费的性别差距已经消失，在欧洲也大幅缩小。在美国，少数族裔获得研究经费的可能性低于白人。我们发现，大部分文献是一系列信息丰富的独立研究，其中许多潜在解释取决于具体背景。我们对同行评审的考察也发现了关于其有效性的矛盾证据。各国、资助者和同行评审方法的多样性使得在面对关于性别经费差距的矛盾证据时难以得出明确结论。我们得出结论，获取高质量的行政数据将有助于采用改进的方法论来理解这些研究经费差异。

papers.title: Days of Work Over a Half Century: The Rise of the Four-day Week
papers.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh, Jeff Biddle
papers.abstract: We examine patterns of work in the U.S. from 1973-2018 with the novel focus on days per week, using intermittent CPS samples and one ATUS sample. Among full-time workers the incidence of four-day work tripled during this period, with over 8 million more full-time workers on four-day weeks. The same growth occurred in the Netherlands, Germany, and South Korea. The rise was not due to changes in demographics or industrial structure. Four-day full-time work is more common among less educated, younger, and white non-Hispanic workers, among men, natives, and people with young children; and among police and firefighters, health-care workers, and in eating/drinking places. Based on an equilibrium model of its prevalence, we show that it results more from workers’ preferences and/or daily fixed costs of working than from employers' production costs. We verify the implication that the wage penalty for four-day work is greater where such work is more prevalent, and we show that the penalty has diminished over time.
papers.zh_title: 半个世纪以来的工作日数：每周四天工作制的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用间歇性的当前人口调查样本和一个美国时间使用调查样本，以每周工作天数这一新颖视角，考察了1973年至2018年美国的工作模式。在全职工作者中，每周工作四天的发生率在此期间增加了两倍，有超过800万更多的全职工作者实行每周四天工作制。同样的增长也发生在荷兰、德国和韩国。这种增长并非由人口结构或产业结构的变化所致。每周四天的全职工作在受教育程度较低、较年轻、非西班牙裔白人工作者中更为常见，在男性、本土出生者、有年幼子女的人群中，以及在警察和消防员、医疗工作者和餐饮场所中更为普遍。基于一个关于其普遍性的均衡模型，我们表明，这更多地源于工作者的偏好和/或每日固定工作成本，而非雇主的生产成本。我们验证了其含义，即每周四天工作的工资惩罚在更普遍存在此类工作安排的地方更大，并且我们表明这种惩罚随时间推移而减弱。

papers.title: The Effects of Advanced Degrees on the Wage Rates, Hours, Earnings and Job Satisfaction of Women and Men
papers.authors: Joseph G. Altonji, John Eric Humphries, Ling Zhong
papers.abstract: This paper uses a college-by-graduate degree fixed effects estimator to evaluate the returns to 19 different graduate degrees for men and women. We find substantial variation across degrees, and evidence that OLS overestimates the returns to degrees with high average earnings and underestimates the returns to degrees with low average earnings. Second, we decompose the impacts on earnings into effects on wage rates and effects on hours. For most degrees, the earnings gains come from increased wage rates, though hours play an important role in some degrees, such as medicine, especially for women. Third, we estimate the net present value and internal rate of return for each degree, which account for the time and monetary costs of degrees. We show annual earnings and hours worked while enrolled in graduate school vary a lot by gender and degree. Finally, we provide descriptive evidence that gains in overall job satisfaction and satisfaction with contribution to society vary substantially across degrees.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：I21, I24, I26, J16, J24, J28
papers.zh_title: 高级学位对男女工资率、工时、收入和职业满意度的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用大学-研究生学位固定效应估计量来评估男性和女性19种不同研究生学位的回报。我们发现不同学位之间存在显著差异，并且有证据表明，普通最小二乘法高估了平均收入高的学位的回报，而低估了平均收入低的学位的回报。其次，我们将对收入的影响分解为对工资率的影响和对工时的影响。对于大多数学位而言，收入增长来自工资率的提高，尽管工时在某些学位（如医学）中起着重要作用，尤其是对女性而言。第三，我们估计了每个学位的净现值和内部收益率，这考虑了学位的时间成本和货币成本。我们显示，在研究生学习期间的年度收入和工时因性别和学位而异。最后，我们提供了描述性证据，表明总体工作满意度以及对社会的贡献满意度在不同学位之间存在显著差异。

papers.title: Non-Covid Excess Deaths, 2020-21: Collateral Damage of Policy Choices?
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan, Robert D. Arnott
papers.abstract: From April 2020 through at least the end of 2021, Americans died from non-Covid causes at an average annual rate 97,000 in excess of previous trends. Hypertension and heart disease deaths combined were elevated 32,000. Diabetes or obesity, drug-induced causes, and alcohol-induced causes were each elevated 12,000 to 15,000 above previous (upward) trends. Drug deaths especially followed an alarming trend, only to significantly exceed it during the pandemic to reach 108,000 for calendar year 2021. Homicide and motor-vehicle fatalities combined were elevated almost 10,000. Various other causes combined to add 18,000. While Covid deaths overwhelmingly afflict senior citizens, absolute numbers of non-Covid excess deaths are similar for each of the 18-44, 45-64, and over-65 age groups, with essentially no aggregate excess deaths of children. Mortality from all causes during the pandemic was elevated 26 percent for working-age adults (18-64), as compared to 18 percent for the elderly. Other data on drug addictions, non-fatal shootings, weight gain, and cancer screenings point to a historic, yet largely unacknowledged, health emergency.
papers.zh_title: 2020-21年非新冠超额死亡：政策选择的附带损害？
papers.zh_abstract: 从2020年4月到至少2021年底，美国人因非新冠原因死亡的年均人数比以往趋势高出97,000人。高血压和心脏病死亡合计增加了32,000人。糖尿病或肥胖、药物诱发原因和酒精诱发原因分别比之前的（上升）趋势高出12,000至15,000人。药物死亡尤其遵循了令人担忧的趋势，只是在疫情期间显著超过该趋势，在2021日历年达到108,000人。凶杀和机动车死亡合计增加了近10,000人。其他各种原因合计增加了18,000人。虽然新冠死亡绝大多数影响老年人，但非新冠超额死亡的绝对数量在18-44岁、45-64岁和65岁以上年龄组中相似，儿童基本上没有总体超额死亡。疫情期间，工作年龄成年人（18-64岁）的全因死亡率上升了26%，而老年人则上升了18%。关于药物成瘾、非致命枪击、体重增加和癌症筛查的其他数据指向一场历史性但基本上未被承认的健康紧急状况。

papers.title: Maternal Mortality and Women’s Political Power
papers.authors: Sonia R. Bhalotra, Damian Clarke, Joseph F. Gomes, Atheendar Venkataramani
papers.abstract: Millions of women continue to die during and soon after childbirth, even where the knowledge and resources to avoid this are available. We posit that raising the share of women in parliament can trigger action. Leveraging the timing of gender quota legislation across developing countries, we identify sharp sustained reductions of 8–12 percent in maternal mortality. Investigating mechanisms, we find that gender quotas lead to increases in percentage points of 5–8 in skilled birth attendance and 4–8 in prenatal care utilization, alongside a decline in fertility of 6–7 percent and an increase in the schooling of young women of about 0.5 years.
