The results are robust to numerous robustness checks. They suggest a new policy tool for tackling maternal mortality.
papers.zh_title: 孕产妇死亡率与女性政治权力
papers.zh_abstract: 即使在具备避免孕产妇死亡的知识和资源的地区，仍有数百万女性在分娩期间及产后不久死亡。我们提出，提高女性在议会中的比例可以触发行动。利用发展中国家性别配额立法的时机，我们识别出孕产妇死亡率出现了8%至12%的显著持续下降。在机制探究中，我们发现性别配额导致熟练助产士接生比例提高了5至8个百分点，产前保健利用率提高了4至8个百分点，同时生育率下降了6%至7%，年轻女性的受教育年限增加了约0.5年。这些结果在众多稳健性检验中依然成立。它们为应对孕产妇死亡率问题提供了一种新的政策工具。

papers.title: Microgiving with Digital Platforms
papers.authors: Xiheng Jiang, Jianwei Xing, Jintao Xu, Eric Zou
papers.abstract: Microgiving, a new form of digital fundraising, operates by soliciting minuscule donation amounts that are typically not viable in traditional settings. This paper considers the scaling up of microgiving via platform integration, whereby small donations are bundled with high volume of economic activities that are naturally occurring on digital platforms. We evaluate a charity subscription program run by Alibaba, one of the world’s largest retail platforms, which allows sellers to pledge a tiny portion of a product’s revenue (2 cents per order at minimum) to charity, with donations made automatically as transactions take place. We document that, between 2018 and 2020, the program attracted more than 2 million Alibaba sellers and generated 1.2 billion yuan of charitable funds, representing one of China’s most successful online fundraisers. We pinpoint three forces that jointly create a self-fulfilling incentive for platform sellers to engage in microgiving: First, intense competition motivates sellers to link their products with charitable causes, even though the signaling value of the linkage is small; Second, due to low financial commitment, sellers rarely discontinue their giving once subscribed to the program, which ensures stable streams of charitable funds; Third, the program provides sellers with the joy of giving at a low cost, and this “warm glow” effect further reinforces participation. The success of the microgiving scheme hinges on features that are shared by many digital platforms, and its success is potentially applicable on a broader scale.
papers.zh_title: 数字平台上的微捐赠
papers.zh_abstract: 微捐赠是一种新型数字筹款方式，通过募集传统环境下通常不可行的小额捐款来运作。本文考虑了通过平台整合来扩大微捐赠规模，即将小额捐款与数字平台上自然发生的大量经济活动捆绑在一起。我们评估了由全球最大零售平台之一阿里巴巴运营的一项慈善订阅计划，该计划允许卖家将产品收入的一小部分（每笔订单至少2分钱）捐赠给慈善机构，捐款在交易发生时自动进行。我们记录到，在2018年至2020年间，该计划吸引了超过200万阿里巴巴卖家，并产生了12亿元人民币的慈善资金，成为中国最成功的在线筹款活动之一。我们指出了三种共同为平台卖家创造参与微捐赠自我实现激励的力量：首先，激烈的竞争促使卖家将他们的产品与慈善事业联系起来，尽管这种联系的信号价值很小；其次，由于财务承诺低，卖家一旦订阅该计划就很少停止捐赠，这确保了慈善资金的稳定来源；第三，该计划以低成本为卖家提供捐赠的快乐，这种“温暖光辉”效应进一步强化了参与。微捐赠计划的成功依赖于许多数字平台共有的特征，其成功可能适用于更广泛的规模。

papers.title: Wealth of Two Nations: The U.S. Racial Wealth Gap, 1860-2020
papers.authors: Ellora Derenoncourt, Chi Hyun Kim, Moritz Kuhn, Moritz Schularick
papers.abstract: The racial wealth gap is the largest of the economic disparities between Black and white Americans, with a white-to-Black per capita wealth ratio of 6 to 1. It is also among the most persistent. In this paper, we construct the first continuous series on white-to-Black per capita wealth ratios from 1860 to 2020, drawing on historical census data, early state tax records, and historical waves of the Survey of Consumer Finances, among other sources. Incorporating these data into a parsimonious model of wealth accumulation for each racial group, we document the role played by initial conditions, income growth, savings behavior, and capital returns in the evolution of the gap. Given vastly different starting conditions under slavery, racial wealth convergence would remain a distant scenario, even if wealth-accumulating conditions had been equal across the two groups since Emancipation. Relative to this equal-conditions benchmark, we find that observed convergence has followed an even slower path over the last 150 years, with convergence stalling after 1950. Since the 1980s, the wealth gap has widened again as capital gains have predominantly benefited white households, and income convergence has stopped.
papers.zh_title: 两个国家的财富：美国种族财富差距，1860-2020年
papers.zh_abstract: 种族财富差距是美国黑人与白人之间最大的经济差距，白人的人均财富是黑人的6倍。它也是最持久的差距之一。在本文中，我们利用历史人口普查数据、早期州税收记录以及历次消费者金融调查等来源，构建了从1860年到2020年白人至黑人的人均财富比率的首个连续序列。将这些数据纳入一个针对每个种族群体的简约财富积累模型，我们记录了初始条件、收入增长、储蓄行为和资本回报在差距演变中所起的作用。鉴于奴隶制下截然不同的起始条件，即使自解放以来两个群体的财富积累条件相同，种族财富趋同仍将是一个遥远的情景。相对于这个同等条件的基准，我们发现，在过去150年中，观察到的趋同遵循了更慢的路径，趋同在1950年后停滞。自1980年代以来，由于资本收益主要惠及白人家庭，且收入趋同停止，财富差距再次扩大。

papers.title: Gender Pay Gap across Cultures
papers.authors: Natasha Burns, Kristina Minnick, Jeffry Netter, Laura Starks
papers.abstract: Employing a cross-country sample, we examine how a population’s underlying cultural values help explain gender compensation variation across corporate executives. The results show that the cultural differences embedded in societies long before the board’s compensation decisions have significant explanatory power for the observed gender gap in executive compensation. Using an Oaxaca-Blinder decomposition combined with variables previously shown to be fundamental determinants of executive compensation, we find that adding cultural measures increases the model’s explanatory power of the gender compensation gap from 44% to 95%. We use further identification strategies to support causal inference.
papers.zh_title: 跨文化的性别薪酬差距
papers.zh_abstract: 利用跨国样本，我们研究了一个人群的潜在文化价值观如何有助于解释企业高管之间的性别薪酬差异。结果表明，早在董事会做出薪酬决定之前就已嵌入社会的文化差异，对观察到的行政薪酬性别差距具有显著的解释力。使用Oaxaca-Blinder分解方法，并结合先前被证明是行政薪酬基本决定因素的变量，我们发现，加入文化度量指标后，模型对性别薪酬差距的解释力从44%提高到95%。我们使用进一步的识别策略来支持因果推断。

papers.title: Dividend Taxes, Firm Growth, and the Allocation of Capital
papers.authors: Adrien Matray
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the 2013 three-fold increase in the French dividend tax rate. Using administrative data covering the universe of firms from 2008- 2017 and a quasi-experimental setting, we find that firms swiftly cut dividend payments and used this tax-induced increase in liquidity to accumulate more capital and labor, resulting in higher revenues. Heterogeneity analyses show that firms with high demand and returns to capital responded most, while no group of treated firms reduced their capital. Our results reject models in which higher dividend taxes increase the cost of capital and show that the tax-induced increase in liquidity relaxes financial constraints, which can reduce capital misallocation.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：G32, H2, H25, H32, O16
papers.zh_title: 股息税、企业增长与资本配置
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了2013年法国股息税率提高三倍的情况。利用涵盖2008年至2017年所有企业的行政数据和准实验设定，我们发现企业迅速削减了股息支付，并利用这种税收引起的流动性增加来积累更多资本和劳动力，从而带来了更高的收入。异质性分析表明，需求高和资本回报高的企业反应最大，而没有任何一组受处理企业减少了资本。我们的结果否定了较高股息税会增加资本成本的模型，并表明税收引起的流动性增加缓解了金融约束，这可以减少资本错配。

papers.title: Right-to-Work Laws, Unionization, and Wage Setting
papers.authors: Nicole Fortin, Thomas Lemieux, Neil Lloyd
papers.abstract: This paper uses two complementary approaches to estimate the effect of right-to-work (RTW) laws on wages and unionization rates. The first approach uses an event study design to analyze the impact of the adoption of RTW laws in five U.S. states since 2011. The second approach relies on a differential exposure design that exploits the differential impact of RTW laws on industries with high unionization rates relative to industries with low unionization rates. Both approaches indicate that RTW laws lower wages and unionization rates. Under the assumption that RTW laws only affect wages by lowering the unionization rate, RTW can be used as an instrumental variable (IV) to estimate the causal effect of unions on wages. In our preferred specification based on the differential exposure design, the IV estimate of the effect of unions on wages is 0.35, which substantially exceeds the corresponding OLS estimate of 0.16. This large wage effect suggests that RTW may also directly affect wages due to a reduced union threat effect.
papers.zh_title: 工作权利法、工会化与工资设定
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用两种互补的方法来估计工作权利法对工资和工会化率的影响。第一种方法采用事件研究设计，分析自2011年以来美国五个州通过工作权利法的影响。第二种方法依赖于差异暴露设计，利用工作权利法对高工会化率行业相对于低工会化率行业的不同影响。两种方法都表明，工作权利法降低了工资和工会化率。假设工作权利法仅通过降低工会化率来影响工资，那么工作权利法可以作为工具变量来估计工会对工资的因果效应。在我们基于差异暴露设计的首选规范中，工会对工资影响的工具变量估计值为0.35，这大大超过了相应的普通最小二乘估计值0.16。这种较大的工资效应表明，工作权利法也可能由于工会威胁效应的减弱而直接影响工资。

papers.title: Tax Knowledge and Tax Manipulation: A Unifying Model
papers.authors: Ashley C. Craig, Joel Slemrod
papers.abstract: We provide a unified analysis of taxation and taxpayer education when individuals have an incomplete understanding of a complex tax system. The analysis is independent of whether income is earned legitimately, or by avoiding or evading taxes. In this sense, learning about tax minimization strategies (tax manipulation) is similar to learning about the tax code. The government in our model balances a trade-off: A better understanding of the tax system potentially allows taxpayers to optimize more effectively, but also affects government revenue. Optimal taxpayer education and the optimal amount of redistribution can both be characterized ex post by aggregate sufficient statistics that do not require information about how biases or behavioral responses vary across the decision margins.
papers.zh_title: 税收知识与税收操纵：一个统一模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一个关于税收与纳税人教育的统一分析框架，其中个体对复杂税制的理解不完整。该分析独立于收入是合法赚取、通过避税还是逃税获得。在此意义上，学习税收最小化策略（税收操纵）与学习税法本身类似。我们模型中的政府需要权衡：对税制更好的理解可能使纳税人更有效地优化自身行为，但也会影响政府收入。最优的纳税人教育与最优的再分配规模均可事后通过加总充分统计量来刻画，这些统计量无需了解偏差或行为反应在不同决策边际上的异质性信息。

papers.title: Strategic Investment under Uncertainty with First- and Second-mover Advantages
papers.authors: Min Dai, Zhaoli Jiang, Neng Wang
papers.abstract: We analyze firm entry in a duopoly real-option game. The interaction between first- and second-mover advantages gives rise to a unique Markov subgame-perfect symmetric equilibrium, featuring state-contingent pure and mixed strategies in multiple endogenously-determined regions. In addition to the standard option-value-of-waiting region, a second waiting region arises because of the second-mover advantage. For sufficiently high market demand, waiting preserves the second-mover advantage but forgoes profits. Two disconnected mixed-strategy regions where firms enter probabilistically surface. In one such region, Leader earns monopoly rents while Follower optimally waits. Finally, when the first-mover advantage dominates the second-mover advantage, firms enter using pure strategies.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IO；JEL：E22, G13, G31
papers.zh_title: 不确定条件下具有先动与后动优势的战略投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了双寡头实物期权博弈中的企业进入问题。先动优势与后动优势之间的相互作用产生了一个独特的马尔可夫子博弈完美对称均衡，该均衡在多个内生决定的区域中呈现出状态依存的纯策略与混合策略。除了标准的等待期权价值区域外，由于后动优势的存在，还出现了第二个等待区域。当市场需求足够高时，等待保留了后动优势，但放弃了利润。出现了两个不连续的混合策略区域，企业以概率方式进入。在其中一个区域中，领导者获得垄断租金，而追随者最优地等待。最后，当先动优势主导后动优势时，企业采用纯策略进入。

papers.title: Four Facts about Human Capital
papers.authors: David J. Deming
papers.abstract: This paper synthesizes what economists have learned about human capital since Becker (1962) into four stylized facts. First, human capital explains at least one-third of the variation in labor earnings within countries and at least half of the variation across countries. Second, human capital investments have high economic returns throughout childhood and young adulthood. Third, we know how to build foundational skills such as literacy and numeracy, and resources are often the main constraint. Fourth, higher-order skills such as problem-solving and teamwork are increasingly valuable, and the technology for producing these skills is not well-understood. We know that investment in education works and that skills matter for earnings, but we do not always know why.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I25, I26, J24
papers.zh_title: 关于人力资本的四个事实
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综合了自Becker（1962）以来经济学家关于人力资本的研究成果，提炼出四个典型事实。第一，人力资本至少解释了国家内部劳动收入变动的三分之一，以及国家间收入变动的至少一半。第二，人力资本投资在整个童年和青年时期都具有高经济回报。第三，我们已知如何构建读写和计算等基础技能，资源往往是主要制约因素。第四，解决问题和团队合作等高阶技能日益重要，但生产这些技能的技术尚未被充分理解。我们知道教育投资是有效的，技能对收入至关重要，但我们并不总是知道其中的原因。

papers.title: Take-up of Social Benefits
papers.authors: Wonsik Ko, Robert A. Moffitt
papers.abstract: Take-up of a social benefit is usually defined as receiving a benefit for which an individual or household is eligible. The take-up rate is the fraction of those eligible for a program who participate and receive a benefit or service. We survey estimates of take-up of social benefits around the world, discuss alternative theories of reasons for incomplete take-up, and survey the empirical evidence on the importance of different factors. We find a wide range of take-up rates around the world which follow some general patterns but are not easily explained. Theories of incomplete take-up include those involving low monetary or utility gains, stigma of receipt, monetary and nonmonetary costs of program participation, imperfect information, administrative barriers, and mismeasurement. The types of individuals who do and do not take up a program is argued to be determined by the joint distribution of gains and losses across those types, which ones face the largest administrative burden of participation and largest information deficits, and face more program operator error. There is a large body of evidence showing the importance of benefit gain and earnings losses from take-up but a smaller body of evidence on other factors, which shows that administrative barriers and costs, lack of information, and stigma all appear to be important for different programs. While there are no easy solutions to the problem of incomplete take-up, policies to at least lessen the problem are argued to be available, although generally not without increased government expenditure.
papers.zh_title: 社会福利的领取行为
papers.zh_abstract: 社会福利的领取通常被定义为个人或家庭在符合资格条件下实际获得福利。领取率是指符合项目资格的人口中参与并领取福利或服务的比例。我们调查了全球社会福利领取率的估计值，讨论了关于领取不完全原因的各种理论，并综述了不同因素重要性的经验证据。我们发现全球范围内的领取率差异很大，遵循一些一般模式但难以简单解释。关于领取不完全的理论包括：货币或效用收益低、领取的污名化、参与项目的货币与非货币成本、信息不完善、行政障碍以及测量误差。哪些类型的个体领取或不领取项目，取决于这些类型之间收益与损失的联合分布、哪些人面临最大的参与行政负担和信息缺失，以及哪些人面临更多的项目操作者错误。大量证据表明福利收益和领取导致的收入损失很重要，但关于其他因素的证据较少，这些证据显示行政障碍与成本、信息缺乏以及污名化对不同项目似乎都很重要。虽然解决领取不完全问题没有简单方案，但本文认为至少存在一些政策可以缓解该问题，尽管通常需要增加政府支出。

papers.title: The Returns to Face-to-Face Interactions: Knowledge Spillovers in Silicon Valley
papers.authors: David Atkin, M. Keith Chen, Anton Popov
papers.abstract: The returns to face-to-face interactions are of central importance to understanding the determinants of agglomeration. However, the existing literature studying patterns of geographic proximity in patent citations or industrial co-location has struggled to disentangle the benefits of face-to-face interactions from other spatial spillovers. In this paper, we use highly granular smartphone geolocation data to measure face-to-face interactions (or meetings) between workers at different establishments in Silicon Valley. To study the degree to which knowledge flows result from such interactions, we explore the relationship between these meetings and the citations among the firms these workers belong to. As firms may organize meetings with those they wish to learn from, we isolate causal impacts of face-to-face meetings by instrumenting with the meetings between workers in adjacent firms that belong to unconnected industries. Our IV approach estimates substantial returns to face-to-face meetings with overidentification tests suggesting we are capturing the returns to serendipity that play a central role in the urban theories of Jane Jacobs.
papers.zh_title: 面对面互动的回报：硅谷的知识溢出
papers.zh_abstract: 面对面互动的回报对于理解集聚的决定因素至关重要。然而，现有研究专利引用中的地理邻近模式或产业共聚的文献，一直难以将面对面互动的收益与其他空间溢出效应区分开来。本文利用高精度的智能手机地理定位数据，衡量硅谷不同企业员工之间的面对面互动（或会议）。为了研究知识流动在多大程度上源于此类互动，我们探讨了这些会议与这些员工所属企业之间的专利引用之间的关系。由于企业可能会组织与它们希望学习的对象进行会议，我们通过工具变量法来隔离面对面会议的因果影响，该工具变量是相邻但属于不相关行业的企业员工之间的会议。我们的IV估计显示面对面会议具有可观的回报，过度识别检验表明我们捕捉到了偶然相遇的回报，这在简·雅各布斯的城市理论中扮演着核心角色。

papers.title: Estimating Discrete Games with Many Firms and Many Decisions: An Application to Merger and Product Variety
papers.authors: Ying Fan, Chenyu Yang
papers.abstract: This paper presents a new method for estimating discrete games based on bounds of conditional choice probabilities. The method does not require solving the game and is scalable to models with many firms and many discrete decisions. We apply the method to study merger effects on firm entry and product variety in the retail craft beer market in California. We simulate an acquisition of multiple craft breweries by a large brewery and find that the acquisition would induce firm entry and product entry by non-merging firms. However, these changes are insufficient to offset the negative welfare effects resulting from the higher prices and decreased product offerings by the merging firms.
papers.zh_title: 估计具有众多企业和众多决策的离散博弈：应用于并购与产品多样性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种基于条件选择概率边界来估计离散博弈的新方法。该方法无需求解博弈，并且可扩展至包含众多企业和众多离散决策的模型。我们将该方法应用于研究并购对加州零售精酿啤酒市场企业进入和产品多样性的影响。我们模拟了一家大型啤酒厂对多家精酿啤酒厂的收购，发现该收购会促使非合并企业进入市场并增加产品种类。然而，这些变化不足以抵消合并企业提高价格和减少产品供应所带来的负面福利效应。

papers.title: Intangible Marketing Capital
papers.authors: Bart Bronnenberg, Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Chad Syverson
papers.abstract: We present several empirical facts about trends in marketing investment in the US. We also present estimates of the private value of brands to firms and aggregate intangible brand capital stocks created by these investments. These investments include the creation and maintenance of a brand name and all its corresponding brand elements (e.g., awareness, reputation, image, etc.), along with the investments in the labor force used to manage and oversee the branding. We then discuss the private benefits to firms from their advertising and the established academic wisdom for the striking magnitude of marketing outlays. Finally, we explore the welfare implications of investments in brand capital.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D21, D22, D24, D4, L1, L15, M3, M31, M37
papers.zh_title: 无形营销资本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了关于美国营销投资趋势的几个经验事实。我们还估计了品牌对企业的私人价值，以及由这些投资创造的总体无形品牌资本存量。这些投资包括品牌名称及其所有相应品牌元素（如知名度、声誉、形象等）的创建和维护，以及用于管理和监督品牌化劳动力的投资。然后，我们讨论了企业从其广告中获得的私人收益，以及学术界对营销支出惊人规模的既有共识。最后，我们探讨了品牌资本投资的福利含义。

papers.title: Bottlenecks for Evidence Adoption
papers.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Woojin Kim, Elizabeth Linos
papers.abstract: Governments increasingly use RCTs to test innovations before scale up. Yet, we know little about whether and how they incorporate the results of the experiments into policy-making. We follow up with 67 U.S. city departments which collectively ran 73 RCTs in collaboration with a national Nudge Unit. Compared to most contexts, the barriers to adoption are low. Yet, city departments adopt a nudge treatment in follow-on communication in 27% of cases. As potential determinants of adoption we consider (i) the strength of the evidence, as determined by the RCT itself, (ii) features of the organization, such as “organizational capacity” of the city and whether the city staff member working on the RCT has been retained, and (iii) the experimental design, such as whether the RCT was implemented as part of pre-existing communication. We find (i) a limited impact of strength of the evidence and (ii) some impact of city features, especially the retention of the original staff member. By far, the largest predictor of adoption is (iii) whether the communication was pre-existing, as opposed to a new communication. We consider two main interpretations of this finding: organizational inertia, in that changes to pre-existing communications are more naturally folded into year-to-year city processes, and costs, since new communications may require additional funding. We find the same pattern for electronic communications, with zero marginal costs, supporting the organizational inertia explanation. The pattern of results differs from the predictions of both experts and practitioners, who over-estimate the extent of evidence-based adoption. Our results underline the importance of considering the barriers to evidence adoption, beginning at the stage of experimental design and continuing after the RCT completion.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D72, D9, H1, H70
papers.zh_title: 证据采纳的瓶颈
papers.zh_abstract: 政府越来越多地使用随机对照试验（RCT）在推广前测试创新。然而，我们对它们是否以及如何将实验结果纳入政策制定知之甚少。我们对67个美国城市部门进行了跟踪调查，这些部门与一个国家级的助推单位合作，共进行了73项RCT。与大多数情境相比，这里的采纳障碍较低。然而，城市部门在后续沟通中采纳助推处理的比例仅为27%。作为采纳的潜在决定因素，我们考虑了：（i）证据的强度，由RCT本身决定；（ii）组织特征，如城市的“组织能力”以及负责RCT的城市工作人员是否留任；以及（iii）实验设计，例如RCT是否作为既有沟通的一部分实施。我们发现（i）证据强度的影响有限，（ii）城市特征有一定影响，尤其是原始工作人员的留任。迄今为止，最大的采纳预测因素是（iii）沟通是否为既有沟通，而非新沟通。我们对这一发现提出了两种主要解释：组织惯性，即对既有沟通的修改更自然地融入城市的年度流程；以及成本，因为新沟通可能需要额外资金。我们发现电子沟通（边际成本为零）也存在相同模式，这支持了组织惯性的解释。结果模式与专家和实践者的预测不同，他们高估了基于证据的采纳程度。我们的结果强调了考虑证据采纳障碍的重要性，从实验设计阶段开始，并持续到RCT完成之后。

papers.title: Growing Apart: Declining Within- and Across-Locality Insurance in Rural China
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Costas Meghir, Corina Mommaerts, Yu Zheng
papers.abstract: We consider risk sharing in rural China during its rapid economic transformation from the late 1980s through the late 2000s. We document an erosion of consumption insurance against both household-level idiosyncratic and village-level aggregate income shocks, and show that this decline is related to observable economic changes: the shift out of agriculture, the decline of publicly owned Township-and-Village Enterprises, and increased migrant work. Further evidence suggests that as these changes took place at the village level, higher levels of government failed to offset these effects through the tax-and-transfer system, leaving households more exposed to both idiosyncratic and village-aggregate risk.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PE；JEL：D12, E21, O12, P25
papers.zh_title: 渐行渐远：中国农村地区内部与跨地区风险分担的衰退
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了中国从1980年代末到2000年代末快速经济转型期间的风险分担情况。我们记录了家庭层面异质性冲击和村庄层面总体收入冲击对消费保险的侵蚀，并表明这种下降与可观察到的经济变化有关：农业的退出、公有乡镇企业的衰落以及外出务工的增加。进一步的证据表明，随着这些变化在村庄层面发生，更高级别的政府未能通过税收和转移支付体系抵消这些影响，使得家庭面临更大的异质性和村庄总体风险。

papers.title: Policy Diffusion and Polarization across U.S. States
papers.authors: Stefano DellaVigna, Woojin Kim
papers.abstract: Economists have studied the impact of numerous state laws, from welfare rules to voting ID requirements. Yet for all this policy evaluation, what do we know about policy diffusion—how these policies spread from state to state? We present a series of facts based on a data set of over 700 U.S. state policies spanning the past 7 decades. First, considering the introduction of new laws, state capacity seems to have a small role, in that larger and richer states are only slightly more likely to innovate policy. Second, the diffusion of policies from 1950 to 2000 is best predicted by proximity: a state is more likely to adopt a policy if nearby states have already done so. Third, instead since 2000, political alignment outperforms geographic proximity in predicting diffusion. Fourth, the diffusion of COVID state policies, as opposed to vaccination mandates since the 1970s, follows similar patterns of political polarization. Models of learning and correlated preferences could account for these patterns, including the decreased role of geography over time, if ideas spread more easily and preference correlation has become more political than geographical. We document, however, a role for party control: similarity in state party control predicts policy adoption in the last two decades, even controlling for voter political preferences. We conclude that party polarization has emerged as a key factor recently for policy adoption. Finally, building on these results, we broadly classify the patterns of policy diffusion in a set of difference-in-differences papers.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EEE, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D04, H3, J68
papers.zh_title: 美国各州间的政策扩散与极化
papers.zh_abstract: 经济学家研究了众多州级法律的影响，从福利规则到选民身份证明要求。然而，尽管有这些政策评估，我们对政策扩散——即这些政策如何在州与州之间传播——了解多少？我们基于一个涵盖过去70年间700多项美国州级政策的数据集，呈现了一系列事实。首先，考虑到新法律的引入，州能力似乎作用不大，因为较大和较富裕的州仅略微更有可能进行政策创新。其次，从1950年到2000年，政策扩散的最佳预测因素是地理邻近性：如果一个州附近的州已经采纳了某项政策，该州更有可能采纳它。第三，自2000年以来，政治一致性在预测政策扩散方面优于地理邻近性。第四，与自1970年代以来的疫苗接种强制令不同，新冠疫情州级政策的扩散遵循类似的政治极化模式。学习和相关偏好的模型可以解释这些模式，包括地理因素作用的减弱，如果思想更容易传播且偏好相关性变得更具政治性而非地理性的话。然而，我们记录了政党控制的作用：在过去二十年中，州政党控制的相似性可以预测政策采纳，即使在控制了选民政治偏好之后也是如此。我们得出结论，政党极化最近已成为政策采纳的关键因素。最后，基于这些结果，我们在一组双重差分论文中广泛分类了政策扩散的模式。

papers.title: Health Care Centralization: The Health Impacts of Obstetric Unit Closures in the US
papers.authors: Stefanie J. Fischer, Heather Royer, Corey D. White
papers.abstract: Over the last few decades, health care services in the United States have become more geographically centralized. We study how the loss of hospital-based obstetric units in over 400 counties affect maternal and infant health via a difference-in-differences design. We find that closures lead mothers to experience a significant change in birth procedures such as inductions and C-sections. In contrast to concerns voiced in the public discourse, the effects on a range of maternal and infant health outcomes are negligible or slightly beneficial. While women travel farther to receive care, closures induce women to receive higher quality care.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH；JEL：I18, I38, J08, J13, J18
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健集中化：美国产科病房关闭对健康的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去几十年里，美国的医疗保健服务在地理上变得更加集中。我们通过双重差分设计，研究了超过400个县中基于医院的产科病房的关闭如何影响孕产妇和婴儿健康。我们发现，关闭导致母亲在分娩程序（如引产和剖腹产）上经历显著变化。与公众讨论中表达的担忧相反，对一系列孕产妇和婴儿健康结果的影响微乎其微或略有好处。虽然女性需要走更远的路去接受护理，但关闭促使女性获得了更高质量的护理。

papers.title: An Equilibrium Model of the Impact of Increased Public Investment in Early Childhood Education
papers.authors: Jonathan Borowsky, Jessica H. Brown, Elizabeth E. Davis, Chloe Gibbs, Chris M. Herbst, Aaron Sojourner, Erdal Tekin, Matthew J. Wiswall
papers.abstract: Recent policy proposals call for significant new investments in early care and education (ECE). These policies are designed to reduce the burden of child care costs, support parental employment, and foster child development by increasing access to high-quality care, especially for children in lower-income families. In this paper, we propose and calibrate a model of supply and demand for different ECE service and teacher types to estimate equilibrium family expenditures, participation in ECE, maternal labor supply, teacher wages, market ECE prices, and program costs under different policy regimes. Under a policy of broadly expanded subsidies that limits family payments for ECE to no more than 7% of income among those up to 250% of national median income, we estimate that mothers’ employment would increase by six percentage points while full-time employment would increase by nearly 10 percentage points, with substantially larger increases among lower-income families. The policy would also induce a shift from informal care and parent-only care to center- and home-based providers, which are higher-quality on average, with larger shifts for lower-income families. Despite the increased use of formal care, family expenditures on ECE services would decrease throughout most of the income distribution. For example, families in the bottom three income quintiles would experience expenditure reductions of 76%, 68%, and 55%, respectively. Finally, teacher wages and market prices would increase to attract workers with higher levels of education. We also estimate the impact of a narrower subsidy expansion for families with an income up to 85% of national median income.
papers.zh_title: 增加早期儿童教育公共投资影响的均衡模型
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的政策提案呼吁对早期保育和教育（ECE）进行大量新投资。这些政策旨在减轻儿童保育成本负担、支持父母就业，并通过增加获得高质量保育的机会（特别是针对低收入家庭儿童）来促进儿童发展。在本文中，我们提出并校准了一个针对不同ECE服务类型和教师类型的供需模型，以估计在不同政策体制下的均衡家庭支出、ECE参与率、母亲劳动力供给、教师工资、市场ECE价格和项目成本。在一项将家庭ECE支出限制在不超过国民中位收入250%家庭收入7%的广泛扩大的补贴政策下，我们估计母亲就业率将提高6个百分点，而全职就业率将提高近10个百分点，其中低收入家庭的增幅更大。该政策还将促使从非正式保育和父母独自保育转向平均质量更高的中心式和家庭式提供者，低收入家庭的转变更大。尽管正式保育的使用增加，但大多数收入分布中家庭的ECE服务支出将减少。例如，收入最低的三个五等分组的家庭将分别经历76%、68%和55%的支出减少。最后，教师工资和市场价格将上涨，以吸引教育水平更高的工人。我们还估计了针对收入不超过国民中位收入85%家庭的更窄范围补贴扩张的影响。

papers.title: Vaccination Policy, Delayed Care, and Health Expenditures
papers.authors: Erkmen G. Aslim, Wei Fu, Chia-Lun Liu, Erdal Tekin
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has profoundly affected the United States healthcare system, resulting in major disruptions in the delivery of essential care and causing crippling financial losses that threaten the viability of millions of medical practices. There is little empirical evidence on the types of policies or innovations that are effective in shaping healthcare seeking behavior during a public health crisis. This paper evaluates the effect of COVID-19 vaccination on the individual propensity to delay or skip medical care. Our research design exploits the arguably exogenous variation in age-specific vaccine eligibility rollout across states and over time as an instrument for individual vaccination status. We find that receiving a COVID-19 vaccine reduces the likelihood of delaying care for any medical condition by 37 percent. Furthermore, our analysis reveals that children are significantly less likely to delay or skip healthcare as a result of their parents becoming vaccine eligible, indicating the presence of a positive health spillover within households that extends beyond protection against infection. We also find evidence to indicate that vaccination affects healthcare seeking behavior by easing concerns about contracting or spreading COVID-19. Our results highlight the important role that vaccines play in, not only protecting against coronavirus, but also safeguarding against the worsening of health due to delayed or foregone medical care. The decline in delayed or foregone care caused by vaccination is particularly strong among minorities and those with a low socioeconomic background, revealing an important role that vaccination efforts can play in narrowing inequities in health and healthcare. In supplementary analysis, we use novel data on debit and credit card spending to demonstrate that increased vaccine uptake has a positive, albeit statistically insignificant, effect on consumer healthcare spending in the short run. Taken together, our findings imply that advancements in vaccine development coupled with a regulatory process that accelerates the availability of vaccines to public in a safe manner can have the additional benefit of tackling unmet healthcare needs during a public health crisis.
papers.zh_title: 疫苗接种政策、延迟就医与医疗支出
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情深刻影响了美国医疗保健系统，导致基本医疗服务提供严重中断，并造成毁灭性的财务损失，威胁到数百万医疗诊所的生存。关于在公共卫生危机期间哪些类型的政策或创新能有效塑造就医行为，目前缺乏实证证据。本文评估了新冠疫苗接种对个人延迟或放弃就医倾向的影响。我们的研究设计利用了各州随时间变化的特定年龄疫苗资格推广的外生变化，作为个人疫苗接种状态的工具变量。我们发现，接种新冠疫苗使因任何医疗状况延迟就医的可能性降低了37%。此外，我们的分析显示，由于父母获得疫苗资格，儿童延迟或放弃医疗的可能性显著降低，这表明家庭内部存在超越感染保护的正向健康溢出效应。我们还发现证据表明，疫苗接种通过缓解对感染或传播新冠的担忧来影响就医行为。我们的结果强调了疫苗在不仅保护免受冠状病毒感染，而且防止因延迟或放弃医疗而导致健康状况恶化方面的重要作用。由疫苗接种引起的延迟或放弃医疗的减少在少数族裔和社会经济背景较低的人群中尤为显著，揭示了疫苗接种工作在缩小健康和医疗保健不平等方面可以发挥的重要作用。在补充分析中，我们使用关于借记卡和信用卡支出的新颖数据表明，疫苗接种率的提高在短期内对消费者医疗支出有正向（尽管统计上不显著）影响。综合来看，我们的发现意味着疫苗开发的进步，加上以安全方式加速疫苗向公众提供的监管流程，可以带来在公共卫生危机期间解决未满足医疗需求的额外好处。

papers.title: Targeting Impact versus Deprivation
papers.authors: Johannes Haushofer, Paul Niehaus, Carlos Paramo, Edward Miguel, Michael W. Walker
papers.abstract: Targeting is a core element of anti-poverty program design, with benefits typically targeted to those most “deprived” in some sense (e.g., consumption, wealth). A large literature in economics examines how to best identify these households feasibly at scale, usually via proxy means tests (PMTs). We ask a different question, namely, whether targeting the most deprived has the greatest social welfare benefit: in particular, are the most deprived those with the largest treatment effects or do the “poorest of the poor” sometimes lack the circumstances and complementary inputs or skills to take full advantage of assistance? We explore this potential trade-off in the context of an NGO cash transfer program in Kenya, utilizing recent advances in machine learning (ML) methods (specifically, generalized random forests) to learn PMTs that target both a) deprivation and b) high conditional average treatment effects across several policy-relevant outcomes. We find that targeting solely on the basis of deprivation is generally not attractive in a social welfare sense, even when the social planner's preferences are highly redistributive. We show that a planner using simpler prediction models, based on OLS or less sophisticated ML approaches, could reach divergent conclusions. We discuss implications for the design of real-world anti-poverty programs at scale.
papers.zh_title: 瞄准影响还是瞄准贫困
papers.zh_abstract: 瞄准是反贫困项目设计的核心要素，福利通常针对在某种意义（例如消费、财富）上最“贫困”的人群。经济学中大量文献研究如何以可扩展的方式最好地识别这些家庭，通常通过代理家计调查（PMTs）。我们提出了一个不同的问题，即瞄准最贫困者是否具有最大的社会福利收益：特别是，最贫困者是否具有最大的处理效应，还是“最贫困中的最贫困者”有时缺乏充分利用援助的环境、互补投入或技能？我们在肯尼亚一个非政府组织现金转移项目的背景下探讨了这一潜在权衡，利用机器学习（ML）方法（特别是广义随机森林）的最新进展来学习PMTs，这些PMTs既瞄准a）贫困，又瞄准b）在多个政策相关结果上的高条件平均处理效应。我们发现，仅基于贫困进行瞄准在社会福利意义上通常不具有吸引力，即使社会规划者的偏好是高度再分配的。我们表明，使用基于OLS或较不复杂的ML方法的更简单预测模型的社会规划者可能会得出不同的结论。我们讨论了对现实世界中大规模反贫困项目设计的启示。

papers.title: Adapting to Flood Risk: Evidence from a Panel of Global Cities
papers.authors: Sahil Gandhi, Matthew E. Kahn, Rajat Kochhar, Somik Lall, Vaidehi Tandel
papers.abstract: We assemble a global dataset capturing the universe of major floods in 9,468 cities across 175 countries to estimate flood damage and test adaptation hypotheses. Analyzing 3,931 major floods (2000–2023) and monthly night lights data (2012–2023) as a proxy for urban economic activity, we present three key findings. First, floods lead to a 3.5-times larger decline in night lights in cities in low-income countries compared to cities in high-income countries. Second, the impact of floods on economic activity and mortality has decreased over time. Third, we explore the mechanisms driving this adaptation. Cities with greater prior flood exposure experience smaller impacts, supporting experience-driven adaptation. In high-income countries, migration, critical infrastructure intensity, and dam protection enhance flood resilience, but these factors are less effective in low-income countries. The disproportionate impacts and slower flood adaptation in cities in low-income countries highlight a significant protection gap.
papers.zh_title: 适应洪水风险：来自全球城市面板数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们汇集了一个全球数据集，涵盖了175个国家9,468个城市中的重大洪水事件，以估算洪水损失并检验适应假说。通过分析3,931次重大洪水（2000-2023年）和作为城市经济活动代理变量的月度夜间灯光数据（2012-2023年），我们提出了三个关键发现。首先，与高收入国家的城市相比，低收入国家城市的洪水导致夜间灯光下降幅度高出3.5倍。其次，洪水对经济活动的影响随着时间的推移而减小。第三，我们探讨了这种适应的驱动机制。先前洪水暴露程度较高的城市受到的影响较小，这支持了经验驱动的适应。在高收入国家，移民、关键基础设施强度和堤坝保护增强了洪水韧性，但这些因素在低收入国家效果较差。低收入国家城市遭受的不成比例的影响和较慢的洪水适应凸显了巨大的保护差距。

papers.title: Measuring Human Capital
papers.authors: Katharine G. Abraham, Justine Mallatt
papers.abstract: There are many reasons to want measures of countries’ investments in human capital and especially their investments in formal education. We review the existing literature on the measurement of human capital. Broadly speaking, economists have proposed three approaches to the measurement of human capital—the indicator approach, the cost approach and the income approach. Studies employing the indicator approach have used single measures such as average years of schooling or created indexes of multiple measures as human capital proxies. The cost approach values human capital investments based on spending. The income approach values human capital investments by looking forward to the increment to expected future earnings they produce. The latter two approaches have the significant advantage of consistency with national income accounting practices and measures of other types of capital, but there are also challenges to their implementation. Measures based on the income approach typically yield far larger estimates of the value of human capital than measures based on the cost approach. We outline possible reasons for this discrepancy and show how changes in assumptions can reconcile estimates based on the two approaches.
papers.zh_title: 衡量人力资本
papers.zh_abstract: 有许多理由希望衡量各国对人力资本的投资，特别是对正规教育的投资。我们回顾了关于人力资本衡量的现有文献。广义上讲，经济学家提出了三种衡量人力资本的方法——指标法、成本法和收入法。采用指标法的研究使用单一指标（如平均受教育年限）或创建多个指标的指数作为人力资本的代理变量。成本法基于支出来评估人力资本投资的价值。收入法通过前瞻性地评估人力资本投资所产生的预期未来收入增量来评估其价值。后两种方法具有与国民收入核算实践以及其他类型资本衡量标准相一致的显著优势，但其实施也面临挑战。基于收入法的衡量通常得出的估计值远大于基于成本法的衡量。我们概述了这种差异的可能原因，并展示了假设的变化如何能够调和基于这两种方法的估计值。

papers.title: Historical Newspaper Data: A Researcher’s Guide and Toolkit
papers.authors: Brian Beach, W. Walker Hanlon
papers.abstract: Digitized historical newspaper databases offer a valuable research tool. A rapidly expanding set of studies use these databases to address a wide range of topics. We review this literature and provide a toolkit for researchers interested in working with historical newspaper data. We provide a brief description of the evolution of historical newspapers, focusing on aspects that are likely to have implications for the design of empirical studies. We then review the main databases in use. We also discuss some key challenges in using these data, most importantly the fact that even the most extensive datasets contain only a selected sample of the universe of historical newspaper articles. We offer tools for evaluating the comprehensiveness of available newspaper datasets, show how to assess potential identification concerns, and suggest some solutions.
papers.zh_title: 历史报纸数据：研究者指南与工具包
papers.zh_abstract: 数字化历史报纸数据库提供了一种宝贵的研究工具。迅速扩展的研究利用这些数据库探讨广泛的主题。我们回顾了相关文献，并为有兴趣使用历史报纸数据的研究者提供了一个工具包。我们简要描述了历史报纸的演变，重点关注可能对实证研究设计有影响的方面。然后，我们回顾了当前使用的主要数据库。我们还讨论了使用这些数据时的一些关键挑战，最重要的是，即使是最全面的数据集也仅包含历史报纸文章总体中的选定样本。我们提供了评估可用报纸数据集全面性的工具，展示了如何评估潜在的识别问题，并提出了一些解决方案。

papers.title: Temporary Layoffs, Loss-of-Recall and Cyclical Unemployment Dynamics
papers.authors: Mark Gertler, Christopher K. Huckfeldt, Antonella Trigari
papers.abstract: We revisit the role of temporary layoffs in the business cycle, motivated by their unprecedented surge during the pandemic recession. We first measure the contribution of temporary layoffs to unemployment dynamics over the period 1979 to the present. While many have emphasized a stabilizing effect due to recall hiring, we quantify an important destabilizing effect due to “loss-of-recall”, whereby workers in temporary-layoff unemployment lose their job permanently and do so at higher rates in recessions. We then develop a quantitative model that allows for endogenous flows of workers across employment and both temporary-layoff and jobless unemployment. The model captures well pre-pandemic unemployment dynamics and shows how loss-of-recall enhances the recessionary contribution of temporary layoffs. We also show that with some modification the model can capture the pandemic recession. We then use our structural model to show that the Paycheck Protection Program generated significant employment gains. It did so in part by significantly reducing loss-of-recall.
papers.zh_title: 临时解雇、召回失效与周期性失业动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了临时解雇在经济周期中的作用，其动机源于疫情期间临时解雇的空前激增。我们首先衡量了1979年至今临时解雇对失业动态的贡献。尽管许多人强调了因召回雇佣而产生的稳定效应，但我们量化了因“召回失效”而产生的重要不稳定效应，即处于临时解雇失业状态的工人永久失去工作，且在经济衰退期间这一比例更高。然后，我们开发了一个定量模型，允许工人在就业、临时解雇失业和完全失业之间进行内生流动。该模型很好地捕捉了疫情前的失业动态，并展示了召回失效如何增强临时解雇在经济衰退中的贡献。我们还表明，经过一些修改，该模型可以捕捉疫情衰退。接着，我们利用结构模型表明，薪资保护计划带来了显著的就业增长，部分原因在于它显著减少了召回失效。

papers.title: Cognitive Endurance as Human Capital
papers.authors: Christina L. Brown, Supreet Kaur, Geeta Kingdon, Heather Schofield
papers.abstract: Schooling may build human capital not only by teaching academic skills, but by expanding the capacity for cognition itself. We focus specifically on cognitive endurance: the ability to sustain effortful mental activity over a continuous stretch of time. As motivation, we document that globally and in the US, the poor exhibit cognitive fatigue more quickly than the rich across field settings; they also attend schools that offer fewer opportunities to practice thinking for continuous stretches. Using a field experiment with 1,600 Indian primary school students, we randomly increase the amount of time students spend in sustained cognitive activity during the school day—using either math problems (mimicking good schooling) or non-academic games (providing a pure test of our mechanism). Each approach markedly improves cognitive endurance: students show 22% less decline in performance over time when engaged in intellectual activities—listening comprehension, academic problems, or IQ tests. They also exhibit increased attentiveness in the classroom and score higher on psychological measures of sustained attention. Moreover, each treatment improves students’ school performance by 0.09 standard deviations. This indicates that the experience of effortful thinking itself—even when devoid of any subject content—increases the ability to accumulate traditional human capital. Finally, we complement these results with quasi-experimental variation indicating that an additional year of schooling improves cognitive endurance, but only in higher-quality schools. Our findings suggest that schooling disparities may further disadvantage poor children by hampering the development of a core mental capacity.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：D90, I24, I25, O12
papers.zh_title: 认知耐力作为人力资本
papers.zh_abstract: 学校教育不仅可以通过教授学术技能来积累人力资本，还可以通过扩展认知能力本身来实现。我们特别关注认知耐力：在连续时间内维持费力的脑力活动的能力。作为动机，我们记录了在全球和美国，穷人在实地环境中比富人更快地表现出认知疲劳；他们就读的学校也提供更少的连续思考练习机会。通过对1600名印度小学生进行的实地实验，我们随机增加了学生在校期间进行持续认知活动的时间——使用数学题（模拟优质教育）或非学术游戏（提供对我们机制的纯检验）。每种方法都显著改善了认知耐力：学生在从事智力活动（如听力理解、学术问题或智商测试）时，表现随时间下降的幅度减少了22%。他们还表现出课堂注意力的提高，并在持续注意力的心理测量上得分更高。此外，每种处理都将学生的学业成绩提高了0.09个标准差。这表明，费力的思考体验本身——即使没有任何学科内容——也能提高积累传统人力资本的能力。最后，我们利用准实验变异补充了这些结果，表明多上一年学能提高认知耐力，但仅限于质量较高的学校。我们的发现表明，教育差距可能通过阻碍核心心智能力的发展，进一步使贫困儿童处于不利地位。

papers.title: A Monetary Policy Asset Pricing Model
papers.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Alp Simsek
papers.abstract: We propose a model where the central bank’s (“the Fed’s”) interpretation of macroeconomic needs drives aggregate asset prices. The Fed affects macroeconomic activity with a lag by altering aggregate asset prices. Its objective is to align future aggregate demand and supply (in expectation). We reverse engineer the aggregate asset price that implements the Fed’s objective (“pystar”) and derive several implications: (i) the Fed’s beliefs about future macroeconomic needs (aggregate demand and supply) drive aggregate asset prices, while standard financial forces determine relative asset prices; (ii) more precise news about future aggregate demand makes output less volatile but increases asset price volatility; (iii) with aggregate demand inertia, the Fed overshoots asset prices in response to current output gaps; (iv) inflation is negatively correlated with aggregate asset prices, regardless of its source (aggregate demand or supply); and (v) belief disagreements between the central bank and the market generate a policy risk premium and potential “behind-the-curve” asset price dynamics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, E43, E44, E52, G12
papers.zh_title: 货币政策资产定价模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，其中中央银行（“美联储”）对宏观经济需求的解读驱动了总体资产价格。美联储通过改变总体资产价格来滞后地影响宏观经济活动。其目标是使未来的总需求与总供给（在预期上）保持一致。我们逆向推导出实现美联储目标的总体资产价格（“pystar”），并得出若干含义：（i）美联储对未来宏观经济需求（总需求和总供给）的信念驱动总体资产价格，而标准金融力量决定相对资产价格；（ii）关于未来总需求的更精确消息使产出波动性降低，但增加了资产价格波动性；（iii）在总需求惯性下，美联储对当前产出缺口的反应会导致资产价格超调；（iv）无论通胀来源（总需求或总供给）如何，通胀与总体资产价格负相关；（v）中央银行与市场之间的信念分歧会产生政策风险溢价和潜在的“落后于曲线”的资产价格动态。

papers.title: Financing Infrastructure in the Shadow of Expropriation
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Cecilia Parlatore, Suresh Sundaresan
papers.abstract: We examine the optimal financing of infrastructure when governments have limited financial commitment and can expropriate rents from private sector firms that manage infrastructure. While private firms need incentives to implement projects well, governments need incentives to limit expropriation. This double moral hazard limits the willingness of outside investors to fund infrastructure projects. Optimal financing involves government guarantees to investors against project failure to incentivize the government to commit not to expropriate which improves private sector incentives and project quality. The model captures several other features prevalent in infrastructure financing such as government co-investment, tax subsidies, development rights, and cross-guarantees.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：D82, G30, G32, G38, H20, H41, H44
papers.zh_title: 在征收阴影下的基础设施融资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当政府财务承诺有限且可能从管理基础设施的私营部门公司征收租金时，基础设施的最优融资问题。私营公司需要激励才能良好地实施项目，而政府需要激励来限制征收。这种双重道德风险限制了外部投资者为基础设施项目提供资金的意愿。最优融资涉及政府对投资者的项目失败担保，以激励政府承诺不进行征收，从而改善私营部门的激励和项目质量。该模型还捕捉了基础设施融资中普遍存在的其他几个特征，如政府共同投资、税收补贴、开发权和交叉担保。

papers.title: Discrete-Choice Models and Representative Consumer Theory
papers.authors: Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Joonhwi Joo, Kyeongbae Kim
papers.abstract: We establish the Hurwicz-Uzawa integrability of the broad class of discrete-choice additive random-utility models of individual consumer behavior with perfect substitutes (linear indifference) preferences and divisible goods. We derive the corresponding indirect utility function and then establish a representative consumer formulation for this entire class of models. The representative consumer is always normative, facilitating aggregate welfare analysis. These findings should be of interest to the literatures in macro, trade, industrial organization, labor and ideal price index measurement that use representative consumer models, such as CES and its variants. Our results generalize such representative consumer formulations to the broad, empirically-relevant class of models of behavior that are routinely used in the discrete-choice analysis of micro data, including specifications that do not suffer from the IIA property and that allow for heterogeneous consumer preferences and incomes. These flexible discrete-choice formulations also overcome many of the known limitations of CES and its variants for equilibrium prices and markups, trade liberalization effects and welfare analysis. We also discuss quasi-linear integrability in the case where products are indivisible.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, IO；JEL：C43, D01, D11, D60, E1, L00, M3
papers.zh_title: 离散选择模型与代表性消费者理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们建立了具有完全替代品（线性无差异）偏好和可分商品的离散选择加性随机效用个体消费者行为广泛类别的Hurwicz-Uzawa可积性。我们推导出相应的间接效用函数，然后为整个模型类别建立了代表性消费者公式。该代表性消费者始终是规范性的，便于进行总体福利分析。这些发现应引起宏观、贸易、产业组织、劳动和理想价格指数测量等领域中使用代表性消费者模型（如CES及其变体）的文献的兴趣。我们的结果将此类代表性消费者公式推广到广泛且经验相关的行为模型类别，这些模型常用于微观数据的离散选择分析，包括不具有IIA属性且允许异质性消费者偏好和收入的设定。这些灵活的离散选择公式还克服了CES及其变体在均衡价格和加成、贸易自由化效应和福利分析方面的许多已知局限性。我们还讨论了产品不可分情况下的拟线性可积性。

papers.title: The Distributional Impacts of a VMT-Gas Tax Swap
papers.authors: Gilbert E. Metcalf
papers.abstract: More stringent fuel economy standards and increased market penetration of electric vehicles (EVs) present challenges to federal policy makers who historically have relied on motor vehicle fuel excise taxes to fund highway projects. This paper considers the distributional implications of a federal tax swap where a new vehicle miles travelled (VMT) tax is used to finance a reduction in the federal excise tax on gasoline. Whether the tax shift is progressive (relative to the pivot point) or not depends on the sign of the income elasticity of demand for fuel intensity. If it is negative (higher-income households demand more fuel efficient cars), then the tax shift is progressive around the pivot point. Conversely, if it is positive, then the tax shift is regressive around the pivot point. Where the pivot point occurs and how progressive a shift occurs is an empirical matter.\nUsing data from the 2017 National Household Travel Survey (NHTS), I find that the income elasticity of fuel intensity is negative and that this revenue-neutral tax swap to be mildly progressive for all household incomes below $200,000. This is driven, in part, by the fact that higher income households are more likely to drive hybrid and electric vehicles and to own newer vehicles which, due to increasingly stringent fuel economy standards, tend to be more fuel efficient. How the progressivity of a tax swap changes as fuel economy standards are raised and EV market penetration increases depends on who purchases EVs and more efficient vehicles. Federal policy will likely play a role in influencing the future distribution of EV ownership. In addition, I find the tax swap benefits rural drivers and has no appreciable differential impacts on Black and Hispanic households.
papers.zh_title: 车辆里程税与汽油税互换的分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 更严格的燃油经济性标准和电动汽车市场渗透率的提高，给历史上依赖机动车燃油消费税来资助公路项目的联邦政策制定者带来了挑战。本文考虑联邦税收互换的分配效应，即用新的车辆里程税来资助联邦汽油消费税的削减。税收转移相对于支点是累进的还是累退的，取决于燃油强度的收入弹性符号。如果该弹性为负（高收入家庭需求更省油的汽车），则税收转移在支点附近是累进的。相反，如果为正，则税收转移在支点附近是累退的。支点出现的位置以及转移的累进程度是一个实证问题。利用2017年全国家庭旅行调查的数据，我发现燃油强度的收入弹性为负，并且这种收入中性的税收互换对所有收入低于20万美元的家庭而言是轻微累进的。这在一定程度上是由于高收入家庭更可能驾驶混合动力和电动汽车，并拥有更新、因日益严格的燃油经济性标准而更省油的车辆。随着燃油经济性标准提高和电动汽车市场渗透率增加，税收互换的累进性如何变化取决于谁购买电动汽车和更高效的车辆。联邦政策可能会在影响未来电动汽车拥有权的分布方面发挥作用。此外，我发现税收互换使农村司机受益，并且对黑人和西班牙裔家庭没有明显的差异化影响。

papers.title: Risk Pooling and Precautionary Saving in Village Economies
papers.authors: Marcel Fafchamps, Aditya Shrinivas
papers.abstract: We propose a new method to test for efficient risk pooling that allows for intertemporal smoothing, non-homothetic consumption, and heterogeneous risk and time preferences. The method is composed of three steps. The first one allows for precautionary savings by the aggregate risk pooling group. The second utilizes the inverse Engel curve to estimate good-specific tests for efficient risk pooling. In the third step, we obtain consistent estimates of households' risk and time preferences using a full risk sharing model, and incorporate heterogeneous preferences in testing for risk pooling. We apply this method to panel data from Indian villages to generate a number of new insights. We find that food expenditures are better protected from aggregate shocks than non-food consumption, after accounting for non-homotheticity. Village-level consumption tracks aggregate village cash-in-hand, suggesting some form of coordinated precautionary savings. But there is considerable excess sensitivity to aggregate income, indicating a lack of full asset integration. We also find a large unexplained gap between the variation in measured consumption expenditures and cash-in-hand at the aggregate village level. Contrary to earlier findings, risk pooling in Indian villages no longer appears to take place more at the sub-caste level than at the village level.
papers.zh_title: 乡村经济中的风险分担与预防性储蓄
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种检验有效风险分担的新方法，该方法允许跨期平滑、非位似消费以及异质性风险和时间偏好。该方法由三个步骤组成。第一步允许总体风险分担群体进行预防性储蓄。第二步利用逆恩格尔曲线来估计特定商品的效率风险分担检验。第三步，我们使用完全风险分担模型获得家庭风险和时间偏好的一致估计，并在检验风险分担时纳入异质性偏好。我们将此方法应用于印度村庄的面板数据，产生了一些新见解。我们发现，在考虑非位似性后，食品支出比非食品消费更能免受总体冲击的影响。村庄层面的消费追踪村庄总体手头现金，表明存在某种形式的协调预防性储蓄。但对总体收入存在相当大的过度敏感性，表明缺乏完全的资产整合。我们还发现，在村庄总体层面，测量到的消费支出与手头现金之间的变异存在巨大的未解释差距。与早期发现相反，印度村庄的风险分担似乎不再更多地发生在亚种姓层面而非村庄层面。

papers.title: Structural Change Within versus Across Firms: Evidence from the United States
papers.authors: Xiang Ding, Teresa C. Fort, Stephen J. Redding, Peter K. Schott
papers.abstract: We document the role of intangible capital in manufacturing firms' substantial contribution to non-manufacturing employment growth from 1977-2019. Exploiting data on firms' "auxiliary" establishments, we develop a novel measure of proprietary in-house knowledge and show that it is associated with increased growth and industry switching. We rationalize this reallocation in a model where firms combine physical and knowledge inputs as complements, and where producing the latter in-house confers a sector-neutral productivity advantage facilitating within-firm structural transformation. Consistent with the model, manufacturing firms with auxiliary employment pivot towards services in response to a plausibly exogenous decline in their physical input prices.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D24, F14, L16, O47
papers.zh_title: 企业内部与跨企业的结构性变化：来自美国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了1977年至2019年间，无形资本在制造业企业对非制造业就业增长的重大贡献中所扮演的角色。通过利用企业“辅助”机构的数据，我们开发了一种衡量专有内部知识的新方法，并表明该方法与增长加速和行业转换相关。我们在一个模型中合理化了这种重新配置，该模型假设企业将物质投入和知识投入视为互补品，并且内部生产知识投入赋予企业一种部门中性的生产率优势，从而促进了企业内部的结构转型。与该模型一致，拥有辅助就业的制造业企业在面对其物质投入价格出现看似外生性下降时，会转向服务业。

papers.title: Accelerating Vaccine Innovation for Emerging Infectious Diseases via Parallel Discovery
papers.authors: Joseph Barberio, Jacob Becraft, Zied Ben Chaouch, Dimitris Bertsimas, Tasuku Kitada, Michael Lingzhi Li, Andrew W. Lo, Kevin Shi, Qingyang Xu
papers.abstract: We analyze the financial performance of a hypothetical portfolio of 120 mRNA vaccine candidates in the preclinical stage targeting 11 emerging infectious diseases. We calibrate the simulation parameters with input from domain experts in mRNA technology and an extensive literature review. We find that the portfolio generates an average annualized return on investment of –6.0% per annum and a net present value of –$9.5 billion, despite the scientific advantages of mRNA technology and the financial benefits of diversification. Clinical trial costs account for 94% of the total investment, with manufacturing costs accounting for only 6%. Sensitivity analysis reveals that the most important factor determining financial performance is the price per dose, while the increased probability of success due to mRNA technology, adjusting the size of the portfolio, and the possibility of conducting human challenge trials do not significantly improve financial performance. These results underscore that if the goal is to create a sustainable business model and robust global vaccine ecosystem, continued collaboration between government agencies and the private sector is likely to be necessary.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EH, PE, PR；JEL：G11, G18, G24, G31, G32, H12, H23, H4, H51, H75, I11, I13, I15, I18
papers.zh_title: 通过并行发现加速针对新兴传染病的疫苗创新
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个假设性投资组合的财务表现，该组合包含120个针对11种新兴传染病的处于临床前阶段的mRNA疫苗候选物。我们利用mRNA技术领域专家的意见和广泛的文献综述来校准模拟参数。我们发现，尽管mRNA技术具有科学优势且多元化能带来财务收益，该投资组合的年均投资回报率为-6.0%，净现值为-95亿美元。临床试验成本占总投资的94%，而制造成本仅占6%。敏感性分析显示，决定财务表现的最重要因素是每剂价格，而mRNA技术带来的成功率提高、调整投资组合规模以及进行人类挑战试验的可能性，并未显著改善财务表现。这些结果强调，如果目标是创建可持续的商业模式和强大的全球疫苗生态系统，政府机构与私营部门之间的持续合作可能是必要的。

papers.title: The Impact of Minority Representation at Mortgage Lenders
papers.authors: W. Scott Frame, Ruidi Huang, Erik J. Mayer, Adi Sunderam
papers.abstract: We study links between the labor market for loan officers and access to mortgage credit. Using novel data matching the (near) universe of mortgage applications to loan officers, we find that minorities are significantly underrepresented among loan officers. Minority borrowers are less likely to complete mortgage applications, have completed applications approved, and to ultimately take-up a loan. These disparities are significantly reduced when minority borrowers work with minority loan officers. Minority borrowers working with minority loan officers also have lower default rates. Our results suggest that minority underrepresentation among loan officers has adverse effects on minority borrowers’ access to credit.
papers.zh_title: 抵押贷款机构中少数族裔代表性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了贷款官员劳动力市场与抵押贷款获取之间的联系。利用将抵押贷款申请（近乎）全量数据与贷款官员匹配的新颖数据，我们发现少数族裔在贷款官员中的代表性显著不足。少数族裔借款人完成抵押贷款申请、申请获批以及最终获得贷款的可能性较低。当少数族裔借款人与少数族裔贷款官员合作时，这些差距显著缩小。与少数族裔贷款官员合作的少数族裔借款人也具有更低的违约率。我们的结果表明，贷款官员中少数族裔代表性不足对少数族裔借款人获取信贷产生了不利影响。

papers.title: Nutrient Pollution and U.S. Agriculture: Causal Effects, Integrated Assessment, and Implications of Climate Change
papers.authors: Konstantinos Metaxoglou, Aaron Smith
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between water nutrient pollution and U.S. agriculture using data between the early 1970s and late 2010s. We estimate a positive causal effect of corn acreage on nitrogen concentration in the country’s water bodies using alternative empirical approaches. We find that a 10% increase in corn acreage causes an increase in nitrogen concentration in water by at least 1% and show that the magnitude of the acreage effect increases with precipitation but not with extreme temperature. Based on the average streamflow of the Mississippi River at the Gulf of Mexico during this period and damages of about $16 per kilogram of nitrogen, this 1% increase in average nitrogen concentration implies an annual external cost of $800 million. We also report the results of additional integrated-assessment type of exercises aimed to inform policy makers, and we use recent climate models to project the implications of climate change on the magnitude of the estimated effects. We estimate that climate change will not materially change the relationship between corn acreage and nitrogen concentration in waterways
papers.zh_title: 营养物污染与美国农业：因果效应、综合评估及气候变化的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用20世纪70年代初至2010年代末的数据，研究了水体营养物污染与美国农业之间的关系。我们采用多种实证方法，估计出玉米种植面积对美国水体中氮浓度存在正向因果效应。我们发现，玉米种植面积增加10%会导致水体中氮浓度至少上升1%，并表明种植面积效应的幅度随降水量增加而增大，但不受极端温度影响。基于此期间密西西比河在墨西哥湾的平均流量以及每公斤氮约16美元的损害成本，平均氮浓度上升1%意味着每年产生8亿美元的外部成本。我们还报告了旨在为政策制定者提供信息的额外综合评估类练习的结果，并利用近期气候模型来预测气候变化对估计效应幅度的影响。我们估计，气候变化不会实质性地改变玉米种植面积与水道中氮浓度之间的关系。

papers.title: A National Estimate of Irrigation Canal Lining and Piping Water Conservation
papers.authors: R. Aaron Hrozencik, Nicholas A. Potter, Steven Wallander
papers.abstract: Global climate change is already impacting water resources and, in many areas, reducing the amount of water available for drinking, sanitation, and agriculture. Water conservation can be a means to mitigate the economic damages associated with water scarcity, including scarcity arising from climate change. In the agricultural sector, most water conservation efforts have focused on farm-level irrigation efficiency. However, since over one-third of water applied for agricultural irrigation in the U.S. comes from off-farm supplies, improvements in delivery and conveyance efficiency also have the potential to significantly reduce water losses. This study utilizes survey data from irrigation water delivery organizations in the Western U.S. to estimate the impact of lining and piping conveyance infrastructure on conveyance losses. The average irrigation delivery organization reports a conveyance loss of 15 percent of the total water brought into their system in 2019. Using a control function estimation, this study finds that at the margin an increase of one percentage point in the share of conveyance infrastructure piped leads to an expected 0.16 percentage point reduction in conveyance losses. A simulated water-conservation supply curve based on these estimates shows that about 2.3 percent of total water brought into these systems could be recaptured at a private capital cost below $10,000 per acre foot.
papers.zh_title: 灌溉渠道衬砌与管道化节水的全国性估算
papers.zh_abstract: 全球气候变化已经对水资源产生影响，并在许多地区减少了可用于饮用、卫生和农业的水量。节水可以成为减轻水资源短缺（包括气候变化引起的短缺）所带来经济损失的一种手段。在农业部门，大多数节水努力都集中在农场层面的灌溉效率上。然而，由于美国农业灌溉用水中超过三分之一来自农场外供应，因此提高输送和输水效率也具有显著减少水损失的潜力。本研究利用美国西部灌溉供水组织的调查数据，估算了衬砌和管道化输水基础设施对输水损失的影响。2019年，平均灌溉供水组织报告的输水损失占其系统总引水量的15%。通过使用控制函数估计，本研究发现，在边际上，管道化输水基础设施占比每增加一个百分点，预计将使输水损失减少0.16个百分点。基于这些估算模拟出的节水供给曲线显示，在每英亩英尺私人资本成本低于10,000美元的情况下，这些系统总引水量的约2.3%可以被重新捕获。

papers.title: Cover Crops, Drought, Yield and Risk: an Analysis of U.S. Soybean Production
papers.authors: Fengxia Dong
papers.abstract: Besides a variety of production and environmental benefits, cover cropping has been advocated as a mean to increase resilience to drought. We explored factors influencing farmer’s adoption of cover crops and examined the effects of cover crops on soybean yield and its risk using USDA’s 2018 ARMS Phase II Soybean Production Practices and Costs Report and Phase III Soybean Costs and Returns Report. Incorporating drought occurrence in current year and previous 5 years into our analysis, we find that previous occurrence of drought did not affect farmers’ adoption of cover crops and the effects of cover crops on yield and its risk are mixed. Under a drought condition, cover crops reduced soybean yield and increased yield variation; but in the meantime, they reduced the risk of crop failure, or made yield less negatively skewed. The insignificant effect of previous drought on cover crop adoption and the mixture of positive and negative effects of cover crops on yield and its risk imply that farmers are divided in their acceptance of cover crops as a mean to build resilience to drought.
papers.zh_title: 覆盖作物、干旱、产量与风险：美国大豆生产分析
papers.zh_abstract: 除了多种生产和环境效益外，覆盖作物还被提倡作为增强抗旱能力的一种手段。我们利用美国农业部2018年ARMS第二阶段大豆生产实践与成本报告以及第三阶段大豆成本与收益报告，探讨了影响农民采用覆盖作物的因素，并检验了覆盖作物对大豆产量及其风险的影响。通过将当年及过去五年的干旱发生情况纳入分析，我们发现，过去的干旱发生并未影响农民对覆盖作物的采用，而覆盖作物对产量及其风险的影响则是混合的。在干旱条件下，覆盖作物降低了大豆产量并增加了产量变异；但与此同时，它们降低了作物歉收的风险，或者使产量的负偏态性减弱。过去干旱对覆盖作物采用的影响不显著，以及覆盖作物对产量及其风险的正负效应并存，表明农民对于是否接受覆盖作物作为增强抗旱能力的手段存在分歧。

papers.title: Weather, Climate, and Technology Adoption: An Application to Drought-Tolerant Corn in the United States
papers.authors: Jonathan R. McFadden, David J. Smith, Steven Wallander
papers.abstract: Crop farmers have few short-run options for reducing downside production risk from changes in drought frequency and intensity due to ongoing climate change. However, one recently available option is drought-tolerant (DT) varieties. We determine how recent drought exposure, drought risk, and other climatic features have influenced adoption of DT corn—a water-intensive crop of particular economic importance due to its large share of U.S. agricultural value. Our empirical analysis is motivated by a state-contingent economic framework that accommodates farmers' beliefs about future drought based on objective drought risk and exposure. Using a representative sample of U.S. farmers' fields, we implement a novel econometric method, spatial first differences, that can reduce concerns of omitted variables bias. We find that long-run temperatures and drought risk—rather than short-run drought exposure in recent prior years—led to increased adoption of DT corn varieties in 2016. Farmers are more likely to plant DT corn on highly erodible land and less likely to irrigate such varieties, consistent with the fact that the western Corn Belt was of major marketing focus during the early years of commercialization.
papers.zh_title: 天气、气候与技术采用：以美国耐旱玉米为例
papers.zh_abstract: 由于持续的气候变化，农作物种植者在短期内几乎没有减少因干旱频率和强度变化带来的下行生产风险的选项。然而，一个近期可用的选项是耐旱品种。我们确定了近期的干旱暴露、干旱风险及其他气候特征如何影响耐旱玉米的采用——玉米是一种耗水量大的作物，因其在美国农业产值中占比较大而具有特殊的经济重要性。我们的实证分析受到一个状态依存经济框架的启发，该框架基于客观的干旱风险和暴露来容纳农民对未来干旱的信念。利用美国农民田地的代表性样本，我们实施了一种新颖的计量经济学方法——空间一阶差分法，该方法可以减少遗漏变量偏差的担忧。我们发现，长期温度和干旱风险——而非近期前几年的短期干旱暴露——导致了2016年耐旱玉米品种采用率的增加。农民更倾向于在高度易侵蚀的土地上种植耐旱玉米，并且不太可能对这些品种进行灌溉，这与玉米带西部在商业化初期是主要营销重点的事实相符。

papers.title: Age and the labor market for Hispanics in the United States
papers.authors: Joanna Lahey, Roberto M. Mosquera
papers.abstract: We explore the labor market for Hispanic high school graduates in the United States by age using information from the US Census, American Community Survey, Current Population Survey, and three laboratory experiments. We find, in general, that the differences in outcomes for Hispanic and non-Hispanic high school graduates do not change across the lifecycle. Moving to a laboratory setting, we provided participants with randomized resumes for a clerical position that are on average equivalent except for name and age (as indicated by date of high school graduation). In all three experiments, hypothetical applicants with Hispanic and non-Hispanic names were generally treated the same across the lifecycle by a student population, a population of human resources managers, and a more general population from mTurk. These results stand in contrast to earlier results that find strong differences by age in how resumes with Black and White names are treated.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：C91, J14, J15, J18, J7, M5
papers.zh_title: 年龄与美国西班牙裔劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国人口普查、美国社区调查、当前人口调查以及三项实验室实验的信息，按年龄探讨了美国西班牙裔高中毕业生的劳动力市场状况。我们发现，总体而言，西班牙裔与非西班牙裔高中毕业生在结果上的差异在整个生命周期中并未发生变化。在实验室环境中，我们向参与者提供了针对文职岗位的随机简历，这些简历除姓名和年龄（以高中毕业日期表示）外平均相当。在所有三项实验中，由学生群体、人力资源经理群体以及来自mTurk的更广泛群体进行的评估显示，具有西班牙裔和非西班牙裔姓名的假设求职者在整个生命周期中通常受到同等对待。这些结果与早期发现黑人和白人姓名简历因年龄而受到强烈区别对待的结果形成对比。

papers.title: Machine Learning Can Predict Shooting Victimization Well Enough to Help Prevent It
papers.authors: Sara B. Heller, Benjamin Jakubowski, Zubin Jelveh, Max Kapustin
papers.abstract: Using arrest and victimization records for almost 644,000 people from the Chicago Police Department, we train a machine learning model to predict the risk of being shot in the next 18 months. Out-of-sample accuracy is strikingly high: of the 500 people with the highest predicted risk, almost 17 percent are shot within 18 months, a rate 106 times higher than the average Chicagoan. A central concern with using police data is that predictions will “bake in” bias, overestimating risk for groups likelier to interact with police conditional on behavior. We show that Black male victims more often have enough police contact to generate predictions. But those predictions are not, on average, inflated; the demographic composition of predicted and actual shooting victims is almost identical. There are legal, ethical, and practical barriers to using these predictions to target law enforcement. But using them to target social services could increase the potential for prevention programs to reduce shootings: predictive accuracy among the top 500 people justifies spending up to $190,900 per person for an intervention that could cut the probability of being shot by half.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, PE；JEL：C53, H75, I14, K42
papers.zh_title: 机器学习能够足够准确地预测枪击受害风险以帮助预防
papers.zh_abstract: 利用芝加哥警察局近644,000人的逮捕和受害记录，我们训练了一个机器学习模型来预测未来18个月内被枪击的风险。样本外准确性惊人地高：在预测风险最高的500人中，近17%的人在18个月内被枪击，这一比率是芝加哥平均水平的106倍。使用警方数据的一个核心担忧是预测会“固化”偏见，高估那些在行为相同条件下更可能与警方互动的群体的风险。我们表明，黑人男性受害者更经常有足够的警方接触以生成预测。但这些预测平均而言并未被夸大；预测的枪击受害者与实际枪击受害者的人口构成几乎相同。利用这些预测来指导执法存在法律、伦理和实践障碍。但利用它们来指导社会服务可能会增加预防项目减少枪击事件的潜力：对前500名高风险人群的预测准确性证明，对于一项能将枪击概率降低一半的干预措施，每人最高可花费190,900美元。

papers.title: Getting to the Core: Inflation Risks Within and Across Asset Classes
papers.authors: Xiang Fang, Yang Liu, Nikolai Roussanov
papers.abstract: Do “real” assets protect against inflation? Core inflation betas of stocks are negative while energy betas are positive; currencies, commodities, and real estate also mostly hedge against energy inflation but not core. These hedging properties are reflected in the prices of inflation risks: only core inflation carries a negative risk premium, and its magnitude is consistent both within and across asset classes, uniquely among macroeconomic risk factors. While high core inflation tends to be followed by low real output, consumption, and dividend payouts, it impacts asset prices through both cash-flow and discount rate channels. The relative contribution of core and energy changes over time, helping explain the time-varying correlation between stock and bond returns. A two-sector New Keynesian model qualitatively accounts for these facts and implies that the changing stock-bond correlation can be attributed to the shifting importance of supply and demand shocks in driving energy inflation over time.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E44, E5, F31, G12, G15
papers.zh_title: 触及核心：资产类别内部及跨资产类别的通胀风险
papers.zh_abstract: “实物”资产能抵御通胀吗？股票的核心通胀贝塔值为负，而能源贝塔值为正；货币、大宗商品和房地产也主要对冲能源通胀，而非核心通胀。这些对冲特性反映在通胀风险的价格上：只有核心通胀带有负的风险溢价，且其幅度在资产类别内部和跨资产类别之间一致，这在宏观经济风险因素中是独一无二的。虽然高核心通胀往往伴随着低实际产出、消费和股息支付，但它通过现金流和贴现率两个渠道影响资产价格。核心通胀与能源通胀的相对贡献随时间变化，这有助于解释股票和债券回报之间随时间变化的相关性。一个两部门新凯恩斯模型定性地解释了这些事实，并表明股票-债券相关性的变化可归因于供给和需求冲击在推动能源通胀中重要性的转变。

papers.title: Was Pandemic Fiscal Relief Effective Fiscal Stimulus? Evidence from Aid to State and Local Governments
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Philip G. Hoxie, Stan Veuger
papers.abstract: We use an instrumental-variables estimator reliant on variation in congressional representation to analyze the effects of federal aid to state and local governments across all four major pieces of COVID-19 response legislation. Through September 2021, we estimate that the federal government allocated $855,000 for each state or local government job-year preserved. Our baseline confidence interval allows us to rule out estimates of less than $433,000. Our estimates of effects on aggregate income and output are centered on zero and imply modest if any spillover effects onto the broader economy. We discuss aspects of the pandemic context, which include the surprising resilience of state and local tax revenues as well as of broader macroeconomic conditions, that may underlie the small employment and stimulative impacts we estimate in comparison with previous research.
papers.zh_title: 疫情财政救济是有效的财政刺激吗？来自对州和地方政府援助的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用依赖于国会代表权变动的工具变量估计量，分析了所有四项主要COVID-19应对立法中对州和地方政府的联邦援助的影响。截至2021年9月，我们估计联邦政府为每个保留的州或地方政府工作岗位年拨款855,000美元。我们的基准置信区间排除了低于433,000美元的估计值。我们对总收入和产出影响的估计以零为中心，表明对更广泛经济的溢出效应即使有也很小。我们讨论了疫情背景的各个方面，包括州和地方税收收入以及更广泛宏观经济状况出人意料的韧性，这些可能解释了与我们之前的研究相比，我们所估计的就业和刺激效应较小的原因。

papers.title: Surveillance of Repression: Theory and Implementation
papers.authors: Veli Andirin, Yusuf Neggers, Mehdi Shadmehr, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: A repressive regime can suppress dissent (e.g., protest) after it manifests (e.g., by beating or arresting protesters) or prevent it beforehand (e.g., by obstructing public spaces). We separately study and measure these two forms of repression, focusing on the case of political protest. We show in a model that preventive repression makes protest less predictable. We introduce a new database of security alerts that includes advance warning of protest. We validate the database against objectively measured events and use it to produce global, monthly indices of repression grounded in our model. We show that these indices track salient episodes of repression and predict public expressions of human rights concerns. We find that additional government resources increase prevention but not suppression. We argue that these indices can be a valuable tool for surveillance by the international community and analysis by the research community.
papers.zh_title: 镇压的监控：理论与实施
papers.zh_abstract: 一个压制性政权可以在异议（例如抗议）显现后予以压制（例如通过殴打或逮捕抗议者），也可以事先加以预防（例如通过封锁公共场所）。我们分别研究并衡量这两种形式的镇压，重点关注政治抗议的情形。我们在一个模型中表明，预防性镇压使抗议更难以预测。我们引入了一个新的安全警报数据库，其中包含对抗议的提前预警。我们根据客观测量的事件对该数据库进行了验证，并利用它基于我们的模型生成了全球性的月度镇压指数。我们表明，这些指数能够追踪显著的镇压事件，并预测对人权问题的公开表达。我们发现，额外的政府资源增加了预防性镇压，但并未增加压制性镇压。我们认为，这些指数可以成为国际社会进行监控和研究界进行分析的宝贵工具。

papers.title: Fighting Communism Supporting Collusion
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Jose Manuel Paz y Miño, Gustavo Torrens
papers.abstract: We develop a simple model to explain why a powerful importer country like the United States may provide political support for international collusive agreements concerning certain imported commodities (e.g., coffee). We show that helping producer countries organize and enforce collusion might be an attractive instrument to advance important geopolitical goals; for example, to reduce the chances that the producer countries will align with a rival global power (e.g., the Soviet Union during the Cold War). Moreover, using this practice, the cost of collusion is shared with other importers (including allies). Thus, collusion might be a superior strategy to foreign aid (a priori a more direct and efficient instrument), which is riddled with free riding problems. The model sheds light on why the United States supported (or failed to support) international commodity agreements for coffee, sugar, and oil during and immediately after the Cold War period.
papers.zh_title: 打击共产主义，支持合谋
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单模型来解释为什么像美国这样的强大进口国可能会为某些进口商品（例如咖啡）的国际合谋协议提供政治支持。我们表明，帮助生产国组织和执行合谋可能是推进重要地缘政治目标的一个有吸引力的工具；例如，降低生产国与竞争对手全球大国（例如冷战时期的苏联）结盟的可能性。此外，通过这种做法，合谋的成本与其他进口国（包括盟友）共同分担。因此，合谋可能是一种优于对外援助的策略（后者在理论上是一种更直接、更有效的工具），因为对外援助充斥着搭便车问题。该模型揭示了为什么美国在冷战期间及结束后立即支持（或未能支持）咖啡、糖和石油的国际商品协议。

papers.title: The Fertility Consequences of Air Pollution in China
papers.authors: Xuwen Gao, Ran Song, Christopher Timmins
papers.abstract: We incorporate pollution exposure into Becker’s “Quantity-Quality” (Q-Q) model of fertility and quantify how air pollution distorts individuals’ fertility behaviors in China. We document a robust pattern in which increased pollution over time negatively affects the fertility of ethnic Han people, who comprise approximately 92% of the Chinese population. These patterns are evident in both cross-sectional and panel data, when instrumenting for pollution using distant coal-fired plants upwind of cities or thermal inversions that trap pollution. Consistent with the stylized Q-Q model of fertility, we find that increased pollution drives up the parental expenditure per child, which increases the shadow price associated with the number of children and reduces fertility. Consistent with the model, we also find that the fertility choices of people who tend to have higher demand for child quality are significantly more sensitive to pollution changes. Pollution does not have a meaningful effect on the fertility of ethnic minorities, which can also be explained under the Q-Q framework.
papers.zh_title: 中国空气污染的生育后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将污染暴露纳入贝克尔生育的“数量-质量”（Q-Q）模型，并量化了空气污染如何扭曲中国个体的生育行为。我们记录了一个稳健的模式：随着时间的推移，污染增加对汉族人的生育率产生负面影响，汉族人约占中国人口的92%。这些模式在横截面数据和面板数据中都很明显，当我们使用城市上风向的远距离燃煤电厂或捕获污染的热逆温层作为污染的工具变量时也是如此。与生育的经典Q-Q模型一致，我们发现污染增加推高了每个孩子的父母支出，这提高了与孩子数量相关的影子价格并降低了生育率。与模型一致，我们还发现，倾向于对孩子质量有更高需求的人群的生育选择对污染变化显著更敏感。污染对少数民族的生育率没有显著影响，这也可以在Q-Q框架下得到解释。

papers.title: Public Pension Reforms and Retirement Decisions: Narrative Evidence and Aggregate Implications
papers.authors: Huixin Bi, Sarah Zubairy
papers.abstract: We construct a database of public pension policy changes with motivation and implementation information for ten OECD countries. Structural pension reforms, motivated by long-run sustainability concerns, often come with prolonged phase-in periods. In response to pension retrenchments implemented immediately, people close to retirement stay in the work force longer. News about future pension retrenchments with implementation lags, however, is likely to lead this group to exit the labor market. This decline in the labor force participation rate is particularly strong for reforms with long lags, ones that introduce fundamental policy changes, and where citizens have lower trust in the government.
papers.zh_title: 公共养老金改革与退休决策：叙事证据与总体影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为十个OECD国家构建了一个包含动机和实施信息的公共养老金政策变化数据库。由长期可持续性担忧驱动的结构性养老金改革，通常伴随着漫长的逐步实施期。针对立即实施的养老金紧缩，接近退休的人群会延长工作年限。然而，关于未来实施滞后的养老金紧缩的消息，很可能导致这一群体退出劳动力市场。这种劳动力参与率的下降在以下改革中尤为显著：实施滞后时间长的改革、引入根本性政策变化的改革，以及公民对政府信任度较低的国家。

papers.title: The Size and Census Coverage of the U.S. Homeless Population
papers.authors: Bruce D. Meyer, Angela Wyse, Kevin Corinth
papers.abstract: Despite widespread concern about homelessness, fundamental questions about the size and characteristics of this hard to study population are unresolved, in large part because it is unclear whether existing data are sufficiently complete and reliable. We examine these questions as well as the coverage of new microdata sources that are designed to be nationally representative and will allow pathbreaking new analyses. We compare three restricted use data sources that have been largely unused to study homelessness to less detailed public data. In doing this triangulation of sources, we examine the completeness and accuracy of available data and improve our understanding of the size of the homeless population and its inclusion in the Census and household surveys. Specifically, we compare restricted data from the 2010 Census, American Community Survey (ACS), and Homeless Management Information System (HMIS) to HUD's public-use point-in-time (PIT) estimates and the Housing Inventory Count (HIC) at the national, city and county, and person level. We also develop a new approach to estimating the size of the sheltered homeless population using linked Census and HMIS shelter microdata. Our analyses suggest that on a given night there are about 600,000 people experiencing homelessness in the U.S., about one-third of whom are sleeping on the streets and two-thirds in shelters. More than 90 percent of those in shelters were counted in the Census, although many were classified as housed or in other group quarters, a result that stems largely from ambiguity in the definition of a homeless shelter. By establishing the broad coverage and reliability of the new data sources, this paper lays the foundation for pathbreaking future work on the characteristics, income, safety net participation, mortality, migration, geographic distribution, and housing status transitions of the U.S. homeless population.
papers.zh_title: 美国无家可归人口的规模与普查覆盖情况
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管人们对无家可归问题普遍关注，但关于这一难以研究人群的规模和特征的基本问题仍未解决，这在很大程度上是因为现有数据是否足够完整和可靠尚不清楚。我们研究了这些问题，以及旨在具有全国代表性并将允许开创性新分析的新的微观数据源的覆盖情况。我们将三个主要未被用于研究无家可归问题的限制使用数据源与详细程度较低的公开数据进行了比较。在进行这种数据源三角验证的过程中，我们检查了现有数据的完整性和准确性，并加深了对无家可归人口规模及其在人口普查和家庭调查中纳入情况的理解。具体来说，我们将2010年人口普查、美国社区调查（ACS）和无家可归者管理信息系统（HMIS）的限制使用数据，与住房和城市发展部（HUD）的公开使用点估计（PIT）和住房库存统计（HIC）在国家、城市和县以及个人层面进行了比较。我们还开发了一种新方法，利用关联的人口普查和HMIS庇护所微观数据来估计有庇护无家可归人口的规模。我们的分析表明，在美国，每晚约有60万人经历无家可归，其中约三分之一露宿街头，三分之二住在庇护所。超过90%的庇护所居住者在人口普查中被计数，尽管许多人被归类为有住房或居住在其他集体居住设施中，这一结果很大程度上源于无家可归者庇护所定义的模糊性。通过确立新数据源的广泛覆盖性和可靠性，本文为未来关于美国无家可归人口特征、收入、安全网参与、死亡率、迁移、地理分布和住房状态转变的开创性研究奠定了基础。

papers.title: The Costs of Job Displacement over the Business Cycle and Its Sources: Evidence from Germany
papers.authors: Johannes F. Schmieder, Till M. von Wachter, Jörg Heining
papers.abstract: We document the sources behind the costs of job loss over the business cycle using administrative data from Germany. Losses in annual earnings after displacement are large, persistent, and highly cyclical, nearly doubling in size during downturns. A large part of the long-term earnings losses and their cyclicality is driven by declines in wages. Key to these long-lasting wage declines and their cyclicality are changes in employer characteristics, as displaced workers switch to lower-paying firms. Changes in characteristics of workers or displacing firms explain little of the cyclicality, though non-employment durations correlated with losses in employer effects play a role.
papers.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：J0, J2, J31, J60, J63, J64, J65
papers.zh_title: 经济周期中失业的成本及其来源：来自德国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国的行政数据，记录了经济周期中失业成本背后的来源。失业后年度收入的损失是巨大的、持久的，并且具有高度的周期性，在经济衰退期间损失规模几乎翻倍。长期收入损失及其周期性的很大一部分是由工资下降驱动的。这些持久的工资下降及其周期性的关键在于雇主特征的变化，因为失业工人转向了支付更低工资的企业。工人特征或解雇企业特征的变化几乎不能解释这种周期性，尽管与雇主效应损失相关的非就业持续时间起到了一定作用。

papers.title: Investing with the Government: A Field Experiment in China
papers.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Bo Li, Ernest Liu
papers.abstract: We study the demand for government participation in China’s venture capital and private equity market. We conduct a large-scale, non-deceptive field experiment in collaboration with the leading industry service provider, through which we survey both capital investors and the firms managing the invested capital by deploying it to high-growth entrepreneurs. Each respondent evaluates synthetic profiles of potential investment partners, whose characteristics we randomize, under the incentive that they will be introduced to real partners matching their preferences. Our main result is that the average firm dislikes investors with government ties. We show that such dislike is not present with government-owned firms, and this dislike is highest with best-performing firms. Additional results and surveys suggest political interference in decision-making is the leading mechanism why government capital is unattractive to private firms. We feed administrative microdata and our experimental surveys into a simple model of two-sided search to discuss the equilibrium effects of government participation. Overall, our findings point to the limits of a model of “state capitalism” that strongly relies on the complementarity between private firms and government capital to drive high-growth entrepreneurship and innovation.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, POL, PR；JEL：C93, D2, D20, D22, G0, G02, G18, G28, G3, G38, G4, O0, O1, O14, O16, O17, O25, O3, O38, O4, O40, O47
papers.zh_title: 与政府共同投资：中国的实地实验
