papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国风险投资和私募股权市场中对政府参与的需求。我们与领先的行业服务提供商合作，进行了一项大规模、非欺骗性的实地实验，通过该实验，我们调查了资本投资者以及管理这些资本并将其配置给高增长企业家的公司。每位受访者评估了潜在投资伙伴的合成档案，我们随机化了这些档案的特征，并给予他们将被介绍给符合其偏好的真实伙伴的激励。我们的主要结果是，普通公司不喜欢有政府背景的投资者。我们表明，这种不喜欢在政府所有的公司中并不存在，并且这种不喜欢在表现最好的公司中最高。额外的结果和调查表明，决策中的政治干预是政府资本对私营公司缺乏吸引力的主要机制。我们将行政微观数据和我们的实验调查输入到一个简单的双边搜索模型中，以讨论政府参与的均衡效应。总体而言，我们的发现指出了“国家资本主义”模式的局限性，该模式强烈依赖私营公司与政府资本之间的互补性来推动高增长创业和创新。

papers.title: The Big Tech Lending Model
papers.authors: Lei Liu, Guangli Lu, Wei Xiong
papers.abstract: By comparing uncollateralized business loans made by a big tech lending program with conventional bank loans, we find that big tech loans tend to be smaller and have higher interest rates and that borrowers of big tech loans tend to repay far before maturity and borrow more frequently. These patterns remain for borrowers with access to bank credit. Our findings highlight the big tech lender’s roles in serving borrowers’ short-term liquidity rather than their long-term financing needs. Through this model, big tech lending facilitates credit to borrowers underserved by banks without experiencing more-severe adverse selection or incurring greater risks than banks (even during the COVID-19 crisis).
papers.zh_title: 大型科技公司贷款模式
papers.zh_abstract: 通过比较大型科技公司贷款项目提供的无抵押商业贷款与传统银行贷款，我们发现大型科技公司贷款往往金额更小、利率更高，并且大型科技公司贷款的借款人倾向于在到期前很久就还款，并且更频繁地借款。这些模式对于能够获得银行信贷的借款人仍然存在。我们的发现突显了大型科技贷款机构在满足借款人短期流动性需求而非长期融资需求方面的作用。通过这种模式，大型科技贷款促进了向服务不足的借款人提供信贷，而不会经历比银行更严重的逆向选择，也不会承担比银行更大的风险（即使在COVID-19危机期间也是如此）。

papers.title: Is Our Fiscal System Discouraging Marriage? A New Look at the Marriage Tax
papers.authors: Elias Ilin, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Melinda Pitts
papers.abstract: We provide a new measure of the marriage tax – the percentage change in remaining lifetime (future) spending from marrying. (Equivalently, the increase in future net taxes divided by initial future spending.) We calculate this tax for young respondents to the 2016 Survey of Consumer Finance, impute the tax facing single young respondents to the 2018 American Community Survey (ACS), and study whether the tax alters the ACS respondents’ decisions to marry. We control for endogenous spousal selection by assuming clone marriage – marriage to oneself. Our clone-marriage tax is comprehensive, intertemporal, and actuarial. It includes all key federal and state tax and benefit programs, weighing the present value of extra net taxes along each marital survivor path by the path’s probability. The weighted average marriage tax – 2.69 percent – is very large, corresponding to a year or two of lost earnings for most singles. The range of clone-marriage tax rates – -74.4 percent to 45.8 percent – is equally remarkable. The average marriage tax rate is twice as high for the poor than for the rich and twice as high in some states than in others. Marriage taxation has a small overall impact on marrying, but a substantial impact for subgroups. Absent the tax, 13.7 percent more low-income, single females with children would marry annually and 7.5 percent more would be married by age 35. Our results are robust to assuming ACS singles marry higher- or lower-earning variants of themself and to adjusting for partial benefit takeup. Clearly, making each fiscal policies marriage neutral or using the federal income tax to annually adjust a couple’s total net tax burden to ensure it’s twice that of singles represent two ways to eliminate marriage taxation. An alternative, partial reform lies in adopting universal health insurance whose receipt is not income based. As we show, Medicaid and the ACA embed substantial marriage taxes.
papers.zh_title: 我们的财政体系是否在阻碍婚姻？对婚姻税的新审视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一种衡量婚姻税的新指标——结婚后剩余生命周期（未来）支出变化的百分比（等价于未来净税收的增加额除以初始未来支出）。我们针对2016年消费者金融调查中的年轻受访者计算了这一税负，并将其归因于2018年美国社区调查中单身的年轻受访者，进而研究该税负是否改变了这些受访者的结婚决策。我们通过假设克隆婚姻（即与自己结婚）来控制内生性配偶选择。我们的克隆婚姻税是全面的、跨期的且精算公平的，涵盖了所有关键的联邦和州税收及福利项目，并按照每种婚姻存续路径的概率，对沿该路径产生的额外净税收现值进行加权。加权平均婚姻税率为2.69%，这一数值非常高，相当于大多数单身人士一到两年的收入损失。克隆婚姻税率的范围（-74.4%至45.8%）同样引人注目。穷人的平均婚姻税率是富人的两倍，某些州的平均婚姻税率也是其他州的两倍。婚姻税对整体结婚决策的影响较小，但对特定子群体影响显著。若没有该税负，每年将有13.7%更多的低收入、有子女的单身女性结婚，到35岁时结婚的比例将增加7.5%。我们的结果在假设美国社区调查中的单身人士与收入更高或更低的自身变体结婚，以及调整部分福利领取率后依然稳健。显然，使每项财政政策对婚姻中性，或利用联邦所得税每年调整一对夫妇的总净税收负担以确保其是单身人士的两倍，是消除婚姻税的两种方式。另一种替代性的部分改革在于采用不以收入为基础的全民健康保险。正如我们所展示的，医疗补助和《平价医疗法案》中包含了大量的婚姻税。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Returns to Active Labour Market Programs for Indigenous Populations
papers.authors: Donn. L. Feir, Kelly Foley, Maggie E.C. Jones
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impact of active labour market programs for institutionally distinct Indigenous populations in Canada using administrative data on the universe of participants in the Aboriginal Skills and Employment Training Strategy (ASETS). Within Indigenous population groups, we compare labour market outcomes among individuals who participated in high- relative to low-intensity programs, where high-intensity programs were longer in duration. For Métis and non-Status First Nations groups, we find a large impact of high-intensity participation on earnings two years post-ASETS. The post-program earnings of Status First Nations individuals who participated in high-intensity programs were not statistically different from those in low-intensity programs. We argue that these differences are due to the unique institutional environments affecting different Indigenous populations.
papers.zh_title: 针对原住民群体的积极劳动力市场项目的异质性回报
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用加拿大原住民技能与就业培训战略全部参与者的行政数据，研究了针对制度上不同的原住民群体的积极劳动力市场项目的影响。在原住民群体内部，我们比较了参与高强度项目（持续时间较长）与低强度项目的个体的劳动力市场结果。对于梅蒂斯人和非身份原住民群体，我们发现参与高强度项目对参与后两年的收入有显著正向影响。而参与高强度项目的身份原住民个体的项目后收入与参与低强度项目的个体相比，在统计上没有显著差异。我们认为这些差异源于影响不同原住民群体的独特制度环境。

papers.title: Moral Universalism: Global Evidence
papers.authors: Alexander W. Cappelen, Benjamin Enke, Bertil Tungodden
papers.abstract: This paper presents novel stylized facts about the global variation in universalism, leveraging nationally representative surveys across 60 countries (N=64,000). We find large variation in universalism within and across countries, which almost entirely reflects heterogeneity in people’s moral views regarding how to treat different types of relationships. Universalism is strongly predictive of political views, civic engagement, and the radius of trust, and varies with the economic, political and religious organization of societies. We provide tentative evidence that experience with democracy makes people more universalist. Overall, our results suggests that moral universalism shapes and is shaped by politico-economic outcomes across the globe.
papers.zh_title: 道德普遍主义：全球证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用覆盖60个国家的全国代表性调查（N=64,000），提出了关于普遍主义全球差异的新颖典型事实。我们发现，国家内部和国家之间在普遍主义上存在巨大差异，这几乎完全反映了人们在如何对待不同类型关系上的道德观念异质性。普遍主义与政治观点、公民参与和信任半径密切相关，并随着社会的经济、政治和宗教组织方式而变化。我们提供了初步证据表明，民主经验使人们变得更加普遍主义。总体而言，我们的结果表明，道德普遍主义塑造并受到全球政治经济结果的影响。

papers.title: Estimating the Effect of Easements on Agricultural Production
papers.authors: Nicole Karwowski
papers.abstract: US crops face higher losses as growing season temperatures rise and destructive disasters become commonplace. The Natural Resources Conservation Service (NRCS) easement programs offer an adaptation strategy to improve agricultural resilience. Easements impact agricultural production directly by reducing planting on marginal land and indirectly by improving yields on surrounding cropland. I use national USDA data from the past three decades to build a county-level panel. I employ a regression model with two-way fixed effects to quantify how easement land share impacts yields, risk, as well as acres planted, failed, and prevented planted. A 100% increase in land share of wetland easements increases yields by 0.34%, 0.77% and 0.46% for corn, soybeans, and wheat. Easements improve yields by mitigating the effect of excess precipitation and extreme degree days. Wetland easements reduce soybean losses from excess moisture, heat, and disease by $3.59, $6.07 and $11.23 for each dollar of liability. I also find evidence of a spillage effect in which producers reduce soybean and wheat acreage but increase corn production. This work quantifies the ecosystem benefits of easement habitats and uncovers program externalities including yield spillovers and a spillage effect. My results have policy implications for future NRCS funding and targeting decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：Q1, Q15, Q18, Q54, Q57, Q58
papers.zh_title: 估算地役权对农业生产的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 随着生长季节气温升高和破坏性灾害频发，美国作物面临更高的损失。自然资源保护局的地役权项目提供了一种提高农业韧性的适应策略。地役权通过直接减少边际土地上的种植以及间接提高周边农田的产量来影响农业生产。我利用过去三十年的全国性美国农业部数据构建了一个县级面板数据。我采用带有双向固定效应的回归模型，量化地役权土地份额对产量、风险以及种植面积、失败面积和预防性未种植面积的影响。湿地地役权土地份额增加100%，玉米、大豆和小麦的产量分别提高0.34%、0.77%和0.46%。地役权通过减轻过量降水和极端度日的影响来提高产量。对于每美元的责任，湿地地役权分别使大豆因过湿、高温和病害造成的损失减少3.59美元、6.07美元和11.23美元。我还发现了溢出效应的证据，即生产者减少大豆和小麦种植面积，但增加玉米生产。这项工作量化了地役权栖息地的生态系统效益，并揭示了包括产量溢出和溢出效应在内的项目外部性。我的研究结果对未来自然资源保护局的资金分配和定向决策具有政策意义。

papers.title: NIH Grant Expansion, Ancestral Diversity and Scientific Discovery in Genomics Research
papers.authors: Wei Fu, Shin-Yi Chou, Li-San Wang
papers.abstract: In the approaching era of genomic medicine, the underrepresentation of minority populations in human genetics and genomics research has raised growing concerns regarding the distributive justice in the translation of biomedical innovations into human health across populations. Quantitative assessment of public funding policy in addressing the missing diversity is imperative yet lacking. In this paper, we fill this gap by empirically answering two central questions in the context of Genome-Wide Association Studies (GWAS): whether improved funding opportunity facilitates minority health research, and how significant is the scientific value of funding science on underrepresented populations. Our identification draws on an exogenous NIH grant expansion under the American Reinvestment and Recovery Act of 2009, and exploits variations in the share of people with medical conditions among minorities relative to whites. Our main findings are threefold. First, the ARRA-NIH grant expansion contributes to an increase in the inclusion of minority ancestries in GWAS. It also facilitates the engagement of minority scientists in academic activities and promotes their role in scientific collaborations. The grant expansion fosters the discoveries of disease-associated genetic variants within minority populations. This quantitative evidence speaks to the role that public funding policy can play in advancing science.
papers.zh_title: 美国国立卫生研究院资助扩张、祖先多样性与基因组学研究中的科学发现
papers.zh_abstract: 在基因组医学时代即将到来之际，少数族裔群体在人类遗传学和基因组学研究中的代表性不足，引发了人们对生物医学创新转化为人类健康成果在不同群体间分配正义的日益担忧。对公共资助政策在解决多样性缺失问题上的定量评估至关重要，但目前尚缺乏。在本文中，我们通过在全基因组关联研究背景下实证回答两个核心问题来填补这一空白：改善的资助机会是否促进了少数族裔健康研究，以及资助针对代表性不足群体的科学研究的科学价值有多大。我们的识别策略利用了2009年《美国复苏与再投资法案》下美国国立卫生研究院的外生性拨款扩张，并利用了少数族裔相对于白人患有某些疾病的人口比例差异。我们的主要发现有三点。首先，美国复苏与再投资法案-美国国立卫生研究院拨款扩张促进了全基因组关联研究中少数族裔祖先的纳入。它还促进了少数族裔科学家参与学术活动，并提升了他们在科学合作中的作用。拨款扩张促进了少数族裔群体内疾病相关遗传变异的发现。这些定量证据说明了公共资助政策在推动科学发展方面可以发挥的作用。

papers.title: Inefficient Automation
papers.authors: Martin Beraja, Nathan Zorzi
papers.abstract: How should the government respond to automation? We study this question in a heterogeneous agent model that takes worker displacement seriously. We recognize that displaced workers face two frictions in practice: reallocation is slow and borrowing is limited. We first show that these frictions result in inefficient automation. Firms fail to internalize that displaced workers have a limited ability to smooth consumption while they reallocate. We then analyze a second best problem where the government can tax automation but lacks redistributive tools to fully overcome borrowing frictions. The equilibrium is (constrained) inefficient. The government finds it optimal to slow down automation on efficiency grounds, even when it has no preference for redistribution. Using a quantitative version of our model, we find that the optimal speed of automation is considerably lower than at the laissez-faire. The optimal policy improves aggregate efficiency and achieves welfare gains of 4%. Slowing down automation achieves important gains even when the government implements generous social insurance policies.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E2, H21, J08, J23, O33, O38
papers.zh_title: 低效的自动化
papers.zh_abstract: 政府应如何应对自动化？我们在一个认真对待工人失业问题的异质性代理人模型中研究这一问题。我们认识到，失业工人在实践中面临两种摩擦：重新配置缓慢且借贷受限。我们首先证明这些摩擦导致了低效的自动化。企业未能内化失业工人在重新配置期间平滑消费的能力有限。然后，我们分析了一个次优问题，其中政府可以对自动化征税，但缺乏完全克服借贷摩擦的再分配工具。均衡是（受约束的）低效的。政府发现，即使没有再分配偏好，基于效率理由减缓自动化也是最优的。使用我们模型的量化版本，我们发现最优自动化速度远低于自由放任水平。最优政策提高了总体效率，并实现了4%的福利收益。即使政府实施了慷慨的社会保险政策，减缓自动化也能实现重要的收益。

papers.title: Climate Change and Downstream Water Quality in Agricultural Production: The Case of Nutrient Runoff to the Gulf of Mexico
papers.authors: Levan Elbakidze, Yuelu Xu, Philip W. Gassman, Jeffrey G. Arnold, Haw Yen
papers.abstract: Nitrogen (N) fertilizer use in agricultural production is a significant determinant of surface water quality. As climate changes, agricultural producers are likely to adapt at extensive and intensive margins in terms of land and per acre input use, including fertilizers. These changes can affect downstream water quality. We investigate the effect of climate-driven productivity changes on water quality in the Gulf of Mexico using an integrated hydro-economic agricultural land use (IHEAL) model. Our results indicate that land and N use adaptation in agricultural production to climate change increases N delivery to the Gulf of Mexico by 0.4%-1.58% relative to the baseline scenario with no climate change.
papers.zh_title: 气候变化与农业生产中的下游水质：以流入墨西哥湾的营养物径流为例
papers.zh_abstract: 农业生产中的氮肥使用是地表水水质的重要决定因素。随着气候变化，农业生产者可能会在土地和单位面积投入（包括化肥）的集约边际和粗放边际上进行适应。这些变化会影响下游水质。我们使用综合水文经济农业土地利用模型，研究了气候驱动的生产力变化对墨西哥湾水质的影响。我们的结果表明，农业生产中为适应气候变化而进行的土地和氮肥使用调整，相对于无气候变化基线情景，使流入墨西哥湾的氮量增加了0.4%-1.58%。

papers.title: Unemployment Insurance, Starting Salaries, and Jobs
papers.authors: Gordon Dahl, Matthew M. Knepper
papers.abstract: We study the labor market effects of permanent 23-50% reductions in unemployment insurance benefits available in seven states. Leveraging linked firm-establishment data, we find that establishments based in reform states experience 1.5-2.4% faster employment growth relative to the same firm's establishments in other states. Using a similar multi-state firm design, starting salaries are 1.8-7.2% lower in reform states and posted salaries for the same job fall by 1.4-5.5%. These labor supply shocks yield an average labor demand elasticity of -1.0. Our results reveal a substantial decline in match quality and worker bargaining power as UI benefits become less generous.
papers.zh_title: 失业保险、起薪与工作
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了七个州实施的永久性失业保险福利削减23%-50%对劳动力市场的影响。利用关联的企业-机构数据，我们发现，相对于同一企业在其他州的机构，位于改革州的机构就业增长快1.5%-2.4%。使用类似的多州企业设计，改革州的起薪低1.8%-7.2%，同一职位的公布薪资下降1.4%-5.5%。这些劳动力供给冲击产生了平均为-1.0的劳动力需求弹性。我们的结果表明，随着失业保险福利变得不那么慷慨，匹配质量和工人议价能力显著下降。

papers.title: On the Role of Learning, Human Capital, and Performance Incentives for Wages
papers.authors: Braz Camargo, Fabian Lange, Elena Pastorino
papers.abstract: Although performance pay is a key source of wage dispersion, little is known about why it typically accounts for only a small portion of pay or how it shapes wages over the life cycle. As we document, standard models of performance incentives fail to explain its declining importance later in the life cycle. We fill this gap and resolve this puzzle by proposing a new framework that integrates well-known models of dynamic moral hazard, uncertainty about worker productivity, and human capital acquisition, and proving it is identified based on its equilibrium characterization. Once we parameterize the model using well-known firm-level data, we find that performance pay is central to life-cycle wages. Strikingly, its level and life-cycle profile are not driven by the canonical risk-incentive tradeoff of moral-hazard models. Instead, they reflect workers’ desire to insure against the productivity risk arising from uncertainty about their productivity and to acquire human capital.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D8, D86, J24, J3, J31, J33, J41, J44
papers.zh_title: 论学习、人力资本与绩效激励对工资的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管绩效薪酬是工资离散的关键来源，但关于它为何通常仅占薪酬的一小部分，以及它如何塑造整个生命周期的工资，人们知之甚少。正如我们所记录的，标准的绩效激励模型无法解释其在生命周期后期重要性下降的现象。我们通过提出一个新框架来填补这一空白并解决这一谜题，该框架整合了关于动态道德风险、工人生产率不确定性以及人力资本获取的知名模型，并证明基于其均衡特征可以识别该模型。一旦我们使用知名的企业层面数据对模型进行参数化，我们发现绩效薪酬对生命周期工资至关重要。引人注目的是，其水平和生命周期轨迹并非由道德风险模型中经典的风险-激励权衡所驱动。相反，它们反映了工人希望为因自身生产率不确定性而产生的生产率风险提供保险，以及获取人力资本的愿望。

papers.title: Why Does Right-to-Carry Cause Violent Crime to Increase?
papers.authors: John J. Donohue, Samuel V. Cai, Matthew V. Bondy, Philip J. Cook
papers.abstract: While the recent state panel data literature has broadly concluded that “right-to-carry” (RTC) concealed handgun regimes increase violent crime, there is little empirical evidence on the precise mechanisms that drive this increase. Using data from 217 US cities, we find that the effect of RTC on violent crime is concentrated to large urban centers. In cities with an average population of over 250,000 between 1979 and 2019, we find that the introduction of RTC increases violent crime by 20 percent. We then present novel estimates that RTC increases gun theft by 50 percent and lowers violent crime clearance rates by 9 percent in these large cities. Leveraging city-level heterogeneity in RTC-induced violent crime effects, we demonstrate that these two mechanisms explain a substantial portion of the RTC-induced increase in violent crime.
papers.zh_title: 为何“携带权”会导致暴力犯罪增加？
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管近期州面板数据文献普遍认为“携带权”（RTC）隐蔽持枪制度会增加暴力犯罪，但关于驱动这一增长的具体机制，实证证据很少。利用美国217个城市的数据，我们发现RTC对暴力犯罪的影响集中在大城市中心。在1979年至2019年间平均人口超过25万的城市中，我们发现引入RTC会使暴力犯罪增加20%。随后，我们提出了新的估计，表明在这些大城市中，RTC使枪支盗窃增加50%，并使暴力犯罪破案率降低9%。利用城市层面RTC引发的暴力犯罪效应的异质性，我们证明这两种机制解释了RTC导致的暴力犯罪增长的很大一部分。

papers.title: Mechanism Design Approaches to Blockchain Consensus
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans, Richard T. Holden
papers.abstract: Blockchain consensus is a state whereby each node in a network agrees on the current state of the blockchain. Existing protocols achieve consensus via a contest or voting procedure to select one node as a dictator to propose new blocks. However, this procedure can still lead to potential attacks that make consensus harder to achieve or lead to coordination issues if multiple, competing chains (i.e., forks) are created with the potential that an untruthful fork might be selected. We explore the potential for mechanisms to be used to achieve consensus that are triggered when there is a dispute impeding consensus. Using the feature that nodes stake tokens in proof of stake (POS) protocols, we construct revelation mechanisms in which the unique (subgame perfect) equilibrium involves validating nodes propose truthful blocks using only the information that exists amongst all nodes. We construct operationally and computationally simple mechanisms under both Byzantine Fault Tolerance and a Longest Chain Rule, and discuss their robustness to attacks. Our perspective is that the use of simple mechanisms is an unexplored area of blockchain consensus and has the potential to mitigate known trade-offs and enhance scalability.
papers.zh_title: 区块链共识的机制设计方法
papers.zh_abstract: 区块链共识是指网络中每个节点就区块链的当前状态达成一致的状态。现有协议通过竞赛或投票程序选择单个节点作为独裁者来提议新区块，从而实现共识。然而，这一程序仍可能导致潜在攻击，使共识更难达成，或者如果创建了多个竞争链（即分叉），且可能选择不诚实的分叉，则会导致协调问题。我们探索了在出现阻碍共识的争议时，使用机制来实现共识的潜力。利用权益证明（POS）协议中节点质押代币的特性，我们构建了揭示机制，在该机制中，唯一的（子博弈完美）均衡涉及验证节点仅使用所有节点之间存在的现有信息来提议诚实的区块。我们在拜占庭容错和最长链规则下构建了操作和计算上简单的机制，并讨论了它们对攻击的稳健性。我们的观点是，使用简单机制是区块链共识中一个尚未被探索的领域，并且有可能缓解已知的权衡并增强可扩展性。

papers.title: Globalization, Trade Imbalances and Inequality
papers.authors: Rafael Dix-Carneiro, Sharon Traiberman
papers.abstract: We investigate the role of trade imbalances for the distributional consequences of globalization. We do so through the lens of a quantitative, general equilibrium, multi-country, multi-sector model of trade with four key ingredients: (a) workers with different levels of skills are organized into separate representative households; (b) endogenous trade imbalances arise from households' consumption and saving decisions; (c) production exhibits capital-skill complementarity; (d) labor market frictions across sectors and non-employment. We conduct a series of counterfactual experiments that illustrate the quantitative importance of both trade imbalances and capital-skill complementarity for the dynamics of the skill premium. We show that modelling trade imbalances can lead to stark differences between short- and long-run consequences of globalization shocks for the skill premium.
papers.zh_title: 全球化、贸易失衡与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了贸易失衡在全球化分配后果中的作用。我们通过一个定量的一般均衡、多国、多部门贸易模型来审视这一问题，该模型包含四个关键要素：(a) 不同技能水平的工人被组织成独立的代表性家庭；(b) 内生贸易失衡源于家庭的消费和储蓄决策；(c) 生产表现出资本-技能互补性；(d) 跨部门的劳动力市场摩擦和非就业。我们进行了一系列反事实实验，这些实验说明了贸易失衡和资本-技能互补性对技能溢价动态的定量重要性。我们表明，对贸易失衡进行建模可能导致全球化冲击对技能溢价的短期和长期后果之间存在显著差异。

papers.title: Aggregate Lapsation Risk
papers.authors: Ralph S. J. Koijen, Hae Kang Lee, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: We study aggregate lapsation risk in the life insurance sector. We construct two lapsation risk factors that explain a large fraction of the common variation in lapse rates of the 30 largest life insurance companies. The first is a cyclical factor that is positively correlated with credit spreads and unemployment, while the second factor is a trend factor that correlates with the level of interest rates. Using a novel policy-level database from a large life insurer, we examine the heterogeneity in risk factor exposures based on policy and policyholder characteristics. Young policyholders with higher health risk in low-income areas are more likely to lapse their policies during economic downturns. We explore the implications for hedging and valuation of life insurance contracts. Ignoring aggregate lapsation risk results in mispricing of life insurance policies. The calibrated model points to overpricing on average. In the cross-section, young, low-income, and high-health risk households face higher effective mark-ups than the old, high-income, and healthy.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：E32, E44, G12, G22, G52
papers.zh_title: 总体退保风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了寿险行业的总体退保风险。我们构建了两个退保风险因子，它们解释了30家最大寿险公司退保率中大部分共同变动。第一个是周期性因子，与信用利差和失业率正相关，而第二个是趋势因子，与利率水平相关。利用一家大型寿险公司新颖的保单层面数据库，我们根据保单和保单持有人特征考察了风险因子暴露的异质性。在经济衰退期间，低收入地区健康风险较高的年轻保单持有人更有可能退保。我们探讨了对寿险合同对冲和估值的启示。忽略总体退保风险会导致寿险保单定价错误。校准后的模型表明平均而言存在定价过高。在横截面上，与年长、高收入和健康的家庭相比，年轻、低收入和高健康风险的家庭面临更高的有效加价。

papers.title: The Effect of Labor Market Liberalization on Political Behavior and Free Market Norms
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Netanel Ben-Porath, Shahar Lahad, Victor Lavy, Michal Palgi
papers.abstract: We study the effects of labor market liberalization on political behavior and attitudes towards free-market capitalism and socialism, exploiting a reform whereby the Israeli socialist communities called kibbutzim shifted from equal sharing to market-based wages. Our identification strategy relies on this reform's sharp and staggered implementation in different kibbutzim. We first examine changes in behavior associated with this labor market liberalization and document that the reform led to a shift in electoral voting patterns, resulting in decreased support for left-wing political parties and increased support for the center and right parties in national elections. Using annual survey data on attitudes over 25 years, we show that the reform led to increased support for free-market policies such as full privatization and differential wages. Moreover, it decreased support for socialist policies such as the joint ownership of production means. Yet, the reform increased support for the safety net to support weak members through mutual guarantee. These effects appear to be driven by an increase in living standards and work ethics that resulted from the reform. We conclude that introducing market-based wages led to a shift in attitudes towards a market economy with compassion, revealing a change in members’ support from their traditional democratic socialist model to a social democratic model.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场自由化对政治行为与自由市场规范的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了劳动力市场自由化对政治行为以及对自由市场资本主义和社会主义态度的影响，利用了一项改革，即以色列的社会主义社区——基布兹——从平均分配转向基于市场的工资。我们的识别策略依赖于这项改革在不同基布兹中突然且交错实施的特点。我们首先考察了与此次劳动力市场自由化相关的行为变化，并记录到该改革导致了选举投票模式的转变，表现为在全国选举中对左翼政党的支持减少，对中间和右翼政党的支持增加。利用25年间的年度态度调查数据，我们表明该改革导致了对自由市场政策（如完全私有化和差异化工资）的支持增加。此外，它减少了对社会主义政策（如生产资料共同所有制）的支持。然而，该改革增加了对通过互助保障支持弱势成员的安全网的支持。这些效应似乎是由改革带来的生活水平提高和职业道德增强所驱动的。我们得出结论，引入基于市场的工资导致态度向带有同情心的市场经济转变，揭示了成员对其传统民主社会主义模式的支持转向社会民主模式。

papers.title: Excess Savings and Twin Deficits: The Transmission of Fiscal Stimulus in Open Economies
papers.authors: Rishabh Aggarwal, Adrien Auclert, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: We study the effects of debt-financed fiscal transfers in a general equilibrium, heterogeneous-agent model of the world economy. In the long run, increases in government debt anywhere raise the world interest rate and increase private wealth everywhere. In the short run, a country with a larger-than-average fiscal deficit experiences both a large increase in private savings (“excess savings”) and a small but persistent current account deficit (a slow-motion “twin deficit”). These patterns are consistent with the evolution of the world’s balance of payments since the beginning of the Covid pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, E62, F32, F41
papers.zh_title: 超额储蓄与双赤字：开放经济中财政刺激的传导
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个世界经济的异质性代理人一般均衡模型中研究了债务融资型财政转移支付的影响。长期来看，任何地方政府债务的增加都会提高世界利率并增加所有地方的私人财富。短期内，一个财政赤字高于平均水平的国家会同时经历私人储蓄的大幅增加（“超额储蓄”）和一个小而持续的经常账户赤字（一个缓慢的“双赤字”）。这些模式与自新冠疫情开始以来世界国际收支的演变是一致的。

papers.title: Labor Supply and the Pension-Contribution Link
papers.authors: Eric French, Attila S. Lindner, Cormac O'Dea, Tom A. Zawisza
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of public pension systems on labor supply far from the normal retirement age by exploiting Poland's switch from a Defined Benefit to a Notional Defined Contribution scheme for men born after 1948. Using the universe of taxpayers and this sharp cohort-based discontinuity in the link between current contributions and future benefits, we estimate an employment elasticity with respect to the return to work of 0.44 for ages 51-54. We estimate a lifecycle model that matches these results. The model implies that the change in the contribution-benefit link from the reform increases employment among those in their 30s but decreases it at older ages, reducing overall labor supply across the lifecycle by 2 months.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：D15, H55, J22, J26
papers.zh_title: 劳动力供给与养老金缴费关联
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用波兰对1948年后出生的男性从固定收益制转向名义固定缴费制的改革，估计了公共养老金制度对远未达到正常退休年龄的劳动力供给的影响。利用全体纳税人数据和这种基于出生队列的、当前缴费与未来福利之间关联的尖锐断点，我们估计了51-54岁年龄段劳动力供给对工作回报的弹性为0.44。我们估计了一个与这些结果相匹配的生命周期模型。该模型表明，改革带来的缴费-福利关联变化增加了30多岁人群的就业，但减少了老年人群的就业，从而在整个生命周期内将总体劳动力供给减少了2个月。

papers.title: The Political Polarization of Corporate America
papers.authors: Vyacheslav Fos, Elisabeth Kempf, Margarita Tsoutsoura
papers.abstract: U.S. executives are increasingly segregating by political party. Using voter registration records for top executives of S&P 1500 firms between 2008 and 2022, we document that while the executive pool shifted toward Democrats, partisan segregation across firms increased sharply. Intensifying segregation offsets 74% of the decline in team-level homogeneity implied by changing party composition. Turnover is the driving force: politically misaligned executives are more likely to depart, and executives who join top teams increasingly match the team’s partisan majority. The trend accelerates after the 2016 presidential election, marking an inflection point in the political polarization of corporate America.
papers.zh_title: 美国企业的政治极化
papers.zh_abstract: 美国高管正日益按政党划分。利用2008年至2022年间标普1500强企业高管的选民登记记录，我们记录了以下现象：虽然高管群体整体转向民主党，但企业间的党派隔离急剧加剧。这种加剧的隔离抵消了因政党构成变化所隐含的团队层面同质性下降的74%。人员流动是主要驱动力：政治立场不一致的高管更可能离职，而加入高层团队的高管越来越倾向于与团队的党派多数保持一致。这一趋势在2016年总统大选后加速，标志着美国企业政治极化的一个转折点。

papers.title: Politics At Work
papers.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Valdemar Pinho Neto, Edoardo Teso
papers.abstract: We study how individual political views shape firm behavior and labor market outcomes using new micro-data from Brazil. We first show that business owners are considerably more likely to employ copartisan workers. This phenomenon is in part driven by the overlapping of political and social networks. Multiple tests—a survey, an event study, analyses of wage premia and promotions within the firm, and a field experiment—further highlight how business owners’ political preferences directly influence firms’ employment decisions. A channel of political discrimination appears more relevant than one of political quid-pro-quo between firms and politicians.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D22, D72, D73, G0, G3, G4, J0, J15, J2, J3, J7, O0, O1
papers.zh_title: 职场中的政治
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自巴西的新微观数据，研究个人政治观点如何塑造企业行为和劳动力市场结果。我们首先发现，企业主雇佣同党派工人的可能性显著更高。这一现象部分由政治与社会网络的重叠驱动。多项检验——一项调查、一项事件研究、对企业内部工资溢价和晋升的分析，以及一项实地实验——进一步凸显了企业主的政治偏好如何直接影响企业的雇佣决策。政治歧视的渠道似乎比企业与政客之间的政治利益交换渠道更为相关。

papers.title: Uncharted Waters: Effects of Maritime Emission Regulation
papers.authors: Jamie Hansen-Lewis, Michelle M. Marcus
papers.abstract: Maritime shipping emits as much fine particulate matter as half of global road traffic. We are the first to measure the consequences of US maritime emissions standards on air quality, human health, racial exposure disparities, and behavior. The introduction of US maritime emissions control areas significantly decreased fine particulate matter, low birth weight, and infant mortality. Yet, only about half of the forecasted fine particulate matter abatement was achieved by the policy. We show evidence consistent with behavioral responses among ship operators, other polluters, and individuals that muted the policy’s impact, but were not incorporated in ex-ante models.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, EH, ITI；JEL：F18, I14, Q52, Q53, Q56
papers.zh_title: 未知水域：海上排放法规的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 海上航运排放的细颗粒物相当于全球道路交通排放量的一半。我们首次衡量了美国海上排放标准对空气质量、人类健康、种族暴露差异和行为的影响。美国海上排放控制区的引入显著降低了细颗粒物浓度、低出生体重率和婴儿死亡率。然而，该政策仅实现了预测细颗粒物减排量的大约一半。我们展示的证据与船舶运营商、其他污染者和个人之间的行为反应一致，这些反应削弱了政策的影响，但并未被纳入事前模型。

papers.title: Industrial Robots, Workers' Safety, and Health
papers.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Luca Stella, Tianyi Wang
papers.abstract: This study explores the relationship between the adoption of industrial robots and workplace injuries. Using establishment-level data on injuries, we find that a one standard deviation increase in our commuting zone-level measure of robot exposure reduces work-related annual injury rates by approximately 1.2 cases per 100 workers. US commuting zones more exposed to robot penetration experience a significant increase in drug- or alcohol-related deaths and mental health problems. Employing longitudinal data from Germany, we exploit within-individual changes in robot exposure and document that a one standard deviation change in robot exposure led to a 4% decline in physical job intensity and a 5% decline in disability, but no evidence of significant effects on mental health and work and life satisfaction.
papers.zh_title: 工业机器人、工人安全与健康
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了工业机器人的采用与工作场所伤害之间的关系。利用企业层面的伤害数据，我们发现，通勤区层面的机器人暴露度指标每增加一个标准差，与工作相关的年伤害率大约每100名工人减少1.2例。美国机器人渗透度较高的通勤区经历了药物或酒精相关死亡以及心理健康问题的显著增加。利用德国的纵向数据，我们利用个体内部机器人暴露度的变化，发现机器人暴露度的一个标准差变化导致体力工作强度下降4%，残疾率下降5%，但没有发现对心理健康以及工作和生活满意度有显著影响的证据。

papers.title: Failing Just Fine: Assessing Careers of Venture Capital-backed Entrepreneurs Via a Non-Wage Measure
papers.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Paul Gompers, George Hu, Will Levinson, Vladimir Mukharlyamov
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a non-pecuniary measure of career achievement, Seniority. Based on a database of over 5 million resumes, this metric exploits the variation in job titles and how long they take to attain. When non-monetary factors influence career choice, inference benefits from the use of non-wage measures, such as seniority. We apply it to study labor market outcomes of VC-backed entrepreneurs. Would-be founders experience accelerated career trajectories prior to founding, significantly outperforming graduates of same-tier colleges with similar first jobs. After exiting their start-ups, they obtain jobs about three years more senior than their right-before-founding peers. Even failed founders land jobs with higher seniority than those attained by their peers in the meantime.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：J0, J3, J30, J31, J44, J6, J63
papers.zh_title: 失败也无妨：通过非工资指标评估风险投资支持企业家的职业生涯
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种非金钱的职业成就衡量指标——资历。基于一个超过500万份简历的数据库，该指标利用了职位头衔的差异以及获得这些头衔所需的时间。当非金钱因素影响职业选择时，使用资历等非工资指标有助于推断。我们将其应用于研究风险投资支持企业家的劳动力市场结果。潜在的创始人在创业前经历了加速的职业轨迹，其表现显著优于来自同级别大学且拥有类似第一份工作的毕业生。在离开初创企业后，他们获得的职位比创业前同期的同龄人高出约三年的资历。即使是失败的创始人，其获得的职位资历也高于同龄人同期所达到的水平。

papers.title: Labor Market Effects of Short-Cycle Higher Education Programs: Lessons from Colombia
papers.authors: Maria Marta Ferreyra, Camila Galindo, Sergio S. Urzúa
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the heterogeneous labor market effects of enrolling in higher education short-cycle (SC) programs. Expanding access to these programs might affect the behavior of some students (compliers) in two margins: the expansion margin (students who would not have enrolled in higher education otherwise) and the diversion margin (students who would have enrolled in bachelor's programs otherwise). To quantify these responses, we exploit local exogenous variation in the supply of higher education institutions (HEIs) facing Colombian high school graduates in an empirical multinomial choice model with several instruments. According to our findings, the presence of at least one HEI specialized in SC programs in the vicinity of the student's high school municipality increases SC enrollment by 3.7-4.5 percentage points (40-50% of the SC enrollment rate). The diversion margin largely drives this effect. For female compliers, enrollment in SC programs increases formal employment relative to the next-best alternative. For male compliers, in contrast, it lowers formal employment and wages. These results should alert policymakers of the unexpected consequences of higher education expansionary policies.
papers.zh_title: 短期高等教育项目的劳动力市场效应：来自哥伦比亚的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了就读高等教育短期项目（SC）的异质性劳动力市场效应。扩大这些项目的入学机会可能会从两个方面影响部分学生（依从者）的行为：扩张边际（原本不会接受高等教育的学生）和转移边际（原本会就读本科项目的学生）。为了量化这些反应，我们利用哥伦比亚高中毕业生面临的高等教育机构（HEIs）供给的局部外生变异，在一个包含多个工具变量的实证多项选择模型中进行分析。根据我们的发现，在学生高中所在市镇附近至少有一所专门提供短期项目的高等教育机构，会使短期项目入学率提高3.7-4.5个百分点（占短期项目入学率的40-50%）。这一效应主要由转移边际驱动。对于女性依从者而言，相对于次优选择，就读短期项目增加了正规就业。相比之下，对于男性依从者，它降低了正规就业和工资。这些结果应提醒政策制定者注意高等教育扩张政策可能带来的意外后果。

papers.title: Prediction Machines, Insurance, and Protection: An Alternative Perspective on AI's Role in Production
papers.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
papers.abstract: Recent advances in AI represent improvements in prediction. We examine how decision-making and risk management strategies change when prediction improves. The adoption of AI may cause substitution away from risk management activities used when rules are applied (rules require always taking the same action), instead allowing for decision-making (choosing actions based on the predicted state). We provide a formal model evaluating the impact of AI and how risk management, stakes, and inter-related tasks affect AI adoption. The broad conclusion is that AI adoption can be stymied by existing processes designed to address uncertainty. In particular, many processes are designed to enable coordinated decision-making among different actors in an organization. AI can make coordination even more challenging. However, when the cost of changing such processes falls, then the returns from AI adoption increase.
papers.zh_title: 预测机器、保险与保护：关于人工智能在生产中作用的另一种视角
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能的最新进展代表了预测能力的提升。我们研究了当预测能力提高时，决策和风险管理策略如何变化。人工智能的采用可能导致替代掉在应用规则时使用的风险管理活动（规则要求始终采取相同行动），转而允许进行决策（根据预测状态选择行动）。我们提供了一个正式模型来评估人工智能的影响，以及风险管理、利害关系和相互关联的任务如何影响人工智能的采用。总体结论是，人工智能的采用可能受到旨在应对不确定性的现有流程的阻碍。特别是，许多流程旨在协调组织中不同参与者之间的决策。人工智能可能使协调更具挑战性。然而，当改变此类流程的成本下降时，人工智能采用的回报就会增加。

papers.title: The Geography of Child Penalties and Gender Norms: A Pseudo-Event Study Approach
papers.authors: Henrik Kleven
papers.abstract: This paper develops a pseudo-event study approach for estimating child penalties using cross-sectional data. The approach produces estimates that align closely with those obtained from true event studies using panel data and is statistically more precise. This allows for providing more granular evidence and study mechanisms. The paper presents a detailed investigation of the variation in child penalties across time, geography, and demographic/cultural groups in the US. There is large variation in these dimensions. Using a variety of approaches—including epidemiological studies of movers and immigrants—the paper finds that gender norms have sizable effects on child penalties.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：J13, J16, J21, J22, J61
papers.zh_title: 育儿惩罚与性别规范的地理分布：一种伪事件研究方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种利用横截面数据估计育儿惩罚的伪事件研究方法。该方法产生的估计值与使用面板数据的真实事件研究得出的估计值高度一致，并且在统计上更为精确。这使得能够提供更细粒度的证据并研究机制。本文详细调查了美国育儿惩罚在时间、地理以及人口/文化群体间的变异。在这些维度上存在巨大差异。利用多种方法——包括针对迁移者和移民的流行病学研究——本文发现性别规范对育儿惩罚有显著影响。

papers.title: Determinants of Health Insurance Enrollment and Health Expenditure in Ghana: An Empirical Analysis
papers.authors: Kwame Adjei-Mantey, Charles Yuji Horioka
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the determinants of health insurance enrollment and health expenditure in Ghana using micro data from wave 7 of the Ghana Living Standards Survey (GLSS 7) with emphasis on the role of risk preferences and the availability of health facilities in one’s own community. It is possible to analyze the determinants of health insurance enrollment in Ghana because its public health insurance system (the National Health Insurance Scheme or NHIS) is, in theory, mandatory, but is, in actual practice, voluntary, with only about 40% of the population enrolled in the scheme. Our empirical findings show that risk preferences have a significant impact on health insurance enrollment, with risk averse individuals being significantly more likely than other households to enroll in health insurance. Moreover, our findings also show that very poor households are significantly more likely to enroll in health insurance than other households, perhaps because they are exempt from paying premiums for health insurance. Finally, our findings also show that the availability of health facilities in one’s own community significantly decreases expenditures on health care.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：D11, D12, D81, I12, I13
papers.zh_title: 加纳健康保险参保与健康支出的决定因素：一项实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用加纳生活水平调查第七轮（GLSS 7）的微观数据，分析了加纳健康保险参保与健康支出的决定因素，重点关注风险偏好和社区内医疗设施可及性的作用。之所以能够分析加纳健康保险参保的决定因素，是因为其公共健康保险体系（国家健康保险计划，NHIS）理论上具有强制性，但实际执行中却是自愿性的，仅有约40%的人口参保。我们的实证结果表明，风险偏好对健康保险参保有显著影响，风险规避型个体参保的可能性显著高于其他家庭。此外，我们的发现还显示，非常贫困的家庭参保的可能性显著高于其他家庭，这可能是因为他们免缴健康保险费。最后，我们的研究还表明，社区内医疗设施的可及性显著降低了医疗保健支出。

papers.title: The Quality of Lower-Track Education: Evidence from Britain
papers.authors: Damon Clark
papers.abstract: For much of the 20th century, British students were tracked into higher-track (for the "top" 20%) or lower-track (for the rest) secondary schools. Opponents of tracking contend that the lower-track schools in these systems will inevitably provide low-quality education. In this paper I examine this claim using a 1947 reform that increased the minimum school leaving age from 14 to 15. First, I show that over 95% of the students affected by the reform ("compliers") attended lower-track schools. Second, using new data, I show that for both men and women, the additional schooling induced by the reform had close to zero impact on a range of labor market outcomes including earnings. Third, I show that lower-track schools featured, among other things, large classes and a curriculum that promoted practical education. I conclude that my findings shed new light on the potential consequences of educational tracking.
papers.zh_title: 低轨教育的质量：来自英国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪的大部分时间里，英国学生被分流到高轨中学（面向“顶尖”20%的学生）或低轨中学（面向其余学生）。反对教育分轨的人认为，这些体系中的低轨学校不可避免地会提供低质量的教育。本文利用1947年将最低离校年龄从14岁提高到15岁的改革来检验这一论断。首先，我表明受改革影响的学生（“依从者”）中超过95%就读于低轨学校。其次，利用新数据，我表明对于男性和女性而言，改革带来的额外教育对包括收入在内的一系列劳动力市场结果的影响几乎为零。第三，我表明低轨学校的特点包括大班额和推行实用教育的课程。我的结论是，这些发现为教育分轨的潜在后果提供了新的视角。

papers.title: A Shot at Economic Prosperity: Long-term Effects of India’s Childhood Immunization Program on Earnings and Consumption Expenditure
papers.authors: Amit Summan, Arindam Nandi, David E. Bloom
papers.abstract: Routine childhood vaccinations are among the most cost-effective child health interventions. In recent years, the broader benefits of vaccines, which include improved cognitive and schooling outcomes, have also been established. This paper evaluates the long-term economic benefits of India’s national program of childhood vaccinations, known as the Universal Immunization Programme (UIP). We combine individual-level data from the 68th round of the National Sample Survey of India (2011–2012) with district-wise data on the rollout of UIP from 1985 to1990. We employ age-district fixed effects regression models to compare the earnings and per capita household consumer spending of 21- to 26-year-old adults who were born in UIP-covered districts vis-à-vis non-UIP districts between 1985 and 1990. We find that exposure to UIP in infancy increases weekly wages by 13.8% (95% CI: 7.6% to 20.3%, p<0.01) and monthly per capita household consumption expenditure by 2.9% (95% CI: 0.7% to 5.0%, p<0.01). Program exposure also reduces the probability that an individual’s household relies on agriculture as the main source of income by 1.9% (95% CI: 0.0% to 3.5%, p<0.01). The findings are robust to several specifications including varying study duration and accounting for potential migration. The effects vary by sex, location, and caste group.
papers.zh_title: 迈向经济繁荣的一针：印度儿童免疫计划对收入和消费支出的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 常规儿童疫苗接种是最具成本效益的儿童健康干预措施之一。近年来，疫苗的广泛益处，包括改善认知和学业成果，也已得到证实。本文评估了印度国家儿童疫苗接种计划（即全民免疫计划，UIP）的长期经济效益。我们将印度国家抽样调查第68轮（2011-2012年）的个人层面数据与1985年至1990年UIP在各地区的推广数据相结合。我们采用年龄-地区固定效应回归模型，比较1985年至1990年间出生在UIP覆盖地区与非UIP覆盖地区的21至26岁成年人的收入及人均家庭消费支出。我们发现，婴儿期接触UIP可使周工资提高13.8%（95%置信区间：7.6%至20.3%，p<0.01），使月人均家庭消费支出提高2.9%（95%置信区间：0.7%至5.0%，p<0.01）。项目接触还使个人家庭依赖农业作为主要收入来源的概率降低1.9%（95%置信区间：0.0%至3.5%，p<0.01）。这些发现在多种设定下（包括改变研究时长和考虑潜在迁移）均保持稳健。效应因性别、地点和种姓群体而异。

papers.title: Preparing for the (Non-Existent?) Future of Work
papers.authors: Anton Korinek, Megan Juelfs
papers.abstract: This paper considers the labor market and distributional implications of a scenario of ever-more-intelligent autonomous machines that substitute for human labor and drive down wages. We lay out three concerns arising from such a scenario and evaluate recent predictions and objections to these concerns. Then we analyze how a utilitarian social planner would allocate work and income if these concerns start to materialize. As the income produced by autonomous machines rises and the value of labor declines, a utilitarian planner finds it optimal to phase out work, beginning with workers who have low labor productivity and job satisfaction, since they have comparative advantage in enjoying leisure. This is in stark contrast to welfare systems that force individuals with low labor productivity to work. If there are significant wage declines, avoiding mass misery will require other ways of distributing income than labor markets, whether via sufficiently well-distributed capital ownership or via benefits. Recipients could still engage in work for its own sake if they enjoy work amenities such as structure, purpose and meaning. If work gives rise to positive externalities such as social connections or political stability, or if individuals undervalue the benefits of work because of internalities, then a social planner would incentivize work. However, in the long run, the planner might be able to achieve a higher level of social welfare by adopting alternative ways of providing these benefits.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E6, J2, O3
papers.zh_title: 为（不存在的？）未来工作做准备
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了在日益智能化的自主机器替代人类劳动并压低工资的情景下，劳动力市场和分配方面的含义。我们阐述了这种情景可能引发的三个担忧，并评估了近期对这些担忧的预测和反对意见。然后，我们分析了当这些担忧开始显现时，功利主义社会规划者将如何分配工作和收入。随着自主机器生产的收入上升和劳动价值下降，功利主义规划者发现逐步淘汰工作是最优选择，从劳动生产率和工作满意度较低的工人开始，因为他们在享受闲暇方面具有比较优势。这与强迫低劳动生产率个体工作的福利体系形成鲜明对比。如果工资大幅下降，避免大规模贫困将需要劳动力市场以外的其他收入分配方式，无论是通过充分分散的资本所有权还是通过福利金。如果个体享受工作带来的结构、目标和意义等福利，他们仍可以为了工作本身而继续工作。如果工作产生积极的外部性，如社会联系或政治稳定，或者如果个体因内部性而低估工作的益处，那么社会规划者将激励工作。然而，从长远来看，规划者或许能够通过采用提供这些益处的替代方式来实现更高的社会福利水平。

papers.title: Screening Adaptive Cartels
papers.authors: Juan M. Ortner, Sylvain Chassang, Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi
papers.abstract: We propose an equilibrium theory of data-driven antitrust oversight in which regulators launch investigations on the basis of suspicious bidding patterns and cartels can adapt to the statistical screens used by regulators. We emphasize the use of asymptotically safe tests, i.e. tests that are passed with probability approaching one by competitive firms, regardless of the underlying economic environment. Our main result establishes that screening for collusion with safe tests is a robust improvement over laissez-faire. Safe tests do not create new collusive equilibria, and do not hurt competitive industries. In addition, safe tests can have strict bite, including unraveling all collusive equilibria in some settings. We provide evidence that cartel adaptation to regulatory oversight is a real concern.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PE；JEL：C57, C72, D44, H57, L4
papers.zh_title: 筛选适应性卡特尔
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个数据驱动的反垄断监管的均衡理论，其中监管机构基于可疑的投标模式发起调查，而卡特尔可以适应监管机构使用的统计筛选方法。我们强调使用渐近安全检验，即无论潜在经济环境如何，竞争性企业以趋近于一的概率通过的检验。我们的主要结果表明，使用安全检验筛选合谋是对自由放任的稳健改进。安全检验不会创造新的合谋均衡，也不会损害竞争性行业。此外，安全检验可以产生严格效力，包括在某些情况下瓦解所有合谋均衡。我们提供证据表明，卡特尔对监管监督的适应性是一个真实的问题。

papers.title: Using Divide-and-Conquer to Improve Tax Collection
papers.authors: Samuel Kapon, Lucia Del Carpio, Sylvain Chassang
papers.abstract: Tax collection by capacity constrained governments may exhibit multiple equilibria: if delinquency is low, limited enforcement capacity is enough to discipline deviators; if delinquency is high, limited enforcement capacity is overstretched and no longer dissuasive. In principle, divide-and-conquer, a theoretically important but untested principle from mechanism design, can be used to unravel the undesirable high-delinquency equilibrium. We investigate the challenge of doing so in practice.\nOur preferred mechanism takes the form of Prioritized Iterative Enforcement (PIE). Tax-payers are assigned a rank trading-off expected collection and expected capacity use. Tax-payers are then iteratively threatened in small groups for which collection capacity is sufficient to induce compliance. After repayment occurs, unused collection capacity is released to issue the next round of threats.\nIn partnership with a district of Lima (Peru) we experimentally evaluate the impact of PIE on the collection of property taxes from 13432 tax-payers. Reduced-form evidence both validates and refines the theoretical benchmark. A structural model of tax-payer behavior suggests that, keeping the number of collection actions fixed, PIE would increase tax revenue by 11.3%.
papers.zh_title: 利用分而治之策略改善税收征管
papers.zh_abstract: 能力受限的政府的税收征管可能存在多重均衡：如果拖欠率低，有限的执法能力足以惩戒违规者；如果拖欠率高，有限的执法能力不堪重负，不再具有威慑力。原则上，分而治之——一个理论上重要但未经检验的机制设计原则——可以用来瓦解不理想的高拖欠率均衡。我们研究了在实践中实现这一目标的挑战。 我们偏好的机制采取优先迭代执法的形式。纳税人被分配一个排名，该排名权衡了预期征收额和预期能力使用。然后，纳税人被迭代地以小组形式受到威胁，这些小组的征收能力足以确保合规。在还款发生后，未使用的征收能力被释放以进行下一轮威胁。 我们与秘鲁利马的一个区合作，通过实验评估了优先迭代执法对13432名纳税人财产税征收的影响。简化形式的证据既验证了理论基准，也对其进行了完善。一个纳税人行为的结构模型表明，在征收行动数量固定的情况下，优先迭代执法将使税收收入增加11.3%。

papers.title: The Virtue of Complexity in Return Prediction
papers.authors: Bryan T. Kelly, Semyon Malamud, Kangying Zhou
papers.abstract: Much of the extant literature predicts market returns with “simple” models that use only a few parameters. Contrary to conventional wisdom, we theoretically prove that simple models severely understate return predictability compared to “complex” models in which the number of parameters exceeds the number of observations. We empirically document the virtue of complexity in US equity market return prediction. Our findings establish the rationale for modeling expected returns through machine learning.
papers.zh_title: 回报预测中复杂性的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 现有文献大多使用仅包含少数参数的“简单”模型来预测市场回报。与传统观点相反，我们从理论上证明，与参数数量超过观测数量的“复杂”模型相比，简单模型会严重低估回报的可预测性。我们通过实证记录了美国股票市场回报预测中复杂性的价值。我们的发现为通过机器学习建模预期回报提供了理论依据。

papers.title: Information Spillovers and Sovereign Debt: Theory Meets the Eurozone Crisis
papers.authors: Harold L. Cole, Guillermo Ordoñez, Daniel Neuhann
papers.abstract: We develop a theory of information spillovers in sovereign bond markets in which investors can acquire information about default risk before trading in primary and secondary markets. If primary markets are structured as multi-unit discriminatory-price auctions, an endogenous winner’s curse leads to strategic complementarities in information acquisition. As a result, shocks to default risk in one country may trigger crisis episodes with widespread information acquisition, sharp increases in the level and volatility of yields in risky countries, falling yields in safe countries, endogenous market segmentation, and arbitrage profits between primary and secondary markets. These predictions are consistent with the behavior of primary and secondary market yields, market segmentation, and measures of information acquisition during the Eurozone sovereign debt crisis.
papers.zh_title: 信息溢出与主权债务：理论与欧元区危机
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个主权债券市场信息溢出理论，其中投资者可以在一级和二级市场交易前获取关于违约风险的信息。如果一级市场被构建为多单位歧视性价格拍卖，则内生的赢家诅咒会导致信息获取中的策略互补性。因此，一国违约风险的冲击可能引发危机事件，表现为广泛的信息获取、风险国家收益率水平和波动率的急剧上升、安全国家收益率的下降、内生市场分割以及一级和二级市场之间的套利利润。这些预测与欧元区主权债务危机期间一级和二级市场收益率、市场分割以及信息获取指标的行为一致。

papers.title: The Privacy Elasticity of Behavior: Conceptualization and Application
papers.authors: Inbal Dekel, Rachel Cummings, Ori Heffetz, Katrina Ligett
papers.abstract: We propose and initiate the study of privacy elasticity—the responsiveness of economic variables to small changes in the level of privacy given to participants in an economic system. Individuals rarely experience either full privacy or a complete lack of privacy; we use differential privacy—a computer-science theory increasingly adopted by industry and government—as a standardized means of quantifying continuous privacy changes. The resulting privacy measure implies a privacy-elasticity notion that is portable and comparable across contexts. We discuss applications, and demonstrate the feasibility of this approach by estimating the privacy elasticity of public-good contributions in a lab experiment.
papers.zh_title: 行为的隐私弹性：概念化与应用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出并启动了隐私弹性的研究——即经济变量对经济系统中参与者所获隐私水平微小变化的响应程度。个体很少经历完全隐私或完全缺乏隐私；我们使用差分隐私——一种日益被行业和政府采用的计算机科学理论——作为量化连续隐私变化的标准化手段。由此产生的隐私度量隐含了一个可跨情境移植和比较的隐私弹性概念。我们讨论了应用，并通过在实验室实验中估计公共品贡献的隐私弹性来证明这种方法的可行性。

papers.title: Polarization and Public Policy: Political Adverse Selection under Obamacare
papers.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Jonathan T. Kolstad, Aakaash Rao, Pietro Tebaldi, Noam Yuchtman
papers.abstract: Politicizing policies designed to address market failures can diminish their effectiveness. We document a pattern of “political adverse selection” in the health insurance exchanges established under the Affordable Care Act (ACA; “Obamacare” in political debates): Republicans enrolled at lower rates than Democrats and independents, a gap driven by healthier Republicans. This selection raised public subsidy spending by approximately $124 per enrollee annually (2.4% of average cost). We field a survey to show this selection does not exist for other insurance products. Lower enrollment and higher costs are concentrated in more Republican areas, potentially contributing to polarized views of the policy.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, POL；JEL：H0, I13, L38
papers.zh_title: 极化与公共政策：奥巴马医改下的政治逆向选择
papers.zh_abstract: 将旨在解决市场失灵的政策政治化会削弱其有效性。我们在《平价医疗法案》（ACA；政治辩论中称为“奥巴马医改”）下建立的健康保险交易所中记录了一种“政治逆向选择”模式：共和党人的参保率低于民主党人和独立人士，这一差距由更健康的共和党人驱动。这种选择每年使每位参保人的公共补贴支出增加约124美元（占平均成本的2.4%）。我们进行了一项调查，表明这种选择在其他保险产品中并不存在。较低的参保率和较高的成本集中在共和党人较多的地区，可能加剧了对该政策的两极化看法。

papers.title: Can Fiscal Externalities Be Internalized?
papers.authors: Erzo F.P. Luttmer
papers.abstract: Subsidies and in-kind transfers give rise to negative fiscal externalities. However, internalizing negative fiscal externalities through taxation would undo the subsidy or in-kind transfer that caused them. Similarly, positive fiscal externalities cannot be internalized though government subsidies. This paper describes a mechanism that transfers fiscal externalities from the government to private parties. Such transfers generate incentives within the private sector to reduce inefficiencies caused by fiscal externalities. Thus, the paper offers a straightforward, but powerful, insight: transferring fiscal externalities to third parties extends the reach of the Coase Theorem to inefficiencies stemming from fiscal externalities.
papers.zh_title: 财政外部性能否被内部化？
papers.zh_abstract: 补贴和实物转移会产生负财政外部性。然而，通过税收来内部化负财政外部性会抵消导致这些外部性的补贴或实物转移。同样，正财政外部性也无法通过政府补贴来内部化。本文描述了一种将财政外部性从政府转移到私人部门的机制。这种转移在私人部门内部产生激励，以减少由财政外部性导致的低效率。因此，本文提供了一个直接但有力的见解：将财政外部性转移给第三方，将科斯定理的适用范围扩展到由财政外部性导致的低效率。

papers.title: Are Effective Teachers for Students with Disabilities Effective Teachers for All?
papers.authors: W. Jesse Wood, Ijun Lai, Neil R. Filosa, Scott A. Imberman, Nathan D. Jones, Katharine O. Strunk
papers.abstract: The success of many students with disabilities (SWDs) depends on access to high-quality general education teachers. Yet, most measures of teacher value-added measures (VAM) fail to distinguish between a teacher’s effectiveness in educating students with and without disabilities. We create two VAM measures: one focusing on teachers’ effectiveness in improving outcomes for SWDs, and one for non-SWDs. We find top-performing teachers for non-SWDs often have relatively lower VAMs for SWDs, and that SWDs sort to teachers with lower scores in both VAMs. Overall, SWD-specific VAMs may be more suitable for identifying which teachers have a history of effectiveness with SWDs and could play a role in ensuring that students are being optimally assigned to these teachers.
papers.zh_title: 对残疾学生有效的教师对所有学生都有效吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 许多残疾学生的成功取决于能否获得高质量的普通教育教师。然而，大多数教师增值衡量指标未能区分教师在教育残疾学生和非残疾学生方面的有效性。我们创建了两个增值衡量指标：一个关注教师改善残疾学生成果的有效性，另一个关注非残疾学生。我们发现，对非残疾学生表现最佳的教师，其对残疾学生的增值衡量指标通常相对较低，并且残疾学生会选择在两项增值衡量指标上得分都较低的教师。总体而言，针对残疾学生的增值衡量指标可能更适合识别哪些教师有对残疾学生有效的历史，并可能在确保学生被最优分配给这些教师方面发挥作用。

papers.title: u* = √uv
papers.authors: Pascal Michaillat, Emmanuel Saez
papers.abstract: Most governments are mandated to maintain their economies at full employment. We propose that the best marker of full employment is the efficient unemployment rate, u*. We define u* as the unemployment rate that minimizes the nonproductive use of labor—both jobseeking and recruiting. The nonproductive use of labor is well measured by the number of jobseekers and vacancies, u + v. Through the Beveridge curve, the number of vacancies is inversely related to the number of jobseekers. With such symmetry, the labor market is efficient when there are as many jobseekers as vacancies (u = v), too tight when there are more vacancies than jobseekers (v > u), and too slack when there are more jobseekers than vacancies (u > v). Accordingly, the efficient unemployment rate is the geometric average of the unemployment and vacancy rates: u* = √uv. We compute u* for the United States between 1930 and 2022. We find for instance that the US labor market has been over full employment (u < u*) since May 2021.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E32, E52, E61, J63, J64
papers.zh_title: u* = √uv
papers.zh_abstract: 大多数政府被授权维持其经济处于充分就业状态。我们提出，充分就业的最佳标志是有效失业率u*。我们将u*定义为最小化劳动力非生产性使用——包括求职和招聘——的失业率。劳动力的非生产性使用可以通过求职者和职位空缺的数量u+v很好地衡量。通过贝弗里奇曲线，职位空缺数量与求职者数量呈负相关。在这种对称性下，当求职者数量等于职位空缺数量（u=v）时，劳动力市场是有效的；当职位空缺多于求职者（v>u）时，市场过于紧张；当求职者多于职位空缺（u>v）时，市场过于松弛。因此，有效失业率是失业率和职位空缺率的几何平均值：u* = √uv。我们计算了1930年至2022年间美国的u*。例如，我们发现自2021年5月以来，美国劳动力市场一直处于过度充分就业状态（u < u*）。

papers.title: Fed Implied Market Prices and Risk Premia
papers.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Joanna Harris, Harry Mamaysky, Cristina Tessari
papers.abstract: We introduce FDIF, a measure of Fed communication surprise based on the text of FOMC statements. FDIF measures the difference between text-implied and actual values of key market variables. Positive FDIF of countercyclical variables (e.g., credit spreads) is associated with negative macroeconomic forecast revisions; the opposite holds for procyclical variables. Industries that hedge bad FDIF news earn low returns on FOMC announcement days, but high returns on non-FOMC days. The opposite holds for FDIF-exposed industries, and the return differences are large. Controlling for FDIF exposure, rate-based policy surprise measures are not priced in the cross-section of industry returns.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E32, E44, E52, G1, G12
papers.zh_title: 美联储隐含的市场价格与风险溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了FDIF，这是一种基于联邦公开市场委员会声明文本的美联储沟通意外度量。FDIF衡量了文本隐含的关键市场变量值与实际值之间的差异。逆周期变量（如信用利差）的正FDIF与负的宏观经济预测修正相关；顺周期变量则相反。对冲FDIF坏消息的行业在联邦公开市场委员会公告日获得低回报，但在非公告日获得高回报。暴露于FDIF的行业则相反，且回报差异很大。在控制FDIF暴露后，基于利率的政策意外度量在行业回报的横截面上不被定价。

papers.title: Officer-Involved: The Media Language of Police Killings
papers.authors: Jonathan Moreno-Medina, Aurelie Ouss, Patrick Bayer, Bocar A. Ba
papers.abstract: This paper examines language patterns in US television news coverage of police killings. We first document that the media employ semantic structures that obfuscate responsibility—such as passive voice, nominalizations, and intransitive verbs—more frequently for police killings than for civilian killings. Using field variation and an online experiment, we demonstrate that these language differences matter. In the field, we find that people who happened to have taken a survey just after more obfuscatory coverage of a police killing are more likely to support police funding. In our online experiment, participants are less likely to hold police officers morally responsible and demand penalties when exposed to obfuscatory language, especially when the victim is unarmed. Returning to the news data, we find higher use of obfuscatory language when victims are unarmed, when video footage is available, or when the suspect is not fleeing—in other words, situations when obfuscation matters most. Turning to the causes of this differential obfuscation, our evidence is not consistent with either demand-side drivers or supply-side factors associated with TV station ownership and political leaning. Instead, our results point to original narratives crafted by police departments as a more likely driver of obfuscation. Our study emphasizes the importance of considering semantic language structures in understanding how media shapes perceptions, extending beyond coverage quantity and slant.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：K14, K42, L82
papers.zh_title: 涉警事件：警察杀人案的媒体语言
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国电视新闻中关于警察杀人案的报道语言模式。我们首先发现，与平民杀人案相比，媒体在报道警察杀人案时更频繁地使用模糊责任的语义结构——如被动语态、名词化和不及物动词。通过实地变异分析和一项在线实验，我们证明了这些语言差异确实会产生影响。在实地研究中，我们发现，那些恰好在观看更模糊的警察杀人案报道后参与调查的人，更倾向于支持增加警察经费。在我们的在线实验中，当参与者接触到模糊语言时，他们不太可能认为警察负有道德责任并要求惩罚，尤其是在受害者手无寸铁的情况下。回到新闻数据，我们发现当受害者手无寸铁、有视频片段可用或嫌疑人没有逃跑时——换句话说，在模糊化最为关键的情况下——模糊语言的使用率更高。关于这种差异化模糊化的成因，我们的证据既不符合需求侧驱动因素，也不符合与电视台所有权和政治倾向相关的供给侧因素。相反，我们的研究结果表明，由警察部门精心策划的原始叙述更可能是模糊化的驱动因素。我们的研究强调了在理解媒体如何塑造观念时，考虑语义语言结构的重要性，这超越了报道数量和倾向的范畴。

papers.title: Waivers for the Public Service Loan Forgiveness Program: Who Would Benefit from Takeup?
papers.authors: Diego A. Briones, Nathaniel Ruby, Sarah Turner
papers.abstract: For workers employed in the public and non-profit sectors, the Public Service Loan Forgiveness (PSLF) program offers the potential for full forgiveness of federal student loans for those with 10-years of full-time work experience. In practice, the benefits of the PSLF program have been illusory for many. In the first year of eligibility for forgiveness (2017), only 96 borrowers claimed benefits and even by the end of April of 2022 only 130,730 had received benefits. Administrative problems related to the certification of public service employment and the determination of qualifying loans led the Department of Education to issue temporary waivers (which expire in October of 2022) which essentially provide a path to forgiveness retroactively. In this paper, we explore the overall impact and distributional implications of potential full participation in loan forgiveness enabled by the PSLF waiver program using the 2018 Survey of Income and Program Participation (SIPP). Our estimates identify more than $100 billion in loan forgiveness available to as many as 3.5 million borrowers through the PSLF waiver program. Potential beneficiaries of this initiative are disproportionately employed in occupations like teaching and health care. Full take-up of the PSLF waiver would lead to a narrowing of the racial gap in student debt burden. However, the distribution of potential benefits of the PSLF waiver depends critically on the extent to which those with high income or advanced degrees are differentially likely to take-up benefits conditional on eligibility.
papers.zh_title: 公共服务贷款减免计划豁免：参与将惠及哪些人？
papers.zh_abstract: 对于在公共和非营利部门工作的员工，公共服务贷款减免计划为拥有10年全职工作经验的人提供了全额免除联邦学生贷款的可能性。实际上，对许多人来说，PSLF计划的福利一直是虚幻的。在符合减免资格的第一年（2017年），只有96名借款人申请了福利，即使到2022年4月底，也只有130,730人获得了福利。与公共服务就业认证和合格贷款确定相关的行政问题导致教育部发布了临时豁免（于2022年10月到期），这些豁免实质上提供了一条追溯性的减免路径。在本文中，我们利用2018年收入与项目参与调查，探讨了通过PSLF豁免计划实现贷款减免的潜在全面参与的整体影响和分配含义。我们的估计显示，通过PSLF豁免计划，多达350万借款人可获得超过1000亿美元的贷款减免。该计划的潜在受益者不成比例地集中在教学和医疗保健等职业。全面参与PSLF豁免将缩小学生债务负担中的种族差距。然而，PSLF豁免潜在收益的分配关键取决于，在符合条件的情况下，高收入或高学历者是否更有可能参与并获益。

papers.title: Local Projections vs. VARs: Lessons From Thousands of DGPs
papers.authors: Dake Li, Mikkel Plagborg-Møller, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: We conduct a simulation study of Local Projection (LP) and Vector Autoregression (VAR) estimators of structural impulse responses across thousands of data generating processes, designed to mimic the properties of the universe of U.S. macroeconomic data. Our analysis considers various identification schemes and several variants of LP and VAR estimators. A clear bias-variance trade-off emerges: LP estimators have lower bias than VAR estimators but substantially higher variance at intermediate and long horizons. Consequently, unless researchers are overwhelmingly concerned with bias, shrinkage via Bayesian VARs or penalized LPs is attractive.
papers.zh_title: 局部投影法与向量自回归模型：来自数千个数据生成过程的经验教训
papers.zh_abstract: 我们针对数千个旨在模仿美国宏观经济数据整体特性的数据生成过程，对结构脉冲响应的局部投影法和向量自回归模型估计量进行了模拟研究。我们的分析考虑了各种识别方案以及LP和VAR估计量的几种变体。一个清晰的偏差-方差权衡出现了：LP估计量比VAR估计量具有更低的偏差，但在中期和长期具有显著更高的方差。因此，除非研究者极其关注偏差问题，否则通过贝叶斯VAR或惩罚LP进行收缩是很有吸引力的。

papers.title: How Did Federal Aid to States and Localities Affect Testing and Vaccine Delivery?
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Philip G. Hoxie, John Kearns, Stan Veuger
papers.abstract: We estimate whether federal aid for state and local governments played a role in advancing population testing for COVID-19 and the administration of vaccines. To overcome biases that can result from the endogeneity of federal aid allocations, we use an instrumental-variables estimator reliant on the substantial variation in federal aid predicted by variation in states’ congressional representation. We find that federal fiscal assistance dollars had a modest if any impact on the pace of vaccine rollouts, may have improved the equitability of vaccine administration, and had a substantial impact on the volume of tests administered. Regarding the total number of vaccines delivered, we estimate that an additional $1,000 in fiscal relief per resident, which would amount to $330 billion nationwide, translated into just under 1,200 extra doses of the vaccine being delivered per 100,000 people, with the upper bound of our confidence interval suggesting that we can rule out effects in excess of 7,030 extra doses per 100,000 people. We find that federal dollars predict a smaller gap between the vaccination rates of those with a college education relative to those with a high school education. Finally, our baseline estimate implies that each $1,000 in COVID-19 relief aid per capita generated 55,850 additional tests per 100,000 people.
papers.zh_title: 联邦对州和地方政府的援助如何影响检测和疫苗交付？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了联邦对州和地方政府的援助是否在推进COVID-19人群检测和疫苗管理方面发挥了作用。为了克服因联邦援助分配内生性可能导致的偏差，我们使用了一个工具变量估计量，该估计量依赖于由各州国会代表权差异所预测的联邦援助的巨大变化。我们发现，联邦财政援助资金对疫苗推广速度的影响即使有也是微乎其微，可能改善了疫苗管理的公平性，并对检测数量产生了实质性影响。关于疫苗交付总量，我们估计，每位居民额外获得1000美元的财政救济（全国范围内总计3300亿美元），仅相当于每10万人中多交付不到1200剂疫苗，而我们置信区间的上限表明，可以排除每10万人中超过7030剂额外疫苗的影响。我们发现，联邦资金预示着大学学历者与高中学历者之间疫苗接种率的差距会缩小。最后，我们的基准估计表明，人均每1000美元的COVID-19救济援助，每10万人中就会增加55,850次检测。

papers.title: The Quality of Financial Advice: What Influences Client Recommendations?
papers.authors: Philippe d'Astous, Irina Gemmo, Pierre-Carl Michaud
papers.abstract: In this paper, we conduct an experiment with a large sample of financial planner professionals in Canada to elicit factors which may influence client recommendations. Using repeated client vignettes, we find that recommendations are often in-line with what one would expect from economic theory. In particular, advice is sensitive in expected ways to relative costs and benefits of particular options. In some domains, we find evidence that planners are more likely to recommend products they own themselves, their spouse owns, or they are licensed to sell. In the investment domain, we also find that planners are more likely to recommend products that clients inquire about even when this type of solicitation is randomized across clients and options. Finally, we find that planners are systematically sensitive to the gender of the client even when gender is uninformative regarding which recommendation to make.
papers.zh_title: 财务建议的质量：什么影响了客户推荐？
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们与加拿大大量理财规划师专业人士进行了一项实验，以探究可能影响客户推荐的因素。通过使用重复的客户情景案例，我们发现推荐通常符合经济理论的预期。特别是，建议对特定选项的相对成本和收益的敏感方式符合预期。在某些领域，我们发现证据表明，规划师更有可能推荐自己、其配偶拥有或他们获准销售的产品。在投资领域，我们还发现，即使这种询问在客户和选项之间是随机分配的，规划师也更有可能推荐客户询问过的产品。最后，我们发现规划师系统性地对客户的性别敏感，即使性别对于应做出何种推荐并无信息价值。

papers.title: Persecution and Migrant Self-Selection: Evidence from the Collapse of the Communist Bloc
papers.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Travis Baseler, Isabelle Sin
papers.abstract: How does persecution affect who migrates? We analyze migrants’ self-selection out of the USSR and its satellite states before and after the collapse of Communism using census microdata from the three largest destination countries: Germany, Israel, and the United States. We find that migrants arriving before and around the time of the collapse (who were more likely to have moved because of persecution) were more educated and had better labor market outcomes in the destination than those arriving later. This change is not fully explained by the removal of emigration restrictions in the Communist Bloc. Instead, we show that this pattern is consistent with more positive self-selection of migrants who are motivated by persecution. When the highly educated disproportionately forgo migrating to enjoy the amenities of their home country, persecution can induce them to leave.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：F22, J6, N30, N32, N34
papers.zh_title: 迫害与移民自我选择：来自共产主义集团崩溃的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 迫害如何影响谁选择移民？我们利用来自三个最大目的地国——德国、以色列和美国的人口普查微观数据，分析了共产主义崩溃前后来自苏联及其卫星国的移民的自我选择。我们发现，在崩溃前后抵达的移民（更可能是因迫害而迁移）比后来抵达的移民受教育程度更高，在目的地国的劳动力市场表现更好。这种变化并不能完全用共产主义集团移民限制的取消来解释。相反，我们表明，这种模式与受迫害动机驱动的移民更积极的自我选择是一致的。当高学历者不成比例地放弃移民以享受母国的便利设施时，迫害可以促使他们离开。

papers.title: Shareholder Power and the Decline of Labor
papers.authors: Antonio Falato, Hyunseob Kim, Till M. von Wachter
papers.abstract: Shareholder power in the US grew over recent decades due to a steep rise in concentrated institutional ownership. Using establishment-level data from the US Census Bureau’s Longitudinal Business Database for 1982-2015, this paper examines the impact of increases in concentrated institutional ownership on employment, wages, shareholder returns, and labor productivity. Consistent with theory of the firm based on conflicts of interests between shareholders and stakeholders, we find that establishments of firms that experience an increase in ownership by larger and more concentrated institutional shareholders have lower employment and wages. This result holds in both panel regressions with establishment fixed effects and a difference-in-differences design that exploits large increases in concentrated institutional ownership, and is robust to controls for industry and local shocks. The result is more pronounced in industries where labor is relatively less unionized, in more monopsonistic local labor markets, and for dedicated and activist institutional shareholders. The labor losses are accompanied by higher shareholder returns but no improvements in labor productivity, suggesting that shareholder power mainly reallocates rents away from workers. Our results imply that the rise in concentrated institutional ownership could explain about a quarter of the secular decline in the aggregate labor share.
papers.zh_title: 股东权力与劳动力衰落
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，由于集中机构持股的急剧增加，美国股东权力有所增长。本文利用美国人口普查局纵向企业数据库1982-2015年的企业层面数据，考察了集中机构持股增加对就业、工资、股东回报和劳动生产率的影响。与基于股东与利益相关者利益冲突的企业理论一致，我们发现，那些经历更大、更集中的机构股东持股增加的企业，其企业的就业和工资水平较低。这一结果在包含企业固定效应的面板回归以及利用集中机构持股大幅增加的倍差法设计中均成立，并且对行业和本地冲击的控制是稳健的。这一结果在工会化程度相对较低的行业、更具买方垄断性的本地劳动力市场以及针对专注型和积极型机构股东时更为显著。劳动力损失伴随着更高的股东回报，但劳动生产率没有改善，这表明股东权力主要将租金从工人手中重新分配。我们的结果表明，集中机构持股的兴起可以解释总劳动份额长期下降的大约四分之一。

papers.title: Economic vs. Epidemiological Approaches to Measuring the Human Capital Impacts of Infectious Disease Elimination
papers.authors: Caroline Chuard, Hannes Schwandt, Alexander D. Becker, Masahiko Haraguchi
papers.abstract: A rich economic literature has examined the human capital impacts of disease-eliminating health interventions, such as the rollout of new vaccines. This literature is based on reduced-form approaches which exploit proxies for disease burden, such as mortality, instead of actual infection counts, which are difficult to measure. We develop an epidemiological dynamic accounting model based on the susceptible-infected-recovered (SIR) framework to derive precise measles infection shares across U.S. cohorts born around the introduction of the measles vaccine. Measles is highly infectious and fully immunizing which makes the disease an ideal candidate for epidemiological modeling. Our epidemiological model is strongly predictive of future measles outbreaks but the derived measles infection shares are not systematically related to cohorts' later educational, economic, or health outcomes. The reduced-form approach, on the other hand, shows that these long-term outcomes strongly improved among vaccinated cohorts in states with high pre-vaccine measles mortality. Our results suggest that differences in disease severity are more relevant for long-term human capital impacts than raw differences in actual infection rates, supporting the reduced-form approach used in the economic literature.
papers.zh_title: 衡量消除传染病的人力资本影响：经济学方法与流行病学方法
papers.zh_abstract: 丰富的经济学文献研究了消除疾病的健康干预措施（如新疫苗的推广）对人力资本的影响。这类文献基于简化形式方法，利用死亡率等疾病负担的代理变量，而非难以衡量的实际感染人数。我们基于易感-感染-恢复框架开发了一个流行病学动态核算模型，以精确推导出在麻疹疫苗引入前后出生的美国各队列中麻疹感染的比例。麻疹具有高度传染性且能产生完全免疫，这使得该疾病成为流行病学建模的理想候选。我们的流行病学模型对未来麻疹爆发具有很强的预测能力，但推导出的麻疹感染比例与队列后来的教育、经济或健康结果并无系统关联。另一方面，简化形式方法表明，在疫苗前时代麻疹死亡率高的州，接种疫苗的队列的这些长期结果得到了显著改善。我们的结果表明，疾病严重程度的差异对长期人力资本的影响比实际感染率的原始差异更为重要，这支持了经济学文献中使用的简化形式方法。

papers.title: Effects of Restrictive Abortion Legislation on Cohort Mortality Evidence from 19th Century Law Variation
papers.authors: Joanna N. Lahey, Marianne H. Wanamaker
papers.abstract: Recent studies based on 20th century US data conclude that abortion access raises children’s average socioeconomic outcomes. We generalize a model of fertility, highlighting assumptions under which these abortion predictions can be reversed. Using 19th century abortion restrictions, we empirically demonstrate these points. Despite a more than 5 percent increase in birth rates among abortion-restricted cohorts, we find little evidence of negative selection at birth. Longevity was affected nevertheless; in the first ten years of life, children in these larger cohorts died of infectious disease more frequently. These mortality effects diminish with age, potentially reversing at older ages as a result of disease immunity or other offsetting factors.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H75, J1, J13, J16, J18, K14, K15, K38, N3, N31, N4, N41
papers.zh_title: 限制性堕胎立法对队列死亡率的影响：来自19世纪法律变异的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 基于20世纪美国数据的最新研究得出结论，堕胎可及性提高了儿童的平均社会经济成果。我们概括了一个生育模型，强调了这些堕胎预测可能被逆转的假设条件。利用19世纪的堕胎限制，我们实证证明了这些观点。尽管受堕胎限制的队列中出生率增加了超过5%，但我们几乎没有发现出生时负向选择的证据。然而，寿命仍然受到影响；在生命的前十年，这些较大队列中的儿童更频繁地死于传染病。这些死亡率效应随年龄增长而减弱，并可能因疾病免疫或其他抵消因素而在老年时逆转。

papers.title: Dependent Coverage and Parental "Job Lock": Evidence from the Affordable Care Act
papers.authors: Hannah Bae, Katherine Meckel, Maggie Shi
papers.abstract: Coverage for dependents is a standard feature of employer-sponsored insurance. While prior work shows that employees trade off job mobility for their own coverage, less is known about the intra-family spillovers of dependent coverage on parental labor supply. We study this question using a large panel of employer-based insurance claims that links dependent enrollment to a proxy for parental job retention. We use a regression discontinuity design that exploits a sharp change in the duration of dependent eligibility by birth month under the Affordable Care Act. We find that additional dependent insurance eligibility increases both dependent take-up and parental job retention. This “job lock” effect is strongest among parents more likely to be on the margin of a job exit, for families that place higher value on dependent coverage, and employees of firms offering a broader range of insurance options.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, PE；JEL：H0, I13, I28
papers.zh_title: 受抚养人保险覆盖与父母的“工作锁定”：来自《平价医疗法案》的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 受抚养人保险覆盖是雇主提供保险的一个标准特征。虽然先前的研究表明，员工为了自身的保险覆盖而牺牲工作流动性，但关于受抚养人保险覆盖对父母劳动力供给的家庭内部溢出效应知之甚少。我们利用一个大型雇主保险索赔面板数据来研究这个问题，该数据将受抚养人注册与父母工作保留的代理变量联系起来。我们采用断点回归设计，利用《平价医疗法案》下按出生月份划分的受抚养人资格期限的急剧变化。我们发现，额外的受抚养人保险资格同时增加了受抚养人的参保率和父母的工作保留。这种“工作锁定”效应在更可能处于离职边缘的父母、更重视受抚养人保险覆盖的家庭以及提供更广泛保险选择范围的公司的员工中最为强烈。

papers.title: Optimal Income Taxation
papers.authors: Louis Kaplow
papers.abstract: This article explores subjects in optimal income taxation characterized by recent research interest, practical importance in light of concerns about inequality, potential for misunderstanding, and prospects for advancement. Throughout, the analysis highlights paths for further investigation. Areas of focus include multidimensional abilities and endogenous wages; asymmetric information and the income of founders; production and consumption externalities from labor effort; market power and rents; behavioral phenomena relating to perceptions of the income tax schedule, myopic labor supply, and the interactions of savings, savings policies, and labor supply; optimal income transfers; the relationship between optimal income taxation and the use of other instruments; and issues relating to the social welfare function and utility functions, including nonwelfarist objectives, welfare weights, heterogeneous preferences, and taxation of the family.
papers.zh_title: 最优所得税
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了最优所得税领域的主题，这些主题因近期研究兴趣、鉴于对不平等担忧的实际重要性、潜在的误解以及进步前景而受到关注。在整个分析中，本文强调了进一步研究的路径。关注的领域包括多维能力和内生工资；信息不对称与创始人的收入；劳动努力的生产和消费外部性；市场力量与租金；与所得税表认知、短视劳动供给以及储蓄、储蓄政策与劳动供给相互作用相关的行为现象；最优收入转移；最优所得税与其他工具使用之间的关系；以及与福利函数和效用函数相关的问题，包括非福利主义目标、福利权重、异质性偏好和家庭税收。

papers.title: Decomposing Trends in U.S. Air Pollution Disparities from Electricity
papers.authors: Danae Hernandez-Cortes, Kyle C. Meng, Paige E. Weber
papers.abstract: This paper quantifies and decomposes recent trends in U.S. PM2.5 disparities from the electricity sector using a high-resolution pollution transport model. Between 2000-2018, PM2.5 concentrations from electricity fell by 89% for the average individual, more than double the decline rate in overall U.S. ambient PM2.5 concentrations. Across racial/ethnic groups, we detect a dramatic convergence: since 2000, the Black-White PM2.5 disparity from electricity has narrowed by 95% and the Hispanic-White PM2.5 disparity has narrowed by 93%, though these disparities still exist in 2018. A decomposition reveals nearly all of these disparity trends can be attributed roughly equally to improvements in emissions intensities and compositional changes in electric generators, with small contributions from scale and residential location changes. This suggests both local air pollution policies and recent coal-to-natural gas fuel switching have played major roles in reducing U.S. racial/ethnic pollution disparities from electricity. While we detect similarly large PM2.5 improvements for the average low and high income individual, PM2.5 disparities by income are relatively small, with little change over time.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H4, I14, Q5, Q51, Q52, Q53, Q54
papers.zh_title: 美国电力行业空气污染差异趋势的分解
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用高分辨率污染传输模型，量化并分解了美国电力行业PM2.5差异的最新趋势。在2000年至2018年间，普通个体来自电力的PM2.5浓度下降了89%，是美国整体环境PM2.5浓度下降率的两倍多。在不同种族/民族群体中，我们发现了显著的趋同：自2000年以来，来自电力的黑人与白人之间的PM2.5差异缩小了95%，西班牙裔与白人之间的PM2.5差异缩小了93%，尽管这些差异在2018年仍然存在。分解分析显示，这些差异趋势几乎可以大致平均地归因于排放强度的改善和发电机组构成的变化，而规模和居住地变化的贡献较小。这表明，地方空气污染政策和近期从煤炭到天然气的燃料转换在减少美国种族/民族间来自电力的污染差异方面发挥了重要作用。虽然我们检测到普通低收入和高收入个体的PM2.5改善幅度同样巨大，但按收入划分的PM2.5差异相对较小，且随时间变化不大。

papers.title: The Shift to Remote Work Lessens Wage-Growth Pressures
papers.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Brent H. Meyer, Emil Mihaylov, David Altig
papers.abstract: The recent shift to remote work raised the amenity value of employment. As compensation adjusts to share the amenity-value gains with employers, wage-growth pressures moderate. We find empirical support for this mechanism in the wage-setting behavior of U.S. employers, and we develop novel survey data to quantify its force. Our data imply a cumulative wage-growth moderation of 2.0 percentage points over two years. This moderation offsets more than half the real-wage catchup effect that Blanchard (2022) highlights in his analysis of near-term inflation pressures. The amenity-values gains associated with the recent rise of remote work also lower labor’s share of national income by 1.1 percentage points. In addition, the “unexpected compression” of wages since early 2020 (Autor and Dube, 2022) is partly explained by the same amenity-value effect, which operates differentially across the earnings distribution.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME；JEL：D22, E24, E25, E31, J30
papers.zh_title: 向远程工作的转变减轻了工资增长压力
papers.zh_abstract: 近期向远程工作的转变提高了就业的舒适度价值。随着薪酬调整以与雇主分享舒适度价值的收益，工资增长压力得以缓和。我们在美国雇主的工资设定行为中找到了支持这一机制的经验证据，并开发了新的调查数据来量化其力量。我们的数据表明，两年内累计工资增长放缓了2.0个百分点。这种放缓抵消了Blanchard（2022）在分析近期通胀压力时强调的实际工资追赶效应的一半以上。与近期远程工作兴起相关的舒适度价值收益也使国民收入中的劳动份额下降了1.1个百分点。此外，自2020年初以来的“意外工资压缩”（Autor和Dube，2022）部分可由相同的舒适度价值效应解释，该效应在收入分布中差异化地发挥作用。

papers.title: Is GDP Becoming Obsolete? The “Beyond GDP” Debate
papers.authors: Charles R. Hulten, Leonard I. Nakamura
papers.abstract: GDP is a closely watched indicator of the current health of the economy and an indispensable tool of economic policy. It is not, however, a persuasive indicator of individual wellbeing or collective economic progress. There have been calls to refocus or replace GDP with a metric that better reflects the welfare dimension. In response, the U.S. agency responsible for the GDP accounts recently launched a “GDP and Beyond” program.
