This is by no means an easy undertaking, given the subjective and idiosyncratic nature of much of individual wellbeing. Indeed, some sources of wellbeing may prove impossible to measure accurately. This paper joins the Beyond GDP effort by extending the standard utility maximization model of economic theory to include those non-GDP sources of wellbeing for which a monetary value can be established using a willingness-to-pay approach. We have termed our measure expanded GDP (EGDP) in our previous work, and the current paper extends that framework to include a welfare-adjusted stock of wealth, derived using the same general approach used to obtain EGDP. This welfare-expanded stock is useful for issues involving the sustainability of wellbeing over time. Finally, we propose a way of connecting GDP and the large literature on happiness and collective wellbeing by incorporating a survey-based subjective index of perceived wellbeing into the conventional ordinal utility framework. Our conclusion is that both the GDP and wellbeing metrics are important but address different questions: the size of the economy on one hand and true extent of economic progress on the other.
papers.zh_title: GDP是否正在过时？“超越GDP”的辩论
papers.zh_abstract: GDP是当前经济健康状况的密切观察指标，也是经济政策不可或缺的工具。然而，它并非个人福祉或集体经济进步的有说服力的指标。有人呼吁将GDP重新聚焦或替换为更能反映福利维度的指标。作为回应，负责GDP账户的美国机构最近启动了一个“GDP及超越”项目。鉴于个人福祉的许多方面具有主观性和特殊性，这绝非易事。事实上，某些福祉来源可能无法准确衡量。本文通过扩展经济理论中的标准效用最大化模型，将那些可以使用支付意愿方法确定货币价值的非GDP福祉来源纳入其中，从而加入“超越GDP”的努力。我们在之前的工作中将我们的衡量指标称为扩展GDP（EGDP），而本文将该框架扩展为包括一个福利调整后的财富存量，该存量使用与获得EGDP相同的一般方法推导得出。这种福利扩展的存量对于涉及福祉随时间可持续性的问题很有用。最后，我们提出了一种将GDP与关于幸福感和集体福祉的大量文献联系起来的方法，即将基于调查的主观感知福祉指数纳入传统的序数效用框架。我们的结论是，GDP和福祉指标都很重要，但回答的是不同的问题：一方面是经济规模，另一方面是经济进步的真实程度。

papers.title: Crash Narratives
papers.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Dasol Kim, Robert J. Shiller
papers.abstract: Narratives can serve as linguistic mechanisms for transmitting knowledge about important historical events. Shiller (2017) argues that narratives are potent mechanisms for the propagation of beliefs about the economy. We use a controlled context approach to test the effect of media narratives about historic stock market crashes on current investor beliefs and choices. Our methodology avoids the problem of large language model leakage that can lead to look-ahead biases. We find that crash narratives propagate broadly once they appear in news articles, and that they predict market volatility. We exploit investor heterogeneity using survey data to distinguish the effects of narrativity from response to fundamental factors. Finally, we develop a measure of pure narrativity to examine when the financial press is more likely to employ narratives.
papers.zh_title: 崩盘叙事
papers.zh_abstract: 叙事可以作为传递关于重要历史事件知识的语言机制。Shiller（2017）认为，叙事是传播关于经济信念的有力机制。我们采用受控情境方法来测试关于历史股市崩盘的媒体叙事对当前投资者信念和选择的影响。我们的方法避免了可能导致前瞻性偏差的大型语言模型泄漏问题。我们发现，崩盘叙事一旦出现在新闻文章中就会广泛传播，并且它们能预测市场波动。我们利用调查数据中的投资者异质性来区分叙事效应与对基本面因素的反应。最后，我们开发了一个纯叙事性衡量指标，以考察金融媒体何时更可能使用叙事。

papers.title: An Evaluation of a National Program to Reduce Student Absenteeism in High School
papers.authors: Michael Baker, Nina Drange, Hege Marie Gjefsen
papers.abstract: Starting in the 2016/17 academic year, high school students in Norway who missed more than 10 percent of hours in a given course without a medical excuse could not receive a final grade. Across all students, the new policy reduced total absence by 21-28 percent, and chronic absence by 29-39 percent. This behavioral response was largely sufficient to avoid the academic penalty for absence over the 10 percent threshold. We also find the policy had a positive impact on teacher awarded GPA for groups with larger baseline absence and greater absolute changes in attendance.
papers.zh_title: 一项减少高中生缺勤率的国家计划评估
papers.zh_abstract: 从2016/17学年开始，挪威高中生在特定课程中无故缺勤超过总课时的10%将无法获得最终成绩。在所有学生中，新政策使总缺勤率降低了21-28%，长期缺勤率降低了29-39%。这种行为反应在很大程度上足以避免因缺勤超过10%门槛而受到的学业惩罚。我们还发现，对于基线缺勤率较高且出勤率绝对变化较大的群体，该政策对教师评定的平均绩点产生了积极影响。

papers.title: Price Setting with Strategic Complementarities as a Mean Field Game
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Francesco Lippi, Takis Souganidis
papers.abstract: We study the propagation of monetary shocks in a sticky-price general-equilibrium economy where the firms’ pricing strategy feature a complementarity with the decisions of other firms. In a dynamic equilibrium the firm’s price-setting decisions depend on aggregates, which in turn depend on firms’ decisions. We cast this fixed-point problem as a Mean Field Game and establish several analytic results. We study existence and uniqueness of the equilibrium and characterize the impulse response function (IRF) of output following an aggregate “MIT” shock. We prove that strategic complementarities make the IRF larger at each horizon, in a convex fashion. We establish that complementarities may give rise to an IRF with a hump-shaped profile. As the complementarity becomes large enough the IRF diverges and at a critical point there is no equilibrium. Finally, we show that the amplification effect of the strategic interactions is similar across models. For instance, the Calvo model and the Golosov-Lucas model display a comparable amplification, in spite of the fact that the non-neutrality in Calvo is much larger.
papers.zh_title: 具有战略互补性的价格设定作为平均场博弈
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究在粘性价格一般均衡经济中货币冲击的传导机制，其中企业的定价策略与其他企业的决策存在互补性。在动态均衡中，企业的价格设定决策依赖于总量变量，而总量变量又取决于企业的决策。我们将这一不动点问题建模为平均场博弈，并建立了若干分析结果。我们研究了均衡的存在性和唯一性，并刻画了在总体“MIT”冲击后产出的脉冲响应函数。我们证明，战略互补性使每个时间跨度上的脉冲响应函数更大，且呈凸性特征。我们证实，互补性可能导致脉冲响应函数呈现驼峰形轮廓。当互补性足够强时，脉冲响应函数发散，并在临界点处不存在均衡。最后，我们表明，战略互动的放大效应在不同模型中相似。例如，卡尔沃模型和戈洛索夫-卢卡斯模型显示出可比的放大效应，尽管卡尔沃模型中的非中性效应要大得多。

papers.title: Expanding Capacity for Vaccines Against Covid-19 and Future Pandemics: A Review of Economic Issues
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Juan Camilo Castillo, Esha Chaudhuri, Michael Kremer, Alexandre Simoes Gomes, Christopher Snyder
papers.abstract: We review economic arguments for using public policy to accelerate vaccine supply during a pandemic. Rapidly vaccinating a large share of the global population helps avoid economic, mortality, and social losses, which in the case of Covid-19 mounted into trillions of dollars. However, pharmaceutical firms are unlikely to have private incentives to invest in vaccine capacity at the socially optimal scale and speed. The socially optimal level of public spending may cause some sticker shock but—as epitomized by the tagline “spending billions to save trillions”—is eclipsed by the benefits and can be restrained with the help of careful policy design and advance preparations. Capacity is so valuable during a pandemic that fractional dosing and other measures to stretch available capacity should be explored.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, ITI, LE, PE, PR；JEL：D47, H44, I15, I18, O31
papers.zh_title: 扩大新冠疫苗及未来大流行病疫苗产能：经济问题综述
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了在大流行病期间利用公共政策加速疫苗供应的经济论据。快速为全球大部分人口接种疫苗有助于避免经济、死亡和社会损失，在新冠疫情期间这些损失高达数万亿美元。然而，制药公司不太可能有私人激励以社会最优的规模和速度投资于疫苗产能。社会最优的公共支出水平可能会引起一些价格冲击，但——正如“花费数十亿以节省数万亿”这一口号所体现的——其收益远大于成本，并且可以通过精心设计的政策和预先准备加以控制。在大流行病期间，产能如此宝贵，以至于应探索分剂量接种和其他扩大可用产能的措施。

papers.title: Global Supply Chain Pressures, International Trade, and Inflation
papers.authors: Julian di Giovanni, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Alvaro Silva, Muhammed A. Yildirim
papers.abstract: We study the impact of the Covid-19 pandemic on Euro Area inflation and how it compares to the experiences of other countries, such as the United States, over the two-year period 2020-21. Our model-based calibration exercises deliver four key results: 1) Compositional effects – the switch from services to goods consumption – are amplified through global input-output linkages, affecting both trade and inflation. 2) Inflation can be higher under sector-specific labor shortages relative to a scenario with no such supply shocks. 3) Foreign shocks and global supply chain bottlenecks played an outsized role relative to domestic aggregate demand shocks in explaining Euro Area inflation over 2020-21. 4) International trade did not respond to changes in GDP as strongly as it did during the 2008-09 crisis despite strong demand for goods. These lower trade elasticities in part reflect supply chain bottlenecks. These four results imply that policies aimed at stimulating aggregate demand would not have produced as high an inflation as the one observed in the data without the negative sectoral supply shocks.
papers.zh_title: 全球供应链压力、国际贸易与通货膨胀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了新冠疫情对欧元区通胀的影响，并将其与2020-21两年期间美国等其他国家的经历进行了比较。基于模型的校准分析得出了四个关键结果：1) 结构性效应——从服务消费转向商品消费——通过全球投入产出联系被放大，同时影响了贸易和通胀。2) 与没有此类供给冲击的情景相比，特定行业的劳动力短缺可能导致更高的通胀。3) 在解释2020-21年欧元区通胀方面，外国冲击和全球供应链瓶颈相对于国内总需求冲击发挥了更大的作用。4) 尽管对商品的需求强劲，但国际贸易对国内生产总值变化的反应不如2008-09年危机期间那样强烈。这些较低的贸易弹性部分反映了供应链瓶颈。这四个结果意味着，如果没有负面的行业供给冲击，旨在刺激总需求的政策不会产生数据中观察到的那么高的通胀。

papers.title: Minimum Wages and Labor Markets in the Twin Cities
papers.authors: Loukas Karabarbounis, Jeremy Lise, Anusha Nath
papers.abstract: We present new evidence on the labor market effects of large and permanent minimum wage increases by examining the policy changes implemented by Minneapolis and announced by Saint Paul in 2018. Beginning with synthetic difference-in-differences methods, we find that the increase in the minimum wage substantially decreased employment in restaurants, retail, and health, even after accounting for potential confounding effects from the pandemic and civil unrest. Next, using variation in exposure to the minimum wage across establishments and workers within zip codes and industries of the Twin Cities, we find employment effects that are about half as large as those from the time series. We quantify an industry equilibrium model to rationalize our estimates and differentiate among competing economic mechanisms that determine how the minimum wage affects the labor market. Our model accounts quantitatively for the importance of reduced entry in generating a larger employment decline than implied by the cross-sectional estimates; for the employment decline from the announcement of a future minimum wage increase; and for the more negative employment effects of the minimum wage over time, relative to the size of the increase, and when the economy is in a recession.
papers.zh_title: 双城的最低工资与劳动力市场
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过考察明尼阿波利斯市实施以及圣保罗市于2018年宣布的政策变化，提供了关于大规模、永久性最低工资上涨对劳动力市场影响的新证据。首先使用合成双重差分法，我们发现，即使在考虑了疫情和社会动荡的潜在混杂效应后，最低工资的提高也显著减少了餐饮、零售和医疗行业的就业。接下来，利用双城邮政编码和行业内各企业及工人对最低工资暴露程度的差异，我们发现的就业效应大约是时间序列估计结果的一半。我们量化了一个行业均衡模型，以合理化我们的估计，并区分决定最低工资如何影响劳动力市场的相互竞争的经济机制。我们的模型在数量上解释了：相对于横截面估计所暗示的就业下降，进入减少在产生更大就业下降中的重要性；未来最低工资上涨公告导致的就业下降；以及随着时间的推移、相对于涨幅而言以及当经济处于衰退时，最低工资带来的更负面的就业效应。

papers.title: Will the Developing World’s Growing Middle Class Support Low Carbon Policies?
papers.authors: Matthew E. Kahn, Somik Lall
papers.abstract: As billions of people in the developing world seek to increase their living standards, their aspirations pose a challenge to global efforts to cut greenhouse gas emissions. The emerging middle class are buying and operating energy intensive durables ranging from vehicles to air conditioners to computers. Owners of these durables represent an interest group with a stake in opposing carbon pricing. The political economy of encouraging middle class support for carbon pricing hinges on offsetting its perceived negative income effects. Rising environmentalism in the developing world could also increase support for credible GHG reduction policy. We quantify these effects as we estimate Engel curves of durables ownership, compare the grid’s carbon intensity by nation and study the demographic correlates of support for prioritizing environmental protection.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, PE, POL；JEL：H23, H87, Q54
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家日益壮大的中产阶级会支持低碳政策吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 随着发展中国家数十亿人寻求提高生活水平，他们的愿望对全球减少温室气体排放的努力构成了挑战。新兴中产阶级正在购买和使用从汽车到空调再到电脑等高耗能耐用品。这些耐用品的所有者代表了一个利益集团，他们有理由反对碳定价。鼓励中产阶级支持碳定价的政治经济学关键在于抵消其感知到的负面收入效应。发展中国家日益增长的环保主义也可能增加对可信的温室气体减排政策的支持。我们在估计耐用品所有权的恩格尔曲线、比较各国电网的碳强度以及研究支持优先保护环境的人口统计学相关因素时，量化了这些效应。

papers.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Health at Birth: Fathers Matter Too!
papers.authors: Osea Giuntella, Giulia La Mattina, Climent Quintana-Domeque
papers.abstract: We use a unique data set of linked birth records from Florida to analyze the intergenerational transmission of health at birth by parental gender. We show that both paternal and maternal birth weights signiﬁcantly predict the child’s birth weight, even after accounting for all genetic and environmental factors that are common and time-invariant within a family. Our estimates reveal that a one standard deviation increase in mother’s birth weight (535 grams) translates into a 0.13-0.24 standard deviations increase in child’s birth weight (70-128 grams), accounting or not for maternal grandmother ﬁxed eﬀects. On the father’s side, we ﬁnd that a one standard deviation increase in father’s birth weight (563 grams) translates into a 0.10-0.15 standard deviations increase in child’s birth weight (56-78 grams), accounting or not for paternal grandmother ﬁxed eﬀects. The signiﬁcant role of both maternal and paternal health at birth in explaining oﬀspring health at birth is conﬁrmed when using alternative metrics: intrauterine growth, being small for gestational age or being too heavy (i.e., macrosomic).
papers.zh_title: 出生健康水平的代际传递：父亲也很重要！
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用佛罗里达州关联出生记录的独特数据集，按父母性别分析了出生健康水平的代际传递。我们表明，即使在考虑了家庭内部所有共同且随时间不变的遗传和环境因素后，父亲和母亲的出生体重都能显著预测孩子的出生体重。我们的估计显示，母亲出生体重每增加一个标准差（535克），孩子的出生体重就会增加0.13-0.24个标准差（70-128克），无论是否考虑外祖母的固定效应。在父亲方面，我们发现父亲出生体重每增加一个标准差（563克），孩子的出生体重就会增加0.10-0.15个标准差（56-78克），无论是否考虑祖母的固定效应。当使用替代指标时，母亲和父亲出生健康水平在解释后代出生健康方面的显著作用得到了证实：这些指标包括宫内生长情况、小于胎龄儿或体重过重（即巨大儿）。

papers.title: When Is Discrimination Unfair?
papers.authors: Peter J. Kuhn, Trevor T. Osaki
papers.abstract: Using a vignette-based survey experiment on Amazon’s Mechanical Turk, we measure how people’s assessments of the fairness of race-based hiring decisions vary with the motivation and circumstances surrounding the discriminatory act and the races of the parties involved. Regardless of their political leaning, our subjects react in very similar ways to the employer’s motivations for the action, such as the quality of information on which statistical discrimination is based. Compared to conservatives, moderates and liberals are much less accepting of discriminatory actions, and consider the discriminatee’s race when making their fairness assessments. We describe four pre-registered models of fairness – (simple) utilitarianism, race-blind rules (RBRs), racial in-group bias, and belief-based utilitarianism (BBU) – and show that the latter two are inconsistent with major aggregate patterns in our data. Instead, we argue that a two-group framework, in which one group (mostly self-described conservatives) values employers’ decision rights and the remaining respondents value utilitarian concerns, explains our main findings well. In this model, both groups also value applying a consistent set of fairness rules in a race-blind manner.
papers.zh_title: 何时歧视是不公平的？
papers.zh_abstract: 通过在亚马逊土耳其机器人平台上进行的一项基于情景的调查实验，我们衡量了人们对基于种族的招聘决策公平性的评估如何随着歧视行为的动机和情境以及所涉种族的种族而变化。无论其政治倾向如何，我们的受试者对雇主行为动机（例如统计歧视所依据的信息质量）的反应方式非常相似。与保守派相比，温和派和自由派更不接受歧视性行为，并且在做出公平性评估时会考虑被歧视者的种族。我们描述了四个预先注册的公平模型——（简单）功利主义、种族盲规则、种族内群体偏好和基于信念的功利主义——并表明后两者与我们数据中的主要总体模式不一致。相反，我们认为一个双群体框架可以很好地解释我们的主要发现，在该框架中，一个群体（主要是自认为是保守派的人）重视雇主的决策权，而其余受访者则重视功利主义关切。在这个模型中，两个群体也都重视以种族盲目的方式应用一套一致的公平规则。

papers.title: Data and Welfare in Credit Markets
papers.authors: Mark Jansen, Fabian Nagel, Constantine Yannelis, Anthony Lee Zhang
papers.abstract: We show how to measure the welfare effects arising from increased data availability. When lenders have more data on prospective borrower costs, they can charge prices that are more aligned with these costs. This increases total social welfare and transfers surplus from borrowers to lenders. We show that the magnitudes of the welfare changes can be estimated using only quantity data and variation in prices. We apply the methodology on bankruptcy flag removals and find that removing prior bankruptcy information substantially increases the social surplus of previously bankrupt consumers, at the cost of a modest decrease in total social welfare. This suggests that flag removals have low efficiency costs for redistributing surplus to previously bankrupt borrowers. We show how the framework can be extended to incorporate adverse selection and imperfect competition.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, LE, PE, PR；JEL：D6, G20, G21, G28, G5, H81
papers.zh_title: 信贷市场中的数据与福利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了如何衡量数据可用性增加带来的福利效应。当贷款人拥有更多关于潜在借款人成本的数据时，他们可以设定与这些成本更一致的定价。这增加了总社会福利，并将剩余从借款人转移给贷款人。我们表明，福利变化的幅度可以仅使用数量数据和价格变化来估计。我们将该方法应用于破产标记移除，并发现移除先前的破产信息显著增加了先前破产消费者的社会剩余，但代价是总社会福利的适度下降。这表明，标记移除在将剩余重新分配给先前破产借款人方面具有较低效率成本。我们展示了如何将该框架扩展到包含逆向选择和不完全竞争。

papers.title: Common Fund Flows: Flow Hedging and Factor Pricing
papers.authors: Leonid Kogan, Winston Wei Dou, Wei Wu
papers.abstract: Active equity funds care about fund size, affected by fund flows that obey a strong factor structure with the common component responding to macroeconomic shocks. Funds hedge against common flows by tilting their portfolios toward low-flow-beta stocks, while household/retail and index investors overweight high-flow-beta stocks in equilibrium. Consequently, common flows earn a risk premium, leading to a multi-factor asset-pricing model resembling the ICAPM, even with myopic agents and unsophisticated fund clients. Exploiting quasi-experiments induced by the local-natural-disaster occurrences and the unexpected trade-war announcements, we find that an increased outflow risk faced by funds leads to more aggressive flow-hedging portfolio tilts.
papers.zh_title: 共同基金流量：流量对冲与因子定价
papers.zh_abstract: 主动型股票基金关注基金规模，而基金规模受基金流量影响，这些流量遵循强因子结构，其共同成分对宏观经济冲击做出反应。基金通过将投资组合向低流量贝塔股票倾斜来对冲共同流量，而家庭/散户和指数投资者在均衡中则超配高流量贝塔股票。因此，共同流量获得风险溢价，导致一个类似于跨期资本资产定价模型的多因子资产定价模型，即使存在短视的代理人和不成熟的基金客户也是如此。利用由局部自然灾害发生和意外贸易战公告引发的准实验，我们发现基金面临的流出风险增加会导致更激进的对冲流量投资组合倾斜。

papers.title: Combating Cross-Border Externalities
papers.authors: Shiyi Chen, Joshua S. Graff Zivin, Huanhuan Wang, Jiaxin Xiong
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the impact of a pioneering pollution reduction program, the Ecological Compensation Initiative (ECI) in China, which establishes side payments between upstream and downstream provinces along the same river. The program includes both Coasian and pay-for-performance elements. Instructed by a theoretical model, we employ a difference-in-differences empirical design and find strong evidence that the ECI mitigates the spillover effect of water pollution at the province boundary and brings about sharp reductions in water pollutant emissions from upstream firms, especially those in heavily polluting industries. This initiative also reduces upstream firms’ output and pollution intensity relative to downstream firms. The impact is stronger for upstream firms closer to the river and the point at which it enters the downstream province. Further evidence shows a significant increase in the rate of firms’ entry into neighboring prefectures, but no impact on firms’ exit from that region due to the initiative. Evidence from similar programs, later established in other river systems, suggests that cross-jurisdictional negotiations can effectively mitigate cross-border pollution externalities.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, PE；JEL：D22, H7, K32, Q53, Q56
papers.zh_title: 应对跨境外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一项开创性的污染减排计划——中国的生态补偿倡议的影响，该计划在同一条河流的上游和下游省份之间建立了横向转移支付。该计划既包含科斯式要素，也包含按绩效付费要素。在理论模型的指导下，我们采用双重差分实证设计，发现了强有力的证据表明生态补偿倡议减轻了省界处水污染的溢出效应，并导致上游企业（尤其是重污染行业的企业）的水污染物排放大幅减少。该倡议还降低了上游企业相对于下游企业的产出和污染强度。对于更靠近河流以及河流进入下游省份点的上游企业，其影响更强。进一步证据显示，该倡议显著提高了企业进入邻近地级市的比率，但对企业的退出没有影响。来自后来在其他河流系统建立的类似项目的证据表明，跨辖区谈判可以有效缓解跨境污染外部性。

papers.title: Attrition from Administrative Data: Problems and Solutions with an Application to Postsecondary Education
papers.authors: Andrew Foote, Kevin M. Stange
papers.abstract: This paper examines the bias arising from individuals’ migration from administrative outcome data, with a focus on the labor market consequences of postsecondary education. We find that out-of-state migration is particularly problematic for high-earners, flagship graduates, and certain majors. Consequently, the effect of graduating from a flagship university is 10% higher than one would estimate using in-state earnings exclusively, though the extent of bias differs substantially across contexts. The impact of obtaining a 2-year CTE credential is also understated, as are earnings differences across majors. Approaches to testing for and bounding this bias are considered.
papers.zh_title: 行政数据中的样本流失：问题与解决方案——以高等教育为例
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了因个体从行政结果数据中迁移而产生的偏差，重点关注高等教育的劳动力市场后果。我们发现，跨州迁移对于高收入者、旗舰大学毕业生以及某些专业尤其成问题。因此，从旗舰大学毕业的影响比仅使用州内收入估计的结果高出10%，尽管偏差程度在不同情境下差异很大。获得两年制职业技术教育证书的影响也被低估，不同专业之间的收入差异同样如此。本文考虑了检验和界定这种偏差的方法。

papers.title: The Value of Pharmacy Benefit Management
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: In theory, equilibrium profits for drug patent holders would not involve significant restraints on production and patient utilization if the market had a mechanism for two-part pricing (Oi 1971) or quantity commitments (Murphy, Snyder, and Topel 2014). In fact, patent expiration has little effect on drug utilization especially when those drugs are delivered through insurance plans. This paper provides a quantitative model consistent with the theory and evidence in which pharmacy benefit management on behalf of insurance plans serves these and other purposes in both monopoly and oligopoly provider settings. Calibrating the model to the U.S. market, I conclude that pharmacy benefit management is worth at least $145 billion annually beyond its resource costs. PBM services add at least $192 billion annually in value to society compared to a manufacturer price-control regime. Requiring all PBM services to be self-provided by plan sponsors would forgo about 40 percent of the net value of PBM services largely by increasing management costs. Due to changes in the incidence of PBM services over the drug life cycle, the services encourage innovation even though they reduce the profits of incumbent manufacturers.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE；JEL：D43, D71, I11, I13, L14
papers.zh_title: 药品福利管理的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，如果市场存在两部定价机制或数量承诺机制，药品专利持有者的均衡利润不会对生产和患者使用施加显著限制。事实上，专利到期对药品使用影响甚微，尤其是当这些药品通过保险计划提供时。本文提供了一个与理论和证据一致的定量模型，在该模型中，代表保险计划进行的药品福利管理在垄断和寡头供应商环境中均能实现这些及其他目的。通过将模型校准到美国市场，我得出结论：药品福利管理每年至少价值1450亿美元（超出其资源成本）。与制造商价格管制制度相比，药品福利管理服务每年为社会增加至少1920亿美元的价值。要求所有药品福利管理服务由计划发起人自行提供，将损失约40%的药品福利管理服务净价值，这主要是由于管理成本增加。由于药品福利管理服务在药品生命周期中的发生率发生变化，这些服务虽然降低了现有制造商的利润，但鼓励了创新。

papers.title: Acquisitions, Management, and Efficiency in Rwanda's Coffee Industry
papers.authors: Rocco Macchiavello, Ameet Morjaria
papers.abstract: Well-functioning markets allocate assets to owners that improve firms’ management and performance. We study the effects of ownership changes on coffee mills in Rwanda – an industry in which managing relationships with farmers and seasonal workers is important and that has seen many ownership changes in recent years. We combine administrative data, a survey panel of mills and an original survey of acquirers that allows us to construct acquirer-specific and target-specific control groups. A difference-in-differences design reveals that ownership changes do not improve performance unless the mill is acquired by a foreign firm. Our preferred interpretation – supported by detailed survey evidence that considers alternative hypotheses – is that foreign firms successfully implement management changes in key operational areas. Upon acquisition, both domestic and foreign owned mills attempt to implement similar changes, but domestic firms face resistance from workers and farmers. Domestic owners have relationships with their local communities, which can create opportunities to establish new mills and acquire existing ones. However, these same relationships create pressure to maintain status-quo relational arrangements, which makes it harder to implement managerial changes.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D24, G32, G34, L25, N57, O12, O16
papers.zh_title: 卢旺达咖啡行业的收购、管理与效率
papers.zh_abstract: 运作良好的市场将资产分配给能够改善企业管理和绩效的所有者。我们研究了所有权变更对卢旺达咖啡加工厂的影响——在这个行业中，管理与农民和季节性工人的关系至关重要，并且近年来经历了多次所有权变更。我们结合了行政数据、加工厂调查面板数据以及对收购方的原始调查数据，从而能够构建收购方特定和目标特定的对照组。双重差分设计显示，除非加工厂被外国公司收购，否则所有权变更不会改善绩效。我们偏好的解释——得到了考虑替代假设的详细调查证据的支持——是外国公司在关键运营领域成功实施了管理变革。在收购后，国内和外资所有的加工厂都试图实施类似的变革，但国内公司面临来自工人和农民的阻力。国内所有者与其当地社区存在关系，这可以创造建立新加工厂和收购现有加工厂的机会。然而，这些相同的关系造成了维持现状关系安排的压力，这使得实施管理变革更加困难。

papers.title: Real-Time Inequality
papers.authors: Thomas Blanchet, Léon Mouillet, Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: This paper constructs monthly distributions of national income for the United States. We develop a methodology to disaggregate annual distributions and project monthly changes in a timely manner by combining high-frequency public data sources. This allows us to estimate growth by social groups as soon as quarterly macroeconomic growth numbers are released, and to track the distributional impacts of government policies during and in the aftermath of recessions in real time. We test and validate our methodology by implementing it retrospectively back to 1976. Estimates are available at https: //realtimeinequality.org.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E01, H2, H5, J3
papers.zh_title: 实时不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了美国的高频且及时的收入分配数据。我们开发了一种方法，将高频公共数据源（包括月度家庭和就业调查、季度就业和工资普查以及月度与季度国民账户统计）中的信息整合到一个统一框架中。这使我们能够估算按收入群体、种族和性别划分的经济增长，并与季度宏观经济增长数据保持一致，并实时追踪经济衰退期间及之后政府政策的分配效应。我们通过将方法回溯至1976年进行实施来测试并成功验证了该方法。分析新冠疫情，我们发现所有收入群体在衰退开始后的20个月内恢复了危机前的税前收入水平。尽管复苏主要由就业而非工资增长驱动，但2021年和2022年收入分配底层的实际工资显著增长，凸显了紧张劳动力市场的均等化效应。在考虑税收和现金转移后，2021年底层50%人口的实际可支配收入比2019年高出近20%，但随着疫情期间福利国家扩张的逆转，2022年该收入有所下降。所有估计值均可访问https://realtimeinequality.org，并在每次国民账户季度发布后的几小时内更新。

papers.title: STEM Summer Programs for Underrepresented Youth Increase STEM Degrees
papers.authors: Sarah R. Cohodes, Helen Ho, Silvia C. Robles
papers.abstract: Underrepresentation of Black and Hispanic workers in STEM fields contributes to racial wage gaps and reduces innovation and economic growth. “Pipeline” programs intended to increase diversity are a common intervention to address these problems, but there is little rigorous evidence of their efficacy. We fielded a randomized controlled trial to study a suite of such programs targeted to underrepresented high-school students and hosted at an elite technical institution. Students offered seats in the STEM summer programs were more likely to enroll in, persist through, and graduate from elite colleges and to graduate with a degree in a STEM field. These improvements in college outcomes raised predicted earnings by 3 to 15 percentage points. Increased knowledge of the college application process and a more ambitious college application strategy appear to be a key mechanism.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：I21, I24, J15, J16
papers.zh_title: 面向弱势青年的STEM暑期项目增加STEM学位获得
papers.zh_abstract: 黑人和西班牙裔工人在STEM领域的代表性不足加剧了种族工资差距，并降低了创新和经济增长。旨在增加多样性的“管道”项目是解决这些问题的常见干预措施，但关于其有效性的严格证据很少。我们进行了一项随机对照试验，研究一套针对弱势高中生的此类项目，这些项目由一所精英技术机构主办。获得STEM暑期项目名额的学生更有可能进入、坚持并毕业于精英大学，并以STEM领域学位毕业。这些大学成果的改善将预测收入提高了3到15个百分点。对大学申请过程了解的增强和更雄心勃勃的大学申请策略似乎是一个关键机制。

papers.title: Restoring Confidence in Troubled Financial Institutions After a Financial Crisis
papers.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Mark Carlson
papers.abstract: After an unprecedented number of banks suspended operations during the Panic of 1893, the head regulator of banks chartered by the United States government allowed about 100 banks to reopen after certifying their solvency. We evaluate whether actions by bank owners to change management, contract with depositors to extend liability maturity structure, write off bad assets, and/or inject capital affected bank survival and deposit retention. This historical episode is particularly informative because there was no expectation of government intervention. We find that contracting with depositors provided short-term benefits while dealing with bad assets was key for long-run viability.
papers.zh_title: 金融危机后恢复对陷入困境金融机构的信心
papers.zh_abstract: 在1893年恐慌期间，空前数量的银行暂停营业后，由美国政府特许的银行的首席监管官允许约100家银行在证明其偿付能力后重新开业。我们评估了银行所有者更换管理层、与存款人签订合同以延长负债期限结构、核销不良资产和/或注入资本等行动是否影响了银行的生存和存款留存。这一历史事件特别具有启发性，因为当时没有政府干预的预期。我们发现，与存款人签订合同提供了短期利益，而处理不良资产是长期生存能力的关键。

papers.title: Trade Policy and Global Sourcing: An Efficiency Rationale for Tariff Escalation
papers.authors: Pol Antràs, Teresa C. Fort, Agustín Gutiérrez, Felix Tintelnot
papers.abstract: Import tariffs tend to be higher for final goods than for inputs, a phenomenon commonly referred to as tariff escalation. Yet neoclassical trade theory – and modern Ricardian trade models, in particular – predict that welfare-maximizing tariffs are uniform across sectors. We show that tariff escalation can be rationalized on efficiency grounds in the presence of scale economies. When both downstream and upstream sectors produce under increasing returns to scale, a unilateral tariff in either sector boosts the size and productivity of that sector, raising welfare. While these forces are reinforced up the chain for final-good tariffs, input tariffs may drive final-good producers to relocate abroad, mitigating their potential productivity benefits. The welfare benefits of final-good tariffs thus tend to be larger, with the optimal degree of tariff escalation increasing in the extent of downstream returns to scale. A quantitative evaluation of the US-China trade war demonstrates that any welfare gains from the increase in US tariffs are overwhelmingly driven by final-good tariffs.
papers.zh_title: 贸易政策与全球采购：关税升级的效率理由
papers.zh_abstract: 进口关税往往对最终产品高于对投入品，这一现象通常被称为关税升级。然而，新古典贸易理论——尤其是现代李嘉图贸易模型——预测福利最大化的关税在各行业间应是统一的。我们证明，在存在规模经济的情况下，关税升级可以在效率基础上得到合理化。当下游和上游行业都在规模报酬递增条件下生产时，任一行业的单边关税都会提升该行业的规模和生产率，从而提高福利。虽然这些力量对最终产品关税在产业链上得到加强，但投入品关税可能促使最终产品生产商将生产转移到国外，从而削弱其潜在的生产率收益。因此，最终产品关税的福利收益往往更大，最优关税升级程度随下游规模报酬程度的提高而增加。对中美贸易战的定量评估表明，美国关税增加带来的任何福利收益主要来自最终产品关税。

papers.title: Training, Communications Patterns, and Spillovers Inside Organizations
papers.authors: Miguel Espinosa, Christopher T. Stanton
papers.abstract: This paper examines how training affects productivity across hierarchical layers within organizations. After a randomized training program for frontline employees at a government agency, trained workers' output increased while their requests for managerial assistance fell. This freed managers to focus on strategic tasks—particularly managers with the strongest connections to trained employees. A structural model of organizational hierarchies shows that spillovers to managers account for approximately 45% of the program's total benefits, indicating that evaluations focused solely on individual trainees may substantially understate the full value of training investments.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：J24, L2, M5, M53
papers.zh_title: 组织内部的培训、沟通模式与溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了培训如何影响组织内各层级的生产率。在对某政府机构的一线员工进行随机培训项目后，受训员工的产出增加，同时他们向管理层寻求帮助的请求减少。这使得管理者能够专注于战略任务——尤其是那些与受训员工联系最密切的管理者。一个组织层级结构模型表明，对管理者的溢出效应约占该项目总收益的45%，这表明仅关注个体受训者的评估可能会大幅低估培训投资的全部价值。

papers.title: Foundation of the Small Open Economy Model with Product Differentiation
papers.authors: Robert C. Feenstra, Lorenzo Caliendo
papers.abstract: We derive a small open economy (SOE) as the limit of an economy as the number or size of its trading partners goes to infinity and trade costs also go to infinity. We obtain this limit in the Armington, Eaton-Kortum, Krugman, and Melitz models. In all cases, the trade of the SOE with the foreign countries approaches a finite limit, and the domestic expenditure share for the SOE approaches a limit that is not zero or unity. The foreign countries can be either infinitely many SOEs, or alternatively, one or many large countries with domestic expenditure shares that approach unity. We illustrate the usefulness of this framework by obtaining a formula for the optimal tariff in the SOE -- depending on the elasticity of domestic wages with respect to the tariff -- that is consistent with all models.
papers.zh_title: 具有产品差异化的小型开放经济模型的基础
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将小型开放经济推导为一种经济的极限，该经济中贸易伙伴的数量或规模趋于无穷大，同时贸易成本也趋于无穷大。我们在阿明顿模型、伊顿-科图姆模型、克鲁格曼模型和梅里兹模型中得到了这一极限。在所有情况下，小型开放经济与外国的贸易趋近于一个有限极限，小型开放经济的国内支出份额趋近于一个既不为零也不为一的极限。外国可以是无限多个小型开放经济，或者是一个或多个国内支出份额趋近于一的较大国家。我们通过推导小型开放经济中最优关税的公式——该公式取决于国内工资对关税的弹性——来说明这一框架的有用性，且该公式与所有模型一致。

papers.title: Intermediary Balance Sheets and the Treasury Yield Curve
papers.authors: Wenxin Du, Benjamin M. Hébert, Wenhao Li
papers.abstract: We document a regime change in the Treasury market post-Global Financial Crisis (GFC): dealers switched from net short to net long Treasury bonds. We construct “net-long” and “netshort” curves that account for balance sheet and financing costs, and show that actual yields moved from the net short curve pre-GFC to the net long curve post-GFC. Our theory shows the regime shift caused negative swap spreads and co-movement among swap spreads, dealer positions, and covered-interest-parity violations. Furthermore, the effects of various monetary and regulatory policies are regime-dependent. We highlight Treasury supply as a plausible driver of this regime shift.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：F3, G12, G15, G2
papers.zh_title: 中介机构资产负债表与国债收益率曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了全球金融危机后国债市场的一个制度变迁：交易商从净空头转为净多头国债。我们构建了考虑资产负债表和融资成本的“净多头”和“净空头”曲线，并显示实际收益率从危机前的净空头曲线移动到危机后的净多头曲线。我们的理论表明，这一制度变迁导致了负的互换利差，以及互换利差、交易商头寸和抛补利率平价偏离之间的共同变动。此外，各种货币和监管政策的效果具有制度依赖性。我们强调国债供给是这一制度变迁的一个可能驱动因素。

papers.title: The Shadow of the Neolithic Revolution on Life Expectancy: A Double-Edged Sword
papers.authors: Raphaël Franck, Oded Galor, Omer Moav, Ömer Özak
papers.abstract: This research explores the persistent effect of the Neolithic Revolution on the evolution of life expectancy in the course of human history. It advances the hypothesis and establishes empirically that the onset of the Neolithic Revolution and the associated rise in infectious diseases triggered a process of adaptation reducing mortality from infectious diseases while increasing the propensity for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. Exploiting an exogenous source of variation in the timing of the Neolithic Revolution across French regions, the analysis establishes the presence of these conflicting forces - the beneficial effects on life expectancy before the second epidemiological transition and their adverse effects thereafter.
papers.zh_title: 新石器时代革命对预期寿命的阴影：一把双刃剑
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了新石器时代革命对人类历史进程中预期寿命演变的持续影响。我们提出假设并通过实证建立，新石器时代革命的开始以及随之而来的传染病增加，触发了一个适应过程，降低了传染病的死亡率，同时增加了自身免疫性疾病和炎症性疾病的倾向。利用法国各地区新石器时代革命时间的外生变异，分析证实了这些相互冲突的力量的存在——在第二次流行病学转变之前对预期寿命的有利影响，以及在此之后的不利影响。

papers.title: Pareto Improvements in the Contest for College Admissions
papers.authors: Kala Krishna, Sergey Lychagin, Wojciech Olszewski, Ron Siegel, Chloe Tergiman
papers.abstract: College admissions in many countries are based on a centrally administered test. Applicants invest a great deal of resources to improve their performance on the test, and there is growing concern about the large costs associated with these activities. We consider modifying such tests by introducing performance-disclosure policies that pool intervals of performance rankings, and investigate how such policies can improve students’ welfare in a Pareto sense. Pooling aﬀects the equilibrium allocation of studentso colleges, which hurts some students and beneﬁts others, but also aﬀects the eﬀort students exert. We characterize the Pareto frontier of Pareto improving policies, and also identify improvements that are robust to the distribution of college seats.\n\nWe illustrate the potential applicability of our results with an empirical estimation that uses data on college admissions in Turkey. We ﬁnd that a policy that pools a large fraction of the lowest performing students leads to a Pareto improvement in a contest based on the estimated parameters. We then conduct a laboratory experiment based on the estimated parameters to examine the eﬀect of such pooling on subjects’ behavior. The ﬁndings generally support our theoretical predictions. Our work suggests that identifying and introducing Pareto improving performance-disclosure policies may be a feasible and practical way to improve college admissions based on centralized tests.
papers.zh_title: 大学招生竞争中的帕累托改进
papers.zh_abstract: 许多国家的大学招生基于统一组织的考试。申请者投入大量资源以提高考试成绩，人们日益担忧这些活动带来的巨大成本。我们考虑通过引入绩效披露政策来修改此类考试，该政策将绩效排名的区间进行合并，并研究此类政策如何能在帕累托意义上改善学生的福利。合并会影响学生与大学之间的均衡分配，这伤害一些学生而惠及其他学生，但也会影响学生付出的努力。我们刻画了帕累托改进政策的帕累托前沿，并识别出对大学名额分布具有稳健性的改进。 我们利用土耳其大学招生的数据，通过实证估计来说明我们结果的潜在适用性。我们发现，基于估计参数，将大部分成绩最低的学生合并的政策在竞争中导致了帕累托改进。然后，我们基于估计参数进行实验室实验，以检验这种合并对受试者行为的影响。研究结果总体上支持我们的理论预测。我们的工作表明，识别并引入帕累托改进的绩效披露政策可能是改进基于统一考试的大学招生的一种可行且实用的方法。

papers.title: What Motivates Leaders to Invest in Nation-Building?
papers.authors: Paola Giuliano, Bryony Reich, Alessandro Riboni
papers.abstract: Why do some leaders invest in significant nation-building policies and others do not? Why does nation-building occur at certain junctures in time and not others? In our research, we investigate what motivates leaders to nation build. We argue that threats to their regime motivate rulers to invest in significant nation-building and that the type of threats that provoke nation-building have largely materialized since the 19th century.
papers.zh_title: 什么激励领导者投资于国家建设？
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么有些领导者会投资于重大的国家建设政策，而另一些则不会？为什么国家建设会在某些历史节点发生，而在其他时候则不会？在我们的研究中，我们调查了是什么激励领导者进行国家建设。我们认为，对其政权的威胁促使统治者投资于重大的国家建设，而自19世纪以来，引发国家建设的威胁类型已基本显现。

papers.title: A New Interpretation of Productivity Growth Dynamics in the Pre-Pandemic and Pandemic Era U.S. Economy, 1950-2022
papers.authors: Robert J. Gordon, Hassan Sayed
papers.abstract: The dismal decade of 2010-19 recorded the slowest productivity growth of any decade in U.S. history, only 1.1 percent per year in the business sector. Yet the pandemic appears to have created a resurgence in productivity growth with a 4.1 percent rate achieved in the four quarters of 2020. This paper provides a unified framework that explains productivity growth in both the pre-pandemic and pandemic-era U.S. economy. The key insight is that in their panicked reaction to the collapse of output in the 2008-09 recession, business firms overreacted with “excess layoffs,” adjusting hours to the output decline with a far higher elasticity than normal. Our regression analysis, which allows post-recession rehiring that gradually unwinds the excess layoffs, explains why productivity growth was countercyclical in 2009 and why it was so slow in 2010-16 as rehiring boosted hours growth. Post-sample simulations explain why productivity growth was so high in 2020 and why it fell to only 0.6 percent in the five quarters of 2021-22. The paper includes implications for the future long-term evolution of productivity growth in the business sector and total economy. A new data file on quarterly productivity levels and changes for 17 industries provides new perspectives for 2006-22 and particularly for the nine pandemic quarters of 2020-22. Positive pandemic-era productivity growth can be entirely explained by a surge in the performance of work-from-home service industries, while goods industries soared and then slumped, while contact services recorded strongly negative productivity growth throughout 2020-22.
papers.zh_title: 对疫情前和疫情时代美国经济（1950-2022）生产率增长动态的新解释
papers.zh_abstract: 2010-19年这惨淡的十年是美国历史上生产率增长最慢的十年，商业部门年均增长率仅为1.1%。然而，疫情似乎引发了生产率增长的复苏，2020年四个季度的增长率达到4.1%。本文提供了一个统一的框架来解释疫情前和疫情时代美国经济的生产率增长。关键见解在于，在2008-09年经济衰退中产出崩溃的恐慌反应下，企业过度反应，进行了“过度裁员”，以远高于正常水平的弹性将工时调整到产出下降。我们的回归分析允许衰退后的重新雇佣逐步消除过度裁员，这解释了为什么2009年生产率增长是逆周期的，以及为什么2010-16年生产率增长如此缓慢，因为重新雇佣推动了工时增长。样本外模拟解释了为什么2020年生产率增长如此之高，以及为什么在2021-22年的五个季度中生产率增长降至仅0.6%。本文还包含了对商业部门和整体经济未来长期生产率增长演变的启示。一个关于17个行业季度生产率水平和变化的新数据文件为2006-22年，特别是2020-22年九个疫情季度提供了新的视角。疫情时代的正生产率增长可以完全归因于居家办公服务业表现的激增，而商品行业先飙升后下滑，接触性服务业在2020-22年全年则录得强烈的负生产率增长。

papers.title: Firms and Unemployment Insurance Take-up
papers.authors: Marta Lachowska, Isaac Sorkin, Stephen A. Woodbury
papers.abstract: We use administrative data to quantify the employer’s role in unemployment insurance (UI) take-up. First, there are employer effects in both claiming and appeals, and, consistent with deterrence effects, these are negatively correlated. Second, low-wage workers are less likely to claim and more likely to have their claims appealed than median-wage workers, and employer effects explain a large share of these income gradients. Third, high-claiming and low-appealing employers are desirable employers: they are higher-paying and have lower separation rates. Finally, the dominant source of targeting error in the UI system is that eligible workers do not apply. Our findings emphasize a novel dimension of the role of employers in the labor market, and have implications for the financing of UI.
papers.zh_title: 企业与失业保险申领行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用行政数据量化了雇主在失业保险申领中的作用。首先，雇主效应同时存在于申领和申诉环节，且与威慑效应一致，两者呈负相关。其次，与中位工资工人相比，低工资工人申领失业保险的可能性更低，而其申领被申诉的可能性更高，雇主效应解释了这些收入梯度的很大一部分。第三，高申领率和低申诉率的雇主是理想的雇主：他们支付更高的工资，且离职率更低。最后，失业保险体系中目标错误的主要来源是符合条件的工人没有提出申请。我们的研究结果强调了雇主在劳动力市场中作用的一个新维度，并对失业保险的融资具有启示意义。

papers.title: Fighting Climate Change: International Attitudes Toward Climate Policies
papers.authors: Antoine Dechezleprêtre, Adrien Fabre, Tobias Kruse, Bluebery Planterose, Ana Sanchez Chico, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: This paper explores global perceptions and understanding of climate change and policies, examining factors that influence support for climate action and the impact of different types of information. We conduct large-scale surveys with 40,000 respondents from 20 countries, providing new international data on attitudes towards climate change and respondents’ socioeconomic backgrounds and lifestyles. We identify three key perceptions affecting policy support: perceived effectiveness of policies in reducing emissions, their impact on low-income households, and their effect on respondents’ households (self-interest). Educational videos clarifying policy mechanisms increase support for climate policies; those merely highlighting climate change’s impacts do not.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE, POL；JEL：D78, H23, P48, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 应对气候变化：国际社会对气候政策的态度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了全球对气候变化及政策的认知与理解，考察了影响气候行动支持度的因素以及不同类型信息的影响。我们对来自20个国家的40,000名受访者进行了大规模调查，提供了关于气候变化态度以及受访者社会经济背景和生活方式的新国际数据。我们识别出影响政策支持的三个关键认知：政策在减排方面的感知有效性、对低收入家庭的影响，以及对受访者自身家庭的影响（自利动机）。阐明政策机制的教育视频增加了对气候政策的支持；而仅仅强调气候变化影响的视频则没有这种效果。

papers.title: New Pricing Models, Same Old Phillips Curves?
papers.authors: Adrien Auclert, Rodolfo D. Rigato, Matthew Rognlie, Ludwig Straub
papers.abstract: We show that, in a broad class of menu cost models, the first-order dynamics of aggregate inflation in response to arbitrary shocks to aggregate costs are nearly the same as in Calvo models with suitably chosen Calvo adjustment frequencies. We first prove that the canonical menu cost model is first-order equivalent to a mixture of two time-dependent models, which reflect the extensive and intensive margins of price adjustment. We then show numerically that, in any plausible parameterization, this mixture is well-approximated by a single Calvo model. This close numerical fit carries over to other standard specifications of menu cost models. Thus, for shocks that are not too large, the Phillips curve for a menu cost model looks like the New Keynesian Phillips curve, but with a higher slope.
papers.zh_title: 新定价模型，相同的旧菲利普斯曲线？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，在一大类菜单成本模型中，总通胀对总成本任意冲击的一阶动态与具有适当选择的Calvo调整频率的Calvo模型几乎相同。我们首先证明，经典的菜单成本模型在一阶上等价于两个时间依赖模型的混合，这两个模型分别反映了价格调整的广延边际和集约边际。然后，我们通过数值模拟表明，在任何合理的参数化下，这种混合可以被一个单一的Calvo模型很好地近似。这种紧密的数值拟合也适用于菜单成本模型的其他标准设定。因此，对于不太大的冲击，菜单成本模型的菲利普斯曲线看起来像新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线，但具有更高的斜率。

papers.title: Carbon Pricing, Clean Electricity Standards, and Clean Electricity Subsidies on the Path to Zero Emissions
papers.authors: Severin Borenstein, Ryan Kellogg
papers.abstract: We categorize the primary incentive-based mechanisms under consideration for addressing greenhouse gas emissions from electricity generation—pricing carbon, setting intensity standards, and subsidizing clean energy—and compare their market outcomes under similar expansions of clean electricity generation. While pricing emissions gives strong incentives to first eliminate generation with the highest social cost, a clean energy standard incentivizes earliest phaseout of the generation with the highest private cost. We show that the importance of this distinction depends on the correlation between private costs and emissions rates. We then estimate this correlation for US electricity generation and fuel prices as of 2019. The results indicate that the emissions difference between a carbon tax and clean energy standard that phase out fossil fuel generation over the same timeframe may actually be quite small, though it depends on fossil fuel prices during the phaseout. We also discuss how each of these policy options is likely to impact electricity prices, quantity demanded, government revenue, and economic efficiency. Large pre-existing markups of retail electricity prices over marginal costs are likely to considerably weaken or even reverse the usual assumed efficiency advantage of carbon pricing policies over alternatives, including direct subsidization of clean electricity generation.
papers.zh_title: 通往零排放道路上的碳定价、清洁电力标准与清洁电力补贴
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将目前考虑用于解决电力生产温室气体排放的主要基于激励的机制——碳定价、设定强度标准和补贴清洁能源——进行分类，并在清洁电力发电量类似扩张的情况下比较它们的市场结果。虽然排放定价强烈激励首先淘汰社会成本最高的发电方式，但清洁能源标准则激励首先淘汰私人成本最高的发电方式。我们表明，这种区别的重要性取决于私人成本与排放率之间的相关性。然后，我们估算了截至2019年美国电力生产和燃料价格的这种相关性。结果表明，在相同时间框架内逐步淘汰化石燃料发电的碳税和清洁能源标准之间的排放差异实际上可能非常小，尽管这取决于淘汰期间的化石燃料价格。我们还讨论了每种政策选项可能如何影响电价、需求量、政府收入和经济效率。零售电价相对于边际成本存在巨大的预先加价，这很可能大大削弱甚至逆转通常假设的碳定价政策相对于其他替代方案（包括直接补贴清洁电力发电）的效率优势。

papers.title: Confidence, Self-Selection and Bias in the Aggregate
papers.authors: Benjamin Enke, Thomas Graeber, Ryan Oprea
papers.abstract: The influence of behavioral biases on aggregate outcomes like prices and allocations depends in part on self-selection: whether rational people opt more strongly into aggregate interactions than biased individuals. We conduct a series of betting market, auction and committee experiments using 15 classic cognitive bias tasks. We document that some cognitive errors are strongly reduced through self-selection, while others are not affected at all. A large part of this variation is explained by the quality of people's meta-cognition. In some cognitive tasks, confidence and performance are strongly positively correlated, while for others this link is absent or even negative.
papers.zh_title: 信心、自我选择与总体偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 行为偏差对价格和配置等总体结果的影响部分取决于自我选择：理性人是否比有偏差的个体更强烈地选择参与总体互动。我们利用15个经典认知偏差任务进行了一系列博彩市场、拍卖和委员会实验。我们记录到，一些认知错误通过自我选择被大大减少，而另一些则完全不受影响。这种差异的很大一部分可以通过人们元认知的质量来解释。在某些认知任务中，信心和表现呈强正相关，而在其他任务中，这种联系不存在甚至是负的。

papers.title: New Evidence on the Demand for Advice within Retirement Plans
papers.authors: Jonathan Reuter, David P. Richardson
papers.abstract: We study demand for advice within defined contribution retirement plans offered by 23 institutions where TIAA is sole recordkeeper. Advice seeking increases with age, account balance, annual contribution level, web access, and changes in marital status. More provocatively, participants who invest solely through target date funds—the dominant default investment option—are significantly less likely to seek any form of advice throughout the age distribution, raising the possibility that reliance upon defaults crowds out advice seeking. Advice seeking increases significantly following the introduction of online tools, but is only weakly correlated with market returns and investment menu changes.
papers.zh_title: 退休计划内咨询需求的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由23家机构提供的固定缴款退休计划中对咨询的需求，这些机构中TIAA是唯一的记录保管人。寻求咨询的行为随年龄、账户余额、年度缴款水平、网络访问权限以及婚姻状况的变化而增加。更具争议性的是，仅通过目标日期基金（主要的默认投资选项）进行投资的参与者，在整个年龄分布中寻求任何形式咨询的可能性都显著降低，这增加了依赖默认选项会挤出咨询寻求行为的可能性。在线工具的引入显著增加了寻求咨询的行为，但该行为与市场回报和投资菜单变化仅呈弱相关。

papers.title: Expectations and the Rate of Inflation
papers.authors: Iván Werning
papers.abstract: What is the effect of higher expectations of future inflation on current inflation? I compute this passthrough for a series of canonical firm-pricing models, but allowing for arbitrary (non-rational) expectations. In the Calvo model, the expectational-passthrough can be made arbitrarily close to zero for sufficiently high stickiness, but in practice, for reasonable parameters, passthrough is close to its upper bound of 1. In the Taylor model, in contrast, the upper bound for passthrough is ½ instead of 1. For a general time-dependent model I show that: (i) passthrough is given by a measurable sufficient statistic: the ratio of the average duration of ongoing price spells to that of completed price spells; (ii) the lowest theoretically possible passthrough equals ½ by Taylor pricing; and (iii) passthrough can be theoretically greater than 1 with hazards that decrease over time; (iv) breaking down the passthrough across horizons, it is expectations in the near future that matters the most, expectations of long-run inflation are completely irrelevant; (v) I provide a generalized Phillips curve for current inflation as a linear function of expectations of future inflation and realized past inflations; (vi) I show that the sum of all coefficients, both past and future, sums to one, so that the long-run Phillips curve is vertical. Finally, I study state-dependent “menu cost” models and show that passthrough in these models can be extremely low or extremely high, depending on the exact specification and inflation rate. I suggest a model where firms must pay a fixed cost for changing their sS pricing policy bands. This extension gives a passthrough of 0 for small enough changes in expectations.
papers.zh_title: 预期与通货膨胀率
papers.zh_abstract: 更高的未来通胀预期对当前通胀的影响是什么？我计算了一系列经典企业定价模型中的这种传导效应，但允许任意（非理性）预期。在Calvo模型中，对于足够高的粘性，预期传导可以任意接近于零，但在实践中，对于合理的参数，传导接近其上限1。相比之下，在Taylor模型中，传导的上限是1/2而不是1。对于一个一般的时间依赖模型，我证明：(i) 传导由一个可测的充分统计量给出：正在进行的价格持续期的平均持续时间与已完成的价格持续期的平均持续时间之比；(ii) 理论上可能的最低传导等于1/2，由Taylor定价实现；(iii) 当风险率随时间递减时，传导理论上可以大于1；(iv) 按期限分解传导，近期预期最为重要，长期通胀预期完全无关；(v) 我提供了一个广义菲利普斯曲线，将当前通胀表示为未来通胀预期和已实现过去通胀的线性函数；(vi) 我证明所有系数（包括过去和未来）之和为1，因此长期菲利普斯曲线是垂直的。最后，我研究了状态依赖的“菜单成本”模型，并表明这些模型中的传导可能极低或极高，具体取决于确切的设定和通胀率。我提出了一个模型，其中企业必须为改变其sS定价政策区间支付固定成本。这种扩展对于足够小的预期变化给出了0的传导。

papers.title: Ancestral Livelihoods and Moral Universalism: Evidence from Transhumant Pastoralist Societies
papers.authors: Etienne Le Rossignol, Sara Lowes
papers.abstract: Moral universalism, the extent to which individuals exhibit similar altruism and trust towards in-group and out-group members, varies widely across societies. We test the hypothesis from anthropology that the requirements of transhumant pastoralism – a livelihood in which populations seasonally migrate and herd livestock – made individuals highly interdependent and cohesive within groups but hostile to individuals beyond the radius of extended kin. Using global data, we find that historical reliance on transhumant pastoralism is strongly predictive of greater in-group relative to out-group trust. This result is consistent across countries, between residents of the same country, among second-generation migrants, and with an instrumental variable strategy. We find evidence that these results are specific to transhumant pastoralism. The effects are particularly pronounced when transhumant pastoralists interact with groups that rely on other forms of economic production and in areas that are prone to climate shocks and conflict. Finally, we explore the economic implications of limited moral universalism. We find that greater reliance on transhumant pastoralism is associated with less objective promotion criteria within firms and smaller firm size.
papers.zh_title: 祖先生计与道德普遍主义：来自游牧畜牧社会的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 道德普遍主义，即个体对内群体和外群体成员表现出相似利他主义和信任的程度，在不同社会中差异很大。我们检验了来自人类学的假设：游牧畜牧生计——一种人口季节性迁徙并放牧牲畜的生计方式——使得个体在群体内高度相互依赖和凝聚，但对超出亲属关系半径的个体充满敌意。利用全球数据，我们发现历史上对游牧畜牧的依赖强烈预示着相对于外群体信任而言更高的内群体信任。这一结果在国家之间、同一国家的居民之间、第二代移民中以及使用工具变量策略时都是一致的。我们发现有证据表明这些结果是游牧畜牧所特有的。当游牧畜牧者与依赖其他经济生产形式的群体互动时，以及在容易发生气候冲击和冲突的地区，这种效应尤为显著。最后，我们探讨了有限道德普遍主义的经济含义。我们发现，对游牧畜牧的更大依赖与公司内较少的客观晋升标准以及较小的公司规模相关。

papers.title: The Real State: Inside the Congo's Traffic Police Agency
papers.authors: Raúl Sanchez de la Sierra, Kristof Titeca, Haoyang (Stan) Xie, Albert Malukisa Nkuku, Aimable Amani Lameke
papers.abstract: This paper provides insight into a corruption scheme in Kinshasa’s traffic police agency. First, various data collection branches show that the agency’s revenue is five times that from fines and is derived from a coalition of traffic police officials, their managers, and judicial police officers scheming to extort drivers. Second, the analysis of an experiment suggests that the scheme subverts service. Third, the scheme appears to be a rational response to the context but its logic is widespread. The findings suggest that coalitions of officials, while being socially costly, can yield large illicit revenue, challenging the notion of state weakness.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D23, D73, O1
papers.zh_title: 真实状况：刚果交通警察局内部探秘
papers.zh_abstract: 本文深入剖析了金沙萨交通警察局内部的一个腐败体系。首先，多个数据收集分支显示，该机构的收入是罚款收入的五倍，这些收入来源于交通警察官员、他们的上级以及司法警察官员组成的联盟，他们合谋勒索司机。其次，对一项实验的分析表明，这一体系破坏了服务。第三，该体系看似是对当前环境的理性反应，但其逻辑具有普遍性。研究结果表明，官员联盟虽然社会成本高昂，却能产生巨额非法收入，这对“国家虚弱”的观点提出了挑战。

papers.title: Aftermarket Frictions and the Cost of Off-Platform Options in Centralized Assignment Mechanisms
papers.authors: Adam Kapor, Mohit Karnani, Christopher Neilson
papers.abstract: We study the welfare and human-capital impacts of the configuration of on- and off-platform options in the context of Chile’s centralized higher education platform, leveraging administrative data and two policy changes: an expansion of the number of on-platform slots by approximately 40% and the introduction of a large scholarship program. We first show that more programs’ joining the platform led students to start college sooner and raised the share of students who graduated on time. We then develop a model of college applications, offers, waitlists, and matriculation choices, which we estimate using students’ ranked-ordered applications, on- and off-platform enrollment, and on-time graduation outcomes. When more programs join the platform, welfare increases, and the extent of aftermarket frictions matters less for welfare, enrollment, and graduation rates. High-SES students have greater access to off-platform options, and gains from platform expansion are larger for students from lower-SES backgrounds. Our results indicate that expanding the scope of a higher education platform can have real impacts on welfare and human capital.
papers.zh_title: 二级市场摩擦与集中分配机制中平台外选项的成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用智利集中式高等教育平台的数据以及两项政策变化——平台内名额增加约40%和引入大规模奖学金项目——研究了平台内和平台外选项配置对福利和人力资本的影响。我们首先发现，更多项目加入平台促使学生更早开始上大学，并提高了按时毕业的学生比例。随后，我们构建了一个包含大学申请、录取、候补名单和入学选择的模型，并使用学生的排序申请、平台内外入学以及按时毕业结果的数据进行估计。当更多项目加入平台时，福利增加，且二级市场摩擦的程度对福利、入学率和毕业率的影响变小。高社会经济地位（SES）的学生有更多机会获得平台外选项，而平台扩张对低SES背景学生的收益更大。我们的结果表明，扩大高等教育平台的范围可以对福利和人力资本产生实质性影响。

papers.title: A Luna-tic Stablecoin Crash
papers.authors: Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: After remaining close to 1 US Dollar since its inception in November 2020, the algorithmic stablecoin UST crashed in the two weeks of May 9th to May 15th, 2022, leading to a price collapse of the underlying LUNA token and the erasure of more than 50 Billion U.S. Dollar or 90% in market value.\nI provide a novel theory to account for these phenomena and use it to shed light on the data. I break new ground methodologically by showing how crashes unfold gradually, and by introducing the method of quantitative interpretation. To obtain a gradual unfolding of the crash, I allow for the possibility that the market might return to normal at any moment. Suspension of convertibility happens, once the price has fallen sufficiently far. Agents price LUNA, taking into account these probabilities as well as the ongoing inflow from burning UST coins. Agents sell their UST coins when the probability of an eventual suspension of convertibility exceeds some agent-specific threshold. The implications of the theory are highlighted in an analytically tractable example. The theory is then used as a guide to examine and interpret the data, using bi-hourly observations. I use the observed data to quantify theory variables and use them in turn to interpret the data. I find that the majority of the UST coin holders waited until the probability of suspension was rather high, before deciding to burn their holdings.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E41, F31, F32, G01, G12, G23
papers.zh_title: 一场“月神”般的稳定币崩盘
papers.zh_abstract: 算法稳定币UST自2020年11月问世以来，其价格一直保持在接近1美元的水平，但在2022年5月9日至15日的两周内崩溃，导致其底层LUNA代币价格暴跌，市值蒸发超过500亿美元或90%。我提出一个新理论来解释这些现象，并利用该理论来阐明数据。我在方法论上取得突破，展示了崩盘如何逐步展开，并引入了定量解释的方法。为了获得崩盘的逐步展开过程，我允许市场随时可能恢复正常。一旦价格下跌到足够程度，就会暂停兑换。代理人在定价LUNA时，会考虑这些概率以及燃烧UST代币带来的持续流入。当最终暂停兑换的概率超过某个代理人特定的阈值时，代理人就会出售其UST代币。该理论的启示在一个可解析处理的例子中得到强调。然后，该理论被用作指南，利用每两小时的观测数据来检验和解释数据。我使用观测数据来量化理论变量，并反过来用它们来解释数据。我发现，大多数UST代币持有者一直等到暂停兑换的概率相当高时，才决定燃烧其持有的代币。

papers.title: Misinformation, Consumer Risk Perceptions, and Markets: The Impact of an Information Shock on Vaping and Smoking Cessation
papers.authors: Lawrence Jin, Donald S. Kenkel, Michael F. Lovenheim, Alan D. Mathios, Hua Wang
papers.abstract: Smoking is the leading preventable cause of death in the U.S. Because e-cigarettes do not involve the combustion of tobacco, vaping offers the potential to prevent most of the health consequences of smoking. We study the impact of an information shock created by an outbreak of lung injuries apparently related to e-cigarettes. We use data from multiple sources: surveys of risk perceptions conducted before, during, and after the outbreak; an in-depth survey we conducted on risk perceptions and vaping and smoking behavior; and national aggregate time-series sales data. We find that after the outbreak, consumer perceptions of the riskiness of e-cigarettes sharply increased, so that in contrast to almost all experts, the majority of consumers perceive e-cigarettes to be relatively and absolutely riskier than cigarettes. From our estimated e-cigarette demand models, we conclude that the information shock reduced e-cigarette demand by about 30 percent. We also estimate that the information shock decreased the use of e-cigarettes for smoking cessation, again by about 30 percent. Over time, the reduced smoking cessation due to the information shock will in turn increase smoking-related illness and death.
papers.zh_title: 错误信息、消费者风险认知与市场：信息冲击对电子烟使用和戒烟的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 吸烟是美国可预防的主要死因。由于电子烟不涉及烟草燃烧，因此使用电子烟有可能预防吸烟带来的大部分健康后果。我们研究了一次信息冲击的影响，该冲击源于一场显然与电子烟相关的肺部疾病爆发。我们使用了多个来源的数据：在爆发前、中、后进行的风险认知调查；我们进行的一项关于风险认知以及电子烟使用和吸烟行为的深入调查；以及全国性的时间序列销售数据。我们发现，爆发后，消费者对电子烟风险性的认知急剧上升，以至于与几乎所有专家相反，大多数消费者认为电子烟比香烟相对和绝对风险更高。根据我们估计的电子烟需求模型，我们得出结论，信息冲击使电子烟需求减少了约30%。我们还估计，信息冲击使使用电子烟戒烟的行为减少了约30%。随着时间的推移，信息冲击导致的戒烟减少将反过来增加与吸烟相关的疾病和死亡。

papers.title: Financing Health Care Delivery
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber
papers.abstract: I review the key issues that arise in financing health care delivery. I begin by documenting the key features of health care markets that make financing so central in this sector, such as the skewed and unpredictable nature of health care spending and market failures in health care delivery. I then review the key issues that public and private payers face in designing health care markets, from the proper mix of public and private provision to the role of risk bearing for consumers and providers. Finally, I illustrate how these issues manifest in practice by comparing the design of insurance systems in the United States and Canada.
papers.zh_title: 为医疗服务提供融资
papers.zh_abstract: 我回顾了为医疗服务提供融资时出现的关键问题。我首先记录了医疗市场的主要特征，这些特征使得融资在该领域如此核心，例如医疗支出的偏态和不可预测性以及医疗服务提供中的市场失灵。然后，我回顾了公共和私人支付者在设计医疗市场时面临的关键问题，从公共和私人提供的适当组合到消费者和提供者承担风险的角色。最后，我通过比较美国和加拿大保险制度的设计，说明了这些问题在实践中如何体现。

papers.title: A Portfolio Approach to Global Imbalances
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Tony Zhang
papers.abstract: We use a portfolio-based framework to understand what drives the decline of the U.S. net foreign asset (NFA) position and the reversal in returns earned on the US NFA (exorbitant privilege). We show that global savings gluts and monetary policies widened the U.S. NFA position, while investor demand shifts partially offset this widening. Moreover, U.S. privilege declined after 2010, in accordance with increasing foreign demand for U.S. equity. We also highlight a quantity dimension of the U.S. privilege: the U.S. can issue substantially more debt than other countries for a given yield increase.
papers.zh_title: 全球失衡的投资组合方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个基于投资组合的框架来理解是什么推动了美国净外国资产（NFA）头寸的下降以及美国NFA所获回报率的逆转（过高特权）。我们表明，全球储蓄过剩和货币政策扩大了美国的NFA头寸，而投资者需求的转变部分抵消了这一扩大。此外，美国的特权在2010年后下降，这与外国对美国股票需求的增加相一致。我们还强调了美国特权的一个数量维度：在给定收益率增长的情况下，美国可以比其他国家发行多得多的债务。

papers.title: Racial Inequality in the U.S. Unemployment Insurance System
papers.authors: Daphné Skandalis, Ioana Marinescu, Maxim N. Massenkoff
papers.abstract: The decentralized US unemployment insurance (UI) system lets states decide on key rules. Decentralization could help states efficiently adapt to local economic conditions, but it could also generate racial inequality. We build a novel nationally representative dataset of UI claimants and document a 18:3% gap in UI entitlements between Black and white claimants. After accounting for claimants' work history, we show that state rules differences alone create a 8:4% racial gap. Yet, our welfare analysis indicates that state rules differences are inefficient. Reducing UI rule disparities across states would thus enhance both racial equity and economic efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 美国失业保险制度中的种族不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 分散化的美国失业保险（UI）制度允许各州决定关键规则。分散化可能有助于各州有效适应地方经济状况，但也可能产生种族不平等。我们构建了一个新颖的、具有全国代表性的UI申领人数据集，并记录了黑人和白人申领人之间18.3%的UI福利差距。在考虑了申领人的工作历史后，我们表明仅州规则差异就造成了8.4%的种族差距。然而，我们的福利分析表明，州规则差异是低效的。因此，减少各州之间的UI规则差异将同时增强种族公平和经济效率。

papers.title: The Spanish Mission Legacy on Native American Reservations
papers.authors: Lee J. Alston, Marie Christine Duggan, Julio Alberto Ramos Pastrana
papers.abstract: We explore the long run impact of the Spanish missions on Native American outcomes in the early 20th century. Native communities who interacted with Spanish missionaries developed into enclaves which blended Catholicism with native culture. Some survived assaults on their property rights by Mexico and the US to persist as reservations into the 20th century. We found that having extensive contact with missions increased the percentage of Native Americans Catholic, decreased crime rates, and increased income from agriculture and overall earnings from wages. Surprisingly, we found no impact on education.
papers.zh_title: 西班牙传教团对美洲原住民保留地的遗产影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了西班牙传教团对20世纪初美洲原住民结果的长期影响。与西班牙传教士互动的原住民社区发展成了融合天主教与原住民文化的飞地。其中一些社区在经受墨西哥和美国对其财产权的攻击后幸存下来，作为保留地持续到20世纪。我们发现，与传教团的广泛接触增加了美洲原住民中信奉天主教的比例，降低了犯罪率，并增加了农业收入以及来自工资的总收入。令人惊讶的是，我们发现对教育没有影响。

papers.title: Expecting Floods: Firm Entry, Employment, and Aggregate Implications
papers.authors: Ruixue Jia, Xiao Ma, Victoria Wenxin Xie
papers.abstract: Flood events and flood risk have been increasing in the past few decades and have important consequences for the economy. Using county-level and ZIP-code-level data from the United States during 1998–2018, we document that (1) increased flood risk has a large negative impact on firm entry, employment, and output in the long run; and (2) flood events reduce output in the short run while their impact on firm entry and employment is limited. Motivated by these findings, we construct a spatial equilibrium model to characterize how flood risk shapes firms’ location choices and workers’ employment, which we use to estimate the aggregate impact of increased flood risk on the economy. We find that flood risk reduced U.S. aggregate output by 0.52% in 2018, 80% of which stemmed from expectation effects and 20% from direct damages. We also apply our model to study the distributional consequences and forecast the impact of future changes in flood risk. Our results highlight the importance of considering the adjustment of firms and workers in response to risk in evaluating the consequences of natural disasters.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI；JEL：F64, Q54, Q56, R11, R13
papers.zh_title: 预期洪水：企业进入、就业与总体影响
papers.zh_abstract: 过去几十年中，洪水事件和洪水风险不断增加，并对经济产生重要影响。利用1998-2018年美国县级和邮政编码级数据，我们记录到：(1) 长期来看，洪水风险增加对企业进入、就业和产出有显著的负面影响；(2) 短期来看，洪水事件会减少产出，但对企业进入和就业的影响有限。受这些发现启发，我们构建了一个空间均衡模型来描述洪水风险如何塑造企业的选址决策和工人的就业选择，并利用该模型估计洪水风险增加对经济的总体影响。我们发现，2018年洪水风险使美国总产出减少了0.52%，其中80%源于预期效应，20%源于直接损害。我们还应用该模型研究了分配效应，并预测了未来洪水风险变化的影响。我们的结果强调了在评估自然灾害后果时，考虑企业和工人对风险进行调整的重要性。

papers.title: Partisan Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Joseph Engelberg, Jorge Guzman, Runjing Lu, William Mullins
papers.abstract: Republicans start more firms than Democrats. In a sample of 40 million party-identified Americans between 2005 and 2017, we find that 6% of Republicans and 4% of Democrats become entrepreneurs. This partisan entrepreneurship gap is time-varying: Republicans increase their relative entrepreneurship during Republican administrations and decrease it during Democratic administrations, amounting to a partisan reallocation of 170,000 new firms over our 13-year sample. We find sharp changes in partisan entrepreneurship around the elections of President Obama and President Trump, and the strongest effects among the most politically active partisans: those that donate and vote.
papers.zh_title: 党派创业
papers.zh_abstract: 共和党人比民主党人创办更多企业。在2005年至2017年间4000万有党派标识的美国人的样本中，我们发现6%的共和党人和4%的民主党人成为企业家。这种党派创业差距是随时间变化的：共和党人在共和党执政期间相对创业率上升，在民主党执政期间下降，这相当于在我们13年的样本期内，党派间重新分配了17万家新企业。我们发现，在奥巴马总统和特朗普总统当选前后，党派创业行为发生了急剧变化，并且在政治最活跃的党派成员（即那些捐款和投票的人）中影响最为显著。

papers.title: Another Day, Another Visit: Impact of Arkansas's Mandatory Waiting Period for Women Seeking an Abortion by Demographic Groups
papers.authors: Onur Altindağ, Theodore J. Joyce
papers.abstract: Twenty-six states require that women seeking an abortion wait between 18 and 72 hours after receipt of counseling before the abortion can be completed. Thirteen states require that the counseling be given in person necessitating at least two visits to the provider. In April of 2015, Arkansas increased the waiting period for an abortion from 24 to 48 hours and more significantly, required that women receive the counseling in person. We use a regression discontinuity design to analyze the immediate effect of Arkansas’s 2015 mandatory waiting period (MWP) law on abortion rates. We use de-identified, individual-level data from the Arkansas Department of Health (DOH) on all abortions performed in Arkansas from 2000 to 2020. Abortion rates fell 17 percent among all women, but 22 percent among white non-Hispanics and 14 percent among black non-Hispanics immediately after the law went into effect. We show that the law decreased abortion rates the most among unmarried adults with children. Abortion is now illegal in Arkansas. Given the decline in abortion rates associated the MWP’s two-visit requirement, abortion rates will likely fall further as travel distance to the nearest legal provider increases.
papers.zh_title: 又一天，又一次就诊：阿肯色州强制等待期对不同人口群体寻求堕胎女性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国有26个州要求寻求堕胎的女性在接受咨询后等待18至72小时才能完成堕胎。13个州要求咨询必须当面进行，这意味着至少需要两次前往医疗机构。2015年4月，阿肯色州将堕胎等待期从24小时延长至48小时，更重要的是，要求女性必须当面接受咨询。我们采用断点回归设计分析阿肯色州2015年强制等待期法律对堕胎率的即时影响。我们使用了阿肯色州卫生部提供的2000年至2020年该州所有堕胎的去标识化个体层面数据。法律生效后，所有女性的堕胎率下降了17%，但非西班牙裔白人女性下降了22%，非西班牙裔黑人女性下降了14%。我们表明，该法律对有子女的未婚成年人堕胎率下降幅度最大。堕胎在阿肯色州现已非法。鉴于强制等待期的两次就诊要求导致堕胎率下降，随着前往最近合法堕胎机构的旅行距离增加，堕胎率可能会进一步下降。

papers.title: A New Way of Forecasting Recessions
papers.authors: Edward E. Leamer
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a new way of displaying and analyzing macroeconomic time series to form recession forecasts. The proposed data displays contain the last three years of each expansion. These allow observers to see for themselves what is different about the last year before recession. Based on a statistical model, the most recent data are then probabilistically inserted into these images where the recent data are most similar to the historical data. This amounts to a forecast. The traditional probit model used to forecast recessions inappropriately treats every observation as a separate experiment. This new method deals with these intra-correlation issues. The one variable that is causing a recession alarm is inflation. The unemployment rate is also alarming if the covid-19 data are omitted. The slope of the yield curve, the three-month Treasury yield, and housing starts are all two or three years from the end of the expansion. A probit model that conducts a “horse race” among these five variables reveals it is the bond market variables that best predict recessions. This leaves the Fed under control, but the 1970s data suggests it takes a recession to combat high inflation.
papers.zh_title: 预测衰退的新方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一种展示和分析宏观经济时间序列以形成衰退预测的新方法。所提出的数据展示包含每次扩张期的最后三年。这使得观察者能够自行判断衰退前一年有何不同。基于一个统计模型，最新数据被概率性地插入到这些图像中，即最新数据与历史数据最相似的位置。这相当于一个预测。用于预测衰退的传统概率模型不恰当地将每次观测视为一个独立的实验。这种新方法处理了这些内部相关性问题。引发衰退警报的一个变量是通货膨胀。如果忽略新冠疫情数据，失业率也令人担忧。收益率曲线斜率、三个月期国债收益率和房屋开工率都距离扩张结束还有两到三年。一个在这五个变量之间进行“赛马”的概率模型显示，债券市场变量最能预测衰退。这使得美联储处于可控状态，但1970年代的数据表明，需要一场衰退来对抗高通胀。

papers.title: Short-Term Tax Cuts, Long-Term Stimulus
papers.authors: James Cloyne, Joseba Martinez, Haroon Mumtaz, Paolo Surico
papers.abstract: We study the macroeconomic effects of corporate income taxes on innovation and productivity in the United States. Using narrative-identified tax changes from 1950 to 2019, we find that temporary cuts in corporate tax rates lead to persistent increases in R&D, patenting, productivity, output, and broader measures of intangible investment. We interpret these findings with an estimated semi-endogenous growth model, whose implied sufficient statistics for innovation policy, elasticities of patenting with respect to taxes and social returns to R&D are consistent with the existing literature. The model highlights the tax amortization of intangible asset purchases as a key channel through which corporate taxes distort innovation. We provide direct evidence for the model mechanism using firm-level data: a cut in corporate taxes leads to a relative jump in the stock market valuation of the most intangible-intensive companies, followed by a sustained increase in R&D, intangible investment, and patenting, among these firms. Our results suggest that corporate income taxes create a first-order distortion to innovation and that the tax treatment of intangible assets is central to understanding the effects of corporate taxation.
papers.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：E23, E62, H24, H25, H31, H32, O32
papers.zh_title: 短期减税，长期刺激
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国企业所得税对创新和生产率的宏观经济影响。利用1950年至2019年基于叙事识别的税收变化，我们发现企业所得税税率临时下调会导致研发、专利、生产率、产出以及更广泛的无形资产投资持续增加。我们用一个估计的半内生增长模型来解释这些发现，该模型隐含的创新政策充分统计量、专利对税收的弹性以及研发的社会回报率与现有文献一致。该模型强调了无形资产购买的税收摊销是企业所得税扭曲创新的关键渠道。我们利用企业层面数据为模型机制提供了直接证据：企业所得税削减导致无形资产最密集公司的股票市场估值相对跃升，随后这些公司的研发、无形资产投资和专利申请持续增加。我们的结果表明，企业所得税对创新造成了一阶扭曲，并且无形资产的税收待遇是理解企业所得税影响的核心。

papers.title: Malleability of Alcohol Consumption: Evidence from Migrants
papers.authors: Marit Hinnosaar, Elaine M. Liu
papers.abstract: How malleable is alcohol consumption? Specifically, how much is alcohol consumption driven by the current environment versus individual characteristics? To answer this question, we analyze changes in alcohol purchases when consumers move from one state to another in the United States. We find that if a household moves to a state with a higher (lower) average alcohol purchases than the origin state, the household is likely to increase (decrease) its alcohol purchases right after the move. The current environment explains about two-thirds of the differences in alcohol purchases. The adjustment takes place both on the extensive and intensive margins.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：D12, I12, I18, L66
papers.zh_title: 酒精消费的可塑性：来自移民的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 酒精消费的可塑性如何？具体来说，酒精消费在多大程度上受当前环境驱动，而非个人特征？为了回答这个问题，我们分析了消费者在美国从一个州迁移到另一个州时酒精购买量的变化。我们发现，如果一个家庭迁移到一个平均酒精购买量高于（低于）原籍州的州，该家庭在迁移后很可能会增加（减少）其酒精购买量。当前环境解释了约三分之二的酒精购买量差异。这种调整在广延边际和集约边际上均会发生。

papers.title: Trade, Leakage, and the Design of a Carbon Tax
papers.authors: David Weisbach, Samuel S. Kortum, Michael Wang, Yujia Yao
papers.abstract: Climate policies vary widely across countries, with some countries imposing stringent emissions policies and others doing very little. When climate policies vary across countries, energy-intensive industries have an incentive to relocate to places with few or no emissions restrictions, an effect known as leakage. Relocated industries would continue to pollute but would be operating in a less desirable location. We consider solutions to the leakage problem in a simple setting where one region of the world imposes a climate policy and the rest of the world is passive. We solve the model analytically and also calibrate and simulate the model. Our model and analysis imply: (1) optimal climate policies tax both the supply of fossil fuels and the demand for fossil fuels; (2) on the demand side, absent administrative costs, optimal policies would tax both the use of fossil fuels in domestic production and the domestic consumption of goods created with fossil fuels, but with the tax rate on production lower due to leakage; (3) taxing only production (on the demand side), however, would be substantially simpler, and almost as effective as taxing both production and consumption, because it would avoid the need for border adjustments on imports of goods; (4) the effectiveness of the latter strategy depends on a low foreign elasticity of energy supply, which means that forming a taxing coalition to ensure a low foreign elasticity of energy supply can act as a substitute for border adjustments on goods
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI, LE, PE；JEL：F18, H23, Q54
papers.zh_title: 贸易、泄漏与碳税设计
papers.zh_abstract: 各国气候政策差异很大，一些国家实施严格的排放政策，而另一些国家则几乎无所作为。当各国气候政策不同时，能源密集型行业有动机迁移到排放限制很少或没有的地方，这种效应被称为泄漏。迁移后的行业将继续污染，但会在一个不太理想的地点运营。我们考虑在一个简单的设定中解决泄漏问题，即世界的一个区域实施气候政策，而世界其他地区则保持被动。我们解析求解了该模型，并进行了校准和模拟。我们的模型和分析表明：(1) 最优气候政策既对化石燃料供应征税，也对化石燃料需求征税；(2) 在需求侧，如果没有行政成本，最优政策既会对国内生产中使用化石燃料征税，也会对使用化石燃料生产的商品的国内消费征税，但由于泄漏，生产税率会较低；(3) 然而，仅对生产征税（在需求侧）将大大简化，并且几乎与同时对生产和消费征税一样有效，因为它避免了需要对进口商品进行边境调整；(4) 后一种策略的有效性取决于较低的国外能源供给弹性，这意味着形成一个征税联盟以确保较低的国外能源供给弹性，可以作为商品边境调整的替代方案。

papers.title: Looming Large or Seeming Small? Attitudes Towards Losses in a Representative Sample
papers.authors: Jonathan Chapman, Erik Snowberg, Stephanie W. Wang, Colin Camerer
papers.abstract: We measure individual-level loss aversion using three incentivized, representative surveys of the U.S. population (combined N=3,000). We find that around 50% of the U.S. population is loss tolerant, with many participants accepting negative-expected-value gambles. This is counter to earlier findings—which mostly come from lab/student samples—and expert predictions that 70-90% of participants are loss averse. Consistent with the difference between our study and the prior literature, loss aversion is more prevalent in people with high cognitive ability. Loss-tolerant individuals are more likely to report recent gambling and to have experienced financial shocks. These results support the general hypothesis that individuals value gains and losses differently, although the tendency in a large proportion of the population to emphasize gains over losses is an overlooked behavioral phenomenon.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C81, C9, D03, D81, D9
papers.zh_title: 显得巨大还是看似微小？代表性样本中对损失的态度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用三项有激励的代表性美国人口调查（总样本量N=3000）测量了个体层面的损失厌恶。我们发现，约50%的美国人口是损失容忍的，许多参与者接受了期望值为负的赌博。这与早期的发现（主要来自实验室/学生样本）以及专家预测（70-90%的参与者是损失厌恶的）相反。与我们的研究与先前文献的差异一致，损失厌恶在高认知能力人群中更为普遍。损失容忍的个体更有可能报告近期有赌博行为，并经历过财务冲击。这些结果支持了个人对收益和损失评价不同的总体假设，尽管在很大一部分人口中，强调收益胜过损失的倾向是一种被忽视的行为现象。

papers.title: Ghosting the Tax Authority: Fake Firms and Tax Fraud
papers.authors: Paul Carrillo, Dave Donaldson, Dina Pomeranz, Monica Singhal
papers.abstract: An important but poorly understood form of firm tax evasion arises from the use of "ghost firms"—fake firms that issue fraudulent receipts so that their clients can claim false deductions. We provide a unique window into this global phenomenon using transaction-level tax data from Ecuador. Ghost transactions are widespread, prevalent among large firms and firms with high-income owners, and exhibit suspicious patterns in comparison to ordinary transactions: bunching at round numbers, at the end of the fiscal year, and just below financial system thresholds. We go on to study an innovative enforcement intervention that targeted ghost clients rather than ghosts themselves, which led to substantial tax recovery.
papers.zh_title: 幽灵企业：虚假公司与税务欺诈
papers.zh_abstract: 一种重要但鲜为人知的企业逃税形式涉及使用“幽灵公司”——即开具虚假收据以便客户虚报扣除的假公司。我们利用厄瓜多尔的交易级税收数据，为这一全球现象提供了独特的观察窗口。幽灵交易普遍存在，在大公司和高收入所有者拥有的公司中尤为常见，并且与普通交易相比呈现出可疑模式：集中在整数金额、财政年度末以及略低于金融系统门槛的位置。我们进一步研究了一项创新的执法干预措施，该措施针对的是幽灵客户而非幽灵公司本身，从而实现了可观的税收追回。

papers.title: Operating Hedge and Gross Profitability Premium
papers.authors: Leonid Kogan, Jun Li, Harold Zhang
papers.abstract: We show theoretically that variable production costs lower systematic risk of firms’ cash flows if capital and variable inputs are complementary in firms’ production and input prices are pro-cyclical. In our dynamic model, this operating hedge effect is weaker for more profitable firms, giving rise to a gross profitability premium. Moreover, gross profitability and value factors are distinct and negatively correlated, and their premia are not captured by the CAPM. We estimate the model by the simulated method of moments, and find that its main implications for stock returns and cash flow dynamics are quantitatively consistent with the data.
papers.zh_title: 经营对冲与总利润率溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从理论上证明，如果资本和可变投入在生产中是互补的，且投入价格是顺周期的，那么可变生产成本会降低企业现金流的系统性风险。在我们的动态模型中，这种经营对冲效应对利润率更高的企业更弱，从而产生了总利润率溢价。此外，总利润率因子和价值因子是截然不同的且呈负相关，它们的溢价无法被资本资产定价模型所捕捉。我们通过模拟矩方法估计了该模型，并发现其对股票回报和现金流动态的主要含义在数量上与数据一致。

papers.title: How Hybrid Working From Home Works Out
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Ruobing Han, James Liang
papers.abstract: Hybrid working from home (hybrid), whereby employees work a mix of days at home and at work each week, has become common for graduate employees. This paper evaluates a randomized control trial of hybrid on 1612 graduate engineers, marketing and finance employees of a large technology firm. There are four key results. First, hybrid was highly valued by employees on average, reducing attrition by 33% and improving job-satisfaction measures. Second, hybrid reduced working hours on home days and increased them on office days and the weekend, altering the structure of the working week. Third, hybrid increased messaging and video calls, even when all employees were in the office, reflecting a move towards more electronic communication. Finally, there were large differences in the valuations of hybrid between managers and non-managers. Non-managers were more likely to volunteer into the hybrid experiment, to work from home on eligible days, to predict positive impacts on productivity, and to reduce their attrition under hybrid. In contrast, managers were less likely to volunteer, less likely to work from home on eligible days, predicted a negative average impact of hybrid on productivity, and saw increased attrition rates under hybrid.
papers.zh_title: 混合居家办公的效果如何
papers.zh_abstract: 混合居家办公（hybrid），即员工每周部分时间在家办公、部分时间在办公室办公，已成为毕业生员工的常见模式。本文评估了一项针对一家大型科技公司1612名毕业生工程师、市场营销和财务员工的混合办公随机对照试验。有四个关键结果。第一，混合办公平均而言受到员工高度重视，使离职率降低33%，并提高了工作满意度指标。第二，混合办公减少了在家工作日的工时，增加了在办公室日和周末的工时，改变了工作周的结构。第三，混合办公增加了消息和视频通话，即使所有员工都在办公室时也是如此，反映出向更多电子化沟通的转变。最后，管理者与非管理者对混合办公的估值存在巨大差异。非管理者更有可能自愿参与混合办公实验，在符合条件的日子居家办公，预测对生产率的积极影响，并在混合办公下降低离职率。相比之下，管理者不太可能自愿参与，不太可能在符合条件的日子居家办公，预测混合办公对生产率的平均负面影响，并在混合办公下看到离职率上升。
