papers.title: Simple Tests for Selection: Learning More from Instrumental Variables
papers.authors: Dan A. Black, Joonhwi Joo, Robert LaLonde, Jeffrey A. Smith, Evan J. Taylor
papers.abstract: We provide simple tests for selection on unobserved variables in the Vytlacil-Imbens-Angrist framework for Local Average Treatment Effects (LATEs). Our setup allows researchers not only to test for selection on either or both of the treated and untreated outcomes, but also to assess the magnitude of the selection effect. We show that it applies to the standard binary instrument case, as well as to experiments with imperfect compliance and fuzzy regression discontinuity designs, and we link it to broader discussions regarding instrumental variables. We illustrate the substantive value added by our framework with three empirical applications drawn from the literature.
papers.zh_title: 选择性的简单检验：从工具变量中了解更多
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在局部平均处理效应（LATE）的Vytlacil-Imbens-Angrist框架中，提供了针对未观测变量选择性的简单检验。我们的设置不仅允许研究者检验是否对处理结果或未处理结果存在选择性，还可以评估选择性效应的大小。我们表明，该方法适用于标准二元工具变量情形，以及存在不完全依从性的实验和模糊断点回归设计，并将其与关于工具变量的更广泛讨论联系起来。我们通过文献中的三个实证应用来说明我们框架的实质性附加值。

papers.title: American Agriculture, Water Resources, and Climate Change
papers.authors: Gary D. Libecap, Ariel Dinar
papers.abstract: This paper highlights the role of agriculture in the American economy and society over time and points to farmer historical and contemporary responses to varying climatic conditions. It indicates the importance of water as an input to agricultural production and identifies possible impacts of climate change on access to water. It then summarizes a set of eleven papers from an NBER research project on water, climate change, and the agricultural sector.
papers.zh_title: 美国农业、水资源与气候变化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文强调了农业在美国经济和社会中随时间演变的作用，并指出了农民历史上及当代对多变气候条件的应对方式。文章说明了水作为农业生产投入要素的重要性，并识别了气候变化对水资源获取可能产生的影响。随后，文章总结了一个NBER研究项目中关于水、气候变化和农业部门的十一篇论文。

papers.title: Banking on Transparency for the Poor: Experimental Evidence from India
papers.authors: Erica M. Field ⓡ Natalia Rigol ⓡ Charity M. Troyer Moore ⓡ Rohini Pande ⓡ Simone G. Schaner
papers.abstract: Do information frictions limit the benefits of financial inclusion drives for the rural poor? We evaluate an experimental intervention among recently banked poor Indian women receiving government cash transfers via direct deposit. Treated women were provided automated voice calls confirming details of transactions posted to their accounts. The intervention increased women's knowledge of account balances and trust in their local banking agent. Indicative of improved consumption-smoothing by income-constrained women, administrative data show that treated women accessed government transfers faster when the service was active, with treatment effects dissipating after the notifications were discontinued. On average, other aspects of account use remained unchanged. However, consistent with account information benefiting those with high transaction costs more, the intervention increased account use among women who lived more than an hour from the kiosk.
papers.zh_title: 为穷人押注透明度：来自印度的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 信息摩擦是否会限制金融包容性举措对农村贫困人口的益处？我们评估了一项针对近期获得银行账户的印度贫困女性的实验性干预措施，这些女性通过直接存款接收政府现金转移支付。接受干预的女性会收到自动语音电话，确认其账户交易详情。该干预措施提高了女性对账户余额的了解以及对当地银行代理的信任。行政数据显示，在服务活跃期间，接受干预的女性更快地获取了政府转移支付，这表明收入受限女性的消费平滑得到了改善，但在通知停止后，处理效应逐渐消失。平均而言，账户使用的其他方面保持不变。然而，与账户信息对交易成本高的人更有益一致的是，该干预措施增加了居住在距离服务亭超过一小时路程的女性的账户使用。

papers.title: The Effect of Macroeconomic Uncertainty on Firm Decisions
papers.authors: Saten Kumar, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
papers.abstract: Using a new survey of firms in New Zealand, we document how exogenous variation in the macroeconomic uncertainty perceived by firms affects their economic decisions. We use randomized information treatments that provide different types of information about the first and/or second moments of future economic growth to generate exogenous changes in the perceived macroeconomic uncertainty of some firms. The effects on their decisions relative to their initial plans as well as relative to an untreated control group are measured in a follow-up survey six months later. We find that as firms become more uncertain, they reduce their prices, employment, and investment, their sales decline, and they become less likely to invest in new technologies or open new facilities. These ex-post effects of uncertainty are similar to how firms say they would respond to higher uncertainty when asked hypothetical questions.
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济不确定性对企业决策的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一项针对新西兰企业的新调查，我们记录了企业感知到的宏观经济不确定性的外生变化如何影响其经济决策。我们采用随机信息处理方式，提供关于未来经济增长第一和/或第二矩的不同类型信息，以引起部分企业感知到的宏观经济不确定性的外生变化。在六个月后的后续调查中，我们测量了这些变化相对于企业初始计划以及相对于未接受处理的对照组对其决策的影响。我们发现，随着企业变得更加不确定，它们会降低价格、减少就业和投资，销售额下降，并且投资新技术或开设新设施的可能性降低。这些不确定性的事后效应与企业在被问及假设性问题时表示将如何应对更高不确定性的方式相似。

papers.title: Help Really Wanted? The Impact of Age Stereotypes in Job Ads on Applications from Older Workers
papers.authors: Ian Burn, Daniel Firoozi, Daniel Ladd, David Neumark
papers.abstract: Correspondence studies have found evidence of age discrimination in callback rates for older workers, but less is known about whether job advertisements can themselves shape the age composition of the applicant pool. We construct job ads for administrative assistant, retail, and security guard jobs, using language from real job ads collected in a prior large-scale correspondence study (Neumark et al., 2019a). We modify the job-ad language to randomly vary whether or not the job ad includes ageist language regarding age-related stereotypes. Our main analysis relies on machine learning methods to design job ads based on the semantic similarity between phrases in job ads and age-related stereotypes. In contrast to a correspondence study in which job searchers are artificial and researchers study the responses of real employers, in our research the job ads are artificial and we study the responses of real job searchers. \nWe find that job-ad language related to ageist stereotypes, even when the language is not blatantly or specifically age-related, deters older workers from applying for jobs. The change in the age distribution of applicants is large, with significant declines in the average and median age, the 75th percentile of the age distribution, and the share of applicants over 40. Based on these estimates and those from the correspondence study, and the fact that we use real-world ageist job-ad language, we conclude that job-ad language that deters older workers from applying for jobs can have roughly as large an impact on hiring of older workers as direct age discrimination in hiring.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LE, LS, PE；JEL：J14, J6, J7, J78
papers.zh_title: 真的需要帮助吗？招聘广告中的年龄刻板印象对老年工作者申请的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 通信研究已发现老年工作者在回电率方面存在年龄歧视的证据，但关于招聘广告本身是否能塑造申请者的年龄构成，我们知之甚少。我们为行政助理、零售和保安职位构建了招聘广告，使用了先前一项大规模通信研究（Neumark et al., 2019a）中收集的真实招聘广告的语言。我们修改了招聘广告的语言，随机变化广告是否包含与年龄相关刻板印象有关的年龄歧视性语言。我们的主要分析依赖于机器学习方法，根据招聘广告中的短语与年龄相关刻板印象之间的语义相似性来设计招聘广告。与通信研究中求职者是虚构的、研究人员研究真实雇主的反应不同，在我们的研究中，招聘广告是虚构的，我们研究真实求职者的反应。我们发现，与年龄歧视性刻板印象相关的招聘广告语言，即使这些语言并非明显或专门与年龄相关，也会阻止老年工作者申请工作。申请者年龄分布的变化很大，平均年龄和中位年龄、年龄分布的第75百分位数以及40岁以上申请者的比例均显著下降。基于这些估计以及通信研究的估计，并且考虑到我们使用了现实世界中的年龄歧视性招聘广告语言，我们得出结论：阻止老年工作者申请工作的招聘广告语言对老年工作者招聘的影响，大致与招聘中的直接年龄歧视一样大。

papers.title: Are Menthol Smokers Different? An Economic Perspective
papers.authors: Yu-Chun Cheng, Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Hua Wang
papers.abstract: Of the 45.7 million current smokers in the U.S. age 12 and over, more than 18.5 million usually smoke menthol cigarettes. The Food and Drug Administration recently proposed a tobacco product standard that would prohibit menthol as a characterizing flavor in cigarettes. The FDA concludes that the prohibition of menthol in cigarettes is appropriate for public health, meeting the criterion established by the 2009 Tobacco Control Act. In this paper we explore whether there are internality-based market failures that provide an applied welfare economics rationale to prohibit menthol. Our empirical approach provides descriptive evidence from the 2018-2019 Tobacco Use Supplement to the Current Population Survey on how menthol use is associated with smokers’ market demand along multiple intensive and extensive margins. We also use direct measures of smoking-related misinformation and internalities, and stated preference data, from a 2021 Cornell Online Survey. We acknowledge that the associations we document in observational data might reflect bias due to self-selection into menthol use. We discuss several lines of evidence about whether self-selection into menthol use might be mainly quasi-random. We leave it to reader whether there is convincing evidence that differential levels of internality-based market failures are a sufficient justification for the proposed prohibition of menthol cigarettes.
papers.zh_title: 薄荷醇吸烟者有何不同？一个经济学视角
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国12岁及以上的4570万当前吸烟者中，超过1850万人通常吸薄荷醇香烟。美国食品药品监督管理局最近提出了一项烟草产品标准，将禁止在香烟中使用薄荷醇作为特征风味。FDA得出结论，禁止香烟中的薄荷醇对公共健康是适当的，符合2009年《烟草控制法》确立的标准。在本文中，我们探讨是否存在基于内部性的市场失灵，为禁止薄荷醇提供应用福利经济学的理由。我们的实证方法利用2018-2019年当前人口调查的烟草使用补充数据，提供了关于薄荷醇使用如何与吸烟者在多个集约和广延边际上的市场需求相关联的描述性证据。我们还使用了2021年康奈尔在线调查中关于吸烟相关错误信息和内部性的直接测量，以及陈述偏好数据。我们承认，我们在观测数据中记录的相关性可能反映了因自我选择进入薄荷醇使用而产生的偏差。我们讨论了关于自我选择进入薄荷醇使用是否可能主要是准随机的几条证据线索。我们留给读者判断：是否存在令人信服的证据表明，基于内部性的市场失灵的不同水平足以成为拟议禁止薄荷醇香烟的充分理由。

papers.title: Were Small Businesses More Likely to Permanently Close in the Pandemic?
papers.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Frank M. Fossen, Reid L. Johnsen, Gentian Droboniku
papers.abstract: Previous estimates indicate that COVID-19 led to a large drop in the number of operating businesses operating early in the pandemic, but surprisingly little is known on whether these shutdowns turned into permanent closures and whether small businesses were disproportionately hit. This paper provides the first analysis of permanent business closures using confidential administrative firm-level panel data covering the universe of businesses filing sales taxes from the California Department of Tax and Fee Administration. We find large increases in closures rates in the first two quarters of 2020, but a strong reversal of this trend in the third quarter of 2020. The increase in closures rates in the first two quarters of the pandemic was substantially larger for small businesses than large businesses, but the rebound in the third quarter was also larger. The disproportionate closing of small businesses led to a sharp concentration of market share among larger businesses as indicated by the Herfindahl-Hirschman Index with only a partial reversal after the initial increase. The findings highlight the fragility of small businesses during a large adverse shock and the consequences for the competitiveness of markets.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H25, I18, L26
papers.zh_title: 小企业在疫情期间更可能永久关闭吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的估计表明，COVID-19导致疫情初期运营企业数量大幅下降，但令人惊讶的是，关于这些停业是否转变为永久关闭以及小企业是否受到不成比例冲击的信息很少。本文首次利用来自加州税费管理局的涵盖所有提交销售税企业的机密行政企业层面面板数据，对永久性企业关闭进行了分析。我们发现，2020年前两个季度的关闭率大幅上升，但在2020年第三季度出现了强劲逆转。在疫情的前两个季度，小企业的关闭率增长远大于大企业，但第三季度的反弹也更大。小企业不成比例的关闭导致市场份额急剧集中于大企业，如赫芬达尔-赫希曼指数所示，且初始增长后仅出现部分逆转。这些发现突显了小企业在巨大不利冲击下的脆弱性及其对市场竞争力的影响。

papers.title: World War II Blues: The Long–lasting Mental Health Effect of Childhood Trauma
papers.authors: Mevlude Akbulut-Yuksel, Erdal Tekin, Belgi Turan
papers.abstract: There has been a revival of warfare and threats of interstate war in recent years as the number of countries engaged in armed conflict surged dramatically, reaching levels unprecedented since the end of the Cold War. This is happening at a time when the global burden of mental health illness is also on the rise. We examine the causal impact of early life exposure to warfare on long–term mental health, using novel data on the amount of bombs dropped in German cities by Allied Air Forces during World War II (WWII) and the German Socio-economic Panel. Our identification strategy leverages a generalized difference-in-differences design, exploiting the plausibly exogenous variation in the bombing intensity experienced by the former West German cities during the war as a quasi-experiment. We find that cohorts younger than age five at the onset of WWII or those born during the war are in significantly worse mental health later in life when they are between the ages of the late 50s and 70s. Specifically, an increase of one standard deviation in the bombing intensity experienced during WWII is associated with about a 10 percent decline in an individual’s long–term standardized mental health score. This effect is equivalent to a 16.2 percent increase in the likelihood of being diagnosed with clinical depression. Our investigation suggests that mechanisms such as the destruction of healthcare infrastructure, the increased burden on the healthcare system, and wealth losses during WWII exacerbate the adverse impact of bombing exposure on long–term mental health. Conversely, war relief funds transferred to municipalities following the war have a mitigating impact. Our findings are robust to numerous empirical checks and specifications. With the mental health impact of childhood exposure to warfare persisting well into the late stages of life, the global burden of mental illness may be aggravated for many years to come. Our findings imply that prioritizing children and a long–term horizon in public health planning and response may be critical to mitigating the adverse mental health consequences of exposure to armed conflict.
papers.zh_title: 二战忧郁：童年创伤的长期心理健康影响
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，随着参与武装冲突的国家数量急剧增加，达到冷战结束以来前所未有的水平，战争和国家间战争的威胁再度抬头。这发生在全球心理健康疾病负担也在上升的时期。我们利用盟军空军在第二次世界大战期间投放到德国城市的炸弹数量的新数据以及德国社会经济面板数据，考察了早年暴露于战争对长期心理健康的因果影响。我们的识别策略采用广义双重差分设计，利用前西德城市在战争期间经历的轰炸强度的外生变化作为准实验。我们发现，在二战开始时年龄小于五岁或在战争期间出生的群体，在晚年（50多岁到70多岁之间）的心理健康状况显著更差。具体来说，二战期间经历的轰炸强度每增加一个标准差，个体的长期标准化心理健康得分就会下降约10%。这一效应相当于被诊断患有临床抑郁症的可能性增加16.2%。我们的研究表明，二战期间医疗基础设施的破坏、医疗系统负担的增加以及财富损失等机制加剧了轰炸暴露对长期心理健康的不利影响。相反，战后转移给市政当局的战争救济基金则具有缓解作用。我们的发现对众多实证检验和设定均保持稳健。由于童年时期暴露于战争对心理健康的影响会持续到生命晚期，全球心理健康疾病负担可能会在未来许多年加剧。我们的发现意味着，在公共卫生规划和应对中优先考虑儿童并着眼长期，对于减轻暴露于武装冲突的不利心理健康后果可能至关重要。

papers.title: Adverse Selection as a Policy Instrument: Unraveling Climate Change
papers.authors: Steve Cicala, David Hémous, Morten G. Olsen
papers.abstract: We propose a new policy instrument that leverages adverse selection when Pigouvian policies are infeasible or undesirable. Our policy gives firms the option to pay a tax on their voluntarily disclosed emissions, or an output tax based on the average emissions among undisclosed firms. We derive sufficient statistics formulas to calculate the welfare gains relative to an output tax, and an algorithm to implement the policy with minimal information. In an application to methane emissions from oil and gas fields, our policy generates significant welfare gains. Finally, we extend our analysis to the design of international carbon policy.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D82, H2, H87, K32, L51, Q54
papers.zh_title: 作为政策工具的逆向选择：解开气候变化难题
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的政策工具，当庇古税不可行或不可取时，利用逆向选择。我们的政策赋予企业选择权：要么对其自愿披露的排放量缴税，要么根据未披露企业的平均排放量缴纳产出税。我们推导出充分统计量公式，以计算相对于产出税的福利收益，并提出一种在信息最少的情况下实施该政策的算法。在应用于油气田甲烷排放的案例中，我们的政策产生了显著的福利收益。最后，我们将分析扩展到国际碳政策的设计。

papers.title: The Impact of Climate Change on Mortality in the United States: Benefits and Costs of Adaptation
papers.authors: Olivier Deschenes
papers.abstract: This paper reviews and extends the recent empirical literature on the impact of climate change on mortality and adaptation in the United States. The analysis produces several new facts. First, the reductions in the impact of extreme heat on mortality risk previously documented up to 2004 have continued up to 2019, consistent with continued investments in health-protecting adaptations to high temperatures. The second part of the paper examines the private and external costs of electricity generation and consumption related to high temperatures, a commonly-used proxy for measuring the consumption of adaptation services. Extreme temperatures increase electricity demand in the residential sector (relative to moderate temperatures), but not in the commercial, industrial, and transportation end-use sectors. The additional electricity demand in response to high temperatures results in significant external costs due to the release of local and global pollutants caused by the combustion of fossil fuels in order to produce electricity. These external costs, documented for the first time in this paper, are one order of magnitude larger than the private cost of adaptation associated with electricity consumption.
papers.zh_title: 气候变化对美国死亡率的影响：适应的收益与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾并扩展了近期关于气候变化对美国死亡率及适应行为影响的实证文献。分析得出了几个新事实。首先，此前记录至2004年的极端高温对死亡风险影响的减弱趋势一直持续到2019年，这与持续投资于高温健康保护性适应措施相一致。论文第二部分考察了与高温相关的发电和用电的私人成本与外部成本，这是衡量适应服务消费的常用代理指标。极端温度增加了居民部门的电力需求（相对于温和温度），但在商业、工业和交通终端使用部门并未增加。为应对高温而增加的电力需求，因化石燃料燃烧发电释放本地和全球污染物，产生了显著的外部成本。这些外部成本（本文首次记录）比与电力消费相关的适应私人成本高出一个数量级。

papers.title: Fear of Appreciation and Current Account Adjustment
papers.authors: Paul Bergin, Kyunghun Kim, Ju H. Pyun
papers.abstract: This paper finds that limited exchange rate flexibility in the form of “fear of appreciation” slows adjustment of current account imbalances, providing a novel perspective on Friedman’s conjecture regarding exchange-rate flexibility. We present evidence that countries classified as more flexible have faster convergence than peggers for current account deficits, but not so for surpluses. An implication is that current account surpluses are more persistent than deficits on average. Evidence indicates that this asymmetry is associated with a one-sided muting of exchange rate appreciations. We develop a multi-country DSGE model augmented with a “fear of appreciation” policy rule, solved as an occasionally binding constraint. It can explain greater persistence of current account surpluses compared to deficits in general equilibrium where surpluses and deficits must cancel in aggregate.
papers.zh_title: 升值恐惧与经常账户调整
papers.zh_abstract: 本文发现，以“升值恐惧”形式存在的有限汇率灵活性会减缓经常账户失衡的调整，这为弗里德曼关于汇率灵活性的猜想提供了一个新颖视角。我们提供的证据表明，对于经常账户赤字，被归类为更灵活汇率制度的国家比盯住汇率制国家收敛速度更快，但对于盈余则不然。这意味着平均而言，经常账户盈余比赤字更具持续性。证据表明，这种不对称性与汇率升值被单方面抑制有关。我们构建了一个多国DSGE模型，并加入“升值恐惧”政策规则，将其作为偶尔有约束力的条件求解。该模型能够解释在一般均衡中（盈余与赤字必须在总量上抵消）经常账户盈余比赤字更具持续性的现象。

papers.title: Natural Disasters and Municipal Bonds
papers.authors: Jun Kyung Auh, Jaewon Choi, Tatyana Deryugina, Tim Park
papers.abstract: Climate change is increasing the frequency of natural disasters, which could make municipal bonds a riskier asset class. We study the effects of natural disasters on municipal bond returns, exploiting the repeat sales approach to overcome the challenge that municipal bonds trade extremely infrequently. We find substantial price effects that materialize gradually: returns of uninsured bonds fall slowly in the weeks following a disaster, by 0.31% on average, translating into investor losses of almost $10 billion. Source of bond revenue, bond insurance, disaster severity, federal disaster aid, and local financial conditions all affect the magnitude of the price effects.
papers.zh_title: 自然灾害与市政债券
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化正在增加自然灾害的频率，这可能使市政债券成为风险更高的资产类别。我们利用重复销售方法克服市政债券交易极不频繁的挑战，研究了自然灾害对市政债券回报的影响。我们发现价格效应显著且逐步显现：在灾难发生后的几周内，未保险债券的回报平均下降0.31%，转化为投资者近100亿美元的损失。债券收入来源、债券保险、灾难严重程度、联邦灾难援助以及地方金融状况都会影响价格效应的幅度。

papers.title: Measuring Climate Change Impacts on Agriculture: An Equilibrium Perspective on Supply-Side Approaches
papers.authors: Christophe Gouel
papers.abstract: A popular approach for estimating climate change impacts on agriculture is to rely on supply-side reduced-form regressions. These methods, which include the Ricardian approach, focus on how farmers and agricultural land market react to changes in climatic conditions, under the implicit assumption that crop prices stay constant. To test whether this assumption is innocuous, I use a quantitative trade model of global agricultural markets to emulate the findings of a supply-side approach as well as to calculate welfare changes accounting for price changes. The results show that both welfare measures are weakly correlated and can be of opposite signs, and that the supply-side approach tends to underestimate the cost of climate change. The main drivers of these differences are the neglects of the imperfect substitutability of crops in demand and of terms-of-trade changes. The supply-side approach provides a valid approximation of the welfare cost of climate change only if crops are almost perfectly substitutable in demand and trade costs are neglected, a situation in which it is reasonable to assume constant prices.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI；JEL：D58, F18, Q17, Q54, R14
papers.zh_title: 衡量气候变化对农业的影响：基于供给侧方法的均衡视角
papers.zh_abstract: 一种流行的估算气候变化对农业影响的方法是依赖供给侧简化形式回归。这些方法（包括李嘉图方法）关注农民和农业土地市场如何应对气候条件变化，其隐含假设是农产品价格保持不变。为检验这一假设是否无害，我利用全球农产品市场的量化贸易模型来模拟供给侧方法的结果，并计算考虑价格变化后的福利变化。结果表明，两种福利衡量指标弱相关且可能符号相反，供给侧方法倾向于低估气候变化的成本。这些差异的主要驱动因素是对需求中农产品不完全替代性以及贸易条件变化的忽视。只有当农产品在需求中几乎完全可替代且忽略贸易成本时（此时假设价格不变是合理的），供给侧方法才能为气候变化的福利成本提供有效近似。

papers.title: Pricing Power in Advertising Markets: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Matthew Gentzkow, Jesse M. Shapiro, Frank Yang, Ali Yurukoglu
papers.abstract: Existing theories of media competition imply that advertisers will pay a lower price in equilibrium to reach consumers who multi-home across competing outlets. We generalize, extend, and test this prediction. We find that television outlets whose viewers watch more television charge a lower price per impression to advertisers. This finding helps rationalize well-known stylized facts such as a premium for younger and more male audiences on television. A quantitative version of our model whose only free parameter is a scale normalization can explain 35 percent of the variation in price per impression across owners of television networks, and aligns with recent trends in television advertising revenue. We use the model to quantify the impact of mergers and the effect of Netflix ad carriage on prices for linear television advertising. We then extend our analysis to social media markets where we find evidence of a premium for older audiences (who multi-home less), and we discuss implications for competition across ad formats.
papers.zh_title: 广告市场中的定价权：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 现有的媒体竞争理论表明，广告商在均衡中为接触跨平台多归属的消费者将支付更低价格。我们对此预测进行了概括、扩展和检验。我们发现，观众观看电视更多的电视媒体，其向广告商收取的每千次印象价格更低。这一发现有助于解释众所周知的现象，例如电视上年轻和男性观众群体的溢价。我们量化模型的唯一自由参数是规模标准化，它可以解释电视网络所有者之间每千次印象价格变异的35%，并与近期电视广告收入趋势相符。我们利用该模型量化合并的影响以及Netflix广告投放对线性电视广告价格的影响。随后，我们将分析扩展到社交媒体市场，在那里我们发现了老年观众（多归属较少）溢价的证据，并讨论了不同广告形式竞争的含义。

papers.title: Central Bank Communication with the General Public: Promise or False Hope?
papers.authors: Alan S. Blinder, Michael Ehrmann, Jakob de Haan, David-Jan Jansen
papers.abstract: Central banks are increasingly reaching out to the general public to motivate and explain their monetary policy actions. One major aim of this outreach is to guide inflation expectations; another is to ensure accountability and create trust. This article surveys a rapidly-growing literature on central bank communication with the public. We first discuss why and how such communication is more challenging than communicating with expert audiences. Then we survey the empirical evidence on the extent to which this new outreach does in fact affect inflation expectations and trust. On balance, we see some promise in the potential to inform the public better, but many challenges along the way.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D12, D84, E52, E58, G53
papers.zh_title: 央行与公众沟通：承诺还是虚假希望？
papers.zh_abstract: 央行越来越多地接触公众，以解释和说明其货币政策行动。这一外联活动的一个主要目标是引导通胀预期；另一个目标是确保问责制和建立信任。本文综述了关于央行与公众沟通这一快速增长的文献。我们首先讨论了为何以及如何与公众沟通比与专家受众沟通更具挑战性。然后，我们调查了关于这种新型外联活动是否确实影响通胀预期和信任的实证证据。总体而言，我们看到在更好地告知公众方面存在一些希望，但沿途面临许多挑战。

papers.title: Blending Theory and Data: A Space Odyssey
papers.authors: Dave Donaldson
papers.abstract: This article describes methods used in the field of spatial economics that combine insights from economic theory and evidence from data in order to answer counter- factual questions. I outline a general framework that emphasizes three elements: a specific question to be answered, a set of empirical relationships that can be identified from exogeneity assumptions, and a theoretical model that is used to extrapolate from such empirical relationships to the answer that is required. I then illustrate the application of these elements via a series of twelve examples drawn from the fields of international, regional, and urban economics. These applications are chosen to illustrate the various techniques that researchers use to minimize the theoretical assumptions that are needed to traverse the distance between identified empirical patterns and the questions that need to be answered.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IFM, ITI；JEL：B4, C1, F0, O0, R0
papers.zh_title: 融合理论与数据：一场空间奥德赛
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了空间经济学领域中使用的方法，这些方法结合了经济理论的见解和数据的证据，以回答反事实问题。我概述了一个通用框架，强调三个要素：需要回答的具体问题、一组可从外生性假设中识别的经验关系，以及用于从这些经验关系外推至所需答案的理论模型。然后，我通过来自国际、区域和城市经济学领域的十二个例子来说明这些要素的应用。选择这些应用是为了说明研究人员使用的各种技术，以最小化在已识别的经验模式与需要回答的问题之间所需的理论假设。

papers.title: College Costs, Financial Aid, and Student Decisions
papers.authors: Susan Dynarski, Lindsay C. Page, Judith Scott-Clayton
papers.abstract: The increasing tension between the perceived necessity of a college degree and the challenge of paying for it has led to a proliferation of financial aid policy in the U.S. and around the world. More students are receiving more aid today, and more different types of aid, than ever before. Half a century of policy experimentation has led to an equally impressive accumulation of research evidence, facilitated by methodological advances and the widespread availability of student-level administrative data. In this chapter, we present the economic rationale for financial aid, a summary of how aid works in the U.S. context, and common methodological challenges in the study of financial aid. We then review the evidence from both inside and outside the U.S. on the causal impact of a variety of financial aid policies and programs on students’ college decisions, attainment, and post-college outcomes, and summarize the overarching themes with respect to margins of impact, mechanisms, and heterogeneity. We conclude with a discussion of future directions for research.
papers.zh_title: 大学成本、经济援助与学生决策
papers.zh_abstract: 大学学位的必要性认知与支付能力挑战之间日益加剧的紧张关系，导致美国和世界各地经济援助政策的激增。如今，比以往更多的学生获得更多援助，且援助类型更多样。半个世纪的政策实验，加上方法论的进步和学生层面行政数据的广泛可得性，促成了同样令人印象深刻的研究证据积累。在本章中，我们介绍了经济援助的经济学原理、美国背景下援助运作方式的总结，以及研究经济援助时常见的方法论挑战。随后，我们回顾了美国内外关于各种经济援助政策和项目对学生大学决策、学业成就和毕业后结果因果影响的证据，并总结了关于影响边际、机制和异质性的总体主题。最后，我们讨论了未来的研究方向。

papers.title: The Effects of Teacher Quality on Adult Criminal Justice Contact
papers.authors: Evan K. Rose, Jonathan T. Schellenberg, Yotam Shem-Tov
papers.abstract: This paper estimates teachers' impacts on their students' future criminal justice contact (CJC). Using a unique data set linking the universe of North Carolina public school data to administrative arrest records, we find a standard deviation of teacher effects on students' future arrests of 2.7 percentage points (11% of the sample mean). Teachers' effects on CJC are orthogonal to their effects on academic achievement, implying assignment to a high test score value-added teacher does not reduce future CJC. However, teachers who reduce suspensions and improve attendance substantially reduce future arrests. Similar patterns emerge when allowing teacher impacts to vary by student sex, race, socio-economic status, and school. The results suggest that the development of non-cognitive skills is central to the returns to education for crime and highlight an important dimension of teachers' social value missed by test score-based quality metrics.
papers.zh_title: 教师质量对成年后刑事司法接触的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估算了教师对学生未来刑事司法接触（CJC）的影响。利用一个独特的数据集，将北卡罗来纳州公立学校的全体数据与行政逮捕记录相链接，我们发现教师对学生未来逮捕概率的影响标准差为2.7个百分点（占样本均值的11%）。教师对CJC的影响与其对学业成绩的影响正交，这意味着被分配到高考试成绩增值的教师并不会减少未来的CJC。然而，那些能够减少停学率并提高出勤率的教师，则显著降低了未来的逮捕率。当允许教师影响因学生性别、种族、社会经济地位和学校而异时，也出现了类似的模式。研究结果表明，非认知技能的发展对于教育在减少犯罪方面的回报至关重要，并突显了以考试成绩为基础的质量指标所忽视的教师社会价值的一个重要维度。

papers.title: Digital Public Health Interventions at Scale: The Impact of Social Media Advertising on Beliefs and Outcomes Related to COVID Vaccines
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Kristen Grabarz, Michael Luca, Nils C. Wernerfelt
papers.abstract: Public health organizations increasingly use social media advertising campaigns in pursuit of public health goals. In this paper, we evaluate the impact of about $40 million of social media advertisements that were run and experimentally tested on Facebook and Instagram, aimed at increasing COVID-19 vaccination rates in the first year of the vaccine roll-out. The 819 randomized experiments in our sample were run by 174 different public health organizations and collectively reached 2.1 billion individuals in 15 languages. We find that these campaigns are, on average, effective at influencing self-reported beliefs - shifting opinions close to 1% at baseline with a cost per influenced person of about $3.41. Combining this result with an estimate of the relationship between survey outcomes and vaccination rates derived from observational data yields an estimated cost per additional vaccination of about $5.68. There is further evidence that campaigns are especially effective at influencing users’ knowledge of how to get vaccines. Our results represent, to the best of our knowledge, the largest set of online public health interventions analyzed to date.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D0, I0, M0
papers.zh_title: 大规模数字公共卫生干预：社交媒体广告对新冠疫苗相关信念和结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 公共卫生组织越来越多地使用社交媒体广告活动来追求公共卫生目标。在本文中，我们评估了在Facebook和Instagram上运行并通过实验测试的约4000万美元社交媒体广告的影响，这些广告旨在在疫苗推广的第一年提高COVID-19疫苗接种率。我们样本中的819个随机实验由174个不同的公共卫生组织运行，总共以15种语言覆盖了21亿人。我们发现，这些活动平均而言能有效影响自我报告的信念——在基线水平上使观点改变约1%，每位受影响者的成本约为3.41美元。将此结果与从观测数据中得出的调查结果与疫苗接种率之间关系的估计相结合，得出每额外接种一剂的估计成本约为5.68美元。还有证据表明，这些活动在影响用户如何获取疫苗的知识方面尤其有效。据我们所知，我们的结果代表了迄今为止分析的最大规模的在线公共卫生干预数据集。

papers.title: Tertiarization Like China
papers.authors: Xilu Chen, Guangyu Pei, Zheng Michael Song, Fabrizio Zilibotti
papers.abstract: This article documents a rapid shift toward services (tertiarization) of the Chinese economy since 2005, as evidenced by the significant increase in both employment and value-added shares of the service sector. Notably, our analysis reveals that a variety of measures of productivity growth have been greater in the service sector than in the manufacturing sector. Firm-level measures of dynamism corroborate this ongoing tertiarization trend, which is not limited to services used as inputs to industrial production but also extends to consumer services. These findings are robust across different growth accounting methodologies, including a recently proposed method by Fan et al. (2023) that addresses challenges associated with the measurement of quality improvements in service industries.
papers.zh_title: 像中国一样的服务化转型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了中国经济自2005年以来向服务业（服务化）的快速转变，这体现在服务业就业和增加值份额的显著增加上。值得注意的是，我们的分析显示，服务业的各种生产率增长指标均高于制造业。企业层面的活力指标也证实了这一持续的服务化趋势，这种趋势不仅限于用作工业生产投入的服务，还扩展到了消费服务。这些发现在不同的增长核算方法下都是稳健的，包括Fan等人（2023年）最近提出的一种方法，该方法解决了服务业质量改进测量相关的挑战。

papers.title: A Study of Bid-rigging in Procurement Auctions: Evidence from Indonesia, Georgia, Mongolia, Malta, and State of California
papers.authors: Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi, Daichi Shimamoto
papers.abstract: We apply a Regression Discontinuity based approach to screen for collusion developed in Kawai et al. (2022) to public procurement data from five countries. We find that bidders who win by a very small margin have significantly lower backlog than those who lose by a very small margin in the sample of procurement auctions from Indonesia, suggesting that bidders collude by bid rotation. Our results suggest that the proportion of noncompetitive auctions is at least about 5% for all E-procurement auctions and about 3% for all auctions in Indonesia. We cannot reject the null of competition in other countries.
papers.zh_title: 采购拍卖中串通投标的研究：来自印度尼西亚、格鲁吉亚、蒙古、马耳他和加利福尼亚州的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将Kawai等人（2022年）开发的基于断点回归的方法应用于五个国家的公共采购数据，以筛查合谋行为。我们发现，在印度尼西亚的采购拍卖样本中，以极小优势获胜的投标人其积压订单显著少于以极小劣势落败的投标人，这表明投标人通过轮换投标进行合谋。我们的结果表明，在印度尼西亚，所有电子采购拍卖中非竞争性拍卖的比例至少约为5%，所有拍卖中约为3%。在其他国家，我们无法拒绝竞争性原假设。

papers.title: Liquidity, Financial Centrality, and the Value of Key Players
papers.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Robert Townsend, Juan Pablo Xandri
papers.abstract: Consider an economy in which agents face income risk but interact in a stochastic financial network where the randomness is dictated by both chance and choice. We study the financial centrality of an agent defined as the ex-ante marginal social value of providing a small liquid asset to that agent. We show financially central agents are not only those who are linked often, but are more likely to be linked when (i) the realized network is fragmented, (ii) income risk is high, (iii) shocks are positively correlated, (iv) attitudes toward risk are more sensitive in the aggregate, and (v) there are tail risks. We apply our framework to models of financial markets with participation shocks, supply chains subject to disruptions, and village risk-sharing networks. We also study how the stochastic financial network structure influences bargaining, thereby endogenizing Pareto weights in the planner's problem. Evidence from Thai villages is consistent with these bargaining foundations, showing that agents who are more central indeed receive greater Pareto weight. We conclude by examining the welfare consequences of targeting larger liquid assets to key traders in markets, and to the most liquidity-sensitive links in supply chains.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, EFG, PE, TWP；JEL：D14, E44, G01, L14, O16
papers.zh_title: 流动性、金融中心性与关键参与者的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 考虑一个经济，其中代理人面临收入风险，但在一个由随机性和选择共同决定的随机金融网络中互动。我们研究代理人的金融中心性，定义为向该代理人提供少量流动性资产的先验边际社会价值。我们表明，金融中心代理人不仅是那些经常被连接的代理人，而且更有可能在以下情况下被连接：（i）实现的网络是碎片化的，（ii）收入风险高，（iii）冲击是正相关的，（iv）总体风险态度更敏感，以及（v）存在尾部风险。我们将我们的框架应用于具有参与冲击的金融市场模型、易受中断影响的供应链模型以及村庄风险分担网络模型。我们还研究了随机金融网络结构如何影响谈判，从而内生化规划者问题中的帕累托权重。来自泰国村庄的证据与这些谈判基础一致，表明更中心的代理人确实获得了更大的帕累托权重。最后，我们考察了将更大的流动性资产定向分配给市场中的关键交易者以及供应链中对流动性最敏感的环节的福利后果。

papers.title: Heterogeneity in Disease Resistance and the Impact of Antibiotics in the US.
papers.authors: C. Justin Cook, Jason Fletcher
papers.abstract: We hypothesize that the impact of antibiotics is moderated by a population’s inherent (genetic) resistance to infectious disease. Using the introduction of sulfa drugs in 1937, we show that US states that are more genetically susceptible to infectious disease saw larger declines in their bacterial mortality rates following the introduction of sulfa drugs in 1937. This suggests area-level genetic endowments of disease resistance and the discovery of medical technologies have acted as substitutes in determining levels of health across the US. We also document immediate effects of sulfa drug exposure to the age of the workforce and cumulative effects on educational attainment for cohorts exposed to sulfa drugs in early life.
papers.zh_title: 疾病抵抗力的异质性与美国抗生素的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们假设抗生素的影响受到人群对传染病固有（遗传）抵抗力的调节。利用1937年磺胺类药物的引入，我们发现，在遗传上更易感染传染病的美国各州，在1937年磺胺类药物引入后，其细菌性死亡率下降幅度更大。这表明，在决定美国各地健康水平方面，地区层面的疾病抵抗力遗传禀赋与医疗技术的发现起到了替代作用。我们还记录了磺胺类药物暴露对劳动力年龄的即时影响，以及对在生命早期暴露于磺胺类药物的队列在教育程度上的累积影响。

papers.title: Social Capital II: Determinants of Economic Connectedness
papers.authors: Raj Chetty, Matthew O. Jackson, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Nathaniel Hendren, Robert B. Fluegge, Sara Gong, Federico Gonzalez, Armelle Grondin, Matthew Jacob, Drew Johnston, Martin Koenen, Eduardo Laguna-Muggenburg, Florian Mudekereza, Tom Rutter, Nicolaj Thor, Wilbur Townsend, Ruby Zhang, Mike Bailey, Pablo Barberá, Monica Bhole, Nils Wernerfelt
papers.abstract: Low levels of social interaction across class lines have generated widespread concern and are associated with worse outcomes, such as lower rates of upward income mobility. Here, we analyze the determinants of cross-class interaction using data from Facebook, building upon the analysis in the first paper in this series. We show that about half of the social disconnection across socioeconomic lines—measured as the difference in the share of high-socioeconomic status (SES) friends between low- and high-SES people—is explained by differences in exposure to high- SES people in groups such as schools and religious organizations. The other half is explained by friending bias—the tendency for low-SES people to befriend high-SES people at lower rates even conditional on exposure. Friending bias is shaped by the structure of the groups in which people interact. For example, friending bias is higher in larger and more diverse groups and lower in religious organizations than in schools and workplaces. Distinguishing exposure from friending bias is helpful for identifying interventions to increase cross-SES friendships (economic connectedness). Using fluctuations in the share of high-SES students across high school cohorts, we show that increases in high-SES exposure lead low-SES people to form more friendships with high-SES people in schools that exhibit low levels of friending bias. Hence, socioeconomic integration can increase economic connectedness in communities where friending bias is low. In contrast, when friending bias is high, increasing cross-SES interaction among existing members may be necessary to increase economic connectedness. To support such efforts, we release privacy-protected statistics on economic connectedness, exposure, and friending bias for each ZIP code, high school, and college in the U.S. at www.socialcapital.org.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：J0, R0
papers.zh_title: 社会资本 II：经济关联性的决定因素
papers.zh_abstract: 跨阶层社会互动水平低下引发了广泛担忧，并与收入向上流动性降低等更差的结果相关。在此，我们利用Facebook的数据，基于本系列第一篇论文的分析，研究了跨阶层互动的决定因素。我们发现，约一半的社会经济断层（以低社会经济地位人群与高社会经济地位人群之间，拥有高社会经济地位朋友比例的差异来衡量）可归因于在学校和宗教组织等群体中接触高社会经济地位人群的差异。另一半则归因于交友偏差——即低社会经济地位人群即使在接触条件相同的情况下，与高社会经济地位人群交友的倾向也较低。交友偏差受到人们互动群体结构的影响。例如，在规模更大、更多元化的群体中，交友偏差更高；而在宗教组织中，交友偏差低于学校和工作场所。区分接触与交友偏差有助于识别增加跨社会经济地位友谊（经济关联性）的干预措施。利用高中年级队列中高社会经济地位学生比例的波动，我们发现在交友偏差水平较低的学校，高社会经济地位接触的增加会导致低社会经济地位人群与高社会经济地位人群建立更多友谊。因此，在交友偏差较低的社区，社会经济融合可以增加经济关联性。相反，当交友偏差较高时，可能需要增加现有成员之间的跨社会经济地位互动，以提高经济关联性。为支持此类努力，我们在www.socialcapital.org上发布了美国每个邮政编码区、高中和大学的经济关联性、接触和交友偏差的隐私保护统计数据。

papers.title: Social Capital I: Measurement and Associations with Economic Mobility
papers.authors: Raj Chetty, Matthew O. Jackson, Theresa Kuchler, Johannes Stroebel, Nathaniel Hendren, Robert B. Fluegge, Sara Gong, Federico González, Armelle Grondin, Matthew Jacob, Drew Johnston, Martin Koenen, Eduardo Laguna-Muggenburg, Florian Mudekereza, Tom Rutter, Nicolaj Thor, Wilbur Townsend, Ruby Zhang, Mike Bailey, Pablo Barberá, Monica Bhole, Nils Wernerfelt
papers.abstract: In this paper—the first in a series of two papers that use data on 21 billion friendships from Facebook to study social capital—we measure and analyze three types of social capital by ZIP code in the United States: (i) connectedness between different types of people, such as those with low vs. high socioeconomic status (SES); (ii) social cohesion, such as the extent of cliques in friendship networks; and (iii) civic engagement, such as rates of volunteering. These measures vary substantially across areas, but are not highly correlated with each other. We demonstrate the importance of distinguishing these forms of social capital by analyzing their associations with economic mobility across areas. The fraction of high-SES friends among low-SES individuals—which we term economic connectedness—is among the strongest predictors of upward income mobility identified to date, whereas other social capital measures are not strongly associated with economic mobility. If children with low-SES parents were to grow up in counties with economic connectedness comparable to that of the average child with high-SES parents, their incomes in adulthood would increase by 20% on average. Differences in economic connectedness can explain well-known relationships between upward income mobility and racial segregation, poverty rates, and inequality. To support further research and policy interventions, we publicly release privacy-protected statistics on social capital by ZIP code at www.socialcapital.org.
papers.zh_title: 社会资本 I：测量及其与经济流动性的关联
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文——本系列两篇论文中的第一篇，利用Facebook上210亿个友谊数据研究社会资本——中，我们测量并分析了美国按邮政编码区划分的三种社会资本：(i) 不同类型人群（如低社会经济地位与高社会经济地位人群）之间的关联性；(ii) 社会凝聚力，例如友谊网络中派系的程度；(iii) 公民参与，例如志愿服务率。这些指标在不同地区差异显著，但彼此之间相关性不高。我们通过分析它们与地区间经济流动性的关联，证明了区分这些社会资本形式的重要性。低社会经济地位个体中高社会经济地位朋友的比例——我们称之为经济关联性——是迄今为止已识别的向上收入流动性最强的预测因子之一，而其他社会资本指标与经济流动性的关联并不强。如果父母为低社会经济地位的儿童，在具有与普通高社会经济地位父母儿童相当的经济关联性的县成长，他们成年后的收入平均将增加20%。经济关联性的差异可以解释向上收入流动性与种族隔离、贫困率和不平等之间已知的关系。为支持进一步研究和政策干预，我们在www.socialcapital.org上公开发布了按邮政编码区划分的社会资本隐私保护统计数据。

papers.title: The Impact of the Clean Air Act on Particulate Matter in the 1970s.
papers.authors: Maureen L. Cropper, Nicholas Z. Muller, Yongjoon Park, Victoria Perez-Zetune
papers.abstract: We examine whether counties designated as out of attainment with the National Ambient Air Quality Standards (NAAQS) under the 1970 CAA experienced larger reductions in Total Suspended Particulates (TSP) during the 1970s than attainment counties. We answer this question using the official designation of nonattainment status which, between 1972 and 1978, was by Air Quality Control Region (AQCR). Data from balanced panels of TSP monitors in operation from 1969-78 and from 1971-78 are used to examine the impact of nonattainment status on TSP. We also examine the impact of nonattainment on TSP using the definition in the literature, which designates a county as out of attainment if any of its monitors violated the NAAQS. Using the official (AQCR) nonattainment designation, TSP, on average, fell by 10.2 μg/m3 using the 1969 panel and 9.1 μg/m3 using the 1971 panel. Using the definition of nonattainment in the literature yields smaller reductions: 6.0 μg/m3 using the 1969-78 panel and 7.7 μg/m3 using the 1971-78 panel. Using the correct definition of nonattainment in difference-in-differences (DID) models calls into question whether these results can be interpreted as causal. When counties are characterized using the official nonattainment designation, the parallel trends assumption, crucial to causal inference in the DID context, is violated.
papers.zh_title: 1970年代《清洁空气法》对颗粒物的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了根据1970年《清洁空气法》被指定为未达到国家环境空气质量标准（NAAQS）的县，在1970年代是否比达标县经历了更大的总悬浮颗粒物（TSP）减少。我们使用1972年至1978年间按空气质量控制区（AQCR）进行的官方未达标状态指定来回答这个问题。我们利用1969-1978年和1971-1978年期间运行的TSP监测仪平衡面板数据，检验未达标状态对TSP的影响。我们还使用文献中的定义（即如果某个县的任何监测仪违反了NAAQS，则将该县指定为未达标）来检验未达标对TSP的影响。使用官方（AQCR）未达标指定，使用1969年面板，TSP平均下降了10.2 μg/m³；使用1971年面板，平均下降了9.1 μg/m³。使用文献中的未达标定义，下降幅度较小：使用1969-1978年面板为6.0 μg/m³，使用1971-1978年面板为7.7 μg/m³。在双重差分（DID）模型中使用正确的未达标定义，使这些结果是否可被解释为因果关系受到质疑。当使用官方未达标指定对县进行特征描述时，对DID背景下因果推断至关重要的平行趋势假设被违反了。

papers.title: The Race Between Education, Technology, and Institutions
papers.authors: Jonathan Vogel
papers.abstract: I generalize the canonical model--in which relative supply and demand for worker skills shape the skill premium--incorporating monopsony power, minimum wages, and unemployment. I estimate the extended canonical model using national data and, separately, state-level data. I show that incorporating the minimum wage improves the out-of-sample fit of the traditional canonical model. I document that minimum wages--together with supply and demand--play a central role in shaping the evolution of the U.S. college premium and the differential evolution of state-level college premia. Lending credibility to these conclusions, the state and national estimates are not only qualitatively, but also quantitatively consistent.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：E24, J0, J23, J31, J42
papers.zh_title: 教育、技术与制度之间的竞赛
papers.zh_abstract: 我将经典模型——其中工人技能的相对供给和需求塑造了技能溢价——进行了推广，纳入了买方垄断势力、最低工资和失业。我分别使用全国数据和州级数据估计了扩展后的经典模型。我表明，纳入最低工资改善了传统经典模型的样本外拟合度。我记录了最低工资——与供给和需求一起——在塑造美国大学溢价的演变以及州级大学溢价的差异化演变中发挥着核心作用。为这些结论提供可信度的是，州级和全国估计不仅在定性上一致，而且在定量上也一致。

papers.title: Screening with Multitasking: Theory and Empirical Evidence from Teacher Tenure Reform
papers.authors: Michael Dinerstein, Isaac M. Opper
papers.abstract: What happens when employers screen their employees but only observe a subset of output? We specify a model with heterogeneous employees and show that their response to the screening affects output in both the probationary period and the post-probationary period. The post-probationary impact is due to their heterogeneous responses affecting which individuals are retained and hence the screening efficiency. We show that the impact of the endogenous response on both the unobserved outcome and screening efficiency depends on whether increased effort on one task increases or decreases the marginal cost of effort on the other task. If the response decreases unobserved output in the probationary period then it increases the screening efficiency, and vice versa. We then assess these predictions empirically by studying a change to teacher tenure policy in New York City, which increased the role that a single measure—test score value-added—played in tenure decisions. We show that in response to the policy teachers increased test score value-added and decreased output that did not enter the tenure decision. The increase in test score value-added was largest for the teachers with more ability to improve students' untargeted outcomes, increasing their likelihood of getting tenure. We estimate that the endogenous response to the policy announcement reduced the screening efficiency gap—defined as the reduction of screening efficiency stemming from the partial observability of output—by 28%, effectively shifting some of the cost of partial observability from the post-tenure period to the pre-tenure period.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：D23, I21, J08, J24, J41
papers.zh_title: 多任务下的筛选：来自教师任期改革的理论与实证证据
papers.zh_abstract: 当雇主筛选其员工但仅观察到部分产出时会发生什么？我们构建了一个包含异质性员工的模型，并表明他们对筛选的反应会影响试用期和试用期后的产出。试用期后的影响源于他们的异质性反应影响了哪些个体被保留，从而影响了筛选效率。我们表明，内生反应对未观测结果和筛选效率的影响取决于在一项任务上增加努力是否会增加或减少另一项任务上的边际努力成本。如果反应降低了试用期的未观测产出，那么它会提高筛选效率，反之亦然。然后，我们通过研究纽约市教师任期政策的变化来实证评估这些预测，该政策增加了单一指标——考试成绩增值——在任期决策中的作用。我们表明，作为对该政策的回应，教师提高了考试成绩增值，并减少了未进入任期决策的产出。考试成绩增值的增加在那些更有能力提高学生非目标结果的教师中最大，从而增加了他们获得任期的可能性。我们估计，对政策公告的内生反应将筛选效率差距——定义为由产出的部分可观测性导致的筛选效率降低——减少了28%，有效地将部分部分可观测性的成本从任期后时期转移到了任期前时期。

papers.title: Social Protection and Social Distancing During the Pandemic: Mobile Money Transfers in Ghana
papers.authors: Dean Karlan, Matt Lowe, Robert Darko Osei, Isaac Osei-Akoto, Benjamin N. Roth, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: We randomized mobile money transfers to a sample of low-income Ghanaians during the COVID-19 pandemic. Treated households received eight transfers that sum to roughly one month’s income, while control households only received one transfer. The mere announcement of upcoming transfers has null effects. Once disbursed, transfers increase contemporaneous food expenditure by 8% and income by 20%, but do not affect psychological well-being. Over 40% of the transfers are spent on food. We find suggestive evidence that transfers increased social distancing. The positive effect on income does not persist to two years after the last transfer, and surprisingly, two-year effects on consumption and psychological well-being are negative. Together, we learn that pandemic-era cash transfers can support households economically without diminishing adherence to public health protocols, though with null or negative long-term effects.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, H84, O12
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间的社会保护与社会距离：加纳的移动货币转账
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，我们向加纳低收入人群样本随机发放了移动货币转账。受助家庭收到了八笔总计约一个月收入的转账，而对照家庭仅收到一笔转账。仅宣布即将到来的转账没有效果。一旦发放，转账使同期食品支出增加了8%，收入增加了20%，但不影响心理健康。超过40%的转账用于食品。我们发现了转账增加了社会距离的提示性证据。对收入的积极影响并未持续到最后一笔转账后的两年，而且令人惊讶的是，两年后对消费和心理健康的影响是负面的。总之，我们了解到，疫情时期的现金转移可以在不削弱遵守公共卫生协议的情况下为家庭提供经济支持，尽管长期影响为零或负面。

papers.title: Still Worth the Trip? School Busing Effects in Boston and New York
papers.authors: Joshua Angrist, Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Clemence M. Idoux, Parag A. Pathak
papers.abstract: School assignment in Boston and New York City came to national attention in the 1970s as courts across the country tried to integrate schools. Today, district-wide choice allows Boston and New York students to enroll far from home, perhaps enhancing integration. Urban school transportation is increasingly costly, however, and has unclear integration and education consequences. We estimate the causal effects of non-neighborhood school enrollment and school travel on integration, achievement, and college enrollment using an identification strategy that exploits partly-random assignment in the Boston and New York school matches. Instrumental variables estimates suggest distance and travel boost integration for those who choose to travel, but have little or no effect on test scores and college attendance. We argue that small effects on educational outcomes reflect modest effects of distance and travel on school quality as measured by value-added.
papers.zh_title: 仍然值得一程？波士顿和纽约的校车接送效果
papers.zh_abstract: 1970年代，当全国各地的法院试图整合学校时，波士顿和纽约市的学校分配引起了全国关注。如今，全区范围内的择校允许波士顿和纽约的学生在离家很远的地方入学，这或许能促进融合。然而，城市学校交通成本日益高昂，且其融合和教育后果尚不明确。我们利用波士顿和纽约学校匹配中部分随机分配的识别策略，估计了非邻里学校入学和学校通勤对融合、学业成绩和大学入学的因果效应。工具变量估计表明，距离和通勤促进了那些选择通勤者的融合，但对考试成绩和大学入学几乎没有影响。我们认为，对教育成果的微小影响反映了距离和通勤对学校质量（以增值衡量）的适度影响。

papers.title: Stigma in Welfare Programs
papers.authors: Pablo A. Celhay, Bruce D. Meyer, Nikolas Mittag
papers.abstract: Stigma of welfare participation is important for policy and survey design, because it deters program take-up and increases misreporting. Stigma is also relevant to the literature on social image concerns, yet empirical evidence is scant because stigma is difficult to empirically identify. We use a novel approach to studying stigma by examining the relationship between program participation in a recipient’s local network and underreporting program participation in surveys. We find a robust negative relationship and rule out explanations other than stigma. Stigma decreases when more peers engage in the stigmatized behavior and when such actions are less observable.
papers.zh_title: 福利项目中的污名
papers.zh_abstract: 福利参与的污名对政策和调查设计很重要，因为它阻碍了项目参与并增加了误报。污名也与关于社会形象关注的文献相关，然而由于污名难以实证识别，经验证据很少。我们通过考察受助者本地网络中项目参与与调查中项目参与低报之间的关系，采用了一种新颖的方法来研究污名。我们发现了一个稳健的负相关关系，并排除了污名以外的其他解释。当更多同伴从事受污名化的行为且此类行为较不易被观察到时，污名会减少。

papers.title: Social Media and the Behavior of Politicians: Evidence from Facebook in Brazil
papers.authors: Pedro Bessone, Filipe R. Campante, Claudio Ferraz, Pedro Souza
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between the spread of social media platforms and the communication and responsiveness of politicians towards voters, in the context of the expansion of Facebook in Brazil. We use self-collected data on the universe of Facebook activities by federal legislators and the variation in access induced by the spread of the 3G mobile phone network to establish three sets of findings: (i) Politicians use social media extensively to communicate with constituents, finely targeting localities while addressing policy-relevant topics; (ii) They increase their online engagement, especially with places where they have a large pre-existing vote share; but (iii) They shift their offline engagement (measured by speeches and earmarked transfers) away from connected municipalities within their base of support. Our results suggest that, rather than increasing responsiveness, social media may enable politicians to solidify their position with core supporters using communication strategies, while shifting resources away towards localities that lag in social media presence.
papers.zh_title: 社交媒体与政治家行为：来自巴西Facebook的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了社交媒体平台的普及与政治家对选民的沟通和回应性之间的关系，背景是Facebook在巴西的扩张。我们利用自行收集的联邦议员Facebook活动全量数据，以及由3G移动电话网络普及所导致的接入差异，建立了三组发现：（i）政治家广泛使用社交媒体与选民沟通，精准定位地方并涉及政策相关话题；（ii）他们增加了在线互动，尤其是在其原有得票率较高的地区；（iii）但他们将线下互动（以演讲和专项拨款衡量）从其支持基础内的联网城市转移出去。我们的结果表明，社交媒体可能并未提高回应性，反而使政治家能够通过沟通策略巩固其核心支持者的地位，同时将资源转移到社交媒体普及滞后的地区。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Forecasting using Filtered Signals from a Stock Market Cross Section
papers.authors: Nicolas Chatelais, Arthur Stalla-Bourdillon, Menzie D. Chinn
papers.abstract: After the Covid-shock in March 2020, stock prices declined abruptly, reflecting both the deterioration of investors’ expectations of economic activity as well as the surge in aggregate risk aversion. In the following months however, whereas economic activity remained sluggish, equity markets sharply bounced back. This disconnect between equity values and macro-variables can be partially explained by other factors, namely the decline in risk-free interest rates, and, for the US, the strong profitability of the IT sector. As a result, an econometrician trying to forecast economic activity with aggregate stock market variables during the Covid-crisis is likely to get poor results. The main idea of the paper is thus to rely on sectorally disaggregated equity variables within a factor model to predict future US economic activity. We find, first, that the factor model better predicts future economic activity compared to aggregate equity variables or to usual benchmarks used in macroeconomic forecasting (both in-sample and out-of-sample). Second, we show that the strong performance of the factor model comes from the fact that the model filters out the “expected returns” component of the sectoral equity variables as well as the foreign component of aggregate future cash flows, and that it also overweights upstream and “value” sectors that are found to be closely linked to the future state of the US business cycle.
papers.zh_title: 利用股票市场横截面滤波信号进行宏观经济预测
papers.zh_abstract: 在2020年3月新冠疫情冲击之后，股票价格急剧下跌，这既反映了投资者对经济活动预期的恶化，也反映了总体风险偏好的飙升。然而，在随后的几个月里，尽管经济活动依然低迷，股票市场却大幅反弹。股票价值与宏观变量之间的这种脱节可以部分由其他因素解释，即无风险利率的下降，以及在美国，IT行业的强劲盈利能力。因此，试图在新冠危机期间利用股票市场总量变量预测经济活动的计量经济学家可能会得到较差的结果。本文的主要思路是，在因子模型中依赖分行业的股票变量来预测未来的美国经济活动。我们首先发现，与股票市场总量变量或宏观经济预测中常用的基准模型（包括样本内和样本外）相比，因子模型能更好地预测未来的经济活动。其次，我们表明，因子模型的强劲表现源于该模型过滤掉了行业股票变量中的“预期收益”成分以及未来总现金流中的外国成分，并且它过度加权了那些被发现与美国未来商业周期状态密切相关的上游和“价值”行业。

papers.title: The Causal Effects of Youth Cigarette Addiction and Education
papers.authors: Rong Hai, James J. Heckman
papers.abstract: We develop and estimate a life-cycle model in a rational addiction framework where youth choose to smoke, attend school, work part-time, and consume while facing borrowing constraints. The model features multiple channels for studying the reciprocal causal effects of addiction and education. Variations in endowments and cigarette prices are sources of identification. We show that education causally reduces smoking. A counterfactual experiment finds that in absence of cigarettes, college attendance rises by three percentage points in the population. A practical alternative of 40% additional excise tax achieves similar results. Impacts vary substantially across persons of different cognitive and non-cognitive abilities.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EH, PE；JEL：H23, I12, I18, I24, I28
papers.zh_title: 青少年吸烟成瘾与教育的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在理性成瘾框架下开发并估计了一个生命周期模型，在该模型中，青少年在面临借贷约束的情况下选择是否吸烟、上学、兼职工作以及消费。该模型包含多种渠道，用于研究成瘾与教育之间的相互因果效应。禀赋和香烟价格的差异是识别的来源。我们表明，教育因果性地减少了吸烟。一项反事实实验发现，如果没有香烟，大学入学率在人口中会上升三个百分点。一个实际可行的替代方案——额外征收40%的消费税——也能达到类似的效果。影响在不同认知能力和非认知能力的人群中差异很大。

papers.title: The Effect of Vaccine Mandates on Disease Spread: Evidence from College COVID-19 Mandates
papers.authors: Riley K. Acton, Wenjia Cao, Emily E. Cook, Scott A. Imberman, Michael F. Lovenheim
papers.abstract: Since the spring of 2021, nearly 700 colleges and universities in the U.S. have mandated that their students become vaccinated against the COVID-19 virus. We leverage rich data on colleges’ vaccination policies and semester start dates, along with a variety of county-level public health outcomes, to provide the first estimates of the effects of these mandates on the communities surrounding four-year, residential colleges. In event study specifications, we find that, over the first 13 weeks of the fall 2021 semester, college vaccine mandates reduced new COVID-19 cases by 339 per 100,000 county residents and new deaths by 5.4 per 100,000 residents, with an estimated value of lives saved between $9.7 million and $27.4 million per 100,000 residents. These figures suggest that the mandates reduced total US COVID-19 deaths in autumn 2021 by approximately 5%.
papers.zh_title: 疫苗强制令对疾病传播的影响：来自大学新冠疫苗强制令的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 自2021年春季以来，美国近700所学院和大学强制要求学生接种新冠疫苗。我们利用关于大学疫苗接种政策和学期开始日期的丰富数据，以及一系列县级公共卫生结果，首次估计了这些强制令对四年制住宿制大学周边社区的影响。在事件研究设定中，我们发现，在2021年秋季学期的前13周内，大学疫苗强制令使每10万县居民中的新增新冠病例减少了339例，每10万居民中的新增死亡减少了5.4例，每10万居民挽救生命的估计价值在970万美元至2740万美元之间。这些数字表明，这些强制令在2021年秋季使美国新冠死亡总数减少了约5%。

papers.title: Long Story Short: Omitted Variable Bias in Causal Machine Learning
papers.authors: Victor Chernozhukov, Carlos Cinelli, Whitney Newey, Amit Sharma, Vasilis Syrgkanis
papers.abstract: We derive general, yet simple, sharp bounds on the size of the omitted variable bias for a broad class of causal parameters that can be identified as linear functionals of the conditional expectation function of the outcome. Such functionals encompass many of the traditional targets of investigation in causal inference studies, such as, for example, (weighted) average of potential outcomes, average treatment effects (including subgroup effects, such as the effect on the treated), (weighted) average derivatives, and policy effects from shifts in covariate distribution -- all for general, nonparametric causal models. Our construction relies on the Riesz-Frechet representation of the target functional. Specifically, we show how the bound on the bias depends only on the additional variation that the latent variables create both in the outcome and in the Riesz representer for the parameter of interest. Moreover, in many important cases (e.g, average treatment effects and avearage derivatives) the bound is shown to depend on easily interpretable quantities that measure the explanatory power of the omitted variables. Therefore, simple plausibility judgments on the maximum explanatory power of omitted variables (in explaining treatment and outcome variation) are sufficient to place overall bounds on the size of the bias. Furthermore, we use debiased machine learning to provide flexible and efficient statistical inference on learnable components of the bounds. Finally, empirical examples demonstrate the usefulness of the approach.
papers.zh_title: 长话短说：因果机器学习中的遗漏变量偏误
papers.zh_abstract: 我们推导出对于一大类可识别为结果条件期望函数的线性泛函的因果参数，其遗漏变量偏误大小的通用、简洁且严格的界限。这些泛函涵盖了因果推断研究中许多传统的研究目标，例如，潜在结果的（加权）平均值、平均处理效应（包括亚组效应，如对受处理者的效应）、（加权）平均导数，以及协变量分布变化带来的政策效应——所有这些都适用于一般的非参数因果模型。我们的构造依赖于目标泛函的Riesz-Fréchet表示。具体来说，我们展示了偏误界限如何仅取决于潜在变量在结果变量和感兴趣参数的Riesz表示子中创造的额外变异。此外，在许多重要情况下（例如，平均处理效应和平均导数），该界限被证明取决于易于解释的量，这些量衡量了遗漏变量的解释力。因此，关于遗漏变量最大解释力（在解释处理和结果变异方面）的简单合理性判断，就足以对偏误大小设置总体界限。此外，我们使用去偏机器学习对界限中可学习的组成部分提供灵活且高效的统计推断。最后，实证例子展示了该方法的实用性。

papers.title: Bringing Them In or Pushing Them Out? The Labor Market Effects of Pro-cyclical Unemployment Assistance Changes
papers.authors: Gerard Domènech-Arumí, Silvia Vannutelli
papers.abstract: We exploit an unanticipated labor market reform to estimate the effects of pro-cyclical changes in long-term unemployment assistance (UA). In July 2012, Spain raised the minimum age to receive unlimited-duration UA from 52 to 55. Using a difference-in-differences design, we document that shorter benefits caused (i) shorter non-employment duration, especially among younger workers; (ii) higher labor force exit and other programs' take-up, especially among older workers; (iii) lower wages upon re-employment. The reform induced moderate government savings. Our results highlight the importance of considering the interplay with labor market conditions when designing long-term benefit schedules that affect workers close to retirement.
papers.zh_title: 吸引他们进来还是把他们推出去？顺周期失业援助变化的劳动力市场效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一次意外的劳动力市场改革来估计长期失业援助顺周期变化的效应。2012年7月，西班牙将领取无限期失业援助的最低年龄从52岁提高到55岁。使用双重差分设计，我们记录了较短的福利期限导致了：（i）非就业持续时间缩短，尤其是在年轻工人中；（ii）劳动力退出和其他项目参与率上升，尤其是在年长工人中；（iii）再就业时工资降低。该改革带来了适度的政府储蓄。我们的结果强调了在设计影响接近退休工人的长期福利计划时，考虑与劳动力市场状况相互作用的重要性。

papers.title: Precautionary Protectionism
papers.authors: Sharon Traiberman, Martin Rotemberg
papers.abstract: We develop a dynamic extension of Dornbusch et al. (1977) with “rustiness”: the home country has relatively higher unit costs tomorrow for goods it is not producing today. We solve for optimal tariff policy when there is a potential for a crisis: an increase in demand for goods produced abroad. Optimally, the home planner never protects goods where comparative advantage is sufficiently low, not even the goods directly affected by the crises. However, for marginally competitive goods, the optimal policy trades off comparative advantage and demand. The extent of industrial policy is non-monotonic in both the size of the demand shock and in its variance.
papers.zh_title: 预防性保护主义
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在Dornbusch等人（1977）的基础上发展了一个动态扩展模型，其中包含“生锈”特征：本国今天不生产的商品，其明天的单位成本相对更高。我们在存在危机可能性时求解最优关税政策：危机即对国外生产商品需求的增加。最优情况下，本国规划者从不保护比较优势足够低的商品，即使是那些直接受到危机影响的商品也不保护。然而，对于边际竞争商品，最优政策需要在比较优势和需求之间进行权衡。产业政策的程度在需求冲击的大小及其方差上都是非单调的。

papers.title: Covering Undocumented Immigrants: The Effects of a Large-Scale Prenatal Care Intervention
papers.authors: Sarah Miller, Laura Wherry, Gloria Aldana
papers.abstract: We examine the short- and long-term effects of expanded Medicaid pregnancy coverage to undocumented immigrants using a novel dataset linking California birth records to Census surveys and administrative records. We implement a mothers’ fixed effects design that compares changes in sibling outcomes across mothers with different likelihood of having undocumented status. We find the policy increased insurance and prenatal care among likely undocumented immigrant women and improved pregnancy outcomes. Later in life, our results suggest that their children may be more likely to enroll in post-secondary education and receive less public support.
papers.zh_title: 覆盖无证移民：大规模产前护理干预的效果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个将加州出生记录与人口普查调查和行政记录联系起来的新数据集，研究了将医疗补助妊娠保险扩展至无证移民的短期和长期影响。我们实施了一个母亲固定效应设计，比较了不同母亲（其无证身份可能性不同）的子女结果变化。我们发现，该政策增加了可能为无证移民女性的保险覆盖和产前护理，并改善了妊娠结果。在生命后期，我们的结果表明，她们的孩子可能更有可能接受高等教育并获得更少的公共支持。

papers.title: Labor Misallocation Across Firms and Regions
papers.authors: Sebastian Heise, Tommaso Porzio
papers.abstract: We develop a frictional labor market model with multiple regions and heterogeneous firms to study how frictions impeding labor mobility across space affect the joint allocation of labor across firms and regions. Bringing the model to matched employer-employee data from Germany, we find that spatial frictions generate large misallocation of labor across firms within regions. By shielding firms from competition for workers from other regions, spatial frictions allow low productivity firms to expand, reducing aggregate productivity. Overall, we show that taking into account the characteristics of the local labor market is important to quantify the aggregate losses from spatial frictions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：J6, O1, R1
papers.zh_title: 跨企业与跨地区的劳动力错配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含多个地区和异质性企业的摩擦性劳动力市场模型，以研究阻碍劳动力跨空间流动的摩擦如何影响劳动力在企业间和地区间的联合配置。将该模型应用于德国的雇主-雇员匹配数据，我们发现空间摩擦导致区域内企业间出现严重的劳动力错配。通过保护企业免受来自其他地区的劳动力竞争，空间摩擦使得低生产率企业得以扩张，从而降低了总体生产率。总体而言，我们表明，考虑当地劳动力市场的特征对于量化空间摩擦造成的总体损失至关重要。

papers.title: Policy Uncertainty in the Market for Coal Electricity: The Case of Air Toxics Standards
papers.authors: Gautam Gowrisankaran, Ashley Langer, Wendan Zhang
papers.abstract: Government policy uncertainty affects irreversible decisions including technology adoption and exit. This paper quantifies uncertainty surrounding the Mercury and Air Toxics Standard (MATS). We estimate a dynamic oligopoly model for coal-fired electricity generators that recovers generators' beliefs regarding future MATS enforcement. We develop the Approximate Belief Oligopoly Equilibrium concept where players understand that their decisions impact aggregate market states. MATS enforcement created substantial uncertainty: the perceived enforcement probability dropped to 43%. Resolving uncertainty early would increase profits by $1.39 billion but also pollution costs by $0.652–1.776 billion. Had exit been unlikely, resolving uncertainty early would have decreased pollution.
papers.zh_title: 燃煤电力市场中的政策不确定性：以空气毒物标准为例
papers.zh_abstract: 政府政策不确定性会影响包括技术采用和退出在内的不可逆决策。本文量化了围绕《汞和空气毒物标准》（MATS）的不确定性。我们估计了一个燃煤发电企业的动态寡头垄断模型，该模型恢复了发电企业关于未来MATS执行情况的信念。我们提出了近似信念寡头均衡概念，其中企业理解其决策会影响总体市场状态。MATS的执行造成了巨大的不确定性：感知到的执行概率降至43%。提前解决不确定性将使利润增加13.9亿美元，但也会使污染成本增加6.52亿至17.76亿美元。如果退出可能性很小，提前解决不确定性本会减少污染。

papers.title: Sovereign Debt and Economic Growth when Government is Myopic and Self-interested
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Raghuram Rajan, Jack Shim
papers.abstract: We examine how a sovereign’s ability to borrow abroad affects the country’s growth and steady state consumption, assuming that the government is both myopic and self-interested. Surprisingly, government myopia can increase a country’s access to external borrowing. In turn, access to borrowing can extend the government’s effective horizon as the government’s ability to borrow hinges on it convincing creditors they will be repaid, which gives it a stake in incentivizing private production and savings despite its self-interest. In a high-saving country, the lengthening of the government’s effective horizon can incentivize it to tax less, resulting in a “growth boost", with higher steady-state household consumption than if it could not borrow. However, in a country that saves little, the government may engage in more repressive policies to enhance its debt capacity and spending. This could lead to a “growth trap” where household steady-state consumption is lower than if the government had no access to external borrowing. We discuss the effectiveness of alternative debt policies, including declaring the sovereign’s debt “odious”, debt relief, and debt ceilings.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：A0, A1, A11, A13, A14, F0, F02, G0, G00, L0, O0, P0
papers.zh_title: 当政府短视且自利时的主权债务与经济增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了主权国家在国外借款的能力如何影响该国的增长和稳态消费，假设政府既短视又自利。令人惊讶的是，政府短视可以增加一个国家获得外部借款的机会。反过来，获得借款的机会可以延长政府的有效视野，因为政府的借款能力取决于它能否让债权人相信他们会得到偿还，这使政府尽管出于自利，也有动力激励私人生产和储蓄。在一个高储蓄国家，政府有效视野的延长可以激励其减少征税，从而产生“增长提振”，使家庭稳态消费高于无法借款时的水平。然而，在一个储蓄很少的国家，政府可能会采取更多压制性政策以增强其债务能力和支出。这可能导致“增长陷阱”，即家庭稳态消费低于政府无法获得外部借款时的水平。我们讨论了替代性债务政策的有效性，包括宣布主权债务为“恶意债务”、债务减免和债务上限。

papers.title: Rise and Fall of Empires in the Industrial Era: A Story of Shifting Comparative Advantages
papers.authors: Roberto Bonfatti, Kerem Coşar
papers.abstract: The last two centuries witnessed the rise and fall of empires. We construct a model which rationalises this in terms of the changing trade gains from empires. In the model, empires are arrangements that reduce trade cost between an industrial metropole and the agricultural periphery. During early industrialisation, the value of such bilateral trade increases, and so does the value of empires. As industrialisation diffuses, and as manufactures become more differentiated, trade becomes more multilateral and intra-industry, reducing the value of empires. Our results are consistent with long-term changes in income distribution and trade patterns, and with previous historical arguments.
papers.zh_title: 工业时代帝国的兴衰：比较优势转移的故事
papers.zh_abstract: 过去两个世纪见证了帝国的兴衰。我们构建了一个模型，从帝国带来的贸易收益变化角度对此进行解释。在该模型中，帝国是降低工业大都市与农业边缘地区之间贸易成本的安排。在早期工业化时期，这种双边贸易的价值增加，帝国的价值也随之增加。随着工业化的扩散以及制成品变得更加差异化，贸易变得更加多边化和产业内化，从而降低了帝国的价值。我们的结果与收入分配和贸易模式的长期变化以及以往的历史论点是一致的。

papers.title: The Distributional Impact of the Minimum Wage in the Short and Long Run
papers.authors: Erik Hurst, Patrick J. Kehoe, Elena Pastorino, Thomas Winberry
papers.abstract: We develop a framework with rich worker heterogeneity, firm monopsony power, and putty-clay technology to study the distributional impact of the minimum wage in the short and long run. Our production technology is disciplined to be consistent with the small estimated employment effects of the minimum wage in the short run and the large estimated elasticities of substitution across inputs in the long run. We find that in the short run, a large increase in the minimum wage has a small effect on employment and therefore increases the labor income of the workers who were earning less than the new minimum wage. In the long run, however, the minimum wage has perverse distributional implications in that it reduces the employment, income, and welfare of precisely the low-income workers it is meant to help. Nonetheless, these long-run effects take time to fully materialize because firms slowly adjust their mix of inputs. Existing transfer programs, such as the earned income tax credit (EITC), are more effective at improving long-run outcomes for workers at the low end of the wage distribution. But combining existing programs with a modest increase in the minimum wage generates even larger welfare gains for low-earning workers.
papers.zh_title: 最低工资在短期和长期的分配效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含丰富工人异质性、企业买方垄断力量和油灰-粘土技术的框架，以研究最低工资在短期和长期的分配效应。我们的生产技术受到约束，使其与短期最低工资就业效应较小以及长期投入替代弹性较大的估计结果一致。我们发现，在短期内，大幅提高最低工资对就业影响很小，因此增加了收入低于新最低工资的工人的劳动收入。然而，在长期中，最低工资会产生反常的分配效应，因为它恰恰减少了本应受其帮助的低收入工人的就业、收入和福利。尽管如此，这些长期效应需要时间才能完全显现，因为企业会缓慢调整其投入组合。现有的转移支付项目，如劳动所得税抵免（EITC），在改善工资分布低端工人的长期结果方面更为有效。但将现有项目与适度提高最低工资相结合，将为低收入工人带来更大的福利收益。

papers.title: First Foot Forward: A Two-Step Econometric Method for Parsing and Estimating the Impacts of Multiple Identities
papers.authors: Andrew S. Hanks, Kevin M. Kniffin, Xuechao Qian, Bo Wang, Bruce A. Weinberg
papers.abstract: Marketing and strategy researchers have often studied how organizations navigate multiple identities in relation to category spanning but extant literature pays less attention to understanding how individuals do so. Moreover, current econometric approaches only scratch the surface with respect to addressing the impact of multiple identities in professional settings. As a model domain to study labor market returns when individuals have more than one identity, we focus on interdisciplinary dissertators in the United States since evidence shows clear uptrends in dissertators engaging multiple professional identities and unclear trends in their outcomes. Our novel estimation method leverages a two-step process to characterize salaries of interdisciplinary dissertators as functions of the identities (academic fields) they acquire as graduate students. We estimate a first-stage regression of log earnings for monodisciplinarians on field dummies and respondent characteristics. After capturing the estimated field coefficients, we then regress log earnings for interdisciplinarians on linear and non-linear functions of these coefficients. Our estimates robustly reject the hypothesis that interdisciplinarians receive a salary premium. We also find evidence that the academic market, but not other employment sectors, particularly compensates researchers based on their primary discipline, an outcome that challenges emphases on interdisciplinarity. While our findings for interdisciplinarians point to the primary identity holding predominant importance for doctoral graduates in the United States, our two-step method provides a framework for parsing and estimating the varied impacts of multiple identities across a wide range of contexts.
papers.zh_title: 迈出第一步：解析和估计多重身份影响的二步计量经济学方法
papers.zh_abstract: 市场营销和战略研究者经常研究组织如何在跨类别背景下处理多重身份，但现有文献较少关注个体如何做到这一点。此外，当前的计量经济学方法在处理专业环境中多重身份的影响方面仅触及表面。作为研究个体拥有多重身份时劳动力市场回报的模型领域，我们聚焦于美国的跨学科博士论文作者，因为有证据显示，从事多重专业身份的博士论文作者呈明显上升趋势，而他们的结果趋势却不明确。我们的新颖估计方法利用一个两步过程，将跨学科博士论文作者的薪资表征为他们作为研究生所获得的身份（学科领域）的函数。我们首先对单一学科者的对数收入进行第一阶段回归，自变量包括学科虚拟变量和受访者特征。在获得估计的学科系数后，我们再将跨学科者的对数收入对这些系数的线性和非线性函数进行回归。我们的估计稳健地拒绝了跨学科者获得薪资溢价的假设。我们还发现证据表明，学术市场（而非其他就业部门）特别根据研究者的主要学科来补偿他们，这一结果挑战了对跨学科性的强调。虽然我们对跨学科者的发现表明，对于美国的博士毕业生而言，主要身份占据主导重要性，但我们的两步方法提供了一个框架，用于在广泛情境中解析和估计多重身份的不同影响。

papers.title: Bank Liquid Assets, the Portfolio Motive, and Capital Requirements
papers.authors: René M. Stulz, Alvaro G. Taboada, Mathijs A. van Dijk
papers.abstract: Banks hold large amounts of liquid assets. These amounts grow sharply for the largest banks after the global financial crisis (GFC). The standard transaction and precautionary motives for holding liquid assets cannot explain the size and evolution of bank liquid asset holdings. Motivated by the deposit view of banks, we introduce a portfolio motive such that banks hold more liquid assets when they have poorer lending opportunities, making loans and liquid assets substitutes. We find support for the portfolio motive and for its prediction that capital requirement increases help explain the post-GFC growth in the largest banks’ liquid asset holdings.
papers.zh_title: 银行流动资产、投资组合动机与资本要求
papers.zh_abstract: 银行持有大量流动资产。全球金融危机后，最大银行的这些资产规模急剧增长。持有流动资产的常规交易动机和预防性动机无法解释银行流动资产持有量的规模和演变。受银行存款观点的启发，我们引入了一个投资组合动机，即当银行的贷款机会较差时，它们会持有更多流动资产，使贷款和流动资产成为替代品。我们找到了支持投资组合动机的证据，也支持其预测，即资本要求的提高有助于解释全球金融危机后最大银行流动资产持有量的增长。

papers.title: The Benefits and Costs of U.S. Employer COVID-19 Vaccine Mandates
papers.authors: Maddalena Ferranna, Lisa A. Robinson, Daniel Cadarette, Michael Eber, David E. Bloom
papers.abstract: In 2021, the Biden Administration issued mandates requiring COVID-19 vaccinations for U.S. federal employees and contractors and for some healthcare and private sector workers. Although these mandates have been subject to legal challenges and some have been halted or delayed, rigorous appraisal of their benefits and costs accompanied neither the decision to implement them nor the efforts to terminate them. This paper aims to help fill that gap. We estimate the direct costs and health-related benefits that would have accrued if these vaccination requirements had been implemented as intended. Compared with the vaccination rates observed in January 2022, we find that the mandates could have led to 15 million additional vaccinated individuals, increasing the overall proportion of the fully vaccinated U.S. population to 68%. The associated net benefits depend on the evolution of the pandemic from the time of mandate enactment—information unavailable ex ante to analysts or policymakers. In scenarios involving the emergence of a novel, more transmissible variant, against which vaccination and previous infection offer moderate protection, the estimated net benefits reach more than $16,000 per additional vaccinated individual, with more than 20,000 total deaths averted in total. In scenarios involving a fading pandemic, existing vaccination-acquired or infection-acquired immunity provides sufficient protection, and the mandates’ benefits are unlikely to exceed their costs. Thus, mandates may be most useful when the consequences of inaction are catastrophic. However, we do not compare the effects of mandates with alternative policies for increasing vaccination rates or promoting other protective measures, which may receive stronger public support and be less likely to be overturned by litigation.
papers.zh_title: 美国雇主COVID-19疫苗强制令的收益与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 2021年，拜登政府发布强制令，要求美国联邦雇员和承包商以及部分医疗保健和私营部门工人接种COVID-19疫苗。尽管这些强制令面临法律挑战，其中一些已被暂停或推迟，但在实施或终止这些强制令时，并未伴随对其收益和成本的严格评估。本文旨在帮助填补这一空白。我们估算了如果这些疫苗接种要求按计划实施本应产生的直接成本和健康相关收益。与2022年1月观察到的疫苗接种率相比，我们发现这些强制令本可使额外1500万人接种疫苗，将美国完全接种疫苗人口的整体比例提高到68%。相关的净收益取决于强制令颁布时大流行的演变——分析师或政策制定者事先无法获得这些信息。在出现一种新的、传染性更强的变种，且疫苗接种和既往感染提供中等保护的情景下，估计的净收益达到每位额外接种者超过16,000美元，总共避免超过20,000人死亡。在大流行消退的情景下，现有的疫苗获得性或感染获得性免疫提供了足够保护，强制令的收益不太可能超过其成本。因此，当不作为的后果是灾难性时，强制令可能最为有用。然而，我们并未将强制令的效果与提高疫苗接种率或推广其他保护措施的替代政策进行比较，这些替代政策可能获得更强的公众支持，且不太可能因诉讼而被推翻。

papers.title: Climate Change Around the World
papers.authors: Per Krusell, Anthony A. Smith Jr.
papers.abstract: The economic effects of climate change vary across both time and space. To study these effects, this paper builds a global economy-climate model featuring a high degree of geographic resolution. Carbon emissions from the use of energy in production increase the Earth's (average) temperature and local, or regional, temperatures respond more or less sensitively to this increase. Each of the approximately 19,000 regions makes optimal consumption-savings and energy-use decisions as its climate (or regional temperature) and, consequently, its productivity change over time. The relationship between regional temperature and regional productivity has an inverted U-shape, calibrated so that the high-resolution model replicates estimates of aggregate global damages from global warming. At the global level, then, the high-resolution model nests standard one-region economy-climate models, while at the same time it features realistic spatial variation in climate and economic activity. The central result is that the effects of climate change vary dramatically across space---with many regions gaining while others lose---and the global average effects, while negative, are dwarfed quantitatively by the differences across space. A tax on carbon increases average (global) welfare, but there is a large disparity of views on it across regions, with both winners and losers. Climate change also leads to large increases in global inequality, across both regions and countries. These findings vary little as capital markets range from closed (autarky) to open (free capital mobility).
papers.zh_title: 全球气候变化
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化的经济效应在时间和空间上均存在差异。为研究这些效应，本文构建了一个具有高地理分辨率的全球经济-气候模型。生产中能源使用产生的碳排放会提高地球（平均）温度，而局部或区域温度对此升高的敏感程度各不相同。随着气候（或区域温度）及其生产率随时间变化，约19,000个区域中的每一个都会做出最优的消费-储蓄和能源使用决策。区域温度与区域生产率之间的关系呈倒U形，经过校准后，该高分辨率模型能够复制全球变暖对全球总体损害的估计值。因此，在全球层面上，高分辨率模型嵌套了标准的单区域经济-气候模型，同时体现了气候和经济活动在空间上的现实异质性。核心结果是，气候变化的影响在空间上差异巨大——许多地区受益而其他地区受损——全球平均效应虽为负值，但在数量上远小于空间差异。征收碳税会提高平均（全球）福利，但各地区对此存在巨大分歧，既有受益者也有受损者。气候变化还导致全球不平等程度大幅上升，无论是在区域之间还是国家之间。这些发现几乎不因资本市场从封闭（自给自足）到开放（资本自由流动）的状态变化而改变。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Consequences of Natural Rate Shocks: An Empirical Investigation
papers.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: Much of the empirical literature on the natural rate of interest has focused on estimating its path. This paper studies the effects of natural rate shocks on output and inflation. It estimates a semi-structural model inspired by the DSGE literature. A decline in the natural rate is found to have a large negative effect on the trend of output and to be contractionary and deflationary in the short run. When the economy is constrained by the zero lower bound (ZLB), these results are consistent with the secular stagnation hypothesis. However, negative natural rate shocks are found to depress the trend of output even outside of the ZLB, calling for a more general theory of secular stagnation.
papers.zh_title: 自然利率冲击的宏观经济后果：一项实证研究
papers.zh_abstract: 关于自然利率的实证文献大多侧重于估计其路径。本文研究自然利率冲击对产出和通胀的影响。它估计了一个受DSGE文献启发的半结构模型。研究发现，自然利率下降对产出趋势有较大的负向影响，并在短期内具有收缩性和通缩性。当经济受到零下限约束时，这些结果与长期停滞假说一致。然而，即使在零下限之外，负向自然利率冲击也会抑制产出趋势，这需要一种更一般的长期停滞理论来解释。

papers.title: Internationalizing Like China
papers.authors: Christopher Clayton, Amanda Dos Santos, Matteo Maggiori, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: We empirically characterize how China is internationalizing its bond market by staggering the entry of different types of foreign investors into its domestic market and propose a dynamic reputation model to explain this strategy. Our framework rationalizes China’s strategy as trying to build credibility as a safe issuer while reducing the cost of capital flight. We use our framework to shed light on China’s response to episodes of capital outflows.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME, POL；JEL：E0, F2, F3
papers.zh_title: 像中国一样国际化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实证刻画了中国如何通过分阶段允许不同类型的外国投资者进入其国内市场来实现债券市场国际化，并提出了一个动态声誉模型来解释这一策略。我们的框架将中国的策略合理化，认为其旨在建立作为安全发行者的可信度，同时降低资本外逃的成本。我们利用该框架来阐明中国对资本外流事件的应对措施。

papers.title: Lessons from U.S.-China Trade Relations
papers.authors: Lorenzo Caliendo, Fernando Parro
