papers.abstract: We review theoretical and empirical work on the economic effects of the United States and China trade relations during the last decades. We first discuss the origins of the China shock, its measurement, and present methods used to study its economic effects on different outcomes. We then focus on the recent U.S.-China trade war. We discuss methods used to evaluate its effects, describe its economic effects, and analyze if this increase in trade protectionism reverted the effects of the China shock. The main lessons learned in this review are: (i) the aggregate gains from U.S.-China trade created winners and losers; (ii) China's trade expansion seems not to be the main cause of the decline in U.S. manufacturing employment during the same period; and (iii) the recent trade war generated welfare losses, had small employment effects, and was ineffective in reversing the distributional effects due to the China shock.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F1, F10, F11, F12, F13, F14, F15, F16, F19
papers.zh_title: 美中贸易关系的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了过去几十年关于美中贸易关系经济效应的理论和实证研究。我们首先讨论了中国冲击的起源、其衡量方法，以及用于研究其对不同结果经济效应的现有方法。然后，我们聚焦于近期的美中贸易战。我们讨论了评估其影响的方法，描述了其经济效应，并分析了这种贸易保护主义的加剧是否逆转了中国冲击的影响。本综述的主要教训是：(i) 美中贸易带来的总体收益创造了赢家和输家；(ii) 中国贸易扩张似乎并非同期美国制造业就业下降的主要原因；(iii) 近期的贸易战造成了福利损失，对就业影响甚微，并且未能有效逆转中国冲击带来的分配效应。

papers.title: Superiority-Seeking and the Preference for Exclusion
papers.authors: Alex Imas, Kristóf Madarász
papers.abstract: We propose that a person’s desire to consume an object or possess an attribute increases in how much others want but cannot have it. We term this motive superiority-seeking, and show that it generates preferences for exclusion that help explain a host of market anomalies and make novel predictions in a variety of domains. In bilateral exchange, there is a reluctance to trade and people exhibit a ‘social endowment effect.’ People’s value of consuming a good increases in its scarcity, which generates a motive for firms and organizations to cater to such preferences by engaging in exclusionary policies. Randomly barring potential consumers from the opportunity to acquire a product increases the seller’s profits both in standard monopoly and auction settings. Such non-price-based exclusion leads to higher revenues than the classic optimal sales mechanisms. A series of experiments provides direct support for these predictions. In basic exchange, a person’s willingness to pay for a good increases as more people are explicitly barred from the opportunity to acquire it. In auctions, randomly excluding people from the opportunity to bid substantially increases bids amongst those who retain this option. Exclusion leads to bigger gains in expected revenue than increasing competition through inclusion. Our model of superiority-seeking generates ‘Veblen effects,’ rationalizes attitudes against redistribution, and provides a novel motive for social stratification and discrimination.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, POL；JEL：D01, D02, D03, D45, D9, D91
papers.zh_title: 优越感追求与排斥偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出，一个人消费某物或拥有某种属性的欲望，会随着其他人想要但无法拥有该物的程度而增加。我们将这种动机称为优越感追求，并表明它会产生排斥偏好，这有助于解释一系列市场异象，并在多个领域做出新颖的预测。在双边交换中，存在交易惰性，人们表现出一种“社会禀赋效应”。人们对消费某物的价值会因其稀缺性而增加，这为企业或组织通过实施排斥性政策来迎合此类偏好提供了动机。随机阻止潜在消费者获得产品的机会，无论是在标准垄断还是拍卖环境中，都能提高卖方的利润。这种非价格排斥机制比经典的最优销售机制带来更高的收入。一系列实验为这些预测提供了直接支持。在基本交换中，随着更多人被明确禁止获得某物的机会，一个人对该物的支付意愿会增加。在拍卖中，随机排除人们出价的机会，会显著提高那些保留出价机会者的出价。排斥带来的预期收入增长大于通过包容来增加竞争。我们的优越感追求模型产生了“凡勃伦效应”，使反对再分配的态度合理化，并为社会分层和歧视提供了新的动机。

papers.title: Noisy Foresight
papers.authors: Anujit Chakraborty, Chad W. Kendall
papers.abstract: Rational agents must perform backwards induction by thinking contingently about future states and actions, but failures of backwards induction and contingent reasoning are ubiquitous. How do boundedly-rational agents make decisions when they fail to correctly forecast actions in the future? We construct an individual decision-making experiment to collect a rich dataset in which subjects must reason only about their own future actions. We demonstrate substantial mistakes relative to the rational benchmark, and use the rich dataset to estimate several possible models of boundedly-rational foresight. We find that a model in which subjects expect to make more mistakes when the payoff consequences of their future actions are more similar best explains behavior.
papers.zh_title: 噪声预见
papers.zh_abstract: 理性主体必须通过条件性地思考未来状态和行动来进行逆向归纳，但逆向归纳和条件性推理的失败普遍存在。当有限理性主体无法正确预测未来的行动时，他们如何做出决策？我们构建了一个个体决策实验，收集了一个丰富的数据集，其中受试者只需推理自己未来的行动。我们证明了相对于理性基准存在大量错误，并利用该丰富数据集估计了几种可能的有限理性预见模型。我们发现，一个假设受试者预期在未来行动的收益后果更相似时会犯更多错误的模型，最能解释其行为。

papers.title: Green Energy Jobs in the US: What Are They, and Where Are They?
papers.authors: E. Mark Curtis, Ioana Marinescu
papers.abstract: Does the growth of renewable energy benefit US workers, and which workers stand to benefit the most? Until now, evidence on green energy jobs has been limited due to measurement issues. We use data on nearly all jobs posted online in the US, as collected by Burning Glass Technology, and we create a new measure of green jobs, defined here as solar and wind jobs. We use job titles and task requirements to define green jobs. We find that both solar and wind job postings have more than tripled since 2010, with solar jobs seeing especially strong growth that precedes the growth of new installed solar capacity. In 2019, we identify approximately 52,500 solar job openings and 13,500 wind job openings. Solar jobs are mostly (33%) in sales occupations, and in the utilities industry (16%). Wind jobs are most represented among installation and maintenance occupations (37%), and in the manufacturing industry (29%). Green jobs are created in occupations that are about 21% higher paying than average. The pay premium is even higher for jobs with a low educational requirement. Finally, green jobs tend to locate in counties with high shares of employment in fossil fuel extraction. Overall, our results suggest that the growth of renewable energy leads to the creation of relatively high paying jobs, which are more often than not located in areas that stand to lose from a decline in fossil fuel extraction jobs.
papers.zh_title: 美国的绿色能源就业：它们是什么，在哪里？
papers.zh_abstract: 可再生能源的增长是否有利于美国工人，哪些工人将受益最大？迄今为止，由于衡量问题，关于绿色能源就业的证据有限。我们使用Burning Glass Technology收集的美国几乎所有在线招聘职位的数据，并创建了一个新的绿色就业衡量指标，此处定义为太阳能和风能就业。我们使用职位名称和任务要求来定义绿色就业。我们发现，自2010年以来，太阳能和风能职位的招聘信息都增加了两倍以上，其中太阳能就业的增长尤为强劲，且先于新增太阳能装机容量的增长。2019年，我们识别出大约52,500个太阳能职位空缺和13,500个风能职位空缺。太阳能职位主要集中在销售职业（33%）和公用事业行业（16%）。风能职位在安装与维护职业（37%）和制造业（29%）中占比最高。绿色就业所在的职业平均薪酬比平均水平高出约21%。对于教育要求较低的职位，薪酬溢价甚至更高。最后，绿色就业往往位于化石燃料开采就业份额高的县。总体而言，我们的结果表明，可再生能源的增长导致了相对高薪就业岗位的创造，而这些岗位往往位于可能因化石燃料开采岗位减少而受损的地区。

papers.title: The Returns to College Major Choice: Average and Distributional Effects, Career Trajectories, and Earnings Variability
papers.authors: Rodney J. Andrews, Scott A. Imberman, Michael F. Lovenheim, Kevin M. Stange
papers.abstract: Motivated by the large returns to skill in the labor market, there is a growing body of research examining labor market returns to college major. Prior research focuses almost exclusively on mean effects and pays little attention to earnings growth and variability. Using data from Texas on public K-12 students followed through college and into the labor market, we find that the focus on mean differences mask important features of the returns to college majors. First, earnings growth varies with major choice, making returns sensitive to the experience distribution of the sample. Second, quantile treatment effect estimates show considerable cross sectional differences in earnings returns. Third, major choice affects earnings variability within workers over time. We use our results to simulate a lifecycle utility model and compare mid-career utility and mean earnings returns across fields while highlighting the important role of risk preferences. For four-year students, utility returns align with earnings returns, and utility returns increase as students become more risk averse. Results for two-year students are broadly similar, though risk preferences interact with cross-sectional earnings returns variation in complex ways that highlight the importance of different dimensions of risk in driving the returns to major choice.
papers.zh_title: 大学专业选择的回报：平均与分布效应、职业轨迹及收入波动性
papers.zh_abstract: 受劳动力市场中技能回报巨大的启发，越来越多的研究考察大学专业的劳动力市场回报。以往的研究几乎只关注平均效应，很少关注收入增长和波动性。利用德克萨斯州公立K-12学生从大学到劳动力市场的追踪数据，我们发现对平均差异的关注掩盖了大学专业回报的重要特征。首先，收入增长随专业选择而变化，使得回报对样本的经验分布敏感。其次，分位数处理效应估计显示收入回报存在显著的横截面差异。第三，专业选择会影响工人个体随时间推移的收入波动性。我们利用研究结果模拟了一个生命周期效用模型，并比较了不同领域的职业生涯中期效用和平均收入回报，同时强调了风险偏好的重要作用。对于四年制学生，效用回报与收入回报一致，并且随着学生风险厌恶程度的增加，效用回报也会增加。两年制学生的结果大致相似，尽管风险偏好与横截面收入回报变异以复杂的方式相互作用，这凸显了不同风险维度在驱动专业选择回报中的重要性。

papers.title: Unconventional Monetary Policy According to HANK
papers.authors: Eric R. Sims, Jing Cynthia Wu, Ji Zhang
papers.abstract: This paper studies the implications of household heterogeneity for the effectiveness of quantitative easing (QE). We consider a heterogeneous agent New Keynesian (HANK) model with uninsurable household income risk. Financial intermediaries are subject to an endogenous leverage constraint that allows QE to matter. We find that macro aggregates react very similarly to a QE shock in the HANK model compared to a representative agent (RANK) version of the model. This finding is robust across different micro- and macro- distributions of wealth.
papers.zh_title: 基于HANK模型的非常规货币政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了家庭异质性对量化宽松（QE）有效性的影响。我们构建了一个包含不可保险家庭收入风险的异质性代理人新凯恩斯（HANK）模型。金融中介面临内生的杠杆约束，这使得量化宽松能够发挥作用。我们发现，与代表性代理人（RANK）版本的模型相比，在HANK模型中，宏观总量对量化宽松冲击的反应非常相似。这一发现在不同的微观和宏观财富分布下都是稳健的。

papers.title: Fiscal Histories
papers.authors: John H. Cochrane
papers.abstract: The fiscal theory states that inflation adjusts so that the real value of government debt equals the present value of real primary surpluses. Monetary policy remains important. The central bank can set an interest rate target, which determines the path of expected inflation, while news about the present value of surpluses drives unexpected inflation. I use fiscal theory to interpret historical episodes, including the rise and fall of inflation in the 1970s and 1980s, the long quiet zero bound of the 2010s, and the reemergence of inflation in 2021, as well as to analyze the gold standard, currency pegs, the ends of hyperinflations, currency crashes, and the success of inflation targets. Going forward, fiscal theory warns that inflation will have to be tamed by coordinated monetary and fiscal policy. I thank Erik Hurst, Ed Nelson, Nina Pavcnik, and Timothy Taylor for helpful comments.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG；JEL：E42, E52, E58, E61, E62, E63, E65
papers.zh_title: 财政史
papers.zh_abstract: 财政理论指出，通货膨胀会进行调整，以使政府债务的实际价值等于实际基本盈余的现值。货币政策仍然重要。央行可以设定利率目标，这决定了预期通胀的路径，而关于盈余现值的信息则驱动了意外的通胀。我运用财政理论来解释历史事件，包括20世纪70年代和80年代通胀的上升和下降、2010年代长期平静的零利率下限、以及2021年通胀的重新出现，并分析金本位制、货币挂钩、恶性通胀的终结、货币崩溃以及通胀目标制的成功。展望未来，财政理论警告说，通胀必须通过协调的货币和财政政策来加以控制。我感谢Erik Hurst、Ed Nelson、Nina Pavcnik和Timothy Taylor提出的有益评论。

papers.title: Independent Contracting, Self-Employment, and Gig Work: Evidence from California Tax Data
papers.authors: Annette Bernhardt, Christopher Campos, Allen Prohofsky, Aparna Ramesh, Jesse Rothstein
papers.abstract: We use de-identified data from California personal income tax returns to measure the frequency and nature of independent contracting and self-employment work in California. We identify this work by the presence of a Schedule C on the tax return and/or the receipt of a Form 1099 information return. We estimate that 14.4% of California workers aged 18-64 in tax year 2016 had some independent contracting or self-employment income; about half of these workers also had earnings from traditional W-2 jobs during the year. We find that only a small share (1.4%) of workers had earnings from online labor platforms (often called gig work). Workers with low earnings were significantly more likely to earn independent contracting or self-employment income and to rely primarily or exclusively on that income. We explore the characteristics of workers engaging in independent contracting and self-employment and their distribution across family type, geography, and industry.
papers.zh_title: 独立承包、自雇与零工经济：来自加州税收数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用来自加州个人所得税申报表的去标识化数据，来衡量加州独立承包和自雇工作的频率和性质。我们通过纳税申报表中是否存在附表C和/或是否收到1099信息申报表来识别这类工作。我们估计，在2016纳税年度，18-64岁的加州工人中有14.4%拥有一些独立承包或自雇收入；其中约一半的工人当年还拥有来自传统W-2工作的收入。我们发现，只有一小部分工人（1.4%）拥有来自在线劳动平台（通常称为零工工作）的收入。收入较低的工人更有可能获得独立承包或自雇收入，并且更主要或完全依赖该收入。我们探讨了从事独立承包和自雇工作的工人的特征，以及他们在家庭类型、地理位置和行业中的分布。

papers.title: The Political Economy of the Decline of Antitrust Enforcement in the United States
papers.authors: Filippo Lancieri, Eric A. Posner, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: Antitrust enforcement in the United States has declined since the 1960s. Building on several new datasets, we argue that this decline did not reflect a popular demand for weaker enforcement or any other kind of democratic sanction. The decline was engineered by unelected regulators and judges who, with a few exceptions, did not express skepticism about antitrust law in confirmation hearings. We find little evidence that academic ideas played an important role in the decline of antitrust enforcement except where they coincided with the interests of big business, which appears to have exercised influence behind the scenes.
papers.zh_title: 美国反垄断执法衰落的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 自20世纪60年代以来，美国的反垄断执法有所减弱。基于几个新的数据集，我们认为这种衰落并未反映公众对弱化执法的需求或任何其他形式的民主认可。这种衰落是由未经选举的监管者和法官策划的，除了少数例外，他们在确认听证会上并未表达对反垄断法的怀疑。我们发现，几乎没有证据表明学术思想在反垄断执法的衰落中发挥了重要作用，除非这些思想与大企业的利益相吻合，而大企业似乎在幕后施加了影响。

papers.title: Quality Regulation and Competition: Evidence from Pharmaceutical Markets
papers.authors: Juan Pablo Atal, José Ignacio Cuesta, Morten Sæthre
papers.abstract: Quality regulation attempts to ensure quality and foster competition by reducing vertical differentiation, but it may also have adverse effects on market structure. We study this trade-off in the context of pharmaceutical bioequivalence, which is the primary quality standard for generic drugs. Exploiting the introduction of bioequivalence in Chile, we find that stronger regulation decreased the number of drugs in the market by 21 percent and increased average paid prices by 13 percent. We estimate a model of drug entry, certification, and demand to study the role of drug quality, aversion to generics, and certification costs in shaping the equilibrium effects of quality regulation. We find that quality regulation increased demand for generic drugs by resolving asymmetric information and reducing aversion against unbranded generics, which induced entry of high-quality drugs in place of low-quality drugs. Consumer welfare increased despite higher prices and a lower number of firms. We compare minimum quality standards to quality disclosure and other designs of quality regulation.
papers.zh_title: 质量监管与竞争：来自药品市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 质量监管试图通过减少纵向差异化来确保质量并促进竞争，但它也可能对市场结构产生不利影响。我们在药品生物等效性（仿制药的主要质量标准）的背景下研究这种权衡。利用智利引入生物等效性要求的情况，我们发现更严格的监管使市场上的药品数量减少了21%，并使平均支付价格提高了13%。我们估计了一个关于药品进入、认证和需求的模型，以研究药品质量、对仿制药的厌恶以及认证成本在塑造质量监管均衡效应中的作用。我们发现，质量监管通过解决信息不对称和减少对非品牌仿制药的厌恶，增加了对仿制药的需求，这促使高质量药品进入市场以取代低质量药品。尽管价格更高且企业数量更少，但消费者福利增加了。我们将最低质量标准与质量披露及其他质量监管设计进行了比较。

papers.title: China's Financial System and Economy: A Review
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Wei Wei
papers.abstract: China's financial system has been integral to its spectacular economic growth over the past 40 years. We review the recent literature on China's financial system and its connections to the Chinese economy based on the categories of Aggregate Financing to the Real Economy (AFRE), a broad measure of the nation's yearly flow of liquidity accounting for unique features of China's financial system. While early work on China's financial system emphasizes the state-owned enterprise (SOE) reform, the recent literature explores other more market-based financing channels—including shadow banking—that grew rapidly after 2010 and have become important components of AFRE. These new financing channels are not only intertwined with each other, but more importantly often ultimately tied back to the dominant banking sector in China. Understanding the mechanisms behind these channels and their intrinsic connections is crucial to alleviate capital allocation distortion and mitigate potential systemic financial risk in China.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, POL；JEL：G10, G20, G30, O16, O17, O33, P34
papers.zh_title: 中国的金融体系与经济：一个综述
papers.zh_abstract: 中国的金融体系对其过去40年惊人的经济增长至关重要。我们基于社会融资规模（AFRE）这一衡量全国年度流动性流动的广义指标，回顾了近期关于中国金融体系及其与中国经济联系的文献，该指标考虑了中国金融体系的独特特征。虽然早期关于中国金融体系的研究强调国有企业改革，但近期文献探讨了其他更市场化的融资渠道——包括影子银行——这些渠道在2010年后快速增长，并已成为社会融资规模的重要组成部分。这些新的融资渠道不仅相互交织，而且更重要的是，它们往往最终与占主导地位的中国银行业部门相关联。理解这些渠道背后的机制及其内在联系，对于缓解资本配置扭曲和降低中国潜在的系统性金融风险至关重要。

papers.title: When the Kids Grow Up: Women's Employment and Earnings across the Family Cycle
papers.authors: Claudia Goldin, Sari Pekkala Kerr, Claudia Olivetti
papers.abstract: Women earn less than men, and that is especially true of mothers relative to fathers. Much of the widening occurs after family formation when mothers reduce their hours of work. But what happens when the kids grow up? To answer that question, we estimate three earning gaps: the “motherhood penalty,” the “price of being female,” and the “fatherhood premium.” When added together these three produce the “parental gender gap,” defined as the difference in income between mothers and fathers. We estimate earnings gaps for two education groups (college graduates and high school graduates who did not complete college) using longitudinal data from the NLSY79 that tracks respondents from their twenties to their fifties. As the children grow up and as women work more hours, the motherhood penalty is greatly reduced, especially for the less-educated group. But fathers manage to expand their relative gains, particularly among college graduates. The parental gender gap in earnings remains substantial for both education groups.
papers.zh_title: 当孩子长大：女性在家庭周期中的就业与收入
papers.zh_abstract: 女性收入低于男性，母亲相对于父亲尤其如此。这种差距的扩大主要发生在家庭形成之后，此时母亲会减少工作时间。但当孩子长大后会发生什么？为了回答这个问题，我们估计了三个收入差距：“母亲惩罚”、“作为女性的代价”和“父亲溢价”。这三者加总产生了“父母性别差距”，定义为母亲和父亲之间的收入差异。我们使用NLSY79的纵向数据，对两个教育群体（大学毕业生和未完成大学的高中毕业生）估计了收入差距，该数据追踪了受访者从二十多岁到五十多岁的情况。随着孩子长大以及女性工作时间增加，母亲惩罚大大减少，尤其是在受教育程度较低的群体中。但父亲们设法扩大了他们的相对收益，尤其是在大学毕业生中。对于两个教育群体而言，父母之间的收入性别差距仍然很大。

papers.title: The Wage Curve After the Great Recession
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson, Jackson Spurling
papers.abstract: Most economists maintain that the labor market in the United States is ‘tight’ because unemployment rates are low. They infer from this that there is potential for wage-push inflation. However, real wages are falling rapidly at present and, prior to that, real wages had been stagnant for some time. We show that unemployment is not key to understanding wage formation in the USA and hasn’t been since the Great Recession. Instead, we show rates of under-employment (the percentage of workers with part-time hours who would prefer more hours) and the rate of non-employment which includes both the unemployed and those out of the labor force who are not working significantly reduce wage pressures in the United States. This finding holds in panel data with state and year fixed effects and is supportive of a wage curve which fits the data much better than a Phillips Curve. We find no role for vacancies; the V:U ratio is negatively not positively associated with wage growth since 2020. The implication is that the reserve army of labor which acts as a brake on wage growth extends beyond the unemployed and operates from within and outside the firm.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, LS, ME；JEL：E24, J20, J30, J60
papers.zh_title: 大衰退后的工资曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 大多数经济学家认为，由于失业率较低，美国的劳动力市场是“紧张的”。他们由此推断存在工资推动型通胀的潜力。然而，目前实际工资正在迅速下降，而在此之前，实际工资已经停滞了一段时间。我们表明，失业率并不是理解美国工资形成的关键，而且自大衰退以来一直如此。相反，我们表明，就业不足率（希望工作更长时间但从事兼职工作的工人比例）和非就业率（包括失业者和不在劳动力队伍中且未工作的人）显著降低了美国的工资压力。这一发现在包含州和年份固定效应的面板数据中成立，并支持了工资曲线，该曲线比菲利普斯曲线更好地拟合数据。我们发现职位空缺没有作用；自2020年以来，V:U比率与工资增长呈负相关而非正相关。这意味着，作为工资增长制动器的劳动力后备军，其范围超出了失业者，并在企业内部和外部运作。

papers.title: Taxing Externalities: Revenue vs. Welfare Gains with an Application to U.S. Carbon Taxes
papers.authors: Matthew Kotchen
papers.abstract: This paper asserts that reporting of the ratio of welfare gains to tax revenue should be standard protocol in economic analyses of externality correcting taxes. That this comparison might matter is somewhat of a “blind spot” in most economic analyses, for it plays virtually no role when economists recommend taxes to internalize externalities. A simple model illustrates how the ratio of welfare gains to tax revenue plays a central role in a political economy and efficiency framing of Pigouvian type taxes. The analysis also shows intuitive results about how the ratio is increasing in the marginal external costs and the equilibrium elasticity to a tax. The second part of the paper illustrates the wide range of potential results with application of carbon taxes to different fuels in the United States. For example, assuming a social cost of carbon (SCC) and a carbon tax equal to $50 per tonne, the central estimates imply ratios of 12.1 for coal, 0.36 for natural gas, and very close to zero for diesel and gasoline. When all four fuels are combined, the ratios indicate a more proportional balance between welfare gains and tax revenue, with overall estimates ranging between 0.7 and 2.8. The paper concludes with a general appeal for economists to pay more attention to the relative magnitudes of efficiency gains and tax revenue when analyzing and advocating for externality correcting taxes.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：H2, H21, H23, Q38, Q4
papers.zh_title: 对负外部性征税：收入与福利收益——以美国碳税为例
papers.zh_abstract: 本文主张，在外部性矫正税收的经济分析中，应将福利收益与税收收入之比作为标准报告指标。这一比较在大多数经济分析中几乎是一个“盲点”，因为经济学家在推荐通过征税来内部化外部性时，几乎从未考虑这一比率。一个简单模型展示了福利收益与税收收入之比如何在庇古税的政治经济学和效率框架中发挥核心作用。分析还表明，该比率随边际外部成本和税收均衡弹性的增加而上升的直观结果。论文第二部分以美国不同燃料的碳税应用为例，展示了潜在结果的广泛范围。例如，假设社会碳成本（SCC）和碳税均为每吨50美元，中心估计值显示煤炭的比率为12.1，天然气为0.36，柴油和汽油则非常接近零。当四种燃料合并时，该比率表明福利收益与税收收入之间更为均衡，总体估计值在0.7至2.8之间。论文最后呼吁经济学家在分析和倡导外部性矫正税时，应更加关注效率收益与税收收入的相对规模。

papers.title: Do Funding Agencies Select and Enable Risky Research: Evidence from ERC Using Novelty as a Proxy of Risk Taking
papers.authors: Reinhilde Veugelers, Jian Wang, Paula Stephan
papers.abstract: Concern exists that public funding of science is increasingly risk averse. Funders have addressed this concern by soliciting the submission of high-risk research to either regular or specially designed programs. Little evidence, however, has been gathered to examine the extent to which such programs and initiatives accomplish their stated goal. This paper sets out to study this using data from the European Research Council (ERC), a program within the EC, established in 2007 to support high-risk/high-gain research. We examine whether the ERC selected researchers with a track record of conducting risky research. We proxy high-risk by a measure of novelty in the publication records of applicants both before and after the application, recognizing that it is but one dimension of risk. We control and interact the risk measure with high-gain by tracking whether the applicant has one or more top 1% highly cited papers in their field. We find that applicants with a history of risky research are less likely to be selected for funding than those without such a history, especially early career applicants. This selection penalty for high-risk also holds among those applicants with a history of high-gain publications. To test whether receiving a long and generous prestigious ERC grant promotes risk taking, we employ a diff-in-diff approach. We find no evidence of a significant positive risk treatment effect for advanced grantees. Only for early career grantees do we find that recipients are more likely to engage in risky research, but only compared to applicants who are unsuccessful at the second stage. This positive treatment effect is in part due to unsuccessful applicants cutting back on risky research. We cautiously interpret this as a “lesson learned” that risk is not rewarded.
papers.zh_title: 资助机构是否选择并支持高风险研究：以新颖性作为风险承担代理变量的欧洲研究理事会证据
papers.zh_abstract: 人们担忧公共科学资助日益规避风险。资助者通过征集高风险研究提交至常规或专门设计的项目来应对这一担忧。然而，很少有证据检验这些项目和举措在多大程度上实现了其既定目标。本文利用欧洲研究理事会（ERC）的数据进行研究，ERC是欧盟委员会于2007年设立的一个项目，旨在支持高风险/高回报研究。我们考察ERC是否选择了有从事高风险研究记录的申请者。我们以申请者申请前后发表记录中的新颖性度量作为高风险的代理变量，同时认识到这只是风险的一个维度。我们通过追踪申请者是否在其领域内拥有一篇或多篇前1%高被引论文，来控制风险度量并与高回报进行交互分析。我们发现，有高风险研究历史的申请者比没有此类历史的申请者更不可能获得资助，尤其是早期职业申请者。这种对高风险的选拔惩罚同样存在于有高回报发表历史的申请者中。为了检验获得长期且慷慨的著名ERC资助是否促进风险承担，我们采用了双重差分方法。我们没有发现对高级受资助者存在显著正向风险处理效应的证据。仅在早期职业受资助者中，我们发现受资助者更可能从事高风险研究，但这仅与在第二阶段未成功的申请者相比。这种正向处理效应部分源于未成功申请者减少了高风险研究。我们谨慎地将此解释为“经验教训”，即风险并未得到回报。

papers.title: Origins of International Factor Structures
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond
papers.abstract: We show that exchange rate correlations tend to be explained by the global trade network while consumption correlations tend to be explained by productivity correlations. Sharing common trade linkages with other countries increases exchange rate correlations beyond bilateral linkages. We explain these findings using a model of the global trade network with market segmentation. Interdependent global production generates international comovements, while market segmentation disconnects the drivers of exchange rate correlations from the drivers of consumption correlations. Moreover, we show that the trade network generates common factors found in exchange rates. Our findings offer a trade-based account of the origins of international comovements and shed light on important frictions in international markets.
papers.zh_title: 国际因子结构的起源
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，汇率相关性往往由全球贸易网络解释，而消费相关性往往由生产率相关性解释。与其他国家共享共同贸易联系会增加汇率相关性，其影响超出双边联系。我们利用一个具有市场分割的全球贸易网络模型来解释这些发现。相互依赖的全球生产产生了国际联动，而市场分割则使汇率相关性的驱动因素与消费相关性的驱动因素脱钩。此外，我们表明贸易网络产生了汇率中发现的共同因子。我们的发现为国际联动的起源提供了基于贸易的解释，并揭示了国际市场中的重要摩擦。

papers.title: Non-Tariff Barriers in the U.S.-China Trade War
papers.authors: Tuo Chen, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Zheng Michael Song
papers.abstract: We use Chinese customs data to show that unofficial non-tariff barriers were responsible for 50\\% of the overall reduction in Chinese imports from the U.S. during the height of the U.S.-China trade war in 2018 and 2019. We infer non-tariff barriers from the change in imports of U.S. products relative to imports from other countries of the same HS-6 product, after controlling for the change in the relative price of U.S. imports to the same product sold by other countries. These barriers were imposed on a small number of agricultural products, did not apply to state-owned importers, and were larger for products where the share of state importers in total imports of the U.S. product was large. Non-tariff barriers were responsible for more than 90\\% of the welfare cost to Chinese consumers of the U.S.-China trade war. The welfare loss to China of a given reduction in imports from the U.S. from non-tariff barriers is about six times larger than an equivalent import decline due to higher tariffs. Non-tariff barriers are more costly compared to tariffs because they applied to some importers and not others, which results in misallocation, and because non-tariff barriers do not generate revenues.
papers.zh_title: 中美贸易战中的非关税壁垒
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用中国海关数据表明，在2018年和2019年中美贸易战高峰期，非官方非关税壁垒导致了中国从美国进口总额减少的50%。我们通过控制美国进口产品相对于其他国家同一HS-6产品进口的相对价格变化，从美国产品进口变化中推断出非关税壁垒。这些壁垒针对少数农产品，不适用于国有进口商，并且对于美国产品进口中国有进口商份额较大的产品，壁垒更大。非关税壁垒造成了中美贸易战中中国消费者福利成本的90%以上。中国因非关税壁垒导致从美国进口减少的福利损失，大约是同等进口下降因关税提高所致损失的六倍。非关税壁垒比关税成本更高，因为它们仅适用于部分进口商而非全部，导致资源错配，并且非关税壁垒不产生收入。

papers.title: Globotics and Macroeconomics: Globalisation and Automation of the Service Sector
papers.authors: Richard Baldwin
papers.abstract: Globalisation affects the functioning of the macroeconomy. The macroeconomy’s functioning, in turn, conditions the conduct and impact of monetary policy. This is why globalisation matters for central banks. It is also why central bankers should pay attention to the evolution of globalisation. And evolve it has. This paper argues that the future of trade is trade in services – especially trade in intermediate services. Barriers are radically higher and falling radically faster for services versus goods, and, unlike farm and factory goods, there is no capacity constraint when it comes to the export of intermediate services from emerging markets. Undertaking the macroeconomic analysis for services trade that was done in the 2000s for goods trade, however, will require a substantial upgrading of the data available.
papers.zh_title: 全球机器人与宏观经济学：服务业的全球化与自动化
papers.zh_abstract: 全球化影响着宏观经济的运行。而宏观经济的运行又制约着货币政策的实施及其影响。这就是全球化对中央银行重要的原因。这也是为什么央行官员应关注全球化演变的原因。而全球化确实在演变。本文认为，贸易的未来在于服务贸易——尤其是中间服务贸易。与商品相比，服务的壁垒要高得多，且下降速度快得多；与农产品和工厂产品不同，新兴市场出口中间服务不存在产能限制。然而，对服务贸易进行2000年代对商品贸易所做的宏观经济分析，将需要大幅提升可用数据的质量。

papers.title: Fertility and Labor Market Responses to Reductions in Mortality
papers.authors: Sonia R. Bhalotra, Atheendar Venkataramani, Selma Walther
papers.abstract: We investigate women’s fertility, labor and marriage market responses to a health innovation that led to reductions in mortality from treatable causes, and especially large declines in child mortality. We find delayed childbearing, with lower intensive and extensive margin fertility, a decline in the chances of ever having married, increased labor force participation and an improvement in occupational status. Our results provide the first evidence that improvements in child survival allow women to start fertility later and invest more in the labor market. We present a new theory of fertility that incorporates dynamic choices and reconciles our findings with existing models of behavior.
papers.zh_title: 死亡率下降对生育率和劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了女性在生育、劳动力和婚姻市场方面对一项健康创新的反应，该创新导致可治疗原因导致的死亡率下降，尤其是儿童死亡率大幅下降。我们发现生育推迟，集约边际和广延边际的生育率均降低，结婚概率下降，劳动力参与率提高，职业地位改善。我们的结果首次证明，儿童生存率的提高使女性能够推迟生育并更多地投资于劳动力市场。我们提出了一种新的生育理论，该理论纳入了动态选择，并将我们的发现与现有的行为模型相协调。

papers.title: Spending and Job-Finding Impacts of Expanded Unemployment Benefits: Evidence from Administrative Micro Data
papers.authors: Peter Ganong, Fiona E. Greig, Pascal J. Noel, Daniel M. Sullivan, Joseph S. Vavra
papers.abstract: We show that the largest increase in unemployment benefits in U.S. history had large spending impacts and small job-finding impacts. This finding has three implications. First, increased benefits were important for explaining aggregate spending dynamics—but not employment dynamics— during the pandemic. Second, benefit expansions allow us to study the MPC of normally low-liquidity households in a high-liquidity state. These households still have high MPCs. This suggests a role for permanent behavioral characteristics, rather than just current liquidity, in driving spending behavior. Third, the mechanisms driving our results imply that temporary benefit supplements are a promising countercyclical tool.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E21, E24, E32, E62, E71, G5, H3, J18, J65
papers.zh_title: 扩大失业救济金的支出和求职影响：来自行政微观数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，美国历史上最大规模的失业救济金增加产生了巨大的支出影响和微小的求职影响。这一发现有三重含义。首先，增加的救济金对于解释疫情期间的总支出动态很重要——但对就业动态不重要。其次，救济金扩张使我们能够研究通常流动性低的家庭在高流动性状态下的边际消费倾向（MPC）。这些家庭仍然具有高MPC。这表明，除了当前流动性外，永久性行为特征在驱动支出行为中也发挥作用。第三，驱动我们结果的机制意味着临时救济金补充是一种有前景的反周期工具。

papers.title: Producing Health: Measuring Value Added of Nursing Homes
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Neale Mahoney
papers.abstract: We develop a stylized model that allows us to estimate a value-added measure for nursing homes (“SNFs”) which accounts for patient selection both into and out of a SNF. We use the model, together with detailed data on the physical and mental health of about 6 million Medicare SNF patients between 2011 and 2016, to estimate the value added for about 14,000 distinct SNFs. We document substantial heterogeneity in value added. Nationwide, compared to a 10th percentile SNF, a 90th percentile SNF is able to discharge a patient at the same health level almost a week sooner, or one quarter of the median length of stay. Heterogeneity in value added within a market is almost as large as it is nationwide. Our results point to the potential for substantial gains through policies that encourage reallocation of patients to higher-quality SNFs within their market.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：I1, I11, L15, L8, L88
papers.zh_title: 生产健康：衡量养老院的增加值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简约模型，使我们能够估计养老院（“SNF”）的增加值度量，该度量考虑了患者进入和离开SNF的选择。我们利用该模型，结合2011年至2016年间约600万Medicare SNF患者的详细身心健康数据，估计了约14,000家不同SNF的增加值。我们记录了增加值的高度异质性。在全美范围内，与第10百分位的SNF相比，第90百分位的SNF能够在几乎早一周的时间内以相同健康水平出院患者，即中位住院时间的四分之一。市场内增加值的异质性几乎与全国范围一样大。我们的结果指出，通过鼓励患者在其市场内重新分配到更高质量SNF的政策，存在实现实质性收益的潜力。

papers.title: Locus of Control and Prosocial Behavior
papers.authors: Mark A. Andor, James Cox, Andreas Gerster, Michael Price, Stephan Sommer, Lukas Tomberg
papers.abstract: We investigate how locus of control beliefs – the extent to which individuals attribute control over events in their life to themselves as opposed to outside factors – affect prosocial behavior and the private provision of public goods. We begin by developing a conceptual framework showing how locus of control beliefs serve as a weight placed on the returns from one’s own contributions (impure altruism) and others contributions (pure altruism). Using multiple data sets from Germany and the U.S., we show that individuals who relate consequences to their own behavior are more likely to contribute to climate change mitigation, to donate money and in-kind gifts to charitable causes, to share money with others, to cast a vote in parliamentary elections, and to donate blood. Our results provide comprehensive evidence that locus of control beliefs affect prosocial behavior.
papers.zh_title: 控制点与亲社会行为
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究控制点信念——即个体将生活中事件的控制权归因于自身而非外部因素的程度——如何影响亲社会行为和公共物品的私人供给。我们首先构建了一个概念框架，展示控制点信念如何作为权重，分别作用于个人自身贡献的回报（不纯利他主义）和他人贡献的回报（纯利他主义）。利用来自德国和美国的多个数据集，我们表明，将结果归因于自身行为的个体更有可能为减缓气候变化做出贡献、向慈善事业捐赠金钱和实物礼品、与他人分享金钱、在议会选举中投票以及献血。我们的结果提供了全面的证据，表明控制点信念会影响亲社会行为。

papers.title: What Can Time-Series Regressions Tell Us About Policy Counterfactuals?
papers.authors: Christian K. Wolf, Alisdair McKay
papers.abstract: We show that, in a general family of linearized structural macroeconomic models, knowledge of the empirically estimable causal effects of contemporaneous and news shocks to the prevailing policy rule is sufficient to construct counterfactuals under alternative policy rules. If the researcher is willing to postulate a loss function, our results furthermore allow her to recover an optimal policy rule for that loss. Under our assumptions, the derived counterfactuals and optimal policies are robust to the Lucas critique. We then discuss strategies for applying these insights when only a limited amount of empirical causal evidence on policy shock transmission is available.
papers.zh_title: 时间序列回归能告诉我们关于政策反事实的什么信息？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，在一个通用的线性化结构宏观经济模型族中，了解经验上可估计的、现行政策规则下同期冲击和新闻冲击的因果效应，足以构建替代政策规则下的反事实。如果研究者愿意设定一个损失函数，我们的结果还允许她恢复该损失下的最优政策规则。在我们的假设下，推导出的反事实和最优政策对卢卡斯批判是稳健的。然后，我们讨论了在仅有有限的政策冲击传导经验因果证据可用时，应用这些见解的策略。

papers.title: What Do Long Data Tell Us About the Inflation Hike Post COVID-19 Pandemic?
papers.authors: Stephanie Schmitt-Grohé, Martín Uribe
papers.abstract: To what extent is the recent spike in inflation driven by a change in its permanent component? We estimate a semi-structural model of output, inflation, and the nominal interest rate in the United States over the period 1900-2021. The model predicts that between 2019 and 2021 the permanent component of inflation rose by 51 basis points. If instead we estimate the model using postwar data (1955--2021), the permanent component of inflation is predicted to have increased by 238 basis points. A possible interpretation of this finding is that the model estimated on the shorter sample assigns a larger increase in the permanent component of inflation because the period 1955-2021 does not contain sudden sparks in inflation like the one observed in the aftermath of the COVID-19 pandemic but only gradual ones---the great inflation of the 70s took more than 10 years to build up. By contrast, the period 1900-1954 is plagued with sudden inflation hikes---including one around the 1918 Spanish flu pandemic---which the estimated model endogenously recalls and uses to interpret inflation around the COVID-19 episode. This result suggests that prewar data might be of use to understand recent inflation dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 长期数据告诉我们关于COVID-19大流行后通胀飙升的什么信息？
papers.zh_abstract: 近期通胀飙升在多大程度上是由其永久性成分的变化驱动的？我们估计了美国1900年至2021年期间产出、通胀和名义利率的半结构模型。该模型预测，2019年至2021年间，通胀的永久性成分上升了51个基点。如果我们改用战后数据（1955-2021）估计模型，则通胀的永久性成分预计上升了238个基点。对这一发现的一种可能解释是，基于较短样本估计的模型赋予了通胀永久性成分更大的增幅，因为1955-2021年期间没有出现像COVID-19大流行后那样突然的通胀爆发，而只有渐进的通胀——70年代的大通胀花了十多年才形成。相比之下，1900-1954年期间充斥着突然的通胀飙升——包括1918年西班牙流感大流行前后的一次——估计模型内生地回忆起这些事件，并用它们来解释COVID-19事件前后的通胀。这一结果表明，战前数据可能有助于理解近期的通胀动态。

papers.title: Overreaction and Diagnostic Expectations in Macroeconomics
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: We present the case for the centrality of overreaction in expectations for addressing important challenges in finance and macroeconomics. First, non-rational expectations by market participants can be measured and modeled in ways that address some of the key challenges posed by the rational expectations revolution, most importantly the idea that economic agents are forward-looking. Second, belief overreaction can account for many long-standing empirical puzzles in macro and finance, which emphasize the extreme volatility and boom-bust dynamics of key time series, such as stock prices, credit, and investment. Third, overreaction relies on psychology and is disciplined by survey data on expectations. This suggests that relaxing the assumption of rational expectations is a promising strategy, helps theory and evidence go together, and offers a unified view of a great deal of data.
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济学中的过度反应与诊断性预期
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了预期过度反应在解决金融和宏观经济学重要挑战中的核心地位。首先，市场参与者的非理性预期可以被测量和建模，以应对理性预期革命提出的一些关键挑战，最重要的是经济主体具有前瞻性的观点。其次，信念过度反应可以解释宏观和金融领域许多长期存在的经验谜题，这些谜题强调了关键时间序列（如股票价格、信贷和投资）的极端波动性和繁荣-萧条动态。第三，过度反应依赖于心理学，并受到预期调查数据的约束。这表明放松理性预期假设是一个有前景的策略，有助于理论和证据相结合，并为大量数据提供了一个统一的视角。

papers.title: Gendered Ageism and Disablism and Employment of Older Workers
papers.authors: Joanne S. McLaughlin, David Neumark
papers.abstract: Gendered discrimination based on age and disability is a pressing issue, because this discrimination can interfere with the goal of lengthening work lives, especially for older women. In the United States, the Age Discrimination in Employment Act and the Americans with Disabilities Act prohibit age and disability discrimination in employment, while Title VII of the Civil Rights Act bars discrimination against women. However, because gender and age (and disability) discrimination fall under different statutes, these laws may be inadequate to protect against discrimination based on gendered ageism and disablism. Legal rulings in the United States generally do not recognize intersecting claims – discrimination based on two or more protected characteristics – when those characteristics are covered by separate statutes. This may help explain the evidence that age discrimination is worse for women than for men.\nWe discuss the theory and methods we can use to analyze these issues, and the relevant laws and their failure to protect women from gendered ageism. We review evidence on gendered age discrimination, and evidence on the effects of discrimination laws and how well they protect from intersectional discrimination. Finally, we discuss potential changes in policies that could better protect against gendered age discrimination.
papers.zh_title: 性别化的年龄歧视与残疾歧视及老年工人就业
papers.zh_abstract: 基于年龄和残疾的性别歧视是一个紧迫的问题，因为这种歧视会干扰延长工作寿命的目标，尤其是对老年女性而言。在美国，《就业年龄歧视法》和《美国残疾人法案》禁止就业中的年龄和残疾歧视，而《民权法案》第七章则禁止针对女性的歧视。然而，由于性别、年龄（和残疾）歧视属于不同的法规，这些法律可能不足以保护个人免受基于性别化的年龄歧视和残疾歧视的侵害。美国的法律裁决通常不承认交叉索赔——基于两个或多个受保护特征的歧视——当这些特征由不同的法规涵盖时。这可能有助于解释为什么年龄歧视对女性比男性更严重的证据。我们讨论了可用于分析这些问题的理论和方法，以及相关法律及其未能保护女性免受性别化年龄歧视的缺陷。我们回顾了关于性别化年龄歧视的证据，以及关于歧视法律效果及其在多大程度上保护免受交叉歧视的证据。最后，我们讨论了可能更好地保护免受性别化年龄歧视的政策变化。

papers.title: Invention Value, Inventive Capability and the Large Firm Advantage
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Wesley M. Cohen, Honggi Lee, Divya Sebastian
papers.abstract: Do large firms produce more valuable inventions, and if so, why? After confirming that large firms indeed produce more valuable inventions, we consider two possible sources: a superior ability to invent, or a superior ability to extract value from their inventions. We develop a simple model that discriminates between the two explanations. Using a sample of 2,786 public corporations, and measures of both patent quality and patent value, we find that, while average invention value rises with size, average invention quality declines, suggesting, per our model, that the large firm advantage is not due to superior inventive capability, but due to the superior ability to extract value. We provide evidence suggesting that this superior ability to extract value is due to greater commercialization capabilities of larger firms.
papers.zh_title: 发明价值、发明能力与大企业优势
papers.zh_abstract: 大企业是否生产更有价值的发明？如果是，原因何在？在确认大企业确实生产更有价值的发明后，我们考虑两种可能的来源：卓越的发明能力，或从发明中提取价值的卓越能力。我们开发了一个简单模型来区分这两种解释。利用2786家上市公司的样本以及专利质量和专利价值的衡量指标，我们发现，虽然平均发明价值随企业规模上升，但平均发明质量却下降。根据我们的模型，这表明大企业的优势并非源于卓越的发明能力，而是源于卓越的价值提取能力。我们提供的证据表明，这种卓越的价值提取能力归因于大企业更强的商业化能力。

papers.title: Imagining the Future: Memory, Simulation and Beliefs about Covid
papers.authors: Pedro Bordalo, Giovanni Burro, Katherine B. Coffman, Nicola Gennaioli, Andrei Shleifer
papers.abstract: How do people form beliefs about novel risks, with which they have little or no experience? A 2020 US survey of beliefs about the lethality of Covid reveals that the elderly underestimate, and the young overestimate, their own risks, and that people with more health adversities are more pessimistic, even for others. A model in which people selectively recall frequent and similar past experiences, including from other domains, and use them to imagine (simulate) the novel risk, explains our findings. An experience increases perceived risk if it makes that risk easier to imagine, but decreases it by interfering with recall of experiences that fuel imagination. The model yields new predictions on how non-Covid experiences shape beliefs about Covid, for which we find empirical support. These findings cannot be explained by conventional experience effects, and highlight memory mechanisms shaping which experiences are recalled and how they are used to form beliefs.
papers.zh_title: 想象未来：记忆、模拟与关于新冠的信念
papers.zh_abstract: 人们如何形成关于几乎毫无经验的新风险的信念？2020年一项关于新冠致死率信念的美国调查显示，老年人低估自身风险，而年轻人高估自身风险；健康状况较差的人更为悲观，即使是对他人的风险也是如此。一个模型解释了我们的发现：人们选择性回忆频繁且相似的过往经历（包括来自其他领域的经历），并利用它们来想象（模拟）新风险。一段经历如果使该风险更容易想象，则会增加感知风险；但如果它干扰了对激发想象的经历的回忆，则会降低感知风险。该模型产生了关于非新冠经历如何塑造新冠信念的新预测，我们找到了实证支持。这些发现无法用传统的经验效应解释，并突显了塑造哪些经历被回忆以及如何被用于形成信念的记忆机制。

papers.title: Corporate Political Spending and State Tax Policy: Evidence from Citizens United
papers.authors: Cailin R. Slattery, Alisa Tazhitdinova, Sarah Robinson
papers.abstract: To what extent is U.S. state tax policy affected by corporate political contributions? The 2010 Supreme Court Citizens United v. Federal Election Commission ruling provides an exogenous shock to corporate campaign spending, allowing corporations to spend on elections in 23 states which previously had spending bans. Ten years after the ruling and for a wide range of outcomes, we are not able to identify economically or statistically significant effects of corporate independent expenditures on state tax policy, including tax rates, discretionary tax breaks, and tax revenues.
papers.zh_title: 企业政治支出与州税收政策：来自“公民联合”案的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国州税收政策在多大程度上受到企业政治捐款的影响？2010年最高法院对“公民联合诉联邦选举委员会”案的裁决为企业竞选支出提供了外生冲击，允许企业在先前有支出禁令的23个州进行选举支出。在裁决十年后，针对一系列广泛的结果，我们无法识别出企业独立支出对州税收政策（包括税率、酌情税收减免和税收收入）具有经济上或统计上显著的影响。

papers.title: Consumer Demand with Social Influences: Evidence from an E-Commerce Platform
papers.authors: El Hadi Caoui, Chiara Farronato, John J. Horton, Robert Schultz
papers.abstract: For some kinds of goods, rarity itself is valued. "Fashionable'" goods are demanded in part because they are unique. In this paper, we explore the economics of rare goods using auctions of limited-edition shoes held by an e-commerce platform. We model endogenous entry and bidding in multi-unit auctions and construct demand curves from realized bids. We find that doubling inventory reduces willingness to pay by 7-15%. From the producer perspective, ignoring the value of rarity leads to substantial overproduction: auctioned quantities are 82% above the profit-maximizing level. From the consumer perspective however, the negative spillovers of restricting quantity more than offset the benefits of rarer goods.
papers.zh_title: 具有社会影响的消费者需求：来自电商平台的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 对于某些商品，稀缺性本身就有价值。“时尚”商品之所以被需求，部分原因在于其独特性。在本文中，我们利用电商平台举办的限量版球鞋拍卖来探索稀有商品的经济学。我们对多单位拍卖中的内生进入和出价进行建模，并根据实际出价构建需求曲线。我们发现，库存翻倍会使支付意愿降低7-15%。从生产者角度看，忽视稀缺性价值会导致严重过度生产：拍卖数量比利润最大化水平高出82%。然而，从消费者角度看，限制数量带来的负外部性超过了稀有商品带来的好处。

papers.title: Genetic Endowments, Income Dynamics, and Wealth Accumulation Over the Lifecycle
papers.authors: Daniel Barth, Nicholas W. Papageorge, Kevin Thom, Mateo Velásquez-Giraldo
papers.abstract: A growing literature on gene-by-environment (G × E) interactions — much of it concerned with education and human capital — asks how policy and other environmental factors can affect inequality related to genetic factors. Economic models are typically absent from this literature, but could play a vital role in understanding how counterfactual reforms might interact with genetics to shape behavior, outcomes, and welfare. We estimate a life-cycle model of consumption and savings with portfolio decisions, allowing a measure of the genetic endowments that predict educational attainment to directly affect income, labor disutility, stock market participation costs, and returns to risky assets. Our estimates suggest that, even after accounting for completed education, childhood SES, and inheritances, genetic factors linked to educational attainment increase wealth both through life-cycle income profiles and through differences in rates of return on invested wealth. Counterfactual exercises predict how social security reforms would modify the genetic endowment-welfare gradient. Strikingly, some policies may simultaneously flatten gene-wealth gradients but increase gene-welfare inequality. Typical G × E analyses, lacking an optimizing framework, could fail to reveal this distinction. This highlights the value of economic theory in understanding the policy implications of G × E findings, particularly for counterfactual environments.
papers.meta: Programs：AG；JEL：D14, D15, D31, D63, G50, H31, H55, I38, J24, J26
papers.zh_title: 基因禀赋、收入动态与生命周期中的财富积累
papers.zh_abstract: 关于基因与环境的交互作用（G×E）的文献日益增多——其中大部分关注教育和人力资本——探讨政策和其他环境因素如何影响与基因因素相关的不平等。经济模型通常缺席于这类文献，但可能在理解反事实改革如何与基因相互作用以塑造行为、结果和福利方面发挥关键作用。我们估计了一个包含消费和储蓄以及投资组合决策的生命周期模型，允许衡量预测教育成就的基因禀赋直接影响收入、劳动负效用、股市参与成本和风险资产回报。我们的估计表明，即使在考虑了已完成教育、童年社会经济地位和遗产之后，与教育成就相关的基因因素既通过生命周期收入曲线，也通过投资财富回报率的差异来增加财富。反事实练习预测了社会保障改革将如何改变基因禀赋与福利之间的梯度。引人注目的是，某些政策可能同时使基因-财富梯度变平，但增加基因-福利不平等。典型的G×E分析缺乏优化框架，可能无法揭示这一区别。这凸显了经济理论在理解G×E发现的政策含义（尤其是针对反事实环境）方面的价值。

papers.title: Agency, Gender, and Endowments Effects in the Efficiency and Equity of Team Allocation Decisions
papers.authors: Marcel Fafchamps, Bereket Kebede
papers.abstract: We conduct a novel lab experiment in which pairs of subjects make separable decisions about allocative efficiency and equity in different agency structures. In terms of equity, subjects appropriate all surplus when they can, and share equally when they have to negotiate. They achieve high efficiency in general, albeit less so when the allocation of surplus is negotiated and negotiations fail. Allocative efficiency is reduced by input and output endowment effects, particularly in negotiated allocation games where subjects seek to create a sense of entitlement over joint surplus so as to achieve a more equitable income distribution. We find few differences across gender or gender pairings. Subjects are then given a choice between negotiating, paying to decide alone, or be paid to let their assigned partner decide. We find that demand for agency or delegation is sensitive to the price of agency, irrespective of gender. But female subjects are more likely to delegate to their partner if it is a male. We also find that a large fraction of both male and female subjects show a preference for negotiating that appears intrinsically motivated.
papers.zh_title: 团队分配决策效率与公平中的代理权、性别和禀赋效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项新颖的实验室实验，其中成对受试者在不同的代理结构中对分配效率和公平做出可分离的决策。在公平方面，受试者在能够独吞时占有全部剩余，在需要谈判时则平均分享。他们总体上实现了高效率，尽管在剩余分配需要谈判且谈判失败时效率较低。分配效率因投入和产出禀赋效应而降低，尤其是在谈判分配博弈中，受试者试图在联合剩余上创造一种应得权利感，以实现更公平的收入分配。我们在性别或性别配对之间发现很少差异。然后，受试者被给予选择：谈判、付费独自决定、或收费让指定伙伴决定。我们发现，对代理权或委托的需求对代理价格敏感，与性别无关。但女性受试者如果伙伴是男性，则更可能委托给伙伴。我们还发现，很大一部分男性和女性受试者表现出对谈判的偏好，这似乎是内在驱动的。

papers.title: Externalities in the Wildland - Urban Interface: Private Decisions, Collective Action, and Results from Wildfire Simulation Models for California
papers.authors: Howard Kunreuther, Artem Demidov, Mark Pauly, Matija Turcic, Michael Wilson
papers.abstract: Much of the property damage from wildfires occurs when fires spread into built up areas, the wildland urban interface. Fire spread within such areas occurs from house to house, as embers from one burning structure ignite neighboring ones. Actions can be taken to mitigate the chances that a given house will ignite. This size and configuration of this external benefit depends on the assumed process of fire spread. In this paper we use a simulation model based on plausible parameters to illustrate likely patterns of marginal benefit from mitigation as a function of building density and effectiveness of mitigation. The model indicates that a common pattern is for marginal benefit to unmitigated neighbors to be low at low levels of community mitigation, rise to a maximum, and then fall quickly to a low level. This maximum marginal benefit (known as “herd immunity”) helps to indicate the optimal pattern of mitigation in a community. However individual owners in Nash equilibrium will not take the spillover benefits into account. We use the distribution of house values in a California community relative to an assumed cost of mitigation to illustrate in the model the level of mitigation owners will undertake when they make independent investment decisions, and the corrective actions that can lead to the social optimum. We discuss the use of rules or subsidies for insurance premium adjustments based on mitigation activities. Because it will rarely be optimal to mitigate all homes, the optimal solution may involve unequal treatment and raise equity issues.
papers.zh_title: 荒野-城市交界区的外部性：私人决策、集体行动与加州野火模拟模型的结果
papers.zh_abstract: 野火造成的财产损失大部分发生在火势蔓延至建成区（即荒野-城市交界区）时。此类区域内的火势蔓延是逐户进行的，因为一栋燃烧建筑的火星会引燃邻近建筑。可以采取行动来降低特定房屋被引燃的可能性。这种外部收益的大小和配置取决于假定的火势蔓延过程。在本文中，我们使用基于合理参数的模拟模型，来说明缓解措施的边际收益随建筑密度和缓解措施有效性而变化的可能模式。模型表明，一种常见模式是：在社区缓解水平较低时，对未缓解邻居的边际收益较低，然后上升至最大值，之后迅速下降至低水平。这个最大边际收益（即“群体免疫”）有助于指示社区中缓解措施的最优模式。然而，在纳什均衡中，个体房主不会考虑溢出收益。我们利用加州一个社区房屋价值分布相对于假设的缓解成本，在模型中说明房主在独立做出投资决策时会采取的缓解水平，以及能够导致社会最优的纠正措施。我们讨论了基于缓解活动调整保险费的规则或补贴的使用。由于对所有房屋进行缓解很少是最优的，最优解决方案可能涉及不平等对待并引发公平问题。

papers.title: Dynamic Price Competition: Theory and Evidence from Airline Markets
papers.authors: Jose M. Betancourt, Ali Hortaçsu, Aniko Oery, Kevin R. Williams
papers.abstract: We introduce a model of dynamic pricing in perishable goods markets with competition and provide conditions for equilibrium uniqueness. Pricing dynamics are rich because both own and competitor scarcity affect future profits. We identify new competitive forces that can lead to misallocation due to selling units too quickly: the Bertrand scarcity trap. We empirically estimate our model using daily prices and bookings for competing U.S. airlines. We compare competitive equilibrium outcomes to those where firms use pricing heuristics based on observed internal pricing rules at a large airline. We find that pricing heuristics increase revenues (4-5%) and consumer surplus (3%).
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：C70, C73, D21, D22, D43, D60, L13, L93
papers.zh_title: 动态价格竞争：理论与来自航空市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个具有竞争性的易逝品市场动态定价模型，并提供了均衡唯一性的条件。定价动态是丰富的，因为自身和竞争对手的稀缺性都会影响未来利润。我们识别出可能导致因销售过快而产生错配的新竞争力量：伯特兰稀缺陷阱。我们利用美国竞争性航空公司的每日价格和预订数据来实证估计我们的模型。我们将竞争均衡结果与基于一家大型航空公司内部定价规则观察到的定价启发式方法的结果进行比较。我们发现，定价启发式方法增加了收入（4-5%）和消费者剩余（3%）。

papers.title: Causal Narratives
papers.authors: Chad W. Kendall, Constantin Charles
papers.abstract: We study causal narratives – narratives which describe a (potentially incorrect) causal relationship between variables. In a series of experiments across a range of data-generating processes, we show that exogenously generated causal narratives manipulate decisions in ways inconsistent with rational theory. Instead, decisions are generally consistent with a behavioral theory, but with important exceptions, including when subjects face multiple narratives with contradictory recommendations. To study the generation and transmission of causal narratives, we show that they arise endogenously when subjects observe a dataset and provide advice to future subjects. These homegrown causal narratives mislead both the sender and receiver.
papers.zh_title: 因果叙事
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究因果叙事——即描述变量之间（可能不正确的）因果关系的叙事。在一系列涵盖多种数据生成过程的实验中，我们表明，外生生成的因果叙事会以与理性理论不一致的方式操纵决策。相反，决策通常与行为理论一致，但存在重要例外，包括当受试者面临多个给出矛盾建议的叙事时。为了研究因果叙事的生成与传播，我们表明，当受试者观察数据集并向未来的受试者提供建议时，这些叙事会内生地产生。这些自发产生的因果叙事会误导信息发送者和接收者。

papers.title: Overconfidence and Technology Adoption in Health Care
papers.authors: Diego A. Comin, Jonathan S. Skinner, Douglas O. Staiger
papers.abstract: Variation in technology adoption is a key driver of differences in productivity. Previous studies sought to explain variations in technology adoption by heterogeneity in profitability, costs of adoption, or other factors. Less is known about how adoption is affected by bias in the perceived skill to implement the technology. We develop a Bayesian framework in which the use of the technology depends on perceived skill, while the outcomes from using it depend on actual skill. We study the determinants of adoption in the case of implantable cardiac defibrillators (ICDs) for which we document large differences across hospitals in the rate of adoption between 2002-2006, and a strong reversal from 2006-2013. We find that perception bias explains two-thirds of the cross-hospital variation in ICD use. A dynamic version of the model with learning about bias predicts accurately the subsequent decline in ICD use between 2006-2013. These results suggest an important role for misperception in explaining the wide variation in the adoption of new technologies.
papers.zh_title: 医疗领域的过度自信与技术采纳
papers.zh_abstract: 技术采纳的差异是生产率差异的关键驱动因素。以往研究试图通过盈利能力、采纳成本或其他因素的异质性来解释技术采纳的差异。关于对实施技术所需技能的感知偏差如何影响采纳，我们知之甚少。我们构建了一个贝叶斯框架，其中技术的使用取决于感知技能，而使用技术的结果取决于实际技能。我们以植入式心脏复律除颤器（ICD）为例研究采纳的决定因素，发现2002年至2006年间各医院在ICD采纳率上存在巨大差异，并在2006年至2013年间出现强烈逆转。我们发现，感知偏差解释了医院间ICD使用差异的三分之二。一个包含关于偏差学习的动态模型准确预测了2006年至2013年间ICD使用的后续下降。这些结果表明，误解在解释新技术采纳的广泛差异中扮演着重要角色。

papers.title: Scapegoating and Discrimination in Times of Crisis: Evidence from Airbnb
papers.authors: Michael Luca, Elizaveta Pronkina, Michelangelo Rossi
papers.abstract: We present evidence that discrimination against Asian-American Airbnb users sharply increased at the start of the COVID-19 pandemic. Using a DiD approach, we find that hosts with distinctively Asian names experienced a 20 percent decline in guests relative to hosts with distinctively White names. In contrast, we do not see spikes in discrimination against Black or Hispanic hosts. Our results suggest that the rise in anti-Asian sentiment in 2020 translated to discrimination in economic activity, highlighting the ways in which scapegoating minority groups can shape markets. Our results also point to the role of platform design choices in enabling discrimination.
papers.zh_title: 危机时期的替罪羊与歧视：来自Airbnb的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，在COVID-19大流行开始时，针对亚裔美国Airbnb用户的歧视急剧增加。使用双重差分方法，我们发现，与具有明显白人名字的房东相比，具有明显亚裔名字的房东的客人数量下降了20%。相比之下，我们没有观察到针对黑人或西班牙裔房东的歧视激增。我们的结果表明，2020年反亚裔情绪的上升转化为经济活动中的歧视，凸显了将少数群体作为替罪羊可能塑造市场的方式。我们的结果也指出了平台设计选择在助长歧视方面的作用。

papers.title: The Next Wave of Energy Innovation: Which Technologies? Which Skills?
papers.authors: David Popp, Francesco Vona, Myriam Gregoire-Zawilski, Giovanni Marin
papers.abstract: The costs of low-carbon energy fell dramatically over the past decade, leading to rapid growth in its deployment. However, many challenges remain to deploy low-carbon energy at a scale necessary to meet net zero carbon emission targets. If net zero goals are to be met, developing complementary technologies and skills will be a necessary part of the next wave of low-carbon energy innovation. These include both improvements in physical capital, such as smart grids to aid integration of intermittent renewables, and human capital, to develop the skills workers need for a low-carbon economy. We document recent trends in energy innovation and discuss the lessons learnt for policy. We then discuss the potential role for complementary innovation in both physical capital—using smart grids as an example of how policy can help—and human capital, where we show how a task approach to labor informs policy and research on the worker skills needed for the energy transition.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PR；JEL：J24, O31, O38, Q42, Q55
papers.zh_title: 下一波能源创新：哪些技术？哪些技能？
papers.zh_abstract: 过去十年，低碳能源成本大幅下降，导致其部署快速增长。然而，要以实现净零碳排放目标所需的规模部署低碳能源，仍面临许多挑战。如果要实现净零目标，开发互补性技术和技能将是下一波低碳能源创新的必要组成部分。这包括物质资本的改进，例如有助于整合间歇性可再生能源的智能电网，以及人力资本，以培养工人在低碳经济中所需的技能。我们记录了能源创新的近期趋势，并讨论了政策方面的经验教训。然后，我们讨论了物质资本（以智能电网为例说明政策如何提供帮助）和人力资本中互补性创新的潜在作用，在人力资本方面，我们展示了劳动的任务方法如何为能源转型所需的工人技能的政策和研究提供信息。

papers.title: How Worker Productivity and Wages Grow with Tenure and Experience: The Firm Perspective
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, Minjoon Lee, Søren Leth-Petersen, Johan Saeverud, Matthew D. Shapiro
papers.abstract: How worker productivity evolves with tenure and experience is central to economics, shaping, for example, life-cycle earnings and the losses from involuntary job separation. Yet, worker-level productivity is hard to identify from observational data. This paper introduces direct measurement of worker productivity in a firm survey designed to separate the role of on-the-job tenure from total experience in determining productivity growth. A key innovation is to elicit what managers know about the productivity of their workers. Several findings emerge concerning the initial period on the job. (1) On-the-job productivity growth exceeds wage growth, consistent with wages not being allocative period-by-period. (2) Previous experience is a substitute, but a far less than perfect one, for on-the-job tenure. (3) There is substantial heterogeneity across jobs in the extent to which previous experience substitutes for tenure. The survey makes use of administrative data to construct a representative sample of firms, check for selective non-response, validate survey measures with administrative measures, and calibrate parameters not measured in the survey.
papers.zh_title: 工人生产率和工资如何随任期和经验增长：企业视角
papers.zh_abstract: 工人生产率如何随任期和经验演变是经济学的核心问题，例如，它塑造了生命周期收入和因非自愿离职造成的损失。然而，从观测数据中识别工人层面的生产率是困难的。本文介绍了一项企业调查中对工人生产率的直接测量，该调查旨在区分在职任期与总经验在决定生产率增长中的作用。一个关键创新是引出管理者对其工人生产率的了解。关于工作初始阶段，出现了几个发现。（1）在职生产率增长超过工资增长，这与工资并非逐期配置的观点一致。（2）先前经验是任期的一种替代，但远非完美替代。（3）在不同工作中，先前经验替代任期的程度存在显著异质性。该调查利用行政数据构建了具有代表性的企业样本，检查了选择性无应答，用行政测量验证了调查测量，并校准了调查中未测量的参数。

papers.title: Intergenerational Spillover Effects of Language Training for Refugees
papers.authors: Mette Foged, Linea Hasager, Giovanni Peri, Jacob N. Arendt, Iben Bolvig
papers.abstract: Children of refugees are among the most economically disadvantaged youth in several European countries. They are more likely to drop out of school and to commit crime. We show that a reform in Denmark in 1999, that expanded language training for adult refugees and improved their economic integration, had significant intergenerational spillover effects in terms of higher completion rates from lower secondary school and lower juvenile crime rates. The effects on crime are driven by boys who were below school-starting age when their parents were treated.
papers.zh_title: 难民语言培训的代际溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 在几个欧洲国家，难民子女是经济上最弱势的青少年群体之一。他们更有可能辍学和犯罪。我们表明，丹麦1999年的一项改革——该改革扩大了成年难民的语言培训并改善了他们的经济融合——在提高初中毕业率和降低青少年犯罪率方面产生了显著的代际溢出效应。对犯罪的影响主要由那些在父母接受培训时尚未达到入学年龄的男孩驱动。

papers.title: New Frontiers: The Origins and Content of New Work, 1940–2018
papers.authors: David Autor, Caroline Chin, Anna M. Salomons, Bryan Seegmiller
papers.abstract: We address three core questions about the hypothesized role of newly emerging job categories ('new work') in counterbalancing the erosive effect of task-displacing automation on labor demand: what is the substantive content of new work; where does it come from; and what effect does it have on labor demand? To address these questions, we construct a novel database spanning eight decades of new job titles linked both to US Census microdata and to patent-based measures of occupations’ exposure to labor-augmenting and labor-automating innovations. We find, first, that the majority of current employment is in new job specialties introduced after 1940, but the locus of new work creation has shifted—from middle-paid production and clerical occupations over 1940–1980, to high-paid professional and, secondarily, low-paid services since 1980. Second, new work emerges in response to technological innovations that complement the outputs of occupations and demand shocks that raise occupational demand; conversely, innovations that automate tasks or reduce occupational demand slow new work emergence. Third, although flows of augmentation and automation innovations are positively correlated across occupations, the former boosts occupational labor demand while the latter depresses it. Harnessing shocks to the flow of augmentation and automation innovations spurred by breakthrough innovations two decades earlier, we establish that the effects of augmentation and automation innovations on new work emergence and occupational labor demand are causal. Finally, our results suggest that the demand-eroding effects of automation innovations have intensified in the last four decades while the demand-increasing effects of augmentation innovations have not.
papers.zh_title: 新前沿：1940-2018年新工作的起源与内容
papers.zh_abstract: 我们解决了关于新出现的工作类别（“新工作”）在抵消任务替代型自动化对劳动力需求的侵蚀效应方面的假设作用的三个核心问题：新工作的实质内容是什么；它从何而来；它对劳动力需求有何影响？为了解决这些问题，我们构建了一个跨越八十年、包含新职位名称的新数据库，该数据库与美国人口普查微观数据以及基于专利的职业暴露于劳动增强型和劳动自动化型创新的衡量指标相关联。我们发现，首先，当前大多数就业岗位是在1940年后引入的新工作专业中，但新工作创造的焦点已经转移——从1940-1980年中等收入的生产和文职职业，转向1980年以来高收入的专业职业以及次要的低收入服务业。其次，新工作的出现是对补充职业产出的技术创新和提高职业需求的需求冲击的回应；相反，自动化任务或降低职业需求的创新会减缓新工作的出现。第三，尽管增强型和自动化型创新的流动在各职业间呈正相关，但前者提升职业劳动力需求，而后者则抑制它。利用二十年前突破性创新引发的增强型和自动化型创新流动的冲击，我们确定了增强型和自动化型创新对新工作出现和职业劳动力需求的影响是因果性的。最后，我们的结果表明，自动化创新对需求侵蚀的影响在过去四十年中加剧，而增强型创新对需求增加的影响则没有。

papers.title: Does Occupational Licensing Reduce Value Creation on Digital Platforms?
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Mischa Fisher
papers.abstract: We test whether occupational licensing undercuts a key goal of digital marketplaces— to increase social surplus by increasing the effectiveness of customer search. Our setting is a large online marketplace in the $500B home services industry where a platform converts customer search into sales leads that are accepted for purchase by service providers on the platform. For each of the 21 million observations in our data set, we observe task-level variation in the state licensing requirements that service providers must meet to operate on the platform. Exploiting two natural experiments, we find that licensing reduces the accept rate of sales leads by an average of 25 percent. The accept rate drops because licensing reduces the aggregate labor supply of workers on the platform and not because licensing increases the volume of customer search. We develop a model and derive analytic expressions for the impact of licensing on the welfare of consumers, service providers and the platform as a function of seven sufficient statistics which we estimate from the data. We find that licensing a task reduces service provider surplus and platform surplus without increasing consumer surplus.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D60, J44, L51, L86
papers.zh_title: 职业许可会减少数字平台的价值创造吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验职业许可是否削弱了数字市场的一个关键目标——通过提高客户搜索的有效性来增加社会剩余。我们的背景是一个价值5000亿美元的家居服务行业的大型在线市场，在该市场中，平台将客户搜索转化为销售线索，由平台上的服务提供商接受购买。在我们的数据集的2100万个观测值中，每个观测值都观察到服务提供商在平台上运营必须满足的州许可要求的任务层面差异。利用两个自然实验，我们发现许可使销售线索的接受率平均降低了25%。接受率下降是因为许可减少了平台上工人的总劳动力供给，而不是因为许可增加了客户搜索量。我们开发了一个模型，并推导出许可对消费者、服务提供商和平台福利影响的解析表达式，该表达式是七个充分统计量的函数，我们从数据中估计了这些统计量。我们发现，许可一项任务会减少服务提供商剩余和平台剩余，而不会增加消费者剩余。

papers.title: Where Have All the Workers Gone? Recalls, Retirements, and Reallocation in the COVID Recovery
papers.authors: Eliza Forsythe, Lisa B. Kahn, Fabian Lange, David G. Wiczer
papers.abstract: At the onset of the COVID pandemic, the U.S. economy suddenly and swiftly lost 20 million jobs. Over the next two years, the economy has been on the recovery path. We assess the labor market two years into the COVID crisis. We show that early employment dynamics were almost entirely driven by temporary layoffs and later recalls. Taking these into account, we show that the labor market remained surprisingly tight throughout the crisis, despite the dramatic job losses. By spring, 2022, the labor market had largely recovered and was characterized by extremely tight markets and a slightly depressed employment-to-population ratio driven largely by retirements. Finally, we see surprisingly little evidence of excess reallocation, despite predictions that COVID would dramatically and permanently change the way we live and work. We do see that employment has reallocated somewhat away from low-skilled service jobs, and, in light of the job vacancy patterns, conclude that worker preferences or changes in job amenities are driving this shift. In addition, the retirements paved the way for movements up the job ladder, making low-skilled customer-facing jobs even less desirable.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, LS；JEL：E24, E32, J21, J23, J26
papers.zh_title: 工人都去哪儿了？COVID复苏中的召回、退休与重新配置
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID大流行初期，美国经济突然且迅速地失去了2000万个工作岗位。在接下来的两年里，经济一直处于复苏轨道。我们评估了COVID危机两年后的劳动力市场。我们表明，早期的就业动态几乎完全由临时裁员和后来的召回驱动。考虑到这些，我们表明，尽管就业岗位大幅减少，但劳动力市场在整个危机期间仍然出人意料地紧张。到2022年春季，劳动力市场已基本复苏，其特点是市场极度紧张，就业人口比率略有下降，这主要是由退休驱动的。最后，尽管有预测称COVID将戏剧性地、永久地改变我们的生活和工作方式，但我们几乎没有看到过度重新配置的证据。我们确实看到，就业已经从低技能服务岗位有所重新配置，并且根据职位空缺模式，我们得出结论，工人偏好或工作便利条件的变化正在推动这种转变。此外，退休为沿着职业阶梯向上流动铺平了道路，使得低技能面向客户的工作变得更加不受欢迎。

papers.title: The Impact of Diversity on Perceptions of Income Distribution and Preferences for Redistribution
papers.authors: Juliana Londoño-Vélez
papers.abstract: Does diversity affect people’s perceptions of income distribution and their preferences for redistribution? I leverage variation from a Colombian financial aid reform boosting the share of low-income students at an elite university. Combining college records and original survey data, I study how diversity affects high-income students’ social networks, perceptions, and preferences by exploiting treatment variation across cohorts and majors using difference-in-differences. Exposure to low-income peers caused high-income students to diversify their social networks, have more accurate perceptions of the income distribution, and support progressive redistribution. My preferred interpretation is that diversity raised students’ concerns about (the lack of) equal opportunity.
papers.zh_title: 多样性对收入分配认知与再分配偏好的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 多样性是否会影响人们对收入分配的认知及其再分配偏好？我利用哥伦比亚一项财政援助改革带来的变化，该改革提高了某精英大学中低收入学生的比例。结合大学记录和原始调查数据，我通过双重差分法，利用不同年级和专业间的处理差异，研究多样性如何影响高收入学生的社交网络、认知和偏好。接触低收入同龄人促使高收入学生多元化其社交网络，更准确地认知收入分配，并支持累进式再分配。我更倾向的解释是，多样性提高了学生对（缺乏）机会平等的关注。

papers.title: Family Formation and Crime
papers.authors: Maxim N. Massenkoff, Evan K. Rose
papers.abstract: We use administrative data from Washington State to perform a large-scale analysis of the impact of family formation on crime. Our estimates indicate that pregnancy triggers sharp declines in arrests rivaling any known intervention, supporting the view that childbirth is a "turning point" that reduces deviant behavior through social bonds. For mothers, criminal arrests drop precipitously in the first few months of pregnancy, stabilizing at half of pre-pregnancy levels three years after birth. Men show a sustained 20 percent decline in crime that begins at pregnancy, although arrests for domestic violence spike at birth. These effects are concentrated among first-time parents, suggesting that a permanent change in preferences---rather than transitory time and budget shocks---may be responsible. A separate design using parents of stillborn children to estimate counterfactual arrest rates reinforces the main findings. Marriage, in contrast, is not associated with any sudden changes and marks the completion of a gradual 50 percent decline in arrests for both men and women.
papers.zh_title: 家庭组建与犯罪
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用华盛顿州的行政数据，对家庭组建对犯罪的影响进行了大规模分析。我们的估计表明，怀孕引发了逮捕率的急剧下降，其效果可与任何已知干预措施相媲美，这支持了生育是一个通过社会纽带减少越轨行为的“转折点”的观点。对于母亲而言，刑事逮捕在怀孕头几个月急剧下降，并在产后三年稳定在孕前水平的一半。男性在怀孕开始时犯罪率持续下降20%，尽管家庭暴力逮捕在生育时激增。这些效应集中在初为父母的人群中，表明可能是偏好的永久性改变——而非暂时的时间和预算冲击——导致了这一结果。另一个利用死产儿父母来估算反事实逮捕率的设计，进一步强化了主要发现。相比之下，婚姻与任何突然变化无关，而是标志着男性和女性逮捕率均逐步下降50%的完成。

papers.title: Internal Migration in the United States: Rates, Selection, and Destination Choice, 1850-1940
papers.authors: Ariell Zimran
papers.abstract: I study the internal migration of native-born white men in the United States using linked census data covering all possible 10- and 20-year periods 1850--1940. Inter-county migration rates were stable over time. Selection into migration on the basis of occupational status was also largely stable and was neutral or slightly negative. But the orientation of internal migration changed, declining in distance, becoming more directed towards the west, and increasingly driving urbanization. These patterns changed in the 1930s as migration became less common and less urban oriented. These results provide a clearer understanding of historic US internal migration than previously possible.
papers.zh_title: 美国国内移民：1850-1940年的迁移率、选择性及目的地选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我利用覆盖1850年至1940年间所有可能的10年和20年周期的关联人口普查数据，研究了美国本土出生的白人男性的国内移民。跨县迁移率随时间保持稳定。基于职业地位向移民的选择性也基本稳定，且呈中性或轻微负向。但国内移民的方向发生了变化：迁移距离缩短，更倾向于向西迁移，并日益推动城市化。这些模式在1930年代发生改变，移民变得不那么普遍，且城市化导向减弱。这些结果比以往更清晰地揭示了美国历史上的国内移民模式。

papers.title: Broadband Internet and the Stock Market Investments of Individual Investors
papers.authors: Hans K. Hvide, Tom G. Meling, Magne Mogstad, Ola L. Vestad
papers.abstract: We study the effects of broadband internet use on the investment decisions of individual investors. A public program in Norway provides plausibly exogenous variation in internet use. Our instrumental variables estimates show that internet use causes a substantial increase in stock market participation, driven primarily by increased fund ownership. Existing investors tilt their portfolios towards funds, thereby obtaining more diversified portfolios and higher Sharpe ratios, and do not increase their trading activity in stocks. Overall, access to high-speed internet seems to spur a “democratization of finance”, with individuals making investment decisions that are more in line with the advice from portfolio theory.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF；JEL：D04, D14, D15, G00, G11, G40
papers.zh_title: 宽带互联网与个人投资者的股票市场投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了宽带互联网使用对个人投资者投资决策的影响。挪威的一项公共项目提供了互联网使用的外生性变化。我们的工具变量估计表明，互联网使用导致股市参与率大幅增加，这主要由基金持有量的增加驱动。现有投资者将其投资组合向基金倾斜，从而获得更多元化的投资组合和更高的夏普比率，并且没有增加股票交易活动。总体而言，高速互联网的接入似乎促进了“金融民主化”，使个人做出的投资决策更符合投资组合理论的建议。

papers.title: Eviction and Poverty in American Cities
papers.authors: Robert Collinson, John Eric Humphries, Nicholas S. Mader, Davin K. Reed, Daniel I. Tannenbaum, Winnie van Dijk
papers.abstract: More than two million U.S. households have an eviction case filed against them each year. Policymakers at the federal, state, and local levels are increasingly pursuing policies to reduce the number of evictions, citing harm to tenants and high public expenditures related to homelessness. We study the consequences of eviction for tenants using newly linked administrative data from two major urban areas: Cook County (which includes Chicago) and New York City. We document that prior to housing court, tenants experience declines in earnings and employment and increases in financial distress and hospital visits. These pre-trends pose a challenge for disentangling correlation and causation. To address this problem, we use an instrumental variables approach based on cases randomly assigned to judges of varying leniency. We find that an eviction order increases homelessness and hospital visits and reduces earnings, durable goods consumption, and access to credit in the first two years. Effects on housing and labor market outcomes are driven by impacts for female and Black tenants. In the longer-run, eviction increases indebtedness and reduces credit scores.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I30, I32, J01, R0, R28, R38
papers.zh_title: 美国城市中的驱逐与贫困
papers.zh_abstract: 每年有超过两百万美国家庭面临驱逐诉讼。联邦、州和地方各级政策制定者正越来越多地推行减少驱逐数量的政策，理由是驱逐对租户造成伤害，并与无家可归相关的高额公共支出有关。我们利用来自两个主要城市地区——库克县（包括芝加哥）和纽约市——的新关联行政数据，研究了驱逐对租户的后果。我们记录到，在住房法庭审理之前，租户的收入和就业率下降，财务困境和就医次数增加。这些事前趋势给区分相关性和因果关系带来了挑战。为解决这一问题，我们采用了一种基于案件随机分配给宽严程度不同的法官的工具变量方法。我们发现，驱逐令在头两年内增加了无家可归和就医次数，并降低了收入、耐用品消费和信贷获取。对住房和劳动力市场结果的影响主要由女性和黑人租户驱动。从长期来看，驱逐增加了债务并降低了信用评分。

papers.title: Scared Straight? Threat and Assimilation of Refugees in Germany
papers.authors: Philipp Jaschke, Sulin Sardoschau, Marco Tabellini
papers.abstract: This paper studies the effects of threat on convergence to local culture and economic assimilation of refugees, exploiting plausibly exogenous variation in their allocation across German regions between 2013 and 2016. We combine novel survey data on cultural preferences and economic outcomes of refugees with corresponding information on locals, and construct a threat index that integrates contemporaneous and historical variables. On average, refugees assimilate both culturally and economically. However, while refugees assigned to more hostile regions converge to local culture more quickly, they do not exhibit faster economic assimilation. Our evidence suggests that refugees exert more assimilation effort in response to local threat, but do not integrate faster because of higher discrimination in more hostile regions.
papers.zh_title: 恐吓还是同化？威胁对德国难民融入的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了威胁对难民融入当地文化及经济同化的影响，利用了2013年至2016年间难民在德国各地区分配的外生性变化。我们将关于难民文化偏好和经济结果的新调查数据与当地人的相应信息相结合，并构建了一个整合了同期和历史变量的威胁指数。平均而言，难民在文化和经济上都实现了同化。然而，尽管被分配到更敌对地区的难民更快地融入当地文化，但他们并未表现出更快的经济同化。我们的证据表明，难民为应对当地威胁而付出了更多的同化努力，但由于在更敌对地区面临更高的歧视，他们并未实现更快的经济融合。

papers.title: Rationing by Race
papers.authors: Manasvini Singh, Atheendar Venkataramani
papers.abstract: We document how deepening resource scarcity results in rationing on the basis of race in a high-stakes setting: health care. Using detailed, time-stamped data on 107,000 inpatient admissions to a large health system, we find that in-hospital mortality increases for Black, but not White, patients as hospitals reach capacity. These findings are not explained by differential patient selection. We identify rationing by wait times as a mechanism, documenting that sicker Black patients wait longer for care than healthier White patients at almost all capacity levels. Text analysis of unstructured clinical notes reveals rationing of provider effort as another mechanism.
papers.zh_title: 基于种族的配给
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了在一个高风险环境——医疗保健中，资源日益稀缺如何导致基于种族的配给。利用一个大型医疗系统107,000名住院患者的详细时间戳数据，我们发现，当医院达到容量时，黑人患者的院内死亡率上升，而白人患者则没有。这些发现无法用患者选择的差异来解释。我们识别出等待时间配给是一个机制，记录到在几乎所有容量水平下，病情更重的黑人患者比病情较轻的白人患者等待更长时间。对非结构化临床笔记的文本分析揭示了医疗服务提供者努力配给是另一个机制。

papers.title: Unconditional Cash and Family Investments in Infants: Evidence from a Large-Scale Cash Transfer Experiment in the U.S.
papers.authors: Lisa A. Gennetian, Greg Duncan, Nathan A. Fox, Katherine Magnuson, Sarah Halpern-Meekin, Kimberly G. Noble, Hirokazu Yoshikawa
papers.abstract: A key policy question in evaluating social programs to address childhood poverty is how families receiving unconditional financial support would spend those funds. Economists have limited empirical evidence on this topic in the U.S. We provide causal estimates of financial and time investments in infants among families living in poverty from a large-scale, multi-site randomized controlled study of monthly unconditional cash transfers starting at the time of a child’s birth. We find that the cash transfers increased spending on child-specific goods and mothers’ early-learning activities with their infants. The marginal propensity to consume child-focused items from the cash transfer exceeded that from other income, consistent with the behavioral cues in the cash transfer design. We find no statistically detectable offsets in household earnings nor statistically detectable impacts in other pre-registered outcomes related to general household expenditures, maternal labor supply, infants’ time in childcare, or mothers’ subjective well-being.
papers.meta: Programs：CH；JEL：D13, H31, I30, J13, J18, J22
papers.zh_title: 无条件现金与家庭对婴儿的投资：来自美国大规模现金转移实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在评估解决儿童贫困的社会项目时，一个关键的政策问题是，获得无条件经济支持的家庭将如何花费这些资金。经济学家在美国对此问题的实证证据有限。我们通过一项大规模、多地点随机对照研究，提供了对贫困家庭中婴儿的财务和时间投资的因果估计，该研究从孩子出生时开始每月提供无条件现金转移。我们发现，现金转移增加了用于儿童特定商品的支出以及母亲与婴儿进行的早期学习活动。来自现金转移的儿童焦点物品的边际消费倾向超过了来自其他收入的边际消费倾向，这与现金转移设计中的行为提示一致。我们没有发现家庭收入在统计上可检测的抵消效应，也没有发现其他预先登记的结果（如一般家庭支出、母亲劳动力供给、婴儿在托儿所的时间或母亲的主观幸福感）在统计上可检测的影响。

papers.title: Not Learning from Others
papers.authors: John J. Conlon, Malavika Mani, Gautam Rao, Matthew W. Ridley, Frank Schilbach
papers.abstract: We study social learning using experiments where two people independently learn relevant information and can share it to make accurate private decisions. Across three experiments, people are substantially less sensitive to information others discover than to equally-relevant information they discovered themselves. This holds when they must learn information from others through discussion; when the experimenter perfectly communicates the information; and even when participants observe others’ information with their own eyes. Our results therefore stem not from a failure to elicit information from others but a systematic tendency to underweight it relative to one’s own information. Our findings illustrate a powerful barrier to social learning that might underlie many documented cases of failure to learn from others.
papers.zh_title: 不向他人学习
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验研究社会学习，实验中两人独立学习相关信息，并可以分享这些信息以做出准确的私人决策。在三个实验中，人们对他人发现的信息的敏感度远低于对自己发现的同等相关信息。这种情况发生在他们必须通过讨论从他人那里学习信息时；当实验者完美地传达信息时；甚至当参与者亲眼观察到他人的信息时也是如此。因此，我们的结果并非源于未能从他人那里获取信息，而是源于一种系统性的倾向，即相对于自己的信息，低估他人的信息。我们的发现揭示了社会学习的一个强大障碍，这可能构成了许多记录在案的未能向他人学习案例的基础。

papers.title: The German Model of Industrial Relations: Balancing Flexibility and Collective Action
papers.authors: Simon Jäger, Shakked Noy, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: We give an overview of the “German model” of industrial relations. We organize our review by focusing on the two pillars of the model: sectoral collective bargaining and firm-level codetermination. Relative to the United States, Germany outsources collective bargaining to the sectoral level, resulting in higher coverage and the avoidance of firm-level distributional conflict. Relative to other European countries, Germany makes it easy for employers to avoid coverage or use flexibility provisions to deviate downwards from collective agreements.
