The greater flexibility of the German system may reduce unemployment, but may also erode bargaining coverage and increase inequality. Meanwhile, firm-level codetermination through worker board representation and works councils creates cooperative dialogue between employers and workers. Board representation has few direct impacts owing to worker representatives’ minority vote share, but works councils, which hold a range of substantive powers, may be more impactful. Overall, the German model highlights tensions between efficiency-enhancing flexibility and equity-enhancing collective action.\n
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E0, H0, J0
papers.zh_title: 德国劳资关系模式：平衡灵活性与集体行动
papers.zh_abstract: 我们概述了劳资关系的“德国模式”。我们通过聚焦该模式的两大支柱来组织我们的回顾：行业集体谈判和企业层面的共同决策。相对于美国，德国将集体谈判外包给行业层面，从而提高了覆盖率并避免了企业层面的分配冲突。相对于其他欧洲国家，德国使雇主很容易避免覆盖或利用灵活性条款向下偏离集体协议。德国体系更大的灵活性可能降低失业率，但也可能侵蚀谈判覆盖率并加剧不平等。与此同时，通过工人董事会代表和劳资委员会实现的企业层面共同决策，在雇主和工人之间创造了合作对话。由于工人代表的少数投票权，董事会代表的直接影响很小，但拥有实质性权力的劳资委员会可能更具影响力。总体而言，德国模式凸显了提高效率的灵活性与增强公平的集体行动之间的张力。

papers.title: A Model of Intangible Capital
papers.authors: Nicolas Crouzet, Janice C. Eberly, Andrea L. Eisfeldt, Dimitris Papanikolaou
papers.abstract: We propose a model that starts from the premise that intangible capital needs to be stored on some medium --- software, patents, essential employees --- before it can be utilized in production. Storage implies that intangible capital may be partially non-rival within the firm, leading to scale economies. However, storage can also compromise the ability of the firm to fully appropriate the returns generated by intangibles. We explore the implications of these two mechanisms for firm scale, scope, and investment decisions, and we outline their connection to recent macroeconomic and financial trends in the US.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E01, E22, G11, G31, O34
papers.zh_title: 无形资本模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个模型，其出发点是无形的资本需要存储在某种介质上——软件、专利、关键员工——然后才能用于生产。存储意味着无形资本在企业内部可能部分非竞争，从而导致规模经济。然而，存储也可能损害企业完全获取无形资产所产生回报的能力。我们探讨了这两种机制对企业规模、范围和投资决策的影响，并概述了它们与美国近期宏观经济和金融趋势的联系。

papers.title: Why Don't We Sleep Enough? A Field Experiment Among College Students
papers.authors: Mallory L. Avery, Osea Giuntella, Peiran Jiao
papers.abstract: This study investigates the mechanisms affecting sleep choice and explores whether commitment devices and monetary incentives can be used to promote healthier sleep habits. To this end, we conducted a field experiment with college students, providing them incentives to sleep and collecting data from wearable activity trackers, surveys, and time-use diaries. Monetary incentives were effective in increasing sleep duration with some evidence of persistence after the incentive was removed. We uncover evidence of demand for commitment. Our results are consistent with partially sophisticated time-inconsistent preferences and overconfidence, and have implications for the effectiveness of information interventions on sleep choice.
papers.zh_title: 为什么我们睡眠不足？一项针对大学生的实地实验
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了影响睡眠选择的机制，并探讨是否可以利用承诺机制和金钱激励来促进更健康的睡眠习惯。为此，我们对大学生进行了一项实地实验，为他们提供睡眠激励，并通过可穿戴活动追踪器、调查和时间使用日记收集数据。金钱激励在增加睡眠时长方面是有效的，并且在激励取消后有一些持续性的证据。我们发现了对承诺需求的证据。我们的结果与部分老练的时间不一致偏好和过度自信一致，并对信息干预对睡眠选择的有效性具有启示意义。

papers.title: The Impact of Team Incentives on Performance in Graduate School: Evidence from Two Pilot RCTs
papers.authors: John A. List, Rohen Shah
papers.abstract: In organizations, teams are ubiquitous. “Weakest Link” and “Best Shot” are incentive schemes that tie a group member’s compensation to the output of their group’s least and most productive member, respectively. In this paper, we test the impact of these incentive schemes by conducting two pilot RCTs (one in-person, one online), which included more than 250 graduate students in a graduate math class. Students were placed in study groups of three or four students, and then groups were randomized to either control, Weakest Link, or Best Shot incentives. We find evidence that such incentive approaches can affect test scores, both in-person and online.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：C9, C93, D79, I2, J3
papers.zh_title: 团队激励对研究生学业表现的影响：来自两项试点随机对照试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在组织中，团队无处不在。“最弱环节”和“最佳射手”是激励方案，分别将团体成员的报酬与其团体中效率最低和最高成员的产出挂钩。在本文中，我们通过进行两项试点随机对照试验（一项线下，一项线上）来测试这些激励方案的影响，试验对象包括一个研究生数学班上的250多名研究生。学生被分成三人或四人的学习小组，然后小组被随机分配到对照组、最弱环节激励或最佳射手激励。我们发现证据表明，这种激励方法可以影响考试成绩，无论是在线下还是线上。

papers.title: Investing in Infants: The Lasting Effects of Cash Transfers to New Families
papers.authors: Andrew C. Barr, Jonathan Eggleston, Alexander A. Smith
papers.abstract: We provide new evidence that cash transfers following the birth of a first child can have large and long-lasting effects on that child’s outcomes. We take advantage of the January 1 birthdate cutoff for U.S. child-related tax benefits, which results in families of otherwise similar children receiving substantially different refunds during the first year of life. For the average low-income single-child family in our sample this difference amounts to roughly $1,300, or 10 percent of income. Using the universe of administrative federal tax data in selected years, we show that this transfer in infancy increases young adult earnings by at least 1 to 2 percent, with larger effects for males. These effects show up at earlier ages in terms of improved math and reading test scores and a higher likelihood of high school graduation. The observed effects on shorter-run parental outcomes suggest that additional liquidity during the critical window following the birth of a first child leads to persistent increases in family income that likely contribute to the downstream effects on children’s outcomes. The longer-term effects on child earnings alone are large enough that the transfer pays for itself through subsequent increases in federal income tax revenue.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H02, H24, H31, I2, I21, I3, I38, J13, J24, J62
papers.zh_title: 投资于婴儿：对新家庭现金转移的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了新的证据，表明在第一个孩子出生后进行的现金转移可能对该孩子的结果产生巨大而持久的影响。我们利用了美国与儿童相关的税收优惠的1月1日出生日期截止点，这导致其他方面相似的孩子的家庭在出生后第一年获得截然不同的退税。在我们样本中，对于平均低收入单孩家庭来说，这一差额约为1300美元，占收入的10%。利用选定年份的行政联邦税务数据全集，我们表明，婴儿期的这种转移使年轻成年人的收入至少增加1%至2%，对男性的影响更大。这些影响在更早的年龄就显现出来，表现为数学和阅读考试成绩的提高以及高中毕业可能性的增加。观察到的对短期父母结果的影响表明，在第一个孩子出生后的关键窗口期内，额外的流动性导致家庭收入的持续增长，这很可能促成了对孩子结果的后续影响。仅对孩子收入的长期影响就足够大，以至于通过随后联邦所得税收入的增加，转移支付本身就能收回成本。

papers.title: Material Incentives and Effort Choice: Evidence from an Online Experiment Across Countries
papers.authors: Elwyn Davies, Marcel Fafchamps
papers.abstract: We conduct an interactive online experiment framed as an employment contract between employer and worker. Subjects from the US, India, and Africa are matched in pairs within and, in some cases, across countries. Employers make a one-period offer to a worker who can either decline or choose a high or low effort. The offer is restricted to be from a variable set of possible contracts: high and low fixed wage; bonus and malus contracts; and bonus and malus with reneging. High effort is always efficient. Self-interest predicts a fraction of observed choices, but many choices are better explained either by conditional reciprocity or by intrinsic motivation. Subjects from India and Africa are more likely to follow intrinsic motivation and they provide high effort more often. US subjects are more likely to follow self-interest and reach a less efficient outcome on average, but workers earn slightly more. We find no evidence that workers favor employers from some countries or that employers treat workers from different countries differently. Individual characteristics and stated attitudes toward worker incentives are unable to predict the behavioral differences observed between countries, thus allowing the possible existence of cultural differences in the response to labor incentives.
papers.zh_title: 物质激励与努力选择：来自一项跨国在线实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项交互式在线实验，框架为雇主与工人之间的雇佣合同。来自美国、印度和非洲的受试者在国内以及某些情况下跨国配对。雇主向工人提供一个单期要约，工人可以拒绝或选择高努力或低努力。该要约被限制在一组可变的可能合同中：高固定工资和低固定工资；奖金和罚金合同；以及带有违约的奖金和罚金合同。高努力总是有效率的。自利预测了观察到的选择的一部分，但许多选择要么由条件互惠，要么由内在动机更好地解释。来自印度和非洲的受试者更可能遵循内在动机，并且他们更经常提供高努力。美国受试者更可能遵循自利，平均而言达到的效率较低的结果，但工人赚得略多。我们没有发现证据表明工人偏爱来自某些国家的雇主，或者雇主区别对待来自不同国家的工人。个人特征和对工人激励的陈述态度无法预测国家之间观察到的行为差异，从而允许在劳动激励反应方面可能存在文化差异。

papers.title: Real-Time Poverty, Material Well-Being, and the Child Tax Credit
papers.authors: Jeehoon Han, Bruce D. Meyer, James X. Sullivan
papers.abstract: In response to the COVID-19 pandemic two new timely poverty measures have been developed to monitor fast-changing economic conditions for the most deprived. The Han et al. near real-time poverty measure uses responses to a global income question on the Monthly Current Population Survey (CPS) that is available for a subsample of those surveyed. The CPSP monthly poverty measure, widely cited in the media, uses data from the Annual Social and Economic Supplement to the CPS and other sources to impute poverty in the Monthly CPS sample based on demographic and employment variables. This paper evaluates the two measures and their estimates of child poverty around the 2021 temporary changes to the Child Tax Credit (CTC). We argue that conceptually the measure based on responses rather than the one based on imputations is preferable, though both measures suffer from important drawbacks. We also conclude that widely publicized claims that child poverty fell by 25 percent when the Advance CTC payments started and subsequently rose by 41 percent when they ended are based on weak evidence and are overstated. The best evidence, though still imperfect, suggests poverty was relatively stable in 2021 and the first half of 2022. Part of the explanation for the lack of change appears to be a compensating decline in employment among low-skilled workers with children. Other evidence tying changes in well-being to the tax credit is confounded by other policy changes.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C42, C81, H2, I32, I38, J20
papers.zh_title: 实时贫困、物质福祉与儿童税收抵免
papers.zh_abstract: 为应对COVID-19大流行，开发了两种新的及时贫困衡量指标，以监测最贫困人群快速变化的经济状况。Han等人的近实时贫困衡量指标使用了月度当前人口调查中一个全球收入问题的回答，该问题仅对调查子样本可用。媒体广泛引用的CPSP月度贫困衡量指标，则利用当前人口调查年度社会和经济补充数据及其他来源，基于人口和就业变量在月度当前人口调查样本中推算贫困。本文评估了这两种衡量指标及其对2021年儿童税收抵免临时变更前后儿童贫困的估计。我们认为，从概念上讲，基于回答的衡量指标优于基于推算的衡量指标，尽管两种衡量指标都存在重要缺陷。我们还得出结论，广泛宣传的关于提前儿童税收抵免支付开始时儿童贫困下降25%以及支付结束时儿童贫困上升41%的说法，基于薄弱的证据且被夸大。最佳证据（尽管仍不完美）表明，贫困在2021年和2022年上半年相对稳定。缺乏变化的部分解释似乎是带孩子的低技能工人就业的补偿性下降。其他将福祉变化与税收抵免联系起来的证据则与其他政策变化相混淆。

papers.title: Patterns, Determinants, and Consequences of Ability Tracking: Evidence from Texas Public Schools
papers.authors: Kate Antonovics, Sandra E. Black, Julie Berry Cullen, Akiva Yonah Meiselman
papers.abstract: Little is known about the pervasiveness or determinants of within-school ability tracking in the US. To fill this gap, we use detailed administrative data to estimate the extent of tracking in Texas public schools for grades 4 through 8 over the years 2011-2019. Strikingly, we find that ability tracking across classes within schools overwhelms sorting by ability across districts and schools, as well as sorting by race/ethnicity or economic disadvantage. We also examine how schools operationalize tracking as well as the local characteristics that predict tracking. Finally, we explore how exposure to tracking (and the bundle of associated practices) relates to achievement gains, finding that, on average, tracking increases inequality by slightly improving test scores of higher-achieving students without harming those of lower-achieving students.
papers.zh_title: 能力分班的模式、决定因素与后果：来自德克萨斯州公立学校的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 关于美国校内能力分班的普遍性或决定因素，人们知之甚少。为填补这一空白，我们利用详细的行政数据，估算了2011-2019年间德克萨斯州4至8年级公立学校中能力分班的程度。引人注目的是，我们发现校内跨班级的能力分班远远超过了跨学区和学校的能力分班，以及按种族/族裔或经济劣势的分班。我们还考察了学校如何实施能力分班，以及预测能力分班的地方特征。最后，我们探讨了接触能力分班（及其相关实践组合）与学业成绩提升之间的关系，发现平均而言，能力分班通过略微提高成绩较高学生的考试成绩而不损害成绩较低学生，从而加剧了不平等。

papers.title: One Size Doesn’t Fit All: Heterogeneous Depositor Compensation During Periods of Uncertainty
papers.authors: Nikolaos Artavanis, Daniel Paravisini, Claudia Robles Garcia, Amit Seru, Margarita Tsoutsoura
papers.abstract: We develop a new approach to identify different categories of depositors during periods of uncertainty and quantify their compensation to remain in the bank. We isolate withdrawals due to liquidity needs, deterioration of fundamentals, and expectation about withdrawal behavior of other depositors. We exploit variation in the cost of withdrawal induced by the maturity expiration of time deposits around unexpected uncertainty events and high-frequency microdata from a large Greek bank. Deposit withdrawals quadrupled in response to a policy uncertainty shock that doubled the short-run credit default swap (CDS) price of Greek sovereign bonds. About two-thirds of this increase is driven by direct exposure to deteriorating fundamentals, and the remainder due to strategic complementarities. We find that depositors need to be offered annualized returns exceeding 50% to remain in the bank during episodes of high uncertainty. Our findings provide new insights into the design of interventions that prevent runs by targeting depositors with the largest propensity to withdraw.
papers.zh_title: 一刀切并不适用：不确定性时期异质性存款人的补偿
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一种新方法，用于识别不确定性时期不同类别的存款人，并量化他们留在银行所需的补偿。我们分离了因流动性需求、基本面恶化以及对其他存款人提款行为的预期所导致的提款。我们利用定期存款到期时间在意外不确定性事件周围产生的提款成本变化，以及一家大型希腊银行的高频微观数据。在政策不确定性冲击使希腊主权债券的短期信用违约互换价格翻倍后，存款提款增加了四倍。这一增长中约三分之二由对基本面恶化的直接暴露驱动，其余部分则源于策略互补性。我们发现，在高不确定性时期，存款人需要获得超过50%的年化回报率才能留在银行。我们的发现为设计针对具有最大提款倾向的存款人的干预措施以防止银行挤兑提供了新见解。

papers.title: The Slaughter of the Bison and Reversal of Fortunes on the Great Plains
papers.authors: Donn. L. Feir, Rob Gillezeau, Maggie E.C. Jones
papers.abstract: In the late nineteenth century, the North American bison was brought to the brink of extinction in just over a decade. We demonstrate that the loss of the bison had immediate, negative consequences for the Native Americans who relied on them and ultimately resulted in a permanent reversal of fortunes. Once amongst the tallest people in the world, the generations of bison-reliant people born after the slaughter lost their entire height advantage. By the early twentieth century, child mortality was 16 percentage points higher and the probability of reporting an occupation 29.7 percentage points lower in bison nations compared to nations that were never reliant on the bison. Throughout the latter half of the twentieth century and into the present, income per capita has remained 28 percent lower, on average, for bison nations. This persistent gap cannot be explained by differences in agricultural productivity, self-governance, or application of the Dawes Act. We provide evidence that this historical shock altered the dynamic path of development for formerly bison-reliant nations. We demonstrate that limited access to credit constrained the ability of bison nations to adjust through respecialization and migration.
papers.zh_title: 野牛屠杀与大平原地区的命运逆转
papers.zh_abstract: 在19世纪末，北美野牛在短短十多年间濒临灭绝。我们证明，野牛的丧失对依赖它们的原住民产生了直接的负面后果，并最终导致了命运的永久逆转。曾经是世界上最高的人群之一，在屠杀后出生的依赖野牛的一代人完全失去了身高优势。到20世纪初，与从未依赖野牛的民族相比，野牛民族中儿童死亡率高出16个百分点，报告职业的概率低29.7个百分点。在20世纪下半叶直至现在，野牛民族的人均收入平均仍低28%。这一持续差距无法用农业生产力、自治或道斯法案的实施差异来解释。我们提供的证据表明，这一历史冲击改变了原先依赖野牛民族的发展动态路径。我们证明，有限的信贷获取限制了野牛民族通过重新专业化和迁移进行调整的能力。

papers.title: Trickle-Down Effects of Affirmative Action: A Case Study in France
papers.authors: José De Sousa, Muriel Niederle
papers.abstract: The introduction of a quota in the French chess Club Championship in 1990, an activity many players engage in next to playing in individual tournaments, provides a quite unique environment to study its effects on three levels. We find that women selected by the quota improve their performance. We show large spillover and trickle-down effects: There are more and better qualified women. International comparisons confirm that the results are unique to France and that there are no substantial adverse effects on French male players. We discuss the properties of this quota and how to implement it in other environments.
papers.zh_title: 平权行动的涓滴效应：法国的案例研究
papers.zh_abstract: 1990年法国国际象棋俱乐部锦标赛引入配额制，这是一项许多棋手在参加个人锦标赛之外参与的活动，为研究其三个层面的影响提供了相当独特的环境。我们发现，通过配额选拔的女性提高了她们的表现。我们展示了巨大的溢出和涓滴效应：有更多且更优秀的女性棋手。国际比较证实，这些结果仅出现在法国，并且对法国男性棋手没有实质性的不利影响。我们讨论了这一配额的性质以及如何在其他环境中实施它。

papers.title: How and When are High-Frequency Stock Returns Predictable?
papers.authors: Yacine Aït-Sahalia, Jianqing Fan, Lirong Xue, Yifeng Zhou
papers.abstract: This paper studies the predictability of ultra high-frequency stock returns and durations to relevant price, volume and transactions events, using machine learning methods. We find that, contrary to low frequency and long horizon returns, where predictability is rare and inconsistent, predictability in high frequency returns and durations is large, systematic and pervasive over short horizons. We identify the relevant predictors constructed from trades and quotes data and examine what determines the variation in predictability across different stock's own characteristics and market environments. Next, we compute how the predictability improves with the timeliness of the data on a scale of milliseconds, providing a valuation of each millisecond gained. Finally, we simulate the impact of getting an (imperfect) peek at the incoming order flow, a look ahead ability that is often attributed to the fastest high frequency traders, in terms of improving the predictability of the following returns and durations.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：C45, C53, C58, G12, G14, G17
papers.zh_title: 高频股票收益在何时以及如何可预测？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用机器学习方法，研究了超高频股票收益以及到相关价格、成交量和交易事件持续时间的可预测性。我们发现，与低频和长期收益中可预测性罕见且不一致相反，高频收益和持续时间的可预测性在短期是显著的、系统性的且普遍的。我们识别了从交易和报价数据构建的相关预测因子，并考察了不同股票自身特征和市场环境中可预测性变化的决定因素。接下来，我们计算了可预测性如何随着数据在毫秒级别上的及时性而改善，从而为每获得一毫秒提供估值。最后，我们模拟了（不完美地）窥视即将到来的订单流（一种常被归因于最快高频交易者的前瞻能力）对提高后续收益和持续时间可预测性的影响。

papers.title: Estimating Labor Market Power
papers.authors: José A. Azar, Steven T. Berry, Ioana Marinescu
papers.abstract: Job differentiation gives employers market power, allowing them to pay workers less than their marginal productivity. We estimate a differentiated jobs model using application data from Careerbuilder.com. We find direct evidence of substantial job differentiation. Without the use of instruments for wages, job applications appear very inelastic with respect to wages. Plausible instruments produce elastic firm-level application supply curves. Under some assumptions, the implied market level labor supply elasticity is 0.5, while the firm level labor elasticity is 4.8. This suggests that workers may produce 21% more than their wage level, consistent with significant monopsony power.
papers.zh_title: 估算劳动力市场势力
papers.zh_abstract: 工作差异化赋予雇主市场势力，使他们能够支付给工人低于其边际生产力的工资。我们使用来自CareerBuilder.com的申请数据估计了一个差异化工作模型。我们发现了工作差异化的直接证据。在没有使用工资工具变量的情况下，工作申请对工资显得非常缺乏弹性。合理的工具变量产生了有弹性的企业层面申请供给曲线。在某些假设下，隐含的市场层面劳动力供给弹性为0.5，而企业层面劳动力弹性为4.8。这表明工人可能比其工资水平多生产21%，这与显著的买方垄断势力一致。

papers.title: What Makes a Program Good? Evidence from Short-Cycle Higher Education Programs in Five Developing Countries
papers.authors: Lelys I. Dinarte Diaz, Maria Marta Ferreyra, Sergio S. Urzúa, Marina Bassi
papers.abstract: Short-cycle higher education programs (SCPs) can play a central role in skill development and higher education expansion, yet their quality varies greatly within and among countries. In this paper we explore the relationship between programs’ practices and inputs (quality determinants) and student academic and labor market outcomes. We design and conduct a novel survey to collect program-level information on quality determinants and average outcomes for Brazil, Colombia, Dominican Republic, Ecuador, and Peru. Categories of quality determinants include training and curriculum, infrastructure, faculty, link with productive sector, costs and funding, and other practices on student admission and institutional governance. We also collect administrative, student-level data on higher education and formal employment for SCP students in Brazil and Ecuador and match it to survey data. Using machine learning methods, we select the quality determinants that predict outcomes at the program and student levels. Estimates indicate that some quality determinants may favor academic and labor market outcomes while others may hinder them. Two practices predict improvements in all labor market outcomes in Brazil and Ecuador—teaching numerical competencies and providing job market information—and one practice—teaching numerical competencies—additionally predicts improvements in labor market outcomes for all survey countries. Since quality determinants account for 20-40 percent of the explained variation in student-level outcomes, estimates indicate a role for quality determinants to shrink the quality gap among programs. These findings have implications for the design and replication of high-quality SCPs, their regulation, and the development of information systems.
papers.zh_title: 什么造就了一个好项目？来自五个发展中国家短期高等教育项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 短期高等教育项目可以在技能发展和高等教育扩张中发挥核心作用，但其质量在国家内部和国家之间差异很大。在本文中，我们探讨了项目的实践和投入（质量决定因素）与学生学业和劳动力市场结果之间的关系。我们设计并实施了一项新颖的调查，以收集巴西、哥伦比亚、多米尼加共和国、厄瓜多尔和秘鲁的项目层面质量决定因素和平均结果信息。质量决定因素的类别包括培训与课程、基础设施、师资、与生产部门的联系、成本与资金，以及学生录取和机构治理的其他实践。我们还收集了巴西和厄瓜多尔短期高等教育项目学生的高等教育和正规就业的行政层面学生数据，并将其与调查数据匹配。使用机器学习方法，我们选择了在项目和学生层面预测结果的质量决定因素。估计表明，一些质量决定因素可能有利于学业和劳动力市场结果，而另一些则可能阻碍它们。在巴西和厄瓜多尔，两种实践预测了所有劳动力市场结果的改善——教授数字能力和提供就业市场信息——而一种实践（教授数字能力）还额外预测了所有调查国家劳动力市场结果的改善。由于质量决定因素解释了学生层面结果变异的20-40%，估计表明质量决定因素在缩小项目间质量差距方面发挥作用。这些发现对高质量短期高等教育项目的设计和复制、其监管以及信息系统的开发具有启示意义。

papers.title: Stress, Ethnicity, and Prosocial Behavior
papers.authors: Johannes Haushofer, Sara Lowes, Abednego Musau, David M. Ndetei, Nathan Nunn, Moritz Poll, Nancy Qian
papers.abstract: While observational evidence suggests that people behave more prosocially towards members of their own ethnic group, many laboratory studies fail to find this effect. One possible explanation is that coethnic preference only emerges during times of stress. To test this hypothesis, we pharmacologically increase levels of the stress hormone cortisol, after which participants complete laboratory experiments with coethnics and noncoethnics. We find mixed evidence that increased cortisol decreases prosocial behavior. Coethnic preferences do not vary with cortisol. However, in contrast to previous studies, we find strong and robust evidence of coethnic preference.
papers.zh_title: 压力、种族与亲社会行为
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然观察性证据表明，人们对自己种族群体的成员表现出更多的亲社会行为，但许多实验室研究未能发现这种效应。一种可能的解释是，同族偏好仅在压力时期出现。为检验这一假设，我们通过药理学方法提高压力激素皮质醇的水平，之后参与者与同族和异族成员一起完成实验室实验。我们发现，皮质醇增加会减少亲社会行为的证据不一。同族偏好不随皮质醇水平变化。然而，与以往研究相反，我们发现了强烈且稳健的同族偏好证据。

papers.title: Of Academics and Creative Destruction: Startup Advantage in the Process of Innovation
papers.authors: Julian Kolev, Alexis Haughey, Fiona Murray, Scott Stern
papers.abstract: What is the role of startups within the innovation ecosystem? Since 2000, startups have grown in their share of commercializing research from top U.S. universities; however, prior work has little to say on the particular advantages of startup ventures in the innovation process relative to more traditional alternatives such as academia and established private-sector incumbents. We develop a simple model of startup advantage based on private information held by the initial inventor, and generate predictions related to the value and impact of startup innovation. We then explore these predictions using patents granted within the regional ecosystems of top-25 research universities from 2000 to 2015. Our results show a significant startup advantage in terms of forward citations and outlier-patent rates. Further, startup innovation is both more original and more general than innovation by incumbent firms. Moreover, startups that survive to become “scale-ups” quickly grow to dominate their regional innovation ecosystems. Our findings have important implications for innovation policy.
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：L24, L26, M13, O31, O32, O34
papers.zh_title: 学术与创造性破坏：初创企业在创新过程中的优势
papers.zh_abstract: 初创企业在创新生态系统中扮演什么角色？自2000年以来，初创企业在商业化美国顶尖大学研究成果中所占份额有所增长；然而，先前的研究很少论及初创企业在创新过程中相对于更传统的替代方案（如学术界和成熟的私营部门在位企业）所具有的特定优势。我们基于初始发明人持有的私人信息，构建了一个简单的初创企业优势模型，并生成了与初创企业创新的价值和影响相关的预测。然后，我们利用2000年至2015年间美国排名前25的研究型大学区域生态系统内授权的专利来探索这些预测。我们的结果显示，在向前引用和异常专利率方面，初创企业具有显著优势。此外，与在位企业的创新相比，初创企业的创新更具原创性和通用性。而且，那些存活下来并成长为“规模化企业”的初创企业，会迅速主导其区域创新生态系统。我们的发现对创新政策具有重要启示。

papers.title: Does Environmental Policy Uncertainty Hinder Investments Towards a Low-Carbon Economy?
papers.authors: Joelle Noailly, Laura Nowzohour, Matthias van den Heuvel
papers.abstract: We use machine learning algorithms to construct a novel news-based index of US environmental and climate policy uncertainty (EnvPU) available on a monthly basis over the 1990-2019 period. We find that our EnvPU index spikes during the environmental spending disputes of the 1995-1996 government shutdown, in the early 2010s due the failure of the national cap-and-trade climate bill and during the Trump presidency. We examine how elevated levels of environmental policy uncertainty relate to investments in the low-carbon economy. In firm-level estimations, we find that a rise in the EnvPU index is associated with a reduced probability for cleantech startups to receive venture capital (VC) funding. In financial markets, a rise in our EnvPU index is associated with higher stock volatility for firms with above-average green revenue shares. At the macro level, shocks in our index lead to declines in the number of cleantech VC deals and higher volatility of the main benchmark clean energy exchange-traded fund. Overall, our results are consistent with the notion that policy uncertainty has adverse effects on investments for the low-carbon economy.
papers.zh_title: 环境政策不确定性是否会阻碍对低碳经济的投资？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用机器学习算法构建了一个基于新闻的美国环境和气候政策不确定性指数（EnvPU），该指数在1990年至2019年期间按月提供。我们发现，我们的EnvPU指数在1995-1996年政府停摆期间的环境支出争议、2010年代初因全国性总量控制与交易气候法案失败以及特朗普总统任期内出现飙升。我们考察了环境政策不确定性水平升高与低碳经济投资之间的关系。在企业层面的估计中，我们发现EnvPU指数的上升与清洁技术初创企业获得风险投资（VC）融资的概率降低相关。在金融市场中，我们的EnvPU指数上升与绿色收入份额高于平均水平的公司股票波动性增加相关。在宏观层面，我们指数的冲击导致清洁技术风险投资交易数量下降，以及主要基准清洁能源交易所交易基金的波动性增加。总体而言，我们的结果与政策不确定性对低碳经济投资产生不利影响的观点一致。

papers.title: Do Collusive Norms Maximize Profits? Evidence from a Vegetable Market Experiment in India
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Greg Fischer, Dean Karlan, Matt Lowe, Benjamin N. Roth
papers.abstract: Social norms have been shown to facilitate anti-competitive behavior in decentralized markets. We demonstrate these norms can also reduce aggregate profits. First, we present descriptive evidence of competition-suppressing norms in Kolkata vegetable markets. We then report on a market-level experiment in which we induced a temporary relaxation of these norms by subsidizing some vendors to sell additional produce. Our intervention raised profits at the market level by over 60%, excluding the subsidy. Nevertheless, after the subsidy ended vendors largely stopped selling the additional produce. Our results suggest anti-competitive norms may partially explain the pervasiveness of small-scale firms in developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 合谋规范能最大化利润吗？来自印度蔬菜市场实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 社会规范已被证明会助长分散市场中的反竞争行为。我们证明这些规范也可能降低总利润。首先，我们提供了加尔各答蔬菜市场中抑制竞争规范的描述性证据。接着，我们报告了一项市场层面的实验，在该实验中，我们通过补贴部分供应商销售额外产品，诱导这些规范暂时放松。我们的干预措施使市场层面的利润提高了60%以上（不包括补贴）。然而，补贴结束后，供应商大多停止了额外产品的销售。我们的结果表明，反竞争规范可能部分解释了发展中国家小规模企业普遍存在的原因。

papers.title: Everybody’s Talkin’ at Me: Levels of Majority Language Acquisition by Minority Language Speakers
papers.authors: William Brock, Bo Chen, Steven N. Durlauf, Shlomo Weber
papers.abstract: Immigrants in economies with a dominant native language exhibit substantial heterogeneities in language acquisition of the majority language. We model partial equilibrium language acquisition as an equilibrium phenomenon. We consider an environment where heterogeneous agents from various minority groups choose whether to acquire a majority language fully, partially, or not at all. Different acquisition decisions confer different communicative benefits and incur different costs. We offer an equilibrium characterization of language acquisition strategies and find that partial acquisition can arise as an equilibrium behavior. We also show that a language equilibrium may exhibit insufficient learning relative to the social optimum. In addition, we provide a local stability analysis of steady state language equilibria. Finally, we discuss econometric implementation of the language acquisition model and establish identification conditions.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS；JEL：C72, D61, J15, Z13
papers.zh_title: 人人都在对我说话：少数语言使用者对多数语言的习得水平
papers.zh_abstract: 在拥有主导性母语的经济体中，移民在多数语言习得方面表现出显著的异质性。我们将局部均衡的语言习得建模为一种均衡现象。我们考虑一个环境，其中来自不同少数群体的异质性主体选择完全、部分或完全不习得多数语言。不同的习得决策带来不同的沟通收益并产生不同的成本。我们提供了语言习得策略的均衡特征描述，并发现部分习得可以作为均衡行为出现。我们还表明，相对于社会最优水平，语言均衡可能表现出学习不足。此外，我们提供了稳态语言均衡的局部稳定性分析。最后，我们讨论了语言习得模型的计量经济学实现，并建立了识别条件。

papers.title: Infinite Debt Rollover in Stochastic Economies
papers.authors: Narayana R. Kocherlakota
papers.abstract: This paper shows that there is more scope for a borrower to engage in a sustainable infinite debt rollover (a “Ponzi scheme”) when interest/growth rates are stochastic. In this context, I prove that the relevant “r vs. g” comparison uses the yield r_{long} to an infinite-maturity zero-coupon bond. I show that r_{long} is lower than the (risk-neutral) expectation of the short-term yield when it is variable, and that r_{long} is close to the minimal realization of the short-term yield when it is highly persistent. The paper applies these results to illustrative heterogeneous agent dynamic stochastic general equilibrium models to obtain weak sufficient conditions for the existence of public debt bubbles.
papers.zh_title: 随机经济中的无限债务展期
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，当利率/增长率随机时，借款人进行可持续无限债务展期（“庞氏骗局”）的空间更大。在此背景下，我证明相关的“r与g”比较使用的是无限期零息债券的收益率r_long。我表明，当短期收益率可变时，r_long低于其（风险中性）预期，并且当短期收益率高度持久时，r_long接近其最小实现值。本文将这些结果应用于说明性的异质性主体动态随机一般均衡模型，以获得公共债务泡沫存在的弱充分条件。

papers.title: Industry Choice and within Industry Earnings Effects of Career and Technical Education
papers.authors: Eric Brunner, Shaun Dougherty, Stephen Ross
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of attending stand-alone technical high schools on industry of employment and within industry earnings premiums among students that applied to the Connecticut Technical Education and Career System (CTECS). Regression discontinuity estimates suggest that admission shifts male students towards working in higher paying industries, broadly defined, that align with CTECS programs of study but has a much more modest impact on female students. Surprisingly, industry earnings premiums are similar and sometimes larger for female students in traditionally male dominated industries like manufacturing and construction. Both male and female students are also more likely to work in specific industries that have a close occupational match to CTECS programs, and this match helps explain a substantial portion of the CTECS earnings premium for males in manufacturing and construction. Finally, male students admitted to a CTECS school who do not initially place in higher paying industries are more likely to transition into higher paying industries over time, and as a result, eventually experience these earnings premiums.
papers.zh_title: 职业与技术教育的行业选择及行业内收入效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了就读独立技术高中对申请康涅狄格技术教育与职业系统（CTECS）的学生在就业行业以及行业内收入溢价方面的影响。断点回归估计表明，入学促使男生转向与CTECS学习项目相符的、广义上收入更高的行业，但对女生的影响则小得多。令人惊讶的是，在制造业和建筑业等传统上由男性主导的行业中，女生的行业收入溢价相似，有时甚至更大。男生和女生也更有可能在与CTECS项目职业匹配度高的特定行业工作，这种匹配有助于解释CTECS在制造业和建筑业中对男生的收入溢价中的很大一部分。最后，被CTECS学校录取但最初未进入高收入行业的男生，随着时间的推移更有可能转向高收入行业，并最终获得这些收入溢价。

papers.title: Welfare Reform and the Quality of Young Children's Home Environments
papers.authors: Ariel Kalil, Hope Corman, Dhaval M. Dave, Ofira Schwartz-Soicher, Nancy Reichman
papers.abstract: This study investigates effects of welfare reform in the U.S., a major policy shift that increased employment of low-income mothers and reliance on their own earnings instead of cash assistance through the welfare system, on the quality of the home environments they provide for their preschool-age children. Using empirical methods designed to identify plausibly causal effects, we estimate effects of welfare reform on validated survey and observational measures of maternal behaviors that support children’s cognitive skills and emotional adjustment and material goods that parents purchase to stimulate their children’s skill development. The results suggest that welfare reform did not affect the amount of time and material resources mothers devoted to cognitively stimulating activities with their young children but was significantly associated with approximately 0.3–0.4 standard deviation lower scores on provision of emotional support, with stronger effects for mothers with low human capital. The findings provide evidence that maternal work incentives as implemented by welfare reform came at a cost to children in the form of lower quality parenting and underscore the importance of considering quality, and not just quantity, in assessing the effects of maternal work incentive policies on parenting and children’s home environments.
papers.zh_title: 福利改革与幼儿家庭环境质量
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了美国福利改革的影响——这是一项重大的政策转变，增加了低收入母亲的就业，并使其更多依赖自身收入而非福利系统的现金援助——对她们为学龄前儿童提供的家庭环境质量的影响。使用旨在识别合理因果效应的实证方法，我们估计了福利改革对经过验证的调查和观察性测量的影响，这些测量涉及支持儿童认知技能和情绪调整的母亲行为，以及父母为刺激子女技能发展而购买的物质商品。结果表明，福利改革并未影响母亲投入在幼儿认知刺激活动上的时间和物质资源，但与情感支持提供得分显著降低约0.3-0.4个标准差相关，对人力资本较低的母亲影响更强。这些发现提供了证据，表明福利改革所实施的母亲工作激励以降低育儿质量为代价，并强调了在评估母亲工作激励政策对育儿和儿童家庭环境影响时，考虑质量而不仅仅是数量的重要性。

papers.title: The Impacts of Crises on the Trilemma Configurations
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Menzie D. Chinn, Hiro Ito
papers.abstract: The “monetary trilemma” – the hypothesis that full monetary policy autonomy, exchange rate stability, and financial openness cannot simultaneously be achieved – has long been studied. Recently, holding international reserves (IR) has become an important policy instrument, insuring against liquidity shortages. We find that countries’ policy mixes are diverse, and have varied over time, sometimes in response to crises. We illustrate how the policy combinations changed drastically after the Asian Financial Crisis (AFC). In contrast, the Global Financial Crisis did not lead to a drastic change in the policy arrangements. We find that countries that faced large terms of trade shocks or negative economic growth during the crisis increased IR holding, post-AFC. Countries that had negative growth during the crisis also tended to pursue greater exchange rate flexibility and financial openness. This finding is true for commodity, but not manufactured goods, exporters. Countries with large current account deficits tend to be more sensitive to economic growth at the time of the AFC. Countries that are under IMF stabilization programs or those with sovereign wealth funds tended to hold more IR. In general, countries increased their IR holdings after the GFC, but did not otherwise respond concurrently to crisis conditions.
papers.zh_title: 危机对三难困境配置的影响
papers.zh_abstract: “货币三难困境”——即完全的货币政策自主权、汇率稳定和金融开放无法同时实现的假设——长期以来一直受到研究。最近，持有国际储备（IR）已成为一种重要的政策工具，用于防范流动性短缺。我们发现各国的政策组合是多样化的，并且随时间而变化，有时是对危机的反应。我们说明了在亚洲金融危机（AFC）之后，政策组合如何发生了剧烈变化。相比之下，全球金融危机并未导致政策安排发生剧烈变化。我们发现，在危机期间面临巨大贸易条件冲击或经济负增长的国家，在AFC后增加了IR持有量。在危机期间出现负增长的国家也倾向于追求更大的汇率灵活性和金融开放。这一发现对商品出口国成立，但对制成品出口国不成立。经常账户赤字大的国家在AFC时期往往对经济增长更为敏感。处于国际货币基金组织稳定计划下或拥有主权财富基金的国家倾向于持有更多IR。总体而言，各国在GFC后增加了IR持有量，但并未同时对危机状况做出其他反应。

papers.title: A Helping Hand Goes a Long Way: Long-Term Effects of Counselling and Support to Workfare Program Participants
papers.authors: Gustavo J. Bobonis, Aneta Bonikowska, Philip Oreopoulos, W. Craig Riddell, Steven P. Ryan
papers.abstract: We study the medium- and long-run impacts of the Canada Self-Sufficiency Project (SSP) Plus program, which randomly offered intensive employment support services for up to three years to long-term welfare recipients eligible for temporary earnings subsidies. We examine whether this intervention—designed to address both economic and psychosocial barriers to finding and retaining desirable employment—produced long-run changes in individuals’ socioeconomic trajectories. We link study participants to high-frequency survey data and to their federal tax and employer-employee matched records for up to 20 years following random assignment. The intensive services treatment resulted in a 20–27 percent increase in participants’ annual earnings over the 20-year period and sustained increases in full-time employment during the first decade post-intervention. As potential mechanisms, treated individuals engaged in more job search and job-to-job transitions and secured employment in higher-wage jobs and at higher-paying firms.
papers.zh_title: 援手助长远：对工作福利计划参与者的咨询与支持的长期效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了加拿大自给自足项目（SSP）Plus计划的中长期影响，该计划随机向有资格获得临时收入补贴的长期福利领取者提供长达三年的密集就业支持服务。我们考察了这种旨在解决寻找和保持理想就业的经济和心理社会障碍的干预措施，是否在长期内改变了个人的社会经济轨迹。我们将研究参与者与高频调查数据以及随机分配后长达20年的联邦税收和雇主-雇员匹配记录联系起来。密集服务处理导致参与者在20年期间的年收入增加20-27%，并在干预后的第一个十年内持续增加全职就业。作为潜在机制，接受处理的个体进行了更多的求职和工作转换，并在工资更高的工作和薪酬更高的公司获得了就业。

papers.title: The Effect of College and University Endowments on Financial Aid, Admissions, and Student Composition
papers.authors: George Bulman
papers.abstract: This paper examines how private college and university endowments affect financial aid, admissions selectivity, and the economic and racial composition of incoming students. Because endowment levels are a function of expenditures and alumni giving, which are endogenous to the outcomes of interest, the design exploits changes in endowments stemming from variation in investment returns over time and across peer institutions. Estimates reveal that growing endowments generate large and persistent increases in spending overall and for instruction, student services, and administration in particular. However, wealthier colleges and universities do not increase the number of students they serve or the fraction of students receiving aid, and only modestly increase the generosity of aid packages. Instead, these institutions offset higher freshman yield rates by becoming more selective and enrolling fewer low-income students and students of color. Overall, colleges and universities appear to use greater endowment wealth to increase spending and to become more selective, resulting in higher institutional rankings, but do not increase the size or diversity of their student bodies. The results are important in light of the preferential tax treatment of endowments and interest in increasing access to elite postsecondary education for underserved populations.
papers.zh_title: 学院和大学捐赠基金对助学金、招生和学生构成的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了私立学院和大学的捐赠基金如何影响助学金、招生选择性以及入学学生的经济和种族构成。由于捐赠基金水平是支出和校友捐赠的函数，而这些支出和捐赠与所关注的结果是内生的，因此设计利用了因投资回报随时间变化以及同行机构间差异而产生的捐赠基金变动。估计显示，捐赠基金的增长总体上带来了支出的持续大幅增加，特别是在教学、学生服务和行政管理方面。然而，更富裕的学院和大学并没有增加他们服务的学生数量或接受资助的学生比例，只是适度增加了资助包的慷慨程度。相反，这些机构通过提高选择性、招收更少的低收入学生和有色人种学生来抵消更高的新生报到率。总体而言，学院和大学似乎利用更大的捐赠财富来增加支出并变得更具选择性，从而提高了机构排名，但并未增加学生群体的规模或多样性。鉴于捐赠基金享有优惠税收待遇以及增加弱势群体获得精英高等教育机会的兴趣，这些结果具有重要意义。

papers.title: Investing in Lending Technology: IT Spending in Banking
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Sheila Jiang, Douglas Xu, Xiao Yin
papers.abstract: Banks’ lending technology hinges on their handling of soft and hard information in dealing with different types of credit demand. Through assembling a novel dataset on banks’ investment in information technologies (IT), this paper provides concrete empirical evidence on how banks adapt their lending technologies. We find investment in communication IT is associated with improving banks’ ability to produce and transmit soft information, while investment in software IT helps enhance banks’ hard information processing capacity. We exploit policies that affect geographic regions differentially to show causally that banks respond to an increased demand for small business credit (mortgage refinance) by increasing their spending on communication (software) IT spending. We also find that the entry of fintech induces commercial banks to increase their investment in IT—more so in the software IT category.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, PR；JEL：G21, G51, O12, O32
papers.zh_title: 投资于贷款技术：银行业的IT支出
papers.zh_abstract: 银行的贷款技术取决于它们在处理不同类型信贷需求时对软信息和硬信息的运用。通过汇编关于银行信息技术（IT）投资的新数据集，本文提供了银行如何调整其贷款技术的具体实证证据。我们发现，通信IT投资与提高银行生产和传递软信息的能力相关，而软件IT投资有助于增强银行的硬信息处理能力。我们利用对不同地理区域产生不同影响的政策，因果性地表明，银行通过增加通信（软件）IT支出来应对小企业信贷（抵押贷款再融资）需求的增加。我们还发现，金融科技公司的进入促使商业银行增加IT投资——尤其是在软件IT类别中。

papers.title: Free-Riding Yankees: Canada and the Panama Canal
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Luis F. Jaramillo, Mateo Uribe-Castro
papers.abstract: We study the impact of the Panama Canal on the development of Canada’s manufacturing sector from 1900 to 1939. Using newly digitized county-level data from the Census of Manufactures and a market-access approach, we exploit the plausibly exogenous nature of this historical episode to study how changes in transportation costs influence the process of structural transformation and manufacturing productivity. Our reduced-form estimates show that lowered shipping costs increased manufacturing employment as a share of the population by increasing the number of manufacturing establishments, though not their average size, capital intensity, or skilled labor share. Manufacturing revenues grew 9% more in counties with market access gains at the 75th percentile, compared to counties with 25th percentile gains. Productivity grew by 13% more. These effects persist when we consider general equilibrium effects: the closure of the Canal in 1939 would result in economic losses equivalent to 1.86% of GDP, chiefly as a by-product of the restriction of the country’s access to international markets. Altogether, these results suggest that the Canal substantially altered the economic geography of the Western Hemisphere in the first half of the twentieth century.
papers.zh_title: 搭便车的美国人：加拿大与巴拿马运河
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1900年至1939年间巴拿马运河对加拿大制造业发展的影响。利用新数字化的县级制造业普查数据以及市场准入方法，我们借助这一历史事件看似外生的特性，探讨运输成本变化如何影响结构转型过程和制造业生产率。我们的简化形式估计表明，降低的运输成本通过增加制造业企业数量提高了制造业就业人口占比，但并未影响企业的平均规模、资本密集度或熟练劳动力份额。与市场准入收益处于第25百分位的县相比，处于第75百分位的县的制造业收入增长了9%，生产率增长了13%。当我们考虑一般均衡效应时，这些影响依然存在：1939年运河关闭将导致相当于GDP 1.86%的经济损失，这主要是该国进入国际市场受到限制的副产品。总体而言，这些结果表明，巴拿马运河在20世纪上半叶显著改变了西半球的经济地理格局。

papers.title: Growth Elasticities of Poverty Reduction
papers.authors: Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: Thirty years ago, Nanak Kakwani provided elegant nonparametric formulae for the point elasticities of measures of poverty with respect to changes in the mean of the distribution of income, thus analytically linking the poverty measures to key macroeconomic aggregates. Numerous insights are found in Kakwani’s elasticities. However, the literature on poverty and growth since then has revealed that the impacts of economic growth on poverty, as observed in practice, can be substantially lower than suggested by Kakwani’s elasticities; the reasons include rising inequality, measurement errors, discrepancies between surveys and national accounts, and changing ideas about what “poverty” means in specific contexts. Nor should Kakwani’s elasticities be treated as structural parameters. Rather, they can vary over time and place, and in systematic ways that merit closer attention.
papers.zh_title: 减贫的增长弹性
papers.zh_abstract: 三十年前，Nanak Kakwani提供了优雅的非参数公式，用于计算贫困度量相对于收入分配均值变化的点弹性，从而将贫困度量与关键宏观经济总量分析性地联系起来。Kakwani的弹性中蕴含了众多洞见。然而，自那以来的贫困与增长文献表明，实践中观察到的经济增长对贫困的影响可能远低于Kakwani弹性所暗示的水平；原因包括不平等加剧、测量误差、调查与国民账户之间的差异，以及关于“贫困”在特定背景下含义的观念变化。Kakwani的弹性也不应被视为结构参数。相反，它们可能随时间和地点而变化，并且以值得更密切关注的系统性方式变化。

papers.title: Computerized Machine Tools and the Transformation of US Manufacturing
papers.authors: Leah Platt Boustan, Jiwon Choi, David Clingingsmith
papers.abstract: The diffusion of computerized machine tools in the mid-20th century was a pivotal step in the century-long process of factory automation. We build a novel measure of exposure to computer numerical control (CNC) using initial variation in tool types across industries and differential shifts toward CNC by type. Industries more exposed to CNC from 1970-2010 increased labor productivity and reduced production employment. Workers in more exposed labor markets adjusted by shifting from metal to non-metal manufacturing. Union members were shielded from this job loss, and some workers returned to school to retrain.
papers.zh_title: 计算机化机床与美国制造业的转型
papers.zh_abstract: 20世纪中期计算机化机床的普及是长达一个世纪的工厂自动化进程中的关键一步。我们利用各行业初始刀具类型的差异以及不同类型刀具向计算机数控（CNC）转变的差异，构建了一个新的CNC暴露度衡量指标。1970年至2010年间，CNC暴露度更高的行业提高了劳动生产率并减少了生产性就业。在暴露度更高的劳动力市场中，工人通过从金属制造业转向非金属制造业来适应。工会成员免受这种失业的影响，一些工人则重返学校接受再培训。

papers.title: The Steering Incentives of Gatekeepers in the Telecommunications Industry
papers.authors: Brian McManus, Aviv Nevo, Zachary Nolan, Jonathan W. Williams
papers.abstract: We study trade-offs faced by multiple-system operators (MSOs), the gatekeepers in the provision of internet service, when setting prices and quality for internet access and TV service. In response to improvements in over-the-top video (OTT), MSOs choose between accommodating OTT to share in the surplus it provides consumers, or steering consumers towards TV. We augment the standard mixed bundling model to show that in some cases MSOs have incentives to steer consumers towards TV, but that these incentives vary with the available pricing tools. We then estimate the distribution of model parameters using household panel data on subscription choices and internet usage. Our estimates imply that if MSOs can set different prices for different internet content, under many cost circumstances MSOs discount the OTT usage price. Furthermore, we find that the ability to charge prices based on internet usage strengthens the MSOs' incentive to improve OTT quality.
papers.zh_title: 电信行业守门人的引导激励
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了多系统运营商（MSO）——互联网服务提供中的守门人——在设定互联网接入和电视服务的价格与质量时所面临的权衡。为应对OTT视频的改进，MSO选择要么适应OTT以分享其为消费者带来的剩余，要么将消费者引导至电视。我们扩展了标准混合捆绑模型，以表明在某些情况下MSO有激励将消费者引导至电视，但这些激励因可用的定价工具而异。然后，我们利用关于订阅选择和互联网使用的家庭面板数据来估计模型参数的分布。我们的估计表明，如果MSO能够为不同的互联网内容设定不同的价格，在许多成本情况下，MSO会降低OTT使用价格。此外，我们发现，基于互联网使用量收费的能力增强了MSO改善OTT质量的激励。

papers.title: Assessing External Validity in Practice
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Brian Quistorff
papers.abstract: We review, from a practical standpoint, the evolving literature on assessing external validity (EV) of estimated treatment effects. We review existing EV measures, and focus on methods that permit multiple datasets (Hotz et al., 2005). We outline criteria for practical usage, evaluate the existing approaches, and identify a gap in potential methods. Our practical considerations motivate a novel method utilizing the Group Lasso (Yuan and Lin, 2006) to estimate a tractable regression-based model of the conditional average treatment effect (CATE). This approach can perform better when settings have differing covariate distributions and allows for easily extrapolating the average treatment effect to new settings. We apply these measures to a set of identical field experiments upgrading slum dwellings in three different countries (Galiani et al., 2017).
papers.zh_title: 实践中评估外部有效性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从实践角度回顾了关于评估估计处理效应外部有效性（EV）的不断发展的文献。我们回顾了现有的EV度量方法，并重点关注允许使用多个数据集的方法（Hotz等人，2005）。我们概述了实际使用的标准，评估了现有方法，并指出了潜在方法中的空白。我们的实践考量催生了一种新方法，该方法利用Group Lasso（Yuan和Lin，2006）来估计一个易于处理的条件平均处理效应（CATE）的回归模型。当不同设定具有不同的协变量分布时，这种方法可能表现更好，并且允许轻松地将平均处理效应外推到新设定。我们将这些度量应用于一组在三个不同国家（Galiani等人，2017）进行的、旨在升级贫民窟住宅的相同实地实验。

papers.title: Boomerang College Kids: Unemployment, Job Mismatch and Coresidence
papers.authors: Stefania Albanesi, Rania Gihleb, Ning Zhang
papers.abstract: Labor market outcomes for young college graduates have deteriorated substantially in the last twenty five years, and more of them are residing with their parents. The unemployment rate at 23-27 year old for the 1996 college graduation cohort was 9%, whereas it rose to 12% for the 2013 graduation cohort. While only 25% of the 1996 cohort lived with their parents, 31% for the 2013 cohort chose this option. Our hypothesis is that the declining availability of ‘matched jobs’ that require a college degree is a key factor behind these developments. Using a structurally estimated model of child-parent decisions, in which coresidence improves college graduates' quality of job matches, we find that lower matched job arrival rates explain two thirds of the rise in unemployment and coresidence between the 2013 and 1996 graduation cohorts. Rising wage dispersion is also important for the increase in unemployment, while declining parental income, rising student loan balances and higher rental costs only play a marginal role.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D1, E20, J01, J23, J3
papers.zh_title: 回巢的大学生：失业、工作错配与同住
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去二十五年中，年轻大学毕业生的劳动力市场结果显著恶化，更多的人与父母同住。1996年毕业的23-27岁人群失业率为9%，而2013年毕业的人群则升至12%。1996年毕业人群中只有25%与父母同住，而2013年毕业人群中有31%选择了这一选项。我们的假设是，需要大学学位的“匹配工作”机会减少是这些变化背后的关键因素。通过使用一个结构估计的子女-父母决策模型（其中同住改善了大学毕业生的工作匹配质量），我们发现，较低的匹配工作到达率解释了2013年与1996年毕业人群之间失业率和同住率上升的三分之二。工资离散度的上升对失业率的增加也很重要，而父母收入下降、学生贷款余额增加以及租金成本上升仅起边际作用。

papers.title: Top Wealth in America: A Reexamination
papers.authors: Emmanuel Saez, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: Recent estimates of US top wealth shares obtained by capitalizing income tax returns (Saez and Zucman, 2020; Smith, Zidar and Zwick, 2022) are close in both levels and trends except for the top 0.01% where a large discrepancy remains. We examine this difference and, using public data, quantify three main issues in Smith et al. (2022). First, Securities and Exchange Commission data at the shareholder firm level show that billionaires' equity wealth is underestimated by a factor of 2.1. Second, interest-bearing assets at the top are under-estimated by a factor of 1.6, because of an extrapolation from a small and unrepresentative sample of investment funds. We quantify this issue using mandatory filings of US hedge funds. Third, issues involving tiered partnerships and the measurement of business profits suggest that large S-corporations are undervalued by a factor of 1.2 and top-owned partnerships by up to 2.2. After incorporating these results, the top 0.01% wealth share of Smith et al. (2022) is close to the one found in Saez and Zucman (2020) and estimates of US wealth inequality are reconciled.
papers.zh_title: 美国顶级财富：再审视
papers.zh_abstract: 最近通过资本化所得税申报表获得的美国顶级财富份额估计（Saez和Zucman，2020；Smith，Zidar和Zwick，2022）在水平和趋势上都接近，除了前0.01%的群体，其中仍存在巨大差异。我们研究了这一差异，并利用公开数据量化了Smith等人（2022）中的三个主要问题。首先，股东公司层面的证券交易委员会数据显示，亿万富翁的股权财富被低估了2.1倍。其次，顶层的利息资产被低估了1.6倍，这是因为从一个规模小且不具代表性的投资基金样本进行了外推。我们利用美国对冲基金的强制性申报文件量化了这一问题。第三，涉及分层合伙企业和企业利润衡量的问题表明，大型S公司被低估了1.2倍，顶层拥有的合伙企业被低估了高达2.2倍。在纳入这些结果后，Smith等人（2022）中前0.01%的财富份额接近Saez和Zucman（2020）中的发现，美国财富不平等估计得以协调。

papers.title: Popular Personal Financial Advice versus the Professors
papers.authors: James J. Choi
papers.abstract: I survey the advice given by the fifty most popular personal finance books and compare it to the prescriptions of normative academic economic models. Popular advice frequently departs from normative principles derived from economic theory, which should motivate new hypotheses about why households make the financial choices they do, as well as what financial choices households should make. Popular advice is sometimes driven by fallacies, but it tries to take into account the limited willpower individuals have to stick to a financial plan, and its recommended actions are often easily computable by ordinary individuals. I cover advice on savings rates, the advisability of being a wealthy hand-to-mouth consumer, asset allocation, non-mortgage debt management, simultaneous holding of high-interest debt and low-interest savings, and mortgage choices.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP；JEL：D14, D15, G11, G4, G5
papers.zh_title: 流行的个人理财建议与教授们的观点
papers.zh_abstract: 我调查了五十本最受欢迎的个人理财书籍给出的建议，并将其与规范性学术经济模型的处方进行比较。流行的建议经常偏离源于经济理论的规范性原则，这应激发关于家庭为何做出其财务选择以及家庭应做出何种财务选择的新假设。流行的建议有时源于谬误，但它试图考虑个人坚持财务计划的有限意志力，并且其推荐行动通常易于普通人计算。我涵盖的建议涉及储蓄率、成为富裕的手头拮据消费者的可取性、资产配置、非抵押贷款债务管理、同时持有高息债务和低息储蓄以及抵押贷款选择。

papers.title: The Small Open Economy in a Generalized Gravity Model
papers.authors: Svetlana Demidova, Konstantin Kucheryavyy, Takumi Naito, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare
papers.abstract: To provide sharp answers to basic questions in international trade, a standard approach is to focus on a small open economy (SOE). Whereas the classic tradition is to define a SOE as an economy that takes world prices as given, in the new trade literature it is defined instead as one that takes foreign-good prices and export demand schedules as given. We develop a gravity model that nests all its standard microfoundations and show how to take the limit so that an economy that becomes infinitesimally small behaves like a SOE. We then derive comparative statics and optimal policy for the SOE. Ignoring standard tax indeterminacies, optimal policy is characterized by export taxes and import tariffs equal to the (inverse) foreign demand and supply elasticities, respectively, and employment subsidies determined by the scale elasticity (under perfect competition) or markups (under monopolistic competition).
papers.zh_title: 一般化引力模型中的小型开放经济体
papers.zh_abstract: 为了对国际贸易中的基本问题提供清晰的答案，标准方法是聚焦于小型开放经济体（SOE）。经典传统将SOE定义为将世界价格视为给定的经济体，而在新贸易文献中，SOE则被定义为将外国商品价格和出口需求计划视为给定的经济体。我们开发了一个引力模型，该模型包含了所有标准的微观基础，并展示了如何取极限，使得一个变得无穷小的经济体表现得像SOE。然后，我们推导了SOE的比较静态分析和最优政策。忽略标准的税收不确定性，最优政策的特征是出口税和进口关税分别等于（逆）外国需求弹性和供给弹性，以及由规模弹性（在完全竞争下）或加成率（在垄断竞争下）决定的就业补贴。

papers.title: Vote Early and Vote Often? Detecting Electoral Fraud from the Timing of 19th Century Elections
papers.authors: Francesco Ferlenga, Brian G. Knight
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new approach to detecting electoral fraud. Our context involves repeaters, individuals voting in multiple states in the U.S. during 19th Century Congressional Elections. Given high travel times, and the associated difficulties of voting in multiple states on the same day, we exploit the staggered introduction of holding federal elections on the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November (1T1M). The key finding is that county-level turnout rates fell when the closest neighboring state coordinated on 1T1M. This result is consistent with 1T1M adoption making repeating more difficult. In terms of mechanisms, the pattern is stronger in states that had not yet adopted the secret ballot, consistent with the secret ballot itself reducing voter fraud. The pattern is also driven by smaller population counties, consistent with repeaters particularly inflating turnout rates in these places.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D70, H7, P0
papers.zh_title: 早投票与多投票？从19世纪选举时间检测选举舞弊
papers.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种检测选举舞弊的新方法。我们的背景涉及重复投票者，即在美国19世纪国会选举中在多个州投票的个人。鉴于旅行时间长以及在同一天在多个州投票的相关困难，我们利用了联邦选举在11月第一个星期一之后的第一个星期二（1T1M）举行的交错引入。关键发现是，当最近的相邻州协调采用1T1M时，县级投票率下降。这一结果与1T1M的采用使重复投票更加困难相一致。在机制方面，这种模式在尚未采用无记名投票的州更为明显，这与无记名投票本身减少选民舞弊相一致。这种模式也由人口较少的县驱动，这与重复投票者特别抬高了这些地方的投票率相一致。

papers.title: The First Sale Doctrine and the Digital Challenge to Public Libraries
papers.authors: Imke C. Reimers, Joel Waldfogel
papers.abstract: Libraries have traditionally provided free communal access to books, facilitated by the first sale doctrine's (FSD) guarantee that libraries may purchase physical books at consumer prices. Increasingly restrictive ebook access terms may imperil libraries, and we compare the welfare cost of higher ebook prices to the welfare benefit of the FSD's guarantee of low physical book prices for libraries and their patrons. Using data on over 8,000 library systems for 2013-2019, we measure the impacts of physical and electronic holdings on the respective formats' circulation. We then build a structural model of the library market, and we rationalize the status quo book holdings with a librarian utility function that attaches higher weights to electronic circulation. While higher counterfactual ebook prices would induce libraries to substitute physical for electronic holdings, this would have little effect on patron CS because of consumer willingness to substitute. By contrast, higher physical book prices, as would prevail absent the first sale doctrine, reduce CS by almost ten times as much as an analogous ebook price increase.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, IO, LE, PE；JEL：H42, L82, O34
papers.zh_title: 首次销售原则与公共图书馆面临的数字挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 图书馆传统上提供免费的公共图书借阅服务，这得益于首次销售原则（FSD）保证图书馆可以按消费者价格购买实体书。日益严格的电子书访问条款可能危及图书馆，我们比较了更高电子书价格的福利成本与FSD保证图书馆及其读者获得低价实体书的福利收益。利用2013-2019年超过8000个图书馆系统的数据，我们衡量了实体和电子馆藏对各自格式流通量的影响。然后，我们构建了一个图书馆市场的结构模型，并用一个赋予电子流通更高权重的图书馆员效用函数来合理化现状下的图书馆藏。虽然反事实的更高电子书价格会促使图书馆用实体馆藏替代电子馆藏，但由于消费者愿意替代，这对消费者剩余影响很小。相比之下，如果没有首次销售原则，实体书价格会更高，这导致的消费者剩余减少几乎是类似电子书价格上涨的十倍。

papers.title: The Governance of Non-Profits and their Social Impact: Evidence from a Randomized Program in Healthcare in the Democratic Republic of Congo
papers.authors: Anicet Fangwa, Caroline Flammer, Marieke Huysentruyt, Bertrand Quelin
papers.abstract: Substantial funding is provided to the healthcare systems of low-income countries. However, an important challenge is to ensure that this funding be used efficiently. This challenge is complicated by the fact that a large share of healthcare services in low-income countries is provided by non-profit health centers that often lack i) effective governance structures and ii) organizational know-how and adequate training. In this paper, we argue that the bundling of performance-based incentives with auditing and feedback (A&F) is a potential way to overcome these obstacles. First, the combination of feedback and performance-based incentives—that is, feedback joint with incentives to act on this feedback and achieve specific health outcomes—helps address the knowledge gap that may otherwise undermine performance-based incentives. Second, coupling feedback with auditing helps ensure that the information underlying the feedback is reliable—a prerequisite for effective feedback. To examine the effectiveness of this bundle, we use data from a randomized governance program conducted in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Within the program, a set of health centers were randomly assigned to a “governance treatment” that consisted of performance-based incentives combined with A&F, while others were not. Consistent with our prediction, we find that the governance treatment led to i) higher operating efficiency and ii) improvements in health outcomes. Furthermore, we find that funding is not a substitute for the governance treatment—health centers that only receive funding increase their scale, but do not show improvements in operating efficiency nor health outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 非营利组织的治理及其社会影响：来自刚果民主共和国医疗保健随机项目的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 大量资金被提供给低收入国家的医疗保健系统。然而，一个重要挑战是确保这些资金得到有效利用。这一挑战因低收入国家中很大一部分医疗服务由非营利性医疗中心提供而变得复杂，这些中心通常缺乏有效的治理结构以及组织知识和充分培训。在本文中，我们认为将基于绩效的激励与审计和反馈（A&F）捆绑在一起是克服这些障碍的一种潜在方式。首先，反馈与基于绩效的激励相结合——即反馈与采取行动实现特定健康结果的激励相结合——有助于解决可能削弱基于绩效的激励的知识差距。其次，将反馈与审计相结合有助于确保反馈所依据的信息可靠——这是有效反馈的先决条件。为了检验这种捆绑的有效性，我们使用了来自刚果民主共和国一个随机治理项目的数据。在该项目中，一组医疗中心被随机分配到“治理处理”组，该处理包括基于绩效的激励与A&F相结合，而其他医疗中心则没有。与我们的预测一致，我们发现治理处理导致了更高的运营效率和健康结果的改善。此外，我们发现资金不能替代治理处理——仅获得资金的医疗中心扩大了规模，但在运营效率或健康结果方面没有显示出改善。

papers.title: The Private Provision of Public Services: Evidence from Random Assignment in Medicaid
papers.authors: Danil Agafiev Macambira, Michael Geruso, Anthony Lollo, Chima D. Ndumele, Jacob Wallace
papers.abstract: This paper examines the effects of privatizing social health insurance. We exploit a natural experiment in Medicaid, wherein nearly 100,000 enrollees were randomly assigned between a publicly-operated fee-for-service system and private managed care. Managed care reduced costs by 5.6% via cost-effective substitutions within prescription drugs and via lower prices for outpatient services. We present evidence that pharmacy utilization management was the key mechanism reducing overuse and encouraging substitution to lower-cost drugs without decreasing quality. In contrast, privatizing medical benefits led to only modest savings and was associated with decreased healthcare quality and consumer satisfaction.
papers.zh_title: 公共服务的私人提供：来自医疗补助随机分配的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了社会健康保险私有化的影响。我们利用医疗补助中的一项自然实验，其中近10万名参保者被随机分配到公共运营的按服务收费系统与私人管理式医疗之间。管理式医疗通过处方药中的成本效益替代以及门诊服务的更低价格，将成本降低了5.6%。我们提供的证据表明，药房利用管理是减少过度使用并鼓励转向低成本药物而不降低质量的关键机制。相比之下，医疗福利的私有化仅带来了适度的节省，并且与医疗保健质量和消费者满意度的下降相关。

papers.title: The Impact of Female Teachers on Female Students' Lifetime Well-Being
papers.authors: David Card, Ciprian Domnisoru, Seth G. Sanders, Lowell Taylor, Victoria Udalova
papers.abstract: It is widely believed that female students benefit from being taught by female teachers, particularly when those teachers serve as counter-stereotypical role models. We study education in rural areas of the US circa 1940--a setting in which there were few professional female exemplars other than teachers--and find that female students were more successful when their primary-school teachers were disproportionately female. Impacts are lifelong: female students taught by female teachers were more likely to move up the educational ladder by completing high school and attending college, and had higher lifetime family income and increased longevity.
papers.zh_title: 女教师对女学生终身福祉的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为，女学生受益于女教师的教导，尤其是当这些教师充当反刻板印象的榜样时。我们研究了约1940年美国农村地区的教育——这是一个除了教师之外几乎没有其他职业女性榜样的环境——并发现当女学生的小学教师中女性比例过高时，她们更为成功。这种影响是终身的：由女教师教导的女学生更有可能在教育阶梯上攀升，完成高中并进入大学，并且拥有更高的终身家庭收入和更长的寿命。

papers.title: If You Build it, Will They Vaccinate? The Impact of COVID-19 Vaccine Sites on Vaccination Rates and Outcomes
papers.authors: John Brownstein, Jonathan H. Cantor, Benjamin Rader, Kosali I. Simon, Christopher M. Whaley
papers.abstract: Safe and effective vaccines have vastly reduced the lethality of the COVID-19 pandemic worldwide, but disparities exist in vaccine take-up. Although the out-of-pocket price is set to zero in the U.S., time (information gathering, signing up, transportation and waiting) and misinformation costs still apply. To understand the extent to which geographic access impacts COVID-19 vaccination take-up rates and COVID-19 health outcomes, we leverage exogenous, pre-existing variation in locations of retail pharmacies participating the U.S. federal government’s vaccine distribution program through which over 40% of US vaccine doses were administered. We use unique data on nearly all COVID-19 vaccine administrations in 2021. We find that the presence of a participating retail pharmacy vaccination site in a county leads to an approximately 26% increase in the per-capita number of doses administered, possibly indicating that proximity and familiarity play a substantial role in vaccine take-up decisions. Increases in county-level per capita participating retail pharmacies lead to an increase in COVID-19 vaccination rates and a decline in the number of new COVID-19 cases, hospitalizations, and deaths, with substantial heterogeneity based on county rurality, political leanings, income, and race composition. The relationship we estimate suggests that averting one COVID-19 case, hospitalization, and death requires approximately 25, 200, and 1,500 county-level vaccine total doses, respectively. These results imply a 9,500% to 22,500% economic return on the full costs of COVID-19 vaccination. Overall, our findings add to understanding vaccine take-up decisions for the design of COVID era and other public health interventions.
papers.zh_title: 如果你建了，他们会接种吗？新冠疫苗接种点对接种率和结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 安全有效的疫苗已大幅降低了全球新冠疫情的致死率，但疫苗接种率存在差异。尽管在美国自付价格为零，但时间（信息收集、注册、交通和等待）和错误信息成本仍然存在。为了解地理可及性在多大程度上影响新冠疫苗接种率和健康结果，我们利用了参与美国联邦政府疫苗分发计划的零售药店的现有外生位置差异，该计划承担了美国超过40%的疫苗剂量。我们使用了2021年几乎所有新冠疫苗接种的独特数据。我们发现，一个县内存在参与计划的零售药店接种点，会导致人均接种剂量增加约26%，这可能表明邻近性和熟悉度在疫苗接种决策中起着重要作用。县级人均参与计划的零售药店数量的增加，导致新冠疫苗接种率上升，以及新增新冠病例、住院和死亡人数下降，且这种效应因县的农村程度、政治倾向、收入和种族构成而存在显著异质性。我们估计的关系表明，避免一例新冠病例、住院和死亡分别需要大约25、200和1500剂县级疫苗总剂量。这些结果表明，新冠疫苗接种的全部成本可获得9500%至22500%的经济回报。总体而言，我们的发现增进了对疫苗接种决策的理解，有助于设计新冠时期及其他公共卫生干预措施。

papers.title: Is Secessionism Mostly About Income or Identity? A Global Analysis of 3,003 Subnational Regions
papers.authors: Klaus Desmet, Ignacio Ortuño-Ortín, Ömer Özak
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes whether the propensity to secede by subnational regions responds mostly to differences in income per capita or to distinct identities. We explore this question in a quantitative political economy model where people's willingness to finance a public good depends on their income and identity. Using high-resolution economic and linguistic data for the entire globe, we predict the propensity to secede of 3,003 subnational regions in 173 countries. We validate the model-based predictions with data on secessionist movements, state fragility, regional autonomy, and conflict, as well as with an application to the dissolution of the Soviet Union. Counterfactual analysis strongly suggests that identity trumps income in determining a region's propensity to secede. Removing identity differences reduces the average support for secession from 7.5% to 0.6% of the population.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D70, F02, F52, H77, P00
papers.zh_title: 分离主义主要是关于收入还是身份？对3003个次国家区域的全球分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了次国家区域的分离倾向主要取决于人均收入差异还是不同的身份认同。我们在一个定量政治经济学模型中探讨了这个问题，在该模型中，人们为公共产品提供资金的意愿取决于他们的收入和身份。利用全球的高分辨率经济和语言数据，我们预测了173个国家中3003个次国家区域的分离倾向。我们使用关于分离主义运动、国家脆弱性、区域自治和冲突的数据，以及一个关于苏联解体的应用，来验证基于模型的预测。反事实分析强烈表明，在决定一个区域的分离倾向时，身份认同胜过收入。消除身份差异将使支持分离的人口比例从7.5%降至0.6%。

papers.title: Team Incentives and Lower Ability Workers: A Real-Effort Experiment
papers.authors: Richard B. Freeman, Xiaofei Pan, Xiaolan Yang, Maoliang Ye
papers.abstract: Despite a large literature on team incentives, studies on teams in a purely financial sense are limited. In such environments, team members independently engage in tasks with identifiable individual contributions, while their compensation is partially linked to team outputs. We con-ducted an experiment of such scenario with three distribution schemes (equal sharing, individ-ual piece rate, and winner-takes-all) and examined these schemes both with and without a team threshold. Our results showed the surprising power of equal sharing on improving team produc-tivity compared to winner-takes-all and individual piece-rate, contradicting the predictions of the standard economics theory. Our findings reveal that the higher team output observed under equal sharing was driven by the increased productivity of less able workers. This could be at-tributed to an explanation of guilt aversion and cannot be illuminated by several alternative theories. We also found that participants preferred piece rate over the other schemes. Yet, the presence of a team threshold highlighted the importance of cooperation, leading to a greater preference for equal sharing. Our findings suggest that organizations with workers of varying abilities are likely to benefit from an appropriate equal sharing component tailored to their re-sponsiveness to sharing in rewards.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：C91, C92, D23, J33
papers.zh_title: 团队激励与低能力工人：一项真实努力实验
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管关于团队激励的文献很多，但关于纯粹财务意义上团队的研究有限。在这种环境中，团队成员独立从事任务，个人贡献可识别，而他们的报酬部分与团队产出挂钩。我们针对这种情景进行了一项实验，涉及三种分配方案（平均分配、个人计件工资和赢家通吃），并分别在有和没有团队门槛的情况下检验了这些方案。我们的结果显示了平均分配在提高团队生产力方面相对于赢家通吃和个人计件工资的惊人力量，这与标准经济学理论的预测相矛盾。我们的发现表明，在平均分配下观察到的更高团队产出是由能力较低工人生产力的提高驱动的。这可以归因于内疚厌恶的解释，而几种替代理论无法阐明这一点。我们还发现，参与者更喜欢计件工资而非其他方案。然而，团队门槛的存在凸显了合作的重要性，导致对平均分配的偏好增强。我们的发现表明，拥有不同能力工人的组织很可能受益于根据其对奖励分享的反应性量身定制的适当平均分配成分。

papers.title: Race and Redistribution in the United States: An Experimental Analysis
papers.authors: Jesper Akesson, Robert W. Hahn, Robert D. Metcalfe, Itzhak Rasooly
papers.abstract: Scholars have suggested that White American support for welfare is related to beliefs about the racial composition of welfare recipients. While a host of observational studies lend credence to this view, it has not yet been tested using the tools of randomized inference. In this study, we do this by conducting two incentive-compatible experiments (n = 9,775) in which different participants are randomly given different signals about the share of welfare recipients who identify as Black and White. Our analysis yields four main findings. First, 86% of respondents greatly overestimate the share of welfare recipients who are Black, with the average respondent overestimating this by almost a factor of two. Second, White support for welfare is inversely related to the proportion of welfare recipients who are Black—a causal claim that we establish using treatment assignment as an instrument for beliefs about the racial composition of welfare recipients. Third, just making White participants think about the racial composition of welfare recipients reduces their support for welfare. Fourth, providing White respondents with accurate information about the racial composition of welfare recipients (relative to not receiving any information) does not significantly influence their support for welfare.
papers.zh_title: 美国的种族与再分配：一项实验分析
papers.zh_abstract: 学者们提出，美国白人对福利的支持与他们对福利领取者种族构成的信念有关。虽然大量观察性研究支持这一观点，但尚未使用随机推断工具进行检验。在本研究中，我们通过进行两项激励相容实验（n=9,775）来做到这一点，其中不同的参与者被随机给予关于福利领取者中黑人和白人比例的不同信号。我们的分析得出四个主要发现。首先，86%的受访者大大高估了福利领取者中黑人的比例，平均受访者高估了近两倍。其次，白人对福利的支持与福利领取者中黑人的比例呈负相关——这是一个我们利用处理分配作为福利领取者种族构成信念的工具变量所建立的因果主张。第三，仅仅让白人参与者思考福利领取者的种族构成就会降低他们对福利的支持。第四，向白人受访者提供关于福利领取者种族构成的准确信息（相对于不提供任何信息）并不会显著影响他们对福利的支持。

papers.title: Price Spillovers and Specialization in health Care: The Case of Children's Hospitals
papers.authors: Ian McCarthy, Mehul V. Raval
papers.abstract: Specialty hospitals tend to negotiate higher commercial insurance payments, even for relatively routine procedures with comparable clinical quality across hospital types. How specialty hospitals can maintain such a price premium remains an open question. In this paper, we examine a potential (horizontal) differentiation effect in which patients perceive specialty hospitals as sufficiently distinct from other hospitals, so that specialty hospitals effectively compete in a separate market from general acute care hospitals. We estimate this effect in the context of routine pediatric procedures offered by both specialty children’s hospitals as well as general acute care hospitals, and we find strong empirical evidence of a differentiation effect in which specialty children’s hospitals appear largely immune to competitive forces from non-children’s hospitals.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健中的价格溢出效应与专业化：以儿童医院为例
papers.zh_abstract: 专科医院往往能协商获得更高的商业保险支付，即使是对于临床质量在不同医院类型间可比的相对常规手术也是如此。专科医院如何维持这种价格溢价仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们考察了一种潜在的（横向）差异化效应，即患者认为专科医院与其他医院有显著区别，以至于专科医院实际上在与综合急症护理医院不同的市场中竞争。我们在儿童专科医院和综合急症护理医院都提供的常规儿科手术背景下估计了这一效应，并发现了差异化效应的有力实证证据，即儿童专科医院似乎在很大程度上不受非儿童医院竞争力量的影响。

papers.title: Place Effects and Geographic Inequality in Health at Birth
papers.authors: Eric Chyn, Na'ama Shenhav
papers.abstract: This paper uses birth records from California and mothers who move to quantify the absolute and relative importance of birth location in early-life health. Using a model that includes mother and location fixed effects, we find that moving from a below- to an above-median birth weight location leads to a 19-gram increase in average birth weight. These causal place effects explain 16 percent of geographic variation in birth weight, with family-specific factors accounting for the remaining 84 percent. Place effects are more influential for children of non-college-educated mothers, and are most strongly correlated with local levels of pollution. The improvement in birth weight from moving to a higher-quality area compares favorably to policies that target maternal health, and could have a small, lasting effect on long-run outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, I1, I15, J13, Q53, R23
papers.zh_title: 出生地效应与出生健康的地理不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用加利福尼亚州的出生记录和母亲迁移数据，量化了出生地点对早期生命健康的绝对和相对重要性。通过一个包含母亲固定效应和地点固定效应的模型，我们发现，从出生体重低于中位数的地区迁移到高于中位数的地区，平均出生体重增加19克。这些因果性的地点效应解释了出生体重地理差异的16%，而家庭特定因素则解释了剩余的84%。地点效应对非大学教育母亲的子女影响更大，并且与当地的污染水平相关性最强。与针对孕产妇健康的政策相比，迁移到更高质量地区带来的出生体重改善效果更优，并可能对长期结果产生微小而持久的影响。

papers.title: Blue Spoons: Sparking Communication About Appropriate Technology Use
papers.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Esther Duflo, Michael Kremer, João F. Pugliese, Jonathan Robinson, Frank Schilbach
papers.abstract: An enduring puzzle regarding technology adoption in developing countries is that new technologies often diffuse slowly through the social network. Two of the key predictions of the canonical epidemiological model of technology diffusion are that forums to share information and higher returns to technology should both spur social transmission. We design a large-scale experiment to test these predictions among farmers in Western Kenya, and we fail to find support for either. However, in the same context, we introduce a technology that diffuses very fast: a simple kitchen spoon (painted in blue) to measure out how much fertilizer to use. We develop a model that explains both the failure of the standard approaches and the surprising success of this new technology. The core idea of the model is that not all information is reliable, and farmers are reluctant to develop a reputation of passing along false information. The model and data suggest that there is value in developing simple, transparent technologies to facilitate communication.
papers.zh_title: 蓝色勺子：激发关于适当技术使用的沟通
papers.zh_abstract: 关于发展中国家技术采纳的一个持久谜题是，新技术往往通过社交网络缓慢传播。经典的技术扩散流行病学模型的两个关键预测是，信息共享论坛和更高的技术回报都应能促进社会传播。我们在肯尼亚西部的农民中设计了一项大规模实验来检验这些预测，但未能找到支持任一预测的证据。然而，在同一背景下，我们引入了一种传播非常迅速的技术：一把简单的厨房勺子（涂成蓝色），用于量取化肥用量。我们开发了一个模型，既解释了标准方法的失败，也解释了这种新技术的惊人成功。该模型的核心思想是，并非所有信息都可靠，农民不愿建立传播虚假信息的声誉。模型和数据表明，开发简单、透明的技术以促进沟通具有价值。

papers.title: How Can Asset Prices Value Exchange Rate Wedges?
papers.authors: Karen K. Lewis, Edith Liu
papers.abstract: When available financial securities allow investors to optimally diversify risk across countries, standard theory implies that exchange rates should reflect this behavior. However, exchange rates observed in the data deviate from these predictions. In this paper, we develop a framework to value the welfare costs of these exchange rate wedges, as disciplined by asset returns. This framework applies to a general class of asset pricing and exchange rate models. We further decompose the value of these wedges into components, showing that the ability of goods markets to respond to financial markets through exchange rate adjustment has significant implications for welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：F30, F31, F41, G10, G15
papers.zh_title: 资产价格如何为汇率楔子定价？
papers.zh_abstract: 当可用的金融证券允许投资者在各国间最优地分散风险时，标准理论意味着汇率应反映这种行为。然而，数据中观察到的汇率偏离了这些预测。在本文中，我们开发了一个框架，以资产回报为约束，评估这些汇率楔子的福利成本。该框架适用于一般类别的资产定价和汇率模型。我们进一步将这些楔子的价值分解为各个组成部分，表明商品市场通过汇率调整对金融市场做出反应的能力对福利具有重要影响。

papers.title: The Geography of Job Tasks
papers.authors: Enghin Atalay, Sebastian Sotelo, Daniel I. Tannenbaum
papers.abstract: We introduce new measurement tools to understand the sources of earnings differences across space. Based on the natural language employers use in job vacancy text, we develop granular measures of job tasks and of worker specialization. We find that jobs in larger commuting zones involve greater interpersonal interactions and have higher computer software requirements. Between 10 and 50 percent of task and technology variation between large and small commuting zones exists within occupations. Further, workers in larger markets are more specialized within occupations. Tasks, technologies, and worker specialization account for a substantial portion of the market size premium even within occupations.
papers.zh_title: 工作任务的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了新的测量工具来理解跨地区收入差异的根源。基于雇主在职位空缺文本中使用的自然语言，我们开发了工作任务和工人专业化的精细度量。我们发现，在较大的通勤区，工作涉及更多的人际互动，并且对计算机软件的要求更高。在大型和小型通勤区之间，任务和技术差异的10%到50%存在于职业内部。此外，较大市场的工人在职业内部更加专业化。即使在职业内部，任务、技术和工人专业化也解释了市场规模溢价的很大一部分。

papers.title: Using Administrative Data to Impute Income Non-Response in Household Surveys
papers.authors: V. Kerry Smith, Michael P. Welsh, Richard Carson, Stanley Presser
papers.abstract: Income is simultaneously one of the most important variables used by economists and the variable most likely to be missing due to item non-response. While observations that are missing income responses are often dropped from analyses, such treatment is usually inappropriate. More appropriate solutions rely on imputation based on either covariates (e.g., age and education) measured in the survey or on spatial estimates (most often for zip codes) from the American Community Survey. We describe a new spatially-based alternative using publicly available Internal Revenue Service tax data that allows estimates of zip code’s income distribution.
papers.zh_title: 利用行政数据填补住户调查中的收入无回答
papers.zh_abstract: 收入既是经济学家使用的最重要变量之一，也是最可能因项目无回答而缺失的变量。虽然缺失收入回答的观测值通常被从分析中剔除，但这种处理通常是不恰当的。更合适的解决方案依赖于基于调查中测量的协变量（如年龄和教育）或基于美国社区调查的空间估计（最常见的是邮政编码层面）的插补。我们描述了一种新的基于空间的方法，利用公开可用的美国国税局税收数据，允许估计邮政编码的收入分布。

papers.title: Zoomers and Boomers: Asset Prices and Intergenerational Inequality
papers.authors: Leland Farmer, Roger Farmer
papers.abstract: We construct a perpetual youth DSGE model with aggregate uncertainty in which there are dynamically complete markets and agents have Epstein-Zin preferences. We prove that, when endowments have a realistic hump-shaped age-profile, our model has three steady-state equilibria. One of these equilibria is dynamically inefficient and displays real price indeterminacy. We estimate the parameters of our model and we find that a fourth-order approximation around the indeterminate steady-state provides the best fit to U.S. data. Our work interprets the large and persistent generational inequality that has been observed in western economies over the past century as the result of uninsurable income shocks to birth cohorts.
papers.zh_title: Zoomers与Boomers：资产价格与代际不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个具有总体不确定性的永续青年DSGE模型，其中存在动态完备市场，且代理人具有Epstein-Zin偏好。我们证明，当禀赋具有现实的驼峰形年龄分布时，我们的模型存在三个稳态均衡。其中一个均衡是动态无效率的，并表现出实际价格的不确定性。我们估计了模型的参数，并发现围绕不确定稳态的四阶近似对美国数据提供了最佳拟合。我们的工作将过去一个世纪西方经济体中观察到的大规模且持久的代际不平等解释为出生队列面临的不可保险收入冲击的结果。

papers.title: Foreign Reserves Management and Original Sin
papers.authors: Michael B. Devereux, Steve Pak Yeung Wu
papers.abstract: This paper studies the interaction between foreign exchange reserves and the currency composition of sovereign debt in emerging countries. Focusing on inflation targeting countries, we find that holdings of foreign reserves are associated with higher local currency sovereign debt, an exchange rate which is less sensitive to global shocks, and a lower exchange rate risk premium in local currency sovereign spreads. We rationalize these findings within a financially constrained model of a small open economy. The Sovereign values local currency debt as a hedge against endowment risk, but since the exchange rate tends to depreciate in times of global downturns, risk averse international investors charge an additional currency risk premium on this debt. When a country optimally uses foreign reserves to lean against the wind in response to global shocks, this dampens the response of the exchange rate, providing insurance for the global investor. By reducing the risk premium on local currency debt, foreign exchange reserves therefore facilitate a higher share of local currency debt in the sovereign portfolio. Quantitatively, we find the welfare benefits for the sovereign from optimal foreign reserves management can be very large.
papers.zh_title: 外汇储备管理与原罪
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了新兴国家外汇储备与主权债务货币构成之间的相互作用。聚焦于通胀目标制国家，我们发现，外汇储备持有量与更高的本币主权债务、对全球冲击敏感度较低的汇率以及本币主权利差中较低的汇率风险溢价相关。我们在一个金融约束的小型开放经济模型中合理化了这些发现。主权国家将本币债务视为对冲禀赋风险的工具，但由于汇率在全球经济低迷时期倾向于贬值，风险规避的国际投资者对此类债务收取额外的货币风险溢价。当一个国家最优地利用外汇储备来应对全球冲击时，这会抑制汇率的反应，从而为全球投资者提供保险。通过降低本币债务的风险溢价，外汇储备因此促进了主权投资组合中本币债务份额的提高。在定量上，我们发现最优外汇储备管理对主权国家的福利收益可能非常大。

papers.title: Cognitive Imprecision and Stake-Dependent Risk Attitudes
papers.authors: Mel Win Khaw, Ziang Li, Michael Woodford
