papers.abstract: In an experiment that elicits subjects’ willingness to pay (WTP) for the outcome of a lottery, we document a systematic effect of stake sizes on the magnitude and sign of the relative risk premium, and find that there is a log-linear relationship between the monetary payoff of the lottery and WTP, conditional on the probability of the payoff and its sign. We account quantitatively for this relationship, and the way in which it varies with both the probability and sign of the lottery payoff, in a model in which all departures from risk-neutral bidding are attributed to an optimal adaptation of bidding behavior to the presence of cognitive noise. Moreover, the cognitive noise required by our hypothesis is consistent with patterns of bias and variability in judgments about numerical magnitudes and probabilities that have been observed in other contexts. We thus provide foundations for the kind of nonlinear distortions in lottery valuation posited by prospect theory, that we believe can provide an interpretation for the observed instability across contexts of estimated prospect-theoretic parameters.
papers.zh_title: 认知不精确与赌注依赖的风险态度
papers.zh_abstract: 在一项诱导受试者对彩票结果支付意愿的实验中，我们记录了赌注大小对相对风险溢价大小和符号的系统性影响，并发现彩票的货币收益与支付意愿之间存在对数线性关系，且该关系取决于收益的概率及其符号。我们在一个模型中定量解释了这种关系及其随彩票收益概率和符号变化的方式，该模型将所有偏离风险中性出价的行为归因于出价行为对认知噪声存在的最优适应。此外，我们假设所需的认知噪声与其他情境下观察到的关于数值大小和概率判断的偏差和变异性模式一致。因此，我们为前景理论所假设的彩票估值中的非线性扭曲提供了基础，我们认为这可以为估计的前景理论参数在不同情境下观察到的稳定性缺失提供一种解释。

papers.title: Place-Based Productivity and Costs in Science
papers.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Simon Johnson, Enrico Moretti
papers.abstract: Cities with a larger concentration of scientists have been shown to be more productive places for additional scientists to do Research and Development. At the same time, these urban areas tend to be associated with higher costs of doing research, in terms of both wages and land. While the literature on the benefits of agglomeration economies is extensive, it offers no direct evidence of how productivity gains from agglomeration compare with higher costs of production. This paper aims to shed light on the balance between local productivity and local costs in science. Using a novel dataset, we estimate place-based costs of carrying out R&D in each US metro area and assess how these place-based costs vary with the density of scientists in each area. We then compare these costs with estimates of the corresponding productivity benefits of more scientist density from Moretti (2021). Adding more scientists to a city increases both productivity and production costs, but the rise in productivity is larger than the rise in production costs. In particular, each 10% rise in the stock of scientists is associated with a 0.11% rise in costs and a 0.67% rise in productivity. This implies that firms moving from cities with a small agglomeration of scientists to cities with a large agglomeration of scientists experience productivity gains that are 6 times larger than the increase in production costs. This finding is consistent with the increased concentration of R&D activity observed over the past 30 years. However, while the productivity estimate has only modest non-linearities, the cost estimates suggest much larger non-linearities as the concentration of scientists increases. For the most concentrated R&D cities, the difference between productivity gains and cost increases is close to zero.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H0, J0, R0
papers.zh_title: 科学领域基于地点的生产力与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 研究表明，科学家更为集中的城市，对于其他科学家开展研发活动而言，生产力也更高。与此同时，这些城市地区在工资和土地方面，往往与研究成本较高相关联。尽管关于集聚经济收益的文献十分丰富，但并未提供直接证据来证明集聚带来的生产力提升与较高的生产成本相比孰优孰劣。本文旨在阐明科学领域中本地生产力与本地成本之间的平衡关系。利用一个新颖的数据集，我们估算了美国每个都市区开展研发活动的基于地点的成本，并评估了这些基于地点的成本如何随每个地区科学家密度的变化而变化。然后，我们将这些成本与Moretti（2021）估算的科学家密度增加所带来的相应生产力收益进行了比较。向一个城市增加更多科学家会同时提高生产力和生产成本，但生产力的提升幅度大于生产成本的上升幅度。具体而言，科学家存量每增加10%，成本上升0.11%，生产力提升0.67%。这意味着，从科学家集聚程度较小的城市迁往科学家集聚程度较大的城市的企业，其生产力提升幅度是生产成本增加幅度的6倍。这一发现与过去30年观察到的研发活动日益集中的趋势相符。然而，尽管生产力估计值仅呈现适度的非线性特征，但成本估计值表明，随着科学家集中度的提高，非线性特征更为显著。对于研发活动最集中的城市而言，生产力提升与成本增加之间的差异接近于零。

papers.title: Environmental Economics, Regulation, and Innovation
papers.authors: Mads Greaker, David Popp
papers.abstract: This paper provides a primer on the economics of environmental innovation. Our intention is not to write a pure review paper, but to also provide an up-to-date textbook treatment on the issue. Thus, we start by defining the marginal costs of both emissions and of emissions abatement. We then analyze theoretically how innovation may affect marginal abatement costs. We also cover the different modelling choices with respect to how the innovation process is represented mathematically and how different environmental policy measures could affect environmental innovation. Our theoretical propositions are all illustrated with examples from the empirical literature. A special emphasis is placed on the recent literature on directed technical change and the potential impact of government intervention in the research and development choices of private firms.
papers.zh_title: 环境经济学、监管与创新
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于环境创新经济学的入门介绍。我们的意图并非撰写一篇纯粹的综述论文，而是就这一问题提供一份最新的教科书式论述。因此，我们首先定义了排放和减排的边际成本。然后，我们从理论上分析了创新如何可能影响边际减排成本。我们还涵盖了关于创新过程如何以数学方式表示的不同建模选择，以及不同的环境政策措施如何可能影响环境创新。我们的所有理论命题均辅以实证文献中的例子加以说明。特别强调了近期关于定向技术变革的文献，以及政府干预私营企业研发选择的潜在影响。

papers.title: Passing the Message: Peer Outreach about COVID-19 Precautions in Zambia
papers.authors: Alfredo Burlando, Pradeep Chintagunta, Jessica Goldberg, Melissa Graboyes, Peter Hangoma, Dean Karlan, Mario Macis, Silvia Prina
papers.abstract: During public health emergencies, spreading accurate information and increasing adherence to recommended behaviors is critical for communal welfare. However, uncertainty, mistrust, and misinformation can slow the adoption of best practices. Preexisting social networks can amplify and endorse information from authorities, and technology makes peer-to-peer messaging scalable and fast. Using text messages and small cash incentives, we test a peer-based information campaign to encourage adherence to recommended COVID-19-related health behaviors in Zambia. None of the treatments affected health behavior among primary study participants or their peers. The suggestion to pass messages to peers increases dissemination, but financial incentives do not have any additional impact.
papers.zh_title: 传递信息：赞比亚关于COVID-19预防措施的同伴宣传
papers.zh_abstract: 在突发公共卫生事件期间，传播准确信息并提高对推荐行为的遵从度对于公共福祉至关重要。然而，不确定性、不信任和错误信息可能会减缓最佳实践的采纳。已有的社会网络可以放大和认可来自权威机构的信息，而技术使得点对点信息传递具有可扩展性和快速性。通过短信和小额现金激励，我们在赞比亚测试了一项基于同伴的信息宣传活动，以鼓励人们遵守推荐的COVID-19相关健康行为。所有处理均未影响主要研究参与者或其同伴的健康行为。向同伴传递信息的建议增加了信息传播，但金钱激励没有产生额外影响。

papers.title: Optimal Assignment of Bureaucrats: Evidence from Randomly Assigned Tax Collectors in the DRC
papers.authors: Augustin Bergeron, Pedro Bessone, John Kabeya Kabeya, Gabriel Z. Tourek, Jonathan L. Weigel
papers.abstract: The assignment of workers to tasks and teams is a key margin of firm productivity and a potential source of state effectiveness. This paper investigates whether a low-capacity state can increase its tax revenue by optimally assigning its tax collectors. We study the two-stage random assignment of property tax collectors into teams and to neighborhoods in a large Congolese city. The optimal assignment involves positive assortative matching on both dimensions: high (low) ability collectors should be paired together, and high (low) ability teams should be paired with high (low) payment propensity households. Positive assortative matching stems from complementarities in collector-to-collector and collector-to-household match types. We provide evidence that these complementarities reflect in part high-ability collectors exerting greater effort when matched with other high-ability collectors. According to our estimates, implementing the optimal assignment would increase tax compliance by 2.94 percentage points and revenue by 26% relative to the status quo (random) assignment. Alternative policies, such as replacing low-ability collectors with new ones of average ability or increasing collectors’ performance wages, are likely incapable of achieving a similar revenue increase.
papers.zh_title: 官僚的最优分配：来自刚果民主共和国随机分配税务人员的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 将工人分配到任务和团队是企业生产力的一个关键方面，也是国家效能的一个潜在来源。本文研究了一个低能力国家是否可以通过最优分配其税务人员来增加税收收入。我们研究了在一个刚果大城市中，财产税征收人员分两阶段随机分配到团队和社区的情况。最优分配涉及在两个维度上的正向分类匹配：高（低）能力的征收人员应配对在一起，高（低）能力的团队应与高（低）支付倾向的家庭配对。正向分类匹配源于征收人员之间以及征收人员与家庭之间匹配类型的互补性。我们提供的证据表明，这些互补性部分反映了高能力征收人员在与其它高能力征收人员匹配时会付出更多努力。根据我们的估计，与现状（随机）分配相比，实施最优分配将使税收遵从度提高2.94个百分点，税收收入增加26%。其他政策，例如用平均能力的新征收人员替换低能力征收人员，或增加征收人员的绩效工资，可能无法实现类似的收入增长。

papers.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Family Influence
papers.authors: Sadegh Eshaghnia, James J. Heckman, Rasmus Landersø, Rafeh Qureshi
papers.abstract: This paper studies intergenerational mobility—the transmission of family influence. We develop and estimate measures of lifetime resources (income and wealth) motivated by economic theory that account for generational differences in life-cycle trajectories, uncertainty, and credit constraints. These measures of lifetime resources allow us to estimate the transmission of welfare and lifetime resources at different stages of the life cycle. We compare these measures with traditional ones such as wage income and disposable income measured over narrow windows of age that are used to proxy lifetime wealth. The performance of proxy measures is poor. Parents’ expected lifetime resources are stronger predictors of many important child outcomes (including children’s own expected lifetime resources and education) than the income measures traditionally used in the literature on social mobility. Changes in patterns of educational attainment across generations explain most of the intergenerational change in life-cycle dynamics. While relative mobility is overstated by the traditional income measures, absolute upward mobility is understated. Recent generations have higher welfare and are better off compared to their parents.
papers.zh_title: 家庭影响力的代际传递
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究代际流动性——即家庭影响力的传递。我们根据经济理论开发并估算了终身资源（收入和财富）的衡量指标，这些指标考虑了代际间生命周期轨迹、不确定性和信贷约束的差异。这些终身资源衡量指标使我们能够估算生命历程不同阶段的福利和终身资源的传递。我们将这些衡量指标与传统的衡量指标进行比较，例如在较窄的年龄窗口内测量的工资收入和可支配收入，这些传统指标被用作终身财富的代理变量。代理变量的表现不佳。与社会科学流动性文献中传统使用的收入衡量指标相比，父母的预期终身资源是许多重要儿童结果（包括儿童自身的预期终身资源和教育）的更强预测因子。跨代教育成就模式的变化解释了生命周期动态中大部分的代际变化。虽然传统收入衡量指标高估了相对流动性，但绝对向上流动性却被低估了。与父母相比，最近几代人的福利更高，境况也更好。

papers.title: Microequity and Mutuality: Experimental Evidence on Credit with Performance-Contingent Repayment
papers.authors: Francesco Cordaro, Marcel Fafchamps, Colin Mayer, Muhammad Meki, Simon Quinn, Kate Roll
papers.abstract: We conduct the first field experiment of a performance-contingent microfinance contract. A large food multinational wishes to help micro-distributors in its supply chain with the financing of a productive asset. Working with the firm in Kenya, we compare asset financing under a traditional debt contract to three alternatives: (i) a novel equity-like financing contract, (ii) a hybrid debt-equity contract, and (iii) an index-insurance financing contract. Experimental results reveal large positive impacts from the contractual innovations. These findings demonstrate the economic appeal of microfinance contracts that leverage improved observability of performance to achieve a greater sharing of risk and reward.
papers.zh_title: 小额股权与互助：基于绩效还款的信贷实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了首个关于绩效挂钩小额信贷合同的实地实验。一家大型食品跨国公司希望帮助其供应链中的微型分销商为一项生产性资产融资。我们与该公司在肯尼亚合作，将传统债务合同下的资产融资与三种替代方案进行了比较：(i) 一种新颖的类似股权的融资合同，(ii) 一种混合债务-股权合同，以及 (iii) 一种指数保险融资合同。实验结果显示，这些合同创新带来了巨大的积极影响。这些发现证明了小额信贷合同的经济吸引力，这些合同利用对绩效观察能力的改善，实现了风险与回报的更大程度分担。

papers.title: Road Maintenance and Local Economic Development: Evidence from Indonesia’s Highways
papers.authors: Paul Gertler, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro, Tadeja Gracner, Alexander D. Rothenberg
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the local welfare impacts of highway maintenance investments. We instrument road quality exploiting Indonesia’s two-step budgeting process for allocating funding to local road authorities. Using comprehensive data on road quality from 1990-2007, we find evidence that better roads help manufacturers create new jobs, enabling worker transitions out of informal employment, and increasing labor income. Road quality also changes the cost of living, reducing perishable food prices but also raising housing prices. We estimate the elasticity of household welfare with respect to road quality to be 0.1 and the benefit/cost ratio for road maintenance investments to be 2.3.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PE；JEL：J43, O18, R23, R42
papers.zh_title: 道路维护与地方经济发展：来自印度尼西亚高速公路的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了高速公路维护投资对地方福利的影响。我们利用印度尼西亚向地方道路管理机构分配资金的两步预算流程来工具化道路质量。使用1990-2007年道路质量的综合数据，我们发现证据表明，更好的道路有助于制造商创造新的就业机会，使工人能够从非正规就业中转移出来，并增加劳动收入。道路质量也会改变生活成本，降低易腐食品价格，但同时也推高了住房价格。我们估计家庭福利对道路质量的弹性为0.1，道路维护投资的效益成本比为2.3。

papers.title: KFstar and Portfolio Inflows: A Focus on Latin America
papers.authors: John D. Burger, Francis E. Warnock, Veronica Cacdac Warnock
papers.abstract: Latin American portfolio inflows show a strong tendency to revert to a natural level, KF*, over medium-run horizons. Deviations of actual flows from KF* provide policymakers with a real-time predictor of future flows, sudden stops and vulnerability to global shocks. Analysis of short-run deviations of flows from KF* reveals heterogeneous drivers: commodity prices for Brazil, Chile, and Mexico; risk tolerance for Argentina, Costa Rica, and Peru.
papers.zh_title: KFstar与投资组合流入：聚焦拉丁美洲
papers.zh_abstract: 拉丁美洲的投资组合流入显示出在中期时间范围内强烈回归自然水平KF*的趋势。实际流量与KF*的偏离为政策制定者提供了未来流量、突然停止以及对全球冲击脆弱性的实时预测指标。对流量与KF*短期偏离的分析揭示了异质性驱动因素：巴西、智利和墨西哥受大宗商品价格影响；阿根廷、哥斯达黎加和秘鲁受风险容忍度影响。

papers.title: Climate Risks and FDI
papers.authors: Grace Weishi Gu, Galina Hale
papers.abstract: Climate-related risks have increased in recent decades, both in terms of the frequency of extreme weather events (physical risk) and implementation of climate-change mitigation policies (transition risk). This paper explores whether multinational firms react to such risks by altering their presence in countries that are more affected. We measure this by examining foreign direct investment (FDI) dynamics at different levels of aggregation as well as at firm level. We propose a theoretical framework for firm production location choice that explicitly incorporates transition and physical risks. The model predicts a reduction in FDI resulting from both physical and transition risks but an ambiguous interaction effect of these risks with emission productivity of the firm. In an extensive empirical analysis we find some support for model predictions, but overall we do not find consistent evidence for statistically significant effects of physical and transition risks on FDI. However, firm-level evidence suggests that firms that are more exposed to climate risks react more negatively to physical climate risk following Paris Climate Accord. We also find that FDI outflows following extreme weather events from affected countries are smaller for industries with higher emission productivity. Our theory and empirical results point to the importance of accounting for heterogeneity in emission productivity when analyzing effects of climate risks.
papers.zh_title: 气候风险与外国直接投资
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，气候相关风险有所增加，无论是极端天气事件的频率（物理风险）还是气候变化减缓政策的实施（转型风险）。本文探讨跨国公司是否通过改变其在受影响更严重国家的存在来应对此类风险。我们通过考察不同加总层面以及企业层面的外国直接投资动态来衡量这一点。我们提出了一个企业生产区位选择的理论框架，该框架明确纳入了转型风险和物理风险。该模型预测，物理风险和转型风险都会导致外国直接投资减少，但这些风险与企业排放生产率之间的交互效应是不明确的。在广泛的实证分析中，我们发现了支持模型预测的一些证据，但总体而言，我们没有找到一致的证据表明物理风险和转型风险对外国直接投资具有统计上显著的影响。然而，企业层面的证据表明，在《巴黎气候协定》之后，更容易受到气候风险影响的企业对物理气候风险的反应更为负面。我们还发现，在极端天气事件之后，受影响国家的外国直接投资流出在排放生产率较高的行业中较小。我们的理论和实证结果指出了在分析气候风险影响时考虑排放生产率异质性的重要性。

papers.title: Slavery and the British Industrial Revolution
papers.authors: Stephan Heblich, Stephen J. Redding, Hans-Joachim Voth
papers.abstract: We provide theory and evidence on the contribution of slavery wealth to Britain’s economic development prior to the abolition of slavery in 1833. We combine data on individual slaveholders from compensation records, an exogenous source of variation in slavery wealth from weather-induced shocks to mortality of the enslaved during the middle passage, and a quantitative spatial model. Exogenous increases in slavery wealth reduce the agricultural employment share, increase the manufacturing employment share, raise the number of cotton mills, and increase property values. Quantifying our model, we find that slavery wealth raises aggregate income by the equivalent of around a decade of economic growth, and increases local income in places with the greatest involvement in slavery by more than 40 percent.
papers.zh_title: 奴隶制与英国工业革命
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于奴隶制财富在1833年废除奴隶制之前对英国经济发展贡献的理论和证据。我们结合了来自补偿记录的个人奴隶主数据、由天气引起的奴隶在“中间通道”期间死亡率冲击所产生的外生奴隶制财富变异，以及一个定量空间模型。奴隶制财富的外生增加降低了农业就业份额，提高了制造业就业份额，增加了棉纺厂的数量，并提升了财产价值。通过量化我们的模型，我们发现奴隶制财富使总收入提高了相当于大约十年的经济增长，并在奴隶制参与度最高的地区使当地收入增加了超过40%。

papers.title: Global Sourcing and Multinational Activity: A Unified Approach
papers.authors: Pol Antràs, Evgenii Fadeev, Teresa C. Fort, Felix Tintelnot
papers.abstract: Multinational firms (MNEs) accounted for 42 percent of US manufacturing employment, 87 percent of US imports, and 84 of US exports in 2007. Despite their disproportionate share of global trade, MNEs’ input sourcing and final-good production decisions are often studied separately. Using newly merged data on firms’ trade and FDI activity by country, we show that US MNEs are more likely to import not only from the countries in which they have affiliates, but also from other countries within their affiliates’ region. We rationalize these patterns in a unified framework in which firms jointly determine the countries in which to produce final goods, and the countries from which to source inputs. The model generates a new source of scale economies that arises because a firm incurs a country-specific fixed cost that allows all its assembly plants to source inputs from that country. This shared fixed cost across plants creates interdependencies between firms’ assembly and sourcing locations, and leads to non-monotonic responses in third markets to bilateral trade cost changes.
papers.zh_title: 全球采购与跨国活动：一个统一的方法
papers.zh_abstract: 2007年，跨国公司占美国制造业就业的42%，美国进口的87%和美国出口的84%。尽管跨国公司在全球贸易中占据不成比例的份额，但其投入品采购和最终产品生产决策通常被分开研究。利用新合并的企业按国家划分的贸易和外国直接投资活动数据，我们表明美国跨国公司不仅更有可能从其拥有附属公司的国家进口，也更有可能从其附属公司所在区域内的其他国家进口。我们在一个统一框架中合理化这些模式，在该框架中，企业共同决定在哪些国家生产最终产品以及从哪些国家采购投入品。该模型产生了一种新的规模经济来源，其产生原因是企业承担了一个国家特定的固定成本，该成本允许其所有组装工厂从该国采购投入品。这种跨工厂的共享固定成本在企业组装地点和采购地点之间创造了相互依赖关系，并导致第三市场对双边贸易成本变化产生非单调反应。

papers.title: Information Frictions and Employee Sorting Between Startups
papers.authors: Kevin A. Bryan, Mitchell Hoffman, Amir Sariri
papers.abstract: Would workers apply to better firms if they were more informed about firm quality? Collaborating with 26 science-based startups, we create a custom job board and invite business school alumni to apply. The job board randomizes across applicants to show coarse expert ratings of all startups’ science and/or business model quality. Making ratings visible strongly reallocates applications toward higher-rated firms. This reallocation holds restricting to high-quality workers. Treatments operate in part by shifting worker beliefs about firms’ right-tail outcomes. Despite these benefits, workers make post-treatment bets indicating highly overoptimistic beliefs about startup success, suggesting a problem of broader informational deficits.
papers.zh_title: 信息摩擦与初创企业间的员工分类
papers.zh_abstract: 如果工人对企业的质量了解更多，他们会申请更好的企业吗？我们与26家科学型初创企业合作，创建了一个定制招聘板，并邀请商学院校友申请。该招聘板随机向申请者展示所有初创企业科学和/或商业模式质量的粗略专家评级。使评级可见会显著将申请重新分配给评级更高的企业。这种重新分配在仅限于高质量工人时仍然成立。这些处理措施部分通过改变工人对企业右尾结果的信念来发挥作用。尽管有这些好处，工人在处理后的赌注中表现出对初创企业成功的高度过度乐观信念，这表明存在更广泛的信息缺失问题。

papers.title: Auditing the Prescription Drug Consumer Price Index in a Changing Marketplace
papers.authors: Richard G. Frank, Andrew L. Hicks, Ernst R. Berndt
papers.abstract: The Bureau of Labor Statistics' Prescription Drug Consumer Price Index (CPI-Rx) has been the focus of considerable controversy in recent years. The CPI-Rx limits its sampling frame to transactions in retail outpatient outlets, and excludes prescription pharmaceuticals dispensed in hospitals, physician/clinic outpatient facilities, and nursing homes. Thus the CPI-Rx overlooks the increasingly important specialty pharmaceuticals dispensed in hospitals, outpatient clinics, and physician offices, whose transactions are instead captured in the overall hospital or professional services component of the medical CPI. Specialty drugs now account for 55% of all U.S. drug spending, double the amount of a decade earlier. To the extent specialty drug growth differs from that of traditional pharmaceuticals, the CPI-Rx could provide an inaccurate measure of overall drug price inflation. Using data from the IBM MarketScan database for the years 2010-2019 and IQVIA-designated specialty drugs, we estimate that by not sampling specialty drugs in non-retail settings, the CPI-Rx has understated overall U.S. prescription drug price inflation by just under 75 basis points annually. We discuss implications for health care policy, and suggest the BLS examine the feasibility of publishing an overall pharmaceutical price index incorporating both traditional and specialty pharmaceuticals dispensed in retail and non-retail settings.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PR；JEL：C43, D43, I11, I18, L11, L53, L65
papers.zh_title: 审计变化市场中的处方药消费者价格指数
papers.zh_abstract: 美国劳工统计局的处方药消费者价格指数（CPI-Rx）近年来一直是争议的焦点。CPI-Rx将其抽样范围限制在零售门诊药房的交易中，排除了在医院、医生/诊所门诊设施和疗养院发放的处方药。因此，CPI-Rx忽略了在医院、门诊诊所和医生办公室发放的日益重要的专科药物，这些交易反而被纳入医疗CPI的整体医院或专业服务部分。专科药物现在占美国所有药物支出的55%，是十年前的两倍。如果专科药物的增长与传统药物不同，CPI-Rx可能无法准确衡量整体药物价格通胀。利用2010-2019年IBM MarketScan数据库的数据和IQVIA指定的专科药物，我们估计，由于未对非零售环境中的专科药物进行抽样，CPI-Rx每年将美国整体处方药价格通胀低估了近75个基点。我们讨论了对医疗保健政策的影响，并建议劳工统计局研究发布一个包含零售和非零售环境中发放的传统和专科药物的整体药物价格指数的可行性。

papers.title: Firm Responses and Wage Effects of Foreign Demand Shocks with Fixed Labor Costs and Monopsony
papers.authors: Emmanuel Dhyne, Ayumu Ken Kikkawa, Toshiaki Komatsu, Magne Mogstad, Felix Tintelnot
papers.abstract: We quantify the firm responses and real wage effects of foreign demand shocks. We use Belgian micro data to construct firm-specific measures of demand shocks which capture that firms pass on foreign demand shocks to domestic suppliers. Our estimates of firm responses to these shocks suggest that firms face upward-sloping labor supply curves and have sizable fixed labor costs. We specify a general equilibrium model with these features to quantify the aggregate effects of simulated tariff shocks on wages. We find that ignoring fixed labor costs substantially underestimates aggregate effects on wages, whereas incorporating upward-sloping labor supply appears less consequential.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：E1, F1, F12, J31, J42, L11
papers.zh_title: 固定劳动力成本和买方垄断下外国需求冲击的企业反应与工资效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了外国需求冲击的企业反应和实际工资效应。我们使用比利时微观数据构建了企业特定的需求冲击度量，这些度量捕捉了企业将外国需求冲击传递给国内供应商的过程。我们对这些冲击的企业反应的估计表明，企业面临向上倾斜的劳动力供给曲线，并具有相当大的固定劳动力成本。我们指定了一个具有这些特征的一般均衡模型，以量化模拟关税冲击对工资的总体效应。我们发现，忽略固定劳动力成本会显著低估对工资的总体效应，而纳入向上倾斜的劳动力供给似乎影响较小。

papers.title: Working from Home Around the World
papers.authors: Cevat Giray Aksoy, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Mathias Dolls, Pablo Zarate
papers.abstract: The pandemic triggered a large, lasting shift to work from home (WFH). To study this shift, we survey full-time workers who finished primary school in 27 countries as of mid 2021 and early 2022. Our cross-country comparisons control for age, gender, education, and industry and treat the U.S. mean as the baseline. We find, first, that WFH averages 1.5 days per week in our sample, ranging widely across countries. Second, employers plan an average of 0.7 WFH days per week after the pandemic, but workers want 1.7 days. Third, employees value the option to WFH 2-3 days per week at 5 percent of pay, on average, with higher valuations for women, people with children and those with longer commutes. Fourth, most employees were favorably surprised by their WFH productivity during the pandemic. Fifth, looking across individuals, employer plans for WFH levels after the pandemic rise strongly with WFH productivity surprises during the pandemic. Sixth, looking across countries, planned WFH levels rise with the cumulative stringency of government-mandated lockdowns during the pandemic. We draw on these results to explain the big shift to WFH and to consider some implications for workers, organization, cities, and the pace of innovation.
papers.zh_title: 全球范围内的居家办公
papers.zh_abstract: 疫情引发了一次大规模且持久的向居家办公的转变。为了研究这一转变，我们在2021年年中和2022年年初对27个国家中完成小学教育的全职工作者进行了调查。我们的跨国比较控制了年龄、性别、教育和行业，并以美国均值作为基准。我们发现，首先，在我们的样本中，居家办公平均每周1.5天，各国之间差异很大。其次，雇主计划在疫情后平均每周居家办公0.7天，但员工希望每周1.7天。第三，员工平均将每周居家办公2-3天的选择权价值评估为薪酬的5%，其中女性、有孩子的人和通勤时间较长的人估值更高。第四，大多数员工对疫情期间居家办公的生产力感到惊喜。第五，从个体层面看，疫情后雇主对居家办公水平的计划与疫情期间居家办公生产力的惊喜程度呈强正相关。第六，从国家层面看，计划的居家办公水平与疫情期间政府强制封锁的累积严格程度呈正相关。我们利用这些结果来解释向居家办公的重大转变，并考虑其对员工、组织、城市和创新步伐的一些影响。

papers.title: Is Physical Climate Risk Priced? Evidence from Regional Variation in Exposure to Heat Stress
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Timothy Johnson, Suresh Sundaresan, Tuomas Tomunen
papers.abstract: We exploit regional variations in exposure to heat stress to study if physical climate risk is priced in municipal bond, corporate bond and equity markets. We find consistent evidence across asset classes that local exposure to heat stress is associated with higher yield spreads for bonds and higher conditional expected returns for stocks. These results are observed robustly starting in 2013–15. The fact that heat stress premium is (a) positive, (b) economically substantial, and (c) present across comprehensive samples of multiple asset classes is consistent with macroeconomic models where climate change has a direct negative impact on aggregate consumption.
papers.zh_title: 物理气候风险是否被定价？来自热应激暴露区域差异的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用热应激暴露的区域差异来研究物理气候风险是否在市政债券、公司债券和股票市场中被定价。我们发现跨资产类别的一致证据表明，当地对热应激的暴露与债券较高的收益率利差和股票较高的条件预期收益相关。这些结果从2013-15年左右开始稳健地观察到。热应激溢价（a）为正，（b）在经济上显著，并且（c）存在于多个资产类别的全面样本中，这一事实与气候变化对总消费产生直接负面影响的宏观经济模型一致。

papers.title: Gender and Race in Entrepreneurial Finance
papers.authors: Michael Ewens
papers.abstract: Economic frictions pervade the founding, financing, growing, and exiting of high-growth entrepreneurial firms. This article considers one friction that currently affects a small, but important, set of entrepreneurs: racial and gender discrimination. I first collect facts from a large empirical literature that show clear gender and race gaps in participation and financing of startups. Female founders manage 16-25% of all startups, while Black entrepreneurs rarely exceed 3% of the startup population. Conditioning on startups that successfully raise external finance has little impact on these gaps. The complexity of the entrepreneurial process presents several opportunities for discrimination to manifest itself and produce this gap. The article details the major discrimination theories and the empirical methods used to test for their presence. It then provides an extensive review of a growing empirical literature in entrepreneurial finance that tests these models. The pattern of evidence reveals a nuanced and incomplete story about bias, information asymmetry, and differential treatment of underrepresented founders. The article ends with an extensive set of research ideas motivated by the gaps in the entrepreneurship literature and recent developments in theory and measurement of discrimination.
papers.zh_title: 创业融资中的性别与种族
papers.zh_abstract: 经济摩擦普遍存在于高增长创业企业的创立、融资、成长和退出过程中。本文考虑了一种目前影响一小部分但重要的创业者群体的摩擦：种族和性别歧视。我首先从大量实证文献中收集事实，这些事实显示在创业企业的参与和融资方面存在明显的性别和种族差距。女性创始人管理着16-25%的创业企业，而黑人创业者很少超过创业企业人口的3%。以成功获得外部融资的创业企业为条件，对这些差距几乎没有影响。创业过程的复杂性为歧视的表现和产生这种差距提供了多种机会。本文详细介绍了主要的歧视理论以及用于检验其存在的实证方法。然后，它对创业金融领域日益增长的、检验这些模型的实证文献进行了广泛回顾。证据模式揭示了一个关于偏见、信息不对称和对代表性不足的创始人的区别对待的微妙且不完整的故事。本文最后提出了一系列广泛的研究思路，这些思路源于创业文献中的空白以及歧视理论和测量方面的最新发展。

papers.title: Robustness Checks in Structural Analysis
papers.authors: Sylvain Catherine, Mehran Ebrahimian, Mohammad Fereydounian, David Sraer, David Thesmar
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a computationally efficient methodology for estimating variants of structural models. Our approach approximates the relationship between moments and parameters, offering a low-cost alternative to traditional estimation methods. We establish general convergence conditions, primarily requiring model-based moments to be continuous functions of parameters. While this continuity does not necessitate a continuous economic model, it does require the model to have only sparse discontinuities, a concept we define. We also provide convergence rate bounds for Kernel and Neural Net approximations, with the latter demonstrating superior performance in higher dimensions. \nWe apply this methodology to two standard structural models: (1) dynamic corporate finance and (2) life-cycle portfolio choice. We demonstrate the reliability of our approach through simulations and then use it to explore identification, robustness to sample splits and moment selection, and model misspecification. These explorations are computationally infeasible with standard techniques, but become trivial with our methodology.
papers.zh_title: 结构分析中的稳健性检验
papers.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了一种计算效率高的方法，用于估计结构模型的变体。我们的方法近似了矩与参数之间的关系，为传统估计方法提供了一种低成本替代方案。我们建立了通用的收敛条件，主要要求基于模型的矩是参数的连续函数。虽然这种连续性不需要连续的经济模型，但它要求模型只有稀疏的不连续性，这是我们定义的一个概念。我们还提供了核近似和神经网络近似的收敛速度界限，其中神经网络在高维情况下表现出更优的性能。我们将此方法应用于两个标准结构模型：（1）动态公司金融和（2）生命周期投资组合选择。我们通过模拟证明了我们方法的可靠性，然后利用它来探索识别、对样本分割和矩选择的稳健性以及模型误设。这些探索使用标准技术在计算上不可行，但使用我们的方法变得简单。

papers.title: The Midlife Crisis
papers.authors: Osea Giuntella, Sally McManus, Redzo Mujcic, Andrew J. Oswald, Nattavudh Powdthavee, Ahmed Tohamy
papers.abstract: This paper documents a longitudinal crisis of midlife among the inhabitants of rich nations. Yet middle-aged citizens in our data sets are close to their peak earnings, have typically experienced little or no illness, reside in some of the safest countries in the world, and live in the most prosperous era in human history. This is paradoxical and troubling. The finding is consistent, however, with the prediction – one little-known to economists – of Elliott Jaques (1965). Our analysis does not rest on elementary cross-sectional analysis. Instead the paper uses panel and through-time data on, in total, approximately 500,000 individuals. It checks that the key results are not due to cohort effects. Nor do we rely on simple life-satisfaction measures. The paper shows that there are approximately quadratic hill-shaped patterns in data on midlife suicide, sleeping problems, alcohol dependence, concentration difficulties, memory problems, intense job strain, disabling headaches, suicidal feelings, and extreme depression. We believe the seriousness of this societal problem has not been grasped by the affluent world’s policy-makers.
papers.zh_title: 中年危机
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了富裕国家居民中一种纵向的中年危机。然而，我们数据集中的中年公民接近其收入峰值，通常很少或没有经历过疾病，居住在一些世界上最安全的国家，并生活在人类历史上最繁荣的时代。这是矛盾且令人不安的。然而，这一发现与Elliott Jaques（1965）的预测——一个经济学家知之甚少的预测——是一致的。我们的分析并非基于简单的横截面分析。相反，本文使用了总计约50万人的面板数据和纵向数据。它检验了关键结果并非由队列效应导致。我们也不依赖简单的生活满意度指标。本文显示，在中年自杀、睡眠问题、酒精依赖、注意力困难、记忆问题、高强度工作压力、致残性头痛、自杀念头和极度抑郁的数据中，存在近似二次的驼峰形模式。我们认为，富裕世界的政策制定者尚未认识到这一社会问题的严重性。

papers.title: Power and Dignity in the Low-Wage Labor Market: Theory and Evidence from Wal-Mart Workers
papers.authors: Arindrajit Dube, Suresh Naidu, Adam D. Reich
papers.abstract: We measure workers’ preferences for wages and non-wage amenities at America’s largest employer, Walmart, using targeted survey experiments. We find that workers have an economically significant willingness to pay for “dignity at work". Consistent with the presence of monopsony power, we estimate hypothetical quit elasticities similar to recent estimates from the literature. We document significant complementarities between wages and non-wage amenities, suggesting that measures of monopsony that do not account for amenities may be biased. We find that workers at low dignity jobs have higher quit elasticities, but lower bargaining elasticities, relative to workers at high dignity jobs. Finally, we use cross-state variation in the bite of Walmart’s 2014 corporate minimum wage to estimate the effects of the minimum wage on both workplace dignity and other amenities. We find no evidence that non-wage amenities are reduced in response to a higher minimum wage, consistent with wage-amenity complementarity and labor market power.
papers.zh_title: 低工资劳动力市场中的权力与尊严：来自沃尔玛员工的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过有针对性的调查实验，衡量了美国最大雇主沃尔玛员工对工资和非工资福利的偏好。我们发现，员工对“工作中的尊严”具有经济上显著的支付意愿。与买方垄断力量的存在一致，我们估计了与近期文献估计相似的情景离职弹性。我们记录了工资和非工资福利之间显著的互补性，这表明未考虑福利的买方垄断度量可能存在偏差。我们发现，与高尊严工作的员工相比，低尊严工作的员工具有更高的离职弹性，但更低的议价弹性。最后，我们利用沃尔玛2014年公司最低工资影响程度的跨州差异，来估计最低工资对工作尊严和其他福利的影响。我们没有发现证据表明非工资福利会因最低工资提高而减少，这与工资-福利互补性和劳动力市场力量一致。

papers.title: The Effects of Off-label Drug Use on Disability and Medical Expenditure
papers.authors: Katharina E. Blankart, Frank R. Lichtenberg
papers.abstract: Does using prescription drugs off-label increase disability and medical expenditure? This paper uses a unique dataset to evaluate off-label vs. on-label drug use in the US non-institutionalized population. Patients using drugs off-label have on average $515 higher medical expenditure and work-loss cost. Pharmaceutical innovation has direct and indirect effects on off-label drug use. Market size is indicative of the fraction of treatments used off-label. Our findings have implications for regulation and welfare. We address endogeneity issues by demonstrating that patients with higher disease severity do not experience higher off-label uses and by controlling for unobserved individual and condition effects.
papers.zh_title: 标签外用药对残疾和医疗支出的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 使用标签外处方药是否会增加残疾和医疗支出？本文利用一个独特的数据集，评估了美国非住院人群中标签外用药与标签内用药的情况。平均而言，标签外用药患者的医疗支出和工作损失成本高出515美元。医药创新对标签外用药有直接和间接影响。市场规模反映了标签外用药治疗的比例。我们的发现对监管和福利具有启示意义。我们通过证明病情严重程度较高的患者并未经历更高的标签外用药率，并控制未观测到的个体和条件效应，来处理内生性问题。

papers.title: Exhaustive or Exhausting? Evidence on Respondent Fatigue in Long Surveys
papers.authors: Dahyeon Jeong, Shilpa Aggarwal, Jonathan Robinson, Naresh Kumar, Alan Spearot, David Sungho Park
papers.abstract: Living standards measurement surveys require sustained attention for several hours. We quantify survey fatigue by randomizing the order of questions in 2-3 hour-long in-person surveys. An additional hour of survey time increases the probability that a respondent skips a question by 10-64%. Because skips are more common, the total monetary value of aggregated categories such as assets or expenditures declines as the survey goes on, and this effect is sizeable for some categories: for example, an extra hour of survey time lowers food expenditures by 25%. We find similar effect sizes within phone surveys in which respondents were already familiar with questions, suggesting that cognitive burden may be a key driver of survey fatigue.
papers.zh_title: 详尽还是令人疲惫？长调查中受访者疲劳的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 生活水平测量调查需要持续数小时的注意力集中。我们通过随机化2-3小时面对面调查中问题的顺序来量化调查疲劳。每增加一小时的调查时间，受访者跳过问题的概率增加10-64%。由于跳答更为常见，资产或支出等汇总类别的总货币价值随着调查的进行而下降，且这种效应对某些类别影响显著：例如，额外一小时的调查时间使食品支出降低25%。我们在受访者已熟悉问题的电话调查中发现了类似的影响大小，这表明认知负担可能是调查疲劳的关键驱动因素。

papers.title: The Social Tax: Redistributive Pressure and Labor Supply
papers.authors: Eliana Carranza, Aletheia Donald, Florian Grosset, Supreet Kaur
papers.abstract: In low-income communities, pressure to share income with others may disincentivize work, distorting labor supply. We document that across countries, social groups that undertake more interpersonal transfers work fewer hours. Using a field experiment, we enable piece-rate factory workers in Côte d’Ivoire to shield income using blocked savings accounts over 3-9 months. Workers may only deposit earnings increases, relative to baseline, mitigating income effects on labor supply. We vary whether the offered account is private or known to the worker’s network, altering the likelihood of transfer requests against saved income. When accounts are private, take-up is substantively higher (60% vs. 14%). Offering private accounts sharply increases labor supply—raising work attendance by 10% and earnings by 11%. Outgoing transfers do not decline, indicating no loss in redistribution. Our estimates imply a 9-14% social tax rate. The welfare benefits of informal redistribution may come at a cost, depressing labor supply and productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H0, J0, O1, O4, O55
papers.zh_title: 社会税：再分配压力与劳动力供给
papers.zh_abstract: 在低收入社区，与他人分享收入的压力可能会抑制工作积极性，扭曲劳动力供给。我们记录到，跨国数据显示，进行更多人际转移的社会群体工作时间更少。通过一项实地实验，我们让科特迪瓦的计件工厂工人在3-9个月内使用封闭储蓄账户来保护收入。工人只能存入相对于基线的收入增长部分，以减轻收入对劳动力供给的影响。我们改变所提供的账户是私密的还是被工人社交网络知晓，从而改变针对储蓄收入提出转移请求的可能性。当账户私密时，接受率显著更高（60%对14%）。提供私密账户急剧增加了劳动力供给——使工作出勤率提高10%，收入提高11%。对外转移并未减少，表明再分配没有损失。我们的估计表明社会税率为9-14%。非正式再分配的福利收益可能以抑制劳动力供给和生产力为代价。

papers.title: Facts and Fantasies about Wage Setting and Collective Bargaining
papers.authors: Manudeep Bhuller, Karl O. Moene, Magne Mogstad, Ola L. Vestad
papers.abstract: In this article, we document and discuss salient features of collective bargaining systems in the OECD countries, with the goal of debunking some misconceptions and myths and revitalizing the general interest in wage setting and collective bargaining. We hope that such an interest may help close the gap between how economists tend to model wage setting and how wages are actually set. Canonical models of competitive labor markets, monopsony, and search and matching all assume a decentralized wage setting where individual firms and workers determine wages. In most advanced economies, however, it is common that firms or employer associations bargain with unions over wages, producing collective bargaining systems. We show that the characteristics of these systems vary in important ways across advanced economies, with regards to both the scope and the structure of collective bargaining.
papers.zh_title: 关于工资设定和集体谈判的事实与幻想
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们记录并讨论了经合组织国家集体谈判制度的显著特征，旨在破除一些误解和迷思，并重振对工资设定和集体谈判的普遍兴趣。我们希望这种兴趣有助于缩小经济学家倾向于建模工资设定的方式与实际工资设定方式之间的差距。竞争性劳动力市场、买方垄断以及搜索和匹配的经典模型都假设分散化的工资设定，即由单个企业和工人决定工资。然而，在大多数发达经济体中，企业或雇主协会与工会就工资进行谈判是常见的，从而形成了集体谈判制度。我们表明，这些制度的特征在发达经济体之间存在重要差异，无论是在集体谈判的范围还是结构方面。

papers.title: Health and Safety vs. Freedom of Contract: The Tortured Path of Wage and Hours Limits Through the State Legislatures and the Courts
papers.authors: Price V. Fishback
papers.abstract: The paper examines changes in wage and hour labor regulation between 1898 and 1938. Many see the 1905 Lochner Supreme Court decision striking down hours limits for men as the beginning of 30 years in which labor regulation was stymied by the doctrine of “freedom of contract.” That issue played a role but judges often weighed it against safety issues. As a result, hours limits for men in dangerous industries were found to be constitutional. The debates over minimum wages for women also centered on these issues. These laws passed muster in state supreme courts and initially at the U.S. Supreme Court. In 1923 a majority of Supreme Court judges emphasized freedom of contract in declaring a female minimum wage unconstitutional. Seeing close votes and substantial turnover of judges on the Supreme Court, many states continued promulgating advisory minimums and passed new laws. Ultimately, turnover on the Court and a renewed emphasis on the role of minimum wages in ensuring health and safety of women and children during the Depression led the Court to declare minimums for women constitutional. This opened the door for federal minimum wage legislation for all workers.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, LE, LS；JEL：J81, K31, N32, N42
papers.zh_title: 健康与安全对合同自由：通过州立法机构和法院的工资与工时限制的曲折道路
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1898年至1938年间工资和工时劳动法规的变化。许多人将1905年最高法院在洛克纳案中推翻男性工时限制的裁决视为30年劳动法规被“合同自由”原则阻碍的开端。该问题确实发挥了作用，但法官们经常将其与安全问题权衡。因此，危险行业中男性的工时限制被裁定为合宪。关于女性最低工资的辩论也围绕这些问题展开。这些法律在州最高法院以及最初在美国最高法院获得了通过。1923年，最高法院多数法官强调合同自由，宣布女性最低工资违宪。鉴于最高法院的投票接近且法官更替频繁，许多州继续颁布建议性最低工资并制定新法律。最终，法院的人员更替以及大萧条期间对最低工资在确保妇女和儿童健康与安全方面作用的重新强调，导致法院宣布女性最低工资合宪。这为所有工人的联邦最低工资立法打开了大门。

papers.title: The Impacts of Covid-19 Illnesses on Workers
papers.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Evan J. Soltas
papers.abstract: We show that Covid-19 illnesses persistently reduce labor supply. Using an event study, we estimate that workers with week-long Covid-19 work absences are 7 percentage points less likely to be in the labor force one year later compared to otherwise-similar workers who do not miss a week of work for health reasons. Our estimates suggest Covid-19 illnesses have reduced the U.S. labor force by approximately 500,000 people (0.2 percent of adults) and imply an average forgone earnings per Covid-19 absence of at least $9,000, about 90 percent of which reflects lost labor supply beyond the initial absence week.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, J17, J21, J22
papers.zh_title: 新冠疾病对工人的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，新冠疾病持续减少了劳动力供给。通过事件研究，我们估计，与因健康原因未缺勤一周的类似工人相比，因新冠缺勤一周的工人在一年后仍在劳动力市场中的可能性低7个百分点。我们的估计表明，新冠疾病已使美国劳动力减少约50万人（占成年人的0.2%），并意味着每次新冠缺勤的平均收入损失至少为9,000美元，其中约90%反映了初始缺勤周之后的劳动力供给损失。

papers.title: Bargaining in the Shadow of Uncertainty
papers.authors: Marina Agranov, Hülya Eraslan, Chloe Tergiman
papers.abstract: We experimentally study unanimity and majority voting rules in multilateral bargaining environments with stochastic future surplus. In these settings, reaching agreement when expected future surplus is sufficiently higher than the current surplus is inefficient. Theoretically, such inefficiencies never arise under unanimity rule but can arise under majority rule as players try to avoid endogenous risk of being excluded from the winning coalitions in the future. We find strong support for this prediction both when the unanimity rule is predicted to lead to more delays, and when both rules should lead to identical levels of delays. We also find that there are more delays than predicted under the majority rule. Using data from conversations among the bargainers and the type of proposals that are implemented, we find that these deviations arise as a result of more egalitarian sharing than predicted by theory, and therefore, lower risk of being excluded from the winning coalitions in the future.
papers.zh_title: 不确定性阴影下的谈判
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验研究了多边谈判环境中具有随机未来剩余的一致同意和多数投票规则。在这些环境中，当预期未来剩余显著高于当前剩余时达成协议是低效的。理论上，这种低效在一致同意规则下永远不会出现，但在多数规则下可能出现，因为参与者试图避免未来被排除在获胜联盟之外的内生风险。我们发现，无论是在一致同意规则预计导致更多延迟的情况下，还是在两种规则应导致相同延迟水平的情况下，这一预测都得到了强有力的支持。我们还发现，在多数规则下，延迟比预测的更多。利用谈判者之间的对话数据以及所实施提案的类型，我们发现这些偏差是由于比理论预测更平等的分享而产生的，因此未来被排除在获胜联盟之外的风险更低。

papers.title: Multiple Price Lists for Willingness to Pay Elicitation
papers.authors: Kelsey Jack, Kathryn McDermott, Anja Sautmann
papers.abstract: Multiple price lists are a convenient tool to elicit willingness to pay (WTP) in surveys and experiments, but choice patterns such as “multiple switching” and “never switching” indicate high error rates. Existing measurement approaches often do not provide accurate standard errors and cannot correct for bias due to framing and order effects. We propose to combine a randomization approach with a random-effects latent utility model to detect bias and account for error. Data from a choice experiment in South Africa shows that significant order effects exist which, if uncorrected, would lead to distorted conclusions about subjects’ preferences. We provide templates to create a multiple price list survey instrument in SurveyCTO and analyze the resulting data using our proposed methods.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：C91, C93, D46, O12, Q51
papers.zh_title: 用于支付意愿诱导的多价格列表
papers.zh_abstract: 多价格列表是在调查和实验中诱导支付意愿的便捷工具，但“多次切换”和“从不切换”等选择模式表明错误率很高。现有的测量方法通常不能提供准确的标准误，也无法纠正因框架效应和顺序效应导致的偏差。我们提出将随机化方法与随机效应潜在效用模型相结合，以检测偏差并解释误差。来自南非选择实验的数据表明，存在显著的顺序效应，如果不加以纠正，将导致关于受试者偏好的扭曲结论。我们提供了在SurveyCTO中创建多价格列表调查工具模板，并使用我们提出的方法分析所得数据。

papers.title: Judicial Independence, Local Protectionism, and Economic Integration: Evidence from China
papers.authors: Ernest Liu, Yi Lu, Wenwei Peng, Shaoda Wang
papers.abstract: We show that judicial independence can reduce local protectionism and foster cross-regional economic integration. We exploit a judicial independence reform in China with staggered roll-out since 2014. The reform removed local governments’ control over local courts’ financial and personnel decisions, thereby substantially improving local courts’ independence. Combining novel data on the universes of civil lawsuits and business registration records, we show that local defendants’ rate of winning court cases against non-local plaintiffs declined by 7.0% after the reform. The effect is mainly driven by improvements in the quality of judicial decisions and is more salient for politically connected local defendants. Over time, the reduction in local protectionism encouraged smaller non-local firms to file lawsuits against larger local firms. Using the shareholding network extracted from business registration records, we find that the decline in local protectionism could attract 8.4% more inward investment flows into reformed localities. This has the potential to increase China’s GDP by 2.3% when the judicial independence reform is implemented nationwide.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：K0, P48, R11
papers.zh_title: 司法独立、地方保护主义与经济一体化：来自中国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明司法独立可以减少地方保护主义并促进跨区域经济一体化。我们利用中国自2014年起分阶段推行的司法独立改革。该改革取消了地方政府对地方法院财政和人事决策的控制，从而大幅提升了地方法院的独立性。结合涵盖所有民事诉讼和商业登记记录的新数据，我们发现改革后，本地被告在针对非本地原告的诉讼中胜诉率下降了7.0%。这一效应主要由司法判决质量的提升驱动，且对具有政治关联的本地被告更为显著。随着时间的推移，地方保护主义的减少鼓励了更多小型非本地企业起诉大型本地企业。利用从商业登记记录中提取的股权网络，我们发现地方保护主义的下降能够吸引更多（8.4%）的资本流入改革地区。当司法独立改革在全国范围内实施时，这有可能使中国GDP增长2.3%。

papers.title: International College Students' Impact on the US Skilled Labor Supply
papers.authors: Michel Beine, Giovanni Peri, Morgan Raux
papers.abstract: US universities have attracted hundreds of thousands of international students each year for the last decade. Some of these remain in the US after graduating and contribute to the high skilled labor supply in US labor markets. In this paper, we identify and estimate by how much one more international master’s (or bachelor’s) student increases the skilled labor supply of the US in the short-run. To estimate this "transition rate" we implement an instrumental variable estimation using quasi-random variation in the tuition charged to international students by public US universities in the year that they likely started their studies. We find that attracting an additional international student to a US university increases the local labor supply by about 0.23 employees for master’s students and about 0.11 for bachelor’s students. These averages conceal an important difference. While non-STEM bachelor’s and master’s students had negligible transition rates into US employment, STEM Master students have had significant transition rates around 0.2, especially after the 2008 reform of Optional Practical Training for STEM graduates.
papers.zh_title: 国际大学生对美国熟练劳动力供给的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，美国大学每年吸引数十万国际学生。其中一些学生在毕业后留在美国，为美国劳动力市场的高技能劳动力供给做出贡献。在本文中，我们识别并估计了每增加一名国际硕士（或学士）学生在短期内对美国熟练劳动力供给的增加量。为了估计这一“转化率”，我们采用工具变量估计法，利用美国公立大学在可能入学年份对国际学生收取学费的准随机变化。我们发现，吸引一名额外的国际学生到美国大学，会使当地劳动力供给增加约0.23人（硕士生）和约0.11人（本科生）。这些平均值掩盖了一个重要差异。虽然非STEM（科学、技术、工程和数学）专业的本科生和硕士生进入美国就业的转化率可以忽略不计，但STEM硕士生的转化率显著，约为0.2，尤其是在2008年针对STEM毕业生的选择性实习培训改革之后。

papers.title: Depression and Loneliness Among the Elderly Poor
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Esther Duflo, Erin Grela, Madeline McKelway, Frank Schilbach, Garima Sharma, Girija Vaidyanathan
papers.abstract: The mental health of the elderly in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) is a largely neglected subject, both by policy and research. We combine data from the health and retirement family of surveys in seven LMICs (plus the US) to document that depressive symptoms among those aged 55 and above are more prevalent in those countries and increase sharply with age. Depressive symptoms in one survey wave are associated with a greater decline in functional abilities and higher probability of death in the next wave. Using data from a panel survey we conducted in Tamil Nadu with a focus on elderly living alone, we document that social isolation, poverty, and health challenges are three of the leading correlates of depression. We discuss potential policy interventions in these three domains, including some results from our randomized control trials in the Tamil Nadu sample.
papers.zh_title: 老年贫困人口的抑郁与孤独感
papers.zh_abstract: 低收入和中等收入国家（LMICs）老年人的心理健康是一个在政策和研究方面都很大程度上被忽视的课题。我们结合了七个低收入和中等收入国家（加上美国）的健康与退休系列调查数据，记录到在这些国家中，55岁及以上人群的抑郁症状更为普遍，并且随年龄增长而急剧增加。一次调查波次中的抑郁症状与下一波次中功能能力下降幅度更大以及死亡概率更高相关。利用我们在泰米尔纳德邦进行的一项面板调查数据（重点关注独居老年人），我们记录了社会孤立、贫困和健康挑战是抑郁的三个主要相关因素。我们讨论了在这三个领域可能的政策干预措施，包括我们在泰米尔纳德邦样本中进行的随机对照试验的一些结果。

papers.title: Is Social Protection a Luxury Good?
papers.authors: Michael Lokshin, Martin Ravallion, Iván Torre
papers.abstract: The claim that social protection is a luxury good—with a national income elasticity exceeding unity—has as been influential. The paper tests the “luxury good hypothesis” using newly-assembled data on social protection spending across countries since 1995, treating the pandemic period separately, as it entailed a large expansion in social protection efforts. While the mean income share devoted to social protection rises with income, this is attributable to multiple confounders, including relative prices, weak governance in low-income countries and access to information-communication technologies. Controlling for these, social protection is not a luxury good. This was also true during the pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 社会保护是奢侈品吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 社会保护是奢侈品——其国民收入弹性超过1——这一论断颇具影响力。本文利用1995年以来各国社会保护支出的新汇编数据检验了“奢侈品假说”，并将疫情时期单独处理，因为该时期社会保护努力大幅扩张。虽然社会保护支出占国民收入的平均份额随收入增加而上升，但这可归因于多种混杂因素，包括相对价格、低收入国家治理薄弱以及信息通信技术的可及性。在控制这些因素后，社会保护并非奢侈品。在疫情期间也是如此。

papers.title: Understanding Labor Market Discrimination Against Transgender People: Evidence from a Double List Experiment and a Survey
papers.authors: Billur Aksoy, Christopher S. Carpenter, Dario Sansone
papers.abstract: Using a US nationally representative sample and a double list experiment designed to elicit views free from social desirability bias, we find that anti-transgender labor market attitudes are significantly underreported. After correcting for this concealment, we report that 73 percent of people would be comfortable with a transgender manager and 74 percent support employment non-discrimination protection for transgender people. We also show that respondents severely underestimate the population level of support for transgender individuals in the workplace, and we find that labor market support for transgender people is significantly lower than support for gay, lesbian, and bisexual people. Our results provide timely evidence on workplace-related views toward transgender people and help us better understand employment discrimination against them.
papers.zh_title: 理解劳动力市场对跨性别者的歧视：来自双重列表实验和一项调查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国全国代表性样本和旨在引出不受社会期望偏差影响的观点的双重列表实验，我们发现反跨性别的劳动力市场态度被显著低报。在纠正这种隐瞒后，我们报告称73%的人对跨性别管理者感到舒适，74%的人支持针对跨性别者的就业非歧视保护。我们还表明，受访者严重低估了工作场所中对跨性别者支持的人口水平，并且我们发现对跨性别者的劳动力市场支持显著低于对男同性恋、女同性恋和双性恋者的支持。我们的结果为工作场所中与跨性别者相关的观点提供了及时的证据，并有助于我们更好地理解针对他们的就业歧视。

papers.title: The Human Perils of Scaling Smart Technologies: Evidence from Field Experiments
papers.authors: Alec Brandon, Christopher M. Clapp, John A. List, Robert D. Metcalfe, Michael Price
papers.abstract: Smart-home technologies have been heralded as an important way to increase energy conservation. While in vitro engineering estimates support optimism, little has been done to explore whether such estimates scale beyond the lab. We estimate the causal impact of smart thermostats on energy use via two novel framed field experiments in which a random subset of treated households have a smart thermostat installed in their home. Examining 18 months of associated high-frequency data on household energy consumption, yielding more than 16 million hourly electricity and daily natural gas observations, we find little evidence that smart thermostats have a statistically or economically significant effect on energy use. Using almost four million observations of system events including human interactions with their smart thermostat, we find that user behavior dampens energy savings and explains the discrepancy between estimates from engineering models, which assume a perfectly compliant subject, and actual households, who are occupied by users acting in accord with behavioral economists’ conjectures. In this manner, our data document a keen threat to the scalability of new user-based technologies.
papers.zh_title: 智能技术规模化的人类风险：来自田野实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 智能家居技术被誉为增加节能的重要途径。虽然体外工程估算支持乐观态度，但很少有研究探讨这些估算能否在实验室之外规模化。我们通过两项新颖的框架田野实验来估算智能恒温器对能源使用的因果影响，其中随机选取的部分处理组家庭在家中安装了智能恒温器。通过检查18个月相关的高频家庭能源消耗数据（产生超过1600万个每小时电力和每日天然气观测值），我们几乎没有发现智能恒温器对能源使用具有统计或经济上显著影响的证据。利用近400万个系统事件观测值（包括人类与其智能恒温器的互动），我们发现用户行为削弱了节能效果，并解释了工程模型（假设完全服从的受试者）与实际家庭（由按照行为经济学家猜想行事的用户占据）估算之间的差异。通过这种方式，我们的数据记录了基于用户的新技术可规模化性的一个显著威胁。

papers.title: College Consumption Amenities, Academic Performance, and Donation Behavior
papers.authors: Joshua M. Hyman, Isaac McFarlin Jr.
papers.abstract: Colleges compete to attract students by investing in amenities such as athletics, dormitories, and student activities. We examine the effect of student consumption of postsecondary amenities on academic achievement and future donation behavior in the context of Big-Time college sports. We resolve the selection issue using data from a large, public university with a highly-ranked men’s basketball team, where student season tickets are awarded by lottery. Game attendance has small negative effects on academic performance but no impact on donation behavior. Negative academic effects are concentrated at the bottom of the achievement distribution and driven by in-state students and students attending during seasons when the team reaches the postseason tournament. We uncover no evidence of spillover effects to roommates. Our results suggest that certain postsecondary amenities may hinder academic performance, with little upside from future giving.
papers.zh_title: 大学消费性设施、学业表现与捐赠行为
papers.zh_abstract: 大学通过投资于体育、宿舍和学生活动等设施来竞争吸引学生。我们以大型大学体育为背景，考察学生对高等教育设施消费对学业成绩和未来捐赠行为的影响。我们利用一所拥有高排名男子篮球队的大型公立大学的数据来解决选择问题，该校的学生季票通过抽签分配。观赛对学业成绩有微小的负面影响，但对捐赠行为没有影响。负面的学业影响集中在成绩分布底部的学生，并且主要由本州学生以及在该队进入季后赛赛季期间观赛的学生驱动。我们没有发现对室友的溢出效应。我们的结果表明，某些高等教育设施可能会阻碍学业表现，而未来捐赠的收益甚微。

papers.title: Perceptions about Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Michael D. Bauer, Carolin Pflueger, Adi Sunderam
papers.abstract: We estimate perceptions about the Fed's monetary policy rule from micro data on professional forecasters. The perceived rule varies significantly over time, with important consequences for monetary policy and bond markets. Over the monetary policy cycle, easings are perceived to be quick and surprising, while tightenings are perceived to be gradual and data-dependent. Consistent with the idea that forecasters learn about the policy rule from policy decisions, the perceived monetary policy rule responds to high-frequency monetary policy surprises. Variation in the perceived rule impacts financial markets, explaining changes in the sensitivity of interest rates to macroeconomic announcements and affecting risk premia on long-term Treasury bonds. It also helps explain forecast errors for the future federal funds rate. We interpret these findings through the lens of a model with forecaster heterogeneity and learning from observed policy decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E03, E4, E42, E44, G12
papers.zh_title: 对货币政策的认知
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用专业预测者的微观数据来估算对美联储货币政策规则的认知。感知到的规则随时间显著变化，对货币政策和债券市场产生重要影响。在货币政策周期中，宽松政策被认为迅速且出人意料，而紧缩政策则被认为渐进且依赖数据。与预测者从政策决策中学习政策规则的观点一致，感知到的货币政策规则会对高频货币政策意外做出反应。感知规则的变化会影响金融市场，解释了利率对宏观经济公告敏感性的变化，并影响长期国债的风险溢价。它还有助于解释未来联邦基金利率的预测误差。我们通过一个包含预测者异质性和从观察到的政策决策中学习的模型来解读这些发现。

papers.title: Tail Risk in Production Networks
papers.authors: Ian Dew-Becker
papers.abstract: This paper describes the response of the economy to large shocks in a nonlinear production network. While arbitrary combinations of shocks can be studied, it focuses on a sector's tail centrality, which quantifies the effect of a large negative shock to the sector – a measure of the systemic risk of each sector. Tail centrality is theoretically and empirically very different from local centrality measures such as sales share – in a benchmark case, it is measured as a sector's average downstream closeness to final production. The paper then uses the results to analyze the determinants of total tail risk in the economy. Increases in interconnectedness in the presence of complementarity can simultaneously reduce the sensitivity of the economy to small shocks while increasing the sensitivity to large shocks. Tail risk is strongest in economies that display conditional granularity, where some sectors become highly influential following negative shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME, PR；JEL：D24, D57, E13, E32
papers.zh_title: 生产网络中的尾部风险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文描述了在非线性生产网络中经济对大规模冲击的反应。虽然可以研究任意冲击组合，但本文聚焦于一个部门的尾部中心度，该指标量化了该部门遭受大规模负面冲击的影响——即每个部门的系统性风险度量。尾部中心度在理论和实证上都与销售份额等局部中心度指标截然不同——在基准情形下，它被衡量为一个部门到最终生产的平均下游接近度。然后，本文利用这些结果分析经济中总尾部风险的决定因素。在存在互补性的情况下，互联性的增强可以同时降低经济对小冲击的敏感性，同时增加对大冲击的敏感性。尾部风险在表现出条件粒度性的经济体中最为强烈，在这些经济体中，一些部门在遭受负面冲击后会变得极具影响力。

papers.title: Real-Time Forward-Looking Skewness over the Business Cycle
papers.authors: Ian Dew-Becker
papers.abstract: This paper measures option-implied skewness for individual firms and the overall stock market between 1980 and 2021, giving real-time measures of conditional micro and macro skewness. There are three key results: 1. Micro skewness is significantly procyclical, while macro skewness is acyclical; 2. Micro skewness leads the business cycle and is strongly linked to credit spreads, suggesting one potential causal channel; 3. Micro skewness is significantly, and not mechanically, correlated with macro volatility, implying that there is a common shock driving them both, which is also linked to the business cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, E22, E27, E3, G13
papers.zh_title: 经济周期中的实时前瞻性偏度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文衡量了1980年至2021年间单个公司和整个股票市场的期权隐含偏度，提供了条件性微观和宏观偏度的实时度量。有三个关键结果：1. 微观偏度显著顺周期，而宏观偏度是非周期的；2. 微观偏度领先于经济周期，并与信用利差密切相关，暗示了一个潜在的因果渠道；3. 微观偏度与宏观波动率显著相关，且并非机械相关，这意味着存在一个共同冲击驱动两者，该冲击也与经济周期相关。

papers.title: Effect of Macroprudential Policies on Sovereign Bond Markets: Evidence from the ASEAN-4 Countries
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Gazi Salah. Uddin, Tianqi Luo, Ranadeva Jayasekera, Donghyun Park
papers.abstract: This paper examines whether prudential policies help to reduce sovereign bond vulnerability to global spillover risk in ASEAN-4 countries (Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, and Thailand). We measure sovereign vulnerability within a risk connectedness network among sovereign bonds. The direct effect is that markets with tighter prudential policies have significantly smaller spillovers from the Treasury yield shocks of other regional and global economies. The sum of indirect and direct effects indicates that prudential policies reduce sovereign spillover risk in the long term. These findings suggest prudential policies have dual efficiency in sovereign risk regulation and Treasury internationalization.
papers.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策对主权债券市场的影响：来自东盟四国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了审慎政策是否有助于降低东盟四国（印度尼西亚、马来西亚、菲律宾和泰国）主权债券对全球溢出风险的脆弱性。我们在主权债券之间的风险关联网络中衡量主权脆弱性。直接影响是，审慎政策更严格的市场，其国债收益率受到其他区域和全球经济体冲击的溢出效应显著更小。间接和直接效应的总和表明，审慎政策在长期内降低了主权溢出风险。这些发现表明，审慎政策在主权风险监管和国债国际化方面具有双重效率。

papers.title: Dollar Reserves and U.S. Yields: Identifying the Price Impact of Official Flows
papers.authors: Rashad Ahmed, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: This paper shows that the price impact of foreign official (FO) purchases or sales of U.S. Treasuries (USTs) is about twice as large as previously reported in the literature once critical sources of endogeneity are addressed. We also show that prevailing estimates of this price impact suffer from omitted variable bias when foreign government bond yields and Federal Reserve policies are not controlled for. By exploiting changes in the volatility of FO flows and U.S. yields after the 2008 Global Financial Crisis, we identify a FO flow shock via heteroskedasticity in a structural VAR. We estimate that a $100B flow shock moves the 5-year, 10-year, and 30-year yields by more than 100 basis points on impact, compared to the 19-44 basis points range that we estimate by assuming FO flows are price inelastic and without controlling for foreign yields and Fed actions. Our findings suggest that FO sales of USTs played a critical role during the March 2020 episode of Treasury market turmoil and that even a small reduction in the Dollar's share of China's reserves could have a significant impact on U.S. long-term interest rates.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, F2, F30, G1
papers.zh_title: 美元储备与美国收益率：识别官方流动的价格影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，一旦解决了关键的内生性来源，外国官方购买或出售美国国债的价格影响大约是文献先前报告的两倍。我们还表明，当未控制外国政府债券收益率和美联储政策时，这种价格影响的普遍估计存在遗漏变量偏差。通过利用2008年全球金融危机后外国官方流动和美国收益率波动性的变化，我们利用结构向量自回归中的异方差性识别出一个外国官方流动冲击。我们估计，一个1000亿美元的流动冲击会使5年期、10年期和30年期收益率在冲击发生时变动超过100个基点，而我们假设外国官方流动价格无弹性且未控制外国收益率和美联储行动时估计的范围为19-44个基点。我们的发现表明，在2020年3月国债市场动荡期间，外国官方出售美国国债发挥了关键作用，并且即使美元在中国储备中的份额小幅减少，也可能对美国长期利率产生显著影响。

papers.title: Long-Run Trends in Long-Maturity Real Rates 1311-2021
papers.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Barbara Rossi, Paul Schmelzing
papers.abstract: Taking advantage of key recent advances in long-run financial and economic data, this paper analyzes the statistical properties of global long-maturity real interest rates over the past seven centuries. In contrast to existing consensus, which has overwhelmingly concentrated on short samples for short-maturity rates, we find that long-maturity real interest rates across advanced economies are in fact trend stationary, and exhibit a persistent downward trend since the Renaissance. We investigate structural breaks in real interest rates over time using multiple statistical approaches, and find that only the Black Death and the "Trinity default" of 1557 appear as consistent inflection points in capital markets on both global and country levels. While a 1914 break is also suggested in multiple series (though less robust than existing literature would lead one to expect), the evidence for an inflection point in 1981 appears much weaker. We further examine trends in persistence, as well as commonly-invoked drivers of global real rates: exploiting significant data advances, we argue that historically, demographic and productivity factors appear to show no promising causal role, and in fact diverge from real interest rates over the long run.
papers.zh_title: 长期限实际利率的长期趋势：1311-2021年
papers.zh_abstract: 利用近期在长期金融和经济数据方面的关键进展，本文分析了过去七个世纪全球长期限实际利率的统计特性。与现有共识（主要集中于短期利率的短样本）相反，我们发现发达经济体的长期限实际利率实际上是趋势平稳的，并且自文艺复兴以来呈现出持续的下行趋势。我们使用多种统计方法研究了实际利率随时间变化的结构性断裂，发现只有黑死病和1557年的“三位一体违约”在全球和国家层面的资本市场中表现为一致的拐点。虽然多个序列也提示了1914年的断裂（尽管不如现有文献所预期的那么稳健），但1981年存在拐点的证据则弱得多。我们进一步考察了持续性的趋势，以及通常被引用的全球实际利率驱动因素：利用显著的数据进展，我们认为从历史上看，人口和生产力因素似乎没有显示出有希望的因果作用，并且实际上在长期内与实际利率背道而驰。

papers.title: Fertility and the Education of African Parents and Children
papers.authors: Tom Vogl
papers.abstract: Sub-Saharan Africa exhibits higher fertility and lower education than other world regions. Economic and demographic theory posit that these phenomena are linked, with slow fertility decline connected to slow education growth among both adults and children. Using microdata from 33 African countries, this paper documents the co-evolution of adult education, fertility, and child education in female birth cohorts surrounding the onset of the region's fertility transition. Fertility change displays a robust negative relationship with the educational outcomes of adult women but a more nuanced relationship with the educational outcomes of children. As fertility declines, children's grade attainment rises, but their school enrollment does not. The divergence is partly explained by a split in how women's education relates to fertility and child education. Rising women's education predicts declining fertility and rising children's grade attainment, but it is less systematically linked to enrollment change.
papers.zh_title: 生育率与非洲父母及子女的教育
papers.zh_abstract: 撒哈拉以南非洲地区的生育率高于世界其他地区，而教育水平则较低。经济和人口理论认为这些现象是相互关联的，生育率下降缓慢与成人和儿童的教育增长缓慢有关。利用33个非洲国家的微观数据，本文记录了在该地区生育率转变开始前后的女性出生队列中，成人教育、生育率和儿童教育的共同演变。生育率变化与成年女性的教育成果呈现稳健的负相关关系，但与儿童的教育成果关系更为微妙。随着生育率下降，儿童的年级完成率上升，但他们的入学率并未上升。这种分化部分可以通过女性教育与生育率及儿童教育之间关系的差异来解释。女性教育的提高预示着生育率下降和儿童年级完成率上升，但与入学率变化的系统性关联较弱。

papers.title: Exposure to Past Immigration Waves and Attitudes toward Newcomers
papers.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Luca Stella
papers.abstract: How does previous exposure to massive immigrant inflows affect concerns about current immigration and the integration of refugees? To answer this question, we investigate attitudes toward newcomers among natives and previous immigrants. In areas that in the 1990s received higher inflows of immigrants of German origin—so-called ethnic Germans—native Germans are more likely to believe that refugees are a resource for the economy and the culture, viewing them as an opportunity rather than a risk. Refugees living in these areas report better health and feel less exposed to xenophobia.
papers.zh_title: 过去移民浪潮的暴露程度与对新来者的态度
papers.zh_abstract: 先前大规模移民流入的经历如何影响对当前移民和难民融入的担忧？为了回答这个问题，我们调查了本地人和先前移民对新来者的态度。在1990年代接收了更多德裔移民（即所谓的“民族德意志人”）流入的地区，德国本地人更倾向于认为难民是经济和文化的资源，将其视为机遇而非风险。居住在这些地区的难民报告了更好的健康状况，并感觉较少受到仇外心理的影响。

papers.title: Quantifying and Explaining the Decline in Public-School Teacher Retirement Benefits
papers.authors: Nino Abashidze, Robert L. Clark, Lee A. Craig
papers.abstract: In recent decades, many states have reduced future retirement benefits for newly hired teachers. We estimate that in 2020 the average initial monthly retirement benefit, for teachers retiring with 30 years of service, is 11.2 percent lower than that of teachers retiring in the same plan with the provisions that were in place in 2000, implying a lower annual benefit of over $3,000. We examine why state plans that cover only teachers, along with plans in which teachers are not included in Social Security, have made smaller reductions in the generosity of their pension benefits in recent decades.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H55, J26, J32, J45, N31
papers.zh_title: 量化并解释公立学校教师退休福利的下降
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，许多州降低了新入职教师的未来退休福利。我们估计，到2020年，对于服务满30年退休的教师，其平均初始月度退休福利比2000年同一计划下退休的教师低11.2%，这意味着年福利减少超过3000美元。我们研究了为何仅覆盖教师的州计划，以及教师未被纳入社会保障的计划，在近几十年对其养老金福利的慷慨程度做出了较小的削减。

papers.title: What Drives Risky Prescription Opioid Use? Evidence from Migration
papers.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Matthew Gentzkow, Dean Li, Heidi L. Williams
papers.abstract: We investigate the role of person- and place-specific factors in the opioid epidemic by developing and estimating a dynamic model of risky prescription opioid use. We estimate the model using the relationship between cross-state migration and risky use among adults receiving federal disability insurance from 2006 to 2015. Event studies suggest that moving to a state with a 3.5 percentage point higher rate of risky use (roughly the difference between the 20th and 80th percentile states) increases the probability of risky use by 1.0 percentage point on-impact, followed by an additional increase of 0.30 percentage points per subsequent year. Model estimates imply large place effects in both the likelihood of transitioning to addiction and the availability of prescription opioids. A one standard deviation reduction in all place effects would have reduced risky use by two-thirds over our study period. Reductions in place effects on addiction have a larger cumulative effect than analogous reductions in place effects on availability. However, their relative efficacy is reversed in the first few years, suggesting a temporal tradeoff among policy options.
papers.zh_title: 什么驱动了危险的处方阿片类药物使用？来自移民的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过开发并估计一个危险处方阿片类药物使用的动态模型，研究了个体因素和地点因素在阿片类药物流行中的作用。我们利用2006年至2015年间联邦残疾保险成年受益人的跨州迁移与危险使用之间的关系来估计该模型。事件研究表明，迁移到一个危险使用率高出3.5个百分点（大致相当于第20百分位州与第80百分位州之间的差异）的州，会立即将危险使用的概率提高1.0个百分点，随后每年再增加0.30个百分点。模型估计表明，地点因素在成瘾转变的可能性和处方阿片类药物的可获得性方面都有很大影响。所有地点因素减少一个标准差，将在我们的研究期间内将危险使用减少三分之二。减少成瘾方面的地点因素比减少可获得性方面的地点因素具有更大的累积效应。然而，在最初几年，它们的相对有效性是相反的，这表明政策选择之间存在时间上的权衡。

papers.title: Do the Retired Elderly in Europe Decumulate Their Wealth? The Importance of Bequest Motives, Precautionary Saving, Public Pensions, and Homeownership
papers.authors: Charles Yuji Horioka, Luigi Ventura
papers.abstract: In this paper, we use micro data on a large number of European countries from the Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) to examine the wealth accumulation (saving) behavior of the retired elderly in Europe. To summarize our main findings, we find that less than half of the retired elderly in Europe are decumulating their wealth and that the average wealth accumulation rate of the retired elderly in Europe is positive though relatively moderate (6.6% over a 3-year period). These findings strongly suggest that the Wealth Decumulation (or Retirement Saving) Puzzle (the tendency of the retired elderly to not decumulate their wealth or to decumulate their wealth more slowly than expected) applies in the case of Europe. Moreover, our regression results suggest that bequest motives, generous public pension systems, and the reluctance of retired elderly homeowners to sell or borrow against their owner-occupied housing are the primary explanations for the existence of the Wealth Decumulation Puzzle in Europe.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D14, D15, D64, E21, H55, J14
papers.zh_title: 欧洲退休老年人会减少财富吗？遗赠动机、预防性储蓄、公共养老金和住房所有权的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用来自欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE）的多个欧洲国家的微观数据，考察欧洲退休老年人的财富积累（储蓄）行为。总结我们的主要发现，我们发现不到一半的欧洲退休老年人正在减少他们的财富，并且欧洲退休老年人的平均财富减少率虽然相对温和（三年期内为6.6%），但为正值。这些发现强烈表明，财富减少（或退休储蓄）之谜（退休老年人倾向于不减少财富或比预期更慢地减少财富）适用于欧洲的情况。此外，我们的回归结果表明，遗赠动机、慷慨的公共养老金体系以及退休老年房主不愿出售或以其自住住房为抵押借款，是欧洲存在财富减少之谜的主要原因。

papers.title: Choosing Who Chooses: Selection-Driven Targeting in Energy Rebate Programs
papers.authors: Takanori Ida, Takunori Ishihara, Koichiro Ito, Daido Kido, Toru Kitagawa, Shosei Sakaguchi, Shusaku Sasaki
papers.abstract: We develop an optimal policy assignment rule that integrates two distinctive approaches commonly used in economics—targeting by observables and targeting through self-selection. Our method can be used with experimental or quasi-experimental data to identify who should be treated, be untreated, and self-select to achieve a policymaker’s objective. Applying this method to a randomized controlled trial on a residential energy rebate program, we find that targeting that optimally exploits both observable data and self-selection outperforms conventional targeting. We use the Local Average Treatment Effect (LATE) framework (Imbens and Angrist, 1994) to investigate the mechanism in our approach. By estimating several key LATEs based on the random variation created by our experiment, we demonstrate how our method allows policymakers to identify whose self-selection would be valuable and harmful to social welfare.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：C01, Q4, Q48, Q5, Q58
papers.zh_title: 选择谁选择：能源回扣项目中的选择驱动型目标定位
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个最优政策分配规则，该规则整合了经济学中常用的两种不同方法——基于可观测特征的目标定位和通过自我选择的目标定位。我们的方法可以利用实验或准实验数据，来确定谁应该被处理、谁不应该被处理以及谁应该自我选择，以实现政策制定者的目标。将此方法应用于一项关于住宅能源回扣项目的随机对照试验，我们发现，最优地利用可观测数据和自我选择的目标定位优于传统目标定位。我们使用局部平均处理效应（LATE）框架（Imbens和Angrist, 1994）来研究我们方法中的机制。通过基于实验产生的随机变异估计几个关键的LATE，我们展示了我们的方法如何使政策制定者能够识别哪些人的自我选择对社会福利有益，哪些人的自我选择有害。

papers.title: Expectations and the Neutrality of Interest Rates
papers.authors: John H. Cochrane
papers.abstract: Our central banks set interest rates, and do not even pretend to control money supplies. How do interest rates affect inflation? We finally have a complete theory of inflation under interest rate targets and unconstrained liquidity. Its long-run properties mirror those of monetary theory: Inflation can be stable and determinate under interest rate targets, including a peg, analogous to a k-percent rule. The zero bound era is confirmatory evidence. Uncomfortably, stability means that higher interest rates eventually raise inflation, just as higher money growth eventually raises inflation. Sticky prices generate some short-run non-neutrality as well: Higher nominal interest rates can raise real rates and lower output. A model in which higher nominal interest rates temporarily lower inflation, without a change in fiscal policy, is a harder task. I exhibit one such model, but it paints a much more limited picture than standard beliefs. We either need a model with a stronger effect, or to accept that higher interest rates have limited power to lower inflation. Empirical understanding of how interest rates affect inflation without fiscal help is also a wide-open question.
papers.zh_title: 预期与利率的中性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们的中央银行设定利率，甚至不假装控制货币供应量。利率如何影响通货膨胀？我们终于有了一个关于利率目标和不受限制的流动性下通货膨胀的完整理论。其长期特性反映了货币理论的特性：在利率目标（包括钉住利率）下，通货膨胀可以是稳定和确定的，类似于k%规则。零利率下限时代是确证性证据。令人不安的是，稳定性意味着更高的利率最终会提高通货膨胀，就像更高的货币增长最终会提高通货膨胀一样。价格粘性也产生了一些短期非中性：更高的名义利率可以提高实际利率并降低产出。一个模型，其中更高的名义利率暂时降低通货膨胀，而不改变财政政策，是一项更艰巨的任务。我展示了一个这样的模型，但它描绘的画面比标准信念要有限得多。我们要么需要一个具有更强效应的模型，要么接受更高的利率在降低通货膨胀方面的能力有限。在没有财政帮助的情况下，利率如何影响通货膨胀的实证理解也是一个悬而未决的问题。

papers.title: Energy Efficiency Can Deliver for Climate Policy: Evidence from Machine Learning-Based Targeting
papers.authors: Peter Christensen, Paul Francisco, Erica Myers, Hansen Shao, Mateus Souza
papers.abstract: Building energy efficiency has been a cornerstone of greenhouse gas mitigation strategies for decades. However, impact evaluations have revealed that energy savings typically fall short of engineering model forecasts that currently guide funding decisions. This creates a resource allocation problem that impedes progress on climate change. Using data from the largest U.S. energy efficiency program, we demonstrate that a data-driven approach to predicting retrofit impacts based on previously realized outcomes is more accurate than the status quo engineering models. Targeting high-return interventions based on these predictions dramatically increases net social benefits, from $0.93 to $1.23 per dollar invested.
papers.zh_title: 能源效率可以为气候政策带来成效：来自基于机器学习的定位的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 几十年来，建筑能效一直是温室气体减排战略的基石。然而，影响评估显示，能源节约通常低于目前指导资金决策的工程模型预测。这造成了资源配置问题，阻碍了气候变化的进展。利用美国最大能源效率项目的数据，我们证明，基于先前实现的结果来预测改造影响的数驱动方法比现状工程模型更准确。基于这些预测来定位高回报干预措施，将净社会效益从每投资1美元获得0.93美元大幅提高到1.23美元。

papers.title: Advances in the Economic Theory of Cultural Transmission
papers.authors: Alberto Bisin, Thierry Verdier
papers.abstract: In this paper we survey recent advances in the economic theory of cultural transmission. We highlight three main themes on which the literature has made great progress in the last ten years: the domain of traits subject to cultural transmission, the micro-foundations for the technology of transmission, and feedback effects between culture, institutions, and various socio-economic environments. We conclude suggesting interesting areas for future research.
papers.zh_title: 文化传播经济理论的进展
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们综述了文化传播经济理论的最新进展。我们强调了该文献在过去十年中取得巨大进展的三个主要主题：受文化传播影响的特质领域、传播技术的微观基础，以及文化、制度和各种社会经济环境之间的反馈效应。最后，我们提出了未来研究的有趣领域。

papers.title: Housing Wealth and Online Consumer Behavior: Evidence from Xiong'an New Area in China
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Long Wang, Yang Yang
papers.abstract: We provide new evidence on the causal effects of housing wealth on consumer behavior. To overcome the empirical challenge of non-random housing wealth changes, we exploit the unexpected announcement of China's newest national-level new area—Xiong'an New Area—on April 1, 2017 as an exogenous shock to housing prices. We use a proprietary dataset of individual-level online consumption from the largest e-commerce company in China to measure various aspects of consumer behavior, such as consumption patterns, purchase hesitation, tolerance to unsatisfied products, and shirking (proxied by making online purchases during work hours). We explore the underlying mechanisms through which the housing shock affects consumer behavior; in particular, we attempt to disentangle the realizable and unrealizable housing wealth effects.
papers.zh_title: 住房财富与在线消费者行为：来自中国雄安新区的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于住房财富对消费者行为因果效应的新证据。为了克服住房财富变化非随机的实证挑战，我们利用2017年4月1日中国最新国家级新区——雄安新区的意外宣布作为房价的外生冲击。我们使用来自中国最大电子商务公司的个人层面在线消费专有数据集，来衡量消费者行为的各个方面，例如消费模式、购买犹豫、对不满意产品的容忍度以及怠工（以工作时间进行在线购物作为代理）。我们探讨了住房冲击影响消费者行为的潜在机制；特别是，我们试图区分可实现的住房财富效应和不可实现的住房财富效应。

papers.title: Do Low-skilled Immigrants Improve Native Productivity but Worsen Local Amenities? Learning from the South Korean Experience
papers.authors: Hyejin Kim, Jongkwan Lee, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: In this study, we first evaluate the effect of a significant increase in low-skilled immigration in Korean municipalities from 2010-2015 on the internal migration of natives. Using Korean survey data we are able to distinguish between natives moving for work-related and non-work-related reasons. Using a change in immigration policy and the pre-existing networks of immigrants to construct an instrument for immigration across Korean municipalities, we find that locations experiencing significant low-skilled immigration attracted natives who moved for working purposes. However, these locations saw outflows of natives that moved for non-work-related reasons, such as due to housing and local amenities. We then estimate that immigration had positive effects on local firm creation and on native wages but reduced the quality of local amenities. It had small to no impact on local housing prices. These facts together suggest that immigration attracted natives who value labor income over local amenities but pushed out those who place a higher value on local amenities. Thus, immigration, while generating little net native migration, changed the composition of natives in Korean municipalities.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：J21, J61, R12, R31
papers.zh_title: 低技能移民是否提升了本地生产率但恶化了本地便利设施？来自韩国的经验
papers.zh_abstract: 在本研究中，我们首先评估了2010-2015年韩国各城市低技能移民显著增加对本地居民内部迁移的影响。利用韩国调查数据，我们能够区分因工作相关和非工作相关原因迁移的本地居民。通过利用移民政策变化和移民的既有网络构建韩国各城市移民的工具变量，我们发现经历显著低技能移民流入的地区吸引了因工作目的迁移的本地居民。然而，这些地区也出现了因非工作相关原因（如住房和本地便利设施）而迁出的本地居民。随后，我们估计移民对本地企业创建和本地工资产生了积极影响，但降低了本地便利设施的质量。移民对本地房价影响很小甚至没有影响。这些事实共同表明，移民吸引了重视劳动收入超过本地便利设施的本地居民，但挤出了那些更看重本地便利设施的人。因此，移民虽然几乎没有导致本地居民净迁移，但改变了韩国各城市本地居民的构成。

papers.title: The Rise of Age-Friendly Jobs
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Nicolaj Søndergaard Mühlbach, Andrew J. Scott
papers.abstract: In 1990, one in five U.S. workers were aged over 50 years whereas today it is one in three. One possible explanation for this is that occupations have become more accommodating to the preferences of older workers. We explore this by constructing an “age-friendliness” index for occupations. We use Natural Language Processing to measure the degree of overlap between textual descriptions of occupations and characteristics which define age friendliness. Our index provides an approximation to rankings produced by survey participants and has predictive power for the occupational share of older workers. We find that between 1990 and 2020 around three quarters of occupations have seen their age-friendliness increase and employment in above-average age-friendly occupations has risen by 49 million. However, older workers have not benefited disproportionately from this rise, with substantial gains going to younger females and college graduates and with male non-college educated workers losing out the most. These findings point to the need to frame the rise of age-friendly jobs in the context of other labour market trends and imperfections.
