Purely age-based policies are insufficient given both heterogeneity amongst older workers as well as similarities between groups of older and younger workers. The latter is especially apparent in the overlapping appeal of specific occupational characteristics.
papers.zh_title: 适龄友好型工作的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 1990年，美国五分之一的工人年龄超过50岁，而如今这一比例是三分之一。一个可能的解释是，职业已变得更加适应老年工人的偏好。我们通过构建职业的“适龄友好度”指数来探索这一点。我们使用自然语言处理来衡量职业文本描述与定义适龄友好度的特征之间的重叠程度。我们的指数近似于调查参与者产生的排名，并对老年工人的职业份额具有预测能力。我们发现，在1990年至2020年间，大约四分之三的职业的适龄友好度有所提高，且高于平均适龄友好度职业的就业人数增加了4900万。然而，老年工人并未从这一增长中不成比例地受益，年轻女性和大学毕业生获得了显著收益，而男性非大学教育工人损失最大。这些发现表明，需要将适龄友好型工作的兴起置于其他劳动力市场趋势和不完善的背景下。鉴于老年工人之间的异质性以及老年和年轻工人群体之间的相似性，纯粹基于年龄的政策是不够的。后者在特定职业特征的共同吸引力中尤为明显。

papers.title: Transportation Networks, Short-term Mobility, and Pollution Exposure: Evidence from High-Speed Rail in China
papers.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Dave Donaldson, Shanjun Li, Yatang Lin, Deyu Rao
papers.abstract: Can the enhanced mobility created by transportation infrastructure investments help people to avoid environmental extremes? We use transaction records from China’s card payment system to measure experienced pollution exposure (EPE)—that is, exposure based on the pollution levels at travelers’ actual locations—and evaluate how EPE was affected by the country’s high-speed railway network, even while holding pollution itself constant. Our estimates imply a reduction in EPE that corresponds to a mortality benefit of 21.3 million life-years saved, primarily due to travelers changing their destinations towards locations with predictably cleaner air.
papers.zh_title: 交通网络、短期流动性与污染暴露：来自中国高铁的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 交通基础设施投资带来的增强流动性能否帮助人们避免环境极端情况？我们利用中国卡支付系统的交易记录来衡量经历过的污染暴露（EPE）——即基于旅行者实际所在地污染水平的暴露——并评估在污染本身保持不变的情况下，EPE如何受到国家高铁网络的影响。我们的估计表明，EPE的减少相当于挽救了2130万生命年的死亡效益，这主要是由于旅行者将目的地转向了空气质量可预测地更清洁的地点。

papers.title: Partial Identification of Personalized Treatment Response with Trial-reported Analyses of Binary Subgroups
papers.authors: Sheyu Li, Valentyn Litvin, Charles F. Manski
papers.abstract: Medical journals have adhered to a reporting practice that seriously limits the usefulness of published trial findings. Medical decision makers commonly observe many patient covariates and seek to use this information to personalize treatment choices. Yet standard summaries of trial findings only partition subjects into broad subgroups, typically into binary categories. Given this reporting practice, we study the problem of inference on long mean treatment outcomes E[y(t)|x], where t is a treatment, y(t) is a treatment outcome, and the covariate vector x has length K, each component being a binary variable. The available data are estimates of {E[y(t)|xk = 0], E[y(t)|xk = 1], P(xk)}, k = 1, . . . , K reported in journal articles. We show that reported trial findings partially identify {E[y(t)|x], P(x)}. Illustrative computations demonstrate that the summaries of trial findings in journal articles may imply only wide bounds on long mean outcomes. One can realistically tighten inferences if one can combine reported trial findings with credible assumptions having identifying power, such as bounded-variation assumptions.
papers.zh_title: 基于试验报告的二值亚组分析对个性化治疗反应的部分识别
papers.zh_abstract: 医学期刊一直遵循一种严重限制已发表试验结果有用性的报告实践。医疗决策者通常观察到许多患者协变量，并寻求利用这些信息来个性化治疗选择。然而，试验结果的标准摘要仅将受试者划分为宽泛的亚组，通常为二值类别。鉴于这种报告实践，我们研究了对长期平均治疗结果E[y(t)|x]的推断问题，其中t是治疗，y(t)是治疗结果，协变量向量x长度为K，每个分量都是二值变量。可用数据是期刊文章中报告的{E[y(t)|xk = 0], E[y(t)|xk = 1], P(xk)}的估计值，k = 1, . . . , K。我们表明，报告的试验结果部分识别了{E[y(t)|x], P(x)}。说明性计算表明，期刊文章中试验结果的摘要可能仅意味着长期平均结果的宽泛界限。如果可以将报告的试验结果与具有识别力的可信假设（如有界变异假设）相结合，则可以现实地收紧推断。

papers.title: Explanations for the Decline in Spending at Older Ages
papers.authors: Susann Rohwedder, Michael D. Hurd, Péter Hudomiet
papers.abstract: We use new data from the 2019 wave of the Consumption and Activities Mail Survey to help interpret the observed decline in spending as individuals age. At one extreme, forward-looking individuals optimally chose the decline; at the other, myopic individuals overspent and were forced to reduce spending because they had run out of wealth. Which interpretation is correct has important implications for the measurement of economic preparation for retirement. According to their own assessments, the fraction of respondents feeling financially constrained is lower at advanced ages, and the fraction satisfied with their economic situation is considerably higher at older ages than at ages near retirement. An important mechanism reconciling the evidence of reduced spending and greater economic satisfaction at older ages may be that individuals’ enjoyment of several activities declines with worsening health, widowing, and increasing age, leading to a lessening desire to spend on them. We find strong support for this hypothesis. Nonetheless, close to 20% of those older than 80 report not being satisfied with their financial situation, pointing to heterogeneity in economic security.
papers.zh_title: 老年支出下降的解释
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2019年消费与活动邮件调查的新数据来帮助解释观察到的随年龄增长支出下降的现象。在一个极端，前瞻性个体最优地选择了这种下降；在另一个极端，短视个体过度支出并因财富耗尽而被迫减少支出。哪种解释正确对衡量退休经济准备具有重要意义。根据受访者自己的评估，感到财务受限的比例在高龄阶段较低，而对经济状况满意的比例在老年阶段远高于接近退休年龄。调和老年支出减少与经济满意度提高证据的一个重要机制可能是，随着健康状况恶化、丧偶和年龄增长，个体对若干活动的享受程度下降，导致在这些活动上消费的意愿减弱。我们找到了支持这一假设的有力证据。尽管如此，近20%的80岁以上老年人报告对其财务状况不满意，这表明经济保障存在异质性。

papers.title: A Framework for Economic Growth with Capital-Embodied Technical Change
papers.authors: Benjamin F. Jones, Xiaojie Liu
papers.abstract: Technological advance is often embodied in capital inputs. This paper develops a model where capital innovations occur on two margins: (1) vertically, where a capital input becomes more productive at a given task; and (2) horizontally, where a capital input replaces labor at a given task. These two forms of technological advance engage in a macroeconomic “tug of war” when capital and labor have less than a unitary elasticity of substitution, and the resulting framework can meet numerous macroeconomic regularities. First, it can produce a balanced growth path and satisfy the Uzawa Growth Theorem—even though all technological progress occurs in capital inputs. Second, it can produce intuitive macroeconomic dynamics, adding perspectives on the apparent productivity slowdown and declining labor share of income. Third, it can produce rich industry dynamics and inform structural change, including declining GDP shares of agriculture and manufacturing, sectoral bottlenecks, the role of general purpose technologies, and the limited macroeconomic impacts of computing. Overall, this tractable framework can help resolve puzzling tensions between micro-level observations of technological advance and macroeconomic features of economic growth.
papers.zh_title: 资本体现型技术变革的经济增长框架
papers.zh_abstract: 技术进步通常体现在资本投入中。本文发展了一个模型，其中资本创新发生在两个边际上：（1）垂直方向，即资本投入在给定任务中变得更具生产力；（2）水平方向，即资本投入在给定任务中替代劳动力。当资本和劳动的替代弹性小于单位弹性时，这两种技术进步形式在宏观经济中展开“拉锯战”，由此产生的框架可以满足众多宏观经济规律。首先，它可以产生平衡增长路径并满足宇泽增长定理——尽管所有技术进步都发生在资本投入中。其次，它可以产生直观的宏观经济动态，为明显的生产率放缓和劳动收入份额下降增添视角。第三，它可以产生丰富的产业动态并为结构变革提供信息，包括农业和制造业GDP份额下降、部门瓶颈、通用技术的作用以及计算技术有限的宏观经济影响。总体而言，这个易于处理的框架有助于解决微观层面技术进步观察与宏观经济经济增长特征之间令人困惑的紧张关系。

papers.title: Monetary Policy and the Short-Rate Disconnect in Emerging Economies
papers.authors: Pierre De Leo, Gita Gopinath, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan
papers.abstract: We document that emerging market central banks adhere to Taylor-type rules and lower their policy rates when economic activity slows down, including as a response to U.S. monetary policy tightening. This suggests a countercyclical monetary policy stance. However, in contrast to advanced economies, short-term market rates do not move in tandem with policy rates. Market rates, if anything, tend to increase during recessions. We present evidence that this disconnect between policy rates and market rates can be significantly explained by fluctuations in dollar funding premia that get transmitted into local market rates through the banking sector that relies on foreign funding. Our findings shed light on the challenges to transmission and effectiveness of monetary policy in emerging economies.
papers.zh_title: 新兴经济体的货币政策与短期利率脱节
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了新兴市场央行遵循泰勒型规则，并在经济活动放缓时降低政策利率，包括作为对美国货币政策收紧的回应。这表明了一种逆周期的货币政策立场。然而，与发达经济体相反，短期市场利率并不与政策利率同步变动。市场利率在衰退期间反而倾向于上升。我们提供的证据表明，政策利率与市场利率之间的这种脱节可以显著由美元融资溢价的波动来解释，这些波动通过依赖外国融资的银行部门传导至本地市场利率。我们的发现揭示了新兴经济体货币政策传导和有效性的挑战。

papers.title: A Model of the Gold Standard
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Daniel Sanches
papers.abstract: The gold standard emerged as the international monetary system by the end of the 19th century. We formally study its properties in a micro-founded model and find that the scarcity of the world gold stock not only results in a suboptimal output of goods that are purchased with money but also subjects the domestic economy of a country to external shocks. The creation of inside money in the form of private credit instruments adds to the money supply, usually resulting in a Pareto improvement, but opens the door to the international transmission of banking crises. These properties of the gold standard can explain the limited adherence by peripheral countries because of the potential risks to their economies. We argue that the gold standard can be sustainable at the core but not at the periphery.
papers.zh_title: 金本位模型
papers.zh_abstract: 金本位在19世纪末成为国际货币体系。我们在一个微观基础模型中正式研究其性质，发现世界黄金存量的稀缺性不仅导致用货币购买的商品产出次优，而且使一国国内经济受到外部冲击。以私人信用工具形式创造内部货币增加了货币供应量，通常导致帕累托改进，但为银行危机的国际传导打开了大门。金本位的这些性质可以解释外围国家因潜在经济风险而有限参与的原因。我们认为，金本位在核心国家可以持续，但在外围国家则不能。

papers.title: Racial and Ethnic Disparities in Retirement Outcomes: Impacts of Outreach
papers.authors: Angelino Viceisza, Amaia Calhoun, Gabriella J.O. Lee
papers.abstract: We review select literature on racial and ethnic disparities in retirement outcomes in the United States and the impact of outreach on such outcomes. First, there are significant disparities in retirement outcomes, reflecting a long history of racism and structural barriers. Second, there is comparatively little work on the differential impact of retirement outreach across race and ethnicity. Future work should consider designing interventions that cater to the needs of specific demographic groups, for example, by embracing the fact that Blacks, Hispanics, and Whites acquire retirement information from different sources. Future work should incorporate behavioral insights, particularly from prior interventions, and innovate on methodologies for data collection, linking, and analysis.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：D83, J15, J26, J32, Z13
papers.zh_title: 退休结果中的种族与民族差异：外展服务的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于美国退休结果中种族与民族差异以及外展服务对这些结果影响的精选文献。首先，退休结果存在显著差异，这反映了长期的种族主义和结构性障碍。其次，关于退休外展服务在不同种族和民族群体中差异化影响的研究相对较少。未来的研究应考虑设计针对特定人口群体需求的干预措施，例如，认识到黑人、西班牙裔和白人从不同来源获取退休信息这一事实。未来的研究应纳入行为洞察，特别是来自先前干预措施的洞察，并在数据收集、链接和分析方法上进行创新。

papers.title: Looking Backward, Innovating Forward: A Theory of Competitive Cascades
papers.authors: Kevin Lim, Daniel Trefler, Miaojie Yu
papers.abstract: Innovation depends on exporting and, in particular, on scale and competition in export markets. We develop a theory featuring (1) quality-segmented markets, (2) step-by-step innovation that moves firms forward along the quality ladder, and (3) escape-the-competition motives for innovation. We derive four predictions about the impact on innovation of scale and competition: a firm with a large and less-competitive quality segment ahead or forward of it will have strong incentives to innovate into this profitable segment, while a firm with a small and more-competitive quality segment behind it will also have strong incentives to innovate for fear of facing firms in this segment in the future. We take these predictions to Chinese firm-level data during a period of explosive export growth (2000-2006). Using information about scale and competition by quality segment in China's export markets, we confirm all four hypotheses. By implication, and unlike in standard CES models, the impact of trade on innovation depends critically on how it drives scale and competition in high- versus low-quality segments.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, PR；JEL：F01, F12, F14, O3
papers.zh_title: 回顾过去，创新未来：竞争级联理论
papers.zh_abstract: 创新依赖于出口，特别是依赖于出口市场的规模和竞争。我们发展了一个理论，该理论包含：(1) 质量分割的市场，(2) 逐步创新，推动企业沿着质量阶梯前进，以及 (3) 逃避竞争的创新动机。我们推导出关于规模和竞争对创新影响的四个预测：一个在其前方或前方拥有较大且竞争较少质量段的企业，将有强烈的创新动机进入这个有利可图的质量段；而一个在其后方拥有较小且竞争更激烈质量段的企业，也将有强烈的创新动机，因为担心未来会面对该质量段的企业。我们将这些预测应用于中国企业在出口爆炸性增长时期（2000-2006年）的企业层面数据。利用中国出口市场中按质量段划分的规模和竞争信息，我们确认了所有四个假设。这意味着，与标准CES模型不同，贸易对创新的影响关键取决于它如何推动高质量段与低质量段中的规模和竞争。

papers.title: Zoning for Profits: How Public Finance Shapes Land Supply in China
papers.authors: Zhiguo He, Scott T. Nelson, Yang Su, Anthony Lee Zhang, Fudong Zhang
papers.abstract: Public finance and real estate are uniquely intertwined in China, where local governments also serve as monopolist sellers of land. We shed new light on how land sale decisions and land prices depend on local governments’ financing objectives. First, we document the large (ten-fold) price premium paid for residential-zoned relative to industrial-zoned land and show this price premium can be explained by the greater future tax revenues generated by industrial land; the choice to sell land as industrial rather than residential generates an IRR of 7.70%, which is comparable to local governments’ cost of capital in bond markets. Second, local governments are sensitive to financing constraints: industrial land supply decreases with governments’ bond yields. Third, local governments’ land sales are sensitive to the intergovernmental tax sharing, such that industrial land sales increase with the share of taxes captured by local governments. Thus, shocks to local public finances can be expected to affect the Chinese real estate market and vice versa.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, PE, POL；JEL：G31, H70, R14, R38
papers.zh_title: 为利润而分区：公共财政如何塑造中国的土地供应
papers.zh_abstract: 在中国，公共财政与房地产有着独特的交织关系，地方政府同时也是土地的垄断卖方。我们揭示了土地出售决策和土地价格如何依赖于地方政府的融资目标。首先，我们记录了住宅用地相对于工业用地所支付的大额（十倍）价格溢价，并表明这一价格溢价可以用工业用地产生的未来税收收入更高来解释；选择将土地作为工业用地而非住宅用地出售，会产生7.70%的内部收益率，这与地方政府在债券市场上的资本成本相当。其次，地方政府对融资约束很敏感：工业用地供应随着政府债券收益率的上升而减少。第三，地方政府的土地销售对政府间税收分成敏感，因此工业用地销售随着地方政府截留的税收份额增加而增加。因此，地方公共财政的冲击预计会影响中国的房地产市场，反之亦然。

papers.title: Macroeconomic and Asset Pricing Effects of Supply Chain Disasters
papers.authors: Vladimir Smirnyagin, Aleh Tsyvinski
papers.abstract: We build a general equilibrium production-based asset pricing model with heterogeneous firms that jointly accounts for firm-level and aggregate facts emphasized by the recent macroeconomic literature, and for important asset pricing moments. Using administrative firm-level data, we establish empirical properties of large negative idiosyncratic shocks and their evolution. We then demonstrate that these shocks play an important role for delivering both macroeconomic and asset pricing predictions. Finally, we combine our model with data on the universe of U.S. seaborne import since 2007, and establish the importance of supply chain disasters for the cross-section of asset prices.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ITI；JEL：E0, F40, G0
papers.zh_title: 供应链灾难的宏观经济与资产定价效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含异质性企业的生产型一般均衡资产定价模型，该模型同时解释了近期宏观经济文献所强调的企业层面和总体事实，以及重要的资产定价矩。利用行政企业层面数据，我们建立了大型负面异质性冲击及其演变的经验特征。然后，我们证明这些冲击在提供宏观经济和资产定价预测方面都发挥着重要作用。最后，我们将模型与2007年以来美国所有海运进口数据相结合，确立了供应链灾难对资产价格横截面差异的重要性。

papers.title: The U.S. Manufacturing Sector’s Response to Higher Electricity Prices: Evidence from State-Level Renewable Portfolio Standards
papers.authors: Ann Wolverton, Ronald Shadbegian, Wayne B. Gray
papers.abstract: While several papers examine the effects of renewable portfolio standards (RPS) on electricity prices, they mainly rely on state-level data and there has been little research on how RPS policies affect manufacturing activity via their effect on electricity prices. Using plant-level data for the entire U.S. manufacturing sector and all electric utilities from 1992 – 2015, we jointly estimate the effect of RPS adoption and stringency on plant-level electricity prices and production decisions. To ensure that our results are not sensitive to possible pre-existing differences across manufacturing plants in RPS and non-RPS states, we implement coarsened exact covariate matching. Our results suggest that electricity prices for plants in RPS states averaged about 2% higher than in non-RPS states, notably lower than prior estimates based on state-level data. In response to these higher electricity prices, we estimate that plant electricity usage declined by 1.2% for all plants and 1.8% for energy-intensive plants, broadly consistent with published estimates of the elasticity of electricity demand for industrial users. We find smaller declines in output, employment, and hours worked (relative to the decline in electricity use). Finally, several key RPS policy design features that vary substantially from state-to-state produce heterogeneous effects on plant-level electricity prices.
papers.zh_title: 美国制造业对更高电价的反应：来自州级可再生能源组合标准的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 虽然有几篇论文研究了可再生能源组合标准（RPS）对电价的影响，但它们主要依赖州级数据，并且关于RPS政策如何通过影响电价进而影响制造业活动的研究很少。利用1992年至2015年整个美国制造业和所有电力公用事业的企业层面数据，我们联合估计了RPS采纳及其严格程度对企业层面电价和生产决策的影响。为了确保我们的结果不受RPS州和非RPS州制造业企业之间可能存在的预先存在差异的影响，我们实施了粗化精确匹配。我们的结果表明，RPS州企业的电价平均比非RPS州高出约2%，显著低于先前基于州级数据的估计。作为对这些更高电价的回应，我们估计所有企业的用电量下降了1.2%，能源密集型企业的用电量下降了1.8%，这与已发表的工业用户电力需求弹性估计值大致一致。我们发现产出、就业和工作时间的下降幅度（相对于用电量的下降）较小。最后，各州之间差异很大的几个关键RPS政策设计特征对企业层面的电价产生了异质性影响。

papers.title: Managing Public Portfolios
papers.authors: Leo R. Aparisi de Lannoy, Anmol Bhandari, David Evans, Mikhail Golosov, Thomas J. Sargent
papers.abstract: We develop a unified framework for optimally managing public portfolios for a class of macro-finance models that include widely-used specifications for households' risk and liquidity preferences, market structures for financial assets, and trading frictions. An optimal portfolio hedges fluctuations in interest rates, primary surpluses, liquidities and inequalities. It recognizes liquidity benefits that government debts provide and internalizes equilibrium effects of public policies on financial asset prices. We express an optimal portfolio in terms of statistics that are functions only of macro and financial market data. An application to the U.S. shows that hedging interest rate risk plays a dominant role in shaping an optimal maturity structure of government debt.
papers.zh_title: 管理公共投资组合
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为一个宏观金融模型类别开发了一个最优管理公共投资组合的统一框架，该模型类别包括家庭风险和流动性偏好、金融资产市场结构以及交易摩擦的广泛使用的设定。一个最优投资组合对冲利率、初级盈余、流动性和不平等的波动。它认识到政府债务提供的流动性收益，并将公共政策对金融资产价格的均衡效应内部化。我们用仅依赖于宏观和金融市场数据的统计量来表达一个最优投资组合。一个应用于美国的例子表明，对冲利率风险在塑造政府债务的最优期限结构中起着主导作用。

papers.title: Racial Diversity in Private Capital Fundraising
papers.authors: Johan Cassel, Josh Lerner, Emmanuel Yimfor
papers.abstract: Black- and Hispanic-owned funds control a very modest share of assets in the private capital industry. We find that the sensitivity of follow-on fundraising to fund performance is greater for minority-owned groups, particularly for underperforming groups. We find little support for a number of explanations for these patterns: that minority fund valuations are overstated, that minority funds encounter difficulties in hiring personnel, or that deploying capital is more difficult for these funds. We do find that the ability of minority groups to raise capital increases during periods of high racial awareness and when the chief investment officer of local public pension plans and endowments are minorities. Together, the results support the hypothesis that the modest representation of Black and Hispanic-owned firms in private capital stems at least partially from the nature of investor demand, rather than the supply of fund managers.
papers.zh_title: 私募资本募资中的种族多样性
papers.zh_abstract: 黑人和西班牙裔拥有的基金在私募资本行业中控制的资产份额非常有限。我们发现，后续募资对基金业绩的敏感性在少数族裔拥有的集团中更大，特别是对于业绩不佳的集团。我们几乎没有发现支持这些模式的一些解释的证据：少数族裔基金的估值被夸大，少数族裔基金在招聘人员方面遇到困难，或者这些基金部署资本更加困难。我们确实发现，在种族意识高涨时期，以及当地方公共养老金计划和捐赠基金的首席投资官是少数族裔时，少数族裔群体筹集资金的能力会提高。总之，这些结果支持了以下假设：黑人和西班牙裔拥有的公司在私募资本中的代表性不足至少部分源于投资者需求的性质，而不是基金经理的供给。

papers.title: Family Bargaining with Altruism
papers.authors: Robert A. Pollak
papers.abstract: The theoretical literature on bargaining ignores altruism and assumes that everyone is an egoist. Because the importance of altruism in the family is widely recognized, the egoism assumption is especially problematic in the economics of the family. This paper shows that incorporating altruism into cooperative bargaining models shrinks the set potential cooperative bargaining solutions. The analysis depends on the implications of altruism for Pareto efficiency and the implications of Pareto efficiency for potential cooperative bargaining solutions. The analysis here applies not only to Nash bargaining but to all cooperative bargaining models. For noncooperative bargaining, the analysis implies that any solution that lies outside the shrunken set of potential cooperative bargaining solutions is not Pareto efficient.
papers.zh_title: 具有利他主义的家庭谈判
papers.zh_abstract: 关于谈判的理论文献忽略了利他主义，并假设每个人都是利己主义者。由于利他主义在家庭中的重要性被广泛认可，利己主义假设在家庭经济学中尤其成问题。本文表明，将利他主义纳入合作谈判模型会缩小潜在合作谈判解决方案的集合。该分析取决于利他主义对帕累托效率的影响以及帕累托效率对潜在合作谈判解决方案的影响。这里的分析不仅适用于纳什谈判，而且适用于所有合作谈判模型。对于非合作谈判，该分析意味着任何位于缩小后的潜在合作谈判解决方案集合之外的解决方案都不是帕累托有效的。

papers.title: Demand Stimulus as Social Policy
papers.authors: Alan J. Auerbach, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Daniel Murphy
papers.abstract: We exploit a panel of city-level data with rich demographic information to estimate the distributional effects of Department of Defense spending and its effects on a range of social outcomes. The income generated by defense spending accrues predominantly to households without a bachelor’s degree. These households as well as Black households tend to disproportionately benefit from this spending. Defense spending also promotes a range of beneficial social outcomes that are often targeted by government programs, including reductions in poverty, divorce rates, disability rates, and mortality rates, as well as increases in homeownership, health insurance rates, and occupational prestige. We compare the effects of defense spending with the effects of general demand shocks and explore reasons for the differential effects of the shocks.
papers.zh_title: 作为社会政策的需求刺激
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含丰富人口统计信息的城市级数据面板，来估计国防部支出的分配效应及其对一系列社会结果的影响。国防支出产生的收入主要归属于没有学士学位的家庭。这些家庭以及黑人家庭往往不成比例地从这项支出中受益。国防支出还促进了一系列有益的社会结果，这些结果通常是政府项目的目标，包括减少贫困、离婚率、残疾率和死亡率，以及提高住房拥有率、医疗保险覆盖率和职业声望。我们将国防支出的影响与一般需求冲击的影响进行了比较，并探讨了这些冲击产生不同效应的原因。

papers.title: Trade-ins and Transaction Costs in the Market for Used Business Jets
papers.authors: Charles Hodgson
papers.abstract: Manufacturers of durable goods can encourage consumers facing transaction costs to upgrade by accepting used units as trade-ins. These “buyback schemes” increase demand for new units, but increase the supply of used units if trade-ins are resold. In this paper, I investigate the equilibrium effects of buyback schemes in the market for business jets. I find that buyback increases demand for new units by 37% at fixed prices. However, in equilibrium this increase in sales is diminished by 38% due to substitution away from new jets among first time buyers. Because of this cannibalization, offering buyback is a dominant strategy for only 3 of the 6 major firms, with 3 firms offering buyback as a best response to other firms’ policies. I show that equilibrium buyback policies can change under counterfactual market structures: a simulated merger leads to a reduction in consumer welfare, 70% of which is due to a change in buyback policy.
papers.zh_title: 二手公务机市场中的以旧换新与交易成本
papers.zh_abstract: 耐用品制造商可以通过接受旧单位作为以旧换新，来鼓励面临交易成本的消费者进行升级。这些“回购计划”增加了对新单位的需求，但如果以旧换新的产品被转售，则会增加旧单位的供应。在本文中，我研究了公务机市场中回购计划的均衡效应。我发现，在固定价格下，回购使对新单位的需求增加了37%。然而，在均衡状态下，由于首次购买者对新飞机的替代，这种销售增长被削弱了38%。由于这种蚕食效应，提供回购仅在6家主要公司中的3家是占优策略，而另外3家公司则将提供回购作为对其他公司政策的最佳回应。我表明，在反事实的市场结构下，均衡回购政策可能会发生变化：模拟的合并导致消费者福利减少，其中70%是由于回购政策的变化。

papers.title: Sparse Production Networks
papers.authors: Andrew B. Bernard, Yuan Zi
papers.abstract: Firm-to-firm connections in domestic and international production networks play a fundamental role in economic outcomes. Firm heterogeneity and the sparse nature of firm-to-firm connections implicitly discipline network structure. We find that a large group of well-established statistical relationships are not useful in improving our understanding of production networks. We propose an ``elementary" model for production networks based on random matching and firm heterogeneity and characterize the families of statistics and data generating processes that may raise underidentification concerns in more complex models. The elementary model is a useful benchmark in developing ``instructive" statistics and informing model construction and selection.
papers.zh_title: 稀疏生产网络
papers.zh_abstract: 国内和国际生产网络中企业间的联系在经济结果中发挥着基础性作用。企业异质性和企业间联系的稀疏性隐含地约束了网络结构。我们发现，大量已确立的统计关系无助于增进我们对生产网络的理解。我们提出了一个基于随机匹配和企业异质性的生产网络“基础”模型，并刻画了在更复杂模型中可能引发欠识别问题的统计量族和数据生成过程。该基础模型是开发“指导性”统计量以及指导模型构建与选择的有用基准。

papers.title: Land Rental Markets: Experimental Evidence from Kenya
papers.authors: Michelle Acampora, Lorenzo Casaburi, Jack Willis
papers.abstract: Do land market frictions cause misallocation in agriculture? In a field experiment in Western Kenya, we randomly subsidize owners to rent out land. Transferring cultivation rights to renters increases output and value added on the plots, consistent with imperfect land markets and misallocation, and induced rentals persist after the subsidy ends. Additional analysis provides insights on the magnitude and nature of land frictions—which include search, risks, and learning—and on the sources of gains from trade—which include differences between owners and renters in crop choices, productivity, and financial market constraints, but not in labor constraints.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PR；JEL：C93, O11, O12, O13, Q15
papers.zh_title: 土地租赁市场：来自肯尼亚的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 土地市场摩擦是否导致农业中的资源错配？在肯尼亚西部的一项实地实验中，我们随机补贴土地所有者以出租土地。将耕作权转移给租户增加了地块的产出和增加值，这与不完全土地市场和资源错配相一致，并且补贴结束后诱导的租赁行为得以持续。进一步分析提供了关于土地摩擦（包括搜索、风险和学习）的规模和性质，以及贸易收益来源（包括所有者和租户在作物选择、生产率和金融市场约束方面的差异，但不包括劳动力约束）的见解。

papers.title: Multinationals and Structural Transformation
papers.authors: Vanessa I. Alviarez, Cheng Chen, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar, Liliana Varela, Kei-Mu Yi, Hongyong Zhang
papers.abstract: We study how multinational corporations (MNCs) shape firm-level and aggregate structural transformation. Using confidential microdata from Japan and exploiting a quasi-exogenous reform that expanded foreign investment opportunities in China, we assess empirically how this reform affected employment at firms in both the host country (China) and the home country (Japan). In liberalized industries, Japanese manufacturing affiliates in China expanded employment, while parent firms in Japan shifted out of manufacturing and into higher-value service activities, including R&D. To assess the broader relevance of this mechanism, we use microdata from several advanced and middle-income economies, and show that MNCs account for the majority of the middle-income countries’ reallocation to manufacturing.
papers.zh_title: 跨国公司与结构转型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究跨国公司如何塑造企业层面和总体的结构转型。利用日本的机密微观数据，并利用一项准外生改革（该改革扩大了中国的外商投资机会），我们实证评估了这项改革如何影响东道国（中国）和母国（日本）企业的就业。在自由化的行业中，日本在华制造业子公司扩大了就业，而日本母公司将就业从制造业转向了更高价值的服务活动，包括研发。为了评估这一机制的更广泛相关性，我们使用了多个发达和中等收入经济体的微观数据，并表明跨国公司是中等收入国家向制造业重新配置的主要推动力。

papers.title: Estimating Perceptions of the Relative COVID Risk of Different Social-Distancing Behaviors from Respondents' Pairwise Assessments
papers.authors: Ori Heffetz, Matthew Rabin
papers.abstract: How do people compare bundles of social-distancing behaviors? During the COVID pandemic, we showed 676 online respondents in the US, UK, and Israel 30 pairs of brief videos of acquaintances meeting. We asked them to indicate which in each pair depicted greater risk of COVID infection. Their choices imply that on average respondents considered talking 14 minutes longer to be as risky as standing 1 foot closer, being indoors as standing 3 feet closer, and removing a properly worn mask by either party as standing 4–5 feet closer. We explore subpopulations and perceived nonlinear and interacted effects of combined behaviors.
papers.zh_title: 从受访者的成对评估中估计对不同社交距离行为的相对新冠风险的认知
papers.zh_abstract: 人们如何比较不同的社交距离行为组合？在新冠疫情期间，我们向美国、英国和以色列的676名在线受访者展示了30对熟人见面的短视频。我们要求他们指出每对视频中哪一个显示的新冠感染风险更高。他们的选择表明，平均而言，受访者认为多交谈14分钟的风险与站近1英尺相当，在室内与站近3英尺相当，任何一方摘下正确佩戴的口罩与站近4-5英尺相当。我们探讨了亚群体以及组合行为的感知非线性和交互效应。

papers.title: Labor Supply and Occupational Choice
papers.authors: Andrés Erosa, Luisa Fuster, Gueorgui Kambourov, Richard Rogerson
papers.abstract: We document a robust negative relationship between mean annual hours in an occupation and the dispersion of annual hours within that occupation. We study a unified model of occupational choice and labor supply that features heterogeneity across occupations in the return to working additional hours and show that it can match the key features of the data both qualitatively and quantitatively. Occupational choice in our model is shaped both by selection on comparative advantage and selection on tastes for leisure. Our quantitative work finds that the dominant source of differences in hours across occupations is selection on tastes for leisure.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力供给与职业选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一个稳健的负相关关系：职业的平均年工作小时数与该职业内年工作小时数的离散度之间。我们研究了一个统一的职业选择和劳动力供给模型，该模型具有不同职业在额外工作小时回报上的异质性，并表明该模型在定性和定量上都能匹配数据的关键特征。在我们的模型中，职业选择既受比较优势选择的影响，也受休闲偏好选择的影响。我们的定量研究发现，不同职业间工作小时差异的主要来源是休闲偏好的选择。

papers.title: Rising Markups or Changing Technology?
papers.authors: Lucia S. Foster, John C. Haltiwanger, Cody Tuttle
papers.abstract: Recent evidence suggests the U.S. business environment is changing, with rising market concentration and markups. The most prominent and extensive evidence backs out firm-level markups from the first-order conditions for variable factors. The markup is identified as the ratio of the variable factor’s output elasticity to its cost share of revenue. Our analysis starts from this indirect approach, but we exploit a long panel of manufacturing establishments to permit output elasticities to vary to a much greater extent - relative to the existing literature - across establishments within the same industry over time. With our more detailed estimates of output elasticities, the measured increase in markups is substantially dampened, if not eliminated, for U.S. manufacturing. As supporting evidence, we relate differences in the markups’ patterns to observable changes in technology (e.g., computer investment per worker, capital intensity, diversification to non-manufacturing) and find patterns in support of changing technology as the driver of those differences.
papers.zh_title: 上升的加成率还是变化的技术？
papers.zh_abstract: 近期证据表明美国商业环境正在变化，市场集中度和加成率上升。最突出且广泛的证据是从可变要素的一阶条件中反推出企业层面的加成率。加成率被识别为可变要素的产出弹性与其收入成本份额之比。我们的分析始于这种间接方法，但我们利用一个长期的制造业企业面板数据，允许产出弹性在相同行业内不同企业之间随时间有更大程度的变化——相对于现有文献。利用我们更详细的产出弹性估计，美国制造业中测得的加成率上升被大幅削弱，甚至消除。作为支持性证据，我们将加成率模式的差异与可观测的技术变化（例如，人均计算机投资、资本密集度、向非制造业的多元化）联系起来，并发现支持技术变化是这些差异驱动因素的模式。

papers.title: The Racial Wealth Gap, Financial Aid, and College Access
papers.authors: Phillip B. Levine, Dubravka Ritter
papers.abstract: We examine how the racial wealth gap interacts with financial aid in American higher education to generate a disparate impact on college access and outcomes. Retirement savings and home equity are excluded from the formula used to estimate the amount a family can afford to pay. All else equal, omitting those assets mechanically increases the financial aid available to families that hold them. White families are more likely to own those assets and in larger amounts. We document this issue and explore its relationship with observed differences in college attendance, types of institutions attended, degrees attained, and education debt using data from the Survey of Consumer Finances (SCF), the National Postsecondary Student Aid Study (NPSAS), and the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID). We show that this treatment of assets provides an implicit subsidy worth thousands of dollars annually to students from families with above-median incomes. White students receive larger subsidies relative to Black students and Hispanic students with similar family incomes, and this gap in subsidies is associated with disadvantages in educational advancement and student loan levels. It may explain 10 percent to 15 percent of white students’ advantage in these outcomes relative to Black students and Hispanic students.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：D31, G51, I22, I24, J15
papers.zh_title: 种族财富差距、经济援助与大学入学机会
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了种族财富差距如何与美国高等教育中的经济援助相互作用，从而对大学入学机会和结果产生差异性影响。用于估算家庭支付能力的公式排除了退休储蓄和房屋净值。在其他条件相同的情况下，省略这些资产会机械地增加持有这些资产的家庭可获得的经济援助。白人家庭更有可能拥有这些资产，且持有量更大。我们利用消费者金融调查、全国中学后学生援助研究和收入动态面板研究的数据，记录了这一问题，并探讨了其与观察到的大学入学率、就读院校类型、获得学位和教育债务差异的关系。我们表明，这种对资产的处理方式为来自收入高于中位数家庭的学生提供了每年价值数千美元的隐性补贴。与具有相似家庭收入的黑人学生和西班牙裔学生相比，白人学生获得了更大的补贴，这种补贴差距与教育进步和学生贷款水平方面的劣势相关。这可能解释了白人学生相对于黑人学生和西班牙裔学生在这些结果上10%至15%的优势。

papers.title: Spatial Structural Change
papers.authors: Fabian Eckert, Michael Peters
papers.abstract: We develop a quantitative theory of spatial structural change in which economic growth, sectoral reallocation, and regional development are jointly determined in equilibrium. We show that sectoral reallocation inherently disadvantages regions specialized in the declining sector. Yet spatial forces—such as technology diffusion, trade, and migration—can offset or even reverse this bias. These forces are crucial to understand the first structural transformation of the US. Between 1880 and 1920, GDP per capita doubled and the agricultural employment share fell from 50% to 25%. Yet wages rose fastest in agriculture-intensive regions. Calibrated to this period, our model shows that productivity catch-up through technology diffusion enabled rural America to benefit from structural change; in its absence, rural regions would not have stagnated—they would have fallen further behind.
papers.zh_title: 空间结构变迁
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个空间结构变迁的定量理论，其中经济增长、部门再配置和区域发展在均衡中共同决定。我们表明，部门再配置内在地使专门从事衰退部门的区域处于不利地位。然而，空间力量——如技术扩散、贸易和移民——可以抵消甚至逆转这种偏差。这些力量对于理解美国的第一次结构转型至关重要。在1880年至1920年间，人均GDP翻了一番，农业就业份额从50%下降到25%。然而，工资在农业密集型地区增长最快。根据这一时期进行校准，我们的模型表明，通过技术扩散实现的生产率追赶使美国农村地区能够从结构变迁中受益；如果没有这种追赶，农村地区不会停滞不前——它们会进一步落后。

papers.title: Rebel Governance and Development: The Persistent Effects of Guerrillas in El Salvador
papers.authors: Antonella Bandiera, Lelys I. Dinarte Diaz, Juan Miguel Jimenez, Sandra V. Rozo, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
papers.abstract: How does rebel governance affect long-term development? Rebel forces have controlled territory and imposed their own institutions in many countries over the past decades affecting millions of people. We investigate the economic, social, and political consequences of temporary territorial control by guerrillas during the Salvadoran Civil War. During that time, guerrillas displaced state authorities and created informal institutions that encouraged autonomy and self-sufficiency. Using a spatial regression discontinuity design, we show that areas once under guerrilla control have experienced worse economic outcomes over the last 20 years than adjacent areas controlled by the state. In these areas, higher social capital coexists with negative economic consequences. The fact that rebel institutions developed as an alternative to the state generated mistrust of outsiders, and isolated these areas from the rest of the country, resulting in over-dependence on subsistence farming and disengagement from postwar governments. Results are larger in areas where rebel governance initiatives were stronger and do not revert despite increased postwar public investment in formerly guerrilla areas. This study shows that when non-state actors develop alternative governance institutions, these can prompt adverse development effects through lasting norms of distrust of out-groups.
papers.zh_title: 反叛治理与发展：萨尔瓦多游击队的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 反叛治理如何影响长期发展？过去几十年中，反叛力量在许多国家控制了领土并建立了自己的制度，影响了数百万民众。我们研究了萨尔瓦多内战期间游击队临时领土控制的经济、社会和政治后果。在此期间，游击队取代了国家当局，并创建了鼓励自治和自给自足的非正式制度。利用空间断点回归设计，我们表明，与邻近由国家控制的地区相比，曾受游击队控制的地区在过去20年中经历了更差的经济结果。在这些地区，较高的社会资本与负面经济后果并存。反叛制度作为国家的替代方案而发展起来，这一事实导致对外部人士的不信任，并使这些地区与该国其他地区隔离，导致过度依赖自给农业并与战后政府脱节。在反叛治理举措更强的地区，结果更为显著，并且尽管战后对前游击队地区的公共投资增加，这些结果并未逆转。本研究表明，当非国家行为者发展替代治理制度时，这些制度可能通过对群体外部的持久不信任规范引发不利的发展效应。

papers.title: Distinguishing Causes of Neighborhood Racial Change: A Nearest Neighbor Design
papers.authors: Patrick Bayer, Marcus D. Casey, W. Ben McCartney, John Orellana-Li, Calvin S. Zhang
papers.abstract: We study neighborhood choice using a novel research design that contrasts the move rate of homeowners who receive a new different-race neighbor immediately next-door versus slightly further away on the same block. This approach isolates a component of household preferences directly attributable to their neighbors’ identities. Both Black and White homeowners are more likely to move after receiving a new different-race neighbor. These findings are robust to additional controls (e.g., income) and alternative research designs. We find evidence of heterogeneity in responses, especially associated with housing density, which has implications for understanding contemporary neighborhood racial change and the prospects for maintaining stable, integrated neighborhoods.
papers.zh_title: 区分社区种族变迁的原因：一种最近邻设计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一种新颖的研究设计来研究社区选择，该设计对比了那些在紧邻隔壁获得新不同种族邻居的房主，与在同一街区稍远位置获得新不同种族邻居的房主的搬迁率。这种方法分离出直接归因于邻居身份的家庭偏好成分。黑人和白人房主在获得新不同种族邻居后都更有可能搬迁。这些发现在加入额外控制变量（例如收入）和采用替代研究设计时依然稳健。我们发现了反应异质性的证据，特别是与住房密度相关的异质性，这对理解当代社区种族变迁以及维持稳定、融合社区的前景具有启示意义。

papers.title: It Hurts To Ask
papers.authors: Roland Bénabou, Ania Jaroszewicz, George Loewenstein
papers.abstract: We analyze the offering, asking, and granting of help or other benefits as a three-stage game with bilateral private information between a person in need of help and a potential help-giver. Asking entails the risk of rejection, which can be painful: since unawareness of the need can no longer be an excuse, a refusal reveals that the person in need, or the relationship, is not valued very much. We show that a failure to ask can occur even when most helpers would help if told about the need, and that even though a greater need makes help both more valuable and more likely to be granted, it can reduce the propensity to ask. When potential helpers concerned about the recipient’s ask-shyness can make spontaneous offers, this can be a double-edged sword: offering reveals a more caring type and helps solve the failure-to-ask problem, but not offering reveals a not-so-caring one, and this itself deters asking. This discouragement effect can also generate a trap where those in need hope for an offer while willing helpers hope for an ask, resulting in significant inefficiencies.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D03, D23, D64, D82, D83, D91
papers.zh_title: 开口求助是痛苦的
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析提供、请求和给予帮助或其他利益的过程，将其视为一个在需要帮助的人和潜在帮助者之间具有双边私人信息的三阶段博弈。请求帮助伴随着被拒绝的风险，这可能是痛苦的：因为无法再以不知晓需求为借口，拒绝表明需要帮助的人或这段关系不被足够重视。我们表明，即使大多数帮助者在被告知需求后会提供帮助，也可能出现不开口请求的情况；并且，尽管更大的需求使帮助更有价值且更可能被授予，但它可能降低请求的倾向。当关心接受者请求羞怯的潜在帮助者可以主动提供帮助时，这可能是一把双刃剑：主动提供帮助揭示了一个更关心他人的类型，并有助于解决不开口请求的问题，但不主动提供帮助则揭示了一个不那么关心他人的类型，而这本身就会阻止请求。这种抑制效应还可能产生一种陷阱，即需要帮助的人希望得到主动提供，而愿意帮助的人则希望得到请求，从而导致显著的效率低下。

papers.title: Monetary and Financial Spillovers: New Historical Evidence from Germany
papers.authors: James Cloyne, Patrick Hürtgen, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: Using newly identified exogenous variation in German monetary policy from 580 policy meetings between 1974 and 1998, we provide new evidence on the role of the exchange rate regime in monetary spillovers. Germany played a central role in the European Monetary System over these decades. Following a German monetary tightening, European countries pegged to the Deutschmark experienced unchanged nominal exchange rates, higher short-term interest rates and sizable economic contractions. In contrast, floating exchange rate economies in Europe saw a sizable depreciation of their currency vis-á-vis Germany, but limited short-run movements in interest rates, activity or prices. U.S. monetary tightenings had similar effects on both Deutschmark pegs and floats. Our findings are consistent with the predictions of the trilemma.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E52, F42, F44
papers.zh_title: 货币与金融溢出效应：来自德国的新历史证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用1974年至1998年间580次政策会议中新识别的德国货币政策外生变动，我们提供了关于汇率制度在货币溢出效应中作用的新证据。在这几十年间，德国在欧洲货币体系中扮演了核心角色。在德国货币紧缩之后，与德国马克挂钩的欧洲国家经历了名义汇率不变、短期利率上升以及显著的经济收缩。相比之下，欧洲的浮动汇率经济体经历了其货币相对于德国马克的大幅贬值，但利率、经济活动或价格在短期内的变动有限。美国的货币紧缩对德国马克的挂钩国和浮动国都有类似的影响。我们的发现与“三难困境”的预测一致。

papers.title: Automation and Polarization
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Jonas Loebbing
papers.abstract: We develop an assignment model of automation. Each of a continuum of tasks of variable complexity is assigned to either capital or one of a continuum of labor skills. We characterize conditions for interior automation, whereby tasks of intermediate complexity are assigned to capital. Interior automation arises when the most skilled workers have a comparative advantage in the most complex tasks relative to capital, and because the wages of the least skilled workers are sufficiently low relative to their productivity and the effective cost of capital in low-complexity tasks. Minimum wages and other sources of higher wages at the bottom make interior automation less likely. Starting with interior automation, a reduction in the cost of capital (or an increase in capital productivity) causes employment and wage polarization. Specifically, further automation pushes workers into tasks at the lower and upper ends of the task distribution. It also monotonically increases the skill premium above a skill threshold and reduces the skill premium below this threshold. Moreover, automation tends to reduce the real wage of workers with comparative advantage profiles close to that of capital. We show that large enough increases in capital productivity ultimately induce a transition to low-skill automation and qualitatively alter the effects of automation - thereafter inducing monotone increases in skill premia rather than wage polarization.
papers.zh_title: 自动化与极化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个自动化的任务分配模型。每个具有不同复杂度的连续任务被分配给资本或一系列连续劳动技能中的一种。我们刻画了内部自动化的条件，即中等复杂度的任务被分配给资本。当技能最高的工人相对于资本在最复杂任务中具有比较优势，并且技能最低的工人的工资相对于其生产率以及在低复杂度任务中的有效资本成本足够低时，内部自动化就会出现。最低工资和底部其他导致更高工资的来源使得内部自动化不太可能发生。从内部自动化开始，资本成本的降低（或资本生产率的提高）会导致就业和工资极化。具体来说，进一步的自动化将工人推向任务分布的低端和高端。它还会单调地提高高于某个技能门槛的技能溢价，并降低低于该门槛的技能溢价。此外，自动化往往会降低那些比较优势特征与资本相近的工人的实际工资。我们表明，足够大的资本生产率增长最终会引发向低技能自动化的转变，并从根本上改变自动化的影响——此后会导致技能溢价的单调增长，而非工资极化。

papers.title: How to Run Surveys: A Guide to Creating Your Own Identifying Variation and Revealing the Invisible
papers.authors: Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: Surveys are an essential approach for eliciting otherwise invisible factors such as perceptions, knowledge and beliefs, attitudes, and reasoning. These factors are critical determinants of social, economic, and political outcomes. Surveys are not merely a research tool. They are also not only a way of collecting data. Instead, they involve creating the process that will generate the data. This allows the researcher to create their own identifying and controlled variation. Thanks to the rise of mobile technologies and platforms, surveys offer valuable opportunities to study either broadly representative samples or focus on specific groups. This paper offers guidance on the complete survey process, from the design of the questions and experiments to the recruitment of respondents and the collection of data to the analysis of survey responses. It covers issues related to the sampling process, selection and attrition, attention and carelessness, survey question design and measurement, response biases, and survey experiments.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, POL；JEL：D9, H0, J0, P20
papers.zh_title: 如何开展调查：创建自身识别变异与揭示隐性因素的指南
papers.zh_abstract: 调查是揭示感知、知识和信念、态度以及推理等隐性因素的基本方法。这些因素是决定社会、经济和政治结果的关键因素。调查不仅仅是一种研究工具，也不仅仅是收集数据的一种方式。相反，它们涉及创建将生成数据的过程。这使得研究者能够创建自身的识别变异和受控变异。得益于移动技术和平台的兴起，调查为研究广泛代表性样本或关注特定群体提供了宝贵的机会。本文提供了关于完整调查过程的指导，从问题和实验的设计，到受访者的招募和数据的收集，再到调查响应的分析。它涵盖了与抽样过程、选择和损耗、注意力和粗心、调查问题设计和测量、响应偏差以及调查实验相关的问题。

papers.title: Work From Home and the Office Real Estate Apocalypse
papers.authors: Arpit Gupta, Vrinda Mittal, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: We study the impact of remote work on the commercial office sector. We document large shifts in lease revenues, office occupancy, lease renewal rates, lease durations, and market rents as firms shifted to remote work in the wake of the Covid-19 pandemic. We show that the pandemic has had large effects on both current and expected future cash flows for office buildings. Remote work also changes the risk premium on office real estate. We revalue the stock of New York City commercial office buildings taking into account pandemic-induced cash flow and discount rate effects. We find a 45% decline in office values in 2020 and 39% in the longer-run, the latter representing a $453 billion value destruction. Higher quality office buildings were somewhat buffered against these trends due to a flight to quality, while lower quality office buildings see much more dramatic swings. These valuation changes have repercussions for local public finances and financial sector stability.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：G10, G17, R00, R33
papers.zh_title: 远程办公与写字楼房地产末日
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了远程工作对商业办公领域的影响。我们记录了在新冠疫情后企业转向远程工作时，租赁收入、写字楼入住率、续租率、租赁期限和市场租金的巨大变化。我们表明，疫情对写字楼当前的现金流和预期的未来现金流都产生了巨大影响。远程工作还改变了写字楼房地产的风险溢价。我们重新评估了纽约市商业写字楼存量，考虑了疫情引发的现金流和贴现率效应。我们发现，2020年写字楼价值下降了45%，长期下降39%，后者代表着4530亿美元的价值毁灭。由于向优质资产的转移，较高质量的写字楼在一定程度上缓冲了这些趋势，而较低质量的写字楼则经历了更为剧烈的波动。这些估值变化对地方公共财政和金融部门稳定产生了影响。

papers.title: Horses for Courses: Measuring Foreign Supply Chain Exposure
papers.authors: Richard Baldwin, Rebecca Freeman, Angelos Theodorakopoulos
papers.abstract: Perceptions of global supply chains (GSCs) have shifted in recent years from a positive to a more cautious view. Standard GSC measures have mostly not adapted to this change as they focus on participation in, rather than exposure to, foreign supply chains. This paper presents the tools necessary to track foreign GSC exposure, and introduces a systematic shocks approach to GSC indicator design. We use this to develop indicators that gauge the impact of a variety of foreign shocks. We argue that different indicators are appropriate to different questions and show that they can provide qualitatively different answers to the same foreign exposure question.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：D57, F13, F14, F15, F60, R15
papers.zh_title: 各取所需：衡量外国供应链暴露度
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，对全球供应链的看法已从积极转向更为谨慎。标准的全球供应链衡量指标大多未能适应这一变化，因为它们关注的是参与外国供应链，而非暴露于外国供应链。本文提出了追踪外国供应链暴露度所需的工具，并介绍了一种系统性的冲击方法来设计全球供应链指标。我们利用这一点来开发衡量各种外国冲击影响的指标。我们认为，不同的指标适用于不同的问题，并表明它们可能对相同的外国暴露问题给出性质不同的答案。

papers.title: Global Trends in Income Inequality and Income Dynamics: New Insights from GRID
papers.authors: Fatih Guvenen, Luigi Pistaferri, Giovanni L. Violante
papers.abstract: The Global Repository of Income Dynamics (GRID) is a new open-access, cross- country database that contains a wide range of micro statistics on income inequality, dynamics, and mobility. It has four key characteristics: it is built on micro panel data drawn from administrative records; it fully exploits the longitudinal dimension of the underlying datasets; it offers granular descriptions of income inequality and income dynamics for finely defined subpopulations; and it is designed from the ground up with the goals of harmonization and cross-country comparability. This paper introduces the database and presents a set of global trends in income inequality and income dynamics across the 13 countries that are currently in GRID. Our results are based on the statistics created for GRID by the 13 country teams who also contributed to this special issue with individual articles.
papers.zh_title: 全球收入不平等与收入动态趋势：来自GRID的新见解
papers.zh_abstract: 全球收入动态数据库是一个新的开放获取、跨国数据库，包含关于收入不平等、动态和流动性的广泛微观统计数据。它有四个关键特征：它建立在来自行政记录的微观面板数据之上；它充分利用了基础数据集的纵向维度；它为精细定义的子群体提供了收入不平等和收入动态的详细描述；并且它从一开始就以协调和跨国可比性为目标进行设计。本文介绍了该数据库，并展示了目前GRID中13个国家在收入不平等和收入动态方面的一系列全球趋势。我们的结果基于13个国家团队为GRID创建的统计数据，这些团队也以各自文章的形式为本特刊做出了贡献。

papers.title: Are Immigrants more Left leaning than Natives?
papers.authors: Simone Moriconi, Giovanni Peri, Riccardo Turati
papers.abstract: We analyze whether second-generation immigrants have different political preferences relative to observationally identical children of citizens in the host countries. Using data on individual voting behavior in 22 European countries between 2001 and 2017, we characterize each vote on a left-right scale based on the ideological and policy positions of the party receiving the vote. In the first part of the paper, we characterize the size of the "left-wing bias" in the vote of second-generation immigrants after controlling for a large set of individual characteristics and origin and destination country fixed effects. We find a significant left-wing bias of second-generation immigrants, comparable in magnitude to the left-wing bias associated with living in urban (rather than rural) areas. We then show that this left-wing bias is associated with stronger preferences for inequality-reducing government intervention, internationalism and multiculturalism. We do not find that second-generation immigrants are biased towards or away from populist political agendas.
papers.zh_title: 移民是否比本地人更左倾？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了第二代移民是否与东道国中观察特征相同的公民子女具有不同的政治偏好。利用2001年至2017年间22个欧洲国家的个人投票行为数据，我们根据接收投票的政党的意识形态和政策立场，将每次投票置于左-右光谱上。在论文的第一部分，我们在控制了大量个人特征以及来源国和目的地国固定效应后，刻画了第二代移民投票中“左翼偏向”的大小。我们发现第二代移民存在显著的左翼偏向，其幅度与居住在城市（而非农村）地区相关的左翼偏向相当。然后我们表明，这种左翼偏向与对减少不平等的政府干预、国际主义和文化多元主义的更强偏好相关。我们没有发现第二代移民倾向于或远离民粹主义政治议程。

papers.title: War, Influenza, and U.S. Carbon Intensity.
papers.authors: Nicholas Z. Muller
papers.abstract: Carbon intensity from fossil fuel use in the United States economy peaked in 1917. World War I ended, and the Spanish Flu pandemic broke out one year later in 1918. This paper contends that these events, coupled with associated turmoil in the domestic coal industry, were largely responsible for the turning point in carbon intensity. It is instructive to consider that geopolitics, labor markets, and public health at the time of peak carbon intensity bear relevance to the global economy from 2019 to the present. Interventions in markets intended to mitigate detrimental consequences of pandemic and war may induce ancillary impacts for long-run climate change and environmental quality.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE；JEL：N41, N42, N51, N52, N71, N72, Q43, Q54
papers.zh_title: 战争、流感与美国碳强度
papers.zh_abstract: 美国经济中化石燃料使用的碳强度在1917年达到峰值。第一次世界大战结束，西班牙流感大流行于一年后的1918年爆发。本文认为，这些事件，加上国内煤炭行业的相关动荡，在很大程度上是碳强度出现转折点的原因。值得思考的是，碳强度达到峰值时的地缘政治、劳动力市场和公共卫生状况，与2019年至今的全球经济具有相关性。旨在减轻疫情和战争不利后果的市场干预措施，可能会对长期气候变化和环境质量产生附带影响。

papers.title: Know Your Customer: Informed Trading by Banks
papers.authors: Rainer Haselmann, Christian Leuz, Sebastian Schreiber
papers.abstract: This study analyzes information production and trading behavior of banks with lending relationships. We combine trade-by-trade supervisory data and credit-registry data to examine banks' proprietary trading in borrower stocks around a large number of corporate events. We find that relationship banks build up positive (negative) trading positions in the two weeks before events with positive (negative) news, even when these events are unscheduled, and unwind positions shortly after the event. This trading pattern is more pronounced when banks are likely to possess private information about their borrowers and cannot be explained by specialized expertise in certain industries or firms. The results suggest that banks' lending relationships inform their trading and underscore the potential for conflicts of interest in universal banking—a prominent concern in the regulatory debate for a long time. Our analysis also illustrates how combining large data sets can enhance the supervision of markets and financial institutions.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE；JEL：G01, G14, G15, G18, G21, G24, G28, G38, K22
papers.zh_title: 了解你的客户：银行的内幕交易
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究分析了具有贷款关系的银行的信息生产和交易行为。我们结合逐笔交易监管数据和信贷登记数据，研究了银行在大量公司事件前后对其借款人股票的自营交易。我们发现，关系银行在利好消息事件（利空消息事件）发生前的两周内建立正（负）交易头寸，即使这些事件是非计划性的，并在事件发生后不久平仓。当银行可能拥有关于其借款人的私人信息时，这种交易模式更为明显，并且不能用特定行业或公司的专业专长来解释。结果表明，银行的贷款关系为其交易提供了信息，并突显了全能银行中潜在的利益冲突——这是长期以来监管辩论中的一个突出担忧。我们的分析还说明了如何通过整合大型数据集来加强对市场和金融机构的监管。

papers.title: Assessing School District Decision-Making: Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Alvin Christian, Brian Jacob, John D. Singleton
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic drew new attention to the role of school boards in the U.S. In this paper, we examine school districts’ choices of learning modality—whether and when to offer in-person, virtual, or hybrid instruction—over the course of the 2020-21 pandemic school year. The analysis takes advantage of granular weekly data on learning mode and COVID-19 cases for Ohio school districts. We show that districts respond on the margin to health risks: all else equal, a marginal increase in new cases reduces the probability that a district offers in-person instruction the next week. Moreover, this negative response is magnified when the district was in-person the prior week and attenuates in magnitude over the school year. These findings are consistent with districts learning from experience about the effect of in-person learning on disease transmission in schools. We also find evidence that districts are influenced by the decisions of their peers.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, H10, H30, I20, I21
papers.zh_title: 评估学区决策：来自COVID-19大流行的证据
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行重新引起了人们对美国学校董事会角色的关注。在本文中，我们研究了学区在2020-21学年期间对教学模式的选择——即是否以及何时提供面对面、虚拟或混合教学。该分析利用了俄亥俄州学区关于教学模式和COVID-19病例的详细周度数据。我们发现，学区会在边际上对健康风险做出反应：在其他条件相同的情况下，新增病例的边际增加会降低学区下周提供面对面教学的概率。此外，当学区前一周处于面对面教学状态时，这种负面反应会加剧，并且其幅度在整个学年中逐渐减弱。这些发现与学区从经验中学习面对面教学对学校内疾病传播影响的情况一致。我们还发现，学区会受到同行决策的影响。

papers.title: A Tale of Tier 3 Cities
papers.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Yuanchen Yang
papers.abstract: This paper provides new estimates of the housing stock, construction rates and price developments by city tier in China in order to understand where excess supply might be concentrated, and the implications of any significant contraction. We also update estimates of the size of China’s rapidly evolving real estate sector through 2021, allowing one to look at the initial impact of COVID-19, as well as extending the analysis to incorporate urban-expansion related infrastructure construction. We argue that China overall faces imbalances between supply and demand for housing stock, but the problem is significantly deeper in the generally smaller and lower income tier 3 cities, which nevertheless account for more than 60% of both China’s GDP and its housing stock.
papers.zh_title: 三线城市的故事
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了按城市层级划分的中国住房存量、建设率和价格发展的新估计，以了解过剩供应可能集中在何处，以及任何显著收缩的影响。我们还更新了截至2021年中国快速发展的房地产行业规模的估计，从而可以考察COVID-19的初步影响，并将分析扩展到包括与城市扩张相关的基础设施建设。我们认为，中国整体上面临住房存量供需失衡的问题，但在通常规模较小且收入较低的三线城市，问题更为严重，然而这些城市占中国GDP和住房存量的比例均超过60%。

papers.title: Neoclassical Growth with Limited Commitment
papers.authors: Dirk Krueger, Harald Uhlig
papers.abstract: We characterize the stationary equilibrium of a continuous-time neoclassical production economy with capital accumulation in which agents can insure against idiosyncratic income risk by trading state-contingent assets, subject to limited commitment constraints that rule out short-selling. For an N-state Poisson labor productivity process we provide the household consumption-asset allocation, stationary asset distribution and aggregate capital supply. When production is Cobb-Douglas, when productivity takes two values, of which one is zero, and when agents have log-utility, we calculate the equilibrium interest rate, capital stock and consumption distribution in closed form, including its comparative statics change with respect to idiosyncratic income risk.
papers.zh_title: 有限承诺下的新古典增长
papers.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了一个具有资本积累的连续时间新古典生产经济中的稳态均衡，其中代理人可以通过交易状态依存资产来抵御异质性收入风险，但受到禁止卖空的有限承诺约束。对于N状态的泊松劳动生产率过程，我们提供了家庭消费-资产配置、稳态资产分布和总资本供给。当生产函数为柯布-道格拉斯形式、生产率取两个值（其中一个为零）且代理人具有对数效用时，我们以闭式解形式计算了均衡利率、资本存量和消费分布，包括其关于异质性收入风险的比较静态变化。

papers.title: Culture Clash: Incompatible Reputation Mechanisms and Intergroup Conflict
papers.authors: Vasiliki Fouka, Alain Schläpfer
papers.abstract: Under what conditions does intergroup contact lead to conflict? We provide a novel answer to this question by highlighting the role of reputation mechanisms in sustaining cooperation. Reputational concerns can deter defection in one-time interactions within a group, but the informational content of reputation can differ across groups. We consider two types of information. Punishment-based reputation (a "culture of honor") represents past sanctioning behavior of individuals, while a reputation based on image scoring captures past cooperative and uncooperative acts. While either type can successfully sustain cooperation within a group, we show theoretically that interactions of individuals from a punishment-based culture with those from a culture of image scoring can lead to widespread inter-group tensions. Mutual cooperation is a more likely outcome if both cultures use a similar reputation mechanism. We find empirical support for the model's predictions across phenomena related to the emergence of social tensions. Cross-cultural differences in the importance of retaliation predict patterns of host population discrimination against immigrants and variation in bilateral conflict across ethnic groups.
papers.zh_title: 文化冲突：不相容的声誉机制与群体间冲突
papers.zh_abstract: 在什么条件下，群体间接触会导致冲突？我们通过强调声誉机制在维持合作中的作用，为这个问题提供了一个新颖的答案。声誉关切可以阻止群体内一次性互动中的背叛行为，但声誉的信息内容在不同群体间可能不同。我们考虑两种类型的信息。基于惩罚的声誉（一种“荣誉文化”）代表个人过去的制裁行为，而基于形象评分的声誉则捕捉过去合作与不合作的行为。虽然任何一种类型都能成功维持群体内的合作，但我们从理论上表明，来自惩罚文化背景的个体与来自形象评分文化背景的个体之间的互动可能导致广泛的群体间紧张关系。如果两种文化使用相似的声誉机制，相互合作更有可能成为结果。我们在与社会紧张局势出现相关的现象中找到了模型预测的实证支持。报复重要性的跨文化差异预测了东道国人口对移民的歧视模式以及不同族群间双边冲突的变化。

papers.title: Housing Dynamics: Theory Behind Empirics
papers.authors: Ping Wang, Danyang Xie
papers.abstract: To fill the knowledge gap that previous studies ignore either housing or internal urban structure and to enable better fit with important stylized facts, we construct a two-sector optimal growth model of housing where housing is produced by land and housing structure/household durables. We explicitly model within-city locational choice. Housing services derive positive utility but are decayed away from the city center. Our model enables a full characterization of the dynamic paths of housing and housing and land prices. The model is then calibrated to fit part of the stylized facts: faster growth of housing structure/household durables than housing, faster growth of land prices than housing prices, and downward housing price and land rent gradients within a city. The calibrated model can then be used to predict the remaining untargeted part of stylized facts: a locationally steeper land rent gradient than the housing price gradient, relatively flatter housing quantity and price gradients in larger cities with flatter population gradients and moderate rise in the housing expenditure share. The calibrated model can be further used to yield additional insights on housing dynamics and spatial distribution. We find nonhomotheticities in housing preference and housing production are crucial for realistic model predictions.
papers.zh_title: 住房动态：实证背后的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 为了填补以往研究忽视住房或城市内部结构的知识空白，并更好地拟合重要的典型事实，我们构建了一个两部门住房最优增长模型，其中住房由土地和住房结构/家庭耐用品生产。我们明确建模了城市内的区位选择。住房服务带来正效用，但会随着远离市中心而衰减。我们的模型能够全面刻画住房、住房价格和土地价格的动态路径。然后，我们对模型进行校准，以拟合部分典型事实：住房结构/家庭耐用品比住房增长更快，土地价格比住房价格增长更快，以及城市内住房价格和土地租金梯度向下倾斜。校准后的模型随后可用于预测剩余未针对的典型事实：土地租金梯度在区位上比住房价格梯度更陡峭，大城市中住房数量和价格梯度相对更平坦，人口梯度更平坦，住房支出份额适度上升。校准后的模型还可进一步用于得出关于住房动态和空间分布的额外见解。我们发现，住房偏好和住房生产中的非位似性对于实现现实的模型预测至关重要。

papers.title: Urban-Biased Growth: A Macroeconomic Analysis
papers.authors: Fabian Eckert, Sharat Ganapati, Conor Walsh
papers.abstract: Since 1980, US wage growth has been concentrated in high-density locations, nearly doubling the wage-density elasticity across cities. We show that this urban-biased growth originates entirely at large, IT-intensive firms in the Business Services sector. We propose a simple explanation centered on the dramatic decline in IT prices over this period. First, a complementarity between IT capital and firm scale makes large firms benefit most from cheaper IT capital. Second, because large Business Services firms are concentrated in dense cities, falling IT prices generate urban-biased growth. Disciplining this mechanism with firm-level data, we find that the observed decline in IT prices accounts for approximately 75% of the increase in the wage-density gradient.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：J3, O33, R11, R12
papers.zh_title: 偏向城市的增长：一项宏观经济分析
papers.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来，美国工资增长集中在高密度地区，使得城市间的工资-密度弹性几乎翻倍。我们表明，这种偏向城市的增长完全源于商业服务部门中大型、IT密集型的企业。我们提出了一个简单的解释，其核心是这一时期IT价格的急剧下降。首先，IT资本与企业规模之间的互补性使得大型企业从更便宜的IT资本中获益最多。其次，由于大型商业服务企业集中在密集城市，IT价格下降产生了偏向城市的增长。通过使用企业层面数据对这一机制进行约束，我们发现，观察到的IT价格下降大约解释了工资-密度梯度增加的75%。

papers.title: Imperfect Competition and Sanitation: Evidence from Randomized Auctions in Senegal
papers.authors: Jean-François Houde, Terence R. Johnson, Molly Lipscomb, Laura A. Schechter
papers.abstract: We study the extent to which collusion can explain the under-provision of clean sanitation technologies in developing countries. Using latrine desludging services in Dakar as a case-study, we document that prices are 40% lower in competitive areas than in areas where prices are coordinated by a trade association. We then develop an experimental just-in-time auction platform with random variation in several design features to formally test for collusive conduct and estimate the welfare costs of imperfect competition. Consistent with the collusion hypothesis, we find that bidders systematically avoid competition by placing round focal bids and refraining from undercutting rivals. We use a K-means clustering algorithm to classify bidders as competitive or non-competitive and simulate counterfactuals in which non-competitive bidders are replaced with competitive bidders. This would significantly increase take-up of the improved sanitation technology, with back-of-the-envelope calculations suggesting increased competition would improve health by a half to a quarter as much as would building improved sewerage systems–an often prohibitively expensive and demanding undertaking.
papers.zh_title: 不完全竞争与卫生设施：来自塞内加尔随机拍卖的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了合谋在多大程度上可以解释发展中国家清洁卫生技术供应不足的问题。以达喀尔的厕所清掏服务为案例，我们记录了竞争区域的价格比由行业协会协调价格的区域低40%。然后，我们开发了一个实验性的即时拍卖平台，其中包含多个设计特征的随机变化，以正式检验合谋行为并估计不完全竞争的福利成本。与合谋假说一致，我们发现竞标者通过报出整数焦点价格并避免压低竞争对手来系统性地规避竞争。我们使用K-means聚类算法将竞标者分类为竞争性或非竞争性，并模拟了用竞争性竞标者替代非竞争性竞标者的反事实情景。这将显著提高改进型卫生技术的采用率，粗略计算表明，增加竞争带来的健康改善效果，相当于建设改进型下水道系统（一项通常成本高昂且要求苛刻的工程）效果的一半到四分之一。

papers.title: Listen to Her: Gender Differences in Information Diffusion within the Household
papers.authors: Dietmar Fehr, Johanna Mollerstrom, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
papers.abstract: We study how economic information diffuses within the household, leveraging an information-provision experiment with a representative sample of households from Germany. A random sample of household members received information about their household’s position in the income distribution. When provided with information directly, there are no gender differences in how individuals update their beliefs. However, we observe significant gender disparities in the diffusion of information within the household. Specifically, when only the husband receives the information, it influences the wife’s beliefs; however, when only the wife receives the information, it does not affect the husband’s beliefs.
papers.zh_title: 倾听她的声音：家庭内部信息传播的性别差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项针对德国家庭代表性样本的信息提供实验，研究了经济信息如何在家庭内部传播。随机抽取的家庭成员收到了关于其家庭在收入分配中位置的信息。当直接提供信息时，个体在更新信念方面不存在性别差异。然而，我们观察到信息在家庭内部传播中存在显著的性别差异。具体而言，当只有丈夫收到信息时，它会影响妻子的信念；然而，当只有妻子收到信息时，它不会影响丈夫的信念。

papers.title: Excess Death Rates for Republicans and Democrats During the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Jacob Wallace, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Jason L. Schwartz
papers.abstract: Political affiliation has emerged as a potential risk factor for COVID-19, amid evidence that Republican-leaning counties have had higher COVID-19 death rates than Democrat- leaning counties and evidence of a link between political party affiliation and vaccination views. This study constructs an individual-level dataset with political affiliation and excess death rates during the COVID-19 pandemic via a linkage of 2017 voter registration in Ohio and Florida to mortality data from 2018 to 2021. We estimate substantially higher excess death rates for registered Republicans when compared to registered Democrats, with almost all of the difference concentrated in the period after vaccines were widely available in our study states. Overall, the excess death rate for Republicans was 5.4 percentage points (pp), or 76%, higher than the excess death rate for Democrats. Post- vaccines, the excess death rate gap between Republicans and Democrats widened from 1.6 pp (22% of the Democrat excess death rate) to 10.4 pp (153% of the Democrat excess death rate). The gap in excess death rates between Republicans and Democrats is concentrated in counties with low vaccination rates and only materializes after vaccines became widely available.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情期间共和党人与民主党人的超额死亡率
papers.zh_abstract: 政治归属已成为新冠肺炎的潜在风险因素，有证据表明倾向共和党的县的新冠肺炎死亡率高于倾向民主党的县，且政党归属与疫苗接种观点之间存在关联。本研究通过将2017年俄亥俄州和佛罗里达州的选民登记数据与2018年至2021年的死亡率数据相关联，构建了一个包含政治归属和新冠疫情期间超额死亡率的个体层面数据集。我们发现，与注册民主党人相比，注册共和党人的超额死亡率显著更高，几乎所有差异都集中在疫苗在我们研究州广泛可用之后的时期。总体而言，共和党人的超额死亡率比民主党人高出5.4个百分点（pp），即76%。疫苗普及后，共和党人与民主党人之间的超额死亡率差距从1.6个百分点（占民主党超额死亡率的22%）扩大到10.4个百分点（占民主党超额死亡率的153%）。共和党人与民主党人之间的超额死亡率差距集中在疫苗接种率低的县，并且仅在疫苗广泛可用后才显现出来。

papers.title: Culture in Historical Political Economy
papers.authors: Sara Lowes
papers.abstract: Culture – the set of socially transmitted values and beliefs held by individuals – has important implications for a wide variety of economic outcomes. Both the causes and consequences of culture have been the subject of work in Historical Political Economy. I first outline several theories on the origins, evolution, and transmission of culture. I then discuss various strategies for measuring culture. Finally, I review recent research in HPE that explores the origins of variation in culture and the economic consequences of culture.
papers.zh_title: 历史政治经济学中的文化
papers.zh_abstract: 文化——个体所持有的社会性传递的价值观和信仰集合——对广泛的经济结果具有重要影响。文化的成因和后果都是历史政治经济学研究的主题。我首先概述了关于文化起源、演变和传播的几种理论。然后，我讨论了衡量文化的各种策略。最后，我回顾了近期历史政治经济学领域的研究，这些研究探讨了文化差异的起源以及文化的经济后果。

papers.title: Gender Gaps at the Academies
papers.authors: David Card, Stefano DellaVigna, Patricia Funk, Nagore Iriberri
papers.abstract: Historically, a large majority of the newly elected members of the National Academy of Science (NAS) and the American Academy of Arts and Science (AAAS) were men. Within the past two decades, however, that situation has changed, and in the last 3 years women made up about 40 percent of the new members in both academies. We build lists of active scholars from publications in the top journals in three fields – Psychology, Mathematics and Economics – and develop a series of models to compare changes in the probability of selection of women as members of the NAS and AAAS from the 1960s to today, controlling for publications and citations. In the early years of our sample, women were less likely to be selected as members than men with similar records. By the 1990s, the selection process at both academies was approximately gender-neutral, conditional on publications and citations. In the past 20 years, however, a positive preference for female members has emerged and strengthened in all three fields. Currently, women are 3-15 times more likely to be selected as members of the AAAS and NAS than men with similar publication and citation records.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：J15, J16, O30
papers.zh_title: 科学院中的性别差距
papers.zh_abstract: 历史上，新当选的美国国家科学院和美国艺术与科学院的成员绝大多数是男性。然而，在过去二十年里，这种情况发生了变化，在最近三年中，女性在这两个科学院的新成员中约占40%。我们根据三个领域——心理学、数学和经济学——顶级期刊的出版物构建了活跃学者名单，并开发了一系列模型，以比较从1960年代至今女性被选为美国国家科学院和美国艺术与科学院成员的概率变化，同时控制出版物和引用次数。在我们样本的早期年份，与记录相似的男性相比，女性被选为成员的可能性较低。到1990年代，在控制出版物和引用次数的条件下，两个科学院的选拔过程大致是性别中性的。然而，在过去20年中，对所有三个领域而言，对女性成员的正面偏好已经出现并加强。目前，与具有相似出版物和引用记录的男性相比，女性被选为美国艺术与科学院和美国国家科学院成员的可能性高出3到15倍。

papers.title: Kinship Structure and the Family: Evidence from the Matrilineal Belt
papers.authors: Sara Lowes
papers.abstract: Kinship structure varies across societies and may affect incentives for cooperation within the household. A key source of variation in kinship structure is whether lineage and inheritance are traced through women, as in matrilineal kinship systems, or men, as in patrilineal kinship systems. Anthropologists hypothesize that matrilineal kinship benefits women because they have greater support from their kin and husbands have less authority over their wives. However, these factors may reduce cooperation within the nuclear household. I test these hypotheses using a geographic regression discontinuity design along the matrilineal belt, which describes the distribution of matrilineal kinship across sub-Saharan Africa. Using over 50 DHS survey-waves with more than 400,000 respondents, I find that matrilineal women are less likely to believe domestic violence is justified, experience less domestic violence, and have greater autonomy in decision making – particularly in the ability to visit family and seek healthcare. Additionally, matrilineal kinship closes the education gap between male and female children, and matrilineal children experience health benefits. Using original survey and experimental data from couples along the matrilineal belt, I test how matrilineal kinship structure affects spousal cooperation. Matrilineal women contribute less to a public good with a spouse when it is easier to hide income. The results highlight how broader social structures shape women’s empowerment, investment in children, and cooperation in the household.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE；JEL：D13, J16, N47, P5, Z13
papers.zh_title: 亲属结构与家庭：来自母系带的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 亲属结构在不同社会中存在差异，并可能影响家庭内部的合作激励。亲属结构的一个关键差异来源是世系和继承是通过女性（如母系亲属制度）还是男性（如父系亲属制度）来追溯。人类学家假设母系亲属制度对女性有利，因为她们从亲属那里获得更多支持，且丈夫对妻子的权威较小。然而，这些因素可能减少核心家庭内部的合作。我利用沿母系带的地理断点回归设计来检验这些假设，母系带描述了撒哈拉以南非洲母系亲属制度的分布。使用超过50次人口与健康调查波次、超过40万受访者的数据，我发现母系女性更不可能认为家庭暴力是正当的，经历更少的家庭暴力，并在决策方面拥有更大的自主权——尤其是在探访家人和寻求医疗保健的能力上。此外，母系亲属制度缩小了男女儿童之间的教育差距，并且母系儿童在健康方面受益。利用从母系带夫妇处收集的原始调查和实验数据，我检验了母系亲属制度如何影响配偶合作。当更容易隐藏收入时，母系女性与配偶在公共物品上的贡献更少。这些结果突显了更广泛的社会结构如何塑造女性赋权、对子女的投资以及家庭内部的合作。

papers.title: Buy Now, Pay Later Credit: User Characteristics and Effects on Spending Patterns
papers.authors: Marco Di Maggio, Emily Williams, Justin Katz
papers.abstract: Firms offering “buy now, pay later” (BNPL) point-of-sale installment loans with minimal underwriting and low interest have captured a growing fraction of the market for short-term unsecured consumer credit. We provide a detailed look into the US BNPL market by constructing a large panel of BNPL users from transaction-level data. We document characteristics of users and usage patterns, and use BNPL roll-out to provide new insights into consumer responses to unsecured credit access. BNPL access increases both total spending levels and the retail share in total spending, with magnitudes too large for standard intertemporal and static substitution effects to explain. These findings hold for consumers with and without inferred liquidity constraints. Our findings are more consistent with a “liquidity flypaper effect” where additional retail liquidity through BNPL “sticks where it hits”, than a standard lifecycle model with liquidity constraints.
papers.zh_title: 先买后付信贷：用户特征及对消费模式的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 提供“先买后付”销售点分期贷款的公司，其贷款审批要求极低且利率低，已占据了短期无担保消费信贷市场日益增长的份额。我们通过从交易层面数据构建一个大型的“先买后付”用户面板，详细审视了美国“先买后付”市场。我们记录了用户特征和使用模式，并利用“先买后付”的推出为消费者对无担保信贷获取的反应提供了新见解。“先买后付”的获取增加了总消费水平以及零售支出在总消费中的占比，其幅度之大，标准跨期和静态替代效应无法解释。这些发现对于推断有和没有流动性约束的消费者均成立。我们的发现更符合“流动性粘蝇纸效应”，即通过“先买后付”增加的零售流动性“粘在它触及的地方”，而不是带有流动性约束的标准生命周期模型。

papers.title: Three Criteria for Evaluating Social Programs
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
papers.abstract: This paper examines the economic foundations of three criteria used for evaluating the costs and benefits of social programs. Some criteria do not consider the scale of programs or address the costs associated with programs that expand or contract the total government budget. A recent addition to the list of evaluation criteria--the marginal value of public funds (MVPF)--does not adopt a social optimality perspective. It evaluates the optimality of expenditures assuming a predetermined aggregate budget without considering the social costs of raising that budget.
papers.zh_title: 评估社会项目的三个标准
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了用于评估社会项目成本和收益的三个标准的经济学基础。一些标准不考虑项目的规模，也不处理那些扩大或缩小政府总预算的项目所带来的成本。评估标准列表中的一个最新补充——公共资金边际价值——并未采用社会最优性视角。它在假设总预算预先确定且不考虑筹集该预算的社会成本的情况下评估支出的最优性。

papers.title: Trapped in the Trilemma: When Security Trumps Economics
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Harold James
papers.abstract: This paper describes the challenges of globalization in terms of the logic underpinning four distinct policy constraints or “trilemmas” and their interrelationship; in particular the disturbances that arise from capital flows and the difficulties of adjusting monetary policies to a global monetary environment. These trilemmas intersect and interlock. The trilemmas are: 1. The traditional Macroeconomic trilemma between capital mobility, fixed exchange rates and monetary autonomy; 2. The International relations trilemma between capital mobility, sovereignty and international order; 3. The Political economy trilemma between capital mobility, democracy and sovereignty; 4. The Financial stability trilemma between capital mobility, financial stability and independent national policies. The four trilemmas offer a way to analyze how domestic monetary, financial, economic and political systems are interconnected within the international system that opens up vulnerabilities. They can be described as the impossible policy choices at the heart of globalization.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E52, E60, F30, F40, G28, N1
papers.zh_title: 困于三难困境：当安全压倒经济
papers.zh_abstract: 本文根据支撑四种不同政策约束或“三难困境”的逻辑及其相互关系，描述了全球化的挑战；特别是资本流动引起的扰动以及调整货币政策以适应全球货币环境的困难。这些三难困境相互交叉和锁定。这些三难困境是：1. 传统的宏观经济三难困境：资本流动性、固定汇率和货币自主权之间；2. 国际关系三难困境：资本流动性、主权和国际秩序之间；3. 政治经济三难困境：资本流动性、民主和主权之间；4. 金融稳定三难困境：资本流动性、金融稳定和独立国家政策之间。这四个三难困境提供了一种分析国内货币、金融、经济和政治体系如何在国际体系内相互关联的方式，这种关联打开了脆弱性。它们可以被描述为全球化核心中不可能的政策选择。

papers.title: Firming up Price Inflation
papers.authors: Philip Bunn, Lena S. Anayi, Nicholas Bloom, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites, Ivan Yotzov
papers.abstract: We use data from a large panel survey of UK firms to analyze the economic drivers of price setting since the start of the Covid pandemic. Inflation responded asymmetrically to movements in demand. This helps to explain why inflation did not fall much during the negative initial pandemic demand shock. Energy prices and shortages of labor and materials account for most of the rise during the rebound. Inflation rates across firms have become more dispersed and skewed since the start of the pandemic. We find that average price inflation is positively correlated with the dispersion and skewness of the distribution. Finally, we also introduce a novel measure of subjective inflation uncertainty within firms and show how this has increased during the pandemic, continuing to rise in 2022 even as sales uncertainty dropped back.
papers.zh_title: 夯实价格通胀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用英国企业大型面板调查的数据，分析了自新冠疫情开始以来价格设定的经济驱动因素。通胀对需求变动的反应是不对称的。这有助于解释为什么在疫情初期负面的需求冲击期间通胀没有大幅下降。能源价格以及劳动力和材料短缺解释了反弹期间通胀上升的大部分原因。自疫情开始以来，企业间的通胀率变得更加分散和偏斜。我们发现平均价格通胀与分布的离散度和偏度呈正相关。最后，我们还引入了一种衡量企业内部主观通胀不确定性的新方法，并展示了这种不确定性在疫情期间如何增加，即使在2022年销售不确定性回落时仍继续上升。

papers.title: All Clear for Takeoff: Evidence from Airports on the Effects of Infrastructure Privatization
papers.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, Yeejin Jang, Hyeik Kim, Michael S. Weisbach
papers.abstract: Infrastructure assets have undergone substantial privatization around the world in recent decades. How do these assets perform post-privatization? This paper examines global airports. Our central finding is that the type of ownership matters: Volume, efficiency, and quality improve substantially under private equity (PE) ownership—both following privatization and in subsequent transactions—but there is little evidence of improvement under non-PE private ownership. This remains the case for airports sold in auctions in which PE and non-PE firms bid, mitigating concerns about selection. PE owners invest in new physical capacity and appear to negotiate more effectively with airlines, especially in the presence of a state-owned flag carrier. Higher prices and more retail revenue increase net income, with no evidence of cost reductions or layoffs. We find that improvements are concentrated when there is a competing airport nearby, under longer-term leases, and when the local government is less corrupt. One explanation for the failure of non-PE private firms to outperform government ownership is that they tend to target more corrupt locations.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G32, G38, H54, L32, R42
papers.zh_title: 起飞畅通无阻：来自机场的基础设施私有化效应证据
papers.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，全球基础设施资产经历了大规模私有化。这些资产在私有化后表现如何？本文考察了全球机场。我们的核心发现是，所有权类型至关重要：在私募股权所有权下——无论是在私有化之后还是在后续交易中——运量、效率和质量都显著改善，但几乎没有证据表明非私募股权私人所有权下有所改善。对于私募股权和非私募股权公司竞标的拍卖中出售的机场，情况依然如此，这缓解了对选择问题的担忧。私募股权所有者投资于新的物理容量，并且似乎在与航空公司谈判时更有效，尤其是在存在国有旗舰航空公司的情况下。更高的价格和更多的零售收入增加了净收入，没有证据表明成本降低或裁员。我们发现，当附近有竞争机场、租约期限较长以及当地政府腐败程度较低时，改善更为集中。非私募股权私人公司未能超越政府所有权的一个解释是，它们倾向于瞄准更腐败的地点。

papers.title: Heterogenous Rates of Return on Homes and Other Real Estate: Do the Rich Do Better? Do Black Households Do Worse?
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: Recent work on wealth inequality based on the capitalization method wherein aggregate wealth totals are distributed in proportion to various forms of income like dividends has motivated a concern about whether rates of return on assets vary across the wealth distribution. In this study, I use a new data source, accrued capital gains on homes and other real estate as reported in the Survey of Consumer Finances. I find strong econometric evidence that returns on homes vary directly with wealth level and are considerably higher for the very wealthy compared to the middle class and lower wealth households. However, there is no evidence from the preferred specification that Black or Hispanic families receive lower returns on their property once controlling for factors such as years of occupancy and overall house price movements in the market. The number of years of occupancy is also a highly significant determinant of returns on homes. The effect is strongly negative because communities of residence become less desirable and real properties deteriorate physically over time, both factors reducing property values. Returns on individual homes are also strongly related to overall house price movements in the market, suggesting that timing the market is a key determinant.
papers.zh_title: 住房及其他房地产的异质性回报率：富人表现更好吗？黑人家庭表现更差吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 近期基于资本化方法（即总财富总量按股息等各种收入形式比例分配）研究财富不平等的工作，引发了对资产回报率是否随财富分布而变化的关注。在本研究中，我使用了一个新的数据来源，即消费者金融调查中报告的住房及其他房地产的应计资本收益。我发现了强有力的计量经济学证据，表明住房回报率与财富水平直接相关，且非常富裕家庭的回报率远高于中产阶级和较低财富家庭。然而，在控制了居住年限和市场整体房价变动等因素后，首选设定中没有证据表明黑人家庭或西班牙裔家庭的房产回报率较低。居住年限也是住房回报率的一个高度显著的决定因素。其效应为强负向，因为居住社区随时间推移变得不那么理想，且实物资产会物理性贬值，这两个因素都会降低房产价值。个人住房回报率也与市场整体房价变动密切相关，这表明把握市场时机是一个关键决定因素。

papers.title: Multidimensional Screening and Menu Design in Health Insurance Markets
