papers.authors: Hector Chade, Victoria R. Marone, Amanda Starc, Jeroen Swinkels
papers.abstract: We analyze a multidimensional screening model in which a principal offers a menu of quality-price pairs to a consumer with multiple dimensions of private information and a quasilinear utility function. We derive necessary conditions for optimality, and use them to provide insight into optimal exclusion, positive trade, and screening. We then recast the problem in terms of incremental quality levels and prices, the so-called demand-profile approach (DPA). Under DPA, the problem decouples across increments and can be solved one at a time. We provide novel conditions under which DPA recovers the solution to the full problem exactly or approximately, and which make the necessary conditions sufficient for optimality: essentially, valuations must be sufficiently correlated across quality increments. Applied to empirical estimates of demand for health insurance, we show that DPA is approximately valid, and we apply it to understand equilibrium outcomes in a monopoly insurance market.

papers.title: Coordination and Incumbency Advantage in Multi-Party Systems - Evidence from French Elections
papers.authors: Kevin Dano, Francesco Ferlenga, Vincenzo Galasso, Caroline Le Pennec, Vincent Pons
papers.abstract: In theory, free and fair elections can improve the selection of politicians and incentivize them to exert effort. In practice, incumbency advantage and coordination issues may lead to the (re)election of bad politicians. We ask whether these two forces compound each other. Using a regression discontinuity design in French two-round local and parliamentary elections, we find that winning an election increases candidates' chances to win the next election by 25.1 percentage points. Close winners are more likely to run again and more likely to win, conditional on running, than close losers. Incumbents personalize their campaign communication more and face fewer ideologically close competitors, indicating that parties coordinate more effectively on the winning side than on the losing side. A complementary RDD reveals that marginally qualifying for the runoff also enables candidates to rally new voters, but does not affect the number of competitors on their side. We conclude that party coordination and voters rallying candidates who won or gained visibility in an election both contribute to their success in future races, even absent any actual difference in quality with candidates on the losing side.
papers.zh_title: 多党制中的协调与在位优势——来自法国选举的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，自由公正的选举可以改善政治家的选拔并激励他们付出努力。实践中，在位优势和协调问题可能导致糟糕的政治家（再次）当选。我们探究这两种力量是否相互叠加。利用法国两轮地方和议会选举中的断点回归设计，我们发现赢得选举会使候选人赢得下一次选举的概率提高25.1个百分点。与落败的接近获胜者相比，接近获胜者更有可能再次参选，并且在参选条件下更有可能获胜。在位者更倾向于个性化其竞选沟通，并且面临的意识形态相近的竞争者更少，这表明政党在获胜方比在落败方协调得更为有效。一项补充性的断点回归设计显示，勉强进入第二轮投票也使候选人能够吸引新选民，但不会影响其所在阵营的竞争者数量。我们得出结论，即使与落败方的候选人不存在任何实际质量差异，政党协调以及选民对赢得选举或获得可见度的候选人的支持，都共同促进了他们在未来选举中的成功。

papers.title: Inequality and Social Distancing during the Pandemic
papers.authors: Caitlin S. Brown, Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: We study how pre-pandemic inequalities in America influenced social distancing over the course of the COVID-19 pandemic. Richer counties tended to see more protective mobility responses in the initial (pre-pharmaceutical) phase, but less protective responses later. Near linearity of this income effect implies that inequality between counties contributed very little to overall mobility reductions. By contrast, higher within-county inequality and/or poverty measures came with substantially larger attenuations to non-residential mobility at given average incomes. There were also significant effects of the county’s racial and age composition. Standard epidemiological covariates of contact rates were also relevant, controlling for the socioeconomic factors.
papers.zh_title: 疫情前的不平等与疫情期间的社交距离
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国疫情前的不平等如何影响COVID-19疫情期间的社交距离行为。在初始（药物前）阶段，较富裕的县往往表现出更具保护性的流动性反应，但后期则相反。这种收入效应的近乎线性意味着县际不平等对整体流动性减少的贡献非常小。相比之下，在给定平均收入水平下，较高的县内不平等和/或贫困指标与非居住流动性的显著更大衰减相关。县的种族和年龄构成也有显著影响。在控制社会经济因素后，接触率的标准流行病学协变量也具有相关性。

papers.title: Does the Squeaky Wheel Get More Grease? The Direct and Indirect Effects of Citizen Participation on Environmental Governance in China
papers.authors: Mark Buntaine, Michael Greenstone, Guojun He, Mengdi Liu, Shaoda Wang, Bing Zhang
papers.abstract: We conducted a nationwide field experiment in China to evaluate the direct and indirect impacts of assigning firms to public or private citizen appeals when they violate pollution standards. There are three main findings. First, public appeals to the regulator through social media substantially reduce violations and pollution emissions, while private appeals cause more modest environmental improvements. Second, public appeals appear to tilt regulators’ focus away from facilitating economic growth and toward avoiding pollution-induced public unrest. Third, pollution reductions by treated firms are not offset by control firms, based on randomly varying the proportion of treatment firms at the prefecture-level.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LE, PE, POL；JEL：K32, P28, Q52
papers.zh_title: 会哭的孩子有奶吃？公民参与对中国环境治理的直接与间接影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在中国进行了一项全国性实地实验，以评估当企业违反污染标准时，将企业分配给公众或私人公民申诉的直接和间接影响。主要有三个发现。首先，通过社交媒体向监管机构进行公开申诉显著减少了违规行为和污染排放，而私人申诉则带来较为温和的环境改善。其次，公开申诉似乎使监管机构的关注点从促进经济增长转向避免污染引发的公众不安。第三，基于在地级市层面随机改变处理组企业比例，处理组企业的污染减少并未被对照组企业所抵消。

papers.title: Micro Propagation and Macro Aggregation
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Elisa Rubbo
papers.abstract: This paper reviews a framework for studying the aggregation and propagation of microeconomic shocks in general equilibrium. We discuss the determinants of aggregate measures of real economic activity, like real GDP, real domestic absorption, and aggregate productivity in both efficient and inefficient environments. We also discuss how shocks from one set of producers are transmitted to other producers through prices and quantities. The framework we provide is amenable to generalization and can be used to study any collection of producers ranging from one isolated producer, to an industry consisting of heterogeneous producers, to an entire economy. We conclude with a brief survey of some of the applied questions that can be addressed using the analytical tools presented in this review and avenues for future work.
papers.zh_title: 微观传导与宏观加总
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了一个研究一般均衡中微观经济冲击的加总和传导的框架。我们讨论了在有效和无效环境中，实际经济活动（如实际GDP、实际国内吸收和总生产率）的总体衡量指标的决定因素。我们还讨论了来自一组生产者的冲击如何通过价格和数量传导给其他生产者。我们提供的框架易于推广，可用于研究任何生产者集合，范围从单个孤立的生产者，到由异质性生产者组成的行业，再到整个经济体。最后，我们简要概述了使用本文所述分析工具可以解决的一些应用问题以及未来工作的方向。

papers.title: Inflation Expectations and Corporate Borrowing Decisions: New Causal Evidence
papers.authors: Tiziano Ropele, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
papers.abstract: We match survey data of Italian firms that includes a repeated experiment in which information about inflation is randomly provided to firms over time with detailed credit data that covers the borrowing decisions of firms. This allows us to study how exogenous variation in inflation expectations causally affects the borrowing decisions of Italian firms. We document a number of new results. Firms with exogenously higher inflation expectations end up paying higher interest rates on average but do not change the overall demand of loans. Instead, we find a significant rebalancing of firms’ borrowing decisions away from lower-interest long-term loans and toward higher-interest short-term loans. In anticipation of rising future interest rates linked to higher expected inflation, firms also take on new long-term loans to pay down existing loans, thereby locking in interest rate savings. Firms that are relatively more knowledgeable about financial tools engage in the latter particularly strongly.
papers.zh_title: 通胀预期与企业借贷决策：新的因果证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将意大利企业的调查数据（其中包含一项重复实验，随时间随机向企业提供关于通胀的信息）与涵盖企业借贷决策的详细信贷数据相匹配。这使我们能够研究通胀预期的外生变化如何因果性地影响意大利企业的借贷决策。我们记录了一系列新结果。通胀预期外生较高的企业平均支付了更高的利率，但并未改变贷款的总需求。相反，我们发现企业的借贷决策发生了显著再平衡，从低利率的长期贷款转向高利率的短期贷款。由于预期未来利率会随着预期通胀上升而上升，企业还借入新的长期贷款来偿还现有贷款，从而锁定利率节省。对金融工具相对更了解的企业尤其强烈地参与了后一种行为。

papers.title: Jobs in the Smog: Firm Location and Workers’ Exposure to Pollution in African Cities
papers.authors: Vittorio Bassi, Matthew E. Kahn, Nancy Lozano Gracia, Tommaso Porzio, Jeanne Sorin
papers.abstract: We show that the organization of production prevalent in Ugandan cities increases workers’ exposure to urban pollution. Using new granular spatial data on air pollution and manufacturing firms, we document that small firms cluster along the busiest and most polluted roads because road traffic bundles air pollution with customer access. Even within neighborhoods, cleaner areas exist, yet jobs are in the smog. A spatial equilibrium model rationalizes these patterns, with firms capturing sizable profit gains from polluted locations while workers receive limited compensation for the exposure. Our results imply that the welfare costs of urban air pollution in developing-country cities may be substantially larger than city-level averages suggest.
papers.zh_title: 雾霾中的工作：非洲城市的企业选址与工人污染暴露
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，乌干达城市普遍存在的生产组织方式增加了工人对城市污染的暴露。利用关于空气污染和制造业企业的新颖精细空间数据，我们记录了小型企业聚集在最繁忙、污染最严重的道路沿线，因为道路交通将空气污染与客户可达性捆绑在一起。即使在社区内部也存在更清洁的区域，但工作机会却在雾霾之中。一个空间均衡模型使这些模式合理化，企业从污染地点获得了可观的利润收益，而工人则因暴露而获得的补偿有限。我们的结果表明，发展中国家城市中城市空气污染的福利成本可能远大于城市平均水平所暗示的程度。

papers.title: Informationally Efficient Climate Policy: Designing Markets to Measure and Price Externalities
papers.authors: Derek Lemoine
papers.abstract: I study how policymakers can access and act on the information about climate change damages that is dispersed throughout the economy. I analyze a new dynamic deposit-refund instrument that I label “carbon shares”. This instrument empowers markets to perform price discovery about future damages. I show that there exists a limit-case rational expectations equilibrium in which this instrument: i) efficiently prices new emissions, ii) efficiently incentivizes removal of past emissions, and iii) efficiently aggregates dispersed information about the social cost of emissions. Conventional emission taxes achieve only the first of these objectives, for given information. Calibrated numerical simulations suggest benefits from achieving the other two objectives.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：D82, G14, H23, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 信息有效的气候政策：设计市场以衡量和定价外部性
papers.zh_abstract: 我研究了政策制定者如何获取并利用分散在整个经济中的关于气候变化损害的信息。我分析了一种新的动态押金-退款工具，我将其称为“碳份额”。该工具使市场能够对未来损害进行价格发现。我证明存在一个极限情况下的理性预期均衡，在该均衡中，这一工具能够：i) 有效定价新排放，ii) 有效激励清除历史排放，以及iii) 有效加总关于排放社会成本的分散信息。传统的排放税在给定信息下仅能实现第一个目标。校准后的数值模拟表明，实现另外两个目标会带来收益。

papers.title: Comparing the Effects of Policies for the Labor Market Integration of Refugees
papers.authors: Mette Foged, Linea Hasager, Giovanni Peri
papers.abstract: This paper estimates, within a common framework, the effects of four types of integration polices on the employment probability and earnings of refugees in Denmark during the last three decades. We first review the studies that use a credible identification strategy to evaluate the causal effects of these types of policies on the assimilation of refugees in developed countries. We then describe the dynamics of labor market outcomes of several cohorts of refugees in Denmark. To our knowledge, Denmark is the only country where the number and design of policy changes and the longitudinal individual data availability make such an analysis possible. Our analysis suggests that improved language training, combined with initial placement of refugees in strong labor markets, significantly improved their long-run labor market outcomes. On the contrary, cutting initial welfare payments and housing them near other refugees does not seem to improve their long-run outcomes. Active labor market policies focused on matching refugees with simple jobs in high demand occupations may have positive short-run effects, but we cannot yet assess their long-run effects.
papers.zh_title: 比较难民劳动力市场融合政策的效果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在一个统一框架内，估计了过去三十年间四类融合政策对丹麦难民就业概率和收入的影响。我们首先回顾了那些采用可信识别策略来评估这些政策类型对发达国家难民融入的因果效应的研究。然后，我们描述了丹麦几批难民群体劳动力市场结果的动态变化。据我们所知，丹麦是唯一一个政策变化数量、设计以及纵向个体数据可得性使得此类分析成为可能的国家。我们的分析表明，改进的语言培训，结合将难民初始安置在强劲的劳动力市场，显著改善了他们的长期劳动力市场结果。相反，削减初始福利金并将他们安置在其他难民附近，似乎并未改善其长期结果。侧重于将难民与高需求职业中的简单工作进行匹配的积极劳动力市场政策可能产生积极的短期效应，但我们尚无法评估其长期效应。

papers.title: The Effects of Income on the Economic Wellbeing of Families with Low Incomes: Evidence from the 2021 Expanded Child Tax Credit
papers.authors: Natasha Pilkauskas, Katherine Michelmore, Nicole Kovski, H. Luke Shaefer
papers.abstract: We examine the effects of an unconditional cash transfer on the economic wellbeing (material hardship, ability to meet needs, money on hand, use of friends and family for assistance, and employment) of families and children with very low incomes. We use a parameterized difference-in-differences approach to study the impact of the 2021 temporary expansion of the Child Tax Credit (CTC), which provided monthly, unconditional cash payments to families with children from July to December 2021. The 2021 monthly CTC reduced the number of hardships families experienced, and in particular their food insecurity. We find some evidence that the credit reduced medical hardships, reduced reliance on friends and family for food, and improved respondents’ ability to pay utility bills. We also find no effects on any labor supply measures. Analyses that examine differences by racial/ethnic groups show that the effects are somewhat stronger for Black families than for Hispanic and White families, but the differences are not large.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：H20, I3, I30, I31, I38, J20
papers.zh_title: 收入对低收入家庭经济福祉的影响：来自2021年扩大的儿童税收抵免的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了无条件现金转移支付对极低收入家庭和儿童的经济福祉（物质困难、满足需求的能力、手头现金、向亲友寻求帮助以及就业）的影响。我们采用参数化双重差分法来研究2021年儿童税收抵免（CTC）临时扩大的影响，该扩大在2021年7月至12月期间向有子女的家庭提供了每月无条件现金支付。2021年的月度CTC减少了家庭经历的困难数量，特别是其粮食不安全状况。我们找到一些证据表明，该抵免减少了医疗困难，减少了对亲友提供食物的依赖，并提高了受访者支付水电费的能力。我们也没有发现对任何劳动力供给指标有影响。按种族/民族群体分析差异表明，对黑人家庭的影响略强于对西班牙裔和白人家庭的影响，但差异并不大。

papers.title: The Impacts of COVID-19 on Racial Inequality in Business Earnings
papers.authors: Robert W. Fairlie
papers.abstract: Many small businesses have closed, lost revenues, or downsized as a response to health and economic disruptions caused by COVID-19. But, were economic losses in the pandemic disproportionately felt by businesses owned by people of color? This paper provides the first study of the impacts of COVID-19 on racial inequality in business earnings. Pandemic-induced losses to business earnings in 2020 were 16-19 percent for all business owners. Racial inequality increased in the pandemic: Black business owners experienced larger negative impacts on business earnings of 12-14 percent relative to white business owners. Regression estimates for Latinx and Asian business owners reveal negative point estimates but the estimates are not statistically significant. Using Blinder-Oaxaca decompositions and a new pandemic-focused decomposition technique, I find that the industry concentrations of Black, Latinx, and Asian business owners placed each of these groups at a higher risk of experiencing disproportionate business earnings losses in the pandemic. Higher education levels among Asian business owners helped insulate them from larger losses from COVID-19. Finally, differential exposure to COVID case rates, business closure policies, and mask mandates did not contribute to racial inequality in business earnings losses.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对商业收入种族不平等的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 许多小企业因应对COVID-19造成的健康和经济冲击而关闭、收入损失或裁员。但是，疫情中的经济损失是否不成比例地由有色人种拥有的企业承担？本文首次研究了COVID-19对商业收入种族不平等的影响。2020年，所有企业主因疫情导致的商业收入损失为16-19%。种族不平等在疫情中加剧：与白人企业主相比，黑人企业主的商业收入受到的负面冲击更大，高出12-14%。对拉丁裔和亚裔企业主的回归估计显示负的点估计，但估计值在统计上不显著。使用Blinder-Oaxaca分解和一种新的疫情聚焦分解技术，我发现黑人、拉丁裔和亚裔企业主的行业集中度使这些群体在疫情中面临更高的不成比例商业收入损失风险。亚裔企业主较高的教育水平有助于他们免受COVID-19带来的更大损失。最后，COVID病例率、企业关闭政策和口罩令的差异化暴露并未导致商业收入损失中的种族不平等。

papers.title: Dust to Feed, Dust to Grey: The Effect of In-Utero Exposure to the Dust Bowl on Old-Age Longevity
papers.authors: Hamid Noghanibehambari, Jason Fletcher
papers.abstract: Intensive agriculture and deep plowing resulted in top-soil erosion and dust storms during the 1930s. These effects have been shown to affect agricultural income and land values that persisted for years. Given the growing literature on the relevance of in-utero and early-life exposures, it is surprising that studies focusing on links between the Dust Bowl and later-life health find inconclusive and mixed results. This paper re-evaluates this literature and studies the long-term effects of in-utero and early-life exposure to top-soil erosion caused by the Dust Bowl of the 1930s on old-age longevity. Specifically, we employ Social Security Administration death records linked with the full-count 1940 census and implement event studies and difference-in-difference designs to compare the longevity of individuals in high/medium versus low top-soil erosion counties post-1930 versus pre-1930. We find intent-to-treat reductions in longevity of about 0.9 months for those born in high erosion counties post-1930. We show that these effects are not an artifact of preexisting trends in longevity. Additional analyses suggest the effects are more pronounced among children raised in farm households, females, and those with lower maternal education. We also provide suggestive evidence that reductions in adulthood income are a likely mechanism channel.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, EH；JEL：I12, I15, J0
papers.zh_title: 尘土为食，尘土为灰：子宫内暴露于沙尘暴对老年寿命的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 20世纪30年代，集约化农业和深耕导致了表土侵蚀和沙尘暴。这些影响已被证明会持续多年影响农业收入和土地价值。鉴于关于子宫内和早期生命暴露相关性的文献日益增多，令人惊讶的是，关注沙尘暴与晚年健康之间联系的研究得出了不确定且混杂的结果。本文重新评估了这些文献，并研究了子宫内和早期生命暴露于20世纪30年代沙尘暴导致的表土侵蚀对老年寿命的长期影响。具体而言，我们使用了与1940年全量人口普查相关联的社会保障局死亡记录，并采用事件研究和双重差分设计，比较了1930年后与1930年前，高/中表土侵蚀县与低表土侵蚀县个体的寿命。我们发现，对于1930年后出生在高侵蚀县的个体，寿命的意向性治疗减少约为0.9个月。我们表明这些效应并非寿命先前趋势的人为产物。进一步分析表明，这种效应在农场家庭长大的儿童、女性和母亲受教育程度较低的人群中更为显著。我们还提供了暗示性证据，表明成年期收入减少是一个可能的机制渠道。

papers.title: A Horse Race of Monetary Policy Regimes: An Experimental Investigation
papers.authors: Olena Kostyshyna, Luba Petersen, Jing Yang
papers.abstract: We provide a comprehensive assessment of leading monetary policy frameworks away from and at the ELB. Inflation targeting, dual mandate, average inflation targeting under 4- and 10-period horizons, price level targeting, and nominal GDP level targeting are evaluated in a laboratory setting. Contrary to theoretical prediction with full information rational expectations, participants exhibit backward-looking expectations and, consequently, rate-targeting mandates outperform level targeting. More history dependence worsens macroeconomic stability. Inflation expectations are managed better when mandates are framed in terms of inflation rates than price levels. Central bank communication significantly improves the performance of price level targeting.
papers.zh_title: 货币政策体制的赛马：一项实验研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对远离有效下限（ELB）和处于ELB时的主要货币政策框架进行了全面评估。在实验室环境中评估了通胀目标制、双重使命、4期和10期平均通胀目标制、价格水平目标制和名义GDP水平目标制。与具有完全信息理性预期的理论预测相反，参与者表现出后顾性预期，因此，利率目标制优于水平目标制。更多的历史依赖性会恶化宏观经济稳定性。当使命以通胀率而非价格水平来表述时，通胀预期管理得更好。央行沟通显著改善了价格水平目标制的表现。

papers.title: Comparing China REACH and the Jamaica Home Visiting Program
papers.authors: Jin Zhou, James J. Heckman, Bei Liu, Mai Lu, Susan M. Chang, Sally Grantham-McGregor
papers.abstract: This paper summarizes empirical findings from a series of recent papers studying a replication of the Jamaica Reach Up and Learn home visiting program in China, China REACH. It collects more detailed information than is available on the original program. An analysis of it facilitates investigation of the skills generated by Jamaica Reach Up and Learn. We find evidence for dynamic complementarity for medium- and low-ability children. Children who start behind only slowly catch up. Able children are an exception. Most children master its goals for skill development, but the pace of learning varies greatly among children classified by ability. The program scales well. Costs per pupil are roughly $500 (2015 USD). At the same ages, treatment effect sizes and skill growth curves are comparable across the Jamaica and China REACH interventions, despite differences in scale and differences in cultural settings. We develop a method for comparing scores on different tests by anchoring comparisons on common items.
papers.zh_title: 比较中国REACH项目和牙买加家访项目
papers.zh_abstract: 本文总结了一系列近期论文的实证发现，这些论文研究了牙买加“Reach Up and Learn”家访项目在中国的复制项目——中国REACH。它收集了比原始项目更详细的信息。对其的分析有助于研究牙买加“Reach Up and Learn”项目所产生的技能。我们发现了中低能力儿童存在动态互补性的证据。起步落后的儿童只能缓慢追赶。有能力的儿童是一个例外。大多数儿童掌握了其技能发展目标，但按能力分类的儿童之间学习速度差异很大。该项目扩展性良好。每名学生成本约为500美元（2015年美元）。在相同年龄段，尽管规模和所处文化环境不同，牙买加和中国REACH干预措施的处理效应大小和技能增长曲线具有可比性。我们开发了一种通过将比较锚定在共同项目上来比较不同测试分数的方法。

papers.title: What's My Employee Worth? The Effects of Salary Benchmarking
papers.authors: Zoe B. Cullen, Shengwu Li, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
papers.abstract: Firms are allowed to use aggregate data on market salaries to set pay, a practice known as salary benchmarking. Using national payroll data, we study firms that gain access to a tool that reveals market benchmarks for each job title. Using a difference-indifferences design, we find that the benchmark information reduces salary dispersion by 25%. Thus, salary dispersion must stem partly from aggregate uncertainty about the salaries offered by other firms. Our model formalizes how salary dispersion can arise even in competitive labor markets for identical workers when such uncertainty exists, and we discuss implications for an ongoing policy debate.
papers.zh_title: 我的员工值多少钱？薪资基准化的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 企业被允许使用市场薪资的汇总数据来设定薪酬，这种做法被称为薪资基准化。利用全国薪资数据，我们研究了那些获得一个能揭示每个职位市场基准的工具的企业。采用双重差分设计，我们发现基准信息使薪资离散度降低了25%。因此，薪资离散度必须部分源于其他企业所提供薪资的总体不确定性。我们的模型形式化了即使在同质工人的竞争性劳动力市场中，当存在这种不确定性时，薪资离散度也可能出现，并讨论了对正在进行的政策辩论的启示。

papers.title: The Covid-19 Baby Bump: The Unexpected Increase in U.S. Fertility Rates in Response to the Pandemic
papers.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Janet Currie, Hannes Schwandt
papers.abstract: We use natality microdata covering the universe of U.S. births for 2015-2021 and California births from 2015 through February 2023 to examine childbearing responses to the COVID-19 pandemic. We find that 60% of the 2020 decline in U.S. fertility rates was driven by sharp reductions in births to foreign-born mothers although births to this group comprised only 22% of all U.S. births in 2019. This decline started in January 2020. In contrast, the COVID-19 recession resulted in an overall “baby bump” among U.S.-born mothers which marked the first reversal in declining fertility rates since the Great Recession. Births to U.S.-born mothers fell by 31,000 in 2020 relative to a pre-pandemic trend but increased by 71,000 in 2021. The data for California suggest that U.S. births remained elevated through February 2023. The baby bump was most pronounced for first births and women under age 25, suggesting that the pandemic led some women to start families earlier. Above age 25, the baby bump was most pronounced for women ages 30-34 and women with a college education. The 2021-2022 baby bump is especially remarkable given the large declines in fertility rates that would have been projected by standard statistical models.
papers.zh_title: 新冠婴儿潮：美国生育率对疫情意外增长的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用覆盖2015-2021年美国全部出生人口和2015年至2023年2月加州出生人口的出生微观数据，考察了生育对COVID-19疫情的反应。我们发现，2020年美国生育率下降的60%是由外国出生母亲生育的急剧减少所驱动，尽管该群体在2019年仅占美国全部出生人口的22%。这一下降始于2020年1月。相比之下，COVID-19衰退导致美国出生母亲总体出现“婴儿潮”，这标志着自大衰退以来生育率下降趋势的首次逆转。相对于疫情前趋势，2020年美国出生母亲的生育减少了31,000例，但2021年增加了71,000例。加州的数据表明，美国出生人口在2023年2月之前仍保持高位。婴儿潮在初产和25岁以下女性中最为显著，表明疫情导致一些女性更早开始组建家庭。在25岁以上，婴儿潮在30-34岁女性和受过大学教育的女性中最为显著。考虑到标准统计模型原本会预测生育率大幅下降，2021-2022年的婴儿潮尤为引人注目。

papers.title: Long Social Distancing
papers.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
papers.abstract: Many working-age Americans plan to continue some forms of social distancing after the COVID-19 pandemic ends. We uncover this long social distancing phenomenon in our monthly Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes. It is stronger among older persons, the less educated, and those who live with or care for persons at high risk from infectious diseases. Regression models fit to individual-level data suggest that social distancing lowered labor force participation by 2.4 percentage points in 2022, 1.2 points on an earnings-weighted basis. These effects are highly concentrated among persons with long COVID experiences or daily interactions with at-risk persons. When combined with simple equilibrium models, our results imply that the participation drag reduced U.S. output by $205 billion in 2022, shrank the college wage premium by 2.1 percentage points, and modestly steepened the cross-sectional age-wage profile. The social-distancing drag on participation diminished by an estimated 1.6 percentage points from February 2022 to April 2023. Drawing on self-assessed causal effects in a separate analysis, infection worries lowered participation by an estimated one percentage point as of late 2022.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D12, E24, J14, J21, J22
papers.zh_title: 长期社交距离
papers.zh_abstract: 许多处于工作年龄的美国人计划在COVID-19疫情结束后继续采取某些形式的社交距离。我们在每月进行的“工作安排与态度调查”中发现了这种长期社交距离现象。这种现象在老年人、受教育程度较低者以及那些与传染病高风险人群同住或照顾他们的人中更为强烈。基于个体层面数据的回归模型表明，社交距离在2022年使劳动力参与率降低了2.4个百分点，按收入加权计算则降低了1.2个百分点。这些影响高度集中在有长新冠经历或每天与高风险人群互动的人群中。当与简单的均衡模型相结合时，我们的结果表明，参与率拖累在2022年使美国产出减少了2050亿美元，使大学工资溢价缩小了2.1个百分点，并适度陡化了横截面年龄-工资曲线。从2022年2月到2023年4月，社交距离对参与率的拖累估计减少了1.6个百分点。根据另一项分析中自我评估的因果效应，截至2022年底，感染担忧使参与率估计降低了1个百分点。

papers.title: Older Workers’ Employment and Social Security Spillovers through the Second Year of the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Emilie Jackson, Lauren Hersch Nicholas, Sarah Stith
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic triggered a large and immediate drop in employment among US workers, along with major expansions of unemployment insurance and work from home. We use Current Population Survey and Social Security application data to study employment among older adults and their participation in disability and retirement insurance programs through the second year of the pandemic. We find ongoing improvements in employment outcomes among older workers in the labor force, along with sustained higher levels in the share no longer in the labor force during this period. Applications for Social Security disability benefits remain depressed, particularly for Supplemental Security Income. In models accounting for the expiration of expanded unemployment insurance, we find some evidence that the loss of these additional financial supports resulted in an increase in disability claiming. Social Security retirement benefit claiming is approximately 3 percent higher during the second year of the pandemic.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H31, H5, J14, J26
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情第二年中老年工人的就业与社会保障溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情引发了美国工人就业的大幅即时下降，同时失业保险的大幅扩张和居家办公也随之而来。我们利用当前人口调查和社会保障申请数据，研究了疫情第二年中老年人的就业状况及其在残疾和退休保险项目中的参与情况。我们发现，劳动力中老年工人的就业结果持续改善，同时在此期间不再处于劳动力队伍中的比例持续处于较高水平。社会保障残疾福利的申请仍然低迷，尤其是补充保障收入。在考虑扩大的失业保险到期因素的模型中，我们发现一些证据表明，这些额外财务支持的丧失导致了残疾申请的增加。在疫情的第二年，社会保障退休福利的申请大约高出3%。

papers.title: Global Universal Basic Skills: Current Deficits and Implications for World Development
papers.authors: Sarah Gust, Eric A. Hanushek, Ludger Woessmann
papers.abstract: How far is the world away from ensuring that every child obtains the basic skills needed to be competitive in a modern economy? And what would accomplishing this mean for world development? We provide new approaches for estimating the lack of basic skills that allow mapping achievement across countries of the world onto a common (PISA) scale. We then estimate the share of children not achieving basic skills for 159 countries that cover 98% of world population and 99% of world GDP. We find that at least two-thirds of the world’s youth do not reach basic skill levels, ranging from 24% in North America to 89% in South Asia and 94% in Sub-Saharan Africa. Our economic analysis suggests that the present value of lost world economic output due to missing the goal of global universal basic skills amounts to over $700 trillion over the remaining century, or 12% of discounted GDP.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：I25, O15, O47
papers.zh_title: 全球通用基本技能：当前缺陷及其对世界发展的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 世界距离确保每个儿童获得在现代经济中具备竞争力所需的基本技能还有多远？实现这一目标对世界发展意味着什么？我们提供了估算基本技能缺失的新方法，使得能够将世界各国学生的学业成就映射到共同的PISA量表上。随后，我们估算了159个国家（覆盖全球98%的人口和99%的GDP）中未达到基本技能水平的儿童比例。我们发现，全球至少三分之二的青年未达到基本技能水平，这一比例从北美的24%到南亚的89%和撒哈拉以南非洲的94%不等。我们的经济分析表明，由于未能实现全球通用基本技能目标，在本世纪剩余时间内，世界经济损失的现值超过700万亿美元，相当于折现后GDP的12%。

papers.title: Calculating the Costs and Benefits of Advance Preparations for Future Pandemics
papers.authors: Rachel Glennerster, Christopher M. Snyder, Brandon Joel Tan
papers.abstract: While Covid-19 vaccines were developed and deployed with unprecedented speed, their widespread introduction could have been accelerated—saving millions of lives and trillions of dollars—had more vaccine capacity been available prior to the pandemic. Combining estimates of the frequency and intensity of pandemics with estimates of mortality, economic-output, and human-capital losses from pandemics of varying severities, we calculate that the present value of global social losses from the stream of future pandemics can be expected to be nearly $18 trillion—over $700 billion each year going forward. According to our model, a program spending $60 billion up front to expand production capacity and supply-chain inputs for vaccines and $5 billion annually thereafter would be sufficient to ensure production capacity to vaccinate 70% of the global population against a new virus within six months. The program would generate an expected net present value (NPV) gain of more than $500 billion over the status quo of delaying investment until a pandemic arrives. A program undertaken by the United States alone would generate an expected NPV gain of over $60 billion.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LE, PE, PR；JEL：H44, I15, I18, L65
papers.zh_title: 计算未来大流行病的预先准备成本与收益
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管新冠疫苗以前所未有的速度研发和部署，但如果在大流行之前就有更多的疫苗生产能力，其广泛推广本可以加速——从而挽救数百万人的生命并节省数万亿美元。结合对大流行频率和强度的估计，以及不同严重程度大流行导致的死亡率、经济产出和人力资本损失的估计，我们计算出未来一系列大流行造成的全球社会损失现值预计接近18万亿美元——即未来每年超过7000亿美元。根据我们的模型，一项前期投入600亿美元用于扩大疫苗生产能力和供应链投入、此后每年投入50亿美元的计划，将足以确保在六个月内为全球70%的人口生产针对新病毒的疫苗。与推迟投资直至大流行到来的现状相比，该计划预计将产生超过5000亿美元的净现值收益。仅由美国单独实施的一项计划预计将产生超过600亿美元的净现值收益。

papers.title: Two-way Fixed Effects and Differences-in-Differences Estimators with Several Treatments
papers.authors: Clément de Chaisemartin, Xavier D'Haultfoeuille
papers.abstract: We study two-way-fixed-effects regressions (TWFE) with several treatment variables. Under a parallel trends assumption, we show that the coefficient on each treatment identifies a weighted sum of that treatment’s effect, with possibly negative weights, plus a weighted sum of the effects of the other treatments. Thus, those estimators are not robust to heterogeneous effects and may be contaminated by other treatments’ effects. We further show that omitting a treatment from the regression can actually reduce the estimator’s bias, unlike what would happen under constant treatment effects. We propose an alternative difference-in-differences estimator, robust to heterogeneous effects and immune to the contamination problem. In the application we consider, the TWFE regression identifies a highly non-convex combination of effects, with large contamination weights, and one of its coefficients significantly differs from our heterogeneity-robust estimator.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EEE, LS, PE, POL, PR, TWP；JEL：C21, C23
papers.zh_title: 具有多种处理的双向固定效应与双重差分估计量
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了具有多种处理变量的双向固定效应回归。在平行趋势假设下，我们表明每个处理的系数识别的是该处理效应的加权和（权重可能为负），加上其他处理效应的加权和。因此，这些估计量对异质性效应不稳健，并且可能受到其他处理效应的污染。我们进一步表明，与恒定处理效应下的情况不同，从回归中省略一个处理实际上可以减少估计量的偏差。我们提出了一种替代的双重差分估计量，它对异质性效应稳健且不受污染问题的影响。在我们考虑的应用中，双向固定效应回归识别出一个高度非凸的效应组合，具有较大的污染权重，并且其一个系数与我们的异质性稳健估计量显著不同。

papers.title: The Effects of Racial Segregation on Intergenerational Mobility: Evidence from Historical Railroad Placement
papers.authors: Eric Chyn, Kareem Haggag, Bryan A. Stuart
papers.abstract: This paper provides new evidence on the causal impacts of city-wide racial segregation on intergenerational mobility. We use an instrumental variable approach that relies on plausibly exogenous variation in segregation due to the arrangement of railroad tracks in the nineteenth century. Our analysis finds that higher segregation reduces upward mobility for Black children from households across the income distribution and White children from low-income households. Moreover, segregation lowers academic achievement while increasing incarceration and teenage birth rates. An analysis of mechanisms shows that segregation reduces government spending, weakens support for anti-poverty policies, and increases racially conservative attitudes for White residents.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D63, H0, J0, R0
papers.zh_title: 种族隔离对代际流动的影响：来自历史铁路布局的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于全市范围种族隔离对代际流动性因果影响的新证据。我们使用工具变量方法，该方法依赖于19世纪铁路轨道布局带来的看似外生的隔离变化。我们的分析发现，更高的隔离程度降低了来自各收入阶层家庭的黑人儿童以及来自低收入家庭的白人儿童的向上流动性。此外，隔离降低了学业成绩，同时增加了监禁率和青少年生育率。对机制的分析表明，隔离减少了政府支出，削弱了对反贫困政策的支持，并增加了白人居民的种族保守态度。

papers.title: ESG Confusion and Stock Returns: Tackling the Problem of Noise
papers.authors: Florian Berg, Julian F. Koelbel, Anna Pavlova, Roberto Rigobon
papers.abstract: Existing measures of ESG (environmental, social, and governance) performance ESG ratings are noisy and, therefore, standard regression estimates of the effect of ESG performance on stock returns are biased. Addressing this as a classical errors-in-variables problem, we develop a noise-correction procedure in which we instrument ESG ratings with ratings of other ESG rating agencies. With this procedure, the median increase in the regression coefficients is a factor of 2.1. The results are similar when we use accounting profitability measures as outcome variables. In simulations, our noise-correction procedure outperforms alternative approaches such as simple averages or principal component analysis.
papers.zh_title: ESG混淆与股票回报：应对噪声问题
papers.zh_abstract: 现有的ESG（环境、社会和治理）绩效衡量指标——ESG评级——存在噪声，因此，关于ESG绩效对股票回报影响的标准回归估计是有偏的。将此视为经典测量误差问题，我们开发了一种噪声校正程序，在该程序中，我们使用其他ESG评级机构的评级作为ESG评级的工具变量。使用此程序，回归系数的中位数增加了2.1倍。当我们使用会计盈利能力指标作为结果变量时，结果类似。在模拟中，我们的噪声校正程序优于简单平均或主成分分析等替代方法。

papers.title: Segmented Arbitrage
papers.authors: Emil Siriwardane, Adi Sunderam, Jonathan L. Wallen
papers.abstract: We use arbitrage activity in equity, fixed income, and foreign exchange markets to characterize the frictions and constraints facing intermediaries. The average pairwise correlation between the 29 arbitrage spreads that we study is 21%. These low correlations are inconsistent with canonical intermediary asset pricing models. We show that at least two types of segmentation drive arbitrage dynamics. First, funding is segmented—certain trades rely on specific funding sources, making their arbitrage spreads sensitive to localized funding shocks. Second, balance sheets are segmented—intermediaries specialize in certain trades, so arbitrage spreads are sensitive to idiosyncratic balance sheet shocks.
papers.zh_title: 分割套利
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用股票、固定收益和外汇市场中的套利活动来刻画中介机构面临的摩擦和约束。我们研究的29个套利利差之间的平均两两相关性为21%。这些低相关性与经典的中介资产定价模型不一致。我们表明，至少有两种类型的分割驱动着套利动态。首先，资金是分割的——某些交易依赖于特定的资金来源，使得它们的套利利差对局部资金冲击敏感。其次，资产负债表是分割的——中介机构专注于某些交易，因此套利利差对特质性的资产负债表冲击敏感。

papers.title: Electricity Retail Rate Design in a Decarbonized Economy: An Analysis of Time-Of-Use and Critical Peak Pricing
papers.authors: Tim Schittekatte, Dharik S. Mallapragada, Paul L. Joskow, Richard Schmalensee
papers.abstract: Currently, most U.S. electricity consumers pay a constant price per kWh consumed that accounts for most of their bill. Ongoing developments in the power system increase efficiency gains that can be made from exposing consumers to widely varying wholesale spot prices. Pure spot pricing is not popular; consumers (and politicians) value price predictability and bill stability. We focus on second-best alternatives: time-of-use (TOU) and critical peak pricing (CPP). We introduce alternative assessment criteria tailored to a context with increasing intraday shiftable loads. Using historical data from CAISO, ERCOT and ISO-NE, we find that out-of-sample daily Spearman rank correlations between TOU rates and spot prices can be relatively high (averaging 0.7-0.8), and simulations confirm that TOU rates can reasonably replicate efficient load-shifting incentives (up to 60-70% of the potential). Our analysis suggests that TOU rates, especially when complemented with CPP, can be considerably more socially valuable than previously estimated.
papers.zh_title: 脱碳经济中的电力零售费率设计：分时电价与尖峰电价分析
papers.zh_abstract: 目前，大多数美国电力消费者为其消耗的每千瓦时支付恒定的价格，这构成了他们账单的大部分。电力系统的持续发展增加了通过让消费者面对广泛波动的批发现货价格所能实现的效率收益。纯粹的现货定价并不受欢迎；消费者（和政治家）重视价格可预测性和账单稳定性。我们专注于次优替代方案：分时电价和尖峰电价。我们引入了针对日内可转移负荷日益增加这一背景的替代评估标准。使用来自CAISO、ERCOT和ISO-NE的历史数据，我们发现样本外分时电价与现货价格之间的每日斯皮尔曼等级相关性可能相对较高（平均0.7-0.8），模拟证实分时电价可以合理地复制有效的负荷转移激励（高达潜力的60-70%）。我们的分析表明，分时电价，尤其是在辅以尖峰电价时，其社会价值可能比先前估计的要大得多。

papers.title: Can Pollution Cause Poverty? The Effects of Pollution on Educational, Health and Economic Outcomes
papers.authors: Claudia Persico
papers.abstract: Although pollution is widespread, there is little evidence about how it might harm children’s long run outcomes. Using the detailed, geocoded data that follows national representative cohorts of children born to the National Longitudinal Survey of Youth respondents over time, I compare siblings who were gestating before versus after a Toxic Release Inventory site opened or closed within one mile of their home. I find that children who were exposed prenatally to industrial pollution have lower wages, are more likely to be in poverty as adults, have fewer years of completed education, and are less likely to graduate high school.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EEE, EH；JEL：I10, I14, Q53
papers.zh_title: 污染会导致贫困吗？污染对教育、健康和经济结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管污染普遍存在，但关于它如何损害儿童长期结果的证据却很少。利用详细的地理编码数据，这些数据随时间追踪了全国青年纵向调查受访者所生儿童的代表性全国队列，我比较了在有毒物质释放清单站点在其家一英里范围内开放或关闭之前与之后怀孕的兄弟姐妹。我发现，产前暴露于工业污染的儿童工资较低，成年后更有可能陷入贫困，完成教育的年限更少，并且高中毕业的可能性更低。

papers.title: Understanding the Strength of the Dollar
papers.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Tony Zhang
papers.abstract: We link the sustained appreciation of the U.S. dollar from 2011 to 2019 to international capital flows driven by primitive economic factors. We show that increases in foreign investors’ net savings, increases in U.S. monetary policy rates relative to the rest of the world, and shifts in investor demand for U.S. financial assets contributed approximately equally to the dollar’s appreciation. We then quantify the impact of potential future demand shifts for U.S. assets on the value of the dollar.
papers.zh_title: 理解美元强势
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将2011年至2019年美元的持续升值归因于由基本经济因素驱动的国际资本流动。我们表明，外国投资者净储蓄的增加、美国货币政策利率相对于世界其他地区的上升，以及投资者对美国金融资产需求的转变，对美元升值的贡献大致相等。然后，我们量化了未来对美国资产潜在需求变化对美元价值的影响。

papers.title: Deposit and Credit Reallocation in a Banking Panic: The Role of State-Owned Banks
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Abhiman Das, Nirupama Kulkarni, Prachi Mishra, Nagpurnanand R. Prabhala
papers.abstract: We study a bank run in India in which private bank branches experience sudden and considerable loss of deposits, which migrate to state-owned public sector banks (PSBs) that serve as safe havens. We trace the consequences of the deposit reallocation using bank branch-level balance sheet and firm-bank lending data. The flight to safety is not a flight to quality. Lending shrinks and credit quality improves in run banks, but worsens in PSBs receiving the flight-to-safety flows. The reallocation of resources is not efficient in the aggregate.
papers.zh_title: 银行恐慌中的存款与信贷再配置：国有银行的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了印度的一次银行挤兑事件，其中私人银行分行经历了突然且大量的存款损失，这些存款迁移至作为安全避风港的国有公共部门银行。我们利用银行分行层面的资产负债表和公司-银行贷款数据，追溯了存款再配置的后果。这种“避险”并非“向优质资产转移”。在遭受挤兑的银行中，贷款规模收缩，信贷质量改善；但在接收了避险资金流的国有银行中，信贷质量却恶化了。总体而言，资源的再配置效率不高。

papers.title: The Future of Global Economic Power
papers.authors: Seth G. Benzell, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Maria Kazakova, Guillermo LaGarda, Kristina Nesterova, Victor Yifan Ye, Andrey Zubarev
papers.abstract: The global economy’s enormous region-specific demographic, technological, and fiscal changes raise five major questions. First, which regions will come to dominate the world economy? Second, will regional levels of per capita GDP converge? Third, will high saving rates in fast growing regions lead to a global capital glut? Fourth, does aging augur far higher tax rates in particular regions? Fifth, will automation materially influence development? This paper develops the Global Gaidar Model, a 17-region, 2-skills, 100-period, OLG model, to address these questions. The model is carefully calibrated to 2017 UN demographic and IMF fiscal data. Productivity growth and its interaction with demographic change are the main drivers of future economic power. Fiscal conditions and automation matter, but are secondary factors. Our baseline simulation, which sets future productivity based on each region’s long-term record, predicts China and India becoming the world’s largest two economies with 27.0 percent and 16.2 percent of 2100 world GDP, respectively. The respective end-of-century U.S. and Western European global GDP shares are just 12.3 percent and 11.9 percent. Our baseline also features an evolving global savings glut, major reductions in the world interest rate, substantial aging-related increases in tax rates, and permanent differences in regional living standards. Automation, captured by a rising capital share, makes little difference to our results. But assumed productivity growth does. If recent productivity continues and demographic projections prove accurate, India will account for one third of world output in 2100 and China for over one fifth. The U.S. output share will grow slightly, while that of other developed countries will shrink dramatically. Under more econometrically sophisticated, if seemingly less plausible projections, productivity growth in China and India dramatically slows leaving China’s plus India’s 2100 output share at only 16 percent, but, remarkably, Africa’s at an astounding 17 percent.
papers.zh_title: 全球经济力量的未来
papers.zh_abstract: 全球经济中巨大的区域特定人口、技术和财政变化引发了五个主要问题。第一，哪些区域将主导世界经济？第二，区域人均GDP水平是否会趋同？第三，快速增长地区的高储蓄率是否会导致全球资本过剩？第四，人口老龄化是否预示着特定区域将面临远高于当前的税率？第五，自动化是否会实质性影响发展？本文开发了全球盖达尔模型，这是一个包含17个区域、2种技能水平、100期的世代交叠模型，以回答这些问题。该模型根据2017年联合国人口数据和国际货币基金组织财政数据进行了仔细校准。生产率增长及其与人口变化的相互作用是未来经济力量的主要驱动力。财政状况和自动化也很重要，但属于次要因素。我们的基准模拟根据每个区域的长期记录设定未来生产率，预测中国和印度将成为世界上最大的两个经济体，到2100年分别占全球GDP的27.0%和16.2%。而美国与西欧在本世纪末的全球GDP份额分别仅为12.3%和11.9%。我们的基准模拟还呈现了不断演变的全球储蓄过剩、世界利率的大幅下降、与老龄化相关的税率显著上升，以及区域生活水平的永久性差异。通过提高资本份额来体现的自动化，对我们的结果影响甚微。但假定的生产率增长则影响巨大。如果近期的生产率持续下去且人口预测准确，印度将在2100年占世界产出的三分之一，中国占五分之一以上。美国的产出份额将略有增长，而其他发达国家的份额将急剧萎缩。在计量经济学上更复杂（尽管看似不太合理）的预测下，中国和印度的生产率增长急剧放缓，导致中印两国2100年的产出份额合计仅为16%，但值得注意的是，非洲的份额将达到惊人的17%。

papers.title: The Dynamics of Large Inflation Surges
papers.authors: Andrés Blanco, Pablo Ottonello, Tereza Ranosova
papers.abstract: We empirically characterize episodes of large inflation surges that have been observed worldwide in the last three decades. We document four facts. (1) Inflation following surges tends to be persistent, with the duration of disinflation exceeding that of the initial inflation increase. (2) Surges are initially unexpected but followed by a gradual catch-up of average short-term expectations with realized inflation. (3) Long-term inflation expectations tend to exhibit mild increases that persist throughout disinflation. (4) Policy responses are characterized by hikes in nominal interest rates but no tightening of real rates or fiscal balances. Our findings highlight the challenges monetary authorities face in avoiding persistent inflation dynamics following large inflation surges.
papers.zh_title: 大规模通胀飙升的动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们实证描述了近三十年来全球范围内观察到的大规模通胀飙升事件的特征。我们记录了四个事实。（1）飙升后的通胀往往具有持续性，通货紧缩的持续时间超过了初始通胀上升的持续时间。（2）通胀飙升最初是出乎意料的，但随后短期平均预期会逐渐赶上实际通胀。（3）长期通胀预期往往呈现温和上升，并在整个通缩过程中持续存在。（4）政策反应的特点是名义利率上调，但实际利率或财政平衡并未收紧。我们的发现凸显了货币当局在避免大规模通胀飙升后出现持续性通胀动态方面所面临的挑战。

papers.title: Running Primary Deficits Forever in a Dynamically Efficient Economy: Feasibility and Optimality
papers.authors: Andrew B. Abel, Stavros Panageas
papers.abstract: Government debt can be rolled over forever without primary surpluses in some stochastic economies, including some economies that are dynamically efficient. In an overlapping-generations model with constant growth rate, g, of labor-augmenting productivity, and with shocks to the durability of capital, we show that along a balanced growth path, the maximum sustainable ratio of bonds to capital is attained when the risk-free interest rate, r[sub]f, equals g. Furthermore, this maximal ratio maximizes utility per capita along a balanced growth path and ensures that the economy is dynamically efficient.
papers.zh_title: 在动态有效经济中永远维持基本赤字：可行性与最优性
papers.zh_abstract: 在某些随机经济体中，包括一些动态有效的经济体，政府债务可以在没有基本盈余的情况下无限展期。在一个具有劳动增强型生产率恒定增长率g以及资本耐久性冲击的世代交叠模型中，我们表明，沿着平衡增长路径，当无风险利率r_f等于g时，债券与资本之比达到最大可持续水平。此外，这个最大比率沿着平衡增长路径最大化人均效用，并确保经济是动态有效的。

papers.title: Mortality Effects of Healthcare Supply Shocks: Evidence Using Linked Deaths and Electronic Health Records
papers.authors: Engy Ziedan, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: The contraction in health care consumption at the start of the pandemic provides insight into central economic questions of waste and productivity in the U.S. health care system. Using linked mortality and Electronic Medical Records, we compare people who had outpatient appointments scheduled for dates in 30 day periods immediately before and after the Covid-19 emergency declaration. Appointment cancellation rates were 77% higher for people with appointments in the shutdown period. Intent to treat estimates imply that having a scheduled appointment date right after the emergency declaration increased one-year mortality rates by 4 deaths per 10,000. Instrumental variable estimates suggest that a cancelled appointment increased one-year mortality by 29.7 deaths per 10,000 among compliers, implying that a 10% increase in health care appointments reduces mortality rates by 2.9%. The mortality effects are rooted in two mechanisms: a complier sub-population with high marginal benefits from care, and a cascade of delayed or missed follow-up care that lasted for about 3 months. Healthcare spending accounted for 19.7% of U.S. GDP in 2021, and controlling health spending is a major policy objective. Our results quantify health tradeoffs from cutting every-day non-emergency visits, illustrating the importance of cost-control efforts that differentiate between medical care with the largest and smallest benefits for patient health.
papers.zh_title: 医疗供给冲击的死亡率效应：基于关联死亡记录与电子健康档案的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 疫情初期医疗消费的收缩为理解美国医疗体系中的浪费和生产率等核心经济问题提供了洞见。利用关联的死亡率数据和电子医疗记录，我们比较了在新冠疫情紧急状态声明前后30天内安排有门诊预约的患者。在封锁期间有预约的患者，其预约取消率高出77%。意向性治疗估计表明，在紧急状态声明后立即有预约日期，会使一年内死亡率每万人增加4例。工具变量估计表明，在依从者中，一次被取消的预约使一年内死亡率每万人增加29.7例，这意味着医疗预约增加10%可使死亡率降低2.9%。死亡率效应根植于两个机制：一个是从医疗中获益边际较高的依从者亚群，以及持续约三个月的延迟或错失后续护理的连锁反应。2021年，医疗支出占美国GDP的19.7%，控制医疗支出是一个主要政策目标。我们的结果量化了削减日常非急诊就诊所带来的健康权衡，说明了区分对患者健康益处最大和最小的医疗服务的成本控制努力的重要性。

papers.title: Covid-19 Learning Loss and Recovery: Panel Data Evidence from India
papers.authors: Abhijeet Singh, Mauricio Romero, Karthik Muralidharan
papers.abstract: We use a panel survey of ~19,000 primary-school-aged children in rural Tamil Nadu to study ‘learning loss’ after COVID-19-induced school closures, and the pace of recovery after schools reopened. Students tested in December 2021 (18 months after school closures) displayed learning deficits of ~0.7σ standard deviations in math and ~0.34σ standard deviations in language compared to identically-aged students in the same villages in 2019. Two-thirds of this deficit was made up within 6 months after school reopening. Further, while learning loss was regressive, the recovery was progressive. A government-run after-school remediation program contributed ~24% of the cohort-level recovery, and likely aided the progressive recovery.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情学习损失与恢复：来自印度的面板数据证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项对印度泰米尔纳德邦农村约19000名小学适龄儿童的面板调查，研究了新冠疫情导致的学校关闭后的“学习损失”，以及学校重新开放后的恢复速度。与2019年同村同龄学生相比，在2021年12月（学校关闭18个月后）接受测试的学生，数学学习缺陷约为0.7个标准差，语言学习缺陷约为0.34个标准差。学校重新开放后的六个月内，这一缺陷的三分之二得到了弥补。此外，虽然学习损失是倒退性的，但恢复却是进步性的。政府运营的课后补习项目对群体层面的恢复贡献了约24%，并可能促进了这种进步性的恢复。

papers.title: Impact Investing in Disadvantaged Urban Areas
papers.authors: Romain Boulongne, Rodolphe Durand, Caroline Flammer
papers.abstract: We examine whether impact investing is more effective in fostering business venture success and social impact when investments are directed toward ventures located in disadvantaged urban areas compared to similar investments directed toward ventures located outside these areas. We explore this question in the context of loans made to business ventures in French "banlieues" vs. "non-banlieues." We find that loans issued to banlieue ventures yield greater improvements in financial performance, as well as greater social impact in terms of the creation of local employment opportunities, quality jobs, and gender-equitable jobs. These results suggest that impact investors are able to contract with ventures of greater unrealized potential in banlieues, as banlieue ventures tend to be discriminated on the traditional loan market. This is corroborated in a controlled lab experiment in which participants--working professionals who are asked to act as loan officers--are randomly assigned to identical business ventures that only differ in their geographic location. We find that participants are indeed less likely to grant loans to banlieue ventures compared to non-banlieue ventures, despite the ventures being identical.
papers.zh_title: 对弱势城市地区的影响力投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了与投向弱势城市地区之外类似企业的投资相比，当投资指向位于弱势城市地区的企业时，影响力投资是否在促进企业创业成功和社会影响方面更有效。我们在对法国“郊区”与“非郊区”企业发放贷款的背景下探讨了这个问题。我们发现，向郊区企业发放的贷款在财务绩效方面带来了更大的改善，同时在创造当地就业机会、优质岗位和性别平等岗位方面也产生了更大的社会影响。这些结果表明，影响力投资者能够与郊区中具有更大未实现潜力的企业签订合同，因为郊区企业在传统贷款市场上往往受到歧视。这一点在一项受控实验室实验中得到证实：在该实验中，参与者（被要求扮演信贷员的在职专业人士）被随机分配到仅在地理位置上有差异的相同商业企业。我们发现，尽管这些企业完全相同，但参与者确实不太可能向郊区企业发放贷款。

papers.title: Direct and indirect effects of vaccines: Evidence from COVID-19
papers.authors: Seth M. Freedman, Daniel W. Sacks, Kosali I. Simon, Coady Wing
papers.abstract: We estimate direct and indirect vaccine effectiveness, and assess how far the infection-reducing externality extends from the vaccinated, a key input to policy decisions. Our empirical strategy uses nearly universal microdata from a single state and relies on the six-month delay between 12- and 11 year-old COVID vaccine eligibility. Vaccination reduces cases by 80 percent, the direct effect. This protection spills over to close contacts, producing a household-level indirect effect about half as large as the direct effect. However, indirect effects do not extend to schoolmates. Our results highlight vaccine reach as an important aspect of policy towards infectious disease.
papers.zh_title: 疫苗的直接与间接效应：来自COVID-19的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了疫苗的直接和间接有效性，并评估了疫苗接种者产生的感染减少外部性能够延伸多远，这是政策决策的关键输入。我们的实证策略使用了来自单一州的近乎全民的微观数据，并依赖于12岁和11岁人群COVID-19疫苗资格之间六个月的延迟。疫苗接种使病例减少80%，这是直接效应。这种保护会溢出到密切接触者，产生家庭层面的间接效应，其大小约为直接效应的一半。然而，间接效应并未延伸到同学。我们的结果凸显了疫苗覆盖范围作为传染病政策重要方面的作用。

papers.title: Measuring Welfare by Matching Households Across Time
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Ariel Burstein, Yasutaka Koike-Mori
papers.abstract: The money metric utility function is an essential tool for calculating welfare-relevant growth and inflation. We show how to recover it from repeated cross-sectional data without making parametric assumptions about preferences. We do this by solving the following recursive problem. Given compensated demand, we construct money metric utility by integration. Given money metric utility, we construct compensated demand by matching households over time whose money metric utility value is the same. We illustrate our method using household consumption survey data from the United Kingdom from 1974 to 2017 and find that real consumption calculated using official aggregate inflation statistics overstates money metric utility in 1974 pounds for the poorest households by around half a percent per year and understates it by around a third of a percentage point per year for the richest households. We extend our method to allow for missing or mismeasured prices, assuming preferences are separable between goods with well-measured prices and the rest. We discuss how our results change if the prices of some service sectors are mismeasured.
papers.zh_title: 通过跨期家庭匹配衡量福利
papers.zh_abstract: 货币度量效用函数是计算福利相关增长和通胀的基本工具。我们展示了如何从重复截面数据中恢复它，而无需对偏好做出参数假设。我们通过解决以下递归问题来实现这一点。给定补偿需求，我们通过积分构建货币度量效用。给定货币度量效用，我们通过跨期匹配货币度量效用值相同的家庭来构建补偿需求。我们使用1974年至2017年英国家庭消费调查数据说明了我们的方法，并发现使用官方总体通胀统计计算的真实消费，对于最贫困家庭，以1974年英镑计价的货币度量效用每年被高估约0.5%，而对于最富裕家庭，每年被低估约0.33个百分点。我们将方法扩展到允许缺失或测量错误的价格，假设偏好在对价格测量良好的商品与其他商品之间是可分的。我们讨论了如果某些服务部门的价格被错误测量，我们的结果会如何变化。

papers.title: Secrecy Rules and Exploratory Investment: Theory and Evidence from the Shale Boom
papers.authors: Thomas R. Covert, Richard L. Sweeney
papers.abstract: We analyze how information disclosure policy affects investment efficiency in non-cooperative settings with information externalities. In a two-firm, two-period model, we characterize equilibrium behavior under policies which disclose whether investment returns exceed a predefined level. These policies include complete secrecy, in which players only observe rival actions, as well as full disclosure, in which players also perfectly observe rival returns. With less disclosure (higher disclosure thresholds), there is less free riding, but additional losses from incomplete information aggregation. We characterize the surplus maximizing disclosure threshold in this environment, and show how it depends on firms' patience. We then apply the model to the early years of the shale boom in Pennsylvania and West Virginia, which at the time were governed by complete secrecy and full disclosure, respectively. We find that full disclosure would have maximized surplus in both states, generating 49% and 160% more value than complete secrecy.
papers.zh_title: 保密规则与勘探投资：来自页岩气繁荣的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在具有信息外部性的非合作环境中，信息披露政策如何影响投资效率。在一个两企业、两期模型中，我们刻画了在披露投资回报是否超过预定水平的政策下的均衡行为。这些政策包括完全保密（玩家仅观察对手行动）以及完全披露（玩家还完美观察对手回报）。信息披露越少（披露阈值越高），搭便车行为越少，但会因信息不完全聚合而产生额外损失。我们刻画了在此环境下使剩余最大化的披露阈值，并展示了它如何取决于企业的耐心程度。然后，我们将模型应用于宾夕法尼亚州和西弗吉尼亚州页岩气繁荣的早期年份，这两个州当时分别受完全保密和完全披露政策管辖。我们发现，完全披露本可使两州的剩余最大化，比完全保密分别多创造49%和160%的价值。

papers.title: Nudging the Nudger: Performance Feedback and Organ Donor Registrations
papers.authors: Julian House, Nicola Lacetera, Mario Macis, Nina Mazar
papers.abstract: In a randomized controlled trial (RCT) conducted in three waves over 2.5 years and involving nearly 700 customer-service representatives (CSRs) from a Canadian government service agency, we studied how providing CSRs with repeated performance feedback, with or without peer comparison, affected their subsequent organ donor registration rates. The feedback resulted in a 25% increase in daily signups compared to otherwise equivalent encouragements and reminders. Adding benchmark information about peer performance did not amplify or diminish this effect. We observed increased registration rates for both high and low performers. A post-intervention survey indicates that CSRs in all conditions found the information included in the treatments helpful and motivating and that signing up organ donors makes their job more meaningful. We also found suggestive evidence that performance feedback with benchmark information was the most motivating and created the least pressure to perform.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PR；JEL：C93, D90, H41, I10, J45, M50
papers.zh_title: 助推助推者：绩效反馈与器官捐献者登记
papers.zh_abstract: 在一项分三轮进行、历时2.5年、涉及加拿大政府服务机构近700名客户服务代表的随机对照试验中，我们研究了向客户服务代表提供重复绩效反馈（无论是否包含同行比较）如何影响他们随后的器官捐献者登记率。与同等效果的鼓励和提醒相比，反馈使每日登记人数增加了25%。添加关于同行表现的基准信息并未放大或减弱这一效应。我们观察到高绩效者和低绩效者的登记率均有所提高。干预后的一项调查表明，所有条件下的客户服务代表都认为处理中包含的信息有帮助且激励人心，并且登记器官捐献者使他们的工作更有意义。我们还发现了提示性证据，表明带有基准信息的绩效反馈最具激励性，且产生的绩效压力最小。

papers.title: Externalities of Policy-Induced Scrappage: The Case of Automotive Regulations
papers.authors: Connor R. Forsythe, Akshaya Jha, Jeremy J. Michalek, Kate S. Whitefoot
papers.abstract: Many transportation policies indirectly affect vehicle travel and resulting externalities by inducing changes in vehicle scrappage rates. We leverage the staggered removal of state-level safety inspection programs across the United States within an instrumental variables (IV) framework to produce the first estimates of the fleet-size elasticities of fleet travel distance and gasoline consumption. Our first-stage estimates indicate that the removal of safety inspections caused a 3-4% increase in fleet size on average. Our IV estimates of the fleet-size elasticities of fleet travel distance and gasoline consumption have 95% confidence sets that imply rejection of an assumption commonly used in prior analyses that these elasticities are equal to one. Calculations based on fleet-size elasticities of one result in substantial overestimates of the externality costs from increases in travel and fuel use from delays in scrappage due to the removal of safety inspections.
papers.zh_title: 政策诱导报废的外部性：以汽车法规为例
papers.zh_abstract: 许多交通政策通过诱导车辆报废率的变化，间接影响车辆行驶里程及由此产生的外部性。我们利用美国各州逐步取消州级安全检查项目的情况，在工具变量框架内首次估计了车队规模对车队行驶里程和汽油消耗的弹性。我们的第一阶段估计表明，取消安全检查平均导致车队规模增加3-4%。我们对车队行驶里程和汽油消耗的车队规模弹性的工具变量估计，其95%置信集意味着拒绝了先前分析中常用的假设，即这些弹性等于1。基于车队规模弹性为1的计算，会因取消安全检查导致报废延迟，从而大幅高估由此产生的行驶里程和燃料使用增加的外部性成本。

papers.title: How Is the US Pricing Carbon? How Could We Price Carbon?
papers.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Dallas Burtraw, Carolyn Fischer, Meredith Fowlie, Roberton C. Williams III, Maureen L. Cropper
papers.abstract: Economists have for decades recommended that carbon dioxide and other greenhouse gases be taxed—or otherwise priced—to provide incentives for their reduction. The United States does not have a federal carbon tax; however, many state and federal programs to reduce carbon emissions effectively price carbon—for example, through cap-and-trade systems or regulations. There are also programs that subsidize reductions in carbon emissions. At the 2022 meetings of the American Economic Association, the Society for Benefit-Cost Analysis brought together five well-known economists—Joe Aldy, Dallas Burtraw, Carolyn Fischer, Meredith Fowlie, and Rob Williams—to discuss how the United States does, in fact, price carbon and how it could price carbon. Maureen Cropper chaired the panel. This paper summarizes their remarks.
papers.zh_title: 美国如何为碳定价？我们应如何为碳定价？
papers.zh_abstract: 几十年来，经济学家一直建议对二氧化碳和其他温室气体征税或以其他方式定价，以提供减排激励。美国没有联邦碳税；然而，许多州和联邦的减排项目实际上为碳定价了——例如，通过总量控制与交易体系或法规。还有一些项目补贴减排。在2022年美国经济协会年会上，效益成本分析学会邀请了五位知名经济学家——乔·阿尔迪、达拉斯·伯特劳、卡罗琳·费舍尔、梅雷迪思·福利和罗布·威廉姆斯——讨论美国实际上如何为碳定价以及应如何为碳定价。莫琳·克罗珀主持了小组讨论。本文总结了他们的发言。

papers.title: The Electric Ceiling: Limits and Costs of Full Electrification
papers.authors: David S. Rapson, James B. Bushnell
papers.abstract: Electrification is a centerpiece of global decarbonization efforts. Yet there are reasons to be skeptical of the inevitability, or at least the optimal pace, of the transition. We discuss several under-appreciated costs of full, or even deep, electrification. Consumer preferences can operate in favor of and in opposition to electrification goals; and electrification is likely to encounter physical and economic obstacles when it reaches some as-yet-unknown level. While we readily acknowledge the external benefits of decarbonization, we also explore several under-appreciated external costs. The credibility and eventual success of decarbonization efforts is enhanced by foreseeing and ideally avoiding predictable but non-obvious costs of promising abatement pathways. Thus, even with all of its promise, the degree of electrification may ultimately reach a limit.
papers.zh_title: 电气化天花板：全面电气化的限制与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 电气化是全球脱碳努力的核心。然而，有理由对转型的必然性，或者至少是最优速度持怀疑态度。我们讨论了全面甚至深度电气化的几个被低估的成本。消费者偏好既可能有利于也可能不利于电气化目标；当电气化达到某个未知水平时，它很可能会遇到物理和经济障碍。虽然我们欣然承认脱碳的外部效益，但我们也探讨了几个被低估的外部成本。通过预见并理想地避免有前景的减排路径中可预测但不明显的成本，可以提高脱碳努力的可信度和最终成功。因此，即使电气化前景广阔，其程度最终也可能达到一个极限。

papers.title: The Missing Middle Managers: Labor Costs, Firm Structure, and Development
papers.authors: Jonas Hjort, Hannes Malmberg, Todd Schoellman
papers.abstract: This paper shows that large, multi-establishment business enterprises face a high cost of middle management in poor countries and that this cost inhibits the growth of the modern sector. We provide new empirical evidence using a database covering compensation for 300,000 middle managers working at modern firms in 146 countries. We estimate that the elasticity of real management costs with respect to real GDP per worker is 0.1. We quantify the importance of this finding using a calibrated appropriate technology model where firms choose whether to adopt the management-intensive modern business structure. Lower management costs in developing countries would increase the revenue share of the modern sector by 10-20 percentage points
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：J3, M11, O11, O4
papers.zh_title: 缺失的中层管理者：劳动力成本、企业结构与发展
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，在贫穷国家，大型多机构商业企业面临高昂的中层管理成本，并且这种成本抑制了现代部门的增长。我们利用一个涵盖146个国家现代企业30万名中层管理者薪酬的数据库，提供了新的经验证据。我们估计，实际管理成本相对于实际人均GDP的弹性为0.1。我们使用一个校准的适宜技术模型来量化这一发现的重要性，在该模型中，企业选择是否采用管理密集型的现代商业结构。发展中国家较低的管理成本将使现代部门的收入份额提高10-20个百分点。

papers.title: Housing Wealth and Consumption: The Role of Heterogeneous Credit Constraints
papers.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Ronel Elul, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan
papers.abstract: We quantify the role of heterogeneity in households’ financial constraints in explaining the link between the decline in aggregate consumption and the decline in house values between 2006 and 2009 using individual-level data. Constraints that are triggered by a decline in house values, and a small fraction of consumers facing particularly severe constraints prior to the decline in house values explain 76 percent of the aggregate response. Local general equilibrium feedback and a decline in bank credit to consumers make up the remaining 24 percent. We find no contribution of a pure wealth effect in explaining the consumption decline.
papers.zh_title: 住房财富与消费：异质性信贷约束的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用个体层面数据，量化了家庭财务约束异质性在解释2006年至2009年间总消费大幅下降与房价下跌之间联系中的作用。由房价下跌引发的约束，以及在房价下跌前就面临特别严重约束的一小部分消费者，解释了总消费反应的76%。局部一般均衡反馈和银行对消费者信贷的下降构成了剩余的24%。我们发现纯财富效应对解释消费下降没有贡献。

papers.title: Global Knowledge and Trade Flows: Theory and Measurement
papers.authors: Nelson Lind, Natalia Ramondo
papers.abstract: We study the global innovation and diffusion of ideas by introducing trade into the model in Eaton and Kortum (1999) (EK). This extension allows us to use international trade flows and country-level factor costs to estimate both the intensity of innovation within countries over time and diffusion rates across countries. We find significant specialization across the globe: some countries have high innovation rates, while other countries rely on diffusion. Although innovation is correlated with economic growth, there are many high income countries that primarily produce using diffused ideas. Additionally, these patterns shift over time — we estimate that a wave of innovation began in China during the early-2000’s, reducing its reliance on diffused technology.
papers.zh_title: 全球知识与贸易流动：理论与测度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过将贸易引入Eaton和Kortum（1999）（EK）模型，研究了全球思想的创新与扩散。这一扩展使我们能够利用国际贸易流动和国家层面的要素成本，来估计各国随时间变化的创新强度以及跨国扩散率。我们发现全球存在显著的专业化分工：一些国家创新率很高，而另一些国家则依赖技术扩散。尽管创新与经济增长相关，但许多高收入国家主要依靠扩散的思想进行生产。此外，这些模式随时间推移而变化——我们估计，中国在21世纪初开始了一波创新浪潮，从而减少了对扩散技术的依赖。

papers.title: The Effect of Low-Skill Immigration Restrictions on US Firms and Workers: Evidence from a Randomized Lottery
papers.authors: Michael A. Clemens, Ethan G. Lewis
papers.abstract: U.S. firms face a binding quota on visas to employ foreign workers in low-skill occupations outside of agriculture. The government allocates this quota to firms in part through a randomized lottery. We evaluate the marginal impact of the quota on firms entering this lottery in 2021 and 2022, using a novel survey and pre-analysis plan. Firms exogenously authorized to employ more immigrants in low-skill jobs significantly increase production (elasticity 0.20–0.22), investment (1.5–2.1), and the rate of profit (0.15). Because the foreign-native elasticity of substitution in production is very low in the policy-relevant occupations (0.8–2.2), the effect on native employment is zero or positive overall, and positive in rural areas. Forensic analysis suggests similarly low substitutability of black-market labor.
papers.zh_title: 低技能移民限制对美国企业与工人的影响：来自随机抽签的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国企业在农业以外的低技能职业中雇用外国工人时，面临具有约束力的签证配额。政府部分通过随机抽签将这一配额分配给企业。我们利用一项新颖的调查和预分析计划，评估了2021年和2022年参与该抽签的企业所受配额的边际影响。被外生授权在低技能岗位雇用更多移民的企业，显著提高了产量（弹性0.20–0.22）、投资（1.5–2.1）和利润率（0.15）。由于在政策相关职业中，外国人与本地人之间的生产替代弹性非常低（0.8–2.2），因此对本地人就业的影响为零或总体为正，在农村地区则为正。法证分析表明，黑市劳动力的可替代性同样很低。

papers.title: Can Social Media Rhetoric Incite Hate Incidents? Evidence from Trump's "Chinese Virus" Tweets
papers.authors: Andy Cao, Jason M. Lindo, Jiee Zhong
papers.abstract: We investigate whether Donald Trump's "Chinese Virus" tweets contributed to the rise of anti-Asian incidents. We find that the number of incidents spiked following Trump’s initial “Chinese Virus” tweets and the subsequent dramatic rise in internet search activity for the phrase. Difference-in-differences and event-study analyses leveraging spatial variation indicate that this spike in anti-Asian incidents was significantly more pronounced in counties that supported Donald Trump in the 2016 presidential election relative to those that supported Hillary Clinton. We estimate that anti-Asian incidents spiked by 4000 percent in Trump-supporting counties, over and above the spike observed in Clinton-supporting counties.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H0, I18, J15, K0
papers.zh_title: 社交媒体言论能否煽动仇恨事件？来自特朗普“中国病毒”推文的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了唐纳德·特朗普的“中国病毒”推文是否助长了反亚裔事件的增加。我们发现，在特朗普最初发布“中国病毒”推文以及随后该短语的互联网搜索活动急剧上升之后，反亚裔事件的数量激增。利用空间差异的双重差分和事件研究分析表明，与支持希拉里·克林顿的县相比，在2016年总统选举中支持唐纳德·特朗普的县，反亚裔事件的激增显著更为明显。我们估计，在特朗普支持县，反亚裔事件激增了4000%，这超过了克林顿支持县观察到的激增幅度。

papers.title: Carbon Emissions Trading and Environmental Protection: International Evidence
papers.authors: Jennie Bai, Hong Ru
papers.abstract: We study how the implementation of emissions trading systems (ETS) impacts emissions reductions and the usage of renewable energy using a panel sample of the largest 100 countries worldwide. Exploiting the cross-country variations in ETS implementations, we show that ETS adoption materially reduced greenhouse gas (carbon dioxide) emissions by 12.1% (18.1%). Moreover, ETSs reduced overall emissions by cutting fossil fuel usage, such as coal, by 23.70% while boosting the usage of renewable energy by 61.59%, on average. In contrast, the introduction of carbon taxes has a less effective impact on emissions reduction and fails to boost the usage of renewable energy.
papers.zh_title: 碳排放交易与环境保护：国际证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用全球最大100个国家的面板样本，研究了排放交易体系（ETS）的实施如何影响减排和可再生能源的使用。利用各国ETS实施情况的差异，我们表明ETS的采用显著减少了温室气体（二氧化碳）排放，分别减少12.1%（18.1%）。此外，ETS通过削减化石燃料（如煤炭）使用量平均23.70%来降低总体排放，同时将可再生能源的使用量平均提高61.59%。相比之下，碳税的引入对减排的效果较弱，且未能促进可再生能源的使用。

papers.title: Labor-Market Power, Deadweight Loss, and Technology Adoption
papers.authors: Michael Rubens
papers.abstract: Buyer power can induce deadweight loss, but it can also incentivize buyers’ technology adoption by reducing investment holdup. In this paper, I construct a structural model that incorporates these two opposing forces, and use it to quantify the net welfare effects of employers’ market power over their workers. Applying the model to the late-19th-century Illinois coal mining industry, a textbook monopsony example that experienced a large technological shock due to the invention of mechanical cutting machines, I find that an increase in employer power would have induced substantially higher mechanization rates. Assuming exogenous capital investment leads to overestimating the consumer and labor welfare losses from employer power by 13% and 7%.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场势力、无谓损失与技术采用
papers.zh_abstract: 买方势力可能导致无谓损失，但它也可以通过减少投资套牢问题来激励买方的技术采用。在本文中，我构建了一个包含这两种相反力量的结构模型，并用其量化雇主对工人市场势力的净福利效应。将该模型应用于19世纪末伊利诺伊州的煤炭开采业——一个教科书式的买方垄断案例，该行业因机械切割机的发明而经历了巨大的技术冲击——我发现雇主势力的增强本会导致机械化率大幅提高。假设资本投资是外生的，会导致雇主势力造成的消费者和劳动力福利损失被高估13%和7%。

papers.title: Information Aggregation and Transmission in Strategic Networks
papers.authors: Fan-chin Kung, Ping Wang
papers.abstract: Observing the increasingly important roles played by the creation and transmission of information and tacit knowledge, we construct an information-network model incorporating both information transmitters and information aggregators. Given information-processing roles in aggregation or transmission, we establish various general properties concerning the existence of a network equilibrium, its optimality and the patterns of equilibrium and optimal configuration. We then allow for endogenous choice of the information-processing roles. We prove the existence and show that, with sufficiently small link maintenance costs, the monocentric network with one aggregator connecting to all other agents as transmitters on a tree graph is the unique configuration. In general, a rich array of equilibrium configurations may emerge, including core-star, star-with-satellites and cycles. We further characterize an information-processing chain network with all information aggregators and transmitters linked along a chain and compute numerically the ranges of transmission decays and link costs within which a network equilibrium arises.
papers.zh_title: 战略网络中的信息聚合与传播
papers.zh_abstract: 观察到信息和隐性知识的创造与传播所扮演的日益重要的角色，我们构建了一个包含信息传播者和信息聚合者的信息网络模型。给定聚合或传播中的信息处理角色，我们建立了关于网络均衡存在性、其最优性以及均衡和最优配置模式的各种一般性质。然后，我们允许信息处理角色的内生选择。我们证明了存在性，并表明，在链接维护成本足够小的情况下，一个聚合者通过树状图连接到所有其他作为传播者的代理的单中心网络是唯一的配置。一般来说，可能会出现丰富的均衡配置，包括核心星型、带卫星的星型和环型。我们进一步刻画了一个信息处理链网络，其中所有信息聚合者和传播者沿着一条链连接，并数值计算了网络均衡出现的传播衰减和链接成本的范围。

papers.title: A North-South Model of Structural Change and Growth
papers.authors: Maria Aristizabal-Ramirez, John V. Leahy, Linda Tesar
papers.abstract: This paper is motivated by a set of cross-country observations on growth, structural transformation, and investment rates in a large sample of countries. We observe a hump-shaped relationship between a country's investment rate and its level of development, both within countries over time and across countries. Advanced economies reach their investment peak at a higher level of income and at an earlier point in time relative to emerging markets. We also observe the familiar patterns of structural change (a decline in the agricultural share and an increase in the services share, both relative to manufacturing). The pace of change observed in the 1930 to 1980 period in advanced economies is remarkably similar to that in emerging markets since 1960. We develop a two-region model of the world economy in which regions are isolated from each other up to the point of capital market liberalization in the early 1990s. At that point, capital flows from advanced economies to emerging markets and accelerates the process of structural change in emerging markets. The majority of gains from financial liberalization accrue to emerging economies. We consider the impact of a “second wave” of liberalization when China fully opens its economy to capital inflows.
papers.zh_title: 结构变迁与增长的南北模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文的动机来自对大量国家样本中关于增长、结构转型和投资率的一系列跨国观察。我们观察到，无论是在国家内部随时间推移，还是在国家之间，一国的投资率与其发展水平之间都存在驼峰形关系。与新兴市场相比，发达经济体在更高的收入水平和更早的时间点达到投资峰值。我们还观察到结构变迁的常见模式（农业份额下降和服务业份额上升，两者均相对于制造业）。发达经济体在1930年至1980年期间观察到的变化速度，与新兴市场自1960年以来的变化速度惊人地相似。我们构建了一个世界经济的两区域模型，在该模型中，区域之间在20世纪90年代初资本市场自由化之前是相互隔离的。在自由化时，资本从发达经济体流向新兴市场，加速了新兴市场的结构变迁进程。金融自由化的大部分收益归于新兴经济体。我们考虑了中国完全开放资本流入时“第二波”自由化的影响。

papers.title: U.S Electric Utility Adaptation to Natural Disasters Shocks and Green Power Mandates
papers.authors: Robert Huang, Matthew E. Kahn
papers.abstract: Access to electricity is a crucial determinant of quality of life and productivity. The United States has a highly reliable electricity grid, but it faces new resilience challenges posed by more intense natural disasters and ambitious green power requirements. Using a US electric utility panel dataset from 2013 to 2020, we document that natural disasters disrupt service, but utilities have made progress in adapting to such shocks. Over the last decade, utilities have faced a tradeoff between achieving local carbon mitigation goals and offering reliable power access. We discuss alternative approaches to attenuate this tradeoff.
papers.zh_title: 美国电力公用事业对自然灾害冲击与绿色能源指令的适应
papers.zh_abstract: 电力供应是生活质量和生产力的关键决定因素。美国拥有高度可靠的电网，但面临着由更强烈的自然灾害和雄心勃勃的绿色能源要求所带来的新韧性挑战。利用2013年至2020年的美国电力公用事业面板数据集，我们记录了自然灾害会中断服务，但公用事业在适应此类冲击方面已取得进展。在过去十年中，公用事业在实现本地碳减排目标和提供可靠电力供应之间面临权衡。我们讨论了缓解这种权衡的替代方法。

papers.title: Councils and Indirect Rule in British Africa
papers.authors: Jutta Bolt, Leigh Gardner, Jennifer Kohler, Jack Paine, James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: Did Western colonial rule transform African political institutions? Despite extensive research on indirect rule, we have little systematic evidence about how colonizers’ aims interacted with the structure of indigenous institutions to shape local governance. We explain why colonizers faced incentives to delegate authority to traditionally legitimate institutions, even in historically decentralized areas. Empirically, we analyze originally compiled data on African political institutions in the precolonial and colonial periods for more than 450 subnational units across British Africa. We focus on councils as a form of executive constraints. Subnational councils were widespread, highly correlated with precolonial institutions and patterns of socioeconomic development, and exerted meaningful decision-making powers. These indirect-rule institutions reflected reforms to replace ineffective installed agents. Pressure from below prompted British officials to reintroduce systems of executive constraints based on precolonial models. Our findings contrast with the widespread claim that colonizers could unilaterally implement indirect-rule institutions while disregarding precolonial precedents.
papers.zh_title: 英属非洲的议会与间接统治
papers.zh_abstract: 西方殖民统治是否改变了非洲的政治制度？尽管对间接统治已有大量研究，但关于殖民者的目标如何与本土制度结构相互作用以塑造地方治理的系统性证据仍然匮乏。我们解释了为何殖民者面临将权力委托给传统合法制度的激励，即使在历史上权力分散的地区也是如此。在实证方面，我们分析了英属非洲超过450个次国家级单位在殖民前和殖民时期的非洲政治制度原始汇编数据。我们聚焦于作为行政约束形式的议会。次国家级议会广泛存在，与殖民前制度和社会经济发展模式高度相关，并行使着有意义的决策权。这些间接统治制度反映了对低效委任代理人的改革。来自底层的压力促使英国官员基于殖民前模式重新引入行政约束体系。我们的发现与殖民者可以单方面实施间接统治制度而无视殖民前先例的普遍说法形成对比。

papers.title: When Information Conflicts with Obligations: the Role of Motivated Cognition
papers.authors: Ao Wang, Shaoda Wang, Xiaoyang Ye
papers.abstract: We experimentally test how psychological motivations can impact the processing of purely objective information. We first document that, when the high-stakes College Entrance Exam is held in the month of Ramadan, Chinese Muslim students perform significantly worse. When asked about the impact of fasting, they severely underestimate the cost of taking the exam during Ramadan, even when presented with direct empirical evidence. In the experiment, we randomly offer students reading materials in which well-respected Muslim clerics explain that it is permissible to postpone the fast until after the exam. Consistent with an interpretation of motivated cognition, students who receive the material distort the statistics about the fasting cost significantly less, and become more accepting of delaying the fast for the exam.
papers.zh_title: 当信息与义务冲突时：动机性认知的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验检验了心理动机如何影响对纯粹客观信息的处理。我们首先记录到，当高考在斋月举行时，中国穆斯林学生的成绩显著更差。当被问及禁食的影响时，他们严重低估了在斋月期间参加考试的成本，即使面对直接的实证证据也是如此。在实验中，我们随机向学生提供阅读材料，其中德高望重的穆斯林学者解释称，将禁食推迟到考试之后是允许的。与动机性认知的解释一致，收到材料的学生对禁食成本的统计数据扭曲程度显著降低，并且更倾向于接受为考试推迟禁食。

papers.title: Administrative Burdens and Child Medicaid and CHIP Enrollments
papers.authors: Iris Arbogast, Anna Chorniy, Janet Currie
papers.abstract: Following decades of increasing child access to public health insurance, pre-pandemic enrollments fell in many states after 2016 and the number of uninsured children increased. This study provides the first national, quantitative assessment of the role of administrative burdens in driving this drop in child health insurance coverage. In addition, we identify the demographic groups of children who were most affected. We show that regulations that increased administrative burdens placed on families reduced public health insurance coverage by a mean of 5.9% within six months following the implementation of these changes. Declines were largest for Hispanic children, children with non-citizen parents, and children whose parents reported that they did not speak English well. These reductions were separate from and in addition to enrollment declines among Hispanic children following the announcement of a new public charge rule in Sept. 2018.
papers.zh_title: 行政负担与儿童医疗补助及儿童健康保险计划参保
papers.zh_abstract: 在儿童获得公共医疗保险的机会持续增加数十年后，2016年以来许多州的疫情前参保人数下降，未参保儿童数量增加。本研究首次对行政负担在导致儿童健康保险覆盖率下降中的作用进行了全国性的定量评估。此外，我们识别了受影响最大的儿童人口群体。我们表明，增加家庭行政负担的法规在实施后六个月内，使公共医疗保险覆盖率平均下降了5.9%。西班牙裔儿童、父母为非公民的儿童以及父母报告英语说得不好的儿童降幅最大。这些减少与2018年9月新公共负担规则宣布后西班牙裔儿童参保人数的下降是分开且额外的。

papers.title: Mechanics of Spatial Growth
papers.authors: Sheng Cai, Lorenzo Caliendo, Fernando Parro, Wei Xiang
papers.abstract: We develop a dynamic spatial growth model to explore the role of trade and internal migration in the process of spatial development and aggregate growth. Growth is shaped by the best global and local ideas that contribute to the local stock of knowledge. Global ideas diffuse more to locations that are relatively more exposed to international trade. Local ideas are diffused across space when workers move to another location. We embed the diffusion of ideas through trade and migration into a multi-country, multi-region framework with international trade, forward-looking dynamic migration decisions, and endogenous capital accumulation. We apply our framework to study the role of initial conditions, international trade, and internal migration on China’s spatial development and aggregate growth during the 1990s and 2000s. We find that initial conditions across space, idea diffusion, and capital accumulation play an important role in understanding the process of spatial development and aggregate growth in China. Changes in international trade costs and mobility restrictions during the 1990s and 2000s also contribute to aggregate growth, with large heterogeneity across space.
papers.zh_title: 空间增长的机制
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个动态空间增长模型，以探讨贸易和内部移民在空间发展和总量增长过程中的作用。增长由贡献于地方知识存量的最佳全球和本地思想塑造。全球思想更多地扩散到国际贸易暴露度相对较高的地区。当工人迁移到另一个地点时，本地思想在空间上扩散。我们将通过贸易和移民的思想扩散嵌入到一个包含国际贸易、前瞻性动态移民决策和内生资本积累的多国、多区域框架中。我们应用该框架研究1990年代和2000年代初始条件、国际贸易和内部移民对中国空间发展和总量增长的作用。我们发现，空间上的初始条件、思想扩散和资本积累在理解中国空间发展和总量增长过程中扮演重要角色。1990年代和2000年代国际贸易成本和流动性限制的变化也促进了总量增长，且空间异质性很大。

papers.title: The Early County Business Pattern Files: 1946-1974
papers.authors: Fabian Eckert, Ka-leung Lam, Atif R. Mian, Karsten Müller, Rafael Schwalb, Amir Sufi
papers.abstract: The County Business Pattern (“CBP”) files contain employment and establishment counts for detailed industry codes covering all counties in the United States. The contribution of this project is to digitize, clean, and prepare the CBP files from 1946-1974. We also apply the methods developed in Eckert, Fort, Schott, and Yang (2020a) to impute missing employment observations in the raw data.
