We provide three digital data products for public use: (1) the cleaned CBP files for each year, (2) a consolidated panel data set of employment and establishment counts for about 20 industries and all US counties, (3) estimates for suppressed employment counts for each year.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DAE, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME, PR；JEL：E0
papers.zh_title: 早期县级商业模式文件：1946-1974
papers.zh_abstract: 县级商业模式文件包含覆盖美国所有县、按详细行业代码划分的就业和机构数量。本项目的贡献在于对1946年至1974年的县级商业模式文件进行数字化、清理和准备。我们还应用Eckert、Fort、Schott和Yang（2020a）开发的方法来推算原始数据中缺失的就业观测值。我们提供三种供公众使用的数字数据产品：（1）每年清理后的县级商业模式文件，（2）涵盖约20个行业及所有美国县的就业和机构数量的合并面板数据集，（3）每年被隐瞒就业数量的估计值。

papers.title: Global Fund Flows and Emerging Market Tail Risk
papers.authors: Anusha Chari, Karlye Dilts Stedman, Christian Lundblad
papers.abstract: Global risk and risk aversion shocks have distinct distributional impacts on emerging market capital flows and returns. In particular, we find salient consequences of these different global shocks for tail risk in emerging markets. Open-end mutual fund trading provides a key mechanism linking shocks facing global investors to extreme capital flow and return realizations. The effects are heterogeneous across asset classes and fund types. The limited discretion and higher conformity of passive fund investments linked to benchmarking amplify pass-through effects that engender abnormal co-movements in emerging market flows and returns.
papers.zh_title: 全球资金流动与新兴市场尾部风险
papers.zh_abstract: 全球风险和风险厌恶冲击对新兴市场资本流动和回报具有不同的分布影响。特别是，我们发现这些不同的全球冲击对新兴市场尾部风险有显著后果。开放式共同基金交易提供了一个关键机制，将全球投资者面临的冲击与极端的资本流动和回报实现联系起来。这些效应在资产类别和基金类型之间存在异质性。与基准挂钩的被动基金投资有限自由裁量权和更高一致性，放大了传导效应，导致新兴市场资金流动和回报出现异常联动。

papers.title: Selfish Corporations
papers.authors: Emanuele Colonnelli, Niels Joachim Gormsen, Timothy McQuade
papers.abstract: We study how perceptions of corporate responsibility influence policy preferences and the effectiveness of corporate communication when agents have imperfect memory recall. Using a new large-scale survey of U.S. citizens on their support for corporate bailouts, we first establish that the public demands corporations to behave better within society, a sentiment we label “big business discontent.” Using random variation in the order of survey sections and in the exposure to animated videos, we then show that priming respondents to think about corporate responsibility lowers the support for bailouts. This finding suggests that big business discontent influences policy preferences. Furthermore, we find that messages which paint a positive picture of corporate responsibility can “backfire,” as doing so brings attention to an aspect on which the public has negative views. In contrast, reframing corporate bailouts in terms of economic trade-offs increases support for the policy. We develop a memory-based model of decision-making and communication to rationalize these findings.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D63, D72, G34, G38, M14
papers.zh_title: 自私的公司
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当代理人记忆不完美时，对企业责任的认知如何影响政策偏好和企业沟通的有效性。通过一项关于美国公民对企业救助支持度的新大规模调查，我们首先确定公众要求企业在社会中表现更好，我们将这种情绪称为“大企业不满”。利用调查部分顺序的随机变化和动画视频的接触，我们随后表明，启动受访者思考企业责任会降低对救助的支持。这一发现表明，大企业不满影响政策偏好。此外，我们发现描绘企业责任积极形象的信息可能“适得其反”，因为这会将注意力引向公众持负面看法的方面。相比之下，将企业救助重新定义为经济权衡会增加对该政策的支持。我们开发了一个基于记忆的决策和沟通模型来合理化这些发现。

papers.title: Representation and Extrapolation: Evidence from Clinical Trials
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Maya Durvasula, Harsh Gupta, Joshua Schwartzstein, Heidi L. Williams
papers.abstract: This article examines the consequences and causes of low enrollment of Black patients in clinical trials. We develop a simple model of similarity-based extrapolation that predicts that evidence is more relevant for decision-making by physicians and patients when it is more representative of the group that is being treated. This generates the key result that the perceived benefit of a medicine for a group depends not only on the average benefit from a trial, but also on the share of patients from that group who were enrolled in the trial. In survey experiments, we find that physicians who care for Black patients are more willing to prescribe drugs tested in representative samples, an effect substantial enough to close observed gaps in the prescribing rates of new medicines. Black patients update more on drug efficacy when the sample that the drug is tested on is more representative, reducing Black-White patient gaps in beliefs about whether the drug will work as described. Despite these benefits of representative data, our framework and evidence suggest that those who have benefited more from past medical breakthroughs are less costly to enroll in the present, leading to persistence in who is represented in the evidence base.
papers.zh_title: 代表性与外推：来自临床试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了临床试验中黑人患者低入组率的后果和原因。我们开发了一个基于相似性外推的简单模型，该模型预测，当证据更能代表正在接受治疗的群体时，其对医生和患者决策的相关性更高。这产生了一个关键结果：一个群体对药物感知到的益处不仅取决于试验的平均益处，还取决于该群体在试验中入组的患者比例。在调查实验中，我们发现照顾黑人患者的医生更愿意开在代表性样本中测试过的药物，其效果足以弥合新药处方率中观察到的差距。当药物测试的样本更具代表性时，黑人患者对药物疗效的更新更多，从而缩小了黑人和白人患者之间关于药物是否如所述起作用的信念差距。尽管代表性数据有这些好处，但我们的框架和证据表明，那些从过去医学突破中受益更多的人在当前入组成本更低，导致证据基础中谁被代表具有持续性。

papers.title: Instrumental Variables with Unordered Treatments: Theory and Evidence from Returns to Fields of Study
papers.authors: Eskil Heinesen, Christian Hvid, Lars Johannessen Kirkebøen, Edwin Leuven, Magne Mogstad
papers.abstract: We revisit the identification argument of Kirkeboen et al. (2016) who showed how one may combine instruments for multiple unordered treatments with information about individuals’ ranking of these treatments to achieve identification while allowing for both observed and unobserved heterogeneity in treatment effects. We show that the key assumptions underlying their identification argument have testable implications. We also provide a new characterization of the bias that may arise if these assumptions are violated. Taken together, these results allow researchers not only to test the underlying assumptions, but also to argue whether the bias from violation of these assumptions are likely to be economically meaningful. Guided and motivated by these results, we estimate and compare the earnings payoffs to post-secondary fields of study in Norway and Denmark. In each country, we apply the identification argument of Kirkeboen et al. (2016) to data on individuals' ranking of fields of study and field-specific instruments from discontinuities in the admission systems. We empirically examine whether and why the payoffs to fields of study differ across the two countries. We find strong cross-country correlation in the payoffs to fields of study, especially after removing fields with violations of the assumptions underlying the identification argument.
papers.zh_title: 无序处理变量的工具变量法：来自专业领域回报的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了Kirkeboen等人（2016）的识别论证，他们展示了如何将多个无序处理变量的工具变量与个体对这些处理变量的排序信息相结合，从而在允许处理效应存在观测和未观测异质性的情况下实现识别。我们证明了支撑其识别论证的关键假设具有可检验的含义。我们还对这些假设被违反时可能产生的偏误提供了新的刻画。综合来看，这些结果不仅使研究者能够检验潜在假设，还能论证这些假设被违反所产生的偏误是否可能具有经济意义。在这些结果的指导和推动下，我们估计并比较了挪威和丹麦高等教育专业领域的收入回报。在每个国家，我们应用Kirkeboen等人（2016）的识别论证，利用个体对专业领域的排序数据以及来自招生系统断点的专业特定工具变量。我们实证检验了这两个国家专业回报是否存在差异及其原因。我们发现专业回报在跨国间存在强相关性，尤其是在剔除那些违反识别论证假设的专业之后。

papers.title: Differentiable State-Space Models and Hamiltonian Monte Carlo Estimation
papers.authors: David Childers, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Jesse Perla, Christopher Rackauckas, Peifan Wu
papers.abstract: We propose a methodology to take dynamic stochastic general equilibrium (DSGE) models to the data based on the combination of differentiable state-space models and the Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) sampler. First, we introduce a method for implicit automatic differentiation of perturbation solutions of DSGE models with respect to the model's parameters. We can use the resulting output for various tasks requiring gradients, such as building an HMC sampler, to estimate first- and second-order approximations of DSGE models. The availability of derivatives also enables a general filter-free method to estimate nonlinear, non-Gaussian DSGE models by sampling the joint likelihood of parameters and latent states. We show that the gradient-based joint likelihood sampling approach is superior in efficiency and robustness to standard Metropolis-Hastings samplers by estimating a canonical real business cycle model, a real small open economy model, and a medium-scale New Keynesian DSGE model.
papers.zh_title: 可微状态空间模型与哈密顿蒙特卡洛估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于可微状态空间模型与哈密顿蒙特卡洛（HMC）采样器相结合的方法，将动态随机一般均衡（DSGE）模型应用于数据。首先，我们引入了一种方法，用于对DSGE模型的扰动解相对于模型参数进行隐式自动微分。我们可以将得到的输出用于需要梯度的各种任务，例如构建HMC采样器，以估计DSGE模型的一阶和二阶近似。导数的可用性还使得一种通用的无滤波方法成为可能，即通过采样参数和潜在状态的联合似然来估计非线性、非高斯DSGE模型。我们通过估计一个经典的真实商业周期模型、一个真实小型开放经济模型和一个中等规模的新凯恩斯DSGE模型，证明了基于梯度的联合似然采样方法在效率和稳健性上优于标准的Metropolis-Hastings采样器。

papers.title: Understanding Geographic Disparities in Mortality
papers.authors: Jason Fletcher, Hans G. Schwarz, Michal Engelman, Norman Johnson, Jahn Hakes, Alberto Palloni
papers.abstract: A rich literature shows that early life conditions shape later life outcomes, including health and migration events. However, analyses of geographic disparities in mortality outcomes focus almost exclusively on contemporaneously measured geographic place (e.g., state of residence at death), thereby potentially conflating the role of early life conditions, migration patterns, and effects of destinations. We use the newly available Mortality Disparities in American Communities (MDAC) dataset, which links respondents in the 2008 ACS to official death records and estimate consequential differences by method of aggregation; the mean absolute deviation of the difference in life expectancy at age 50 measured by state of birth versus state of residence is 0.58 (0.50) years for men and 0.40 (0.29) years for women. These differences are also spatially clustered, and we show that regional inequality in life expectancy is higher based on life expectancies by state of birth, implying that interstate migration mitigates baseline geographical inequality in mortality outcomes. Finally, we assess how state-specific features of in-migration, out-migration, and non-migration together shape measures of mortality disparities by state (of residence), further demonstrating the difficulty of clearly interpreting these widely used measures.
papers.zh_title: 理解死亡率的地理差异
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献表明，早期生活条件塑造了后期生活结果，包括健康和迁移事件。然而，对死亡率结果地理差异的分析几乎完全集中在同期测量的地理位置（例如，死亡时的居住州），从而可能混淆了早期生活条件、迁移模式和目的地影响的作用。我们利用新近可用的美国社区死亡率差异（MDAC）数据集，该数据集将2008年美国社区调查（ACS）的受访者与官方死亡记录相链接，并估计了不同聚合方法导致的显著差异；按出生州与按居住州测量的50岁时预期寿命差异的平均绝对偏差，男性为0.58（0.50）年，女性为0.40（0.29）年。这些差异也存在空间聚类，我们表明基于出生州预期寿命的区域不平等更高，这意味着州际迁移缓解了死亡率结果的基线地理不平等。最后，我们评估了迁入、迁出和非迁移的州特定特征如何共同塑造按州（居住地）测量的死亡率差异指标，进一步证明了清晰解释这些广泛使用指标的困难。

papers.title: Welfare Assessments with Heterogeneous Individuals
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Andreas Schaab
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new approach to make welfare assessments based on the notion of Dynamic Stochastic weights (DS-weights for short). For a large class of dynamic stochastic economies with heterogeneous individuals, we introduce an aggregate additive decomposition that satisfies desirable properties and that allows us to exactly decompose welfare assessments into four components: i) aggregate efficiency, ii) risk-sharing, iii) intertemporal-sharing, and iv) redistribution. We leverage DS-weights to i) revisit how welfarist (e.g., utilitarian) planners make interpersonal welfare comparisons and ii) formalize new welfare criteria that are exclusively based on one or several of the components that we identify.
papers.zh_title: 异质性个体的福利评估
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于动态随机权重（简称DS-权重）的概念，发展了一种进行福利评估的新方法。对于一大类具有异质性个体的动态随机经济体，我们引入了一种满足理想性质的加总可加分解，该分解使我们能够将福利评估精确分解为四个组成部分：i) 总体效率，ii) 风险分担，iii) 跨期分担，以及iv) 再分配。我们利用DS-权重来：i) 重新审视福利主义（例如，功利主义）规划者如何进行人际福利比较，以及ii) 形式化仅基于我们所识别的一个或多个组成部分的新福利准则。

papers.title: Regression Discontinuity Evidence on the Effectiveness of the Minimum Legal E-Cigarette Purchasing Age
papers.authors: Jeffrey S. DeSimone, Daniel S. Grossman, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
papers.abstract: Increases in youth vaping rates and concerns of a new generation of nicotine addicts recently prompted an increase in the federal minimum legal purchase age (MLPA) for tobacco products, including e-cigarettes, to 21 years. This study presents the first regression discontinuity evidence on the effectiveness of e-cigarette MLPA laws. Using data on 12th graders from Monitoring the Future, we obtain robust evidence that federal and state age-18 MLPAs decreased underage e-cigarette use by 15–20% and frequent use by 20–40%. These findings suggest that the age-21 federal MLPA could meaningfully reduce e-cigarette use among 18–20-year-olds.
papers.zh_title: 最低合法电子烟购买年龄有效性的断点回归证据
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来青少年电子烟使用率上升以及对新一代尼古丁成瘾者的担忧，促使美国将包括电子烟在内的烟草产品联邦最低合法购买年龄提高至21岁。本研究首次提供了关于电子烟最低合法购买年龄法律有效性的断点回归证据。利用“监测未来”项目中12年级学生的数据，我们获得了稳健的证据，表明联邦和州层面的18岁最低合法购买年龄将未成年人电子烟使用率降低了15%至20%，将频繁使用率降低了20%至40%。这些发现表明，联邦21岁最低合法购买年龄可能显著减少18至20岁人群的电子烟使用。

papers.title: Understanding U.S. Inflation During the COVID Era
papers.authors: Laurence M. Ball, Daniel Leigh, Prachi Mishra
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the dramatic rise in U.S. inflation since 2020, which we decompose into a rise in core inflation as measured by the weighted median inflation rate and deviations of headline inflation from core. We explain the rise in core with two factors, the tightening of the labor market as captured by the ratio of job vacancies to unemployment, and the pass-through into core from past shocks to headline inflation. The headline shocks themselves are explained largely by increases in energy prices and by supply chain problems as captured by backlogs of orders for goods and services. Looking forward, we simulate the future path of inflation for alternative paths of the unemployment rate, focusing on the projections of Federal Reserve policymakers in which unemployment rises only modestly to 4.4 percent. We find that this unemployment path returns inflation to near the Fed’s target only under optimistic assumptions about both inflation expectations and the Beveridge curve relating the unemployment and vacancy rates. Under less benign assumptions about these factors, the inflation rate remains well above target unless unemployment rises by more than the Fed projects.
papers.zh_title: 理解新冠疫情时期的美国通胀
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了自2020年以来美国通胀的急剧上升，我们将其分解为以加权中位数通胀率衡量的核心通胀上升，以及总体通胀与核心通胀的偏离。我们用两个因素来解释核心通胀的上升：以职位空缺与失业率之比衡量的劳动力市场收紧，以及过去总体通胀冲击向核心通胀的传导。总体通胀冲击本身在很大程度上可由能源价格上涨以及以商品和服务订单积压衡量的供应链问题来解释。展望未来，我们模拟了不同失业率路径下通胀的未来走势，重点关注美联储政策制定者的预测，即失业率仅温和上升至4.4%。我们发现，只有在关于通胀预期以及连接失业率和职位空缺率的贝弗里奇曲线都持乐观假设的情况下，这一失业率路径才能使通胀回到接近美联储目标的水平。如果对这些因素的假设不那么有利，除非失业率上升幅度超过美联储的预测，否则通胀率将远高于目标水平。

papers.title: AI, Skill, and Productivity: The Case of Taxi Drivers
papers.authors: Kyogo Kanazawa, Daiji Kawaguchi, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Yasutora Watanabe
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on productivity in the context of taxi drivers. The AI we study assists drivers with finding customers by suggesting routes along which the demand is predicted to be high. We find that AI improves drivers’ productivity by shortening the cruising time, and such gain is accrued only to low-skilled drivers, narrowing the productivity gap between high- and low-skilled drivers by 14%. The result indicates that AI's impact on human labor is more nuanced and complex than a job displacement story, which was the primary focus of existing studies.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PR；JEL：J22, J24, L92, R41
papers.zh_title: 人工智能、技能与生产率：以出租车司机为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们以出租车司机为背景，考察了人工智能对生产率的影响。我们研究的人工智能通过建议需求预计较高的路线来帮助司机寻找乘客。我们发现，人工智能通过缩短空驶时间提高了司机的生产率，而这种收益仅由低技能司机获得，使高技能与低技能司机之间的生产率差距缩小了14%。这一结果表明，人工智能对人类劳动的影响比现有研究主要关注的岗位替代故事更为微妙和复杂。

papers.title: The Impact of Joint versus Separate Prediction Mode on Forecasting Accuracy
papers.authors: Alex Imas, Minah H. Jung, Silvia Saccardo, Joachim Vosgerau
papers.abstract: Forecasters predicting how people change their behavior in response to a treatment or intervention often consider a set of alternatives. In contrast, those who are treated are typically exposed to only one of the treatment alternatives. For example, managers selecting a wage schedule consider a set of alternative wages while employees are hired at a given rate. We show that forecasts made in joint-prediction mode—which considers a set of alternatives—generate predictions that expect substantially larger behavioral responses than those made in separate-prediction mode—which considers the response to only one treatment realization in isolation. Results show the latter to be more accurate in matching people’s actual responses to interventions and treatment changes. We present applications to managerial decision-making and forecasting of scientific results.
papers.zh_title: 联合预测模式与单独预测模式对预测准确性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 预测人们如何改变其行为以应对某种治疗或干预的预测者，通常会考虑一系列备选方案。相比之下，接受治疗者通常只接触其中一种治疗方案。例如，选择工资方案的管理者会考虑一系列备选工资，而员工则以某一特定工资被雇佣。我们表明，在联合预测模式下做出的预测——即考虑一系列备选方案——所产生的预测，预期行为反应幅度显著大于在单独预测模式下做出的预测——即孤立地考虑对单一治疗实现的反应。结果显示，后者在匹配人们对干预和治疗变化的实际反应方面更为准确。我们展示了这些发现在管理决策和科学结果预测中的应用。

papers.title: Parenting Promotes Social Mobility Within and Across Generations
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
papers.abstract: This paper compares early childhood enrichment programs that promote social mobility for disadvantaged children within and across generations. Instead of conducting a standard meta-analysis, we present a harmonized primary data analysis of programs that shape current policy. Our analysis is a template for rigorous syntheses and comparisons across programs. We analyze new long-run life-cycle data collected for iconic programs when participants are middle-aged and their children are in their twenties. The iconic programs are omnibus in nature and offer many services to children and their parents. We compare them with relatively low-cost more focused home-visiting programs. Successful interventions target both children and their caregivers. They engage caregivers and improve the home lives of children. They permanently boost cognitive and non-cognitive skills. Participants in programs that enrich home environments grow up with better skills, jobs, earnings, marital stability, and health, as well as reduced participation in crime. Long-run monetized gains are substantially greater than program costs for iconic programs. We investigate the mechanisms promoting successful family lives for participants and find intergenerational effects on their children. A study of focused home-visiting programs that target parents enables us to isolate a crucial component of successful programs: they activate and promote parenting skills of child caregivers. The home-visiting programs we analyze produce outcomes comparable to those of the iconic omnibus programs. National implementation of the programs with long-run follow up that we analyze would substantially shrink the overall US Black-White earnings gap.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：D13, J13, J18, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 养育方式促进代内与代际社会流动
papers.zh_abstract: 本文比较了旨在促进弱势儿童代内与代际社会流动的早期儿童充实项目。我们没有进行标准的元分析，而是对塑造当前政策的标志性项目进行了统一的原始数据分析。我们的分析为跨项目的严格综合与比较提供了一个模板。我们分析了在参与者步入中年且其子女二十多岁时收集的新的长期生命周期数据。这些标志性项目本质上是综合性的，为儿童及其父母提供多种服务。我们将它们与成本相对较低、更聚焦的家访项目进行比较。成功的干预措施同时针对儿童及其照料者。它们吸引照料者参与，改善儿童的家庭生活，并永久性地提升认知与非认知技能。参与那些丰富家庭环境项目的儿童，成年后拥有更好的技能、工作、收入、婚姻稳定性、健康状况，并减少了犯罪参与。对于标志性项目而言，长期货币化收益远大于项目成本。我们研究了促进参与者成功家庭生活的机制，并发现了对其子女的代际影响。一项针对以父母为目标的聚焦家访项目的研究，使我们能够分离出成功项目的一个关键组成部分：它们激活并提升了儿童照料者的养育技能。我们分析的家访项目产生的结果与标志性综合项目相当。我们分析的这些具有长期跟踪研究的项目若在全国范围内实施，将大幅缩小美国黑人与白人之间的整体收入差距。

papers.title: The U.S. Postal Savings System and the Collapse of B&Ls During the Great Depression
papers.authors: Sebastián Fleitas, Matthew S. Jaremski, Steven Sprick Schuster
papers.abstract: Building and Loan Associations (B&Ls) financed over half of new houses constructed in the U.S. during the 1920s but they lost their predominance within the following decades as they were pushed to convert into Savings and Loans (S&Ls). This study examines whether the U.S. government-insured Postal Savings System attracted funds away from B&Ls precisely when they needed them the most in the Great Depression. Annual town- and county-level data from 1920 through 1935 for 3 states show that the sudden rise in local postal savings was associated with local downturns in B&Ls. Using a panel vector autoregression, we find that postal savings significantly reduced the amount of money in B&Ls, yet B&Ls had no significant effect on postal savings banks. Alternatively, postal savings had no significant effect on commercial banks. The results suggest that this competitive dynamic prevented B&Ls from rebounding in the mid-1930s and helped contribute to Great Depression’s local real estate lending decline.
papers.zh_title: 美国邮政储蓄系统与大萧条时期建筑贷款协会的崩溃
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪20年代，建筑贷款协会为美国一半以上的新建房屋提供了融资，但在随后的几十年里，由于被迫转变为储蓄贷款协会，它们失去了主导地位。本研究考察了美国政府担保的邮政储蓄系统是否在大萧条时期，恰恰在建筑贷款协会最需要资金的时候，吸走了它们的资金。来自三个州1920年至1935年的年度城镇和县级数据显示，当地邮政储蓄的突然增加与当地建筑贷款协会的衰退相关。使用面板向量自回归模型，我们发现邮政储蓄显著减少了建筑贷款协会中的资金量，而建筑贷款协会对邮政储蓄银行没有显著影响。另外，邮政储蓄对商业银行没有显著影响。结果表明，这种竞争动态阻止了建筑贷款协会在20世纪30年代中期复苏，并加剧了大萧条时期地方房地产贷款的下降。

papers.title: The Productivity of Professions: Evidence from the Emergency Department
papers.authors: David C. Chan Jr, Yiqun Chen
papers.abstract: This paper studies the productivity of nurse practitioners (NPs) and physicians, two professions performing overlapping tasks but with starkly different backgrounds, training, and pay. Using quasi-experimental variation in patient assignment to NPs versus physicians in Veterans Health Administration emergency departments, we find that, on average, NPs use more resources and exhibit a higher 30-day preventable hospitalization rate than physicians. However, the NP-physician performance difference varies by case complexity and severity. Importantly, even larger productivity variation exists within each profession, leading to substantial overlap between the productivity distributions of the two professions; NPs outperform physicians in 38 percent of random pairs.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PR；JEL：I11, I18, J24, J44, M53
papers.zh_title: 专业人员的生产率：来自急诊科的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了执业护士和医生这两类从事重叠任务但背景、培训和薪酬截然不同的专业人员的生产率。利用退伍军人健康管理局急诊科中患者被随机分配给执业护士或医生的准实验变异，我们发现，平均而言，执业护士比医生使用更多资源，并且30天可预防住院率更高。然而，执业护士与医生的绩效差异因病例复杂性和严重程度而异。重要的是，每个专业内部的生产率差异甚至更大，导致两个专业的生产率分布存在大量重叠；在38%的随机配对中，执业护士的表现优于医生。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence, the Evolution of the Healthcare Value Chain, and the Future of the Physician
papers.authors: David Dranove, Craig Garthwaite
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming production across all sectors of the economy, with the potential to both complement and substitute for traditional labor inputs. Healthcare is no exception. Dozens of recent academic studies demonstrate that AI can contribute to the healthcare value chain, by improving both diagnostic accuracy and treatment recommendations. In these ways, AI may wither complement or substitute for physicians. We argue that AI represents the culmination of decades of efforts to enhance medical decision making. Using an historical lens that considers long-standing institutional features of healthcare markets, we identify numerous obstacles to the implementation of AI in medical care, and identify which specialties are most at risk for substitution by AI.
papers.zh_title: 人工智能、医疗价值链的演变与医生的未来
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能正在改变经济所有部门的生产方式，并有可能补充和替代传统的劳动力投入。医疗保健也不例外。最近数十项学术研究表明，人工智能可以通过提高诊断准确性和治疗建议来为医疗价值链做出贡献。在这些方面，人工智能可能补充或替代医生。我们认为，人工智能代表了数十年来改进医疗决策努力的高潮。通过一个考虑医疗市场长期制度特征的历史视角，我们识别了在医疗保健中实施人工智能的众多障碍，并指出了哪些专科最有可能被人工智能替代。

papers.title: Should Mothers Work? How Perceptions of the Social Norm Affect Individual Attitudes Toward Work in the U.S.
papers.authors: Patricia Cortés, Gizem Koşar, Jessica Pan, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: We study how peer beliefs shape individual attitudes toward maternal labor supply using realistic hypothetical scenarios that elicit recommendations on the labor supply choices of a mother with a young child and an information treatment embedded within representative surveys. Across the scenarios, we find that individuals systematically overestimate the extent of gender conservativeness of the people around them. Exposure to information on peer beliefs leads to a shift in recommendations, driven largely by information-based belief updating. The information treatment also increases (intended and actual) donations to a non-profit organization advocating for women in the workplace.
papers.zh_title: 母亲应该工作吗？社会规范认知如何影响美国个体对工作的态度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用现实假设情景（这些情景引发关于有幼儿母亲劳动供给选择的建议）以及嵌入在代表性调查中的信息处理，研究同伴信念如何塑造个体对母亲劳动供给的态度。在各种情景中，我们发现个体系统性地高估了周围人群的性别保守程度。接触同伴信念信息会导致建议的转变，这主要由基于信息的信念更新驱动。信息处理还增加了向倡导职场女性权益的非营利组织的（意向和实际）捐赠。

papers.title: Epidemiological Expectations
papers.authors: Christopher D. Carroll, Tao Wang
papers.abstract: ‘Epidemiological’ models of belief formation put social interactions at their core; such models are widely used by scholars who are not economists to study the dynamics of beliefs in populations. We survey the literature in which economists attempting to model the consequences of beliefs about the future – ‘expectations’ – have employed a full-fledged epidemiological approach to explore an economic question. We draw connections to related work on ‘contagion,’ narrative economics, news/rumor spreading, and the spread of internet memes. A main theme of the paper is that a number of independent developments have recently converged to make epidemiological expectations (‘EE’) modeling more feasible and appealing than in the past.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D81, D91, E71, G41
papers.zh_title: 流行病学预期
papers.zh_abstract: 信念形成的“流行病学”模型将社会互动置于核心地位；这类模型被非经济学学者广泛用于研究群体中信念的动态变化。我们综述了经济学家在尝试建模关于未来的信念（即“预期”）的后果时，采用完整流行病学方法探索经济问题的文献。我们将其与关于“传染”、叙事经济学、新闻/谣言传播以及互联网模因传播的相关研究联系起来。本文的一个主要主题是，近期若干独立发展已汇聚在一起，使得流行病学预期建模比过去更加可行且更具吸引力。

papers.title: Why Do Startups Become Unicorns Instead of Going Public?
papers.authors: Daria Davydova, Rüdiger Fahlenbrach, Leandro Sanz, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: Unicorns are startups that choose to stay private even though they are large enough to go public. We propose an efficiency explanation for their existence. Startups relying highly on organization capital are more vulnerable to expropriation of their organization capital if they go public before their position is sufficiently secure. Our main empirical findings are that shocks to the fragility of organization capital decrease the IPO likelihood, unicorn status enables startups to stay private longer by giving them access to new sources of capital, and unicorns and their industries have higher organization capital intensity than other startups.
papers.zh_title: 为什么初创企业成为独角兽而非上市？
papers.zh_abstract: 独角兽是指那些规模已足够上市却选择保持私有的初创企业。我们提出一个效率解释来说明其存在的原因。高度依赖组织资本的初创企业，如果在地位尚未足够稳固时上市，其组织资本更容易被侵占。我们的主要实证发现是：组织资本脆弱性的冲击会降低IPO可能性；独角兽地位通过赋予初创企业获取新资本来源的渠道，使其能够更长时间保持私有；独角兽及其所在行业的组织资本密集度高于其他初创企业。

papers.title: Mapping the Knowledge Space: Exploiting Unassisted Machine Learning Tools
papers.authors: Florenta Teodoridis, Jino Lu, Jeffrey L. Furman
papers.abstract: Understanding factors affecting the direction of innovation is a central aim of research in the economics of innovation. Progress on this topic has been inhibited by difficulties in measuring distance and movement in knowledge space. We describe a methodology that infers the mapping of the knowledge landscape based on text documents. The approach is based on an unassisted machine learning technique, Hierarchical Dirichlet Process (HDP), which flexibly identifies patterns in text corpora. The resulting mapping of the knowledge landscape enables calculations of distance and movement, measures that are valuable in several contexts for research in innovation. We benchmark and demonstrate the benefits of this approach in the context of 44 years of USPTO data.
papers.zh_title: 绘制知识空间：利用无辅助机器学习工具
papers.zh_abstract: 理解影响创新方向的因素是创新经济学研究的核心目标。由于难以衡量知识空间中的距离和移动，这一主题的进展受到阻碍。我们描述了一种基于文本文档推断知识景观映射的方法论。该方法基于无辅助机器学习技术——层次狄利克雷过程，该过程能灵活识别文本语料库中的模式。由此产生的知识景观映射能够计算距离和移动，这些度量在创新研究的多个情境中具有价值。我们以44年的USPTO数据为背景，对该方法进行了基准测试并展示了其优势。

papers.title: The Ex-Ante Moral Hazard Effects of COVID-19 Vaccines
papers.authors: Virat Agrawal, Neeraj Sood, Christopher M. Whaley
papers.abstract: A long-standing economic question is how protection against harm from insurance or other harm reducing interventions leads to potentially offsetting behavior changes (ex-ante moral hazard). Immunization is a type of insurance, as individuals incur an upfront cost when they get vaccinated, but it protects individuals if they are exposed to a vaccine preventable disease. In this study, we empirically evaluate the ex-ante moral hazard effects of COVID-19 vaccines. First, exploiting the discontinuity in vaccination rates at age 65 due to early eligibility of older population, we compared vaccination rates and risk mitigation behavior between those just above and just below 65 years of age. We find no evidence of decrease in risk mitigating behavior among the 65 years old and older population. Second, leveraging state-level variation in the timing of when people in different age groups became eligible for vaccination, we estimate that COVID-19 vaccination has no effect on risk mitigating behaviors in adult population. Our findings imply minimal moral hazard effects of COVID-19 vaccines in the short-term.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫苗的事前道德风险效应
papers.zh_abstract: 一个长期存在的经济学问题是，来自保险或其他减少伤害干预措施的保护如何导致潜在的抵消性行为变化（事前道德风险）。免疫接种是一种保险形式，因为个体在接种疫苗时承担前期成本，但如果暴露于疫苗可预防的疾病，它又能保护个体。在本研究中，我们实证评估了COVID-19疫苗的事前道德风险效应。首先，利用65岁因老年人口提前接种资格导致的疫苗接种率不连续性，我们比较了略高于和略低于65岁人群的疫苗接种率和风险缓解行为。我们没有发现65岁及以上人群风险缓解行为减少的证据。其次，利用不同年龄组人群获得疫苗接种资格时间点的州级差异，我们估计COVID-19疫苗接种对成年人口的风险缓解行为没有影响。我们的发现意味着COVID-19疫苗在短期内具有最小的道德风险效应。

papers.title: A Theory of Fiscal Responsibility and Irresponsibility
papers.authors: Marina Halac, Pierre Yared
papers.abstract: We propose a political economy mechanism that explains the presence of fiscal regimes punctuated by crisis periods. Our model focuses on the interaction between successive deficit-biased governments subject to i.i.d. fiscal shocks. We show that the economy transitions between a fiscally responsible regime and a fiscally irresponsible regime, with transitions occurring during crises when fiscal needs are large. Under fiscal responsibility, governments limit their spending to avoid transitioning to fiscal irresponsibility. Under fiscal irresponsibility, governments spend excessively and precipitate crises that lead to the reinstatement of fiscal responsibility. Regime transitions can only occur if governments' deficit bias is large enough.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, PE, POL；JEL：C73, D02, D82, E6, H1, P16
papers.zh_title: 财政责任与不负责任的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个政治经济学机制，用以解释以危机时期为标志的财政体制的存在。我们的模型聚焦于连续几届存在赤字偏好的政府之间的互动，这些政府面临独立同分布的财政冲击。我们表明，经济在财政负责体制和财政不负责任体制之间转换，转换发生在财政需求巨大的危机时期。在财政负责体制下，政府限制支出以避免转向财政不负责任。在财政不负责任体制下，政府过度支出并引发危机，从而导致财政负责体制的恢复。只有当政府的赤字偏好足够大时，体制转换才可能发生。

papers.title: Modeling Machine Learning: A Cognitive Economic Approach
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin, Daniel J. Martin, Philip Marx
papers.abstract: We apply methodological innovations from cognitive economics that were designed to study human cognition to instead better understand machine learning. We first show that the folk theory of machine learning – that an algorithms learns optimally to minimize the loss function used in training – rests on a shaky foundation. We then identify a path forward by translating ideas from the costly learning branch of cognitive economics. We find that changes in the loss function impact learning just as they might if the algorithm was a rational human being who found learning costly according to a revealed pseudo-cost function that may or may not correspond to actual resource costs. Our approach can be leveraged to determine more effective loss functions given a third party’s objective, be it a firm or a policy maker.
papers.zh_title: 建模机器学习：一种认知经济学方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们应用认知经济学中旨在研究人类认知的方法论创新，来更好地理解机器学习。我们首先表明，机器学习的民间理论——即算法最优地学习以最小化训练中使用的损失函数——基础并不稳固。然后，我们通过转化认知经济学中成本学习分支的思想，确定了一条前进路径。我们发现，损失函数的变化对学习的影响，就如同该算法是一个理性人，其学习成本根据一个可能与实际资源成本相符也可能不符的揭示性伪成本函数来衡量一样。我们的方法可用于根据第三方（无论是企业还是政策制定者）的目标来确定更有效的损失函数。

papers.title: Overweight Grandsons and Grandfathers' Starvation Exposure
papers.authors: Dora Costa
papers.abstract: Much of the increase in the prevalence of overweight and obesity has been in developing countries with a history of famines and malnutrition. Prior research has pointed to the association between overweight and famine exposure during developmental ages as one of several explanations and has hypothesized that ancestral famine exposure may play a role. Data limitations have prevented researchers from investigating the multigenerational effects of famine shocks on descendant overweight. This paper examines overweight among adult grandsons of grandfathers exposed to starvation during developmental ages. I study grandsons born to grandfathers who served in the Union Army during the US Civil War (1861-5) where some grandfathers experienced severe net malnutrition because they were POWs during times of extreme hardship. I find that male-line but not female-line grandsons of grandfathers who experienced a severe captivity during their growing years faced a 21% increase in mean overweight and a 2% increase in mean BMI compared to grandsons of non-POWs. This increase was mediated by fathers’ and to a lesser extent own in-utero conditions, as proxied by season of birth, suggesting a dynamic process of inheritance. Male-line grandsons descended from grandfathers who experienced a harsh captivity faced a 22-28% greater risk of dying every year after age 45 relative to grandsons descended from non-POWs, with overweight accounting for 9-14% of the excess risk.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, EH；JEL：I10, I15, N30
papers.zh_title: 超重的孙辈与祖父的饥饿暴露
papers.zh_abstract: 超重和肥胖患病率增加的大部分发生在有饥荒和营养不良历史的发展中国家。先前的研究指出，发育年龄期暴露于饥荒与超重之间的关联是几种解释之一，并假设祖先的饥荒暴露可能起作用。数据限制阻碍了研究人员调查饥荒冲击对后代超重的多代影响。本文考察了在发育年龄期暴露于饥饿的祖父的成年孙辈中的超重情况。我研究了祖父曾在美国内战期间服役的孙辈，其中一些祖父因在极端困难时期成为战俘而经历了严重的净营养不良。我发现，与祖父非战俘的孙辈相比，祖父在成长时期经历严酷囚禁的男性系孙辈（而非女性系孙辈）的平均超重率增加了21%，平均BMI增加了2%。这种增加由父亲的条件以及较小程度上由自身子宫内条件（以出生季节为代理变量）所中介，表明存在一个动态的遗传过程。与祖父非战俘的孙辈相比，祖父经历严酷囚禁的男性系孙辈在45岁后每年死亡风险高出22-28%，其中超重解释了9-14%的额外风险。

papers.title: Economic Activity Across Space: A Supply and Demand Approach
papers.authors: Treb Allen, Costas Arkolakis
papers.abstract: What do recent advances in economic geography teach us about the spatial distribution of economic activity? We show that the equilibrium distribution of economic activity can be determined simply by the intersection of labor supply and demand curves. We discuss how to estimate these curves and highlight the importance of global geography – i.e. the connections between locations through the trading network – in determining how various policy relevant changes to geography shape the spatial economy.
papers.zh_title: 跨空间的经济活动：一种供需方法
papers.zh_abstract: 近期经济地理学的进展如何帮助我们理解经济活动的空间分布？我们证明，经济活动的均衡分布可以简单地由劳动力供给曲线和需求曲线的交点决定。我们讨论了如何估计这些曲线，并强调了全球地理——即通过贸易网络连接不同地点——在决定各种政策相关的地理变化如何塑造空间经济中的重要性。

papers.title: Cross-Border Mergers and Acquisitions
papers.authors: Isil Erel, Yeejin Jang, Michael S. Weisbach
papers.abstract: One of the most consequential events in any firm’s lifetime is a major acquisition. Because of their importance, mergers and acquisitions (M&As) have been an enormous area of research. However, the vast majority of this research and survey papers summarizing this research have focused on domestic deals. Cross-border ones, however, constitute about 30% of the total number and 37% of the total volume of M&As around the world since the early 1990s. We survey the literature on cross-border M&As, focusing on international factors that can lead firms to acquire a firm in another country. Such factors include differences in economic development, laws, institutions, culture, labor rights, protection of intellectual property, taxes, and corporate governance.
papers.zh_title: 跨境并购
papers.zh_abstract: 任何公司生命周期中最具影响的事件之一就是重大收购。由于其重要性，并购已成为一个巨大的研究领域。然而，绝大多数此类研究以及总结这些研究的综述论文都聚焦于国内交易。然而，自20世纪90年代初以来，跨境交易约占全球并购总数的30%和总交易额的37%。我们综述了关于跨境并购的文献，重点关注可能导致企业在另一国收购公司的国际因素。这些因素包括经济发展水平、法律、制度、文化、劳工权利、知识产权保护、税收和公司治理方面的差异。

papers.title: Economic Impact Payments and Household Spending During the Pandemic
papers.authors: Jonathan A. Parker, Jake Schild, Laura Erhard, David Johnson
papers.abstract: Households spent only a small fraction of their 2020 Economic Impact Payment (EIPs) within a couple of months of arrival, consistent with i) pandemic constraints on spending, ii) other pandemic programs and social insurance, and iii) the broader disbursement of the EIPs compared to the economic losses during the early stages of the pandemic. While these EIPs did not fill an urgent economic need for most households, the first round of EIPs did provide timely pandemic insurance to some households who were more exposed to the economic losses from the pandemic. Households with lower liquid wealth entering the pandemic and those less able to earn while working from home each raised consumption more following receipt of their EIP. While our measurement for later EIPs is not as reliable, our estimates suggest even less spending on average to the second and third rounds of EIPs. Our point estimates imply less short-term spending on average than in response to economic stimulus payments in 2001 or 2008. While our analysis lacks the power to measure longer-term spending effects, the lack of short-term spending contributed to strong household balance sheets as the direct economic effects of the pandemic on households waned.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE；JEL：D14, D15, E21, E62, G5, H31
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间的经济影响支付与家庭支出
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭在收到2020年经济影响支付后的几个月内仅花费了其中一小部分，这与以下因素一致：i) 疫情对支出的限制，ii) 其他疫情项目和社会保险，以及iii) 与疫情早期阶段的经济损失相比，经济影响支付的发放范围更广。虽然这些经济影响支付并未满足大多数家庭的紧急经济需求，但第一轮经济影响支付确实为一些更易受疫情经济损失影响的家庭提供了及时的疫情保险。在疫情开始时流动性财富较低的家庭以及那些在家工作能力较弱的家庭，在收到经济影响支付后消费增加更多。虽然我们对后续几轮经济影响支付的测量不那么可靠，但我们的估计表明，平均而言，家庭对第二轮和第三轮经济影响支付的支出甚至更少。我们的点估计表明，平均短期支出低于对2001年或2008年经济刺激支付的反应。虽然我们的分析缺乏衡量长期支出效应的能力，但短期支出的缺乏有助于家庭资产负债表保持强劲，因为疫情对家庭的直接经济影响逐渐减弱。

papers.title: Socioeconomic Status and Access to Mental Health Care: The Case of Psychiatric Medications for Children in Ontario Canada
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Paul Kurdyak, Jonathan Zhang
papers.abstract: We examine differences in the prescribing of psychiatric medications to low-income and higher-income children in the Canadian province of Ontario using rich administrative data that includes diagnosis codes and physician identifiers. Our most striking finding is that conditional on diagnosis and medical history, low-income children are more likely to be prescribed antipsychotics and benzodiazepines than higher-income children who see the same doctors. These are drugs with potentially dangerous side effects that ideally should be prescribed to children only under narrowly proscribed circumstances. Low-income children are also less likely to be prescribed SSRIs, the first-line treatment for depression and anxiety conditional on diagnosis. Hence, socioeconomic differences in the prescribing of psychotropic medications to children persist even in the context of universal public health insurance and universal drug coverage.
papers.zh_title: 社会经济地位与心理健康服务获取：加拿大安大略省儿童精神科药物处方案例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用包含诊断代码和医生标识符的丰富行政数据，研究了加拿大安大略省低收入和高收入儿童在精神科药物处方方面的差异。我们最显著的发现是，在控制诊断和病史的情况下，低收入儿童比看同一医生的高收入儿童更有可能被处方抗精神病药和苯二氮卓类药物。这些药物具有潜在危险的副作用，理想情况下只应在严格限制的情况下给儿童处方。低收入儿童也更不可能被处方SSRIs，这是诊断后抑郁症和焦虑症的一线治疗药物。因此，即使在全民公共医疗保险和全民药物覆盖的背景下，儿童精神药物处方中的社会经济差异仍然存在。

papers.title: Financial Intermediation and the Funding of Biomedical Innovation: A Review
papers.authors: Andrew W. Lo, Richard T. Thakor
papers.abstract: We review the literature on financial intermediation in the process by which new medical therapeutics are financed, developed, and delivered. We discuss the contributing factors that lead to a key finding in the literature—underinvestment in biomedical R&D—and focus on the role that banks and other intermediaries can play in financing biomedical R&D and potentially closing this funding gap. We conclude with a discussion of the role of financial intermediation in the delivery of healthcare to patients.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EH, PR；JEL：D21, G21, G24, G31, G32, L65
papers.zh_title: 金融中介与生物医学创新的融资：综述
papers.zh_abstract: 我们综述了关于金融中介在新医疗疗法融资、开发和交付过程中的文献。我们讨论了导致文献中一个关键发现——生物医学研发投资不足——的促成因素，并重点关注银行和其他中介机构在资助生物医学研发以及可能缩小这一资金缺口方面可以发挥的作用。最后，我们讨论了金融中介在向患者提供医疗服务中的作用。

papers.title: Give Me a Pass: Flexible Credit for Entrepreneurs in Colombia
papers.authors: Lasse Brune, Xavier Giné, Dean Karlan
papers.abstract: Although microcredit has reached millions, recent randomized evaluations find limited average business impacts. Contract rigidity, specifically the fixed and frequent installments, may restrict moral hazard but limit productive risk-taking, thus limiting the impact. With a Colombian lender, we experimentally compared, for a sample of new borrowers, a standard rigid loan to a more flexible loan that included three “passes” with which borrowers could delay repayments. The flexible loan led to some shifts in investment behavior but had no average impact on revenue, profit level, or profit variance, and led to higher default.
papers.zh_title: 给我一个通行证：哥伦比亚企业家的灵活信贷
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管小额信贷已覆盖数百万人，但最近的随机评估发现其平均商业影响有限。合同刚性，特别是固定且频繁的分期付款，可能限制了道德风险，但也限制了生产性风险承担，从而限制了影响。我们与一家哥伦比亚贷款机构合作，针对新借款人样本，实验性地比较了标准刚性贷款与一种更灵活的贷款，后者包含三个“通行证”，借款人可以用其延迟还款。灵活贷款导致了一些投资行为的转变，但对收入、利润水平或利润方差没有平均影响，并导致了更高的违约率。

papers.title: Smiles in Profiles: Improving Fairness and Efficiency Using Estimates of User Preferences in Online Marketplaces
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Dean Karlan, Emil Palikot, Yuan Yuan
papers.abstract: Online platforms often have conflicting goals: they face tradeoffs between increasing efficiency and reducing disparities, where the latter may relate to objectives such as the longer-term health of the marketplace or the organization’s mission. We examine how participants’ profile pictures shape this trade-off in the context of a peer-to-peer lending platform. We develop and apply an approach to estimate marketplace participants’ preferences for different profile features, distinguishing between (i) "type" (e.g., gender, age) and (ii) "style" (e.g., smiling in the photo). Relative to type, style features are easier to change, and platforms may be more willing to encourage such changes. Our approach starts by using causal inference methods together with computer vision algorithms applied to observational data to identify type and style features of profiles that appear to affect demand for transactions. We further decompose type-based disparities into a component driven by demand for certain types and a component that arises because different types have different distributions of style features; we find that style differences exacerbate type-based disparities. To improve internal validity, we then carry out two randomized survey experiments using generative models to create multiple versions of profile images that differ in one feature at a time. We then evaluate counterfactual platform policies based on the changeable profile features and identify approaches that can ameliorate the disparity-efficiency tension. We identify marketplace feedback effects, where encouraging certain style choices attracts participants who value these choices.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, LS；JEL：D0, D40, J0, J02, O1
papers.zh_title: 资料中的微笑：利用在线市场中用户偏好的估计提高公平性和效率
papers.zh_abstract: 在线平台通常面临相互冲突的目标：它们在提高效率和减少差异之间面临权衡，后者可能与市场长期健康或组织使命等目标相关。我们研究了在点对点借贷平台背景下，参与者的个人资料照片如何塑造这种权衡。我们开发并应用了一种方法来估计市场参与者对不同资料特征的偏好，区分（i）“类型”（例如，性别、年龄）和（ii）“风格”（例如，照片中微笑）。与类型相比，风格特征更容易改变，平台可能更愿意鼓励这种改变。我们的方法首先使用因果推断方法以及应用于观测数据的计算机视觉算法，来识别似乎影响交易需求的资料类型和风格特征。我们进一步将基于类型的差异分解为由对某些类型的需求驱动的部分，以及由于不同类型具有不同风格特征分布而产生的部分；我们发现风格差异加剧了基于类型的差异。为了提高内部有效性，我们随后进行了两项随机调查实验，使用生成模型创建每次仅在一个特征上有所不同的多个版本的个人资料图像。然后，我们基于可改变的资料特征评估反事实平台政策，并确定可以缓解差异-效率紧张关系的方法。我们识别了市场反馈效应，即鼓励某些风格选择会吸引重视这些选择的参与者。

papers.title: Effects of the Earned Income Tax Credit for Childless Adults: A Regression Discontinuity Approach
papers.authors: Jonathan Meer, Joshua Witter
papers.abstract: Most antipoverty policy in the United States focuses on families with children, but efforts to assist childless adults have gained traction in recent years. We examine the impact of the Earned Income Tax Credit on the labor force outcomes of childless adults using the age-25 eligibility discontinuity. We find no impacts on labor force participation and employment outcomes, which may be due to lack of information about the credit, lack of behavioral response due to its small size, or that childless adults already have very high labor force participation rates.
papers.zh_title: 无子女成年人劳动所得税抵免的效果：断点回归方法
papers.zh_abstract: 美国大多数反贫困政策针对有子女的家庭，但近年来帮助无子女成年人的努力逐渐获得关注。我们利用25岁年龄资格断点，研究劳动所得税抵免对无子女成年人劳动力市场结果的影响。我们发现该政策对劳动力参与和就业结果没有显著影响，这可能是因为缺乏对该抵免的了解、其规模较小导致行为反应不足，或者无子女成年人的劳动力参与率已经很高。

papers.title: Legal Activism, State Policy, and Racial Inequality in Teacher Salaries and Educational Attainment in the Mid-Century American South
papers.authors: Elizabeth U. Cascio, Ethan G. Lewis
papers.abstract: In the late 1930s, the NAACP launched a campaign to equalize Black and white teacher salaries in the de jure segregated schools of the American South. Using newly collected county panel data spanning three decades, this paper first documents heterogeneous within-state impacts of the campaign on teacher salaries. In states that reinforced successful NAACP litigation by introducing universal minimum salary schedules based on objective criteria, the relatively large wage penalty historically suffered by Black teachers in districts with higher Black enrollment shares disappeared by the mid-1950s. In states that resisted by adopting salary schedules using the National Teacher Examination as a measure of teaching efficacy, that penalty remained. In the second part of the paper, we estimate the effect of teacher pay on educational attainment exploiting variation in Black salary gains over time across counties with different Black enrollment shares, and across states by whether subsequent state policy reinforced or resisted court rulings favorable to the NAACP. We find that Black teacher salary gains contributed to the large reductions in racial inequality in school enrollment and grade progression in the South at mid-century.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, POL；JEL：H7, I2, J15, N32
papers.zh_title: 法律行动、州政策与种族不平等：20世纪中期美国南部的教师工资与教育成就
papers.zh_abstract: 在20世纪30年代末，全国有色人种协进会发起了一场运动，旨在使美国南部法律上实行种族隔离的学校中黑人与白人教师工资平等。利用新收集的跨越三十年的县级面板数据，本文首先记录了该运动对教师工资在州内产生的异质性影响。在那些通过引入基于客观标准的统一最低工资表来强化全国有色人种协进会成功诉讼的州，历史上黑人教师在高黑人入学率地区遭受的相对较大的工资惩罚到20世纪50年代中期消失了。在那些通过采用以国家教师考试作为教学效能衡量标准的工资表来抵制的州，这种惩罚依然存在。在论文的第二部分，我们利用不同黑人入学率县之间黑人工资增长随时间的变化，以及各州后续政策是强化还是抵制有利于全国有色人种协进会的法院裁决，来估计教师工资对教育成就的影响。我们发现，黑人教师工资的增长促进了20世纪中期美国南部在入学率和年级晋升方面种族不平等的大幅减少。

papers.title: Disaggregated Economic Accounts
papers.authors: Asger L. Andersen, Kilian Huber, Niels Johannesen, Ludwig Straub, Emil Toft Vestergaard
papers.abstract: We develop a system of disaggregated economic accounts. The system breaks down national accounting positions into bilateral flows between consistently defined groups of consumers (“consumer cells”), groups of producers (“producer cells”), the government, and the rest of the world. We disaggregate the full circular flow of money, including consumer spending, labor compensation, firm profits, trade in intermediates, foreign trade, and government transactions, while satisfying all national accounting identities. We implement the disaggregated system for small region-by-industry cells in Denmark and present stylized facts, including variation in domestic spending shares, local and urban bias in consumer spending, and a pattern of “triangular flows” across regions. Cell-level measures of “spending intensity” capture how much spending by a cell contributes to the income of cells experiencing unemployment after a shock. Using a general equilibrium model, we show that fiscal transfers are more effective in stimulating aggregate GDP when they target cells with high spending intensity on unemployed cells. Knowledge of the disaggregated economic accounts helps governments select more effective policies.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI, ME, PE；JEL：E01, E1, E20, F4, G5, R1
papers.zh_title: 分项经济账户
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一套分项经济账户体系。该体系将国民核算项目分解为一致定义的消费者群体（“消费者单元”）、生产者群体（“生产者单元”）、政府和世界其他地区之间的双边流量。我们对货币的完整循环流动进行分项，包括消费者支出、劳动报酬、企业利润、中间品贸易、对外贸易和政府交易，同时满足所有国民核算恒等式。我们在丹麦的小区域-行业单元层面实施了这套分项体系，并呈现了一些典型事实，包括国内支出份额的差异、消费者支出中的本地和城市偏向，以及跨区域的“三角流动”模式。单元层面的“支出强度”衡量了一个单元的支出在多大程度上贡献于遭受冲击后经历失业的单元的收入。利用一个一般均衡模型，我们表明，当财政转移支付针对那些对失业单元具有高支出强度的单元时，在刺激总GDP方面更为有效。了解分项经济账户有助于政府选择更有效的政策。

papers.title: How Substitutable Are Workers? Evidence from Worker Deaths
papers.authors: Simon Jäger, Jörg Heining
papers.abstract: We estimate how exogenous worker exits affect firms’ demand for incumbent workers and new hires. Drawing on administrative data from Germany, we analyze 34,000 unexpected worker deaths, which, on average, raise the remaining workers’ wages and retention probabilities. The average effect masks substantial heterogeneity: Coworkers in the same occupation as the deceased see positive wage effects; coworkers in other occupations experience wage decreases when a high-skilled or specialized worker dies. Our findings imply substantial replacement costs, which are larger in thin markets and when skills are specialized.
papers.zh_title: 工人的可替代性有多高？来自工人死亡的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了外生的工人离职如何影响企业对在职员工和新招聘员工的需求。利用德国的行政数据，我们分析了34,000例意外的工人死亡事件。平均而言，这些事件提高了剩余工人的工资和留任概率。平均效应掩盖了显著的异质性：与逝者同一职业的同事看到了积极的工资效应；而当高技能或专业化工人去世时，其他职业的同事则经历了工资下降。我们的发现意味着可观的替代成本，这些成本在劳动力市场较薄和技能专业化程度较高时更大。

papers.title: The NBER Orange Book Dataset: A User’s Guide
papers.authors: Maya Durvasula, C. Scott Hemphill, Lisa Larrimore Ouellette, Bhaven N. Sampat, Heidi L. Williams
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a newly digitized, open-access version of the Food and Drug Administration’s “Orange Book”—a linkage between approved small-molecule drugs and the patents that protect them. The Orange Book also reports any applicable regulatory exclusivity that prevents competitive entry. We summarize the Orange Book’s coverage and discuss the opportunities and challenges associated with using these data for research. Empirical validations against various administrative datasets suggest that Orange Book records are, largely, complete and accurate. We conclude with a specific use case—calculating legal exclusivity periods for drugs—to highlight the types of choices that researchers must make when using this resource.
papers.zh_title: NBER橙皮书数据集：用户指南
papers.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了美国食品药品监督管理局“橙皮书”的一个新近数字化、开放获取的版本——该文件将已批准的小分子药物与保护它们的专利联系起来。橙皮书还报告了任何可能阻止竞争性进入的适用监管排他期。我们总结了橙皮书的覆盖范围，并讨论了使用这些数据进行研究的机会和挑战。针对各种行政数据集的实证验证表明，橙皮书记录在很大程度上是完整和准确的。我们以一个具体的使用案例——计算药物的法定排他期——作为结尾，以强调研究人员在使用这一资源时必须做出的选择类型。

papers.title: Heterogeneity in School Value-Added and the Private Premium
papers.authors: Tahir Andrabi, Natalie Bau, Jishnu Das, Asim Ijaz Khwaja
papers.abstract: Using rich panel data from Pakistan, we compute test score based measures of quality (School Value-Addeds or SVAs) for more than 800 schools across 112 villages and verify that they are valid and unbiased. With the SVA measures, we then document three striking features of the schooling environment. First, there is substantial within-village variation in quality. The annualized difference in learning between the best and worst performing school in the same village is 0.4 sd; compounded over 5 years of primary schooling, this difference is similar in size to the test score gap between low- and high-income countries. Second, students learn more in private schools (0.15 sd per year on average), but substantial within-sector variation in quality means that the effects of reallocating students from public to private schools can range from -0.35sd to +0.65sd. Thus, there is a range of possible causal estimates of the private premium, a feature of the environment we illustrate using three different identification approaches. Finally, parents appear to recognize and reward SVA in the private sector, but the link between parental demand and SVA is weaker in the public sector. These results have implications for both the measurement of the private premium and how we design and evaluate policies that reallocate children across schools, such as school closures and vouchers.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：H44, I21, I25, I28, O12
papers.zh_title: 学校增值的异质性与私立学校溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 利用来自巴基斯坦的丰富面板数据，我们为横跨112个村庄的800多所学校计算了基于考试成绩的质量衡量指标（学校增值），并验证了这些指标是有效且无偏的。利用学校增值指标，我们随后记录了学校环境的三个显著特征。首先，同一村庄内的学校质量存在显著差异。同一村庄中表现最好和最差学校之间的年化学习差异为0.4个标准差；在五年的小学教育中累积，这一差异与低收入和高收入国家之间的考试成绩差距规模相似。其次，学生在私立学校学习更多（平均每年0.15个标准差），但部门内质量的显著差异意味着将学生从公立学校重新分配到私立学校的效果范围可以从-0.35个标准差到+0.65个标准差。因此，私立学校溢价存在一系列可能的因果估计值，这是我们利用三种不同识别方法说明的环境特征。最后，父母似乎能够识别并奖励私立部门的学校增值，但在公立部门，父母需求与学校增值之间的联系较弱。这些结果对私立学校溢价的衡量以及我们如何设计和评估将儿童在学校间重新分配的政策（如学校关闭和代金券）都有启示。

papers.title: Air Quality and Suicide
papers.authors: Claudia Persico, Dave E. Marcotte
papers.abstract: We conduct the first-ever large-scale study of the relationship between air pollution and suicide using detailed cause of death data from all death certificates in the U.S. between 2003 and 2010. Using wind direction as an instrument for daily pollution exposure, we find that a 1 μg/m3 increase in daily PM2.5 is associated with a 0.49% increase in daily suicides and 0.171 more suicide-related hospitalizations (a 50% increase). Estimates using 2SLS are larger and more robust, suggesting a bias towards zero arising from measurement error. Event study estimates further illustrate that contemporaneous pollution exposure matters more than exposure to pollution in previous weeks.
papers.zh_title: 空气质量与自杀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2003年至2010年间美国所有死亡证明的详细死因数据，进行了关于空气污染与自杀之间关系的首次大规模研究。使用风向作为日常污染暴露的工具变量，我们发现每日PM2.5每增加1 μg/m³，与每日自杀人数增加0.49%以及因自杀相关住院人数增加0.171例（增加50%）相关。使用两阶段最小二乘法的估计值更大且更稳健，表明测量误差导致了向零的偏误。事件研究估计进一步说明，当期的污染暴露比前几周的污染暴露更为重要。

papers.title: Marriage Matching over Five Centuries in China
papers.authors: Carol H. Shiue, Wolfgang Keller
papers.abstract: In the marriage market, families make investments on behalf of their young so that they are able to form a household with their preferred partner. We analyze marriage markets in a central region of China between about 1300 and 1850 through the lens of a model of marriage matching and intergenerational transmission of inequality. For both female and male children, marriage patterns are far from being random, instead, there is positive assortative matching. This is present for the entire income distribution, though at the highest levels matching on income is thirty times of what it is at low income levels. Over the sample period the degree of matching falls, and more so for young females, although from a lower level than young males. Lower marriage matching in the 18th and 19th centuries is accompanied by lower inequality across households, yielding a positive time series correlation between sorting and inequality. There are also intergenerational matching returns. Children of parents who are strongly matched tend to be able to marry into relatively high-income in-law families, conditional on the incomes in both the father’s and the mother’s families. Matching in the parent generation pays off more strongly for male than for female children.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS；JEL：J12, J16, N30, N45
papers.zh_title: 中国五个世纪以来的婚姻匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 在婚姻市场中，家庭代表其年轻子女进行投资，以便他们能够与偏好的伴侣组建家庭。我们通过一个婚姻匹配与不平等代际传递模型的视角，分析了约1300年至1850年间中国中部地区的婚姻市场。对于女性和男性子女而言，婚姻模式远非随机，而是存在正向选型匹配。这在全部收入分布中都存在，尽管在最高收入水平上，基于收入的匹配程度是低收入水平时的三十倍。在样本期间，匹配程度有所下降，年轻女性下降更多，尽管其起点低于年轻男性。18和19世纪较低的婚姻匹配伴随着家庭间较低的 inequality，从而产生了排序与 inequality 之间的正向时间序列相关性。还存在代际匹配回报。父母匹配程度高的子女，在控制了父亲和母亲家庭收入后，往往能够嫁入或娶入相对高收入的姻亲家庭。父母一代的匹配对男性子女的回报比对女性子女更强。

papers.title: Legalizing Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Dany Bahar, Bo Cowgill, Jorge Guzman
papers.abstract: We use administrative data linked to the complete formal business registry to study a 2018 policy shift in Colombia that made nearly half a million Venezuelan undocumented migrants eligible for a resident visa. Immigrants who receive the visa increase their economic activity in the form of higher entrepreneurship by a factor as high as 12, bringing it to parity with native Colombians four years later. To establish causal estimates, we develop a novel extension of a regression discontinuity design. Our design uses variation in the running-variable (coming from rain) to instrument for migrants’ choices to apply for visas.
papers.zh_title: 使创业合法化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用与完整正式商业登记相关联的行政数据，研究了哥伦比亚2018年的一项政策转变，该政策使近50万委内瑞拉无证移民有资格获得居留签证。获得签证的移民以创业形式开展的经济活动增加了高达12倍，四年后与哥伦比亚本土居民持平。为建立因果估计，我们开发了一种断点回归设计的新扩展。我们的设计利用运行变量（来自降雨）的变化作为工具变量，来影响移民申请签证的选择。

papers.title: National Wage Setting
papers.authors: Jonathon Hazell, Christina Patterson, Heather Sarsons, Bledi Taska
papers.abstract: How do firms set wages across space? Using job-level vacancy data and a survey of HR managers, we show that 40-50% of a job’s posted wages are identical across locations within a firm. Moreover, nominal posted wages within the firm vary relatively little with local prices, a pattern we verify with other measures of job level wages. Using the co-movement of wage growth across establishments, we argue these patterns reflect national wage setting---a significant minority of firms choose to set the same nominal wage for a job across all their establishments, despite varying local labor market conditions.
papers.zh_title: 全国性工资设定
papers.zh_abstract: 企业如何在不同空间设定工资？利用职位级别的空缺数据和一项针对人力资源经理的调查，我们显示，在一个企业内部，40-50%的职位公布工资在不同地点是相同的。此外，企业内部的名义公布工资与当地价格水平的关联相对较小，我们通过其他职位级别工资指标验证了这一模式。利用不同机构间工资增长的共同变动，我们认为这些模式反映了全国性工资设定——相当一部分企业选择为其所有机构的同一职位设定相同的名义工资，尽管当地劳动力市场条件各不相同。

papers.title: The Effects of Combat Deployments on Veterans' Outcomes
papers.authors: Jesse M. Bruhn, Kyle Greenberg, Matthew Gudgeon, Evan K. Rose, Yotam Shem-Tov
papers.abstract: As millions of soldiers deployed to Iraq or Afghanistan between 2001 and 2021, Veteran Affairs Disability Compensation payments quadrupled and the veteran suicide rate rose rapidly. We estimate causal effects of combat deployments on soldiers’ well-being. To eliminate non-random selection into deployment, we leverage quasi-random assignment of newly recruited soldiers to units on staggered deployment cycles. Deployments increase injuries, combat deaths, and disability compensation, but we find limited evidence that they affect suicide, deaths of despair, financial health, incarceration, or education. More dangerous deployments have similarly limited effects. Our estimates suggest that deployment cannot explain either the recent rise in disability payments, which is more likely driven by policy changes, or the surge in noncombat deaths, which is better explained by shifts in observable characteristics of soldiers.
papers.zh_title: 作战部署对退伍军人结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 随着2001年至2021年间数百万士兵被部署到伊拉克或阿富汗，退伍军人事务部伤残补偿金支付额翻了两番，退伍军人自杀率也迅速上升。我们估计了作战部署对士兵福祉的因果效应。为消除非随机选择进入部署的影响，我们利用了新招募士兵准随机分配到不同部署周期轮换部队的情况。部署增加了受伤、战斗死亡和伤残补偿，但我们发现有限证据表明它影响自杀、绝望死亡、财务健康、监禁或教育。更危险的部署同样影响有限。我们的估计表明，部署既不能解释近期伤残补偿金的上升（这更可能由政策变化驱动），也不能解释非战斗死亡人数的激增（这更可能由士兵可观测特征的转变来解释）。

papers.title: Subjective Performance Evaluation, Influence Activities, and Bureaucratic Work Behavior: Evidence from China
papers.authors: Alain de Janvry, Guojun He, Elisabeth Sadoulet, Shaoda Wang, Qiong Zhang
papers.abstract: Subjective performance evaluation is widely used by firms and governments to provide work incentives. However, delegating evaluation power to local leadership could induce influence activities: employees might devote too much effort to impressing/pleasing their evaluator, relative to working toward the goals of the organization itself. We conduct a large-scale randomized field experiment among Chinese local civil servants to study the existence and implications of influence activities. We find that civil servants do engage in evaluator-specific influence to affect evaluation outcomes, partly in the form of reallocating work efforts toward job tasks that are more important and observable to the evaluator. Importantly, we show that introducing uncertainty about the evaluator’s identity discourages evaluator-specific influence activities and improves bureaucratic work performance.
papers.zh_title: 主观绩效评估、影响活动与官僚工作行为：来自中国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 主观绩效评估被企业和政府广泛用于提供工作激励。然而，将评估权力下放给地方领导可能引发影响活动：员工可能投入过多精力去给评估者留下好印象或取悦评估者，而不是致力于实现组织自身的目标。我们在中国地方公务员中进行了一项大规模随机实地实验，以研究影响活动的存在及其影响。我们发现，公务员确实会进行针对评估者的影响活动以影响评估结果，部分形式是将工作努力重新分配到对评估者更重要且更可见的工作任务上。重要的是，我们表明，引入关于评估者身份的不确定性会抑制针对评估者的影响活动，并改善官僚工作绩效。

papers.title: Opening the Black Box: Task and Skill Mix and Productivity Dispersion
papers.authors: G. Jacob Blackwood, Cindy Cunningham, Matthew Dey, Lucia S. Foster, Cheryl Grim, John C. Haltiwanger, Rachel L. Nesbit, Sabrina Wulff Pabilonia, Jay Stewart, Cody Tuttle, Zoltan Wolf
papers.abstract: An important gap in most empirical studies of establishment-level productivity is the limited information about workers’ characteristics and their tasks. Skill-adjusted labor input measures have been shown to be important for aggregate productivity measurement. Moreover, the theoretical literature on differences in production technologies across businesses increasingly emphasizes the task content of production. Our ultimate objective is to open this black box of tasks and skills at the establishment-level by combining establishment-level data on occupations from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) with a restricted-access establishment-level productivity dataset created by the BLS-Census Bureau Collaborative Micro-productivity Project. We take a first step toward this objective by exploring the conceptual, specification, and measurement issues to be confronted. We provide suggestive empirical analysis of the relationship between within-industry dispersion in productivity and tasks and skills. We find that within-industry productivity dispersion is strongly positively related to within-industry task/skill dispersion.
papers.zh_title: 打开黑箱：任务与技能组合及生产率离散度
papers.zh_abstract: 在大多数关于机构层面生产率的实证研究中，一个重要的空白是关于工人特征及其任务的有限信息。技能调整后的劳动投入指标已被证明对总体生产率测量很重要。此外，关于企业间生产技术差异的理论文献越来越强调生产的任务内容。我们的最终目标是通过将劳工统计局（BLS）的职业数据与BLS-人口普查局协作微观生产率项目创建的受限访问机构层面生产率数据集相结合，打开机构层面任务与技能的黑箱。我们通过探讨需要面对的概念、规范和测量问题，朝着这一目标迈出了第一步。我们提供了关于行业内生产率离散度与任务和技能之间关系的提示性实证分析。我们发现，行业内生产率离散度与行业内任务/技能离散度呈强正相关。

papers.title: An Optimal Mechanism to Fund the Development of Vaccines Against Emerging Epidemics
papers.authors: Christopher M. Snyder, Kendall Hoyt, Dimitrios Gouglas
papers.abstract: We derive the optimal funding mechanism to incentivize development and production of vaccines against diseases with epidemic potential. In the model, suppliers' costs are private information and investments are noncontractible, precluding cost-reimbursement contracts, requiring fixed-price contracts conditioned on delivery of a successful product. The high failure risk for individual vaccines calls for incentivizing multiple entrants, accomplished by the optimal mechanism, a (w+1)-price reverse Vickrey auction with reserve. Our analysis determines the optimal number of entrants and required funding level. Based on a distribution of supplier costs estimated from survey data, we simulate the optimal mechanism's performance in scenarios ranging from a small outbreak, causing harm in the millions of dollars, to the Covid-19 pandemic, causing harm in the trillions. We assess which mechanism features contribute most to its optimality.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, LE, PR；JEL：D47, H44, I18, L65, O31
papers.zh_title: 资助针对新兴流行病疫苗开发的最优机制
papers.zh_abstract: 我们推导出了激励针对具有流行潜力的疾病疫苗开发和生产的最优资助机制。在该模型中，供应商的成本是私人信息，且投资不可签约，这排除了成本补偿合同，需要采用以成功产品交付为条件的固定价格合同。单个疫苗的高失败风险要求激励多个进入者，这通过最优机制——一种带有保留价的（w+1）价格反向维克里拍卖——来实现。我们的分析确定了最优进入者数量和所需资助水平。基于从调查数据估计的供应商成本分布，我们模拟了该最优机制在从小型疫情（造成数百万美元损失）到新冠疫情（造成数万亿美元损失）等情景下的表现。我们评估了哪些机制特征对其最优性贡献最大。

papers.title: The Impact of Large-Scale Social Media Advertising Campaigns on COVID-19 Vaccination: Evidence from Two Randomized Controlled Trials
papers.authors: Lisa Y. Ho, Emily Breza, Marcella Alsan, Abhijit Banerjee, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Fatima Cody Stanford, Renato Fior, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Kelly Holland, Emily Hoppe, Louis-Maël Jean, Lucy Ogbu-Nwobodo, Benjamin A. Olken, Carlos Torres, Pierre-Luc Vautrey, Erica Warner, Esther Duflo
papers.abstract: COVID-19 vaccines are widely available in wealthy countries, yet many people remain unvaccinated. Understanding the effectiveness -- or lack thereof -- of popular vaccination campaign strategies is therefore critical. In this paper, we report results from two studies that tested strategies central to current vaccination outreach: (1) direct communication by health professionals addressing questions about vaccination and (2) efforts to motivate individuals to promote vaccination within their social networks. Near the peak of the Omicron wave, doctor- and nurse-produced videos were disseminated to 17.8 million Facebook users in the US and 11.5 million in France. In both countries, we cannot reject the null of no effect of any of the interventions on any of the outcome variables (first doses - US and France, second doses and boosters - US). We can reject very small effects on first doses during the interventions in both countries (0.16pp - US, 0.021pp - France). In contrast with similar campaigns earlier in the pandemic to encourage health-preserving behaviors, messaging at this stage of the pandemic -- whether aimed at the unvaccinated or those tasked with encouraging others -- did not change vaccination decisions.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C93, D83, I12, L86, O33
papers.zh_title: 大规模社交媒体广告活动对COVID-19疫苗接种的影响：来自两项随机对照试验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫苗在富裕国家广泛可得，但许多人仍未接种疫苗。因此，理解流行疫苗接种运动策略的有效性（或无效性）至关重要。在本文中，我们报告了两项研究的结果，这些研究测试了当前疫苗接种推广的核心策略：（1）卫生专业人员直接沟通解答疫苗接种问题，以及（2）激励个人在其社交网络中推广疫苗接种的努力。在奥密克戎疫情高峰附近，由医生和护士制作的视频被分发给美国1780万和法国1150万Facebook用户。在这两个国家，我们无法拒绝所有干预措施对所有结果变量（第一剂次——美国和法国，第二剂次和加强针——美国）均无影响的零假设。在干预期间，我们可以拒绝两个国家第一剂次非常小的影响（美国0.16个百分点，法国0.021个百分点）。与疫情早期鼓励健康保护行为的类似活动相比，在疫情这一阶段的宣传——无论是针对未接种者还是负责鼓励他人者——并未改变疫苗接种决策。

papers.title: The Economics of Women's Rights
papers.authors: Michèle Tertilt, Matthias Doepke, Anne Hannusch, Laura Montenbruck
papers.abstract: Two centuries ago, in most countries around the world, women were unable to vote, had no say over their own children or property, and could not obtain a divorce. Women have gradually gained rights in many areas of life, and this legal expansion has been closely intertwined with economic development. We aim to understand the drivers behind these reforms. To this end, we distinguish between four types of women’s rights—economic, political, labor, and body—and document their evolution over the past 50 years across countries. We summarize the political-economy mechanisms that link economic development to changes in women's rights and show empirically that these mechanisms account for a large share of the variation in women's rights across countries and over time.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, POL；JEL：D13, D72, J12, J16, N3, N40, O10, P0
papers.zh_title: 女性权利的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 两个世纪前，在世界上大多数国家，女性无法投票，对自己的孩子或财产没有发言权，也不能离婚。女性在生活的许多领域逐渐获得了权利，这种法律扩展与经济发展紧密交织。我们旨在理解这些改革背后的驱动因素。为此，我们区分了四种类型的女性权利——经济权利、政治权利、劳动权利和身体权利——并记录了它们在过去50年间各国的发展演变。我们总结了将经济发展与女性权利变化联系起来的政治经济学机制，并实证表明这些机制解释了各国之间以及随时间推移女性权利变化的很大一部分。

papers.title: Improving Household Debt Management with Robo-Advice
papers.authors: Ida Chak, Karen Croxson, Francesco D’Acunto, Jonathan Reuter, Alberto G. Rossi, Jonathan M. Shaw
papers.abstract: Poor debt-management skills lower financial security and wealth accumulation. Because optimal solutions to credit repayment problems depend on neither risk preferences nor beliefs, loan repayment is a prime application for robo-advising. Vulnerable households, though, tend to distrust new technologies and override suggestions that do not align with ingrained heuristics, such as matching the minimum payment on a credit card balance. Lower adoption rates by these groups might increase rather than reduce wealth inequalities. To assess these trade-offs, we design and implement an RCT in which robo-advice for borrower repayment decisions is offered to a set of representative UK consumers. The availability of free robo-advice significantly improves average loan repayment choices. When their willingness to pay is elicited, many subjects report values larger than the monetary benefits of the tool, perhaps due to lower cognitive and psychological costs decision-makers face when making assisted choices. Non-adopters and overriders report lower trust in algorithms at the end of the experiment. We find no evidence of learning from robo-advice, which barely improves subsequent unassisted choices, even when paired with explicit tips. In fact, robo-advice usage crowds out learning-by-doing, which is highest for those who make all choices unassisted.
papers.zh_title: 利用机器人咨询改善家庭债务管理
papers.zh_abstract: 糟糕的债务管理技能会降低财务安全并阻碍财富积累。由于信贷偿还问题的最优解既不依赖于风险偏好也不依赖于信念，贷款偿还成为机器人咨询的一个主要应用领域。然而，弱势家庭往往不信任新技术，并会推翻那些与根深蒂固的启发式方法（例如匹配信用卡余额的最低还款额）不一致的建议。这些群体较低的采纳率可能会加剧而非缩小财富不平等。为了评估这些权衡，我们设计并实施了一项随机对照试验，向一组具有代表性的英国消费者提供关于借款人还款决策的机器人咨询。免费机器人咨询的提供显著改善了平均贷款偿还选择。当被问及支付意愿时，许多受试者报告的价值高于该工具带来的货币收益，这可能是由于决策者在获得辅助选择时面临的认知和心理成本较低。在实验结束时，未采纳者和推翻建议者报告了对算法较低的信任度。我们没有发现从机器人咨询中学习的证据，即使与明确的提示相结合，机器人咨询也几乎未能改善后续的独立选择。事实上，机器人咨询的使用挤出了“干中学”，而“干中学”的效果在那些完全独立做出所有选择的人中最高。

papers.title: The Effect of Performance Pay Incentives on Market Frictions: Evidence from Medicare
papers.authors: Atul Gupta, Guy David, Lucy (Kunhee) Kim
papers.abstract: Medicare has increased the use of performance pay incentives for hospitals, with the goal of increasing care coordination across providers, reducing market frictions, and ultimately to improve quality of care. This paper provides new empirical evidence by using novel operations and claims data from a large, independent home health care firm with the Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program (HRRP) penalty on hospitals providing identifying variation. We find that the penalty incentive to reduce re-hospitalizations passed through from hospitals to the firm at least for some types of patients, since it provided more care inputs for heart disease patients discharged from hospitals at greater penalty risk and that contributed more patients to the firm. This evidence suggests that HRRP helped increase coordination between hospitals and home health firms without formal integration. Greater home health effort does not appear to have led to lower patient readmissions.
papers.zh_title: 绩效薪酬激励对市场摩擦的影响：来自医疗保险的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗保险增加了对医院的绩效薪酬激励的使用，旨在提高跨提供者的护理协调，减少市场摩擦，并最终改善护理质量。本文利用一家大型独立家庭医疗保健公司的新颖运营和索赔数据，以及针对医院的医院再入院减少计划（HRRP）罚款作为识别变异，提供了新的实证证据。我们发现，减少再住院的罚款激励至少对某些类型的患者从医院传递到了该公司，因为该公司为从面临更高罚款风险的医院出院的、且为该公司贡献了更多患者的心脏病患者提供了更多的护理投入。这一证据表明，HRRP有助于在没有正式整合的情况下增加医院与家庭医疗公司之间的协调。更大的家庭医疗努力似乎并未导致患者再入院率的降低。

papers.title: Trade and Selection with Heterogeneous Firms and Perfect Competition
papers.authors: Xue Bai, Arpita Chatterjee, Kala Krishna, Hong Ma
papers.abstract: This paper develops a new model with heterogeneous firms under perfect competition in a Heckscher-Ohlin-Samuelson setting. We show that trade need not make selection in the comparative advantage sector stricter as suggested by earlier work. Selection is driven by the capital intensity in entry costs relative to production costs. If trade raises (reduces) the wage rental ratio, and entry costs are more labor intensive than production costs in a sector, then the ratio of entry cost to production costs will rise (fall) and selection will become weaker (stricter) in this sector. Moreover, we show that the central theorems of the HOS model (as well as the standard generalizations using duality) carry over in our setting.
papers.zh_title: 异质性企业与完全竞争下的贸易与选择
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在赫克歇尔-俄林-萨缪尔森框架下，发展了一个完全竞争下异质性企业的新模型。我们表明，贸易并不一定像早期研究所示的那样使比较优势部门的选择更严格。选择由进入成本相对于生产成本的资本密集度驱动。如果贸易提高（降低）工资-租金比率，并且在一个部门中进入成本比生产成本更劳动密集，那么进入成本与生产成本的比率将上升（下降），该部门的选择将变得更弱（更严格）。此外，我们表明，HOS模型的中心定理（以及使用对偶性的标准推广）在我们的设定中得以延续。

papers.title: The Economics of Carbon Accounting and Carbon Offsets
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: I provide a rigorous framework for accounting for corporate greenhouse gas emissions, based on the Greenhouse Gas Protocol. I show that only Scope 1 emissions are of interest from a national policy perspective: that emissions in Scopes 2 and 3 are duplicative, and that downstream Scope 3 emissions in total are equal to total Scope 1 emissions. The correct measure of a company's contributions to national GHG emissions is its Scope 1 emissions plus a part of the emissions of the household and government sectors. This is not generally the same as the level of emissions for which a company bears some responsibility, legal or otherwise. I apply some of these ideas to an analysis of carbon offsets, trying to understand the conditions under which offsets are a valid mechanism for reducing emissions by formalizing the ideas of additionality and leakage.
papers.zh_title: 碳核算与碳抵消的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我基于温室气体核算体系，为企业温室气体排放核算提供了一个严谨的框架。我表明，从国家政策角度来看，只有范围1的排放才具有意义：范围2和范围3的排放是重复计算的，并且下游范围3的排放总量等于范围1的排放总量。衡量一家公司对国家温室气体排放贡献的正确指标是其范围1的排放量加上家庭和政府部门的排放量的一部分。这通常不等于该公司在法律或其他方面承担某种责任的排放水平。我将其中一些想法应用于碳抵消的分析，试图通过形式化额外性和泄漏的概念，来理解碳抵消成为减少排放的有效机制的条件。

papers.title: Valuing Deaths Caused by Climate Change
papers.authors: R. Daniel Bressler, Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: Valuing deaths caused by climate change is complex, controversial, and of first-order consequence for the social cost of carbon (SCC): the metric used to account for climate impacts in Benefit Cost Analysis (BCA). Yet the underlying considerations remain under-analyzed. We assess three BCA approaches with support in the literature and practice when applied to global externalities like climate change: (1) Kaldor-Hicks, (2) Current U.S. Practice, and (3) Welfare-Weighted. All approaches share descriptive inputs including value of statistical life—the willingness to pay to avoid elevated mortality risk—but differ in their procedure for aggregating benefits and costs across winners and losers, a normative choice that must encode value judgements. (1) values richer statistical lives more than poorer lives, (2) values lives equally, and (3) values lives nearly or exactly equally depending on parameter values. We find that the rationale for (1) is weaker for global externalities than domestic ones. Because compensation to losers is less likely globally, (1) reduces to a social welfare function with Negishi weights that undo diminishing marginal utility. Furthermore, when climate costs are measured in purchasing-power-parity-adjusted money—as is typical for the SCC—(1) no longer satisfies its own potential compensation criterion. Arguments for (2) and (3) are comparatively stronger for global externalities than domestic ones, and we establish conditions under which they converge. Given these complexities, we emphasize the importance of reporting the mortality impacts implicit in the SCC in natural physical units before monetizing and aggregating, so that normative assumptions are explicit and transparent, as is standard for other impact categories in BCA. This physical-unit metric implicit in every SCC value is the mortality cost of carbon (MCC): the number of deaths per pulse of emissions.
papers.zh_title: 评估气候变化导致的死亡价值
papers.zh_abstract: 评估气候变化导致的死亡价值是复杂且有争议的，并且对碳的社会成本（SCC）具有首要影响：碳的社会成本是用于在成本效益分析（BCA）中核算气候影响的指标。然而，其背后的考量因素仍未得到充分分析。我们评估了在文献和实践中得到支持的三种成本效益分析方法，当应用于气候变化等全球外部性时：（1）卡尔多-希克斯方法，（2）当前美国实践方法，以及（3）福利加权方法。所有方法都共享描述性输入，包括统计生命价值——即避免死亡风险增加的支付意愿——但在如何汇总赢家和输家之间的收益和成本这一程序上有所不同，这是一个必须编码价值判断的规范性选择。（1）方法对更富裕的统计生命估值高于更贫穷的生命，（2）方法对所有生命平等估值，（3）方法根据参数值对生命进行近乎或完全平等的估值。我们发现，对于全球外部性而言，（1）方法的理由比国内外部性更弱。由于在全球范围内对输家进行补偿的可能性较小，（1）方法简化为一个带有内吉希权重的社会福利函数，该权重抵消了边际效用递减。此外，当气候成本以购买力平价调整后的货币衡量时——正如碳的社会成本通常所做的那样——（1）方法不再满足其自身的潜在补偿标准。对于全球外部性而言，（2）和（3）方法的论据相对比国内外部性更强，并且我们建立了它们趋同的条件。鉴于这些复杂性，我们强调在货币化和汇总之前，以自然物理单位报告碳的社会成本中隐含的死亡率影响的重要性，这样规范性假设就明确且透明，正如成本效益分析中其他影响类别的标准做法一样。每个碳的社会成本值中隐含的这个物理单位指标就是碳的死亡率成本（MCC）：每单位排放脉冲导致的死亡人数。

papers.title: The Effect of the COVID-19 Pandemic Recession on Less Educated Women's Human Capital: Some Projections
papers.authors: Mark M. Drozd, Robert A. Moffitt, Xinyu Zhao
papers.abstract: The recession induced by the COVID-19 pandemic resulted in major declines in employment of women, both from the demand side as firms reduced employment and from the supply side resulting from school closures and the closing of many child care facilities. We provide projections of possible impacts of this reduction on less-educated women’s future human capital framed within the traditional Mincerian model that implies that wage growth falls if a recession reduces the growth of work experience. We develop a new and modified form of the Mincerian log wage equation which we argue captures the effect of women’s work experience on their human capital in a way superior to the traditional form of that equation. Using that modified form, we estimate the impact of recession-induced loss of work experience on wages. Our model, estimated on pre-COVID data, incorporates special features anticipated to be of importance in the pandemic, including the degree to which negative aggregate shocks occur to pandemic-specific industries, whether the impact of shocks varies by telecommuting occupation, and how the impact varies with the presence of preschool and school-age children who are affected by school and child-care facility closures. We find that wage losses one year out from 2020 are relatively modest on average, generally less than one percent, with the largest for married women without children in the home. But losses are greater for married women at young ages, mothers with very young children, and for those working in COVID-impacted industries. School and child care closures increase projected negative wage impacts for married mothers by an additional 50 percent.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情大流行衰退对受教育程度较低女性人力资本的影响：一些预测
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情大流行引发的衰退导致女性就业大幅下降，这既来自需求侧（企业减少就业），也来自供给侧（学校关闭和许多儿童保育设施关闭）。我们提供了这种减少对受教育程度较低女性未来人力资本可能影响的预测，这些预测基于传统的明瑟模型，该模型暗示如果经济衰退减少了工作经验的增长，工资增长就会下降。我们开发了一种新的、修正形式的明瑟对数工资方程，我们认为它比该方程的传统形式更好地捕捉了女性工作经验对其人力资本的影响。使用这种修正形式，我们估计了衰退导致的工作经验损失对工资的影响。我们的模型基于新冠疫情前的数据估计，纳入了预期在疫情中重要的特殊特征，包括负面总体冲击对疫情特定行业的冲击程度，冲击的影响是否因远程办公职业而异，以及冲击的影响如何因受学校和儿童保育设施关闭影响的学龄前和学龄儿童的存在而变化。我们发现，从2020年开始一年后的工资损失平均而言相对较小，通常低于1%，其中对家中无子女的已婚女性影响最大。但对于年轻已婚女性、有非常年幼子女的母亲以及在受疫情影响的行业工作的女性来说，损失更大。学校和儿童保育设施的关闭使已婚母亲的预计负面工资影响额外增加了50%。

papers.title: Racial and Ethnic Inequality and the China Shock
papers.authors: Lisa B. Kahn, Lindsay Oldenski, Geunyong Park
papers.abstract: Minority workers tend to be disproportionately harmed by negative economic shocks. Indeed, we show that Hispanic populations experienced worse employment losses due to import competition from China, relative to whites, largely due to lower education levels. In contrast, Black-white employment and wage gaps actually narrowed due to relative growth in non-manufacturing sectors. We show that Black workers were less attached to manufacturing by 2000, compared to whites, and were therefore more poised to take advantage of China shock induced reallocation to services. The lasting negative impacts of the China shock on exposed communities were primarily driven by white workers.
papers.zh_title: 种族与民族不平等以及中国冲击
papers.zh_abstract: 少数族裔工人往往不成比例地受到负面经济冲击的伤害。事实上，我们表明，相对于白人，西班牙裔人口因来自中国的进口竞争而遭受了更严重的就业损失，这主要是由于教育水平较低。相比之下，由于非制造业部门的相对增长，黑人与白人之间的就业和工资差距实际上缩小了。我们表明，与白人相比，到2000年，黑人工人对制造业的依附程度较低，因此更有能力利用中国冲击引发的向服务业重新配置。中国冲击对受影响社区的持久负面影响主要由白人工人驱动。

papers.title: Communicating Social Security Reform
