Empirically, we combine the near-universe of RS rollouts by MNE subsidiaries in Costa Rica since 2009 with firm-to-firm transactions and matched employer-employee microdata. We find that RS rollouts lead to significant reductions in firm sales and employment at exposed suppliers, an increase in their salaries to initially low-wage workers and a reduction in their low-wage employment share. We then use the estimated effects and the microdata to calibrate the model and quantify GE counterfactuals. We find that while MNE RS policies have led to significant gains among the roughly one third of low-wage workers employed at exposed suppliers ex ante, the majority of low-wage workers lose due to adverse indirect effects on their wages and the domestic price index.
papers.zh_title: 负责任采购？来自哥斯达黎加的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 跨国企业越来越多地对其全球供应商施加“负责任采购”标准，包括对工人薪酬、福利和工作条件的要求。这些政策仅仅是“空谈”，还是会影响受影响的供应商及其工人？负责任采购在采购国的福利影响如何？为了回答这些问题，我们开发了一个负责任采购的定量一般均衡模型，并将其与一个独特的新数据库相结合。在理论上，我们表明负责任采购的福利影响是模糊的，取决于类似于出口税（+）和劳动力市场扭曲（–）之间的相互作用。在实证上，我们将自2009年以来哥斯达黎加跨国企业子公司负责任采购推广的近乎全量数据与企业间交易以及匹配的雇主-雇员微观数据相结合。我们发现，负责任采购的推广导致受影响供应商的企业销售额和就业显著下降，其最初低工资工人的工资增加，以及低工资就业份额减少。然后，我们利用估计效应和微观数据来校准模型并量化一般均衡反事实。我们发现，虽然跨国企业的负责任采购政策使事前受影响的供应商中约三分之一的低工资工人获得了显著收益，但由于对其工资和国内价格指数的负面间接影响，大多数低工资工人遭受了损失。

papers.title: Funding Black High-Growth Startups
papers.authors: Lisa D. Cook, Matt Marx, Emmanuel Yimfor
papers.abstract: We analyze determinants of access to venture capital for Black founders of high-growth startups. We combine image- and name-processing algorithms with clerical review to identify race for over 100,000 startup founders “at risk” for venture funding. Black founders raise roughly one-third as much venture capital in the five years after founding vs. other startups formed in the same year, industry, and state. What explains the gap? We attribute about a third of the gap to four factors: Black startups have smaller founding teams; Black founders are less likely to have worked at the same companies or attended the same schools as investors who fund startups in the same industry and geography; Black startups are less likely to be located in geographies with plentiful venture capital, and Black startups are less likely to have a patent. We then bound our estimates of the funding gap and show that, to explain the gap, omitted variables would have to be nearly four times as important as the variables we fix. The funding gap is not statistically different from zero in later funding stages (post Series B), suggesting that some investors initially hold—but later amend—incorrect beliefs about Black-founded startups. We also exploit the hiring of Black partners and show that they are more likely to fund successful Black startups, consistent with segmented networks.
papers.zh_title: 资助黑人高增长初创企业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了黑人创始人创办的高增长初创企业获得风险投资的决定因素。我们将图像和姓名处理算法与文书审查相结合，以识别超过10万名“有风险”获得风险投资的初创企业创始人的种族。在成立后的五年内，黑人创始人筹集的风险资本大约是同一年、同一行业和同一州成立的其他初创企业的三分之一。是什么造成了这一差距？我们将大约三分之一的差距归因于四个因素：黑人初创企业的创始团队规模较小；黑人创始人不太可能曾在与投资同一行业和地理区域初创企业的投资者相同的公司工作或就读相同的学校；黑人初创企业不太可能位于风险投资充足的地理区域；以及黑人初创企业不太可能拥有专利。然后，我们界定了资金缺口估计值的范围，并表明，要解释这一缺口，遗漏变量的重要性必须是我们所固定变量的近四倍。在后期融资阶段（B轮之后），资金缺口在统计上与零无显著差异，这表明一些投资者最初对黑人创办的初创企业持有错误的信念，但后来修正了这些信念。我们还利用了黑人合伙人的招聘情况，并表明他们更有可能资助成功的黑人初创企业，这与细分网络的观点一致。

papers.title: Overcoming Behavioral Impediments to Maternal Care: Experimental Evidence on Domain Knowledge and Nudgeability from Recalcitrant Pakistan
papers.authors: Musharraf R. Cyan, Resul Cesur, Yasin Civelek, Bauyrzhan Yedgenov, Richard Rothenberg
papers.abstract: We conducted a large-scale field experiment to calibrate phone messaging to its potential of overcoming behavioral barriers to maternal care uptake in the countryside of a developing country, where a significant share of women forgoes life-saving maternity-related care even when within reach. The high-arching goal of our intervention is to test if and to what extent filling out insufficient domain knowledge (i.e., childbearing-related health literacy) generates responsiveness to nudges for adopting maternal care among the rural poor of Pakistan. We find that informational nudges sent in a random order using the appropriate medium of communication, voice messages, during pregnancy significantly improve care-seeking behaviors, measured by antenatal care, postpartum checkup, and postnatal visits, through improved literacy. Importantly, we document that high-frequency voice calls timed to gestational age substantially increase the efficacy of informational nudges, including boosting facility deliveries, once domain knowledge is built and nudgeability established. Nevertheless, small financial incentives trump the productivity of informational voice calls in both improving health literacy and boosting care uptake, likely due to participants equating the intrinsic value of the intended behavioral change to the size of the monetary reward. These results are scalable to a large number of populations across developing nations.
papers.zh_title: 克服孕产妇护理的行为障碍：来自顽固巴基斯坦的领域知识与可助推性实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项大规模实地实验，以校准电话信息传递在克服发展中国家农村地区孕产妇护理采纳行为障碍方面的潜力，在这些地区，相当一部分女性即使能够获得可挽救生命的孕产相关护理，也会放弃使用。我们干预的首要目标是测试，在巴基斯坦农村贫困人口中，填补领域知识（即与生育相关的健康素养）的不足是否以及在多大程度上能产生对采纳孕产妇护理助推措施的反应性。我们发现，在孕期使用适当的沟通媒介（语音信息）以随机顺序发送的信息性助推措施，通过提高健康素养，显著改善了护理寻求行为，这通过产前护理、产后检查和产后访视来衡量。重要的是，我们记录到，一旦领域知识建立且可助推性确立，根据孕周定时发送的高频语音电话能显著提高信息性助推措施的效果，包括提高机构分娩率。尽管如此，小额经济激励在改善健康素养和促进护理采纳方面都优于信息性语音电话的生产力，这可能是由于参与者将预期行为改变的内在价值等同于货币奖励的规模。这些结果可推广到发展中国家的广大人群。

papers.title: Preferred Habitats and Timing in the World’s Safe Asset
papers.authors: Alexandra M. Tabova, Francis E. Warnock
papers.abstract: We build the first-ever comprehensive security-level dataset on the size, flows, coupon payments and returns of foreign and U.S. investors’ Treasury portfolios. Private U.S. and private foreign investors hold longer-duration higher-return Treasuries, whereas foreign governments hold shorter-duration lower-return Treasuries, so all else equal private investors should earn higher returns than foreign governments. But all else is not equal. Foreign governments, even with their low-returns low-volatility portfolios, actually earn higher returns because U.S. and foreign private investors’ returns are substantially reduced by poor timing. Moreover, we find that foreigners beat the (non- Fed) market, while U.S. investors earn a small and insignificant 19 basis points less than market returns. From our analysis, no investor-type earns significantly less than the (non-Fed) Treasury market, indicating that differential investors are not the source of the convenience yield. In terms of investor behavior more broadly, our novel dataset allows a direct comparison of the different investors in the Treasury market. Foreign private investors are similar to U.S. private investors and both behave differently and have different preferred habitats than governments.
papers.zh_title: 全球安全资产中的偏好栖息地与时机选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了首个全面的证券层面数据集，涵盖外国和美国投资者国债投资组合的规模、流量、票息支付和回报。美国私人投资者和外国私人投资者持有期限更长、回报更高的国债，而外国政府持有期限更短、回报更低的国债，因此，在其他条件相同的情况下，私人投资者应获得比外国政府更高的回报。但其他条件并不相同。外国政府即使拥有低回报、低波动的投资组合，实际上却获得了更高的回报，因为美国和外国私人投资者的回报因时机选择不佳而大幅降低。此外，我们发现外国投资者跑赢了（非美联储）市场，而美国投资者的回报比市场回报低19个基点，且这一差异较小且不显著。根据我们的分析，没有一类投资者的回报显著低于（非美联储）国债市场，这表明不同的投资者并非便利收益的来源。从更广泛的投资者行为来看，我们的新颖数据集允许直接比较国债市场中的不同投资者。外国私人投资者与美国私人投资者相似，两者行为不同，且与政府相比具有不同的偏好栖息地。

papers.title: Mutual Fund Revenue Sharing in 401(k) Plans
papers.authors: Veronika K. Pool, Clemens Sialm, Irina Stefanescu
papers.abstract: Recordkeepers in DC pension plans are often paid indirectly in the form of revenue sharing from third-party funds on the menu. We show that these arrangements affect the investment menu of 401(k) plans. Revenue-sharing funds are more likely to be added to the menu and are less likely to be deleted. Overall, revenue-sharing plans are more expensive as higher expense ratios are not offset by lower direct fees or by superior performance. Rebates increase with the market power of the recordkeeper suggesting that third-party funds may revenue share to gain access to retirement assets.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, PE；JEL：G11, G23, G28, G40, G50, H75
papers.zh_title: 401(k)计划中的共同基金收入分成
papers.zh_abstract: 固定缴款养老金计划中的记录保管人通常通过从菜单中的第三方基金获得收入分成来间接获得报酬。我们表明，这些安排会影响401(k)计划的投资菜单。收入分成基金更有可能被添加到菜单中，并且不太可能被删除。总体而言，收入分成计划更昂贵，因为较高的费用比率并未被较低的直接费用或更优的业绩所抵消。回扣随着记录保管人的市场力量而增加，这表明第三方基金可能通过收入分成来获取退休资产。

papers.title: The Macroeconomic Implications of US Market Power in Safe Assets
papers.authors: Jason Choi, Rishabh Kirpalani, Diego J. Perez
papers.abstract: The US government is the dominant supplier of global safe assets and faces a downward-sloping demand for its debt. In this paper, we ask if the US exercises its market power when issuing debt and study its macroeconomic consequences. We develop a model of the global economy in which US public debt generates a non-pecuniary value for its holders, analyze the equilibrium in which the US government is the monopoly provider of this safe asset, and contrast this case with the one in which the US government acts as a price taker. We use variation in estimated demand elasticities for US debt during high- and low-volatility regimes to empirically distinguish between these two models and find that the data reject the price-taking behavior in favor of the monopoly one. We then quantify the distortions due to market power and find that it generates a significant underprovision of safe assets, a sizable markup in the convenience yield, and large welfare benefits for the US to the detriment of the rest of the world. Finally, we study the implications of increasing competition in safe assets from other sovereigns and private institutions.
papers.zh_title: 美国在安全资产中的市场力量的宏观经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国政府是全球安全资产的主要供应者，并面临对其债务向下倾斜的需求。在本文中，我们探讨美国在发行债务时是否行使了其市场力量，并研究其宏观经济后果。我们建立了一个全球经济模型，其中美国公共债务为其持有者产生非金钱价值，分析了美国政府作为这种安全资产的垄断提供者时的均衡，并将此情况与美国政府作为价格接受者时的情形进行对比。我们利用高波动和低波动制度下美国债务需求弹性的估计变化，从实证上区分这两种模型，发现数据拒绝了价格接受行为，支持了垄断行为。然后，我们量化了市场力量造成的扭曲，发现它导致了安全资产的显著供应不足、便利收益的大幅加价，以及美国以世界其他地区为代价的巨大福利收益。最后，我们研究了来自其他主权国家和私人机构在安全资产领域日益激烈的竞争的影响。

papers.title: Adverse Selection and Network Design Under Regulated Plan Prices: Evidence from Medicaid
papers.authors: Amanda R. Kreider, Timothy J. Layton, Mark Shepard, Jacob Wallace
papers.abstract: Health plans for the poor increasingly limit access to specialty hospitals. We investigate the role of adverse selection in generating this equilibrium among private plans in Medicaid. Studying a network change, we find that covering a top cancer hospital causes severe adverse selection, increasing demand for a plan by 50% among enrollees with cancer versus no impact for others. Medicaid’s fixed insurer payments make offsetting this selection, and the contract distortions it induces, challenging, requiring either infeasibly high payment rates or near-perfect risk adjustment. By contrast, a small explicit bonus for covering the hospital is sufficient to make coverage profitable.
papers.zh_title: 受监管计划价格下的逆向选择与网络设计：来自医疗补助计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 针对贫困人群的健康计划日益限制对专科医院的准入。我们研究了逆向选择在医疗补助计划中私人计划之间形成这种均衡的作用。通过研究一次网络变更，我们发现覆盖一家顶级癌症医院会导致严重的逆向选择，使参保癌症患者对该计划的需求增加50%，而对其他人群则无影响。医疗补助计划固定的保险公司支付使得抵消这种选择及其引发的合同扭曲变得困难，要么需要高得不可行的支付率，要么需要近乎完美的风险调整。相比之下，为覆盖该医院提供一个小额的明确奖金就足以使覆盖变得有利可图。

papers.title: Corporate Governance Implications of the Growth in Indexing
papers.authors: Alon Brav, Nadya Malenko, Andrey Malenko
papers.abstract: Passively managed funds have grown to become some of the largest shareholders in publicly traded companies, but there is considerable debate about the effects of this growth on corporate governance. The goal of this paper is to review the literature on the governance implications of passive fund growth and discuss directions for future research. In particular, we present a framework to understand the incentives of passive and actively managed funds to engage in governance, review the empirical evidence in the context of this framework, and highlight the questions that remain unanswered.
papers.zh_title: 指数化增长对公司治理的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 被动管理型基金已成长为上市公司中一些最大的股东，但关于这种增长对公司治理的影响存在相当大的争论。本文旨在回顾关于被动基金增长对治理影响的文献，并讨论未来研究的方向。具体而言，我们提出了一个框架来理解被动和主动管理型基金参与治理的激励，在此框架下回顾实证证据，并强调尚未解答的问题。

papers.title: Missing Workers and Missing Jobs Since the Pandemic
papers.authors: Bart Hobijn, Ayşegül Şahin
papers.abstract: Since the start of the pandemic the U.S. labor market has been characterized as being plagued by missing jobs, i.e. payroll employment has fallen more than five million jobs short of its pre-pandemic trend, and missing workers, i.e. the participation rate has declined by 1.2 percentage points: A pandemic-induced shortage of workers has restrained job creation and, as a result, been a substantial drag on post-pandemic job growth. In this paper, we show that this is a misinterpretation of the data for two reasons. The first is that the number of missing jobs is inflated because it is based on the unrealistic assumption that the pre-pandemic tailwinds for job growth from the decline in the unemployment rate and cyclical upward pressures on participation would have continued in 2020 and beyond if the pandemic would not have occurred. Second, the number of workers missing due to COVID is overstated because the bulk of the 1.2 percentage-point decline in the participation rate since the start of the pandemic reflects a continuation of its long-run downward trend that was already part of projections before the pandemic broke out. Instead, our payroll jobs accounting yields an 810 thousand cyclical shortfall in payroll jobs in October 2022 compared to right before the pandemic. At the recent pace of job growth, even without monetary and fiscal tightening, we expect a substantial deceleration of payroll growth in the coming months.
papers.zh_title: 疫情以来缺失的工人与缺失的就业岗位
papers.zh_abstract: 自疫情开始以来，美国劳动力市场的特征被描述为受到缺失就业岗位的困扰，即薪资就业人数比疫情前趋势少了超过500万个岗位；以及缺失工人，即劳动参与率下降了1.2个百分点：疫情引发的工人短缺抑制了就业创造，从而成为疫情后就业增长的重大拖累。在本文中，我们表明这是对数据的误解，原因有二。第一，缺失就业岗位的数量被夸大了，因为它基于一个不现实的假设，即如果疫情没有发生，疫情前失业率下降和参与率周期性上行压力对就业增长的有利因素本会在2020年及以后持续。第二，因疫情缺失的工人数量被高估了，因为自疫情开始以来参与率下降的1.2个百分点中，大部分反映了其长期下降趋势的延续，这一趋势在疫情爆发前就已包含在预测中。相反，我们的薪资就业核算显示，与疫情前相比，2022年10月薪资就业的周期性缺口为81万个。按照近期的就业增长速度，即使没有货币和财政紧缩，我们预计未来几个月薪资增长将大幅放缓。

papers.title: Tax-Loss Harvesting with Cryptocurrencies
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Wayne Landsman, Edward Maydew, Daniel Rabetti
papers.abstract: We describe the landscape of taxation in the crypto markets, especially that concerning U.S. taxpayers, and examine how recent increases in tax scrutiny have led to changes in trading behavior by crypto traders. We predict under a simple theoretical framework and then empirically document that increased tax scrutiny leads crypto investors to utilize legal tax planning with tax-loss harvesting as an alternative to non-compliance. In particular, domestic traders increase tax-loss harvesting following the increase in tax scrutiny, and U.S. exchanges exhibit a significantly greater amount of wash trading. Additional findings suggest that broad-based and targeted changes in tax scrutiny can differentially affect crypto traders' preference for U.S.-based exchanges. We also discuss other gray areas for tax regulation related to new crypto assets such as Non-Fungible Tokens and Decentralized Finance protocols that further highlight the importance of coordinating tax policy and other regulations.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, ITI, LE, PE；JEL：G15, G18, G29, K29, K42, O16
papers.zh_title: 加密货币的税收损失收割
papers.zh_abstract: 我们描述了加密市场的税收格局，特别是涉及美国纳税人的部分，并考察了近期税收审查加强如何导致加密交易者交易行为的变化。我们在一个简单的理论框架下预测，并通过实证记录，税收审查加强促使加密投资者利用税收损失收割进行合法税务规划，以此替代不合规行为。具体而言，国内交易者在税收审查加强后增加了税收损失收割，美国交易所表现出显著更多的虚假交易。其他发现表明，广泛和针对性的税收审查变化可能对加密交易者选择美国交易所的偏好产生不同影响。我们还讨论了与新型加密资产（如非同质化代币和去中心化金融协议）相关的其他税收监管灰色地带，这进一步凸显了协调税收政策与其他监管的重要性。

papers.title: Heads Up: Does Air Pollution Cause Workplace Accidents?
papers.authors: Victor Lavy, Genia Rachkovski, Omry Yoresh
papers.abstract: Air pollution can adversely affect physiological and cognitive performance. This study estimates the causal effect of increased nitrogen dioxide (NO2), a primary air pollutant, on construction work accidents, a significant factor related to labor market productivity losses. Using data from all construction sites and pollution monitoring stations in Israel, we find a strong and significant effect on accidents, with a 377% (138%) increase on high (moderate) NO2 pollution days compared to clean air levels. Our mechanism analysis suggests the effect is exacerbated under cognitive strain or worker fatigue. A cost-benefit analysis, supported by a nonparametric estimation, examines subsidizing site closures on highly polluted days.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, LS；JEL：I10, I15, J01, J24, Q51, Q52, Q53
papers.zh_title: 抬头注意：空气污染会导致工作场所事故吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 空气污染会对生理和认知表现产生不利影响。本研究估计了主要空气污染物二氧化氮（NO2）增加对建筑工作事故的因果效应，这是与劳动力市场生产力损失相关的一个重要因素。利用以色列所有建筑工地和污染监测站的数据，我们发现对事故有强烈且显著的影响：与清洁空气水平相比，高（中等）NO2污染日的事故增加了377%（138%）。我们的机制分析表明，这种效应在认知压力或工人疲劳下会加剧。一项由非参数估计支持的成本效益分析，考察了在高污染日补贴工地关闭的情况。

papers.title: Preferences, Inequities, and Incentives in the Substitute Teacher Labor Market
papers.authors: Matthew A. Kraft, Megan Lane Conklin, Grace T. Falken
papers.abstract: We examine the labor supply decisions of substitute teachers – a large, on-demand market with broad shortages and inequitable supply. In 2018, Chicago Public Schools implemented a targeted bonus program designed to reduce unfilled teacher absences in largely segregated Black schools with historically low substitute coverage rates. Using a regression discontinuity design, we find that incentive pay substantially improved coverage equity and raised student achievement. Changes in labor supply were concentrated among Black and Hispanic substitutes from nearby neighborhoods with experience in incentive schools. Wage elasticity estimates suggest incentives would need to be 50% of daily wages to close fill-rate gaps.
papers.zh_title: 代课教师劳动力市场中的偏好、不平等与激励
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了代课教师的劳动力供给决策——这是一个庞大的、按需的市场，存在广泛的短缺和不公平的供给。2018年，芝加哥公立学校实施了一项有针对性的奖金计划，旨在减少在历史上代课覆盖率低、高度隔离的黑人学校中未填补的教师缺勤。利用断点回归设计，我们发现激励性薪酬显著改善了覆盖公平性并提高了学生成绩。劳动力供给的变化集中在来自附近社区、在激励学校有经验的黑人和西班牙裔代课教师中。工资弹性估计表明，要填补覆盖率差距，激励措施需要达到日工资的50%。

papers.title: Pros and Cons of Globalization: Income-Based Attitudes
papers.authors: Assaf Razin
papers.abstract: Which income group is pro-globalization or anti-globalization—the wealthy skilled-labor or the poor low-skilled labor? How globalization affect income-based attitudes towards globalization? The paper addresses these issues in the framework of a small open economy which trades in goods and financial securities with the rest of the world. Income-based political cleavages analyzed are grounded on trade-related and macro-related fundamentals, familiar from a standard open-economy model. They are: (i) The degree of trade border frictions, (ii) The degree of international finance frictions, (iii) The relative factor abundance that determines the capital intensity of the country’s exports; and, (iv) The domestic savings and productivity of domestic investment, which determines whether the country is a financial capital exporter or importer.
papers.zh_title: 全球化的利弊：基于收入的态度的分析
papers.zh_abstract: 哪个收入群体支持全球化或反对全球化——是富裕的熟练劳动力还是贫穷的低技能劳动力？全球化如何影响基于收入的对全球化的态度？本文在一个与世界经济进行商品和金融证券贸易的小型开放经济框架下探讨这些问题。所分析的基于收入的政治分歧基于标准开放经济模型中熟悉的贸易相关和宏观相关的基本面因素。这些因素包括：（i）贸易边境摩擦的程度；（ii）国际金融摩擦的程度；（iii）决定国家出口资本密集度的相对要素丰裕度；以及（iv）国内储蓄和国内投资的生产率，这决定了该国是金融资本出口国还是进口国。

papers.title: Regulatory Incentives for Innovation: The FDA's Breakthrough Therapy Designation
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Jennifer Kao, Kathleen L. Miller, Ariel D. Stern
papers.abstract: Regulators of new products confront a tradeoff between speeding a new product to market and collecting additional product quality information. The FDA’s Breakthrough Therapy Designation (BTD) provides an opportunity to understand if a regulator can use new policy to innovate around this tradeoff—i.e., whether it improved regulator productivity by allowing products to come to market more quickly without compromising quality. We find that the BTD program shortened clinical development times by 23 percent and did not impact the ex post safety profile of drugs with the designation. In exploring mechanisms, we find that the BTD program had the greatest impact on less experienced firms and was associated with reduced BTD clinical trial design complexity. The results suggest that targeted regulatory innovation can shorten R&D periods without compromising the quality of new products.
papers.zh_title: 创新的监管激励：FDA的突破性疗法认定
papers.zh_abstract: 新产品的监管者面临权衡：是加快新产品上市，还是收集更多产品质量信息。FDA的突破性疗法认定（BTD）提供了一个机会，以了解监管者是否可以利用新政策在这一权衡上进行创新——即是否通过允许产品更快上市而不牺牲质量来提高监管效率。我们发现，BTD计划将临床开发时间缩短了23%，并且没有影响获得该认定药物的事后安全性。在探索机制时，我们发现BTD计划对经验较少的公司影响最大，并且与BTD临床试验设计复杂性的降低相关。结果表明，有针对性的监管创新可以缩短研发周期，同时不损害新产品的质量。

papers.title: The Impact of School Spending on Civic Engagement: Evidence from School Finance Reforms
papers.authors: Erdal Asker, Eric Brunner, Stephen Ross
papers.abstract: A primary rationale for public provision of K-12 education and state financing of school spending is that education fosters civic engagement and the development of social capital. However, limited evidence exists on whether and how school spending affects civic engagement. Virtually all studies focus on the impact of educational attainment (as opposed to school spending) on political activity. We provide the first causal evidence on how school spending affects volunteerism as well as voting. The court-ordered and legislative school finance reforms that occurred throughout the United States over recent decades led to large and plausibly exogenous shocks to K-12 school spending. We estimate difference-in-difference-in-differences (DDD) models to isolate the causal impact of school spending on civic engagement. Using data from the National Education Longitudinal Study of 1988 (NELS), the Education Longitudinal Study of 2002 (ELS), and the High School Longitudinal Study of 2009 (HSLS), we find that exogenous increases in school spending led to increases in the probability that young adults volunteer and the amount of time they spend volunteering. In contrast, we find little evidence that school spending impacts voting. Consistent with prior studies, we find that increases in school spending increase high school graduation and college attendance.
papers.zh_title: 学校支出对公民参与的影响：来自学校财政改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 公共提供K-12教育以及州政府资助学校支出的一个主要理由是，教育能够培养公民参与和社会资本的发展。然而，关于学校支出是否以及如何影响公民参与，现有证据有限。几乎所有研究都关注教育成就（而非学校支出）对政治活动的影响。我们首次提供了关于学校支出如何影响志愿服务和投票的因果证据。近几十年来，美国各地由法院命令和立法推动的学校财政改革，对K-12学校支出造成了巨大且看似外生的冲击。我们采用三重差分模型来隔离学校支出对公民参与的因果影响。利用1988年全国教育纵向研究、2002年教育纵向研究和2009年高中纵向研究的数据，我们发现，学校支出的外生增加提高了年轻人志愿服务的概率以及他们投入志愿服务的时间。相比之下，我们几乎没有发现学校支出影响投票的证据。与先前研究一致，我们发现学校支出的增加提高了高中毕业率和大学入学率。

papers.title: Cultural Stereotypes of Multinational Banks
papers.authors: Barry Eichengreen, Orkun Saka
papers.abstract: Cultural trust biases (i.e., stereotypes) play an important role in shaping multinational banks’ cross-border exposures. Exploiting a unique identification strategy and combining European regulatory data on banks’ sovereign debt portfolios with existing and new surveys across 30 European countries, we show that multinational banks are more likely to lend to the government of a country when the residents of the countries where they operate exhibit more trust in the residents of that country. This result is robust to saturating our models with time-varying fixed effects at bank and country-pair levels, controlling for financial, informational, political and cultural linkages, and instrumenting trust via genetic and somatic similarities. Bank-level trust similarly drives corporate lending across borders and tilts banks’ sovereign portfolios towards long-term maturities. Its role is amplified when governments are hit by salience shocks such as Eurozone crises and the Brexit referendum. As potential transmission channels of stereotypes from foreign bank branches to headquarters, we provide evidence consistent with culturally biased communication and internal transfers of human capital.
papers.zh_title: 跨国银行的文化刻板印象
papers.zh_abstract: 文化信任偏差（即刻板印象）在塑造跨国银行的跨境风险敞口中扮演着重要角色。利用独特的识别策略，并结合欧洲监管机构关于银行主权债务组合的数据以及覆盖30个欧洲国家的现有和新调查，我们发现，当跨国银行运营所在国的居民对某个国家的居民表现出更多信任时，这些银行更有可能向该国的政府提供贷款。这一结果在模型中饱和了银行和国家-国家对层面的时变固定效应、控制了金融、信息、政治和文化联系，并通过基因和体细胞相似性对信任进行工具变量处理后依然稳健。银行层面的信任同样驱动着跨境企业贷款，并使银行的主权投资组合偏向长期期限。当政府受到欧元区危机和英国脱欧公投等显著性冲击时，信任的作用会被放大。作为刻板印象从外国银行分行传递到总部的潜在传导渠道，我们提供了与文化偏见沟通和人力资本内部转移相一致的证据。

papers.title: Central Bank Digital Currencies, an Old Tale With a New Chapter
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, William Roberds
papers.abstract: We consider the debut of a new monetary instrument, central bank digital currencies (CBDCs). Drawing on examples from monetary history, we argue that a successful monetary transformation must combine microeconomic efficiency with macroeconomic credibility. A paradoxical feature of these transformations is that success in the micro dimension can encourage macro failure. Overcoming this paradox may require politically uncomfortable compromises. We propose that such compromises will be necessary for the success of CBDCs.
papers.zh_title: 央行数字货币：旧故事的新篇章
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑一种新货币工具——央行数字货币的首次亮相。借鉴货币史上的例子，我们认为，成功的货币转型必须将微观经济效率与宏观经济可信度结合起来。这些转型的一个悖论特征是，微观层面的成功可能鼓励宏观层面的失败。克服这一悖论可能需要政治上令人不安的妥协。我们提出，这些妥协对于央行数字货币的成功将是必要的。

papers.title: Demand for ESG
papers.authors: Malcolm Baker, Mark L. Egan, Suproteem K. Sarkar
papers.abstract: We quantify the value investors place on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) objectives over time and space using a revealed preference approach. Our approach measures investors’ willingness to pay for ESG-oriented index funds in exchange for their financial and non-financial benefits. We find that the premium that investors assign to index funds with an ESG mandate rose from 3 basis points in 2019 to a peak of 17 basis points in 2020, before turning negative in 2022 and falling to negative 33 basis points in 2023. The boom and bust in willingness to pay is more pronounced among institutional investors (versus retail investors) and equity investors (versus fixed income investors). In contrast to US investors, European investors’ willingness to pay for ESG started at a higher level in 2019 and remains strongly positive in 2023. Although differences in fund holdings explain some of the demand for ESG-oriented funds, much of it is driven by the ESG label itself, which may leave investors susceptible to greenwashing. When we apply our framework to the cross-section of 401(k) participant portfolios, we find that investors in climate-conscious areas and low-emission industries exhibit higher demand for ESG. We offer tentative conclusions on how value is split among investors, intermediary profits, and firm costs of capital.
papers.zh_title: 对ESG的需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用显示性偏好方法，量化投资者在不同时间和空间对环境、社会和治理目标所赋予的价值。我们的方法衡量投资者为获得ESG导向指数基金而愿意支付的溢价，以换取其财务和非财务收益。我们发现，投资者分配给具有ESG授权指数基金的溢价从2019年的3个基点上升到2020年17个基点的峰值，然后在2022年转为负值，并在2023年降至负33个基点。这种支付意愿的繁荣与萧条在机构投资者（相对于散户投资者）和股票投资者（相对于固定收益投资者）中更为明显。与美国投资者相比，欧洲投资者对ESG的支付意愿在2019年起点更高，并在2023年仍保持强劲正值。尽管基金持仓差异解释了部分对ESG导向基金的需求，但大部分需求是由ESG标签本身驱动的，这可能使投资者容易受到“漂绿”行为的影响。当我们将框架应用于401(k)参与者投资组合的横截面时，我们发现，气候意识强地区和低排放行业的投资者对ESG表现出更高的需求。我们就价值如何在投资者、中介利润和公司资本成本之间分配提出了初步结论。

papers.title: How do Workers and Households Adjust to Robots? Evidence from China
papers.authors: Osea Giuntella, Yi Lu, Tianyi Wang
papers.abstract: We analyze the effects of exposure to industrial robots on labor markets and household behaviors, exploring longitudinal household data from China. We find that a one standard deviation increase in robot exposure led to a decline in labor force participation (-1%), employment (-7.5%), and hourly wages (-9%) of Chinese workers. At the same time, among those who kept working, robot exposure increased the number of hours worked by 14%. These effects were concentrated among the less educated and larger among men, prime-age, and older workers. We then explore how individuals and families responded to increased exposure to robots. We find that more exposed workers increased their participation in technical training and were significantly more likely to retire earlier. Despite the negative impact on wages and employment, we find no evidence of an effect on consumption or savings, which is explained by an increase in borrowing (+10%). While there is no evidence of an effect on marital behavior, we document that robot exposure led to a small decline in the number of children (-1%). Finally, we find that robot exposure increased family time investment in the education of children (+10%) as well as the investment in children’s after-school academic and extra-curricular activities (+24%).
papers.zh_title: 工人和家庭如何适应机器人？来自中国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用中国的纵向家庭数据，分析了工业机器人暴露对劳动力市场和家庭行为的影响。我们发现，机器人暴露程度每增加一个标准差，会导致中国工人的劳动力参与率下降1%、就业率下降7.5%、小时工资下降9%。同时，在继续工作的工人中，机器人暴露使工作时间增加了14%。这些影响集中在受教育程度较低的群体中，并且在男性、壮年和老年工人中更为显著。接着，我们探讨了个人和家庭如何应对机器人暴露的增加。我们发现，暴露程度更高的工人增加了参与技术培训的比例，并且更有可能提前退休。尽管对工资和就业产生了负面影响，但我们没有发现对消费或储蓄有影响的证据，这可以通过借贷增加10%来解释。虽然没有证据表明对婚姻行为有影响，但我们记录到机器人暴露导致子女数量小幅下降1%。最后，我们发现机器人暴露增加了家庭在子女教育上的时间投入10%，以及子女课外学术和课外活动的投资24%。

papers.title: (Un)Conventional Monetary and Fiscal Policy
papers.authors: Jing Cynthia Wu, Yinxi Xie
papers.abstract: We build a tractable New Keynesian model to jointly study four types of monetary and fiscal policy. We find quantitative easing (QE), lump-sum fiscal transfers, and government spending have the same effects on the aggregate economy when fiscal policy is fully tax financed. Compared with these three policies, conventional monetary policy is more inflationary for the same amount of stimulus. QE and transfers have redistribution consequences, whereas government spending and conventional monetary policy do not. Ricardian equivalence breaks: tax-financed fiscal policy is more stimulative than debt-financed policy. Finally, we study optimal policy coordination and find that adjusting two types of policy instruments, the policy rate together with QE or fiscal transfers, can stabilize three targets simultaneously: inflation, the aggregate output gap, and cross-sectional consumption dispersion.
papers.zh_title: （非）传统货币与财政政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个易于处理的新凯恩斯模型，以共同研究四种类型的货币和财政政策。我们发现，当财政政策完全由税收融资时，量化宽松、一次性财政转移支付和政府支出对总体经济具有相同的影响。与这三种政策相比，在提供相同刺激量的情况下，传统货币政策更具通胀性。量化宽松和转移支付具有再分配后果，而政府支出和传统货币政策则没有。李嘉图等价被打破：税收融资的财政政策比债务融资的政策更具刺激作用。最后，我们研究了最优政策协调，发现调整两种政策工具——政策利率与量化宽松或财政转移支付——可以同时稳定三个目标：通胀、总产出缺口和跨部门消费离散度。

papers.title: Economic Research on Privacy Regulation: Lessons from the GDPR and Beyond
papers.authors: Garrett Johnson
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the economic literature on the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). I highlight key challenges for studying the regulation including the difficulty of finding a suitable control group, variable firm compliance and regulatory enforcement, as well as the regulation's impact on data observability. The economic literature on the GDPR to date has largely—though not universally—documented harms to firms. These harms include firm performance, innovation, competition, the web, and marketing. On the elusive consumer welfare side, the literature documents some objective privacy improvements as well as helpful survey evidence. The literature also examines the consequences of the GDPR's design decisions and illuminates how the GDPR works in practice. Finally, I suggest opportunities for future research on the GDPR as well as privacy regulation and privacy-related innovation more broadly.
papers.zh_title: 隐私监管的经济学研究：来自GDPR及更广泛领域的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了关于欧盟《通用数据保护条例》的经济学文献。我强调了研究该法规的主要挑战，包括寻找合适对照组的困难、企业合规和监管执行的可变性，以及该法规对数据可观测性的影响。迄今为止，关于GDPR的经济学文献在很大程度上——尽管并非普遍——记录了其对企业的损害。这些损害包括企业绩效、创新、竞争、网络和营销。在难以捉摸的消费者福利方面，文献记录了一些客观的隐私改进以及有用的调查证据。文献还考察了GDPR设计决策的后果，并阐明了GDPR在实践中如何运作。最后，我就未来关于GDPR以及更广泛的隐私监管和隐私相关创新的研究提出了机会建议。

papers.title: Scaling Agricultural Policy Interventions
papers.authors: Lauren F. Bergquist, Benjamin Faber, Thibault Fally, Matthias Hoelzlein, Edward Miguel, Andrés Rodríguez-Clare
papers.abstract: Policies aimed at raising agricultural productivity have been a centerpiece in the fight against global poverty. Their impacts are often measured using field or quasi-experiments that provide strong causal identification, but may be too small-scale to capture the general equilibrium (GE) effects that emerge once the policy is scaled up. We propose a new approach for quantifying large-scale GE policy counterfactuals that can both complement and be informed by evidence from field and quasi-experiments. We develop a quantitative model of farm production, consumption and trading that captures important features of this setting, and propose a new solution method that relies on rich but widely available microdata. We showcase our approach in the context of a subsidy for modern inputs in Uganda, using variation from field and quasi-experiments for parameter estimation. We find that both the average and distributional impacts of the subsidy differ meaningfully when comparing a local intervention to one at scale, even for the same sample of farmers, and quantify the underlying mechanisms. We further document new insights on how GE forces differ as a function of saturation rates at different geographical scales, and on the importance of capturing a granular economic geography for counterfactual analysis.
papers.zh_title: 农业政策干预的规模化
papers.zh_abstract: 旨在提高农业生产率的政策一直是抗击全球贫困的核心举措。其影响通常通过田野实验或准实验来衡量，这些实验提供了强有力的因果识别，但可能规模过小，无法捕捉政策规模化后出现的一般均衡效应。我们提出了一种量化大规模一般均衡政策反事实的新方法，该方法既可以补充田野实验和准实验的证据，也可以从中获得信息。我们开发了一个包含农业生产、消费和交易的定量模型，该模型捕捉了这一背景的重要特征，并提出了一种依赖于丰富但广泛可得的微观数据的新求解方法。我们以乌干达的现代投入品补贴为例，利用田野实验和准实验的变异进行参数估计，展示了我们的方法。我们发现，即使针对相同的农民样本，将局部干预与规模化干预进行比较时，补贴的平均影响和分配影响都存在显著差异，并量化了其背后的机制。我们进一步记录了关于一般均衡力量如何随不同地理尺度的饱和率而变化的新见解，以及捕捉精细经济地理对于反事实分析的重要性。

papers.title: A Quantity-Based Approach to Constructing Climate Risk Hedge Portfolios
papers.authors: Georgij Alekseev, Stefano Giglio, Quinn Maingi, Julia Selgrad, Johannes Stroebel
papers.abstract: We propose a new methodology to build portfolios that hedge the economic and financial risks from climate change. Our quantity-based approach exploits information on how mutual fund managers trade in response to idiosyncratic changes in their climate risk beliefs. We exploit two types of idiosyncratic belief shocks: (i) instances when fund advisers experience local extreme heat events that are known to shift climate change beliefs, and (ii) instances when fund managers change the language in shareholder disclosures to express concerns about climate risks. We use the funds’ observed portfolio changes around such idiosyncratic belief shocks to predict how investors will reallocate their capital in response to aggregate climate news shocks that shift the beliefs and asset demands of many investors and thus move equilibrium prices. We show that a portfolio that is long stocks that investors tend to buy after experiencing negative idiosyncratic climate belief shocks, and short stocks that investors tend to sell, appreciates in value in periods with negative aggregate climate news shocks. Our quantity-based portfolios have superior out-of-sample hedge performance compared to portfolios constructed using existing alternative methods. The key advantage of the quantity-based approach is that it learns from rich cross-sectional trading responses rather than time-series price information, which is particularly limited in the case of newly emerging risks such as those from climate change. We also demonstrate the versatility of the quantity-based approach by constructing successful hedge portfolios for aggregate unemployment and house price risk.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EFG, ME；JEL：G10, G11, G12, G14, Q50, Q54
papers.zh_title: 基于数量的气候风险对冲组合构建方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新方法来构建能够对冲气候变化带来的经济和金融风险的投资组合。我们的数量方法利用了共同基金经理如何根据其气候风险信念的异质性变化进行交易的信息。我们利用了两种类型的异质性信念冲击：（i）基金顾问经历已知会改变气候变化信念的当地极端高温事件的情况，以及（ii）基金经理改变股东披露文件中的措辞以表达对气候风险担忧的情况。我们利用基金在这些异质性信念冲击前后观察到的投资组合变化，来预测投资者将如何重新配置其资本，以应对那些改变许多投资者信念和资产需求、从而移动均衡价格的总体气候新闻冲击。我们表明，一个做多投资者在经历负面异质性气候信念冲击后倾向于买入的股票、并做空投资者倾向于卖出的股票的投资组合，在总体气候新闻冲击为负的时期会升值。与使用现有替代方法构建的投资组合相比，我们的数量投资组合具有更优的样本外对冲表现。数量方法的关键优势在于，它从丰富的横截面交易反应中学习，而不是从时间序列价格信息中学习，而时间序列价格信息对于气候变化等新兴风险而言尤其有限。我们还通过构建针对总体失业风险和房价风险的成功对冲投资组合，展示了数量方法的通用性。

papers.title: Regulating Untaxable Externalities: Are Vehicle Air Pollution Standards Effective and Efficient?
papers.authors: Mark R. Jacobsen, James M. Sallee, Joseph S. Shapiro, Arthur A. van Benthem
papers.abstract: The world has 1.4 billion passenger vehicles. How should governments regulate their air pollution emissions? A Pigouvian tax is technologically infeasible. Most countries instead rely on exhaust standards that limit air pollution emissions per mile for new vehicles. We assess the effectiveness and efficiency of these standards, which are the centerpiece of US Clean Air Act regulation of transportation, and counterfactual policies. We show that the air pollution emissions per mile of new US vehicles has fallen spectacularly, by over 99 percent, since standards began in 1967. Several research designs with a half century of data suggest that exhaust standards have caused most of this decline. Yet exhaust standards are not cost-effective in part because they fail to encourage scrap of older vehicles, which account for the majority of emissions. To study counterfactual policies, we develop an analytical and a quantitative model of the vehicle fleet. Analysis of these models suggests that tighter exhaust standards increase social welfare and that increasing registration fees on dirty vehicles yields even larger gains by accelerating scrap, though both reforms have complex effects on inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE, IO, LE, PE；JEL：H21, H23, H7, Q5, Q50, R4
papers.zh_title: 监管不可征税的外部性：车辆空气污染标准是否有效且高效？
papers.zh_abstract: 全球有14亿辆乘用车。政府应如何监管其空气污染排放？庇古税在技术上不可行。大多数国家转而依赖排放标准，限制新车每英里的空气污染排放量。我们评估了这些标准（美国《清洁空气法》对交通运输监管的核心内容）以及反事实政策的有效性和效率。我们表明，自1967年标准开始实施以来，美国新车的每英里空气污染排放量已惊人地下降了超过99%。利用半个世纪数据的多项研究设计表明，排放标准是造成这一下降的主要原因。然而，排放标准并非成本有效，部分原因在于它们未能鼓励淘汰占排放多数的老旧车辆。为了研究反事实政策，我们开发了一个分析模型和一个车辆保有量定量模型。对这些模型的分析表明，更严格的排放标准能提高社会福利，而提高高污染车辆的注册费通过加速淘汰能带来更大的收益，尽管这两项改革都会对不平等产生复杂的影响。

papers.title: What Do Changes in State Test Scores Imply for Later Life Outcomes?
papers.authors: Elena Doty, Thomas J. Kane, Tyler Patterson, Douglas O. Staiger
papers.abstract: In the three decades before the pandemic, mean achievement of U.S. 8th graders in math rose by more than half a standard deviation on the National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP). Between 2019 and 2022, U.S. students had forfeited 40 percent of that rise. To anticipate the consequences of the recent decline, we investigate the past relationship between NAEP scores and students’ later life outcomes by year and state of birth. We find that a standard deviation improvement in a birth cohort’s 8th grade math achievement was associated with an 8 percent rise in income, as well as improved educational attainment and declines in teen motherhood, incarceration and arrest rates. If allowed to become permanent, our findings imply that the recent losses would represent a 1.6 percent decline in present value of lifetime earnings for the average K-12 student (or $19,400), totaling $900 billion for the 48 million students enrolled in public schools during the 2020-21 school year.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I24, I26, J24
papers.zh_title: 州考试成绩变化对后期生活结果意味着什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 在疫情前的三十年里，美国八年级学生在国家教育进步评估（NAEP）中的数学平均成绩提高了超过半个标准差。在2019年至2022年间，美国学生损失了这一增长幅度的40%。为了预测近期下降的后果，我们按出生年份和州调查了NAEP分数与学生后期生活结果之间的历史关系。我们发现，一个出生队列八年级数学成绩提高一个标准差，与其收入增长8%相关，同时也与教育程度提高以及青少年生育率、监禁率和逮捕率下降相关。如果这些近期损失成为永久性的，我们的研究结果表明，对于普通K-12学生而言，这将意味着终身收入现值下降1.6%（即19,400美元），对于2020-21学年入学的4800万公立学校学生来说，总计达9000亿美元。

papers.title: Using Measures of Race to Make Clinical Predictions: Decision Making, Patient Health, and Fairness
papers.authors: Charles F. Manski, John Mullahy, Atheendar Venkataramani
papers.abstract: The use of race measures in clinical prediction models and algorithms has become a highly contentious issue, driven by concerns that inclusion of race as a covariate exacerbates and perpetuates long-standing disparities in quality of health care provided to racial and ethnic minority patients. We seek to inform and ground this debate by evaluating the inclusion of race—even if imperfectly measured—in probabilistic predictions of illness that aim to inform clinical decision making. First, adopting a utilitarian framework to formalize social welfare, our analysis reveals that patients of all races are better off when clinical decisions are jointly guided by patient race and other observable covariates. In this sense, race is not a particularly special covariate: any covariate with predictive power (i.e., one that changes conditional probabilities of illness) should be used to optimize clinical decisions. We then extend the model to a two-period setting where prevention activities that address systemic drivers of disease are relevant and find that the same basic conclusions emerge. Finally, we discuss formal non-utilitarian concepts of fairness and disparity-aversion that have been proposed to guide societal allocation of health care resources.
papers.zh_title: 使用种族指标进行临床预测：决策、患者健康与公平性
papers.zh_abstract: 在临床预测模型和算法中使用种族指标已成为一个高度争议的问题，其驱动力是担心将种族作为协变量会加剧并延续向种族和族裔少数患者提供的医疗服务质量方面的长期差异。我们旨在通过评估在旨在为临床决策提供信息的疾病概率预测中包含种族指标（即使测量不完美）来为这场辩论提供信息和基础。首先，采用功利主义框架来形式化社会福利，我们的分析表明，当临床决策由患者种族和其他可观察协变量共同指导时，所有种族的患者都会受益。从这个意义上说，种族并不是一个特别特殊的协变量：任何具有预测能力的协变量（即改变疾病条件概率的协变量）都应用于优化临床决策。然后，我们将模型扩展到两期设定，其中涉及解决疾病系统性驱动因素的预防活动是相关的，并发现相同的基本结论出现。最后，我们讨论了旨在指导医疗资源社会分配的正式的非功利主义公平和差异厌恶概念。

papers.title: Picking Winners? Government Subsidies and Firm Productivity in China
papers.authors: Lee G. Branstetter, Guangwei Li, Mengjia Ren
papers.abstract: Are Chinese industrial policies making the targeted Chinese firms more productive? Alternatively, are efforts to promote productivity undercut by efforts to maintain or expand employment in less productive enterprises? In this paper, we attempt to shed light on these questions through the analysis of previously underutilized microdata on direct government subsidies provided to China’s publicly traded firms. We categorize subsidies into different types. We then estimate total-factor productivity (TFP) for Chinese listed firms and investigate the relationship between these estimates of TFP and the allocation of government subsidies. We find little evidence that the Chinese government consistently “picks winners”. Firms’ ex-ante productivity is negatively correlated with subsidies received by firms, and subsidies appear to have a negative impact on firms’ ex-post productivity growth throughout our data window, 2007 to 2018. Neither subsidies given out under the name of R&D and innovation promotion nor industrial and equipment upgrading positively affect firms’ productivity growth. On the other hand, we find a positive impact of subsidy on current year employment, both for the aggregated and employment-related subsidies. These findings suggest that China’s increasingly prescriptive industrial policies may have generated limited effects in promoting productivity.
papers.zh_title: 挑选赢家？中国政府补贴与企业生产率
papers.zh_abstract: 中国的产业政策是否让目标中国企业变得更具生产力？或者，提高生产力的努力是否被维持或扩大低生产率企业就业的努力所削弱？在本文中，我们试图通过分析先前未充分利用的关于中国上市公司直接政府补贴的微观数据来阐明这些问题。我们将补贴分为不同类型。然后，我们估计了中国上市公司的全要素生产率（TFP），并研究了这些TFP估计值与政府补贴分配之间的关系。我们几乎没有发现中国政府一贯“挑选赢家”的证据。企业的事前生产率与所获补贴呈负相关，并且在整个数据窗口期（2007年至2018年），补贴似乎对企业的事后生产率增长产生了负面影响。无论是名义上用于研发和创新促进的补贴，还是用于工业和设备升级的补贴，都没有对企业的生产率增长产生积极影响。另一方面，我们发现补贴对当年就业有积极影响，无论是总体补贴还是与就业相关的补贴。这些发现表明，中国日益指令性的产业政策在促进生产率方面可能效果有限。

papers.title: Taxes and the Labor Supply of the Stars
papers.authors: Daniel Keniston, Abigail Allison M. Peralta
papers.abstract: Do high taxes cause superstars to work less? We test this hypothesis using complete data on Hollywood movie stars' labor supply from 1927 to 2014. Changes to marginal tax rates in high tax brackets have no significant effect on the number of films a movie star makes each year. However, in years with high taxes, stars produce more highly rated movies with award-winning directors, potentially substituting prestigious films for pecuniary gains
papers.zh_title: 税收与明星的劳动供给
papers.zh_abstract: 高税收会导致超级明星减少工作吗？我们利用1927年至2014年好莱坞电影明星劳动供给的完整数据来检验这一假设。高税率等级边际税率的变化对电影明星每年制作的电影数量没有显著影响。然而，在高税收年份，明星会制作更多评价更高、与获奖导演合作的电影，可能用声望高的电影替代金钱收益。

papers.title: The Regulation of Medical AI: Policy Approaches, Data, and Innovation Incentives
papers.authors: Ariel Dora Stern
papers.abstract: For those who follow health and technology news, it is difficult to go more than a few days without reading about a compelling new application of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to health care. AI has myriad applications in medicine and its adjacent industries, with AI-driven tools already in use in basic science, translational medicine, and numerous corners of health care delivery, including administrative work, diagnosis, and treatment. In diagnosis and treatment, a large and growing number of AI tools meet the statutory definition of a medical device or that of an in-vitro diagnostic. Those that do are subject to regulation by local authorities, resulting in both practical and strategic implications for manufacturers, along with a more complex set of innovation incentives. This chapter presents background on medical device regulation—especially as it relates to software products—and quantitatively describes the emergence of AI among FDA-regulated products. The empirical section of this chapter explores characteristics of AI-supported/driven medical devices (“AI devices”) in the United States. It presents data on their origins (by firm type and country), their safety profiles (as measured by associated adverse events and recalls), and concludes with a discussion of the implications of regulation for innovation incentives in medical AI.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PR；JEL：I11, I18, K2, K32, O31, O32, O33
papers.zh_title: 医疗人工智能的监管：政策方法、数据与创新激励
papers.zh_abstract: 对于那些关注健康和技术新闻的人来说，很难超过几天不读到关于人工智能在医疗保健领域令人信服的新应用。人工智能在医学及其相关行业有无数应用，人工智能驱动的工具已用于基础科学、转化医学以及医疗保健服务的众多角落，包括行政工作、诊断和治疗。在诊断和治疗方面，大量且不断增长的人工智能工具符合医疗器械或体外诊断的法定定义。那些符合定义的器械需接受当地监管机构的监管，这给制造商带来了实际和战略上的影响，以及一套更复杂的创新激励。本章介绍了医疗器械监管的背景——特别是与软件产品相关的部分，并定量描述了人工智能在FDA监管产品中的出现。本章的实证部分探讨了美国人工智能支持/驱动的医疗器械（“人工智能设备”）的特征。它提供了关于其来源（按公司类型和国家）、安全概况（以相关不良事件和召回衡量）的数据，并最后讨论了监管对医疗人工智能创新激励的影响。

papers.title: Quantifying the Costs and Benefits of Quantitative Easing
papers.authors: Andrew T. Levin, Brian L. Lu, William R. Nelson
papers.abstract: We conduct a systematic analysis of the costs and benefits of large-scale securities purchases, using the Federal Reserve’s QE4 program as a concrete example. This program was initiated at the onset of the pandemic in March 2020 and continued for two years, leading to a doubling of the Fed’s securities holdings to about $8.5 trillion as of March 2022. QE4 was initially aimed at mitigating strains in markets for Treasuries and agency mortgage-backed securities but was subsequently aimed more broadly at supporting market functioning and providing monetary stimulus. Nonetheless, QE4 did not have any notable benefits in reducing term premiums. Moreover, since the securities purchases were financed by expanding the Fed’s short-term liabilities, QE4 amplified the interest rate risk associated with the publicly-held debt of the consolidated federal government. Our simulation analysis indicates that QE4 is likely to reduce the Federal Reserve’s remittances to the U.S. Treasury by about $760 billion over the next ten years.
papers.zh_title: 量化宽松的成本与收益量化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们以美联储的 QE4 计划为具体案例，对大规模证券购买的成本和收益进行了系统分析。该计划于 2020 年 3 月疫情爆发时启动，并持续了两年，导致美联储的证券持有量翻倍，截至 2022 年 3 月达到约 8.5 万亿美元。QE4 最初旨在缓解国债和机构抵押贷款支持证券市场的压力，但随后其目标更广泛地转向支持市场运作和提供货币刺激。尽管如此，QE4 在降低期限溢价方面并未带来显著收益。此外，由于证券购买是通过扩大美联储的短期负债来融资的，QE4 放大了与合并联邦政府公众持有债务相关的利率风险。我们的模拟分析表明，QE4 在未来十年内可能会使美联储向美国财政部的汇款减少约 7600 亿美元。

papers.title: The Disappearing Index Effect
papers.authors: Robin Greenwood, Marco C. Sammon
papers.abstract: The abnormal return associated with a stock being added to the S&P 500 has fallen from an average of 3.4% in the 1980s and 7.6% in the 1990s to 0.8% over the past decade. This has occurred despite a significant increase in the percentage of stock market assets linked to the index. A similar pattern has occurred for index deletions, with large negative abnormal returns on average during the 1980s and 1990s, but only -0.6% between 2010 and 2020. We investigate potential drivers of this surprising phenomenon and discuss the implications for market efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 消失的指数效应
papers.zh_abstract: 股票被纳入标普500指数所带来的异常回报率已从1980年代的平均3.4%和1990年代的7.6%下降至过去十年的0.8%。尽管与该指数挂钩的股票市场资产比例显著增加，这种情况仍然发生。指数剔除也出现了类似模式，在1980年代和1990年代平均出现较大的负异常回报，但在2010年至2020年间仅为-0.6%。我们调查了这一令人惊讶现象的可能驱动因素，并讨论了其对市场效率的影响。

papers.title: Children and Grandchildren of Union Army Veterans: New Data Collections to Study the Persistence of Longevity and Socioeconomic Status Across Generations
papers.authors: Dora Costa, CoraLee Lewis, Noelle Yetter
papers.abstract: This paper introduces four new intergenerational and multigenerational datasets which follow both sons and daughters and which can be used to study the persistence of longevity, socioeconomic status, family structure, and geographic mobility across generations. The data follow the children of Black and White Union Army veterans from birth to death, linking them to the available censuses. The White samples include an over-sample of children of ex-POWs. A separate collection links grandchildren of White Union Army veterans to their death records. The data were created with high quality manual linkage procedures utilizing a wide variety of records to establish links.
papers.zh_title: 联邦军退伍军人的子女和孙辈：用于研究长寿和社会经济地位跨代持续性的新数据收集
papers.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了四个新的跨代和多代数据集，这些数据集追踪了儿子和女儿，可用于研究长寿、社会经济地位、家庭结构和地理流动性在代际间的持续性。这些数据追踪了黑人和白人联邦军退伍军人的子女从出生到死亡的过程，并将其与可用的人口普查数据相链接。白人样本包括前战俘子女的过度抽样。另一个独立的数据收集将白人联邦军退伍军人的孙辈与其死亡记录相链接。这些数据是通过高质量的手动链接程序创建的，利用了各种记录来建立链接。

papers.title: How Regressive are Mobility-Related User Fees and Gasoline Taxes?
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser, Caitlin S. Gorback, James M. Poterba
papers.abstract: Pigouvian taxes and user fees can address environmental externalities and efficiently fund transportation infrastructure, but these policies may place burdens on poorer households. This paper presents new evidence on the distributional consequences of the gasoline tax, bus and light rail charges and a vehicle miles traveled (VMT) tax. Gas taxes have become more regressive over time, partially because of environmentally-oriented technological change, although the share of expenditures on gas taxes declines with expenditures much less than the share of income spent on gas taxes declines with income. Replacing the gasoline tax with a household-level VMT tax would increase the average tax burden on households in the top income and expenditure deciles, because of their greater use of hybrid-electric and battery-electric vehicles. This progressive shift would be small given current levels of hybrid and electric vehicle ownership, but will be larger in the future if such vehicles continue to be more common among higher than lower income households. An expanded commercial VMT would place a larger burden, as a share of expenditures, on lower income or expenditure households, because better-off households consume more non-tradable goods that do not require transportation. User charges for airports, subways and commuter rail are progressive, while bus fees loom much larger for lower income households.
papers.zh_title: 与出行相关的用户费和汽油税有多累进？
papers.zh_abstract: 庇古税和用户费可以解决环境外部性并为交通基础设施提供有效资金，但这些政策可能会给较贫困家庭带来负担。本文提供了关于汽油税、公交和轻轨收费以及车辆行驶里程税（VMT）分配后果的新证据。随着时间的推移，汽油税变得更加累退，部分原因是环境导向的技术变革，尽管汽油税支出占总支出的份额随支出下降的幅度远小于汽油税支出占收入的份额随收入下降的幅度。将汽油税替换为家庭层面的VMT税将增加收入最高和支出最高十分位家庭的平均税收负担，因为他们更多地使用混合动力电动汽车和纯电动汽车。鉴于当前混合动力和电动汽车的拥有水平，这种累进性转变幅度较小，但如果这类车辆在未来继续在高收入家庭中比在低收入家庭中更普遍，这种转变将会更大。扩大的商业VMT税将给较低收入或支出家庭带来更大的负担（按支出份额计算），因为较富裕家庭消费更多不需要运输的非贸易商品。机场、地铁和通勤铁路的用户费是累进的，而公交费用对低收入家庭来说则显得更为沉重。

papers.title: The Cost of Imbalance in Clinical Trials
papers.authors: Sylvain Chassang, Rong Feng
papers.abstract: Clinical trials following the “gold standard” of random assignment frequently use independent lotteries to allocate patients to treatment and control arms. However, independent assignment can generate treatment and control arms that are unbalanced (i.e. treatment and control populations with significantly different demographics), which reduces power. Other assignment methods such as matched pair designs ensure balance across arms while maintaining randomization and permitting inference. \nThis paper seeks to measure the cost of imbalance with respect to gender in a sample of roughly 2000 clinical studies. We document significant imbalance: 25% of experiments have at least 26% more men in one treatment arm than in the other. In addition, clinical trials with greater imbalance have more dispersed treatment effects, indicating that imbalance reduces the informativeness of experiments. A simple structural model suggests that for a typical experiment, using a balanced random design could deliver informativeness gains equivalent to increasing the sample size by 18%.
papers.zh_title: 临床试验中不平衡的成本
papers.zh_abstract: 遵循随机分配“金标准”的临床试验通常使用独立抽签将患者分配到治疗组和对照组。然而，独立分配可能导致治疗组和对照组不平衡（即治疗组和对照组人群的人口统计学特征显著不同），这会降低统计功效。其他分配方法，如配对设计，可以在保持随机化并允许推断的同时确保各组间的平衡。本文旨在衡量约2000项临床研究样本中性别不平衡的成本。我们记录了显著的不平衡：25%的实验中，一个治疗组的男性比例比另一个治疗组至少高出26%。此外，不平衡程度更大的临床试验具有更分散的治疗效果，表明不平衡降低了实验的信息量。一个简单的结构模型表明，对于一个典型的实验，使用平衡的随机设计可以带来相当于将样本量增加18%的信息量增益。

papers.title: Industrial Clusters in the Long Run: Evidence from Million-Rouble Plants in China
papers.authors: Stephan Heblich, Marlon Seror, Hao Xu, Yanos Zylberberg
papers.abstract: We study the impact of large, successful manufacturing plants on other local producers in China, focusing on “Million-Rouble Plants” built in the 1950s during a brief alliance with the U.S.S.R. The ephemeral geopolitical situation and the locations of allied and enemy airbases provide exogenous variation in plant siting. We find a boom-and-bust pattern: Counties hosting these plants were 80% more productive than control counties in 1982 but 20% less productive by 2010. This decline reflects the performance of local establishments, which exhibit low productivity, limited innovation, and high markup. Specialization hindered spillovers, preventing the emergence of new clusters and local entrepreneurship.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, PR；JEL：J24, N95, R11, R50

papers.title: The Effect of Financial Resources on Homeownership, Marriage, and Fertility: Evidence from State Lotteries
papers.authors: George Bulman, Sarena Goodman, Adam Isen
papers.abstract: This paper leverages the universe of U.S. tax data and state lottery wins between 2000 and 2019 to estimate the causal effect of financial resources on three key lifecycle outcomes for young adults. We find large and persistent effects on homeownership, with a response function that exhibits substantial concavity but also an extremely high upper bound, and larger responses among higher-income individuals. Resources generate persistent increases in marriage for single men and women but do not increase the likelihood existing marriages are preserved. Fertility is modestly accelerated by a lottery win, but there is little effect on total fertility. Our results support a causal pathway behind differences in homeownership and marriage by socioeconomic status and inform theories of household formation and the family.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：D1, G5, J12, J13, R21
papers.zh_title: 金融资源对住房拥有率、婚姻和生育的影响：来自州彩票的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用2000年至2019年间美国税务数据和州彩票中奖的完整样本，估计了金融资源对年轻人三个关键生命周期结果的因果效应。我们发现，金融资源对住房拥有率产生了巨大且持续的影响，其响应函数表现出显著的凹性，但也存在极高的上限，且高收入个体的响应更大。金融资源能持续提高单身男性和女性的结婚率，但不会增加现有婚姻存续的可能性。彩票中奖会适度加速生育，但对总生育率影响甚微。我们的结果支持了社会经济地位差异导致住房拥有率和婚姻差异的因果路径，并为家庭形成和家庭理论提供了依据。

papers.title: Immigration and Work Schedules: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Timothy N. Bond, Osea Giuntella, Jakub Lonsky
papers.abstract: We develop a theoretical framework to analyze the effects of immigration on native job amenities, focusing on work schedules. Immigrants have a comparative advantage in production at, and lower disamenity cost for nighttime work, which leads them to disproportionately choose nighttime employment. Because day and night tasks are imperfect substitutes, the relative price of day tasks increases as their supply becomes relatively more scarce. We provide empirical support for our theory. Native workers in local labor markets that experienced higher rates of immigration are more likely to work day shifts and receive a lower compensating differential for nighttime work.
papers.zh_title: 移民与工作时间安排：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个理论框架来分析移民对本地居民工作福利的影响，重点关注工作时间安排。移民在夜间工作的生产上具有比较优势，且对夜间工作的不适成本较低，这导致他们不成比例地选择夜间工作。由于白天和夜间任务是不完全替代的，随着白天任务的供给相对变得更加稀缺，其相对价格上升。我们为理论提供了实证支持。在移民率较高的本地劳动力市场中，本地工人更有可能上白班，并因夜间工作而获得较低的补偿性差异。

papers.title: The Employment Effects of Mobile Internet in Developing Countries
papers.authors: Gaurav Chiplunkar, Pinelopi Koujianou Goldberg
papers.abstract: We examine the employment effects of 3G mobile internet expansion in developing countries. We find that 3G significantly increases the labor force participation rate of women and the employment rates of both men and women. Our results suggest that 3G affects the type of jobs and there is a distinct gender dimension to these effects. Men transition away from unpaid agricultural work into operating small agricultural enterprises, while women take more unpaid jobs, especially in agriculture, and operate more small businesses in all sectors. Both men and women are more likely to work in wage jobs in the service sector.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：J21, J62, O30, O50
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家移动互联网的就业效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了3G移动互联网扩展在发展中国家的就业效应。我们发现，3G显著提高了女性的劳动力参与率以及男性和女性的就业率。我们的结果表明，3G影响了工作类型，并且这些效应具有明显的性别维度。男性从无酬农业工作转向经营小型农业企业，而女性则承担更多无酬工作，尤其是在农业领域，并在所有部门经营更多小型企业。男性和女性都更有可能在服务部门从事有薪工作。

papers.title: When do "Nudges" Increase Welfare?
papers.authors: Hunt Allcott, Daniel Cohen, William Morrison, Dmitry Taubinsky
papers.abstract: We use public finance sufficient statistic approaches to characterize the welfare effects of “nudges,” such as simplified information and warning labels, in markets with taxes and endogenous prices. While many studies focus on average effects, we show that welfare also depends on how the nudge affects the variance of choice distortions, and average effects become irrelevant with zero pass-through or optimal taxes. We implement the framework with experiments evaluating automotive fuel economy labels and sugary drink health labels. Labels decrease purchases of low-fuel economy cars and sugary drinks but may decrease welfare, because they increase the variance of choice distortions.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D90, H0
papers.zh_title: “助推”何时能提高福利？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用公共财政充分统计量方法来描述在存在税收和内生产品价格的市场中，“助推”（例如简化信息和警告标签）的福利效应。虽然许多研究关注平均效应，但我们表明福利还取决于助推如何影响选择扭曲的方差，并且在零传导或最优税收的情况下，平均效应变得无关紧要。我们通过评估汽车燃油经济性标签和含糖饮料健康标签的实验来实施该框架。标签减少了低燃油经济性汽车和含糖饮料的购买，但可能会降低福利，因为它们增加了选择扭曲的方差。

papers.title: The Impact of Paid Family Leave on Families with Health Shocks
papers.authors: Courtney Coile, Maya Rossin-Slater, Amanda Su
papers.abstract: We study the impact of paid family leave (PFL) policies on individuals’ labor market and mental health-related responses to their spouses’ and children’s health shocks using data from the Medical Expenditure Panel Survey and event-study models. We find that PFL access improves job continuity among wives of individuals who are hospitalized or have surgery. Additionally, while PFL access does not affect the wives’ self-reported mental health, it reduces their use of mental health-related medication. We find no effects of PFL on parents of children who experience health shocks, suggesting that this policy is less fitting for this group of caregivers.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I18, J12, J18, J22
papers.zh_title: 带薪家庭假对遭受健康冲击家庭的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用医疗支出面板调查数据和事件研究模型，研究了带薪家庭假政策对个人因配偶和子女健康冲击而产生的劳动力市场和心理健康相关反应的影响。我们发现，带薪家庭假改善了因住院或手术而接受治疗的个人的妻子的工作连续性。此外，虽然带薪家庭假不影响妻子自我报告的心理健康，但它减少了她们对心理健康相关药物的使用。我们发现带薪家庭假对经历健康冲击的孩子的父母没有影响，这表明该政策对这一照顾者群体不太适用。

papers.title: A Theory of Gross and Net Capital Flows over the Global Financial Cycle
papers.authors: J. Scott Davis, Eric van Wincoop
papers.abstract: We develop a theory to account for changes in gross and net capital flows over the global financial cycle (GFC). The theory relies critically on portfolio heterogeneity among investors within and across countries, related to risky portfolio shares and portfolio shares allocated to foreign assets. A global drop in risky asset prices during a downturn of the GFC changes relative wealth within and across countries due to portfolio heterogeneity. This leads to changes in gross and net capital flows that are consistent with the stylized facts: all countries experience a decline in gross capital flows (retrenchment), while countries that have a net debt of safe assets experience a rise in net outflows of safe assets (reduced accumulation of safe debt). This is accomplished through a rise in total net outflows and a drop in net outflows of risky assets. The model is applied to 20 advanced countries and calibrated to micro data related to within country portfolio heterogeneity, as well as cross country heterogeneity of net foreign asset positions of safe and risky assets. The implications of the calibrated model for gross and net capital flows are quantitatively consistent with the data.
papers.zh_title: 全球金融周期中的总资本流动与净资本流动理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个理论来解释全球金融周期中总资本流动和净资本流动的变化。该理论关键依赖于国内外投资者之间与风险资产组合份额和分配给外国资产的组合份额相关的投资组合异质性。在全球金融周期低迷期间，风险资产价格的全球性下跌由于投资组合异质性而改变了国内外的相对财富。这导致了与典型事实一致的总资本流动和净资本流动的变化：所有国家都经历总资本流动下降（收缩），而拥有安全资产净债务的国家则经历安全资产净流出增加（安全债务积累减少）。这是通过总净流出增加和风险资产净流出下降实现的。该模型应用于20个发达国家，并根据与国内投资组合异质性以及国内外安全资产和风险资产净外国资产头寸异质性相关的微观数据进行校准。校准模型对总资本流动和净资本流动的预测在数量上与数据一致。

papers.title: Do Foreign Yield Curves Predict U.S. Recessions and GDP Growth?
papers.authors: Rashad Ahmed, Menzie D. Chinn
papers.abstract: This paper shows that foreign term spreads constructed from bond yields of non- U.S. G-7 constituents predict future U.S. recessions and that foreign term spreads are stronger predictors of U.S. recessions occurring within the next year than U.S. term spreads. U.S. and foreign term spreads are both informative of the U.S. economy but over different horizons and for different components of economic activity. Smaller U.S. term spreads lead to smaller foreign term spreads and U.S. Dollar appreciation. Smaller foreign term spreads do not lead to significant U.S. Dollar depreciation but do lead to persistent declines in U.S. exports and FDI flows into the United States. These findings are consistent with the proposition that foreign term spreads embed growth spillovers from the U.S. and the resulting Dollar strength and slowdown abroad spill back to the United States.
papers.zh_title: 外国收益率曲线能否预测美国经济衰退和GDP增长？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，由非美国七国集团成员债券收益率构建的外国期限利差可以预测未来的美国经济衰退，并且外国期限利差在预测未来一年内发生的美国经济衰退方面比美国期限利差更强。美国和外国的期限利差都对美国经济具有信息价值，但针对不同的时间跨度和经济活动的不同组成部分。较小的美国期限利差导致较小的外国期限利差和美元升值。较小的外国期限利差不会导致显著的美元贬值，但会导致美国出口和流入美国的外国直接投资持续下降。这些发现与以下命题一致：外国期限利差包含了来自美国的增长溢出效应，由此产生的美元强势和国外经济放缓会反过来影响美国。

papers.title: How Abundant Are Reserves? Evidence from the Wholesale Payment System
papers.authors: Gara Afonso, Darrell Duffie, Lorenzo Rigon, Hyun Song Shin
papers.abstract: Before the era of large central bank balance sheets, banks relied on incoming payments to fund outgoing payments in order to conserve scarce liquidity. Even in the era of large central bank balance sheets, rather than funding payments with abundant reserve balances, we show that outgoing payments remain highly sensitive to incoming payments. By providing a window on liquidity constraints revealed by payment behavior, our results shed light on thresholds for the adequacy of reserve balances. Our findings are timely, given the ongoing shrinking of central bank balance sheets around the world in response to inflation.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E42, E44, E52, E58, G22
papers.zh_title: 准备金有多充裕？来自批发支付系统的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在中央银行资产负债表庞大的时代之前，银行依赖收款来为付款提供资金，以节省稀缺的流动性。即使在中央银行资产负债表庞大的时代，我们表明，与其用充裕的准备金余额为付款提供资金，付款仍然对收款高度敏感。通过揭示支付行为所反映的流动性约束，我们的结果为准备金充足性的阈值提供了见解。鉴于全球各国央行因应对通胀而持续缩减资产负债表，我们的发现具有时效性。

papers.title: Why Transform Y? A Critical Assessment of Dependent-Variable Transformations in Regression Models for Skewed and Sometimes-Zero Outcomes
papers.authors: John Mullahy, Edward C. Norton
papers.abstract: Dependent variables that are non-negative, follow right-skewed distributions, and have large probability mass at zero arise often in empirical economics. Two classes of models that transform the dependent variable y — the natural logarithm of y plus a constant and the inverse hyperbolic sine — have been widely used in empirical work. We show that these two classes of models share several features that raise concerns about their application. The concerns are particularly prominent when dependent variables are frequently observed at zero, which in many instances is the main motivation for using them in the first place. The crux of the concern is that these models have an extra parameter that is generally not determined by theory but whose values have enormous consequences for point estimates. As these parameters go to extreme values estimated marginal effects on outcomes' natural scales approach those of either an untransformed linear regression or a normed linear probability model. Across a wide variety of simulated data, two-part models yield correct marginal effects, as do OLS on the untransformed y and Poisson regression. If researchers care about estimating marginal effects, we recommend using these simpler models that do not rely on transformations.
papers.zh_title: 为何变换Y？对偏态且含零值结果变量回归模型中因变量变换的批判性评估
papers.zh_abstract: 在实证经济学中，经常出现因变量非负、呈右偏分布且在零点处有大量概率质量的情况。两类变换因变量y的模型——y加常数的自然对数变换和反双曲正弦变换——已被广泛应用于实证研究。我们表明，这两类模型具有若干共同特征，这些特征引发了对其应用的担忧。当因变量在零点处频繁出现时，这些担忧尤为突出，而在许多情况下，这恰恰是使用它们的主要动机。担忧的核心在于，这些模型有一个额外参数，该参数通常不由理论决定，但其取值对点估计结果影响巨大。当这些参数趋于极端值时，基于结果变量原始尺度估计的边际效应会趋近于未变换的线性回归或标准化线性概率模型的结果。在多种模拟数据中，两部分模型能得出正确的边际效应，未变换y的普通最小二乘回归和泊松回归也是如此。如果研究者关心的是估计边际效应，我们建议使用这些不依赖变换的简单模型。

papers.title: Productivity and Wages: What Was the Productivity-Wage Link in the Digital Revolution of the Past, and What Might Occur in the AI Revolution of the Future?
papers.authors: Edward Lazear, Kathryn L. Shaw, Grant E. Hayes, James M. Jedras
papers.abstract: Wages have been spreading out across workers over time – or in other words, the 90th/50th wage ratio has risen over time. A key question is, has the productivity distribution also spread out across worker skill levels over time? Using our calculations of productivity by skill level for the U.S., we show that the distributions of both wages and productivity have spread out over time, as the right tail lengthens for both. We add OECD countries, showing that the wage-productivity correlation exists, such that gains in aggregate productivity, or GDP per person, have resulted in higher wages for workers at the top and bottom of the wage distribution. However, across countries, those workers in the upper income ranks have seen their wages rise the most over time. The most likely international factor explaining these wage increases is the skill-biased technological change of the digital revolution. The new AI revolution that has just begun seems to be having a similar skill-biased effects on wages. But this current AI, called “supervised learning,” is relatively similar to past technological change. The AI of the distant future will be “unsupervised learning,” and it could eventually have an effect on the jobs of the most highly skilled.
papers.zh_title: 生产率与工资：过去数字革命中的生产率-工资联系是什么，未来人工智能革命中可能发生什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 随着时间的推移，工人之间的工资差距在扩大——换言之，90分位/50分位工资比率在上升。一个关键问题是，生产率分布是否也随着时间的推移在工人技能水平之间扩大？利用我们对美国各技能水平生产率的计算，我们表明工资和生产率的分布都随着时间的推移而扩大，因为两者的右尾都在延长。我们加入了经合组织国家，显示工资-生产率相关性确实存在，因此总生产率或人均国内生产总值的增长导致了工资分布顶端和底端工人工资的提高。然而，在不同国家之间，那些高收入阶层的工人工资随着时间的推移增长最多。解释这些工资增长的最可能的国际因素是数字革命中的技能偏向型技术变革。刚刚开始的新人工智能革命似乎对工资产生了类似的技能偏向效应。但这种当前的人工智能，被称为“监督学习”，与过去的技术变革相对相似。遥远未来的人工智能将是“无监督学习”，它最终可能对最高技能工人的工作产生影响。

papers.title: Corporate Decision-Making under Uncertainty: Review and Future Research Directions
papers.authors: Murillo Campello, Gaurav Kankanhalli
papers.abstract: Uncertainty over future business conditions lies at the heart of firm decision-making. Uncertainty can arise from a myriad of sources and is difficult to measure. We present a simple conceptual framework showing how several key corporate decisions are affected by uncertainty. We also highlight recent advances in the measurement of uncertainty, distinguishing between approaches that gauge aggregate uncertainty and those that capture different dimensions of firm-specific uncertainty. These approaches incorporate information obtained from market prices, big data, machine learning techniques, surveys, and more. We then review the growing body of empirical work that studies the role played by uncertainty in shaping outcomes ranging across corporate investment, asset base composition, innovation, liquidity management, payouts, and mergers. Our review outlines several opportunities for future research.
papers.zh_title: 不确定性下的企业决策：回顾与未来研究方向
papers.zh_abstract: 未来商业条件的不确定性是企业决策的核心。不确定性可能源于多种来源，且难以衡量。我们提出了一个简单的概念框架，展示了几个关键的企业决策如何受到不确定性的影响。我们还强调了不确定性衡量方面的最新进展，区分了衡量总体不确定性的方法和捕捉企业特定不确定性不同维度的方法。这些方法整合了从市场价格、大数据、机器学习技术、调查等渠道获得的信息。然后，我们回顾了越来越多的实证研究，这些研究探讨了不确定性在塑造企业投资、资产基础构成、创新、流动性管理、支出和并购等结果中所起的作用。我们的回顾概述了未来研究的若干机会。

papers.title: When Will Arctic Sea Ice Disappear? Projections of Area, Extent, Thickness, and Volume
papers.authors: Francis X. Diebold, Glenn D. Rudebusch, Maximilian Göbel, Philippe Goulet Coulombe, Boyuan Zhang
papers.abstract: Rapidly diminishing Arctic summer sea ice is a strong signal of the pace of global climate change. We provide point, interval, and density forecasts for four measures of Arctic sea ice: area, extent, thickness, and volume. Importantly, we enforce the joint constraint that these measures must simultaneously arrive at an ice-free Arctic. We apply this constrained joint forecast procedure to models relating sea ice to atmospheric carbon dioxide concentration and models relating sea ice directly to time. The resulting "carbon-trend" and "time-trend" projections are mutually consistent and predict a nearly ice-free summer Arctic Ocean by the mid-2030s with an 80% probability. Moreover, the carbon-trend projections show that global adoption of a lower carbon path would likely delay the arrival of a seasonally ice-free Arctic by only a few years.
papers.zh_title: 北极海冰何时消失？面积、范围、厚度和体积的预测
papers.zh_abstract: 北极夏季海冰的迅速减少是全球气候变化速度的一个强烈信号。我们提供了北极海冰四个衡量指标的点预测、区间预测和密度预测：面积、范围、厚度和体积。重要的是，我们强制执行这些指标必须同时达到无冰北极的联合约束。我们将这种约束联合预测程序应用于将海冰与大气二氧化碳浓度联系起来的模型以及将海冰直接与时间联系起来的模型。由此产生的“碳趋势”和“时间趋势”预测相互一致，并预测到21世纪30年代中期，北极夏季海洋几乎无冰的概率为80%。此外，碳趋势预测显示，全球采用低碳路径可能只会将季节性无冰北极的到来推迟几年。

papers.title: State-Building in a Diverse Society
papers.authors: Ruth Carlitz, Ameet Morjaria, Joris M. Mueller, Philip Osafo-Kwaako
papers.abstract: Diversity can pose fundamental challenges to state-building and development. The Tanzanian Ujamaa policy—one of post-colonial Africa’s largest state-building experiments—addressed these challenges by resettling a diverse population in planned villages, where children received political education. We combine differences in exposure to Ujamaa across space and age to identify long-term impacts of the policy. Analysis of contemporary surveys shows persistent, positive effects on national identity and state legitimacy. Exposed cohorts are also more likely to marry across ethnic lines. Our preferred interpretation, supported by evidence that considers alternative hypotheses, is that changes to educational content drive our results. Our findings also point to trade-offs associated with state-building: while the policy contributed to establishing the new state as a legitimate central authority, simultaneously it lowered demands for democratic accountability.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：I28, J15, N47, P21, Z18
papers.zh_title: 多元化社会中的国家建设
papers.zh_abstract: 多样性可能对国家建设和发展构成根本性挑战。坦桑尼亚的乌贾马政策——后殖民时代非洲最大的国家建设实验之一——通过将多元化人口重新安置到规划村庄，并在那里对儿童进行政治教育，来应对这些挑战。我们结合了不同地区和年龄群体对乌贾马政策暴露程度的差异，以识别该政策的长期影响。对当代调查的分析显示，该政策对国家认同和国家合法性产生了持续的积极影响。受影响的群体也更有可能进行跨族裔通婚。我们偏好的解释是，教育内容的改变驱动了我们的结果，这一解释得到了考虑替代假设的证据支持。我们的发现也指出了与国家建设相关的权衡：虽然该政策有助于将新国家确立为合法的中央权威，但同时也降低了对民主问责的要求。

papers.title: Managers and the Management of Organizations
papers.authors: John Roberts, Kathryn L. Shaw
papers.abstract: We critically review the emerging literature in Organizational and Personnel Economics concerning the role of managers and management practices. Our focus is on the middle managers who populate the hierarchies between top executives and front-line employees. We are especially concerned with research that brings together theoretical modeling and empirical investigation.
papers.zh_title: 管理者与组织管理
papers.zh_abstract: 我们批判性地回顾了组织经济学和人事经济学中关于管理者角色和管理实践的新兴文献。我们的重点是那些处于高层管理人员和一线员工之间层级中的中层管理者。我们特别关注那些将理论建模与实证研究相结合的研究。

papers.title: Foreign and Domestic Firms: Long Run Employment Effects of Export Opportunities
papers.authors: Brian McCaig, Nina Pavcnik, Woan Foong Wong
papers.abstract: We investigate a low-income country’s long run employment response to new export opportunities. The U.S.–Vietnam Bilateral Trade Agreement reduced U.S. import tariffs on exports from Vietnam. Employment grew faster in the industries most exposed to the U.S. tariff reductions and this was driven by foreign affiliates of multinationals entering Vietnam. Foreign entrants continue to expand employment long after entry–even after 16 years. Most foreign entrants are exporters and from East Asia, highlighting that opportunities created by bilateral agreements are not just limited to signing parties. Vietnam’s subsequent capacity growth allows it to export to other markets over time.
papers.zh_title: 外国与国内企业：出口机会的长期就业效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个低收入国家对新出口机会的长期就业反应。美越双边贸易协定降低了美国对越南出口产品的进口关税。在受美国关税削减影响最大的行业中，就业增长更快，而这主要是由进入越南的跨国公司外国子公司推动的。外国进入者在进入后很长一段时间内——甚至16年后——仍在继续扩大就业。大多数外国进入者是出口商，且来自东亚，这突显了双边协定创造的机会不仅限于签署方。越南随后的产能增长使其能够随着时间的推移向其他市场出口。

papers.title: Private Sanctions
papers.authors: Oliver D. Hart, David Thesmar, Luigi Zingales
papers.abstract: We survey a representative sample of the U.S. population to understand stakeholders’ desire to see their firms leave Russia after the invasion of Ukraine. Only 37% of the respondents think that leaving Russia is a pure business decision, and only 30% think that sanctions are a pure matter for the government. If a firm does not conform to the desire to leave Russia, 66% of the respondents are willing to boycott it (exit). We randomize a (hypothetical) cost of exiting the firm. This cost has a strong effect on the stated propensity to exit. This sensitivity allows us to provide a natural $ equivalent of moral motivations for exiting. We try to distinguish deontological and impact related motives to exit, by randomizing beliefs about the impact on the firm. We find a clear effect of impact for shareholders, but not for consumers and employees. Our results continue to hold on the subsample of participants who actually donate part of their survey compensation to Ukraine. In our survey, consumers emerge as the most powerful force to control the morality of firms. We discuss the geopolitical and economic implications of a world where private corporations can discontinue profitable business relationships for moral or political reasons.
papers.zh_title: 私人制裁
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了一个具有代表性的美国人口样本，以了解利益相关者希望其公司在乌克兰入侵后离开俄罗斯的意愿。只有37%的受访者认为离开俄罗斯是一个纯粹的商业决策，只有30%的受访者认为制裁纯粹是政府的事务。如果一家公司不遵从离开俄罗斯的意愿，66%的受访者愿意抵制它（退出）。我们随机化了一个（假设的）退出公司的成本。这个成本对陈述的退出倾向有强烈影响。这种敏感性使我们能够为退出的道德动机提供一个自然的美元等价物。我们试图通过随机化关于对公司影响的信念，来区分退出相关的道义论动机和影响动机。我们发现，对股东而言，影响有明确效应，但对消费者和员工则不然。我们的结果在那些实际将部分调查报酬捐赠给乌克兰的参与者子样本中仍然成立。在我们的调查中，消费者成为控制公司道德的最强大力量。我们讨论了在一个私营公司可以因道德或政治原因终止盈利商业关系的世界中的地缘政治和经济影响。

papers.title: A Fiscal Theory of Persistent Inflation
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Renato Faccini, Leonardo Melosi
papers.abstract: We develop a new class of general equilibrium models with partially unfunded debt to propose a fiscal theory of persistent inflation. In response to business cycle shocks, the monetary authority controls inflation and the fiscal authority stabilizes debt. How- ever, the central bank accommodates unfunded fiscal shocks, causing persistent movements in inflation, output, and real interest rates. In an estimated quantitative model, fiscal inflation accounts for the bulk of inflation dynamics. In the aftermath of the pandemic, unfunded fiscal shocks sustain the recovery, but also cause a persistent increase in inflation. The model is able to predict the inflationary effects of the ARPA fiscal stimulus out of sample and with real time data.
papers.zh_title: 持续性通胀的财政理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一类新的具有部分无资金支持债务的一般均衡模型，以提出关于持续性通胀的财政理论。面对商业周期冲击，货币当局控制通胀，而财政当局稳定债务。然而，中央银行会适应无资金支持的财政冲击，导致通胀、产出和实际利率出现持续性变动。在一个估计的量化模型中，财政因素解释了通胀动态的大部分。在疫情之后，无资金支持的财政冲击维持了经济复苏，但也导致了通胀的持续上升。该模型能够利用样本外数据和实时数据预测ARPA财政刺激的通胀效应。

papers.title: Noise-Robust De-Duplication at Scale
papers.authors: Emily Silcock, Luca D'Amico-Wong, Jinglin Yang, Melissa Dell
papers.abstract: Identifying near duplicates within large, noisy text corpora has a myriad of applications that range from de-duplicating training datasets, reducing privacy risk, and evaluating test set leakage, to identifying reproduced news articles and literature within large corpora. Across these diverse applications, the overwhelming majority of work relies on N-grams. Limited efforts have been made to evaluate how well N-gram methods perform, in part because it is unclear how one could create an unbiased evaluation dataset for a massive corpus. This study uses the unique timeliness of historical news wires to create a 27,210 document dataset, with 122,876 positive duplicate pairs, for studying noise-robust de-duplication. The time-sensitivity of news makes comprehensive hand labelling feasible - despite the massive overall size of the corpus - as duplicates occur within a narrow date range. The study then develops and evaluates a range of de-duplication methods: hashing and N-gram overlap (which predominate in the literature), a contrastively trained bi-encoder, and a ``re-rank'' style approach combining a bi- and cross-encoder. The neural approaches significantly outperform hashing and N-gram overlap. We show that the bi-encoder scales well, de-duplicating a 10 million article corpus on a single GPU card in a matter of hours. We also apply our pre-trained model to the RealNews and patent portions of C4 (Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus), illustrating that a neural approach can identify many near duplicates missed by hashing, in the presence of various types of noise. The public release of our NEWS-COPY de-duplication dataset, de-duplicated RealNews and patent corpuses, and the pre-trained models will facilitate further research and applications.
papers.zh_title: 大规模噪声鲁棒的去重方法
papers.zh_abstract: 在大型、嘈杂的文本语料库中识别近似重复项具有众多应用，包括去重训练数据集、降低隐私风险、评估测试集泄露，以及在大型语料库中识别重复的新闻文章和文献。在这些不同的应用中，绝大多数工作依赖于N-gram方法。评估N-gram方法表现如何的努力有限，部分原因在于不清楚如何为大规模语料库创建无偏评估数据集。本研究利用历史新闻专线的独特时效性，创建了一个包含27,210篇文档、122,876个正例重复对的数据集，用于研究噪声鲁棒的去重。新闻的时效敏感性使得全面的手工标注成为可能——尽管语料库整体规模巨大——因为重复发生在狭窄的日期范围内。随后，本研究开发并评估了一系列去重方法：哈希和N-gram重叠（文献中占主导地位）、对比训练的双编码器，以及结合双编码器和交叉编码器的“重排序”风格方法。神经方法显著优于哈希和N-gram重叠。我们展示了双编码器具有良好的可扩展性，能够在单个GPU卡上在数小时内对1000万篇文章的语料库进行去重。我们还将预训练模型应用于C4（大规模清洗爬取语料库）的RealNews和专利部分，说明神经方法能够在存在各种类型噪声的情况下，识别出哈希方法遗漏的许多近似重复项。我们公开发布的NEWS-COPY去重数据集、去重后的RealNews和专利语料库以及预训练模型，将促进进一步的研究和应用。
