Third, those players who benefit from propinquity bias fare better both in terms of the timing of their draft picks and their initial financial contract, conditional on draft order. Finally, the effect is found to be the most pronounced in later rounds of the draft, where the Scouting Director has the greatest latitude.
papers.zh_title: 亲近滋生亲近：使用机器学习估计美国职业棒球大联盟选秀中空间邻近性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 最近关于网络形成的模型和实证工作强调了亲近性在产生强大人际联系中的重要性。然而，人们可能想知道这种见解的深度如何，因为迄今为止的实证结果依赖于调查和实验室证据。在本研究中，我们在人才分配的高风险环境中考察了亲近性：2000年至2019年的美国职业棒球大联盟（MLB）选秀（从超过100万潜在选秀球员中选出了30,000名球员）。我们的发现可以概括为四个部分。首先，在我们的环境中，亲近性依然存在且活跃，甚至延伸到我们样本的后期年份，那时更高级别的统计分析已成为常态而非例外。其次，测量的效应量是显著的，因为MLB俱乐部因亲近性偏见而获得了劣质人才，从而付出了巨大的机会成本：例如，与没有亲近性偏见选中的球员相比，他们的选秀球员最终参加MLB比赛的可能性要低38%。第三，那些受益于亲近性偏见的球员，在选秀顺位的时间以及初始财务合同方面（在控制选秀顺序后）都表现更好。最后，发现这种效应在选秀的后几轮最为显著，因为此时球探总监拥有最大的自由裁量权。

papers.title: Common Ownership, Competition, and Top Management Incentives
papers.authors: Miguel Anton, Florian Ederer, Mireia Gine, Martin C. Schmalz
papers.abstract: We present a mechanism based on managerial incentives through which common ownership affects product market outcomes. Firm-level variation in common ownership causes variation in managerial incentives and productivity across firms, which leads to intra-industry and intra-firm cross-market variation in prices, output, markups, and market shares that is consistent with empirical evidence. The organizational structure of multiproduct firms and the passivity of common owners determine whether higher prices under common ownership result from higher costs or from higher markups. Using panel regressions and a difference-in-differences design we document that managerial incentives are less performance-sensitive in firms with more common ownership.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE；JEL：D21, G32, J33, L13, L21, M12
papers.zh_title: 共同所有权、竞争与高管激励
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于管理层激励的机制，通过该机制，共同所有权影响产品市场结果。共同所有权在企业层面的差异导致管理层激励和生产率在企业间的差异，进而导致行业内和企业内跨市场的价格、产出、加成率和市场份额的差异，这与实证证据一致。多产品企业的组织结构和共同所有者的被动性决定了共同所有权下的更高价格是由更高成本还是更高加成率导致的。利用面板回归和双重差分设计，我们记录到，在共同所有权程度更高的企业中，管理层激励对业绩的敏感性较低。

papers.title: Theory for Extending Single-Product Production Function Estimation to Multi-Product Settings
papers.authors: Emmanuel Dhyne, Amil Petrin, Valerie Smeets, Frederic Warzynski
papers.abstract: We introduce a new methodology for estimating multi-product production functions. It embeds the seminal contributions of Diewert (1973) and Lau (1976) in our extended version of the semi-parametric econometric framework of Olley and Pakes (1996), where we address the simultaneity of inputs and outputs by allowing for the possibility of a possible vector of unobserved ”productivities,” all of which may be freely correlated with inputs and outputs. We show how to use the multi-product production function to recover estimates of firm-product marginal costs using the input and output elasticities by extending Hall’s (1988) single-product result to our multi-product setting using McFadden (1978). We focus on six 6-digit Belgian ”industries” that produce two products, finding all but five of the forty-eight input coefficients are positive and thirty eight are strongly significant. We find outputs are substitutes as the coefficients on ”other good output” is always negative and highly significant. 100% of marginal cost estimates are positive and close to 80% of markups are estimated to be greater than 1. We find very similar results when we move to 4-digit industries, when we use similar multi-product data from France, and when we use the trans-log approximation.
papers.zh_title: 将单一产品生产函数估计扩展到多产品环境的理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种估计多产品生产函数的新方法。它将Diewert（1973）和Lau（1976）的开创性贡献嵌入到我们扩展版的Olley和Pakes（1996）半参数计量经济学框架中，在该框架中，我们通过允许存在一个可能的未观测“生产率”向量（所有这些生产率都可能与投入和产出自由相关）来解决投入和产出的同时性问题。我们展示了如何使用多产品生产函数，通过将Hall（1988）的单一产品结果扩展到我们的多产品环境（使用McFadden（1978）），利用投入和产出弹性来恢复企业-产品边际成本的估计值。我们聚焦于生产两种产品的六个比利时6位数“行业”，发现48个投入系数中除五个外均为正，且38个高度显著。我们发现产出是替代品，因为“其他产品产出”的系数始终为负且高度显著。100%的边际成本估计值为正，近80%的加成率估计值大于1。当我们转向4位数行业、使用来自法国的类似多产品数据以及使用超越对数近似时，我们发现了非常相似的结果。

papers.title: Crypto Wash Trading
papers.authors: Lin William Cong, Xi Li, Ke Tang, Yang Yang
papers.abstract: We introduce systematic tests exploiting robust statistical and behavioral patterns in trading to detect fake transactions on 29 cryptocurrency exchanges. Regulated exchanges feature patterns consistently observed in financial markets and nature; abnormal first-significant-digit distributions, size rounding, and transaction tail distributions on unregulated exchanges reveal rampant manipulations unlikely driven by strategy or exchange heterogeneity. We quantify the wash trading on each unregulated exchange, which averaged over 70% of the reported volume. We further document how these fabricated volumes (trillions of dollars annually) improve exchange ranking, temporarily distort prices, and relate to exchange characteristics (e.g., age and userbase), market conditions, and regulation.
papers.zh_title: 加密货币洗售交易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了系统性测试，利用交易中稳健的统计和行为模式，检测29个加密货币交易所上的虚假交易。受监管的交易所呈现出金融市场和自然界中一致观察到的模式；而未受监管交易所上异常的首位数字分布、规模舍入和交易尾部分布，揭示了不太可能由策略或交易所异质性驱动的猖獗操纵行为。我们量化了每个未受监管交易所的洗售交易量，其平均占报告交易量的70%以上。我们进一步记录了这些虚构交易量（每年数万亿美元）如何提升交易所排名、暂时扭曲价格，并与交易所特征（如年龄和用户基础）、市场状况及监管相关联。
